* 8010: Faith
* 8100: The life of faith
* 8200: The character of the believer
* 8400: The tasks of the believer
* 8600: Prayer and worship of the believer
* 8700: Threats to the life of faith
* **Associated Articles:** 8010: Faith (ID: `8010@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8100: The life of faith (ID: `8100@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8200: The character of the believer (ID: `8200@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8400: The tasks of the believer (ID: `8400@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8600: Prayer and worship of the believer (ID: `8600@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8700: Threats to the life of faith (ID: `8700@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8010: Faith (id: 8010)

* 8020: faith
* 8030: trust
* **Associated Articles:** 8020: faith (ID: `8020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8030: trust (ID: `8030@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8020: faith (id: 8020)

A constant outlook of trust towards God, whereby human beings abandon all reliance on their own efforts and put their full confidence in him, his word and his promises.

* **Associated Articles:** 8021: faith, nature of (ID: `8021@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8022: faith, as basis of salvation (ID: `8022@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8023: faith, necessity of (ID: `8023@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8024: faith, and blessings of God (ID: `8024@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8025: faith, origins of (ID: `8025@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8026: faith, growth in (ID: `8026@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8027: faith, testing of (ID: `8027@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8028: faith, as a body of beliefs (ID: `8028@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8021: faith, nature of (id: 8021)

Confidence in and commitment to God and Jesus Christ. These attitudes remain sure even though the objects of faith are unseen. True faith is seen in obedient action, love and continuing good works.

The object of faith
-------------------

### God as the object of faith

**[HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)** *See also* [PSA 25:1–25:2](https://ref.ly/Ps25:1-Ps25:2), [PSA 26:1](https://ref.ly/Ps26:1); [PRO 29:25](https://ref.ly/Prov29:25); [1PE 1:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:21)

### Jesus Christ as the object of faith

**[JHN 14:1](https://ref.ly/John14:1)** *See also* [JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16), [JHN 3:18](https://ref.ly/John3:18), [JHN 3:36](https://ref.ly/John3:36), [JHN 6:68–6:69](https://ref.ly/John6:68-John6:69)

### False objects of faith

Human resources: [PSA 20:7](https://ref.ly/Ps20:7); ; [HOS 10:13](https://ref.ly/Hos10:13); [PSA 118:9](https://ref.ly/Ps118:9) *other people*; ; [PRO 28:26](https://ref.ly/Prov28:26) *self*; ; [ISA 42:17](https://ref.ly/Isa42:17) *idols*

Faith is personal trust in God
------------------------------

**[2SA 22:31](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:31)** *See also* [PSA 18:2–18:6](https://ref.ly/Ps18:2-Ps18:6), [PSA 27:13–27:14](https://ref.ly/Ps27:13-Ps27:14); [1PE 2:23](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:23)

### True faith cannot be second\-hand

**[2TI 1:5](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:5)** *See also* [JHN 4:42](https://ref.ly/John4:42)

Faith and assurance
-------------------

### Assurance accompanies faith

**[HEB 11:1](https://ref.ly/Heb11:1)** *See also* [ROM 4:19–4:21](https://ref.ly/Rom4:19-Rom4:21); [1TI 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:13); [HEB 10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:22)

### Faith may be mixed with doubt

[MAT 14:31](https://ref.ly/Matt14:31) *Simon Peter*; ; [MRK 9:24](https://ref.ly/Mark9:24) *the father of the boy with an evil spirit*; ; [JHN 20:24–20:28](https://ref.ly/John20:24-John20:28) *Thomas*

Faith and sight
---------------

**[2CO 5:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:7)**

### Faith as trust in what is unseen

**[JHN 20:29](https://ref.ly/John20:29)** *See also* [2CO 4:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:18); [HEB 11:1–11:3](https://ref.ly/Heb11:1-Heb11:3), [HEB 11:7](https://ref.ly/Heb11:7), [HEB 11:27](https://ref.ly/Heb11:27)

### Faith looks towards an unseen future

**[HEB 11:13–11:14](https://ref.ly/Heb11:13-Heb11:14)** *See also* [HEB 11:8–11:10](https://ref.ly/Heb11:8-Heb11:10) *Abraham*; [HEB 11:20–11:22](https://ref.ly/Heb11:20-Heb11:22) *Isaac, Jacob and Joseph*; [HEB 11:24–11:26](https://ref.ly/Heb11:24-Heb11:26) *Moses*

Faith and obedience
-------------------

### True faith is demonstrated in obedience

**[ROM 1:5](https://ref.ly/Rom1:5)**; **[HEB 4:2](https://ref.ly/Heb4:2)** *See also* [ROM 16:26](https://ref.ly/Rom16:26); [2CO 9:13](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:13); [1PE 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:2)

### Examples of obedient faith

Noah builds the ark: [GEN 6:22](https://ref.ly/Gen6:22); ; [HEB 11:7](https://ref.ly/Heb11:7); [GEN 12:4](https://ref.ly/Gen12:4); ; [HEB 11:8](https://ref.ly/Heb11:8); [GEN 22:1–22:10](https://ref.ly/Gen22:1-Gen22:10); ; [HEB 11:17](https://ref.ly/Heb11:17); [EXO 14:15–14:16](https://ref.ly/Exod14:15-Exod14:16) *Moses parts the sea.*; [NUM 13:30](https://ref.ly/Num13:30), [NUM 14:8–14:9](https://ref.ly/Num14:8-Num14:9); [JOS 3:5–3:13](https://ref.ly/Josh3:5-Josh3:13) *Joshua at the river Jordan*; ; [JOS 6:2–6:5](https://ref.ly/Josh6:2-Josh6:5); ; [HEB 11:30](https://ref.ly/Heb11:30); [JHN 21:4–21:6](https://ref.ly/John21:4-John21:6) *Jesus Christ's disciples, fishing*; ; [ACT 26:19](https://ref.ly/Acts26:19) *Paul*

Faith and works
---------------

### True faith is demonstrated in good deeds

**[JAS 2:14–2:26](https://ref.ly/Jas2:14-Jas2:26)** *See also* [PHP 2:17](https://ref.ly/Phil2:17); [1TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:3); [TIT 1:1](https://ref.ly/Titus1:1); [2PE 1:5](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5)

### True faith issues in love

**[GAL 5:6](https://ref.ly/Gal5:6)** *See also* [EPH 1:15](https://ref.ly/Eph1:15), [EPH 6:23](https://ref.ly/Eph6:23); [1TH 3:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:6), [1TH 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:8); [1TI 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:5), [1TI 1:14](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:14), [1TI 4:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:12)

### True faith is constantly productive

**[LUK 8:15](https://ref.ly/Luke8:15)** parallels [MAT 13:23](https://ref.ly/Matt13:23), [MRK 4:20](https://ref.ly/Mark4:20) *See also* [JHN 15:1–15:5](https://ref.ly/John15:1-John15:5)

* **Associated Passages:** Hebrews 11:6; Psalms 25:1-2; Psalms 26:1; Proverbs 29:25; 1 Peter 1:21; John 14:1; John 3:16; John 3:18; John 3:36; John 6:68-69; Psalms 20:7; Hosea 10:13; Psalms 118:9; Proverbs 28:26; Isaiah 42:17; 2 Samuel 22:31; Psalms 18:2-6; Psalms 27:13-14; 1 Peter 2:23; 2 Timothy 1:5; John 4:42; Hebrews 11:1; Romans 4:19-21; 1 Timothy 3:13; Hebrews 10:22; Matthew 14:31; Mark 9:24; John 20:24-28; 2 Corinthians 5:7; John 20:29; 2 Corinthians 4:18; Hebrews 11:1-3; Hebrews 11:7; Hebrews 11:27; Hebrews 11:13-14; Hebrews 11:8-10; Hebrews 11:20-22; Hebrews 11:24-26; Romans 1:5; Hebrews 4:2; Romans 16:26; 2 Corinthians 9:13; 1 Peter 1:2; Genesis 6:22; Genesis 12:4; Hebrews 11:8; Genesis 22:1-10; Hebrews 11:17; Exodus 14:15-16; Numbers 13:30; Numbers 14:8-9; Joshua 3:5-13; Joshua 6:2-5; Hebrews 11:30; John 21:4-6; Acts 26:19; James 2:14-26; Philippians 2:17; 1 Thessalonians 1:3; Titus 1:1; 2 Peter 1:5; Galatians 5:6; Ephesians 1:15; Ephesians 6:23; 1 Thessalonians 3:6; 1 Thessalonians 5:8; 1 Timothy 1:5; 1 Timothy 1:14; 1 Timothy 4:12; Luke 8:15; Matthew 13:23; Mark 4:20; John 15:1-5
* **Associated Articles:** 2369: Jesus Christ, responses to (ID: `2369@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4020: life, of faith (ID: `4020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8031: trust, importance of (ID: `8031@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8104: assurance (ID: `8104@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8207: commitment (ID: `8207@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8213: confidence (ID: `8213@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8292: love (ID: `8292@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8354: trustworthiness (ID: `8354@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8442: good works (ID: `8442@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8454: obedience, to God (ID: `8454@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8722: doubt, nature of (ID: `8722@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9610: hope (ID: `9610@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8022: faith, as basis of salvation (id: 8022)

Both in the OT and in the NT faith is the only basis of salvation. Faith is the means by which God's grace in Christ, and with him the blessings of salvation, is received. Paul's doctrine of justification by faith emphasises the centrality of faith in the Christian life.

Salvation by faith in the OT
----------------------------

**[HAB 2:4](https://ref.ly/Hab2:4)**

### The faith of Abraham and other individuals

**[GEN 15:6](https://ref.ly/Gen15:6)** *See also* [ROM 4:9–4:16](https://ref.ly/Rom4:9-Rom4:16) *Abraham, the father of those righteous by faith*; [HEB 11:4](https://ref.ly/Heb11:4) *Abel*; [HEB 11:5](https://ref.ly/Heb11:5) *Enoch*; [HEB 11:7](https://ref.ly/Heb11:7) *Noah*

Salvation by faith in the NT
----------------------------

**[ROM 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Rom1:16-Rom1:17)** *See also* [1CO 1:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:21); [PHP 3:8–3:9](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8-Phil3:9)

### Salvation through faith alone

**[EPH 2:8–2:9](https://ref.ly/Eph2:8-Eph2:9)** *See also* [ROM 3:27–3:28](https://ref.ly/Rom3:27-Rom3:28), [ROM 4:1–4:8](https://ref.ly/Rom4:1-Rom4:8); [PSA 32:1–32:2](https://ref.ly/Ps32:1-Ps32:2); [ROM 9:30–9:32](https://ref.ly/Rom9:30-Rom9:32); [GAL 3:10–3:14](https://ref.ly/Gal3:10-Gal3:14); [DEU 27:26](https://ref.ly/Deut27:26)

### Salvation is by faith in Jesus Christ

**[JHN 3:14–3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:14-John3:16)** *Being “lifted up” is a reference to Jesus Christ's death on the cross*; **[ROM 10:9–10:10](https://ref.ly/Rom10:9-Rom10:10)** *The necessity of outward confession, as evidence of personal faith in Jesus Christ.* *See also* [JHN 8:24](https://ref.ly/John8:24); [ACT 8:37](https://ref.ly/Acts8:37), [ACT 13:38–13:39](https://ref.ly/Acts13:38-Acts13:39); [ROM 3:21–3:26](https://ref.ly/Rom3:21-Rom3:26), [ROM 4:24](https://ref.ly/Rom4:24); [2CO 4:13–4:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:13-2Cor4:14); [GAL 3:22](https://ref.ly/Gal3:22)

### Salvation is for all who believe

**[ROM 10:4](https://ref.ly/Rom10:4)** *Jesus Christ is the “end of the law”, in the sense that he brings it to its goal and fulfilment, and accomplishes its intentions.* *See also* [ACT 15:7–15:9](https://ref.ly/Acts15:7-Acts15:9); [ROM 3:29–3:30](https://ref.ly/Rom3:29-Rom3:30)

### Salvation is for those who persevere in their faith

**[COL 1:21–1:23](https://ref.ly/Col1:21-Col1:23)** *See also* [HEB 3:14](https://ref.ly/Heb3:14), [HEB 6:11–6:12](https://ref.ly/Heb6:11-Heb6:12)

### Saving faith shows itself in action

**[JAS 2:14](https://ref.ly/Jas2:14)**

Blessings of salvation received through faith
---------------------------------------------

### Justification and peace with God

*See also* [ROM 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Rom5:1-Rom5:2); [GAL 2:15–2:16](https://ref.ly/Gal2:15-Gal2:16), [GAL 5:5](https://ref.ly/Gal5:5)

### Forgiveness

[LUK 7:48–7:50](https://ref.ly/Luke7:48-Luke7:50); ; [ACT 10:43](https://ref.ly/Acts10:43)

### Adoption into God's family

[JHN 1:12](https://ref.ly/John1:12); ; [GAL 3:26](https://ref.ly/Gal3:26)

### The gift of the Holy Spirit

[JHN 7:38–7:39](https://ref.ly/John7:38-John7:39); ; [GAL 3:2](https://ref.ly/Gal3:2); ; [EPH 1:13](https://ref.ly/Eph1:13)

### Jesus Christ in the heart

[EPH 3:17](https://ref.ly/Eph3:17)

### Protection through God's power

[1PE 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:5)

### Access to God

[EPH 3:12](https://ref.ly/Eph3:12); ; [HEB 10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:22)

### Sanctification

[ACT 26:17–26:18](https://ref.ly/Acts26:17-Acts26:18)

### New life

[GAL 2:20](https://ref.ly/Gal2:20)

### Eternal life

[JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16), [JHN 3:36](https://ref.ly/John3:36), [JHN 5:24](https://ref.ly/John5:24), [JHN 6:40](https://ref.ly/John6:40), [JHN 6:47](https://ref.ly/John6:47)

### Victory over death

[JHN 11:25–11:27](https://ref.ly/John11:25-John11:27)

* **Associated Passages:** Habakkuk 2:4; Genesis 15:6; Romans 4:9-16; Hebrews 11:4; Hebrews 11:5; Hebrews 11:7; Romans 1:16-17; 1 Corinthians 1:21; Philippians 3:8-9; Ephesians 2:8-9; Romans 3:27-28; Romans 4:1-8; Psalms 32:1-2; Romans 9:30-32; Galatians 3:10-14; Deuteronomy 27:26; John 3:14-16; Romans 10:9-10; John 8:24; Acts 8:37; Acts 13:38-39; Romans 3:21-26; Romans 4:24; 2 Corinthians 4:13-14; Galatians 3:22; Romans 10:4; Acts 15:7-9; Romans 3:29-30; Colossians 1:21-23; Hebrews 3:14; Hebrews 6:11-12; James 2:14; Romans 5:1-2; Galatians 2:15-16; Galatians 5:5; Luke 7:48-50; Acts 10:43; John 1:12; Galatians 3:26; John 7:38-39; Galatians 3:2; Ephesians 1:13; Ephesians 3:17; 1 Peter 1:5; Ephesians 3:12; Hebrews 10:22; Acts 26:17-18; Galatians 2:20; John 3:16; John 3:36; John 5:24; John 6:40; John 6:47; John 11:25-27

## 8023: faith, necessity of (id: 8023)

A fundamental duty for all people and the necessary response to God's self\-revelation. The only channel through which God's blessings may be received, and the only means by which life may be made meaningful, in relationship with God.

The call to faith
-----------------

### In the OT

**[PSA 37:3–37:5](https://ref.ly/Ps37:3-Ps37:5)** *See also* [PRO 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5-Prov3:6); [ISA 26:4](https://ref.ly/Isa26:4), [ISA 50:10](https://ref.ly/Isa50:10)

### In the NT

**[JHN 6:28–6:29](https://ref.ly/John6:28-John6:29)** *See also* [MRK 1:15](https://ref.ly/Mark1:15); [ACT 16:30–16:31](https://ref.ly/Acts16:30-Acts16:31), [ACT 19:4](https://ref.ly/Acts19:4), [ACT 20:21](https://ref.ly/Acts20:21); [ROM 1:5](https://ref.ly/Rom1:5); [1JN 3:23](https://ref.ly/1John3:23)

God's self\-revelation leaves no excuse for unbelief
----------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 14:8–14:11](https://ref.ly/John14:8-John14:11)**; **[ROM 10:17–10:18](https://ref.ly/Rom10:17-Rom10:18)** *See also* [PSA 19:4](https://ref.ly/Ps19:4); [JHN 1:10–1:12](https://ref.ly/John1:10-John1:12); [ROM 1:18–1:21](https://ref.ly/Rom1:18-Rom1:21), [ROM 3:1–3:4](https://ref.ly/Rom3:1-Rom3:4); [PSA 51:4](https://ref.ly/Ps51:4); [ROM 16:25–16:27](https://ref.ly/Rom16:25-Rom16:27)

The need for faith in God
-------------------------

### The LORD is the only true God

**[HAB 2:18–2:20](https://ref.ly/Hab2:18-Hab2:20)** *See also* [PSA 115:2–115:11](https://ref.ly/Ps115:2-Ps115:11)

### God alone can be trusted absolutely

**[PSA 9:10](https://ref.ly/Ps9:10)** *See also* [PSA 91:1–91:4](https://ref.ly/Ps91:1-Ps91:4); [ISA 12:2](https://ref.ly/Isa12:2); [NAM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Nah1:7)

### Faith in God is the basis for peace

**[ISA 26:3](https://ref.ly/Isa26:3)** *See also* [PSA 42:11](https://ref.ly/Ps42:11); [JHN 14:1](https://ref.ly/John14:1); [ROM 15:13](https://ref.ly/Rom15:13); [2PE 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:1-2Pet1:2)

### Faith is necessary to receive God's blessing

**[HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)** *See also* [PSA 40:4](https://ref.ly/Ps40:4); [JER 17:7–17:8](https://ref.ly/Jer17:7-Jer17:8); [JHN 5:24](https://ref.ly/John5:24)

### Faith is necessary to avoid God's judgment

**[JHN 3:36](https://ref.ly/John3:36)** *See also* [JHN 3:18](https://ref.ly/John3:18); [2TH 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:12); [1PE 2:6–2:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:6-1Pet2:8); [ISA 28:16](https://ref.ly/Isa28:16); [PSA 118:22](https://ref.ly/Ps118:22); [ISA 8:14](https://ref.ly/Isa8:14)

Actions not springing from faith are sinful
-------------------------------------------

**[ROM 14:23](https://ref.ly/Rom14:23)** *See also* [ROM 14:5–14:8](https://ref.ly/Rom14:5-Rom14:8), [ROM 14:14](https://ref.ly/Rom14:14)

Unbelief challenged
-------------------

[HEB 3:12–3:18](https://ref.ly/Heb3:12-Heb3:18); ; [PSA 95:7–95:8](https://ref.ly/Ps95:7-Ps95:8) *comparison with the Israelites in the wilderness*; ; [ISA 7:9](https://ref.ly/Isa7:9) *Ahaz, king of Judah*; ; [JER 17:5–17:6](https://ref.ly/Jer17:5-Jer17:6) *the people of Judah*; ; [MRK 16:14](https://ref.ly/Mark16:14) *Jesus Christ's disciples after the resurrection*

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 37:3-5; Proverbs 3:5-6; Isaiah 26:4; Isaiah 50:10; John 6:28-29; Mark 1:15; Acts 16:30-31; Acts 19:4; Acts 20:21; Romans 1:5; 1 John 3:23; John 14:8-11; Romans 10:17-18; Psalms 19:4; John 1:10-12; Romans 1:18-21; Romans 3:1-4; Psalms 51:4; Romans 16:25-27; Habakkuk 2:18-20; Psalms 115:2-11; Psalms 9:10; Psalms 91:1-4; Isaiah 12:2; Nahum 1:7; Isaiah 26:3; Psalms 42:11; John 14:1; Romans 15:13; 2 Peter 1:1-2; Hebrews 11:6; Psalms 40:4; Jeremiah 17:7-8; John 5:24; John 3:36; John 3:18; 2 Thessalonians 2:12; 1 Peter 2:6-8; Isaiah 28:16; Psalms 118:22; Isaiah 8:14; Romans 14:23; Romans 14:5-8; Romans 14:14; Hebrews 3:12-18; Psalms 95:7-8; Isaiah 7:9; Jeremiah 17:5-6; Mark 16:14

## 8024: faith, and blessings of God (id: 8024)

Confidence in the ability and willingness of God to act in supernatural power to advance his kingdom, and a commitment, expressed in prayer and action, to being the means by which he does so.

God's power is released through faith
-------------------------------------

**[MAT 17:20](https://ref.ly/Matt17:20)** *See also* [MRK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Mark9:23); [LUK 17:6](https://ref.ly/Luke17:6)

### Praying in faith

**[MAT 21:21–21:22](https://ref.ly/Matt21:21-Matt21:22)** parallel [MRK 11:22–11:24](https://ref.ly/Mark11:22-Mark11:24) *See also* [JAS 1:5–1:7](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5-Jas1:7), [JAS 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/Jas5:14-Jas5:15)

### Praying in Jesus Christ's name

**[JHN 14:12–14:14](https://ref.ly/John14:12-John14:14)**

In the OT, faith in God's power
-------------------------------

**[HEB 11:32–11:34](https://ref.ly/Heb11:32-Heb11:34)** *See also* [HEB 11:11–11:12](https://ref.ly/Heb11:11-Heb11:12) *Abraham's faith when promised an heir in his old age*; [JOS 14:6–14:14](https://ref.ly/Josh14:6-Josh14:14) *Caleb receives Hebron*; [1SA 14:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:6) *Jonathan's confidence in God's power to defeat the Philistines*; [1SA 17:32–17:47](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:32-1Sam17:47) *David's confidence in God's power to overcome Goliath*; [2CH 20:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:20) *Jehoshaphat's faith in God's power to give success against Moab and Ammon*; [2CH 32:7–32:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:7-2Chr32:8) *Hezekiah's faith in God when threatened by the Assyrians under Sennacherib*; [DAN 6:23](https://ref.ly/Dan6:23) *Daniel's faith when in the lions' den*

In the NT, healing in response to faith
---------------------------------------

**[MAT 9:22](https://ref.ly/Matt9:22)** parallels [MRK 5:34](https://ref.ly/Mark5:34), [LUK 8:48](https://ref.ly/Luke8:48) *The woman had exercised faith by touching the edge of Jesus Christ's cloak.* *See also* [MAT 9:29–9:30](https://ref.ly/Matt9:29-Matt9:30) *Two blind men are healed*; [MRK 10:52](https://ref.ly/Mark10:52) parallel [LUK 18:42](https://ref.ly/Luke18:42) *Bartimaeus receives his sight*; [LUK 17:19](https://ref.ly/Luke17:19) *One of the ten men with leprosy who thanked Jesus Christ*; [ACT 3:16](https://ref.ly/Acts3:16) *the crippled man at the temple gate*; [ACT 14:8–14:10](https://ref.ly/Acts14:8-Acts14:10) *the crippled man in Lystra*

Powerful ministries marked by faith
-----------------------------------

**[ACT 11:24](https://ref.ly/Acts11:24)** *See also* [ACT 6:5–6:10](https://ref.ly/Acts6:5-Acts6:10) *Stephen*; [1CO 12:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:9) *Exceptional faith to meet specific needs is a special spiritual gift.*

Faith and spiritual warfare
---------------------------

**[EPH 6:16](https://ref.ly/Eph6:16)** *See also* [1TH 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:8); [1JN 5:4–5:5](https://ref.ly/1John5:4-1John5:5)

The importance of love accompanying faith
-----------------------------------------

**[1CO 13:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:2)**

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 17:20; Mark 9:23; Luke 17:6; Matthew 21:21-22; Mark 11:22-24; James 1:5-7; James 5:14-15; John 14:12-14; Hebrews 11:32-34; Hebrews 11:11-12; Joshua 14:6-14; 1 Samuel 14:6; 1 Samuel 17:32-47; 2 Chronicles 20:20; 2 Chronicles 32:7-8; Daniel 6:23; Matthew 9:22; Mark 5:34; Luke 8:48; Matthew 9:29-30; Mark 10:52; Luke 18:42; Luke 17:19; Acts 3:16; Acts 14:8-10; Acts 11:24; Acts 6:5-10; 1 Corinthians 12:9; Ephesians 6:16; 1 Thessalonians 5:8; 1 John 5:4-5; 1 Corinthians 13:2
* **Associated Articles:** 1105: God, power of (ID: `1105@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1415: miracles (ID: `1415@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2351: Jesus Christ, miracles of (ID: `2351@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3030: Holy Spirit, power of (ID: `3030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5333: healing (ID: `5333@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8162: spiritual vitality (ID: `8162@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8207: commitment (ID: `8207@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8304: loyalty (ID: `8304@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8482: spiritual warfare (ID: `8482@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8612: prayer, and faith (ID: `8612@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8720: double-mindedness (ID: `8720@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8738: evil, victory over (ID: `8738@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8025: faith, origins of (id: 8025)

Faith is a gift from God himself and is not to be seen as the result of human striving or achievement. Faith is inspired by the word and works of God.

Faith is a gift from God
------------------------

**[JHN 6:63–6:65](https://ref.ly/John6:63-John6:65)**; **[EPH 2:8–2:9](https://ref.ly/Eph2:8-Eph2:9)** *See also* [MAT 16:15–16:17](https://ref.ly/Matt16:15-Matt16:17); [MRK 9:24](https://ref.ly/Mark9:24); [LUK 17:5](https://ref.ly/Luke17:5); [ACT 3:16](https://ref.ly/Acts3:16), [ACT 14:27](https://ref.ly/Acts14:27), [ACT 18:27](https://ref.ly/Acts18:27); [ROM 12:3](https://ref.ly/Rom12:3); [1CO 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:7), [1CO 12:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:9); [PHP 1:29](https://ref.ly/Phil1:29); [JAS 2:5](https://ref.ly/Jas2:5)

Faith comes through God's word
------------------------------

### Faith following a direct word from God

[HEB 11:29–11:30](https://ref.ly/Heb11:29-Heb11:30); ; [EXO 14:15](https://ref.ly/Exod14:15) *Moses receives God's instructions at the Red Sea*; ; [JOS 6:2–6:5](https://ref.ly/Josh6:2-Josh6:5) *Joshua receives God's instructions concerning Jericho*; ; [ACT 27:23–27:25](https://ref.ly/Acts27:23-Acts27:25)

### Faith through the Scriptures

[JHN 2:22](https://ref.ly/John2:22), [JHN 20:30–20:31](https://ref.ly/John20:30-John20:31); ; [2TI 3:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:15)

### Faith comes through hearing God's word preached

**[ROM 10:14–10:17](https://ref.ly/Rom10:14-Rom10:17)** *See also* [ISA 52:7](https://ref.ly/Isa52:7), [ISA 53:1](https://ref.ly/Isa53:1); [JHN 1:7](https://ref.ly/John1:7), [JHN 4:41–4:42](https://ref.ly/John4:41-John4:42), [JHN 17:20](https://ref.ly/John17:20); [ACT 11:19–11:21](https://ref.ly/Acts11:19-Acts11:21); [1CO 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:4-1Cor2:5)

Faith comes through a personal encounter with Jesus Christ
----------------------------------------------------------

[JHN 9:35–9:38](https://ref.ly/John9:35-John9:38), [JHN 20:26–20:28](https://ref.ly/John20:26-John20:28)

Faith comes through witnessing miracles
---------------------------------------

**[JHN 14:11](https://ref.ly/John14:11)** *See also* [JHN 2:11](https://ref.ly/John2:11) *the miracle at the wedding feast*; [JHN 4:53](https://ref.ly/John4:53) *Jesus Christ heals an official's son.*[JHN 11:45](https://ref.ly/John11:45), [JHN 12:11](https://ref.ly/John12:11)[ACT 9:42](https://ref.ly/Acts9:42) *the raising of Tabitha*

Faith based on knowledge of God
-------------------------------

### Knowledge of God's faithfulness leads to faith

[PSA 46:1–46:3](https://ref.ly/Ps46:1-Ps46:3); ; [LAM 3:19–3:24](https://ref.ly/Lam3:19-Lam3:24); ; [NAM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Nah1:7); ; [ACT 2:25–2:26](https://ref.ly/Acts2:25-Acts2:26)

### Knowledge of God's achievements leads to faith

[DEU 3:21–3:22](https://ref.ly/Deut3:21-Deut3:22); ; [1SA 17:34–17:37](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:34-1Sam17:37); ; [JER 14:22](https://ref.ly/Jer14:22)

* **Associated Passages:** John 6:63-65; Ephesians 2:8-9; Matthew 16:15-17; Mark 9:24; Luke 17:5; Acts 3:16; Acts 14:27; Acts 18:27; Romans 12:3; 1 Corinthians 4:7; 1 Corinthians 12:9; Philippians 1:29; James 2:5; Hebrews 11:29-30; Exodus 14:15; Joshua 6:2-5; Acts 27:23-25; John 2:22; John 20:30-31; 2 Timothy 3:15; Romans 10:14-17; Isaiah 52:7; Isaiah 53:1; John 1:7; John 4:41-42; John 17:20; Acts 11:19-21; 1 Corinthians 2:4-5; John 9:35-38; John 20:26-28; John 14:11; John 2:11; John 4:53; John 11:45; John 12:11; Acts 9:42; Psalms 46:1-3; Lamentations 3:19-24; Nahum 1:7; Acts 2:25-26; Deuteronomy 3:21-22; 1 Samuel 17:34-37; Jeremiah 14:22
* **Associated Articles:** 1105: God, power of (ID: `1105@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1416: miracles, nature of (ID: `1416@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1610: Scripture (ID: `1610@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2351: Jesus Christ, miracles of (ID: `2351@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5467: promises, divine (ID: `5467@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6669: grace, and salvation (ID: `6669@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7754: preaching (ID: `7754@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8112: certainty (ID: `8112@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8825: self-righteousness, and the gospel (ID: `8825@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8026: faith, growth in (id: 8026)

Christians are called to have a growing faith, built up by prayer and the encouragement of others, and also through testing.

Examples of growing faith
-------------------------

**[2TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3)** *See also* [ACT 16:5](https://ref.ly/Acts16:5); [2CO 10:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:15); [REV 2:19](https://ref.ly/Rev2:19)

Weak faith
----------

### Weak faith rebuked

**[MAT 6:28–6:30](https://ref.ly/Matt6:28-Matt6:30)** parallel [LUK 12:27–12:28](https://ref.ly/Luke12:27-Luke12:28) *See also* [MAT 8:26](https://ref.ly/Matt8:26) parallels [MRK 4:40](https://ref.ly/Mark4:40), [LUK 8:25](https://ref.ly/Luke8:25); [MAT 14:31](https://ref.ly/Matt14:31), [MAT 16:8](https://ref.ly/Matt16:8), [MAT 17:20](https://ref.ly/Matt17:20)

### Other examples of weak faith

[JHN 12:42–12:43](https://ref.ly/John12:42-John12:43), [JHN 19:38](https://ref.ly/John19:38); ; [ROM 14:1–14:2](https://ref.ly/Rom14:1-Rom14:2); ; [1CO 8:1–8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:1-1Cor8:13)

Strong faith
------------

### Strong faith commended and encouraged

**[HEB 10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:22)** *See also* [MAT 8:10](https://ref.ly/Matt8:10) parallel [LUK 7:9](https://ref.ly/Luke7:9); [MAT 9:20–9:22](https://ref.ly/Matt9:20-Matt9:22) parallels [MRK 5:25–5:34](https://ref.ly/Mark5:25-Mark5:34), [LUK 8:43–8:48](https://ref.ly/Luke8:43-Luke8:48); [MAT 15:28](https://ref.ly/Matt15:28) parallel [MRK 7:29](https://ref.ly/Mark7:29)

### The faith of OT leaders

[1KI 18:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:3) *Obadiah*; ; [2KI 18:5](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:5) parallel [2CH 31:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:20) *Hezekiah*

### The faith of Christian leaders

**[1TI 4:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:12)**; **[HEB 13:7](https://ref.ly/Heb13:7)** *See also* [ACT 6:5](https://ref.ly/Acts6:5) *Stephen*; [ACT 11:24](https://ref.ly/Acts11:24) *Barnabas*; [2TI 3:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:10) *Paul*[1TI 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:11); [2TI 2:22](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:22)

### Other examples of strong faith

**[HAB 3:17–3:18](https://ref.ly/Hab3:17-Hab3:18)** *See also* [JOB 13:15](https://ref.ly/Job13:15), [JOB 19:25–19:27](https://ref.ly/Job19:25-Job19:27); [MAT 14:35–14:36](https://ref.ly/Matt14:35-Matt14:36) parallel [MRK 6:56](https://ref.ly/Mark6:56); [2CO 8:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:7); [COL 2:5–2:7](https://ref.ly/Col2:5-Col2:7)

The growth of faith
-------------------

### Praying for more faith

**[LUK 17:5](https://ref.ly/Luke17:5)** *See also* [MRK 9:24](https://ref.ly/Mark9:24)

### The encouragement of others

**[2CH 32:7–32:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:7-2Chr32:8)**; **[1TH 3:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:10)** *See also* [NUM 14:6–14:9](https://ref.ly/Num14:6-Num14:9); [LUK 22:32](https://ref.ly/Luke22:32); [ACT 14:22](https://ref.ly/Acts14:22); [ROM 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/Rom1:11-Rom1:12); [1TH 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:2-1Thess3:3); [JUD 1:20](https://ref.ly/Jude1:20)

### Faith strengthened through testing

**[ROM 4:18–4:21](https://ref.ly/Rom4:18-Rom4:21)** *See also* [GEN 15:5](https://ref.ly/Gen15:5); [JAS 1:2–1:4](https://ref.ly/Jas1:2-Jas1:4); [1PE 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:6-1Pet1:7)

* **Associated Passages:** 2 Thessalonians 1:3; Acts 16:5; 2 Corinthians 10:15; Revelation 2:19; Matthew 6:28-30; Luke 12:27-28; Matthew 8:26; Mark 4:40; Luke 8:25; Matthew 14:31; Matthew 16:8; Matthew 17:20; John 12:42-43; John 19:38; Romans 14:1-2; 1 Corinthians 8:1-13; Hebrews 10:22; Matthew 8:10; Luke 7:9; Matthew 9:20-22; Mark 5:25-34; Luke 8:43-48; Matthew 15:28; Mark 7:29; 1 Kings 18:3; 2 Kings 18:5; 2 Chronicles 31:20; 1 Timothy 4:12; Hebrews 13:7; Acts 6:5; Acts 11:24; 2 Timothy 3:10; 1 Timothy 6:11; 2 Timothy 2:22; Habakkuk 3:17-18; Job 13:15; Job 19:25-27; Matthew 14:35-36; Mark 6:56; 2 Corinthians 8:7; Colossians 2:5-7; Luke 17:5; Mark 9:24; 2 Chronicles 32:7-8; 1 Thessalonians 3:10; Numbers 14:6-9; Luke 22:32; Acts 14:22; Romans 1:11-12; 1 Thessalonians 3:2-3; Jude 1:20; Romans 4:18-21; Genesis 15:5; James 1:2-4; 1 Peter 1:6-7

## 8027: faith, testing of (id: 8027)

The means through which the genuineness of faith is proved and Christian character developed. God promises to help his people during times of testing.

God allows faith to be tested
-----------------------------

### Testing proves the genuineness of faith

**[1PE 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:6-1Pet1:7)** *See also* [MAT 13:20–13:21](https://ref.ly/Matt13:20-Matt13:21) parallels [MRK 4:16–4:17](https://ref.ly/Mark4:16-Mark4:17), [LUK 8:13](https://ref.ly/Luke8:13)

### Testing develops Christian character

**[JAS 1:2–1:4](https://ref.ly/Jas1:2-Jas1:4)** *See also* [ROM 5:3–5:4](https://ref.ly/Rom5:3-Rom5:4)

### Testing purifies God's people

**[ISA 48:10](https://ref.ly/Isa48:10)** *See also* [PSA 66:10–66:12](https://ref.ly/Ps66:10-Ps66:12); [JER 9:7](https://ref.ly/Jer9:7); [ZEC 13:9](https://ref.ly/Zech13:9); [MAL 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/Mal3:2-Mal3:3); [1PE 4:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:17)

### Examples of God testing faith

Abraham is told to sacrifice Isaac: [GEN 22:1–22:2](https://ref.ly/Gen22:1-Gen22:2); ; [HEB 11:17–11:19](https://ref.ly/Heb11:17-Heb11:19); [DEU 8:2–8:5](https://ref.ly/Deut8:2-Deut8:5) *God tested Israel in the desert*; ; [JDG 7:1–7:8](https://ref.ly/Judg7:1-Judg7:8) *God reduces Gideon's army*; ; [MAT 15:21–15:28](https://ref.ly/Matt15:21-Matt15:28) parallel [MRK 7:24–7:30](https://ref.ly/Mark7:24-Mark7:30) *Jesus Christ appears to discourage the Canaanite woman*; ; [JHN 11:1–11:6](https://ref.ly/John11:1-John11:6) *Jesus Christ delays going to Bethany when Lazarus is ill.*

Means by which faith is tested
------------------------------

### God allows Satan to test faith

**[JOB 2:7](https://ref.ly/Job2:7)** *See also* [LUK 22:31](https://ref.ly/Luke22:31); [1TH 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:4-1Thess3:5); [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10)

### Difficult circumstances test faith

[1KI 17:17–17:18](https://ref.ly/1Kgs17:17-1Kgs17:18); ; [2KI 4:1](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:1), [2KI 4:27–4:28](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:27-2Kgs4:28); ; [ACT 14:22](https://ref.ly/Acts14:22); ; [2CO 11:25–11:27](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:25-2Cor11:27)

### Persecution tests faith

[DAN 6:10–6:12](https://ref.ly/Dan6:10-Dan6:12); ; [ACT 8:1–8:4](https://ref.ly/Acts8:1-Acts8:4); ; [HEB 11:35–11:38](https://ref.ly/Heb11:35-Heb11:38)

### Discouraging people test faith

[2KI 18:19–18:25](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:19-2Kgs18:25) parallels [2CH 32:10–32:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:10-2Chr32:15), [ISA 36:4–36:10](https://ref.ly/Isa36:4-Isa36:10); ; [MRK 5:35–5:36](https://ref.ly/Mark5:35-Mark5:36) parallel [LUK 8:49–8:50](https://ref.ly/Luke8:49-Luke8:50); ; [MRK 5:40](https://ref.ly/Mark5:40) parallels [MAT 9:24](https://ref.ly/Matt9:24), [LUK 8:53](https://ref.ly/Luke8:53)

God's promise of help during testing
------------------------------------

**[ISA 43:2](https://ref.ly/Isa43:2)**; **[LUK 22:32](https://ref.ly/Luke22:32)** *See also* [PSA 91:14–91:15](https://ref.ly/Ps91:14-Ps91:15); [1CO 10:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:13); [2CO 12:7–12:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:7-2Cor12:9); [1PE 5:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:10); [2PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:9)

### God's help through the encouragement of others

**[1TH 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:2-1Thess3:3)** *See also* [2CO 7:5–7:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:5-2Cor7:7)

The response to trials
----------------------

### Rejoicing at sharing Jesus Christ's suffering

[1PE 4:12–4:13](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:12-1Pet4:13)

### Praying for God's help

[HEB 4:14–4:16](https://ref.ly/Heb4:14-Heb4:16); ; [1PE 4:19](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:19)

### Persevering

**[JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12)** *See also* [2TH 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:4); [HEB 12:1–12:3](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1-Heb12:3); [JAS 5:11](https://ref.ly/Jas5:11); [REV 2:3](https://ref.ly/Rev2:3), [REV 2:19](https://ref.ly/Rev2:19)

Examples of faith victorious through testing
--------------------------------------------

[GEN 22:9–22:12](https://ref.ly/Gen22:9-Gen22:12) *Abraham*; ; [2KI 6:15–6:17](https://ref.ly/2Kgs6:15-2Kgs6:17) *Elisha's servant*; ; [JOB 1:22](https://ref.ly/Job1:22) *Job*; ; [DAN 3:16–3:27](https://ref.ly/Dan3:16-Dan3:27) *Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego*; ; [ACT 5:27–5:29](https://ref.ly/Acts5:27-Acts5:29) *the apostles*; ; [ACT 7:59–7:60](https://ref.ly/Acts7:59-Acts7:60) *Stephen*; ; [2CO 4:7–4:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:7-2Cor4:9) *Paul*

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Peter 1:6-7; Matthew 13:20-21; Mark 4:16-17; Luke 8:13; James 1:2-4; Romans 5:3-4; Isaiah 48:10; Psalms 66:10-12; Jeremiah 9:7; Zechariah 13:9; Malachi 3:2-3; 1 Peter 4:17; Genesis 22:1-2; Hebrews 11:17-19; Deuteronomy 8:2-5; Judges 7:1-8; Matthew 15:21-28; Mark 7:24-30; John 11:1-6; Job 2:7; Luke 22:31; 1 Thessalonians 3:4-5; Revelation 2:10; 1 Kings 17:17-18; 2 Kings 4:1; 2 Kings 4:27-28; Acts 14:22; 2 Corinthians 11:25-27; Daniel 6:10-12; Acts 8:1-4; Hebrews 11:35-38; 2 Kings 18:19-25; 2 Chronicles 32:10-15; Isaiah 36:4-10; Mark 5:35-36; Luke 8:49-50; Mark 5:40; Matthew 9:24; Luke 8:53; Isaiah 43:2; Luke 22:32; Psalms 91:14-15; 1 Corinthians 10:13; 2 Corinthians 12:7-9; 1 Peter 5:10; 2 Peter 2:9; 1 Thessalonians 3:2-3; 2 Corinthians 7:5-7; 1 Peter 4:12-13; Hebrews 4:14-16; 1 Peter 4:19; James 1:12; 2 Thessalonians 1:4; Hebrews 12:1-3; James 5:11; Revelation 2:3; Revelation 2:19; Genesis 22:9-12; 2 Kings 6:15-17; Job 1:22; Daniel 3:16-27; Acts 5:27-29; Acts 7:59-60; 2 Corinthians 4:7-9

## 8028: faith, as a body of beliefs (id: 8028)

That body of essential truth to which Christians hold. It is revealed by God and is to be passed on by faithful teachers. Believers are urged to remain true to the faith and to contend for it.

Faith as the truth that Christians believe
------------------------------------------

**[GAL 1:23](https://ref.ly/Gal1:23)**; **[1TI 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:7)** *See also* [ACT 6:7](https://ref.ly/Acts6:7); [EPH 4:5](https://ref.ly/Eph4:5); [1TI 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:2); [TIT 3:15](https://ref.ly/Titus3:15)

### Terms equivalent to \`\`the faith''

The truth: [JHN 14:6](https://ref.ly/John14:6); ; [1TI 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:15); ; [3JN 1:3](https://ref.ly/3John1:3); [ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42) *the apostles' teaching*; [GAL 1:6–1:9](https://ref.ly/Gal1:6-Gal1:9); ; [PHP 1:7](https://ref.ly/Phil1:7); [2TI 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:13-2Tim1:14) *the good deposit*

### Aspects of \`\`the faith'' summarised

[ACT 2:22–2:24](https://ref.ly/Acts2:22-Acts2:24), [ACT 2:32–2:33](https://ref.ly/Acts2:32-Acts2:33); ; [1CO 15:1–15:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:1-1Cor15:4); ; [PHP 2:5–2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5-Phil2:11); ; [COL 1:15–1:20](https://ref.ly/Col1:15-Col1:20); ; [1TI 1:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:15), [1TI 3:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:16); ; [2TI 2:11–2:13](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:11-2Tim2:13); ; [HEB 6:1–6:2](https://ref.ly/Heb6:1-Heb6:2)

The source and transmission of the faith
----------------------------------------

### The faith has been given by God

**[GAL 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/Gal1:11-Gal1:12)** *See also* [JHN 1:17](https://ref.ly/John1:17), [JHN 8:40](https://ref.ly/John8:40); [1CO 11:23](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:23); [2TI 3:16](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16); [2PE 1:21](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:21)

### The faith is passed on by apostles and teachers

**[TIT 1:9](https://ref.ly/Titus1:9)** *See also* [JHN 15:20](https://ref.ly/John15:20); [ACT 4:20](https://ref.ly/Acts4:20); [2TI 2:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:2); [2PE 1:16](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:16)

Christians must remain true to the faith
----------------------------------------

### Being strengthened in the faith

### The danger of turning from the faith

-------------------------------------

**[PHP 1:27](https://ref.ly/Phil1:27)**; **[JUD 1:3](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3)**

### Refuting false teachers

### Witnessing to the truth

[1PE 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15)

### Contending for the faith is a responsibility of leaders

## 8030: trust (id: 8030)

Reliance on and confidence in a person. Scripture affirms the total trustworthiness of God, especially in relation to his promises to his people. Christian faith is, essentially, trust in the person and character of God. While Scripture insists that believers should be able to trust one another, it also provides examples of false or misplaced trust.

* **Associated Articles:** 8031: trust, importance of (ID: `8031@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8032: trust, lack of (ID: `8032@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8031: trust, importance of (id: 8031)

Scripture emphasises the importance of putting one's trust in God. This trust, which is nurtured by an understanding of God's revealed truth, finds expression in a life lived according to his purpose. There are examples in Scripture of proper trust being placed in other people.

Grounds for trust in God
------------------------

### Trust in God's power and strength

**[EXO 14:31](https://ref.ly/Exod14:31)**; **[2TI 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:12)** *See also* [2SA 22:1–22:3](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:1-2Sam22:3) parallel [PSA 18:2–18:3](https://ref.ly/Ps18:2-Ps18:3); [PSA 9:9–9:10](https://ref.ly/Ps9:9-Ps9:10), [PSA 115:9–115:11](https://ref.ly/Ps115:9-Ps115:11), [PSA 144:1–144:2](https://ref.ly/Ps144:1-Ps144:2)

### Trust in God's unfailing love

**[PSA 13:5](https://ref.ly/Ps13:5)** *See also* [EXO 15:13](https://ref.ly/Exod15:13); [PSA 17:7](https://ref.ly/Ps17:7), [PSA 21:7](https://ref.ly/Ps21:7), [PSA 33:18](https://ref.ly/Ps33:18), [PSA 52:8](https://ref.ly/Ps52:8), [PSA 147:11](https://ref.ly/Ps147:11)

### Trust in God's salvation

**[ISA 12:2](https://ref.ly/Isa12:2)** *See also* [1SA 17:37](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:37); [PSA 22:4–22:5](https://ref.ly/Ps22:4-Ps22:5), [PSA 40:2–40:3](https://ref.ly/Ps40:2-Ps40:3); [ISA 25:9](https://ref.ly/Isa25:9)

Trust nurtured by God's revealed truth
--------------------------------------

**[PRO 22:19–22:21](https://ref.ly/Prov22:19-Prov22:21)** *See also* [PSA 18:30](https://ref.ly/Ps18:30), [PSA 119:42](https://ref.ly/Ps119:42); [PRO 30:5](https://ref.ly/Prov30:5); [JHN 12:36](https://ref.ly/John12:36), [JHN 14:1–14:3](https://ref.ly/John14:1-John14:3)

Expressions of trust in God
---------------------------

### Praise and worship

[PSA 4:5](https://ref.ly/Ps4:5), [PSA 28:7](https://ref.ly/Ps28:7), [PSA 64:10](https://ref.ly/Ps64:10); ; [DAN 3:28](https://ref.ly/Dan3:28)

### Perseverance in faith

[ISA 7:4–7:7](https://ref.ly/Isa7:4-Isa7:7); ; [JER 51:46–51:47](https://ref.ly/Jer51:46-Jer51:47); ; [2TH 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:4); ; [HEB 10:35–10:36](https://ref.ly/Heb10:35-Heb10:36), [HEB 12:2–12:3](https://ref.ly/Heb12:2-Heb12:3); ; [JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12), [JAS 5:11](https://ref.ly/Jas5:11)

### Holding on to God's promise

[1KI 8:56–8:57](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:56-1Kgs8:57); ; [PSA 130:5](https://ref.ly/Ps130:5); ; [ACT 26:7](https://ref.ly/Acts26:7); ; [ROM 4:20–4:21](https://ref.ly/Rom4:20-Rom4:21); ; [COL 1:5](https://ref.ly/Col1:5)

Jesus Christ's trust in the Father
----------------------------------

**[LUK 23:46](https://ref.ly/Luke23:46)** *See also* [PSA 31:5](https://ref.ly/Ps31:5), [PSA 22:8](https://ref.ly/Ps22:8); [MAT 27:43](https://ref.ly/Matt27:43); [HEB 2:13](https://ref.ly/Heb2:13); [ISA 8:17](https://ref.ly/Isa8:17)

King Hezekiah's trust in God
----------------------------

**[2KI 18:5–18:7](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:5-2Kgs18:7)** parallel [2CH 31:20–31:21](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:20-2Chr31:21) *See also* [2KI 18:30](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:30) parallel [ISA 36:15](https://ref.ly/Isa36:15); [2KI 19:14–19:19](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:14-2Kgs19:19) parallel [ISA 37:14–37:20](https://ref.ly/Isa37:14-Isa37:20); [2CH 32:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:20)

Further examples of trust in God
--------------------------------

[RUT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:12) *Ruth*; ; [1CH 5:20](https://ref.ly/1Chr5:20) *the tribes of Reuben, Gad and Manasseh*; ; [DAN 3:17](https://ref.ly/Dan3:17) *Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego*; ; [DAN 6:23](https://ref.ly/Dan6:23) *Daniel*; ; [ZEP 3:12](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:12) *the meek and humble*; ; [ACT 14:23](https://ref.ly/Acts14:23) *members of the NT churches*

The results of trusting in God
------------------------------

### Peace

**[ISA 26:3–26:4](https://ref.ly/Isa26:3-Isa26:4)** *See also* [ROM 15:13](https://ref.ly/Rom15:13)

### Security

**[PSA 37:3](https://ref.ly/Ps37:3)** *See also* [PSA 32:10](https://ref.ly/Ps32:10), [PSA 125:1](https://ref.ly/Ps125:1); [PRO 29:25](https://ref.ly/Prov29:25); [ISA 28:16](https://ref.ly/Isa28:16), [ISA 57:13](https://ref.ly/Isa57:13)

### Protection from danger

[PSA 25:1–25:3](https://ref.ly/Ps25:1-Ps25:3), [PSA 31:14–31:15](https://ref.ly/Ps31:14-Ps31:15), [PSA 32:7](https://ref.ly/Ps32:7), [PSA 33:18–33:22](https://ref.ly/Ps33:18-Ps33:22), [PSA 91:1–91:4](https://ref.ly/Ps91:1-Ps91:4)

### Freedom from fear

**[PSA 27:1](https://ref.ly/Ps27:1)** *See also* [PSA 23:4](https://ref.ly/Ps23:4), [PSA 34:4](https://ref.ly/Ps34:4), [PSA 56:3–56:4](https://ref.ly/Ps56:3-Ps56:4), [PSA 56:10–56:11](https://ref.ly/Ps56:10-Ps56:11), [PSA 112:7](https://ref.ly/Ps112:7)

### Prosperity

[PRO 28:25](https://ref.ly/Prov28:25) *In the OT material prosperity is often seen as a sign of the spiritual wealth that belongs to those who trust God*; ; [PRO 16:20](https://ref.ly/Prov16:20); ; [JER 17:7–17:8](https://ref.ly/Jer17:7-Jer17:8)

### Strength

[ISA 30:15](https://ref.ly/Isa30:15), [ISA 40:29–40:31](https://ref.ly/Isa40:29-Isa40:31)

### Physical life

[PSA 25:20](https://ref.ly/Ps25:20); ; [JER 39:18](https://ref.ly/Jer39:18), [JER 49:11](https://ref.ly/Jer49:11)

Trust in people
---------------

### God's servants entrusted with responsibility

**[1CO 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:1-1Cor4:2)** *See also* [LUK 16:1–16:2](https://ref.ly/Luke16:1-Luke16:2); [1TH 2:4](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:4); [2TI 1:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:14)

### Trust at home and work

[PRO 31:10–31:11](https://ref.ly/Prov31:10-Prov31:11) *A good wife gives her husband confidence*; ; [TIT 2:10](https://ref.ly/Titus2:10) *Employees should be trustworthy.*

### Examples of trusting others

**[GEN 39:4](https://ref.ly/Gen39:4)** *See also* [GEN 41:39–41:40](https://ref.ly/Gen41:39-Gen41:40); [EXO 19:9](https://ref.ly/Exod19:9) *Moses to be trusted by Israel*; [1CH 9:22](https://ref.ly/1Chr9:22) *the gatekeepers appointed by David and Samuel*; [NEH 2:6](https://ref.ly/Neh2:6) *Nehemiah is trusted by Artaxerxes to return to Jerusalem*; [DAN 5:29–6:2](https://ref.ly/Dan5:29-Dan6:2) *Daniel given responsibility*; [PHP 2:25](https://ref.ly/Phil2:25) *Paul's confidence in Epaphroditus*; [2TI 2:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:2) *Timothy to find others to be entrusted to teach the gospel*

### Continued trust in those who fail

**[JON 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Jonah3:1-Jonah3:2)** *God re\-appoints Jonah despite earlier disobedience.* *See also* [JHN 21:15](https://ref.ly/John21:15) *Jesus Christ reinstates Peter after his denial*; [ACT 15:37–15:39](https://ref.ly/Acts15:37-Acts15:39) *Barnabas gives John Mark a second chance.*

## 8032: trust, lack of (id: 8032)

Forsaking God and relying on other objects of dependence. This is futile and it provokes God's anger. Failure to trust others may be the result of a betrayal of trust in the past.

Failure to trust God
--------------------

### The nature of failure to trust God

**[JER 2:13](https://ref.ly/Jer2:13)** *See also* [DEU 31:16](https://ref.ly/Deut31:16); [ISA 8:6](https://ref.ly/Isa8:6), [ISA 65:11](https://ref.ly/Isa65:11)

### Examples of failure to trust God

**[DEU 1:32–1:33](https://ref.ly/Deut1:32-Deut1:33)** *See also* [DEU 9:23](https://ref.ly/Deut9:23); [PSA 78:21–78:22](https://ref.ly/Ps78:21-Ps78:22); [NUM 20:12](https://ref.ly/Num20:12) *Moses and Aaron*; [1KI 11:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:4) *Solomon*; [2CH 16:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr16:7) *Asa*; [REV 3:17](https://ref.ly/Rev3:17) *the church at Laodicea*

### The consequences of failure to trust God

**[HEB 10:38–10:39](https://ref.ly/Heb10:38-Heb10:39)** *See also* [HAB 2:4](https://ref.ly/Hab2:4); [LEV 26:14–26:20](https://ref.ly/Lev26:14-Lev26:20); [JER 13:24–13:25](https://ref.ly/Jer13:24-Jer13:25), [JER 46:25](https://ref.ly/Jer46:25); [HOS 10:13–10:14](https://ref.ly/Hos10:13-Hos10:14)

Objects of misplaced trust
--------------------------

### Trust in false gods

**[PSA 40:4](https://ref.ly/Ps40:4)** *See also* [DEU 31:20](https://ref.ly/Deut31:20); [PSA 4:2](https://ref.ly/Ps4:2); [ISA 42:17](https://ref.ly/Isa42:17), [ISA 47:9–47:10](https://ref.ly/Isa47:9-Isa47:10)

### Trust in alliances, real or metaphorical

**[ISA 31:1](https://ref.ly/Isa31:1)** *See also* [ISA 28:15](https://ref.ly/Isa28:15), [ISA 30:1–30:2](https://ref.ly/Isa30:1-Isa30:2); [JER 2:18](https://ref.ly/Jer2:18)

### Trust in human strength and resources

**[JER 17:5](https://ref.ly/Jer17:5)** *See also* [PSA 44:6–44:7](https://ref.ly/Ps44:6-Ps44:7), [PSA 146:3](https://ref.ly/Ps146:3); [PRO 3:5](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5), [PRO 28:26](https://ref.ly/Prov28:26); [ISA 2:22](https://ref.ly/Isa2:22), [ISA 22:8–22:11](https://ref.ly/Isa22:8-Isa22:11), [ISA 30:15–30:16](https://ref.ly/Isa30:15-Isa30:16); [EZK 16:15](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:15)

### Trust in the outward form of religion

**[MIC 6:6–6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:6-Mic6:8)** *See also* [JER 7:14](https://ref.ly/Jer7:14) *trust in the temple*; [JER 28:15](https://ref.ly/Jer28:15) *trust in false prophecy*; [JHN 8:33](https://ref.ly/John8:33) *trust in descent from Abraham*; [ROM 2:17](https://ref.ly/Rom2:17) *trust in possession of the law*

### Trust in one's own righteousness

**[ROM 3:19–3:20](https://ref.ly/Rom3:19-Rom3:20)** *See also* [EZK 33:13](https://ref.ly/Ezek33:13); [LUK 18:9](https://ref.ly/Luke18:9)

### Trust in wealth

**[1TI 6:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17)** *See also* [JOB 31:24–31:25](https://ref.ly/Job31:24-Job31:25); [PSA 49:5–49:6](https://ref.ly/Ps49:5-Ps49:6), [PSA 52:7](https://ref.ly/Ps52:7), [PSA 62:10](https://ref.ly/Ps62:10); [PRO 11:28](https://ref.ly/Prov11:28); [JER 48:7](https://ref.ly/Jer48:7), [JER 49:4](https://ref.ly/Jer49:4); [LUK 12:18–12:20](https://ref.ly/Luke12:18-Luke12:20)

## 8102: abiding in Christ (id: 8102)

The NT stresses the need for believers to remain in Christ. The reality of this close personal relationship with Jesus Christ is expressed in obedience to his word and is essential to effective discipleship.

Jesus Christ tells his disciples to abide in him
------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 15:4–15:9](https://ref.ly/John15:4-John15:9)** *See also* [MAT 24:10–24:13](https://ref.ly/Matt24:10-Matt24:13); [LUK 9:62](https://ref.ly/Luke9:62); [JHN 6:67](https://ref.ly/John6:67)

NT writers exhort believers to abide in Christ
----------------------------------------------

**[COL 2:6](https://ref.ly/Col2:6)** *See also* [GAL 4:9](https://ref.ly/Gal4:9), [GAL 5:5–5:6](https://ref.ly/Gal5:5-Gal5:6); [COL 3:1–3:3](https://ref.ly/Col3:1-Col3:3); [HEB 12:1–12:3](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1-Heb12:3)

Abiding in Christ depends upon holding on to his teaching
---------------------------------------------------------

**[1JN 2:24](https://ref.ly/1John2:24)** *See also* [JHN 8:31](https://ref.ly/John8:31); [2TH 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:15); [2TI 3:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:14); [2JN 1:9](https://ref.ly/2John1:9); [3JN 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/3John1:3-3John1:4)

### It depends on obedience to him

**[JHN 15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:10)** *See also* [MAT 7:24–7:25](https://ref.ly/Matt7:24-Matt7:25); [JHN 14:23](https://ref.ly/John14:23); [JAS 1:25](https://ref.ly/Jas1:25); [1JN 3:24](https://ref.ly/1John3:24)

### It requires living like Jesus Christ

**[1JN 2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:6)**

Aids to abiding in Christ
-------------------------

### Eating his flesh and drinking his blood

**[JHN 6:56](https://ref.ly/John6:56)** *[Jn 6:35–40](https://ref.ly/John6:35-John6:40) gives the primary explanation of this verse as being a metaphor of the believer coming in faith to Jesus Christ, “the bread of life”. But the verse also reflects the language of the Lord's Supper.*

### The Spirit's anointing

**[1JN 2:27](https://ref.ly/1John2:27)** *See also* [JHN 14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:17), [JHN 14:23](https://ref.ly/John14:23); [ROM 8:9](https://ref.ly/Rom8:9); [1JN 3:24](https://ref.ly/1John3:24)

Jesus Christ abides in believers
--------------------------------

**[JHN 15:4](https://ref.ly/John15:4)** *It is clear that the believer's “abiding in Christ” and Jesus Christ's “abiding in him” are closely connected, although the verse does not make their exact relationship clear. Because of Jesus Christ's indwelling by his Spirit, believers are able to continue to live as his disciples; as they do so, the reality of his indwelling presence is deepened.* *See also* [JHN 17:23](https://ref.ly/John17:23); [COL 1:27](https://ref.ly/Col1:27); [1JN 3:24](https://ref.ly/1John3:24); [REV 3:20](https://ref.ly/Rev3:20)

### By his Spirit

[JHN 14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:17); ; [ROM 8:9–8:10](https://ref.ly/Rom8:9-Rom8:10); ; [1CO 3:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:16); ; [1JN 2:27](https://ref.ly/1John2:27)

### By faith

[EPH 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:17-Eph3:19); ; [GAL 2:20](https://ref.ly/Gal2:20)

Results of abiding in Christ
----------------------------

### Fruitfulness

**[JHN 15:4–15:5](https://ref.ly/John15:4-John15:5)** *The picture of “bearing fruit” may cover many aspects of Christian life but it includes that of developing Christian character, effective Christian service and mission. These result, not from human effort, but from abiding in Christ.* *See also* [GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23)

### Answered prayer

[JHN 15:7](https://ref.ly/John15:7), [JHN 15:16](https://ref.ly/John15:16)

### Freedom from persistent sin

**[1JN 3:6–3:9](https://ref.ly/1John3:6-1John3:9)** *John is not saying that Christians are absolutely sinless. He says elsewhere that to claim sinless perfection is to deceive oneself ([1Jn 1:8](https://ref.ly/1John1:8)). But when people are born again there is the real possibility of living lives in which sin is not the norm. As believers abide in Christ more deeply, the grip of sin upon their lives is lessened.*

### Relationship with God the Father

*See also* [JHN 14:23](https://ref.ly/John14:23); [2JN 1:9](https://ref.ly/2John1:9)

### Confidence in the face of the last day

[1JN 2:28](https://ref.ly/1John2:28)

Warnings to those who fail to abide in Christ
---------------------------------------------

[MAT 24:12–24:13](https://ref.ly/Matt24:12-Matt24:13); ; [JHN 15:2](https://ref.ly/John15:2), [JHN 15:6](https://ref.ly/John15:6); ; [1CO 15:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:2); ; [HEB 6:4–6:6](https://ref.ly/Heb6:4-Heb6:6)

* **Associated Passages:** John 15:4-9; Matthew 24:10-13; Luke 9:62; John 6:67; Colossians 2:6; Galatians 4:9; Galatians 5:5-6; Colossians 3:1-3; Hebrews 12:1-3; 1 John 2:24; John 8:31; 2 Thessalonians 2:15; 2 Timothy 3:14; 2 John 1:9; 3 John 1:3-4; John 15:10; Matthew 7:24-25; John 14:23; James 1:25; 1 John 3:24; 1 John 2:6; John 6:56; John 6:35-40; 1 John 2:27; John 14:17; Romans 8:9; John 15:4; John 17:23; Colossians 1:27; Revelation 3:20; Romans 8:9-10; 1 Corinthians 3:16; Ephesians 3:17-19; Galatians 2:20; John 15:4-5; Galatians 5:22-23; John 15:7; John 15:16; 1 John 3:6-9; 1 John 1:8; 1 John 2:28; Matthew 24:12-13; John 15:2; John 15:6; 1 Corinthians 15:2; Hebrews 6:4-6
* **Associated Articles:** 3254: Holy Spirit, fruit of (ID: `3254@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3278: Holy Spirit, indwelling of (ID: `3278@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6214: participation, in Christ (ID: `6214@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6705: peace, believers' experience of (ID: `6705@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6754: union with Christ (ID: `6754@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8114: discipleship (ID: `8114@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8162: spiritual vitality (ID: `8162@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8256: fruitfulness (ID: `8256@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8453: obedience (ID: `8453@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8459: perseverance (ID: `8459@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8602: prayer (ID: `8602@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8104: assurance (id: 8104)

Certainty of a present relationship with God through Jesus Christ and a secure future hope which is based upon divine revelation, centred on the person, promises and action of God and confirmed by the Holy Spirit.

* **Associated Articles:** 8105: assurance, basis of (ID: `8105@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8106: assurance, nature of (ID: `8106@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8107: assurance, and life of faith (ID: `8107@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8108: assurance, and Holy Spirit (ID: `8108@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8105: assurance, basis of (id: 8105)

The assurance of believers is based upon the certain knowledge of God revealed in creation and his mighty acts in history, upon the certainty of his promises, the vindication and resurrection of Christ and the inward testimony and outward demonstration of the power of the Holy Spirit.

Assurance is based upon the certain knowledge of God
----------------------------------------------------

### Assurance comes from knowing God through creation

**[ROM 1:19–1:20](https://ref.ly/Rom1:19-Rom1:20)** *See also* [PSA 19:1–19:4](https://ref.ly/Ps19:1-Ps19:4); [ACT 14:17](https://ref.ly/Acts14:17)

### Assurance comes from knowing God through his mighty acts

**[EXO 6:7](https://ref.ly/Exod6:7)**; **[EZK 37:13–37:14](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:13-Ezek37:14)** *See also* [EXO 16:12](https://ref.ly/Exod16:12), [EXO 29:46](https://ref.ly/Exod29:46); [JOS 3:10–3:13](https://ref.ly/Josh3:10-Josh3:13); [1KI 20:13](https://ref.ly/1Kgs20:13); [ISA 49:23](https://ref.ly/Isa49:23), [ISA 60:16](https://ref.ly/Isa60:16); [EZK 20:42](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:42), [EZK 28:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:26)

Assurance is based upon the certainty of God's word
---------------------------------------------------

[JHN 17:8](https://ref.ly/John17:8); ; [1JN 5:9–5:10](https://ref.ly/1John5:9-1John5:10)

### Assurance because of God's oath

**[HEB 6:17](https://ref.ly/Heb6:17)** *See also* [GEN 50:24](https://ref.ly/Gen50:24); [DEU 4:31](https://ref.ly/Deut4:31), [DEU 7:7–7:9](https://ref.ly/Deut7:7-Deut7:9); [ACT 2:30](https://ref.ly/Acts2:30); [HEB 7:21](https://ref.ly/Heb7:21)

### Assurance because of God's promise

**[JOS 1:9](https://ref.ly/Josh1:9)**; **[ROM 4:20–4:21](https://ref.ly/Rom4:20-Rom4:21)** *See also* [JOS 23:10](https://ref.ly/Josh23:10), [JOS 23:14](https://ref.ly/Josh23:14); [2SA 7:25–7:26](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:25-2Sam7:26) parallel [1CH 17:23–17:24](https://ref.ly/1Chr17:23-1Chr17:24); [1KI 8:56](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:56); [PSA 145:13](https://ref.ly/Ps145:13); [ISA 33:6](https://ref.ly/Isa33:6); [HEB 13:5](https://ref.ly/Heb13:5); [JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12), [JAS 2:5](https://ref.ly/Jas2:5)

Assurance is based upon God's vindication of his Son
----------------------------------------------------

### Assurance because of the resurrection of Jesus Christ

**[ACT 2:32](https://ref.ly/Acts2:32), [ACT 17:31](https://ref.ly/Acts17:31)** *See also* [ACT 1:3](https://ref.ly/Acts1:3), [ACT 1:22](https://ref.ly/Acts1:22), [ACT 10:39–10:41](https://ref.ly/Acts10:39-Acts10:41), [ACT 13:30–13:31](https://ref.ly/Acts13:30-Acts13:31); [ROM 1:4](https://ref.ly/Rom1:4); [1CO 15:3–15:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:3-1Cor15:7); [1PE 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:3)

### Assurance because of the miracles of Jesus Christ

[MAT 11:2–11:6](https://ref.ly/Matt11:2-Matt11:6) parallel [LUK 7:18–7:23](https://ref.ly/Luke7:18-Luke7:23); ; [JHN 4:48](https://ref.ly/John4:48), [JHN 10:38](https://ref.ly/John10:38), [JHN 14:11](https://ref.ly/John14:11), [JHN 20:30–20:31](https://ref.ly/John20:30-John20:31)

Assurance comes through the work of the Holy Spirit
---------------------------------------------------

### The Holy Spirit assures believers by enabling outward demonstrations of God's power

**[HEB 2:4](https://ref.ly/Heb2:4)** *See also* [MRK 16:17–16:18](https://ref.ly/Mark16:17-Mark16:18); [2CO 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:2-2Cor3:3); [1TH 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:5)

### The Holy Spirit assures believers by giving inward conviction

**[ROM 8:16](https://ref.ly/Rom8:16)**; **[1JN 4:13](https://ref.ly/1John4:13)** *See also* [JHN 15:26](https://ref.ly/John15:26), [JHN 16:8–16:11](https://ref.ly/John16:8-John16:11); [ACT 5:32](https://ref.ly/Acts5:32); [GAL 4:6](https://ref.ly/Gal4:6)

### The Holy Spirit assures believers by sealing God's promise

**[EPH 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Eph1:13-Eph1:14)** *See also* [ACT 15:8](https://ref.ly/Acts15:8); [ROM 5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:5); [2CO 1:22](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:22), [2CO 5:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:5); [EPH 4:30](https://ref.ly/Eph4:30); [1JN 3:24](https://ref.ly/1John3:24)

Assurance based upon the testimony of God's people
--------------------------------------------------

### Assurance because of the testimony of eye\-witnesses

**[2PE 1:16–1:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:16-2Pet1:19)** *See also* [EXO 10:2](https://ref.ly/Exod10:2); [LUK 1:2–1:4](https://ref.ly/Luke1:2-Luke1:4); [JHN 1:32–1:34](https://ref.ly/John1:32-John1:34), [JHN 15:27](https://ref.ly/John15:27), [JHN 19:35](https://ref.ly/John19:35); [ACT 1:22](https://ref.ly/Acts1:22), [ACT 4:20](https://ref.ly/Acts4:20); [1PE 5:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:1)

### Assurance because of the testimony of the apostles

[ACT 22:14–22:15](https://ref.ly/Acts22:14-Acts22:15); ; [1CO 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:6), [1CO 2:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:1); ; [1TH 2:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:13); ; [1TI 2:5–2:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:5-1Tim2:7); ; [REV 1:2](https://ref.ly/Rev1:2)

Assurance is based upon godly living
------------------------------------

**[1JN 2:3–2:5](https://ref.ly/1John2:3-1John2:5)** *See also* [1JN 2:23](https://ref.ly/1John2:23) *right belief about Jesus Christ*; [1JN 2:29](https://ref.ly/1John2:29) *righteousness*[1JN 3:9](https://ref.ly/1John3:9), [1JN 5:18](https://ref.ly/1John5:18)[1JN 3:14–3:20](https://ref.ly/1John3:14-1John3:20) *love for fellow believers*; [1JN 5:1](https://ref.ly/1John5:1) *love for God the Father and God the Son*

## 8106: assurance, nature of (id: 8106)

The God\-given security which believers have in the blessings of divine grace. Believers are assured of the unfailing love of God and of their relationship with him as Father, the salvation and eternal life which he offers and the sure hope of one day sharing his glory.

Assurance of a relationship with God
------------------------------------

### Assurance of God's unfailing love

**[PSA 13:5](https://ref.ly/Ps13:5)** *See also* [EXO 15:13](https://ref.ly/Exod15:13); [PSA 51:1](https://ref.ly/Ps51:1), [PSA 130:7–130:8](https://ref.ly/Ps130:7-Ps130:8); [ISA 54:10](https://ref.ly/Isa54:10); [JHN 13:1](https://ref.ly/John13:1); [1JN 4:9](https://ref.ly/1John4:9)

### Assurance of acceptance by God

[ACT 15:8](https://ref.ly/Acts15:8); ; [ROM 5:1](https://ref.ly/Rom5:1), [ROM 14:3](https://ref.ly/Rom14:3), [ROM 15:7](https://ref.ly/Rom15:7)

### Assurance of adoption as God's children

**[1JN 3:1–3:3](https://ref.ly/1John3:1-1John3:3)** *See also* [JHN 1:12–1:13](https://ref.ly/John1:12-John1:13); [ROM 8:14–8:17](https://ref.ly/Rom8:14-Rom8:17); [GAL 4:6](https://ref.ly/Gal4:6); [JAS 1:18](https://ref.ly/Jas1:18); [1JN 4:7](https://ref.ly/1John4:7), [1JN 5:1](https://ref.ly/1John5:1)

### Assurance of God's presence

**[DEU 31:8](https://ref.ly/Deut31:8)** *See also* [GEN 28:15](https://ref.ly/Gen28:15); [JOS 3:7](https://ref.ly/Josh3:7); [ISA 41:10](https://ref.ly/Isa41:10); [JER 1:8](https://ref.ly/Jer1:8); [MAT 28:20](https://ref.ly/Matt28:20); [JHN 14:18](https://ref.ly/John14:18); [ACT 18:10](https://ref.ly/Acts18:10)

### Assurance of access to God

**[EPH 3:12](https://ref.ly/Eph3:12)** *See also* [ROM 5:2](https://ref.ly/Rom5:2); [EPH 2:8](https://ref.ly/Eph2:8); [HEB 4:16](https://ref.ly/Heb4:16), [HEB 10:19–10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:19-Heb10:22)

Assurance of salvation
----------------------

**[ISA 12:2](https://ref.ly/Isa12:2)** *See also* [PSA 69:13](https://ref.ly/Ps69:13)

### Assurance of redemption

[JOB 19:25](https://ref.ly/Job19:25); ; [PSA 111:9](https://ref.ly/Ps111:9); ; [ROM 3:24](https://ref.ly/Rom3:24); ; [EPH 1:14](https://ref.ly/Eph1:14); ; [HEB 9:12](https://ref.ly/Heb9:12)

### Assurance of justification

[ROM 3:26](https://ref.ly/Rom3:26), [ROM 5:16](https://ref.ly/Rom5:16), [ROM 8:33–8:34](https://ref.ly/Rom8:33-Rom8:34); ; [1CO 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:11)

### Assurance of forgiveness

**[1JN 1:9](https://ref.ly/1John1:9)** *See also* [2CH 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:14); [PSA 32:5](https://ref.ly/Ps32:5), [PSA 103:12](https://ref.ly/Ps103:12); [ISA 43:25](https://ref.ly/Isa43:25); [JER 31:34](https://ref.ly/Jer31:34), [JER 36:3](https://ref.ly/Jer36:3); [MIC 7:18–7:19](https://ref.ly/Mic7:18-Mic7:19); [LUK 24:47](https://ref.ly/Luke24:47); [ACT 2:38](https://ref.ly/Acts2:38), [ACT 3:19](https://ref.ly/Acts3:19); [COL 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/Col2:13-Col2:14)

### Assurance of election

**[ISA 43:1](https://ref.ly/Isa43:1)**; **[EPH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Eph1:4)** *See also* [ISA 44:1–44:2](https://ref.ly/Isa44:1-Isa44:2); [ROM 8:28–8:30](https://ref.ly/Rom8:28-Rom8:30), [ROM 11:29](https://ref.ly/Rom11:29); [1CO 1:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:9); [2TI 1:9](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:9); [1PE 2:9–2:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9-1Pet2:10)

### Assurance of preservation

**[2TI 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:12)**; **[JUD 1:24](https://ref.ly/Jude1:24)** *See also* [JHN 6:39](https://ref.ly/John6:39); [ROM 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:38-Rom8:39); [2CO 4:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:14); [PHP 1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:6); [HEB 7:25](https://ref.ly/Heb7:25); [2PE 1:10](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:10)

Assurance of eternal life
-------------------------

**[JHN 3:15–3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:15-John3:16)**; **[1JN 5:11–5:13](https://ref.ly/1John5:11-1John5:13)** *See also* [MAT 19:29](https://ref.ly/Matt19:29) parallels [MRK 10:30](https://ref.ly/Mark10:30), [LUK 18:30](https://ref.ly/Luke18:30); [JHN 5:24](https://ref.ly/John5:24), [JHN 6:40](https://ref.ly/John6:40), [JHN 11:25–11:26](https://ref.ly/John11:25-John11:26), [JHN 17:2](https://ref.ly/John17:2); [1JN 1:2](https://ref.ly/1John1:2), [1JN 5:20](https://ref.ly/1John5:20)

Assurance of a future hope
--------------------------

### Assurance of confidence at Jesus Christ's return

[MAT 24:30–24:31](https://ref.ly/Matt24:30-Matt24:31) parallels [MRK 13:26–13:27](https://ref.ly/Mark13:26-Mark13:27), [LUK 21:27–21:28](https://ref.ly/Luke21:27-Luke21:28); ; [1TH 4:13–4:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:13-1Thess4:17)

### Assurance on the day of judgment

[1CO 1:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:8); ; [1TH 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:13); ; [1JN 4:17](https://ref.ly/1John4:17)

### Assurance in the hope of resurrection

[JHN 6:40](https://ref.ly/John6:40); ; [1CO 15:42–15:44](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:42-1Cor15:44); ; [PHP 3:21](https://ref.ly/Phil3:21)

### Assurance in the hope of glory

**[ROM 8:18](https://ref.ly/Rom8:18)** *See also* [ROM 5:2](https://ref.ly/Rom5:2); [COL 3:4](https://ref.ly/Col3:4); [1TH 2:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:12); [1PE 5:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:10); [REV 5:10](https://ref.ly/Rev5:10)

### Assurance in the hope of an eternal inheritance

**[ROM 8:17](https://ref.ly/Rom8:17)** *See also* [MAT 25:34](https://ref.ly/Matt25:34); [GAL 4:7](https://ref.ly/Gal4:7); [HEB 9:15](https://ref.ly/Heb9:15); [1PE 1:3–1:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:3-1Pet1:5)

### Assurance in the hope of an eternal reward

[MAT 5:12](https://ref.ly/Matt5:12) parallel [LUK 6:23](https://ref.ly/Luke6:23); ; [2TI 4:7–4:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:7-2Tim4:8); ; [JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12)

## 8107: assurance, and life of faith (id: 8107)

The completeness of conviction and confidence expressed in the life of the believer, worked by the Holy Spirit. It derives from a reliance upon God and his promises alone, and results in boldness and steadfastness in service and in the face of difficulties.

Assurance and faith
-------------------

**[DEU 9:3](https://ref.ly/Deut9:3)**; **[HEB 10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:22)** *See also* [DEU 1:21](https://ref.ly/Deut1:21); [JOS 1:9](https://ref.ly/Josh1:9); [2CH 20:17](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:17); [JHN 17:8](https://ref.ly/John17:8); [HEB 11:1](https://ref.ly/Heb11:1), [HEB 12:5](https://ref.ly/Heb12:5)

Assurance and hope
------------------

**[HEB 6:11](https://ref.ly/Heb6:11)** *See also* [PRO 23:18](https://ref.ly/Prov23:18); [HEB 6:19](https://ref.ly/Heb6:19)

Assurance expressed by believers
--------------------------------

### Assurance in adversity

**[HEB 13:6](https://ref.ly/Heb13:6)** *See also* [PSA 118:6–118:7](https://ref.ly/Ps118:6-Ps118:7), [PSA 3:6](https://ref.ly/Ps3:6), [PSA 27:3–27:5](https://ref.ly/Ps27:3-Ps27:5), [PSA 46:1–46:3](https://ref.ly/Ps46:1-Ps46:3), [PSA 71:5–71:6](https://ref.ly/Ps71:5-Ps71:6), [PSA 73:26](https://ref.ly/Ps73:26); [ROM 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:38-Rom8:39); [2CO 4:16](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:16)

### Assurance of God's promises

**[JOS 23:14](https://ref.ly/Josh23:14)** *See also* [1KI 8:56](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:56); [ROM 4:20–4:21](https://ref.ly/Rom4:20-Rom4:21); [2CO 1:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:20)

### Assurance in ministry

**[ROM 1:16](https://ref.ly/Rom1:16)**; **[1TI 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:13)** *See also* [2CO 3:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:4), [2CO 4:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:1), [2CO 5:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:14); [1TH 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:5); [2PE 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:12)

### Assurance in prayer

**[1JN 5:14](https://ref.ly/1John5:14)** *See also* [1JN 3:21–3:22](https://ref.ly/1John3:21-1John3:22)

### Assurance of God's will

**[ROM 14:5](https://ref.ly/Rom14:5)** *See also* [ROM 14:14](https://ref.ly/Rom14:14), [ROM 14:23](https://ref.ly/Rom14:23); [1CO 8:9–8:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:9-1Cor8:11)

Assurance may be strengthened
-----------------------------

### Examples of believers asking for assurance

[GEN 15:8](https://ref.ly/Gen15:8) *Abraham*; ; [EXO 33:16](https://ref.ly/Exod33:16) *Moses*; ; [JDG 6:17](https://ref.ly/Judg6:17) *Gideon*; ; [LUK 1:18](https://ref.ly/Luke1:18) *Zechariah*

### Assurance through understanding

**[COL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Col2:2)**

### Assurance through waiting on God

**[PSA 46:10](https://ref.ly/Ps46:10)** *See also* [PSA 27:14](https://ref.ly/Ps27:14), [PSA 33:20](https://ref.ly/Ps33:20); [ISA 30:15](https://ref.ly/Isa30:15), [ISA 32:17–32:18](https://ref.ly/Isa32:17-Isa32:18) *The revelation of God's righteousness among his people results in true peace.*

### Assurance strengthened by others

[2CH 32:6–32:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:6-2Chr32:8) *by example*; ; [2TI 3:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:14) *through teaching*; ; [COL 4:12](https://ref.ly/Col4:12) *through prayer*; ; [1TH 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:2-1Thess3:3) *through encouragement amidst trials*

### False teaching weakens assurance

[2TH 2:2](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:2); ; [2TI 2:18](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:18)

The delusion of false assurance
-------------------------------

### The danger of self\-assurance

[LUK 18:9–18:14](https://ref.ly/Luke18:9-Luke18:14); ; [2CO 10:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:12); ; [PHP 3:3–3:4](https://ref.ly/Phil3:3-Phil3:4)

### Such assurance proved false by conduct

**[1JN 1:6](https://ref.ly/1John1:6)** *See also* [1JN 2:9–2:11](https://ref.ly/1John2:9-1John2:11), [1JN 3:6](https://ref.ly/1John3:6), [1JN 4:20](https://ref.ly/1John4:20); [2JN 1:9](https://ref.ly/2John1:9); [3JN 1:11](https://ref.ly/3John1:11)

* **Associated Passages:** Deuteronomy 9:3; Hebrews 10:22; Deuteronomy 1:21; Joshua 1:9; 2 Chronicles 20:17; John 17:8; Hebrews 11:1; Hebrews 12:5; Hebrews 6:11; Proverbs 23:18; Hebrews 6:19; Hebrews 13:6; Psalms 118:6-7; Psalms 3:6; Psalms 27:3-5; Psalms 46:1-3; Psalms 71:5-6; Psalms 73:26; Romans 8:38-39; 2 Corinthians 4:16; Joshua 23:14; 1 Kings 8:56; Romans 4:20-21; 2 Corinthians 1:20; Romans 1:16; 1 Timothy 3:13; 2 Corinthians 3:4; 2 Corinthians 4:1; 2 Corinthians 5:14; 1 Thessalonians 1:5; 2 Peter 1:12; 1 John 5:14; 1 John 3:21-22; Romans 14:5; Romans 14:14; Romans 14:23; 1 Corinthians 8:9-11; Genesis 15:8; Exodus 33:16; Judges 6:17; Luke 1:18; Colossians 2:2; Psalms 46:10; Psalms 27:14; Psalms 33:20; Isaiah 30:15; Isaiah 32:17-18; 2 Chronicles 32:6-8; 2 Timothy 3:14; Colossians 4:12; 1 Thessalonians 3:2-3; 2 Thessalonians 2:2; 2 Timothy 2:18; Luke 18:9-14; 2 Corinthians 10:12; Philippians 3:3-4; 1 John 1:6; 1 John 2:9-11; 1 John 3:6; 1 John 4:20; 2 John 1:9; 3 John 1:11

## 8108: assurance, and Holy Spirit (id: 8108)

See [3203: Holy Spirit, and assurance](3203.md)



## 8110: athletics (id: 8110)

Sports engaged in by athletes. Scripture uses the image of running in a race to represent the Christian life. Believers should show similar perseverance as they press on to their heavenly reward.

The Christian life is like running a race
-----------------------------------------

**[ACT 20:24](https://ref.ly/Acts20:24)** *See also* [GAL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Gal2:2), [GAL 5:7](https://ref.ly/Gal5:7); [PHP 2:16](https://ref.ly/Phil2:16); [1TI 1:18–1:19](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:18-1Tim1:19)

Christians, like athletes, are to be single\-minded
---------------------------------------------------

**[2TI 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:4-2Tim2:5)** *See also* [1CO 9:24–9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:24-1Cor9:27)

Christians, like athletes, are to persevere
-------------------------------------------

**[HEB 12:1](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1)** *See also* [PHP 3:12–3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:12-Phil3:14); [1TI 6:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:12); [REV 3:11](https://ref.ly/Rev3:11)

The reward at the end of the race of life
-----------------------------------------

**[2TI 4:7–4:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:7-2Tim4:8)** *See also* [1CO 9:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:25); [JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12); [1PE 5:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:4); [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10) *The “crown” referred to is the garland or wreath awarded to the winner in athletics contests.*

The race is not necessarily won by the swiftest
-----------------------------------------------

[ECC 9:11](https://ref.ly/Eccl9:11)

* **Associated Passages:** Acts 20:24; Galatians 2:2; Galatians 5:7; Philippians 2:16; 1 Timothy 1:18-19; 2 Timothy 2:4-5; 1 Corinthians 9:24-27; Hebrews 12:1; Philippians 3:12-14; 1 Timothy 6:12; Revelation 3:11; 2 Timothy 4:7-8; 1 Corinthians 9:25; James 1:12; 1 Peter 5:4; Revelation 2:10; Ecclesiastes 9:11
* **Associated Articles:** 5178: running (ID: `5178@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5280: crown (ID: `5280@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5387: leisure, and pastimes (ID: `5387@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5498: reward (ID: `5498@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8140: prize (ID: `8140@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8207: commitment (ID: `8207@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8459: perseverance (ID: `8459@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9410: heaven (ID: `9410@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8112: certainty (id: 8112)

A sure knowledge or conviction that what is believed is true and trustworthy. Christian certainty does not arise from the credulity of the believer, but is based on the faithfulness and trustworthiness of God.

Affirmations and statements of certainty
----------------------------------------

**[JOB 19:25](https://ref.ly/Job19:25)** *See also* [JOS 23:14](https://ref.ly/Josh23:14); [PSA 27:3](https://ref.ly/Ps27:3); [DAN 3:17](https://ref.ly/Dan3:17); [MRK 5:28](https://ref.ly/Mark5:28) parallel [MAT 9:21](https://ref.ly/Matt9:21); [LUK 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/Luke1:3-Luke1:4); [ROM 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:38-Rom8:39); [PHP 3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8); [1JN 5:18–5:20](https://ref.ly/1John5:18-1John5:20)

Certainty in God
----------------

### Because of his character

**[HEB 6:18](https://ref.ly/Heb6:18)** *See also* [NUM 23:19–23:20](https://ref.ly/Num23:19-Num23:20); [DEU 7:9–7:10](https://ref.ly/Deut7:9-Deut7:10), [DEU 32:3–32:4](https://ref.ly/Deut32:3-Deut32:4); [2SA 7:28](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:28); [PSA 18:30–18:31](https://ref.ly/Ps18:30-Ps18:31); [ISA 26:4](https://ref.ly/Isa26:4)

### Because his promises are confirmed

**[HEB 6:16–6:19](https://ref.ly/Heb6:16-Heb6:19)** *See also* [ROM 15:8](https://ref.ly/Rom15:8)

### His intervention encourages certainty

**[JDG 6:36–6:40](https://ref.ly/Judg6:36-Judg6:40)** *See also* [EXO 16:6–16:8](https://ref.ly/Exod16:6-Exod16:8), [EXO 33:12–33:23](https://ref.ly/Exod33:12-Exod33:23); [JOS 3:9–3:13](https://ref.ly/Josh3:9-Josh3:13); [1KI 18:36–18:39](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:36-1Kgs18:39)

Jesus Christ's certainty about his identity and mission
-------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 13:3](https://ref.ly/John13:3)** *See also* [MRK 8:31](https://ref.ly/Mark8:31) parallels [MAT 16:21](https://ref.ly/Matt16:21), [LUK 9:22](https://ref.ly/Luke9:22); [JHN 10:14–10:18](https://ref.ly/John10:14-John10:18), [JHN 14:6–14:11](https://ref.ly/John14:6-John14:11)

Certainty and the believer
--------------------------

### Certainty about who Jesus Christ is

**[2TI 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:12)** *See also* [MAT 16:16](https://ref.ly/Matt16:16) parallels [MRK 8:29](https://ref.ly/Mark8:29), [LUK 9:20](https://ref.ly/Luke9:20); [JHN 11:27](https://ref.ly/John11:27), [JHN 20:28–20:29](https://ref.ly/John20:28-John20:29), [JHN 21:24](https://ref.ly/John21:24)

### Certainty of salvation

**[2CO 1:21–1:22](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:21-2Cor1:22)** *See also* [ROM 4:16](https://ref.ly/Rom4:16), [ROM 8:31–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:31-Rom8:39); [PHP 1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:6); [HEB 6:18–6:19](https://ref.ly/Heb6:18-Heb6:19); [1JN 4:13](https://ref.ly/1John4:13)

### Certainty gained through obedience

**[1JN 2:3–2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:3-1John2:6)** *See also* [MAT 7:24–7:27](https://ref.ly/Matt7:24-Matt7:27) parallel [LUK 6:46–6:49](https://ref.ly/Luke6:46-Luke6:49)

### Certainty in prayer

**[1JN 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/1John5:14-1John5:15)** *See also* [MAT 7:7–7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:7-Matt7:11) parallel [LUK 11:9–11:13](https://ref.ly/Luke11:9-Luke11:13); [MAT 18:19–18:20](https://ref.ly/Matt18:19-Matt18:20), [MAT 21:21–21:22](https://ref.ly/Matt21:21-Matt21:22) parallel [MRK 11:22–11:24](https://ref.ly/Mark11:22-Mark11:24); [JHN 14:13–14:14](https://ref.ly/John14:13-John14:14)

### An area of permissible uncertainty

**[MRK 13:32–13:37](https://ref.ly/Mark13:32-Mark13:37)** *See also* [ACT 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/Acts1:6-Acts1:7); [1TH 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:1-1Thess5:2)
