## 8114: discipleship (id: 8114)

The process of becoming a committed follower of Jesus Christ, with all the spiritual discipline and benefits which this brings.

* **Associated Articles:** 8115: discipleship, nature of (ID: `8115@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8116: discipleship, cost of (ID: `8116@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8117: discipleship, benefits of (ID: `8117@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8115: discipleship, nature of (id: 8115)

The state of following Jesus Christ, and serving and obeying him. The NT stresses the privileges, joys and cost of this calling.

Discipleship involves learning
------------------------------

### Learning from God

**[JHN 6:45](https://ref.ly/John6:45)** *See also* [ISA 54:13](https://ref.ly/Isa54:13); [LEV 11:44–11:45](https://ref.ly/Lev11:44-Lev11:45), [LEV 19:2](https://ref.ly/Lev19:2), [LEV 20:7](https://ref.ly/Lev20:7); [EPH 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1-Eph5:2); [1PE 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15-1Pet1:16)

### Learning from Jesus Christ

**[MAT 11:29](https://ref.ly/Matt11:29)** *See also* [JHN 13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:15); [EPH 4:20–4:21](https://ref.ly/Eph4:20-Eph4:21); [PHP 2:5](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5); [1PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21); [1JN 2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:6)

### Learning from the Holy Spirit

**[JHN 14:26](https://ref.ly/John14:26)** *See also* [LUK 12:12](https://ref.ly/Luke12:12); [JHN 16:13](https://ref.ly/John16:13); [1CO 2:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:13); [EPH 1:17](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17), [EPH 3:16–3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16-Eph3:19); [1PE 1:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:12)

### Learning from other people

**[PHP 4:9](https://ref.ly/Phil4:9)** *See also* [DEU 4:10](https://ref.ly/Deut4:10), [DEU 5:1](https://ref.ly/Deut5:1), [DEU 31:12](https://ref.ly/Deut31:12); [1CO 4:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:6), [1CO 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:16), [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1); [PHP 3:17](https://ref.ly/Phil3:17); [2TH 3:7](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:7), [2TH 3:9](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:9); [1TI 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:11), [1TI 5:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:4); [2TI 3:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:14)

### Learning to do what is good

**[TIT 3:14](https://ref.ly/Titus3:14)** *See also* [PSA 34:14](https://ref.ly/Ps34:14), [PSA 37:27](https://ref.ly/Ps37:27); [ISA 1:17](https://ref.ly/Isa1:17), [ISA 26:9](https://ref.ly/Isa26:9); [3JN 1:11](https://ref.ly/3John1:11)

Jesus Christ calls people to be his disciples
---------------------------------------------

**[MAT 4:19](https://ref.ly/Matt4:19)** parallel [MRK 1:17](https://ref.ly/Mark1:17) *See also* [MAT 4:21](https://ref.ly/Matt4:21) parallel [MRK 1:20](https://ref.ly/Mark1:20) *Jesus Christ calls James and John*; [MAT 8:21–8:22](https://ref.ly/Matt8:21-Matt8:22) parallel [LUK 9:59–9:60](https://ref.ly/Luke9:59-Luke9:60); [MAT 9:9](https://ref.ly/Matt9:9) parallels [MRK 2:14](https://ref.ly/Mark2:14), [LUK 5:27](https://ref.ly/Luke5:27) *Jesus Christ calls Matthew*; [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21) parallels [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21), [LUK 18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22); [JHN 1:43](https://ref.ly/John1:43) *Jesus Christ calls Philip*; [JHN 21:19](https://ref.ly/John21:19)

The consequences of discipleship
--------------------------------

### Following Jesus Christ

**[MAT 10:38](https://ref.ly/Matt10:38)** *See also* [MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24) parallels [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34), [LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23); [LUK 14:27](https://ref.ly/Luke14:27); [JHN 10:27](https://ref.ly/John10:27), [JHN 12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:26); [REV 14:4](https://ref.ly/Rev14:4)

### Serving Jesus Christ

**[COL 3:24](https://ref.ly/Col3:24)** *See also* [MAT 20:25–20:28](https://ref.ly/Matt20:25-Matt20:28) parallel [MRK 10:42–10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:42-Mark10:45); [ROM 12:11](https://ref.ly/Rom12:11); [1TH 1:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:9)

### Obeying Jesus Christ

**[JHN 8:31](https://ref.ly/John8:31)** *See also* [JHN 14:21](https://ref.ly/John14:21), [JHN 14:23–14:24](https://ref.ly/John14:23-John14:24), [JHN 15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:10), [JHN 15:14](https://ref.ly/John15:14); [1JN 2:3](https://ref.ly/1John2:3), [1JN 3:22](https://ref.ly/1John3:22), [1JN 3:24](https://ref.ly/1John3:24), [1JN 5:3](https://ref.ly/1John5:3)

### Responding immediately to Jesus Christ's commands

**[MAT 8:21–8:22](https://ref.ly/Matt8:21-Matt8:22)** *See also* [MAT 4:20](https://ref.ly/Matt4:20) parallel [MRK 1:18](https://ref.ly/Mark1:18); [MAT 4:22](https://ref.ly/Matt4:22) parallels [MRK 1:20](https://ref.ly/Mark1:20), [LUK 5:11](https://ref.ly/Luke5:11)

### Living for Jesus Christ and not for oneself

**[2CO 5:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:15)** *See also* [ROM 14:7–14:8](https://ref.ly/Rom14:7-Rom14:8); [1PE 4:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:2)

### Loving others

**[JHN 13:12–13:17](https://ref.ly/John13:12-John13:17)** *See also* [JHN 15:9–15:14](https://ref.ly/John15:9-John15:14); [1JN 4:7–4:21](https://ref.ly/1John4:7-1John4:21)

Total commitment is required of Jesus Christ's disciples
--------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 10:37–10:39](https://ref.ly/Matt10:37-Matt10:39)** *See also* [MAT 16:24–16:25](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24-Matt16:25) parallels [MRK 8:34–8:35](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34-Mark8:35), [LUK 9:23–9:24](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23-Luke9:24); [MRK 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mark6:8); [LUK 14:26–14:27](https://ref.ly/Luke14:26-Luke14:27), [LUK 17:33](https://ref.ly/Luke17:33); [JHN 12:25](https://ref.ly/John12:25)

The purpose of discipleship is to become Christlike
---------------------------------------------------

**[EPH 4:22–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22-Eph4:24)** *See also* [MAT 5:48](https://ref.ly/Matt5:48); [LUK 6:40](https://ref.ly/Luke6:40); [ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29) *God's purpose in election*; [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2), [ROM 13:14](https://ref.ly/Rom13:14); [2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18), [2CO 7:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:1); [EPH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Eph1:4); [COL 1:28](https://ref.ly/Col1:28), [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12); [2TI 3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:17) *the purpose of Scripture*; [1PE 1:14–1:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:14-1Pet1:15) *a call to holiness*; [2PE 1:5–1:7](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:7); [1JN 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/1John3:2-1John3:3)

Examples of secret discipleship
-------------------------------

**[JHN 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/John3:1-John3:2)** *See also* [JHN 7:50](https://ref.ly/John7:50), [JHN 12:42](https://ref.ly/John12:42), [JHN 19:38–19:39](https://ref.ly/John19:38-John19:39)

* **Associated Passages:** John 6:45; Isaiah 54:13; Leviticus 11:44-45; Leviticus 19:2; Leviticus 20:7; Ephesians 5:1-2; 1 Peter 1:15-16; Matthew 11:29; John 13:15; Ephesians 4:20-21; Philippians 2:5; 1 Peter 2:21; 1 John 2:6; John 14:26; Luke 12:12; John 16:13; 1 Corinthians 2:13; Ephesians 1:17; Ephesians 3:16-19; 1 Peter 1:12; Philippians 4:9; Deuteronomy 4:10; Deuteronomy 5:1; Deuteronomy 31:12; 1 Corinthians 4:6; 1 Corinthians 4:16; 1 Corinthians 11:1; Philippians 3:17; 2 Thessalonians 3:7; 2 Thessalonians 3:9; 1 Timothy 2:11; 1 Timothy 5:4; 2 Timothy 3:14; Titus 3:14; Psalms 34:14; Psalms 37:27; Isaiah 1:17; Isaiah 26:9; 3 John 1:11; Matthew 4:19; Mark 1:17; Matthew 4:21; Mark 1:20; Matthew 8:21-22; Luke 9:59-60; Matthew 9:9; Mark 2:14; Luke 5:27; Matthew 19:21; Mark 10:21; Luke 18:22; John 1:43; John 21:19; Matthew 10:38; Matthew 16:24; Mark 8:34; Luke 9:23; Luke 14:27; John 10:27; John 12:26; Revelation 14:4; Colossians 3:24; Matthew 20:25-28; Mark 10:42-45; Romans 12:11; 1 Thessalonians 1:9; John 8:31; John 14:21; John 14:23-24; John 15:10; John 15:14; 1 John 2:3; 1 John 3:22; 1 John 3:24; 1 John 5:3; Matthew 4:20; Mark 1:18; Matthew 4:22; Luke 5:11; 2 Corinthians 5:15; Romans 14:7-8; 1 Peter 4:2; John 13:12-17; John 15:9-14; 1 John 4:7-21; Matthew 10:37-39; Matthew 16:24-25; Mark 8:34-35; Luke 9:23-24; Mark 6:8; Luke 14:26-27; Luke 17:33; John 12:25; Ephesians 4:22-24; Matthew 5:48; Luke 6:40; Romans 8:29; Romans 12:1-2; Romans 13:14; 2 Corinthians 3:18; 2 Corinthians 7:1; Ephesians 1:4; Colossians 1:28; Colossians 3:12; 2 Timothy 3:17; 1 Peter 1:14-15; 2 Peter 1:5-7; 1 John 3:2-3; John 3:1-2; John 7:50; John 12:42; John 19:38-39

## 8116: discipleship, cost of (id: 8116)

The denial of self\-interests and desires, and a total commitment to do the will of God, even to the point of death.

The cost of discipleship involves a denial of self\-interests and desires
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

### The cost involves self\-denial

**[MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24)** parallels [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34), [LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23) *See also* [MAT 10:38](https://ref.ly/Matt10:38); [LUK 14:27](https://ref.ly/Luke14:27)

### Self\-denial means not living for oneself

**[ROM 14:7](https://ref.ly/Rom14:7)** *See also* [2CO 5:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:15); [GAL 2:20](https://ref.ly/Gal2:20); [1PE 4:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:2)

The cost of discipleship is to be carefully considered
------------------------------------------------------

**[LUK 14:28–14:32](https://ref.ly/Luke14:28-Luke14:32)**

The cost of discipleship means total commitment to the will of God
------------------------------------------------------------------

### Total surrender is required

**[LUK 14:33](https://ref.ly/Luke14:33)** *See also* [PHP 3:7–3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:7-Phil3:8)

### The security of the world is to be resisted

**[MAT 8:19–8:20](https://ref.ly/Matt8:19-Matt8:20)** parallel [LUK 9:57–9:58](https://ref.ly/Luke9:57-Luke9:58)

### Jesus Christ must have first priority

**[LUK 9:59–9:60](https://ref.ly/Luke9:59-Luke9:60)** parallel [MAT 8:21–8:22](https://ref.ly/Matt8:21-Matt8:22) *See also* [MAT 19:16–19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:16-Matt19:21) parallels [MRK 10:17–10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:17-Mark10:21), [LUK 18:18–18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:18-Luke18:22); [COL 1:18](https://ref.ly/Col1:18)

### Jesus Christ must come before family ties

**[LUK 9:61–9:62](https://ref.ly/Luke9:61-Luke9:62)** *See also* [MAT 10:37](https://ref.ly/Matt10:37); [LUK 14:26](https://ref.ly/Luke14:26)

The cost of discipleship is constant
------------------------------------

**[LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23)**

The cost of discipleship includes persecution
---------------------------------------------

**[JHN 15:20](https://ref.ly/John15:20)** *See also* [ACT 14:22](https://ref.ly/Acts14:22); [2TI 3:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:12)

The cost of discipleship includes willingess to suffer and die for Jesus Christ's sake
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 10:38–10:39](https://ref.ly/Matt10:38-Matt10:39)** *See also* [MAT 16:24–16:25](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24-Matt16:25) parallels [MRK 8:34–8:35](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34-Mark8:35), [LUK 9:23–9:24](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23-Luke9:24); [JHN 12:25](https://ref.ly/John12:25)

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 16:24; Mark 8:34; Luke 9:23; Matthew 10:38; Luke 14:27; Romans 14:7; 2 Corinthians 5:15; Galatians 2:20; 1 Peter 4:2; Luke 14:28-32; Luke 14:33; Philippians 3:7-8; Matthew 8:19-20; Luke 9:57-58; Luke 9:59-60; Matthew 8:21-22; Matthew 19:16-21; Mark 10:17-21; Luke 18:18-22; Colossians 1:18; Luke 9:61-62; Matthew 10:37; Luke 14:26; John 15:20; Acts 14:22; 2 Timothy 3:12; Matthew 10:38-39; Matthew 16:24-25; Mark 8:34-35; Luke 9:23-24; John 12:25
* **Associated Articles:** 8120: following Jesus Christ (ID: `8120@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8248: faithfulness (ID: `8248@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8356: unselfishness (ID: `8356@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8450: martyrdom (ID: `8450@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8451: mortification (ID: `8451@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8461: priorities (ID: `8461@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8475: self-denial (ID: `8475@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8481: self-sacrifice (ID: `8481@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8794: persecution (ID: `8794@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8117: discipleship, benefits of (id: 8117)

Joy, peace and happiness result from following Jesus Christ, together with the hope of being like him and with him in heaven. This is anticipated in the OT, which stresses the importance of obedience to the LORD.

Blessings result from obedient discipleship
-------------------------------------------

**[LUK 11:28](https://ref.ly/Luke11:28)** *See also* [PRO 8:32](https://ref.ly/Prov8:32); [MAT 7:24–7:25](https://ref.ly/Matt7:24-Matt7:25) parallel [LUK 6:47–6:48](https://ref.ly/Luke6:47-Luke6:48); [JHN 13:17](https://ref.ly/John13:17), [JHN 14:21](https://ref.ly/John14:21); [JAS 1:25](https://ref.ly/Jas1:25)

Joy results from discipleship
-----------------------------

**[JHN 15:10–15:11](https://ref.ly/John15:10-John15:11)** *See also* [PSA 119:14](https://ref.ly/Ps119:14); [ACT 13:52](https://ref.ly/Acts13:52), [ACT 16:34](https://ref.ly/Acts16:34) *the Philippian jailer*; [ROM 14:17](https://ref.ly/Rom14:17), [ROM 15:13](https://ref.ly/Rom15:13); [GAL 5:22](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22) *the fruit of the Spirit*; [PHP 1:25](https://ref.ly/Phil1:25); [1TH 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:6); [HEB 10:34](https://ref.ly/Heb10:34); [1PE 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:6), [1PE 1:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:8); [JUD 1:24](https://ref.ly/Jude1:24)

Peace results from discipleship
-------------------------------

**[JHN 14:27](https://ref.ly/John14:27)** *See also* [NUM 6:26](https://ref.ly/Num6:26); [PSA 4:8](https://ref.ly/Ps4:8), [PSA 29:11](https://ref.ly/Ps29:11), [PSA 37:11](https://ref.ly/Ps37:11); [ISA 26:3](https://ref.ly/Isa26:3); [MAT 11:28–11:29](https://ref.ly/Matt11:28-Matt11:29) *Jesus Christ promises rest for the weary*; [LUK 2:14](https://ref.ly/Luke2:14) *the angels' greeting to the shepherds at the birth of Jesus Christ*[LUK 24:36](https://ref.ly/Luke24:36); [JHN 20:19](https://ref.ly/John20:19)[JHN 16:33](https://ref.ly/John16:33), [JHN 20:21](https://ref.ly/John20:21), [JHN 20:26](https://ref.ly/John20:26); [ROM 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rom2:10), [ROM 5:1](https://ref.ly/Rom5:1); [PHP 4:7](https://ref.ly/Phil4:7); [COL 3:15](https://ref.ly/Col3:15)

True happiness results from discipleship
----------------------------------------

### Happiness flows from doing God's will

**[PSA 1:1](https://ref.ly/Ps1:1), [PSA 119:1–119:2](https://ref.ly/Ps119:1-Ps119:2)** *See also* [PSA 94:12](https://ref.ly/Ps94:12), [PSA 112:1](https://ref.ly/Ps112:1), [PSA 128:1](https://ref.ly/Ps128:1); [PRO 29:18](https://ref.ly/Prov29:18)

### Disciples are truly happy

**[MAT 5:3–5:12](https://ref.ly/Matt5:3-Matt5:12)** parallel [LUK 6:20–6:23](https://ref.ly/Luke6:20-Luke6:23) *See also* [REV 1:3](https://ref.ly/Rev1:3), [REV 22:14](https://ref.ly/Rev22:14)

Disciples are abundantly recompensed in this life
-------------------------------------------------

**[MRK 10:29–10:30](https://ref.ly/Mark10:29-Mark10:30)** parallels [MAT 19:29](https://ref.ly/Matt19:29), [LUK 18:29–18:30](https://ref.ly/Luke18:29-Luke18:30) *See also* [PRO 15:16](https://ref.ly/Prov15:16), [PRO 16:8](https://ref.ly/Prov16:8); [MAT 7:7–7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:7-Matt7:11) parallel [LUK 11:9–11:13](https://ref.ly/Luke11:9-Luke11:13); [JHN 8:12](https://ref.ly/John8:12), [JHN 10:27](https://ref.ly/John10:27), [JHN 12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:26); [ROM 8:31–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:31-Rom8:39); [1TI 6:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:6)

Disciples are blessed by being united with Jesus Christ in the family of God
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 12:46–12:50](https://ref.ly/Matt12:46-Matt12:50)** parallels [MRK 3:31–3:35](https://ref.ly/Mark3:31-Mark3:35), [LUK 8:19–8:21](https://ref.ly/Luke8:19-Luke8:21) *See also* [GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10); [EPH 2:19](https://ref.ly/Eph2:19), [EPH 3:15](https://ref.ly/Eph3:15)

Disciples will be blessed with eternal life
-------------------------------------------

**[MAT 19:29](https://ref.ly/Matt19:29)** parallels [MRK 10:30](https://ref.ly/Mark10:30), [LUK 18:30](https://ref.ly/Luke18:30) *See also* [MAT 25:46](https://ref.ly/Matt25:46); [ROM 2:7](https://ref.ly/Rom2:7); [GAL 6:8](https://ref.ly/Gal6:8); [1JN 1:2](https://ref.ly/1John1:2), [1JN 5:11](https://ref.ly/1John5:11), [1JN 5:13](https://ref.ly/1John5:13), [1JN 5:20](https://ref.ly/1John5:20)

Disciples have the hope of being like Jesus Christ and being with him in heaven
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[1JN 3:2](https://ref.ly/1John3:2)** *See also* [JHN 12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:26), [JHN 14:3](https://ref.ly/John14:3); [ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29); [1CO 15:49](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:49); [2PE 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:4)

* **Associated Passages:** Luke 11:28; Proverbs 8:32; Matthew 7:24-25; Luke 6:47-48; John 13:17; John 14:21; James 1:25; John 15:10-11; Psalms 119:14; Acts 13:52; Acts 16:34; Romans 14:17; Romans 15:13; Galatians 5:22; Philippians 1:25; 1 Thessalonians 1:6; Hebrews 10:34; 1 Peter 1:6; 1 Peter 1:8; Jude 1:24; John 14:27; Numbers 6:26; Psalms 4:8; Psalms 29:11; Psalms 37:11; Isaiah 26:3; Matthew 11:28-29; Luke 2:14; Luke 24:36; John 20:19; John 16:33; John 20:21; John 20:26; Romans 2:10; Romans 5:1; Philippians 4:7; Colossians 3:15; Psalms 1:1; Psalms 119:1-2; Psalms 94:12; Psalms 112:1; Psalms 128:1; Proverbs 29:18; Matthew 5:3-12; Luke 6:20-23; Revelation 1:3; Revelation 22:14; Mark 10:29-30; Matthew 19:29; Luke 18:29-30; Proverbs 15:16; Proverbs 16:8; Matthew 7:7-11; Luke 11:9-13; John 8:12; John 10:27; John 12:26; Romans 8:31-39; 1 Timothy 6:6; Matthew 12:46-50; Mark 3:31-35; Luke 8:19-21; Galatians 6:10; Ephesians 2:19; Ephesians 3:15; Mark 10:30; Luke 18:30; Matthew 25:46; Romans 2:7; Galatians 6:8; 1 John 1:2; 1 John 5:11; 1 John 5:13; 1 John 5:20; 1 John 3:2; John 14:3; Romans 8:29; 1 Corinthians 15:49; 2 Peter 1:4

## 8120: following Jesus Christ (id: 8120)

The NT provides examples of individuals who followed Jesus Christ and of the implications of this decision for their lives.

Examples of those who followed Jesus Christ
-------------------------------------------

### Crowds of people

**[MAT 4:25](https://ref.ly/Matt4:25)** *See also* [MAT 8:1](https://ref.ly/Matt8:1), [MAT 12:15](https://ref.ly/Matt12:15) parallel [MRK 3:7](https://ref.ly/Mark3:7); [MAT 14:13](https://ref.ly/Matt14:13) parallels [LUK 9:11](https://ref.ly/Luke9:11), [JHN 6:2](https://ref.ly/John6:2); [MAT 19:2](https://ref.ly/Matt19:2); [MRK 2:15](https://ref.ly/Mark2:15), [MRK 5:24](https://ref.ly/Mark5:24); [LUK 7:9](https://ref.ly/Luke7:9), [LUK 7:11](https://ref.ly/Luke7:11)

### Those who were healed

**[MAT 20:34](https://ref.ly/Matt20:34)** *See also* [MRK 10:52](https://ref.ly/Mark10:52) parallel [LUK 18:43](https://ref.ly/Luke18:43)

### Those who were needy

[MAT 9:27](https://ref.ly/Matt9:27)

### The disciples

**[MAT 8:23](https://ref.ly/Matt8:23)** *See also* [MRK 14:51](https://ref.ly/Mark14:51), [MRK 15:41](https://ref.ly/Mark15:41); [JHN 18:15](https://ref.ly/John18:15)

Examples of those who obeyed Jesus Christ's call to follow him
--------------------------------------------------------------

### Peter and Andrew

**[MAT 4:18–4:20](https://ref.ly/Matt4:18-Matt4:20)** parallel [MRK 1:16–1:18](https://ref.ly/Mark1:16-Mark1:18) *See also* [LUK 5:11](https://ref.ly/Luke5:11)

### James and John

**[MRK 1:19–1:20](https://ref.ly/Mark1:19-Mark1:20)**

### Matthew

**[MAT 9:9](https://ref.ly/Matt9:9)** parallels [MRK 2:14](https://ref.ly/Mark2:14), [LUK 5:27–5:28](https://ref.ly/Luke5:27-Luke5:28)

### Philip

**[JHN 1:43–1:45](https://ref.ly/John1:43-John1:45)**

Examples of those who hesitated when called to follow Jesus Christ
------------------------------------------------------------------

*See also* [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21) parallels [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21), [LUK 18:22–18:23](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22-Luke18:23); [LUK 9:59–9:60](https://ref.ly/Luke9:59-Luke9:60)

Wrong motives in following Jesus Christ
---------------------------------------

[1CO 1:11–1:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:11-1Cor1:13)

The cost of following Jesus Christ
----------------------------------

### Carrying one's cross

**[MAT 16:24–16:26](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24-Matt16:26)** parallels [MRK 8:34–8:37](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34-Mark8:37), [LUK 9:23–9:25](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23-Luke9:25) *See also* [MAT 10:37–10:39](https://ref.ly/Matt10:37-Matt10:39); [LUK 14:25–14:33](https://ref.ly/Luke14:25-Luke14:33); [JHN 12:23–12:25](https://ref.ly/John12:23-John12:25)

### Leaving security behind

**[MAT 8:19–8:20](https://ref.ly/Matt8:19-Matt8:20)** parallel [LUK 9:57–9:58](https://ref.ly/Luke9:57-Luke9:58) *See also* [LUK 9:61–9:62](https://ref.ly/Luke9:61-Luke9:62)

### Those who failed to persevere in following Jesus Christ

**[JHN 6:66](https://ref.ly/John6:66)**

Those who persevered under suffering in following Jesus Christ
--------------------------------------------------------------

*See also* [JHN 13:12–13:17](https://ref.ly/John13:12-John13:17), [JHN 21:19](https://ref.ly/John21:19); [ACT 22:4](https://ref.ly/Acts22:4), [ACT 24:14](https://ref.ly/Acts24:14); [ROM 15:5](https://ref.ly/Rom15:5); [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1); [1TH 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:6); [1PE 2:20–2:23](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:20-1Pet2:23); [REV 14:4](https://ref.ly/Rev14:4), [REV 17:14](https://ref.ly/Rev17:14)

The blessings of following Jesus Christ
---------------------------------------

**[MAT 19:27–19:30](https://ref.ly/Matt19:27-Matt19:30)** parallels [MRK 10:28–10:31](https://ref.ly/Mark10:28-Mark10:31), [LUK 18:28–18:30](https://ref.ly/Luke18:28-Luke18:30) *The reward is not on the basis of merit but the free gift promised to those who follow Jesus Christ.* *See also* [JHN 8:12](https://ref.ly/John8:12), [JHN 12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:26)

The limits on following Jesus Christ
------------------------------------

[JHN 13:36](https://ref.ly/John13:36)

## 8122: friendship, with God (id: 8122)

A relationship of love and faithfulness into which God calls all people through faith.

Examples of friendship with God
-------------------------------

### Abraham

**[JAS 2:23](https://ref.ly/Jas2:23)** *See also* [2CH 20:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:7); [ISA 41:8](https://ref.ly/Isa41:8)

### Moses

**[EXO 33:11](https://ref.ly/Exod33:11)** *See also* [NUM 12:8](https://ref.ly/Num12:8); [DEU 34:10](https://ref.ly/Deut34:10)

### Job

**[JOB 29:4–29:5](https://ref.ly/Job29:4-Job29:5)** *See also* [JOB 16:20–16:21](https://ref.ly/Job16:20-Job16:21)

Examples of friendship with Jesus Christ
----------------------------------------

### Mary, Martha and Lazarus

**[JHN 11:5](https://ref.ly/John11:5)** *See also* [JHN 11:3](https://ref.ly/John11:3), [JHN 11:11](https://ref.ly/John11:11), [JHN 11:35–11:36](https://ref.ly/John11:35-John11:36), [JHN 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/John12:1-John12:2)

### The beloved disciple

**[JHN 13:23](https://ref.ly/John13:23)** *“the disciple whom Jesus loved” is generally thought to be John.* *See also* [JHN 19:26](https://ref.ly/John19:26), [JHN 20:2](https://ref.ly/John20:2), [JHN 21:7](https://ref.ly/John21:7), [JHN 21:20](https://ref.ly/John21:20)

### The disciples

**[JHN 15:14–15:15](https://ref.ly/John15:14-John15:15)**

The ministry of Jesus Christ is an expression of friendship to sinners
----------------------------------------------------------------------

### In his life on earth

**[MAT 11:19](https://ref.ly/Matt11:19)** parallel [LUK 7:34](https://ref.ly/Luke7:34) *See also* [LUK 7:39](https://ref.ly/Luke7:39), [LUK 19:7](https://ref.ly/Luke19:7)

### In his death on the cross

**[JHN 15:13](https://ref.ly/John15:13)**; **[ROM 5:7–5:8](https://ref.ly/Rom5:7-Rom5:8)** *See also* [LUK 12:4](https://ref.ly/Luke12:4); [JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16); [1PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:18)

God's delight in friendship with those who he loves
---------------------------------------------------

**[ISA 5:7](https://ref.ly/Isa5:7)**; **[HOS 11:1–11:4](https://ref.ly/Hos11:1-Hos11:4)** *See also* [1JN 1:3](https://ref.ly/1John1:3)

The reliability of God as a friend
----------------------------------

**[ISA 54:10](https://ref.ly/Isa54:10)** *See also* [DEU 7:9](https://ref.ly/Deut7:9); [JOS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Josh1:5); [PRO 18:24](https://ref.ly/Prov18:24); [JHN 13:1](https://ref.ly/John13:1); [HEB 13:5](https://ref.ly/Heb13:5)

God's invitation for people to know his friendship
--------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 145:18](https://ref.ly/Ps145:18)**; **[JAS 4:8](https://ref.ly/Jas4:8)**; **[REV 3:20](https://ref.ly/Rev3:20)** *Sharing a meal is a strong expression of friendship in Scripture.* *See also* [ZEC 1:3](https://ref.ly/Zech1:3); [MAL 3:7](https://ref.ly/Mal3:7); [ACT 17:27](https://ref.ly/Acts17:27); [JAS 4:4](https://ref.ly/Jas4:4)

## 8124: guidance (id: 8124)

God has purposes and plans for his people, as individuals and communities. Believers and churches should seek his direction and counsel in discerning these purposes and plans in their lives.

* **Associated Articles:** 8125: guidance, God's promises of (ID: `8125@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8126: guidance, need for God's (ID: `8126@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8127: guidance, of Holy Spirit (ID: `8127@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8128: guidance, receiving God's (ID: `8128@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8129: guidance, examples of God's (ID: `8129@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8130: guidance, from godly people (ID: `8130@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8131: guidance, results of (ID: `8131@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8125: guidance, God's promises of (id: 8125)

Scripture bears witness to God's promises of guidance for his people.

All God's intentions will be realised
-------------------------------------

### God has purposes

**[ISA 14:27](https://ref.ly/Isa14:27)** *See also* [JOB 36:5](https://ref.ly/Job36:5); [ISA 55:10–55:11](https://ref.ly/Isa55:10-Isa55:11); [JER 23:20](https://ref.ly/Jer23:20); [ROM 8:28](https://ref.ly/Rom8:28); [EPH 3:10–3:11](https://ref.ly/Eph3:10-Eph3:11); [2TI 1:9](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:9); [HEB 6:17](https://ref.ly/Heb6:17)

### God has plans

**[LAM 2:17](https://ref.ly/Lam2:17)** *See also* [PSA 33:11](https://ref.ly/Ps33:11), [PSA 40:5](https://ref.ly/Ps40:5); [PRO 16:9](https://ref.ly/Prov16:9); [ISA 14:24](https://ref.ly/Isa14:24), [ISA 25:1](https://ref.ly/Isa25:1), [ISA 37:26](https://ref.ly/Isa37:26)

### God desires his purposes and plans to be fulfilled

**[LUK 22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42)** parallels [MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39), [MRK 14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:36)**[ACT 21:14](https://ref.ly/Acts21:14)** *See also* [1CH 13:2](https://ref.ly/1Chr13:2); [PSA 57:2](https://ref.ly/Ps57:2), [PSA 138:8](https://ref.ly/Ps138:8); [ACT 18:21](https://ref.ly/Acts18:21); [ROM 1:10](https://ref.ly/Rom1:10), [ROM 15:32](https://ref.ly/Rom15:32); [JAS 4:13–4:15](https://ref.ly/Jas4:13-Jas4:15)

Examples of God working out his purposes
----------------------------------------

**[ACT 2:23](https://ref.ly/Acts2:23)** [ISA 46:10–46:11](https://ref.ly/Isa46:10-Isa46:11), [ISA 48:14](https://ref.ly/Isa48:14); [JER 29:10–29:11](https://ref.ly/Jer29:10-Jer29:11) *restoration of Israel after the exile*; ; [ACT 13:36](https://ref.ly/Acts13:36) *David*; ; [ROM 9:11–9:12](https://ref.ly/Rom9:11-Rom9:12) *Esau and Jacob*; ; [ROM 9:17](https://ref.ly/Rom9:17) *Pharaoh*

God promises to guide Israel and Judah
--------------------------------------

**[EXO 15:13](https://ref.ly/Exod15:13)** *See also* [EXO 32:34](https://ref.ly/Exod32:34); [PSA 23:2–23:3](https://ref.ly/Ps23:2-Ps23:3), [PSA 48:14](https://ref.ly/Ps48:14); [ISA 30:21](https://ref.ly/Isa30:21), [ISA 49:10](https://ref.ly/Isa49:10), [ISA 58:11](https://ref.ly/Isa58:11); [JER 31:8–31:9](https://ref.ly/Jer31:8-Jer31:9); [EZK 34:11–34:16](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:11-Ezek34:16); [LUK 1:76–1:79](https://ref.ly/Luke1:76-Luke1:79)

Other promises of God's guidance
--------------------------------

[GEN 12:1](https://ref.ly/Gen12:1), [GEN 26:2–26:3](https://ref.ly/Gen26:2-Gen26:3); ; [1SA 16:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:3); ; [PSA 32:8](https://ref.ly/Ps32:8), [PSA 67:4](https://ref.ly/Ps67:4); ; [ISA 42:16](https://ref.ly/Isa42:16); ; [REV 7:17](https://ref.ly/Rev7:17)

## 8126: guidance, need for God's (id: 8126)

God's guidance is needed because people are naturally ignorant and rebellious and there are many who lead others astray.

The need to know and do the will of God
---------------------------------------

**[JER 10:23](https://ref.ly/Jer10:23)** *See also* [EZR 7:18](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:18); [1TH 4:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:3); [HEB 13:20–13:21](https://ref.ly/Heb13:20-Heb13:21); [1PE 2:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:15); [1JN 2:17](https://ref.ly/1John2:17); [MAT 6:10](https://ref.ly/Matt6:10), [MAT 7:21](https://ref.ly/Matt7:21), [MAT 12:50](https://ref.ly/Matt12:50) parallels [MRK 3:35](https://ref.ly/Mark3:35), [LUK 8:21](https://ref.ly/Luke8:21); [JHN 7:17](https://ref.ly/John7:17)

### The concern of Jesus Christ to do the will of God

**[JHN 6:38](https://ref.ly/John6:38)** *See also* [JHN 4:34](https://ref.ly/John4:34)

By themselves people are ignorant of the right way in life
----------------------------------------------------------

**[PRO 14:12](https://ref.ly/Prov14:12)** *See also* [ECC 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eccl6:12), [ECC 8:7](https://ref.ly/Eccl8:7); [ISA 53:6](https://ref.ly/Isa53:6), [ISA 59:10](https://ref.ly/Isa59:10) *blindness the result of disobedience*; [MAT 9:36](https://ref.ly/Matt9:36); [1PE 2:25](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:25)

Warnings against false guidance
-------------------------------

### False prophets and teachers

**[JER 23:25–23:27](https://ref.ly/Jer23:25-Jer23:27)**; **[LUK 11:52](https://ref.ly/Luke11:52)** parallel [MAT 23:13](https://ref.ly/Matt23:13) *See also* [ISA 9:16](https://ref.ly/Isa9:16); [JER 23:13](https://ref.ly/Jer23:13), [JER 27:9–27:10](https://ref.ly/Jer27:9-Jer27:10); [MIC 3:5](https://ref.ly/Mic3:5); [2PE 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:1-2Pet2:3); [JUD 1:17–1:19](https://ref.ly/Jude1:17-Jude1:19)

### False shepherds and guides

**[JER 50:6](https://ref.ly/Jer50:6)**; **[MAT 24:24](https://ref.ly/Matt24:24)** *See also* [ISA 3:12](https://ref.ly/Isa3:12); [JER 10:21](https://ref.ly/Jer10:21), [JER 23:1–23:2](https://ref.ly/Jer23:1-Jer23:2); [EZK 34:4–34:6](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:4-Ezek34:6); [MAT 15:14](https://ref.ly/Matt15:14); [ACT 20:30](https://ref.ly/Acts20:30)

### Idols and mediums

**[ZEC 10:2](https://ref.ly/Zech10:2)** *See also* [LEV 19:31](https://ref.ly/Lev19:31); [ISA 41:22–41:24](https://ref.ly/Isa41:22-Isa41:24); [AMO 2:4](https://ref.ly/Amos2:4); [HAB 2:19](https://ref.ly/Hab2:19)

### Other agencies

[1KI 11:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:3); ; [2KI 21:9](https://ref.ly/2Kgs21:9); ; [2CH 21:11](https://ref.ly/2Chr21:11); ; [PRO 16:29](https://ref.ly/Prov16:29); ; [1CO 15:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:33); ; [REV 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rev12:9), [REV 18:23](https://ref.ly/Rev18:23)

Despite knowing God's will, sinners still rebel against him
-----------------------------------------------------------

**[JER 18:11–18:12](https://ref.ly/Jer18:11-Jer18:12)** *See also* [ISA 30:9–30:11](https://ref.ly/Isa30:9-Isa30:11); [JER 6:16](https://ref.ly/Jer6:16), [JER 42:5–42:6](https://ref.ly/Jer42:5-Jer42:6), [JER 42:19–42:21](https://ref.ly/Jer42:19-Jer42:21); [2TI 4:3](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:3)

The adverse consequences of false guidance and disobedience
-----------------------------------------------------------

**[1CH 10:13–10:14](https://ref.ly/1Chr10:13-1Chr10:14)** *See also* [JOB 5:12](https://ref.ly/Job5:12); [PSA 33:10–33:11](https://ref.ly/Ps33:10-Ps33:11), [PSA 146:3–146:4](https://ref.ly/Ps146:3-Ps146:4); [ISA 19:3](https://ref.ly/Isa19:3), [ISA 30:1](https://ref.ly/Isa30:1); [JER 19:7](https://ref.ly/Jer19:7); [HOS 11:5–11:7](https://ref.ly/Hos11:5-Hos11:7); [HEB 3:7–3:11](https://ref.ly/Heb3:7-Heb3:11); [PSA 95:7–95:11](https://ref.ly/Ps95:7-Ps95:11)

See [3263: Holy Spirit, guidance of](3263.md)



## 8128: guidance, receiving God's (id: 8128)

God's guidance is promised to those who genuinely desire it and seek it.

God's readiness to guide his people
-----------------------------------

**[PSA 25:4–25:5](https://ref.ly/Ps25:4-Ps25:5)**; **[JAS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5)** *See also* [EXO 33:12–33:16](https://ref.ly/Exod33:12-Exod33:16); [JOB 6:24](https://ref.ly/Job6:24); [PSA 5:8](https://ref.ly/Ps5:8), [PSA 27:11](https://ref.ly/Ps27:11), [PSA 31:3](https://ref.ly/Ps31:3), [PSA 61:1–61:2](https://ref.ly/Ps61:1-Ps61:2), [PSA 86:11](https://ref.ly/Ps86:11), [PSA 143:8](https://ref.ly/Ps143:8)

Guidance is given through the truth and counsel of God
------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 43:3](https://ref.ly/Ps43:3)** *See also* [PSA 16:7–16:8](https://ref.ly/Ps16:7-Ps16:8), [PSA 73:23–73:24](https://ref.ly/Ps73:23-Ps73:24), [PSA 119:35](https://ref.ly/Ps119:35), [PSA 119:105](https://ref.ly/Ps119:105), [PSA 119:133](https://ref.ly/Ps119:133); [JHN 10:3–10:4](https://ref.ly/John10:3-John10:4), [JHN 10:27](https://ref.ly/John10:27)

Guidance is given to the humble and penitent
--------------------------------------------

**[PRO 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5-Prov3:6)** *See also* [2CH 6:26–6:27](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:26-2Chr6:27); [PSA 25:9](https://ref.ly/Ps25:9), [PSA 139:23–139:24](https://ref.ly/Ps139:23-Ps139:24); [ISA 57:15](https://ref.ly/Isa57:15), [ISA 57:18–57:19](https://ref.ly/Isa57:18-Isa57:19); [JER 50:4–50:5](https://ref.ly/Jer50:4-Jer50:5); [EZK 20:1–20:3](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:1-Ezek20:3), [EZK 20:30–20:31](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:30-Ezek20:31)

Guidance is given to those willing to obey God's will
-----------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39)** parallels [MRK 14:35–14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:35-Mark14:36), [LUK 22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42) *See also* [NUM 14:8–14:9](https://ref.ly/Num14:8-Num14:9); [PSA 32:8–32:9](https://ref.ly/Ps32:8-Ps32:9); [ISA 48:17–48:18](https://ref.ly/Isa48:17-Isa48:18); [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2)

The role of the Holy Spirit in guidance
---------------------------------------

**[LUK 12:11–12:12](https://ref.ly/Luke12:11-Luke12:12)** *See also* [PSA 143:10](https://ref.ly/Ps143:10); [JHN 16:13](https://ref.ly/John16:13); [ACT 10:19–10:20](https://ref.ly/Acts10:19-Acts10:20), [ACT 13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2), [ACT 16:6–16:7](https://ref.ly/Acts16:6-Acts16:7); [GAL 5:18](https://ref.ly/Gal5:18); [1JN 2:26–2:27](https://ref.ly/1John2:26-1John2:27)

Receiving guidance from Scripture
---------------------------------

**[PSA 119:105](https://ref.ly/Ps119:105), [PSA 119:133](https://ref.ly/Ps119:133)** *See also* [PSA 19:8](https://ref.ly/Ps19:8); [ISA 8:19–8:20](https://ref.ly/Isa8:19-Isa8:20); [ACT 17:11](https://ref.ly/Acts17:11); [2PE 1:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:19)

Means of being guided by God
----------------------------

### The pillar of cloud and the pillar of fire

**[EXO 13:21–13:22](https://ref.ly/Exod13:21-Exod13:22)** *See also* [EXO 14:19–14:20](https://ref.ly/Exod14:19-Exod14:20); [NEH 9:19](https://ref.ly/Neh9:19)

### The Urim and the Thummin

[EXO 28:29–28:30](https://ref.ly/Exod28:29-Exod28:30); ; [NUM 27:21](https://ref.ly/Num27:21)

### The casting of lots

[1SA 14:36–14:42](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:36-1Sam14:42); ; [PRO 16:33](https://ref.ly/Prov16:33); ; [JON 1:7](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:7); ; [ACT 1:26](https://ref.ly/Acts1:26)

### Dreams and visions

**[MAT 2:19–2:20](https://ref.ly/Matt2:19-Matt2:20)**; **[ACT 9:10–9:11](https://ref.ly/Acts9:10-Acts9:11)** *See also* [GEN 40:5–40:8](https://ref.ly/Gen40:5-Gen40:8); [JOL 2:28](https://ref.ly/Joel2:28); [ACT 10:3–10:6](https://ref.ly/Acts10:3-Acts10:6), [ACT 11:5–11:9](https://ref.ly/Acts11:5-Acts11:9)

## 8129: guidance, examples of God's (id: 8129)

Scripture provides numerous examples of individuals who have realised their need of God's guidance and who have been given direction by him.

Examples of God taking the initiative to lead his people
--------------------------------------------------------

### God's guidance of Israel and her leaders at the exodus

## 8131: guidance, results of (id: 8131)

Wise counsel, advice and direction from God or his servants, if carefully followed, will enrich and benefit those to whom it is given.

Guidance resulting in military victory
--------------------------------------

**[2SA 5:17–5:20](https://ref.ly/2Sam5:17-2Sam5:20)** parallel [1CH 14:8–14:11](https://ref.ly/1Chr14:8-1Chr14:11) *See also* [JOS 6:1–6:21](https://ref.ly/Josh6:1-Josh6:21), [JOS 8:1–8:22](https://ref.ly/Josh8:1-Josh8:22); [JDG 6:33–7:25](https://ref.ly/Judg6:33-Judg7:25); [2SA 5:22–5:25](https://ref.ly/2Sam5:22-2Sam5:25) parallel [1CH 14:13–14:16](https://ref.ly/1Chr14:13-1Chr14:16)

## 8134: knowing God (id: 8134)

A faith\-relationship and love\-relationship with God involving mind, heart and will, and bringing experience of his presence and power. To know God is to worship him and be transformed by him. Human knowledge of God, which begins with knowledge about him, comes through God's self\-revelation.

* **Associated Articles:** 8135: knowing God, nature of (ID: `8135@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8136: knowing God, effects of (ID: `8136@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8135: knowing God, nature of (id: 8135)

To know God is not merely to know things about him, such as his character, but also to experience his presence and power. To know God is to be transformed by him. Human knowledge of God is as a result of God's revelation of himself.

The origin of knowing God
-------------------------

### Knowing God depends on revelation

**[ROM 11:33–11:36](https://ref.ly/Rom11:33-Rom11:36)** *See also* [ISA 40:13](https://ref.ly/Isa40:13); [DEU 29:29](https://ref.ly/Deut29:29); [NUM 12:6](https://ref.ly/Num12:6), [NUM 23:3](https://ref.ly/Num23:3); [JOB 12:22](https://ref.ly/Job12:22); [ISA 40:5](https://ref.ly/Isa40:5), [ISA 65:1](https://ref.ly/Isa65:1); [EZK 20:5](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:5); [DAN 2:20–2:23](https://ref.ly/Dan2:20-Dan2:23), [DAN 2:28](https://ref.ly/Dan2:28)[AMO 4:13](https://ref.ly/Amos4:13); [MAT 11:25–11:27](https://ref.ly/Matt11:25-Matt11:27) parallel [LUK 10:21–10:22](https://ref.ly/Luke10:21-Luke10:22) *Jesus Christ praises the Father for the revelation the disciples receive*; [ROM 16:25–16:26](https://ref.ly/Rom16:25-Rom16:26); [GAL 1:12](https://ref.ly/Gal1:12); [EPH 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Eph3:4-Eph3:5)

### God gives knowledge of himself and his ways through the Spirit

-------------------------

### Knowing his character

### To know Jesus Christ is to know God

**[JHN 14:6](https://ref.ly/John14:6)**; **[COL 1:15](https://ref.ly/Col1:15)** *See also* [MAT 16:16–16:17](https://ref.ly/Matt16:16-Matt16:17); [JHN 8:19](https://ref.ly/John8:19), [JHN 15:15](https://ref.ly/John15:15), [JHN 16:15](https://ref.ly/John16:15), [JHN 17:26](https://ref.ly/John17:26); [COL 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Col2:2-Col2:3); [1JN 5:20](https://ref.ly/1John5:20)

### To know God is to experience his salvation

**[JHN 17:3](https://ref.ly/John17:3)** *See also* [PSA 17:6–17:7](https://ref.ly/Ps17:6-Ps17:7); [ISA 25:9](https://ref.ly/Isa25:9), [ISA 43:12](https://ref.ly/Isa43:12), [ISA 52:10](https://ref.ly/Isa52:10), [ISA 56:1](https://ref.ly/Isa56:1); [1JN 5:13](https://ref.ly/1John5:13), [1JN 5:20](https://ref.ly/1John5:20)

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 11:33-36; Isaiah 40:13; Deuteronomy 29:29; Numbers 12:6; Numbers 23:3; Job 12:22; Isaiah 40:5; Isaiah 65:1; Ezekiel 20:5; Daniel 2:20-23; Daniel 2:28; Amos 4:13; Matthew 11:25-27; Luke 10:21-22; Romans 16:25-26; Galatians 1:12; Ephesians 3:4-5; Romans 1:20; Psalms 8:1; Psalms 19:1-4; Psalms 97:6; Acts 14:17; Acts 17:24-27; Romans 1:17; Deuteronomy 31:13; Acts 10:36; 1 Corinthians 1:20-21; Hebrews 8:10-11; Jeremiah 31:33-34; Matthew 11:27; Luke 10:22; John 3:2; John 8:19; John 10:32; John 14:7; John 16:30; John 17:3; Colossians 2:2; 2 Timothy 1:9-10; 1 Peter 1:20-21; Ephesians 1:17; Isaiah 11:2; John 14:16-17; John 14:26; John 15:26; John 16:12-15; Acts 4:31; 1 Corinthians 2:9-11; 1 Corinthians 12:8; Ephesians 3:16-19; 1 Peter 1:12; Psalms 56:9-11; Exodus 9:29; Psalms 17:6-7; Psalms 66:19-20; Isaiah 41:19-20; Isaiah 45:3-6; Isaiah 50:4; Isaiah 60:16; Jeremiah 22:16; Jeremiah 24:7; Ezekiel 6:7; Jonah 4:2; Deuteronomy 7:9; Psalms 9:10; Psalms 36:10; Psalms 135:5; 1 Thessalonians 4:3-5; 1 John 4:8; 1 John 4:16; Amos 3:7; Genesis 41:25; Exodus 6:6-7; Exodus 7:5; Exodus 7:17; Exodus 18:11; Deuteronomy 29:291; Deuteronomy 3:7; 1 Samuel 3:211; 1 Samuel 17:46; 2 Samuel 7:21; 1 Chronicles 17:19; 2 Samuel 7:27; 1 Chronicles 17:25; 2 Kings 8:10; 2 Kings 19:19; Psalms 147:19; Ezekiel 20:9; Luke 2:26; John 17:8; Acts 2:22; Acts 22:14; John 14:6; Colossians 1:15; Matthew 16:16-17; John 15:15; John 16:15; John 17:26; Colossians 2:2-3; 1 John 5:20; Isaiah 25:9; Isaiah 43:12; Isaiah 52:10; Isaiah 56:1; 1 John 5:13

## 8136: knowing God, effects of (id: 8136)

Knowing God has a transforming effect on a person spiritually and morally and makes that person bold in actions for God. Not knowing God in the present will result in dissatisfaction and degeneration into wickedness and in the future will bring eternal alienation from him.

The effects of knowing God
--------------------------

### Spiritual transformation: from death to life

**[COL 1:9](https://ref.ly/Col1:9)** *See also* [JHN 17:3](https://ref.ly/John17:3); [GAL 4:8–4:9](https://ref.ly/Gal4:8-Gal4:9); [EPH 1:17](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17), [EPH 3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:19); [COL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Col2:2)

### Moral transformation: from evil to good

**[PRO 2:1–2:6](https://ref.ly/Prov2:1-Prov2:6)**; **[2CO 10:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:5)**; **[1TH 4:3–4:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:3-1Thess4:5)** *See also* [ROM 16:26](https://ref.ly/Rom16:26); [EPH 4:17–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:17-Eph4:24); [PHP 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9-Phil1:11); [COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10); [1JN 3:10](https://ref.ly/1John3:10), [1JN 4:8](https://ref.ly/1John4:8)

### Boldness of action for God

**[JER 32:38–32:39](https://ref.ly/Jer32:38-Jer32:39)**; **[DAN 11:32](https://ref.ly/Dan11:32)** *See also* [PSA 138:3](https://ref.ly/Ps138:3); [PRO 28:1](https://ref.ly/Prov28:1); [ACT 6:8–6:10](https://ref.ly/Acts6:8-Acts6:10); [2CO 3:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:12); [1PE 1:13](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:13)

Biblical images of knowing God
------------------------------

### Like parent and child

**[2SA 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:14)** parallel [1CH 17:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr17:13)**[1JN 3:1](https://ref.ly/1John3:1)** [HEB 12:6](https://ref.ly/Heb12:6); ; [PRO 3:12](https://ref.ly/Prov3:12); ; [DEU 8:5](https://ref.ly/Deut8:5); [PSA 2:7](https://ref.ly/Ps2:7), [PSA 27:10](https://ref.ly/Ps27:10), [PSA 68:5](https://ref.ly/Ps68:5), [PSA 89:26](https://ref.ly/Ps89:26), [PSA 103:13](https://ref.ly/Ps103:13); ; [ISA 49:15](https://ref.ly/Isa49:15), [ISA 66:12–66:13](https://ref.ly/Isa66:12-Isa66:13); ; [HOS 11:1](https://ref.ly/Hos11:1); ; [MAT 5:45](https://ref.ly/Matt5:45), [MAT 5:48](https://ref.ly/Matt5:48), [MAT 6:6–6:9](https://ref.ly/Matt6:6-Matt6:9), [MAT 6:18](https://ref.ly/Matt6:18), [MAT 6:32](https://ref.ly/Matt6:32); ; [LUK 15:11–15:32](https://ref.ly/Luke15:11-Luke15:32) *the parable of the lost son*; ; [JHN 14:21](https://ref.ly/John14:21); ; [1CO 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:3)

### Like husband and wife

**[ISA 62:5](https://ref.ly/Isa62:5)**; **[JER 3:14](https://ref.ly/Jer3:14)** *See also* [ISA 54:5](https://ref.ly/Isa54:5); [JER 2:2](https://ref.ly/Jer2:2), [JER 3:20](https://ref.ly/Jer3:20), [JER 31:32](https://ref.ly/Jer31:32); [HOS 2:16](https://ref.ly/Hos2:16); [EPH 5:25](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25); [REV 19:7](https://ref.ly/Rev19:7), [REV 21:2](https://ref.ly/Rev21:2)

### Like king and subject

**[PSA 97:1](https://ref.ly/Ps97:1)** *See also* [1SA 8:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam8:7); [PSA 5:2](https://ref.ly/Ps5:2), [PSA 10:16](https://ref.ly/Ps10:16), [PSA 29:10](https://ref.ly/Ps29:10), [PSA 44:4](https://ref.ly/Ps44:4), [PSA 84:3](https://ref.ly/Ps84:3), [PSA 95:3](https://ref.ly/Ps95:3), [PSA 99:1](https://ref.ly/Ps99:1), [PSA 145:1](https://ref.ly/Ps145:1); [MAT 6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:33) parallel [LUK 12:31](https://ref.ly/Luke12:31) *Jesus Christ's teaching on seeking first his kingdom*; [1TI 1:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:17), [1TI 6:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:15)

### Like shepherd and sheep

**[GEN 48:15](https://ref.ly/Gen48:15)**; **[PSA 23:1–23:2](https://ref.ly/Ps23:1-Ps23:2)**; **[ISA 40:11](https://ref.ly/Isa40:11)** *See also* [PSA 28:9](https://ref.ly/Ps28:9), [PSA 80:1](https://ref.ly/Ps80:1); [EZK 34:16](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:16); [MIC 7:14](https://ref.ly/Mic7:14); [JHN 10:11](https://ref.ly/John10:11); [REV 7:17](https://ref.ly/Rev7:17)

The peril of not knowing God
----------------------------

### Lack of satisfaction and degeneration in the present

**[ROM 1:21–1:32](https://ref.ly/Rom1:21-Rom1:32)**; **[TIT 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/Titus1:15-Titus1:16)** *See also* [EXO 5:2](https://ref.ly/Exod5:2); [JER 4:22](https://ref.ly/Jer4:22); [ROM 10:2–10:3](https://ref.ly/Rom10:2-Rom10:3); [1TH 4:3–4:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:3-1Thess4:5)

### Eternal punishment in the future

**[MAT 7:22–7:23](https://ref.ly/Matt7:22-Matt7:23)**; **[ROM 1:18–1:19](https://ref.ly/Rom1:18-Rom1:19)** *See also* [ROM 2:5](https://ref.ly/Rom2:5); [2TH 1:8](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Colossians 1:9; John 17:3; Galatians 4:8-9; Ephesians 1:17; Ephesians 3:19; Colossians 2:2; Proverbs 2:1-6; 2 Corinthians 10:5; 1 Thessalonians 4:3-5; Romans 16:26; Ephesians 4:17-24; Philippians 1:9-11; Colossians 1:10; 1 John 3:10; 1 John 4:8; Jeremiah 32:38-39; Daniel 11:32; Psalms 138:3; Proverbs 28:1; Acts 6:8-10; 2 Corinthians 3:12; 1 Peter 1:13; 2 Samuel 7:14; 1 Chronicles 17:13; 1 John 3:1; Hebrews 12:6; Proverbs 3:12; Deuteronomy 8:5; Psalms 2:7; Psalms 27:10; Psalms 68:5; Psalms 89:26; Psalms 103:13; Isaiah 49:15; Isaiah 66:12-13; Hosea 11:1; Matthew 5:45; Matthew 5:48; Matthew 6:6-9; Matthew 6:18; Matthew 6:32; Luke 15:11-32; John 14:21; 1 Corinthians 1:3; Isaiah 62:5; Jeremiah 3:14; Isaiah 54:5; Jeremiah 2:2; Jeremiah 3:20; Jeremiah 31:32; Hosea 2:16; Ephesians 5:25; Revelation 19:7; Revelation 21:2; Psalms 97:1; 1 Samuel 8:7; Psalms 5:2; Psalms 10:16; Psalms 29:10; Psalms 44:4; Psalms 84:3; Psalms 95:3; Psalms 99:1; Psalms 145:1; Matthew 6:33; Luke 12:31; 1 Timothy 1:17; 1 Timothy 6:15; Genesis 48:15; Psalms 23:1-2; Isaiah 40:11; Psalms 28:9; Psalms 80:1; Ezekiel 34:16; Micah 7:14; John 10:11; Revelation 7:17; Romans 1:21-32; Titus 1:15-16; Exodus 5:2; Jeremiah 4:22; Romans 10:2-3; Matthew 7:22-23; Romans 1:18-19; Romans 2:5; 2 Thessalonians 1:8

## 8138: monotheism (id: 8138)

The central doctrine that there is one true God, who alone is the object of worship. There is none like the LORD; other gods and idols are nothing. Scripture also indicates that there is a network of relationships within the Godhead which is stated in terms of the doctrine of the Trinity.

The doctrine of monotheism
--------------------------

### There is only one God

**[DEU 6:4](https://ref.ly/Deut6:4)**; **[EPH 4:6](https://ref.ly/Eph4:6)**; **[1TI 2:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:5)** *See also* [DEU 4:35](https://ref.ly/Deut4:35), [DEU 32:39](https://ref.ly/Deut32:39); [NEH 9:6](https://ref.ly/Neh9:6); [PSA 83:18](https://ref.ly/Ps83:18), [PSA 86:10](https://ref.ly/Ps86:10); [ISA 43:10](https://ref.ly/Isa43:10), [ISA 44:6](https://ref.ly/Isa44:6), [ISA 45:18](https://ref.ly/Isa45:18); [MRK 12:29](https://ref.ly/Mark12:29), [MRK 12:32](https://ref.ly/Mark12:32); [ROM 3:30](https://ref.ly/Rom3:30); [1CO 8:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:6); [JAS 2:19](https://ref.ly/Jas2:19)

### There is none like the LORD

**[1KI 8:23](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:23)** *See also* [EXO 8:10](https://ref.ly/Exod8:10); [2SA 7:22](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:22) parallel [1CH 17:20](https://ref.ly/1Chr17:20); [PSA 89:6](https://ref.ly/Ps89:6); [ISA 40:18](https://ref.ly/Isa40:18), [ISA 40:25](https://ref.ly/Isa40:25)

### He alone is to be worshipped

**[EXO 20:3–20:5](https://ref.ly/Exod20:3-Exod20:5)** parallel [DEU 5:7–5:9](https://ref.ly/Deut5:7-Deut5:9)**[JER 25:6](https://ref.ly/Jer25:6)** *See also* [EXO 20:23](https://ref.ly/Exod20:23), [EXO 34:14](https://ref.ly/Exod34:14); [DEU 6:14](https://ref.ly/Deut6:14), [DEU 13:6–13:8](https://ref.ly/Deut13:6-Deut13:8); [2KI 17:38–17:39](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:38-2Kgs17:39); [PSA 81:9](https://ref.ly/Ps81:9); [JER 1:16](https://ref.ly/Jer1:16), [JER 19:4](https://ref.ly/Jer19:4), [JER 35:15](https://ref.ly/Jer35:15)

### He alone is to be served

**[MRK 12:30](https://ref.ly/Mark12:30)** parallel [MAT 22:37](https://ref.ly/Matt22:37) *See also* [DEU 6:4–6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:4-Deut6:5), [DEU 6:13](https://ref.ly/Deut6:13), [DEU 13:4](https://ref.ly/Deut13:4); [1SA 7:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:3); [MAT 4:10](https://ref.ly/Matt4:10) parallel [LUK 4:8](https://ref.ly/Luke4:8); [1TH 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:9-1Thess1:10)

### Other gods are nothing

**[ISA 37:19](https://ref.ly/Isa37:19)**; **[1CO 8:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:4), [1CO 10:19–10:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:19-1Cor10:20)** *Idols are nothing in themselves, but those worshipping them open themselves to demonic influence.* *See also* [DEU 32:17](https://ref.ly/Deut32:17); [PSA 106:36–106:37](https://ref.ly/Ps106:36-Ps106:37); [ISA 40:18–40:20](https://ref.ly/Isa40:18-Isa40:20), [ISA 44:9–44:11](https://ref.ly/Isa44:9-Isa44:11); [ACT 14:15](https://ref.ly/Acts14:15); [GAL 4:8](https://ref.ly/Gal4:8)

Monotheism and plurality in the Godhead
---------------------------------------

### In the OT

**[GEN 1:26](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26)** *See also* [GEN 1:2](https://ref.ly/Gen1:2) *The Spirit of God is seen as God's agent*; [GEN 3:22](https://ref.ly/Gen3:22), [GEN 11:7](https://ref.ly/Gen11:7); [EXO 3:2–3:6](https://ref.ly/Exod3:2-Exod3:6) *The angel of the LORD is identified with, yet distinct from, God*; [JDG 13:20–13:22](https://ref.ly/Judg13:20-Judg13:22); [NEH 9:20](https://ref.ly/Neh9:20); [PSA 139:7](https://ref.ly/Ps139:7); [ISA 6:8](https://ref.ly/Isa6:8), [ISA 63:10–63:14](https://ref.ly/Isa63:10-Isa63:14)

### The Trinity in the NT

**[MAT 28:19](https://ref.ly/Matt28:19)**; **[2CO 13:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:14)** *See also* [MAT 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/Matt3:16-Matt3:17); [JHN 14:26](https://ref.ly/John14:26), [JHN 15:26](https://ref.ly/John15:26); [ACT 2:32–2:33](https://ref.ly/Acts2:32-Acts2:33); [EPH 2:18](https://ref.ly/Eph2:18); [1PE 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:2)

* **Associated Passages:** Deuteronomy 6:4; Ephesians 4:6; 1 Timothy 2:5; Deuteronomy 4:35; Deuteronomy 32:39; Nehemiah 9:6; Psalms 83:18; Psalms 86:10; Isaiah 43:10; Isaiah 44:6; Isaiah 45:18; Mark 12:29; Mark 12:32; Romans 3:30; 1 Corinthians 8:6; James 2:19; 1 Kings 8:23; Exodus 8:10; 2 Samuel 7:22; 1 Chronicles 17:20; Psalms 89:6; Isaiah 40:18; Isaiah 40:25; Exodus 20:3-5; Deuteronomy 5:7-9; Jeremiah 25:6; Exodus 20:23; Exodus 34:14; Deuteronomy 6:14; Deuteronomy 13:6-8; 2 Kings 17:38-39; Psalms 81:9; Jeremiah 1:16; Jeremiah 19:4; Jeremiah 35:15; Mark 12:30; Matthew 22:37; Deuteronomy 6:4-5; Deuteronomy 6:13; Deuteronomy 13:4; 1 Samuel 7:3; Matthew 4:10; Luke 4:8; 1 Thessalonians 1:9-10; Isaiah 37:19; 1 Corinthians 8:4; 1 Corinthians 10:19-20; Deuteronomy 32:17; Psalms 106:36-37; Isaiah 40:18-20; Isaiah 44:9-11; Acts 14:15; Galatians 4:8; Genesis 1:26; Genesis 1:2; Genesis 3:22; Genesis 11:7; Exodus 3:2-6; Judges 13:20-22; Nehemiah 9:20; Psalms 139:7; Isaiah 6:8; Isaiah 63:10-14; Matthew 28:19; 2 Corinthians 13:14; Matthew 3:16-17; John 14:26; John 15:26; Acts 2:32-33; Ephesians 2:18; 1 Peter 1:2
* **Associated Articles:** 1060: God, greatness of (ID: `1060@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1130: God, sovereignty of (ID: `1130@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1165: God, uniqueness of (ID: `1165@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1510: Trinity, the (ID: `1510@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2018: Jesus Christ, divinity of (ID: `2018@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3015: Holy Spirit, divinity of (ID: `3015@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4140: angel of the Lord (ID: `4140@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8710: atheism (ID: `8710@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8768: idolatry (ID: `8768@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8799: polytheism (ID: `8799@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8140: prize (id: 8140)

Something of value given to those competing in a race, which the Christian life is likened to. Though believers must accept discipline and training, a prize is reserved for everyone who is committed to Jesus Christ.

A prize is reserved for all believers
-------------------------------------

**[2TI 4:7–4:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:7-2Tim4:8)** *The crown is the wreath given to the winner of a race.* *See also* [JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12); [1PE 5:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:4)

Requirements for winning the prize
----------------------------------

### Total dedication to God

**[ACT 20:24](https://ref.ly/Acts20:24)** *See also* [PHP 3:7–3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:7-Phil3:8)

### Perseverance

**[PHP 3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:14)** *See also* [PHP 2:16](https://ref.ly/Phil2:16); [HEB 12:1](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1); [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10), [REV 3:11](https://ref.ly/Rev3:11)

### Keeping God's rules

**[2TI 2:5](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:5)**

### Self\-discipline

**[1CO 9:25–9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:25-1Cor9:27)**

Hindrances to winning the prize
-------------------------------

### Falling into sin

**[HEB 12:1](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1)**

### Following false teaching

**[GAL 5:7](https://ref.ly/Gal5:7)** *See also* [GAL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Gal2:2); [COL 2:18](https://ref.ly/Col2:18)

* **Associated Passages:** 2 Timothy 4:7-8; James 1:12; 1 Peter 5:4; Acts 20:24; Philippians 3:7-8; Philippians 3:14; Philippians 2:16; Hebrews 12:1; Revelation 2:10; Revelation 3:11; 2 Timothy 2:5; 1 Corinthians 9:25-27; Galatians 5:7; Galatians 2:2; Colossians 2:18
* **Associated Articles:** 5280: crown (ID: `5280@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5498: reward (ID: `5498@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5591: treasure (ID: `5591@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5596: victory (ID: `5596@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8110: athletics (ID: `8110@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8207: commitment (ID: `8207@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8223: dedication (ID: `8223@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8248: faithfulness (ID: `8248@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8453: obedience (ID: `8453@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8459: perseverance (ID: `8459@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8476: self-discipline (ID: `8476@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9413: heaven, inheritance of (ID: `9413@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8142: religion (id: 8142)

A set of beliefs, a form of worship, ritual, prayer and a code of moral behaviour. True faith in God, moral standards and good works are important in relation to a biblical understanding of true religion, which is contrasted with the false religion of paganism.

Belief
------

**[HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)** *See also* [GEN 15:61](https://ref.ly/Gen15:61)SA [4:3–4:8](https://ref.ly/Gen4:3-Gen4:8); [1KI 20:23](https://ref.ly/1Kgs20:23)[JON 3:5](https://ref.ly/Jonah3:5); [JAS 2:19](https://ref.ly/Jas2:19) *Belief by itself is insufficient for salvation.*

Worship
-------

**[JON 1:16](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:16)** *See also* [2KI 19:37](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:37) parallel [ISA 37:38](https://ref.ly/Isa37:38); [JER 44:17–44:19](https://ref.ly/Jer44:17-Jer44:19); [ACT 17:22–17:23](https://ref.ly/Acts17:22-Acts17:23)

Ritual
------

**[MRK 7:3–7:4](https://ref.ly/Mark7:3-Mark7:4)** *See also* [EXO 32:2–32:6](https://ref.ly/Exod32:2-Exod32:6); [1KI 18:22–18:29](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:22-1Kgs18:29); [HEB 10:11](https://ref.ly/Heb10:11)

Prayer
------

**[ISA 44:17](https://ref.ly/Isa44:17)** *See also* [1KI 18:26](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:26); [ISA 45:20](https://ref.ly/Isa45:20); [LUK 2:37](https://ref.ly/Luke2:37); [ACT 10:4](https://ref.ly/Acts10:4)

Code of behaviour
-----------------

**[NEH 9:13–9:14](https://ref.ly/Neh9:13-Neh9:14)** *See also* [2KI 23:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:3) parallel [2CH 34:31](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:31); [MAT 19:16–19:20](https://ref.ly/Matt19:16-Matt19:20) parallels [MRK 10:17–10:20](https://ref.ly/Mark10:17-Mark10:20), [LUK 18:18–18:21](https://ref.ly/Luke18:18-Luke18:21); [MAT 23:23](https://ref.ly/Matt23:23) parallel [LUK 11:42](https://ref.ly/Luke11:42) *Religious people do not always see the inconsistencies in their behaviour*; [LUK 1:6](https://ref.ly/Luke1:6); [JHN 18:28](https://ref.ly/John18:28); [JAS 1:26](https://ref.ly/Jas1:26)

True religious practice
-----------------------

**[JAS 1:27](https://ref.ly/Jas1:27)**

### Moral standards

**[1CO 7:19](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:19)** *See also* [MAT 15:16–15:20](https://ref.ly/Matt15:16-Matt15:20) parallel [MRK 7:18–7:23](https://ref.ly/Mark7:18-Mark7:23); [MRK 12:33](https://ref.ly/Mark12:33); [LUK 11:39–11:41](https://ref.ly/Luke11:39-Luke11:41); [ROM 10:2–10:4](https://ref.ly/Rom10:2-Rom10:4), [ROM 14:17](https://ref.ly/Rom14:17)

### Good works

**[1TI 5:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:4)** *See also* [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21) parallels [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21), [LUK 18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22); [EPH 2:10](https://ref.ly/Eph2:10); [JAS 2:14–2:17](https://ref.ly/Jas2:14-Jas2:17)

## 8144: renewal (id: 8144)

The regeneration or revitalisation that God brings to his people and creation, as part of the process of redemption.

* **Associated Articles:** 8145: renewal, of people of God (ID: `8145@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8146: renewal, of natural order (ID: `8146@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8145: renewal, of people of God (id: 8145)

The transformation by God of the lives of his people, whether corporately or individually, leading to the recovery of lost vitality and purity.

Individual renewal
------------------

**[ISA 40:30–40:31](https://ref.ly/Isa40:30-Isa40:31)**; **[EPH 4:22–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22-Eph4:24)** *See also* [PSA 23:3](https://ref.ly/Ps23:3), [PSA 51:10–51:12](https://ref.ly/Ps51:10-Ps51:12), [PSA 103:1–103:5](https://ref.ly/Ps103:1-Ps103:5); [JHN 7:37–7:39](https://ref.ly/John7:37-John7:39); [ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2); [2CO 4:16](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:16); [COL 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:9-Col3:10); [2TI 1:6](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:6); [TIT 3:5](https://ref.ly/Titus3:5)

Corporate renewal
-----------------

### The renewal of Israel

**[EZK 37:1–37:14](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:1-Ezek37:14)** *See also* [JER 31:31–31:34](https://ref.ly/Jer31:31-Jer31:34); [LAM 5:21](https://ref.ly/Lam5:21); [EZK 11:17–11:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek11:17-Ezek11:20), [EZK 36:24–36:28](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:24-Ezek36:28); [JOL 2:28–2:32](https://ref.ly/Joel2:28-Joel2:32)

### Examples of national renewal

**[2CH 34:29–34:33](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:29-2Chr34:33)** *See also* [JOS 24:1](https://ref.ly/Josh24:1), [JOS 24:14–24:27](https://ref.ly/Josh24:14-Josh24:27); [EZR 10:1–10:4](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:1-Ezra10:4); [NEH 10:28–10:29](https://ref.ly/Neh10:28-Neh10:29)

### The new Jerusalem

**[ISA 65:17–65:19](https://ref.ly/Isa65:17-Isa65:19)** *See also* [REV 3:12](https://ref.ly/Rev3:12), [REV 21:2–21:4](https://ref.ly/Rev21:2-Rev21:4), [REV 21:10](https://ref.ly/Rev21:10)

### The church

**[MAT 9:16–9:19](https://ref.ly/Matt9:16-Matt9:19)** parallels [MRK 2:21–2:22](https://ref.ly/Mark2:21-Mark2:22), [LUK 5:36–5:39](https://ref.ly/Luke5:36-Luke5:39) *Jesus Christ here prophesies the great act of renewal by God whereby the church rather than Israel becomes the people of God.* *See also* [ACT 2:1–2:4](https://ref.ly/Acts2:1-Acts2:4), [ACT 2:42–2:47](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42-Acts2:47)

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 40:30-31; Ephesians 4:22-24; Psalms 23:3; Psalms 51:10-12; Psalms 103:1-5; John 7:37-39; Romans 12:2; 2 Corinthians 4:16; Colossians 3:9-10; 2 Timothy 1:6; Titus 3:5; Ezekiel 37:1-14; Jeremiah 31:31-34; Lamentations 5:21; Ezekiel 11:17-20; Ezekiel 36:24-28; Joel 2:28-32; 2 Chronicles 34:29-33; Joshua 24:1; Joshua 24:14-27; Ezra 10:1-4; Nehemiah 10:28-29; Isaiah 65:17-19; Revelation 3:12; Revelation 21:2-4; Revelation 21:10; Matthew 9:16-19; Mark 2:21-22; Luke 5:36-39; Acts 2:1-4; Acts 2:42-47

## 8146: renewal, of natural order (id: 8146)

God's transformation of the natural order is part of his plan of redeeming the whole universe as well as humanity.

Cosmic renewal
--------------

**[REV 21:1](https://ref.ly/Rev21:1)**; **[ROM 8:19–8:21](https://ref.ly/Rom8:19-Rom8:21)** *See also* [ISA 65:17](https://ref.ly/Isa65:17), [ISA 66:22](https://ref.ly/Isa66:22); [MAT 19:28](https://ref.ly/Matt19:28); [2PE 3:10–3:13](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:10-2Pet3:13); [REV 21:5](https://ref.ly/Rev21:5)

The renewal of nature
---------------------

**[ISA 11:6–11:9](https://ref.ly/Isa11:6-Isa11:9)** *See also* [PSA 104:30](https://ref.ly/Ps104:30); [ISA 35:1–35:2](https://ref.ly/Isa35:1-Isa35:2), [ISA 35:5–35:7](https://ref.ly/Isa35:5-Isa35:7), [ISA 43:18–43:21](https://ref.ly/Isa43:18-Isa43:21), [ISA 65:25](https://ref.ly/Isa65:25); [EZK 34:25–34:27](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:25-Ezek34:27)

* **Associated Passages:** Revelation 21:1; Romans 8:19-21; Isaiah 65:17; Isaiah 66:22; Matthew 19:28; 2 Peter 3:10-13; Revelation 21:5; Isaiah 11:6-9; Psalms 104:30; Isaiah 35:1-2; Isaiah 35:5-7; Isaiah 43:18-21; Isaiah 65:25; Ezekiel 34:25-27
* **Associated Articles:** 1325: God, the Creator (ID: `1325@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4010: creation, renewal of (ID: `4010@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4028: world, as redeemed (ID: `4028@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4060: nature (ID: `4060@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4287: universe (ID: `4287@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5977: waiting (ID: `5977@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6698: newness (ID: `6698@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6720: redemption (ID: `6720@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9160: new heavens and new earth (ID: `9160@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8148: revival (id: 8148)

The soveriegn activity of God whereby he renews his people individually and corporately in vigour, affecting both sincerity of belief and quality of behaviour.

* **Associated Articles:** 8149: revival, nature of (ID: `8149@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8150: revival, personal (ID: `8150@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8151: revival, corporate (ID: `8151@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8149: revival, nature of (id: 8149)

Scripture indicates that a number of characteristics precede revival, including repentance, humility and obedience.

Characteristics which precede revival
-------------------------------------

### God's people long for renewal of their lives

**[PSA 80:18](https://ref.ly/Ps80:18)** *See also* [PSA 74:22](https://ref.ly/Ps74:22), [PSA 80:1–80:17](https://ref.ly/Ps80:1-Ps80:17), [PSA 80:19](https://ref.ly/Ps80:19), [PSA 85:6](https://ref.ly/Ps85:6)

### God's people must repent

**[2CH 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:14)** *See also* [1KI 8:46–8:50](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:46-1Kgs8:50) parallel [2CH 6:26–6:27](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:26-2Chr6:27); [ISA 64:1–64:7](https://ref.ly/Isa64:1-Isa64:7); [HOS 5:15](https://ref.ly/Hos5:15); [ACT 3:19](https://ref.ly/Acts3:19)

### God's people experience a new awareness of sin

**[2KI 22:11](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:11)** *See also* [PSA 32:3–32:5](https://ref.ly/Ps32:3-Ps32:5)

### God's people need to be humble

**[ISA 57:15](https://ref.ly/Isa57:15)** *See also* [PSA 149:4](https://ref.ly/Ps149:4); [ISA 66:2](https://ref.ly/Isa66:2); [MIC 6:6–6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:6-Mic6:8)

### God's people are revived through God's initiative

**[ISA 59:16](https://ref.ly/Isa59:16)** *See also* [JER 24:7](https://ref.ly/Jer24:7), [JER 33:6–33:9](https://ref.ly/Jer33:6-Jer33:9); [TIT 3:5](https://ref.ly/Titus3:5)

Characteristic results of revival
---------------------------------

### People experience inward change

**[HEB 8:10–8:12](https://ref.ly/Heb8:10-Heb8:12)** *See also* [JER 31:33–31:34](https://ref.ly/Jer31:33-Jer31:34); [EZK 11:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek11:19); [ACT 2:42–2:47](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42-Acts2:47)

### People live obedient lives

**[EZK 11:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek11:20)** *See also* [EPH 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/Eph4:1-Eph4:3); [1TH 1:7–1:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:7-1Thess1:8)

### People are zealous for God's work

**[EZR 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Ezra5:1-Ezra5:2)** *See also* [HAG 1:12–1:15](https://ref.ly/Hag1:12-Hag1:15)

### People are generous in giving

**[EXO 36:5](https://ref.ly/Exod36:5)** *See also* [1CH 29:6–29:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:6-1Chr29:9); [2CH 31:3–31:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:3-2Chr31:8); [ACT 11:28–11:30](https://ref.ly/Acts11:28-Acts11:30)

### People delight in worshipping God

**[EZR 3:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra3:11)** *See also* [ISA 12:1–12:6](https://ref.ly/Isa12:1-Isa12:6)

### People are joyful

**[ACT 13:49–13:52](https://ref.ly/Acts13:49-Acts13:52)** *See also* [ISA 35:1–35:10](https://ref.ly/Isa35:1-Isa35:10); [ACT 8:5–8:8](https://ref.ly/Acts8:5-Acts8:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 80:18; Psalms 74:22; Psalms 80:1-17; Psalms 80:19; Psalms 85:6; 2 Chronicles 7:14; 1 Kings 8:46-50; 2 Chronicles 6:26-27; Isaiah 64:1-7; Hosea 5:15; Acts 3:19; 2 Kings 22:11; Psalms 32:3-5; Isaiah 57:15; Psalms 149:4; Isaiah 66:2; Micah 6:6-8; Isaiah 59:16; Jeremiah 24:7; Jeremiah 33:6-9; Titus 3:5; Hebrews 8:10-12; Jeremiah 31:33-34; Ezekiel 11:19; Acts 2:42-47; Ezekiel 11:20; Ephesians 4:1-3; 1 Thessalonians 1:7-8; Ezra 5:1-2; Haggai 1:12-15; Exodus 36:5; 1 Chronicles 29:6-9; 2 Chronicles 31:3-8; Acts 11:28-30; Ezra 3:11; Isaiah 12:1-6; Acts 13:49-52; Isaiah 35:1-10; Acts 8:5-8
* **Associated Articles:** 1030: God, compassion of (ID: `1030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1130: God, sovereignty of (ID: `1130@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1325: God, the Creator (ID: `1325@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6020: sin (ID: `6020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6732: repentance (ID: `6732@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8276: humility (ID: `8276@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8283: joy (ID: `8283@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8434: giving (ID: `8434@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8453: obedience (ID: `8453@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8622: worship (ID: `8622@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8150: revival, personal (id: 8150)

The bringing back of individuals to life or vigour both at the point of personal regeneration through the work of the Holy Spirit and at other times in believers' lives.

Aspects of individual revival
-----------------------------

### Physical revival

**[ISA 38:16](https://ref.ly/Isa38:16)** *See also* [JDG 15:18–15:19](https://ref.ly/Judg15:18-Judg15:19); [1SA 14:27](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:27), [1SA 30:11–30:12](https://ref.ly/1Sam30:11-1Sam30:12); [1KI 19:7–19:8](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:7-1Kgs19:8); [JOB 33:25](https://ref.ly/Job33:25); [PSA 41:3](https://ref.ly/Ps41:3), [PSA 116:8–116:9](https://ref.ly/Ps116:8-Ps116:9)

### Revival of hope

**[GEN 45:27](https://ref.ly/Gen45:27)** *See also* [RUT 4:14–4:15](https://ref.ly/Ruth4:14-Ruth4:15)

### Revival of sanity

[DAN 4:26](https://ref.ly/Dan4:26), [DAN 4:34](https://ref.ly/Dan4:34), [DAN 4:36](https://ref.ly/Dan4:36)

### Spiritual revival

**[PSA 23:3](https://ref.ly/Ps23:3)** *See also* [1KI 19:9–19:15](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:9-1Kgs19:15); [JHN 21:15–21:19](https://ref.ly/John21:15-John21:19)

The Holy Spirit brings regeneration by giving spiritual life to those dead in sin
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[EPH 2:1–2:5](https://ref.ly/Eph2:1-Eph2:5); ; [TIT 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Titus3:5-Titus3:6)

Preparation for personal spiritual revival
------------------------------------------

### The Holy Spirit convicts

[JHN 16:8–16:11](https://ref.ly/John16:8-John16:11); ; [ACT 2:37](https://ref.ly/Acts2:37); ; [1TH 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:5)

### Individuals appeal to God

**[JER 17:14](https://ref.ly/Jer17:14)** *See also* [PSA 51:7–51:12](https://ref.ly/Ps51:7-Ps51:12), [PSA 119:34–119:37](https://ref.ly/Ps119:34-Ps119:37)

### Individuals long for God

**[PSA 42:1–42:2](https://ref.ly/Ps42:1-Ps42:2)** *See also* [PSA 63:1](https://ref.ly/Ps63:1)

### Personal repentance is required

**[PSA 51:1–51:4](https://ref.ly/Ps51:1-Ps51:4)** *See also* [2CH 32:26](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:26), [2CH 33:11–33:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr33:11-2Chr33:13); [JOB 22:23](https://ref.ly/Job22:23); [JER 15:19](https://ref.ly/Jer15:19)

The believer must take responsibility for personal revival
----------------------------------------------------------

**[2TI 1:6](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:6)**

God is active in bringing about personal revival
------------------------------------------------

**[ISA 57:15](https://ref.ly/Isa57:15)** *See also* [PSA 43:3–43:4](https://ref.ly/Ps43:3-Ps43:4); [ISA 40:31](https://ref.ly/Isa40:31); [HAG 1:14](https://ref.ly/Hag1:14)

### God's law may initiate personal revival

**[PSA 19:7](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7)** *See also* [PSA 119:130](https://ref.ly/Ps119:130), [PSA 119:162](https://ref.ly/Ps119:162)

The fruit of personal revival
-----------------------------

### God receives praise

**[PSA 40:3](https://ref.ly/Ps40:3)** *See also* [2SA 22:50](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:50) parallel [PSA 18:49](https://ref.ly/Ps18:49); [PSA 51:15](https://ref.ly/Ps51:15), [PSA 59:16](https://ref.ly/Ps59:16), [PSA 61:8](https://ref.ly/Ps61:8)

### God is obeyed

**[2CH 33:15–33:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr33:15-2Chr33:16)** *See also* [ACT 2:14](https://ref.ly/Acts2:14) *Peter had denied Jesus Christ seven weeks before.*

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 38:16; Judges 15:18-19; 1 Samuel 14:27; 1 Samuel 30:11-12; 1 Kings 19:7-8; Job 33:25; Psalms 41:3; Psalms 116:8-9; Genesis 45:27; Ruth 4:14-15; Daniel 4:26; Daniel 4:34; Daniel 4:36; Psalms 23:3; 1 Kings 19:9-15; John 21:15-19; Ephesians 2:1-5; Titus 3:5-6; John 16:8-11; Acts 2:37; 1 Thessalonians 1:5; Jeremiah 17:14; Psalms 51:7-12; Psalms 119:34-37; Psalms 42:1-2; Psalms 63:1; Psalms 51:1-4; 2 Chronicles 32:26; 2 Chronicles 33:11-13; Job 22:23; Jeremiah 15:19; 2 Timothy 1:6; Isaiah 57:15; Psalms 43:3-4; Isaiah 40:31; Haggai 1:14; Psalms 19:7; Psalms 119:130; Psalms 119:162; Psalms 40:3; 2 Samuel 22:50; Psalms 18:49; Psalms 51:15; Psalms 59:16; Psalms 61:8; 2 Chronicles 33:15-16; Acts 2:14

## 8151: revival, corporate (id: 8151)

The experience of God's people both in the OT and NT when prayer is answered and their growth and effectiveness are renewed.

The recurring pattern of apostasy and revival in the OT
-------------------------------------------------------

[JDG 2:10–2:19](https://ref.ly/Judg2:10-Judg2:19)

God is petitioned to revive his people
--------------------------------------

**[PSA 80:14–80:15](https://ref.ly/Ps80:14-Ps80:15)** *See also* [PSA 85:4–85:7](https://ref.ly/Ps85:4-Ps85:7); [JER 31:18](https://ref.ly/Jer31:18); [LAM 5:21](https://ref.ly/Lam5:21); [HAB 3:2](https://ref.ly/Hab3:2)

Repentance is necessary for revival
-----------------------------------

### God's people are urged to repent

**[2CH 30:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:6)** *Hezekiah's appeal to all Israel.* *See also* [ISA 55:1–55:3](https://ref.ly/Isa55:1-Isa55:3); [JER 3:22](https://ref.ly/Jer3:22); [LAM 3:40](https://ref.ly/Lam3:40); [HOS 12:6](https://ref.ly/Hos12:6), [HOS 14:1–14:2](https://ref.ly/Hos14:1-Hos14:2); [ZEC 1:3](https://ref.ly/Zech1:3); [MAL 3:7](https://ref.ly/Mal3:7); [REV 2:5](https://ref.ly/Rev2:5), [REV 2:16](https://ref.ly/Rev2:16), [REV 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/Rev3:2-Rev3:3)

### Wholehearted repentance is required

**[JOL 2:12–2:13](https://ref.ly/Joel2:12-Joel2:13)** *See also* [DEU 4:29](https://ref.ly/Deut4:29), [DEU 30:2–30:3](https://ref.ly/Deut30:2-Deut30:3); [JER 24:7](https://ref.ly/Jer24:7), [JER 29:13–29:14](https://ref.ly/Jer29:13-Jer29:14); [ACT 19:18–19:19](https://ref.ly/Acts19:18-Acts19:19) *Repentance should be evidenced by deeds.*

### Repentance prepares for revival

**[ISA 59:20](https://ref.ly/Isa59:20)** *See also* [JDG 10:9–10:16](https://ref.ly/Judg10:9-Judg10:16); [EZR 10:1](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:1), [EZR 10:10–10:12](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:10-Ezra10:12); [NEH 1:9](https://ref.ly/Neh1:9); [EZK 18:30–18:32](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:30-Ezek18:32)

Revival is God's work
---------------------

**[HOS 6:2](https://ref.ly/Hos6:2)** *See also* [PSA 80:3](https://ref.ly/Ps80:3), [PSA 80:7](https://ref.ly/Ps80:7), [PSA 80:17–80:19](https://ref.ly/Ps80:17-Ps80:19); [ISA 32:14–32:17](https://ref.ly/Isa32:14-Isa32:17)

God promises revival
--------------------

### God promises to revive his people

**[EZK 11:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek11:19)** *See also* [JER 31:33–31:34](https://ref.ly/Jer31:33-Jer31:34); [EZK 36:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:26); [ZEC 10:6](https://ref.ly/Zech10:6)

### The nations are included in the promise of revival

**[ISA 2:3](https://ref.ly/Isa2:3)** parallel [MIC 4:2](https://ref.ly/Mic4:2) *See also* [ISA 19:22–19:25](https://ref.ly/Isa19:22-Isa19:25), [ISA 45:22](https://ref.ly/Isa45:22), [ISA 56:6–56:8](https://ref.ly/Isa56:6-Isa56:8); [ZEC 8:20–8:22](https://ref.ly/Zech8:20-Zech8:22)

The revival of Israel
---------------------

### Under Hezekiah

[2KI 18:4–18:6](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:4-2Kgs18:6); ; [2CH 29:3–29:5](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:3-2Chr29:5), [2CH 30:1](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:1), [2CH 31:4](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:4), [2CH 31:9–31:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:9-2Chr31:10), [2CH 31:20–31:21](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:20-2Chr31:21)

### Under Josiah

[2KI 23:1–23:4](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:1-2Kgs23:4) parallel [2CH 34:29–34:33](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:29-2Chr34:33); ; [2CH 35:1–35:3](https://ref.ly/2Chr35:1-2Chr35:3)

Revival in the NT
-----------------

### Crowds turn to the Lord

[MRK 1:5](https://ref.ly/Mark1:5); ; [JHN 3:26](https://ref.ly/John3:26), [JHN 4:39](https://ref.ly/John4:39); ; [ACT 2:41](https://ref.ly/Acts2:41), [ACT 2:47](https://ref.ly/Acts2:47), [ACT 4:4](https://ref.ly/Acts4:4), [ACT 11:21](https://ref.ly/Acts11:21)

### The Holy Spirit is active in the revival of believers

**[ACT 4:31](https://ref.ly/Acts4:31)** *See also* [ACT 13:9](https://ref.ly/Acts13:9); [2CO 4:16](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:16); [EPH 5:18](https://ref.ly/Eph5:18)

### The response of believers in revival

**[ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2)** *See also* [EPH 4:23–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:23-Eph4:24); [PHP 3:13–3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:13-Phil3:14); [COL 3:9–3:14](https://ref.ly/Col3:9-Col3:14)

* **Associated Passages:** Judges 2:10-19; Psalms 80:14-15; Psalms 85:4-7; Jeremiah 31:18; Lamentations 5:21; Habakkuk 3:2; 2 Chronicles 30:6; Isaiah 55:1-3; Jeremiah 3:22; Lamentations 3:40; Hosea 12:6; Hosea 14:1-2; Zechariah 1:3; Malachi 3:7; Revelation 2:5; Revelation 2:16; Revelation 3:2-3; Joel 2:12-13; Deuteronomy 4:29; Deuteronomy 30:2-3; Jeremiah 24:7; Jeremiah 29:13-14; Acts 19:18-19; Isaiah 59:20; Judges 10:9-16; Ezra 10:1; Ezra 10:10-12; Nehemiah 1:9; Ezekiel 18:30-32; Hosea 6:2; Psalms 80:3; Psalms 80:7; Psalms 80:17-19; Isaiah 32:14-17; Ezekiel 11:19; Jeremiah 31:33-34; Ezekiel 36:26; Zechariah 10:6; Isaiah 2:3; Micah 4:2; Isaiah 19:22-25; Isaiah 45:22; Isaiah 56:6-8; Zechariah 8:20-22; 2 Kings 18:4-6; 2 Chronicles 29:3-5; 2 Chronicles 30:1; 2 Chronicles 31:4; 2 Chronicles 31:9-10; 2 Chronicles 31:20-21; 2 Kings 23:1-4; 2 Chronicles 34:29-33; 2 Chronicles 35:1-3; Mark 1:5; John 3:26; John 4:39; Acts 2:41; Acts 2:47; Acts 4:4; Acts 11:21; Acts 4:31; Acts 13:9; 2 Corinthians 4:16; Ephesians 5:18; Romans 12:1-2; Ephesians 4:23-24; Philippians 3:13-14; Colossians 3:9-14

## 8154: righteousness (id: 8154)

Scripture identifies a close link between righteousness and faith. Part of “being in a right relationship with God” is believing and trusting in him. The NT does not see faith simply in terms of moral righteousness, but also in terms of a living trusting relationship with God. Scripture affirms the righteousness of God and Jesus Christ in all their activity.

* **Associated Articles:** 8155: righteousness, of God (ID: `8155@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8156: righteousness, of Jesus Christ (ID: `8156@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8157: righteousness, as faith (ID: `8157@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8158: righteousness, of believers (ID: `8158@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8155: righteousness, of God (id: 8155)

See [1125: God, righteousness of](1125.md)



## 8156: righteousness, of Jesus Christ (id: 8156)

See [2072: Jesus Christ, righteousness of](2072.md)



## 8157: righteousness, as faith (id: 8157)

Full faith and trust make a person pleasing in the sight of God.

Human righteousness compared with God's righteousness
-----------------------------------------------------

### Human beings cannot by themselves achieve righteousness in the sight of God

**[ECC 7:20](https://ref.ly/Eccl7:20)**; **[ISA 64:6](https://ref.ly/Isa64:6)**; **[MAT 5:20](https://ref.ly/Matt5:20)** *See also* [PRO 21:2](https://ref.ly/Prov21:2); [DAN 9:18](https://ref.ly/Dan9:18); [MAT 23:28](https://ref.ly/Matt23:28); [LUK 16:15](https://ref.ly/Luke16:15), [LUK 18:9](https://ref.ly/Luke18:9); [ROM 3:10](https://ref.ly/Rom3:10), [ROM 3:20](https://ref.ly/Rom3:20); [PHP 3:6–3:7](https://ref.ly/Phil3:6-Phil3:7)

True righteousness is the result of the action of God
-----------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 8:3–8:4](https://ref.ly/Rom8:3-Rom8:4)**; **[EPH 4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:24)**; **[1JN 2:29](https://ref.ly/1John2:29)** *See also* [ROM 6:13](https://ref.ly/Rom6:13), [ROM 6:16–6:20](https://ref.ly/Rom6:16-Rom6:20), [ROM 8:10](https://ref.ly/Rom8:10), [ROM 14:17](https://ref.ly/Rom14:17); [GAL 5:5](https://ref.ly/Gal5:5); [EPH 5:9](https://ref.ly/Eph5:9); [PHP 1:11](https://ref.ly/Phil1:11); [HEB 12:11](https://ref.ly/Heb12:11); [JAS 3:18](https://ref.ly/Jas3:18); [1PE 2:24](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:24); [1JN 3:10](https://ref.ly/1John3:10)

Faith pleases God
-----------------

**[GEN 15:6](https://ref.ly/Gen15:6)**; **[HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)** *See also* [1SA 26:23](https://ref.ly/1Sam26:23); [PSA 32:10](https://ref.ly/Ps32:10), [PSA 40:4](https://ref.ly/Ps40:4), [PSA 84:12](https://ref.ly/Ps84:12), [PSA 106:30–106:31](https://ref.ly/Ps106:30-Ps106:31); [JER 17:7](https://ref.ly/Jer17:7); [HAB 2:4](https://ref.ly/Hab2:4); [HEB 10:38](https://ref.ly/Heb10:38), [HEB 11:4](https://ref.ly/Heb11:4), [HEB 11:7](https://ref.ly/Heb11:7)

Righteousness and faith in Jesus Christ
---------------------------------------

### It is God\-given and not the result of human effort

**[ROM 1:17](https://ref.ly/Rom1:17)**; **[PHP 3:8–3:9](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8-Phil3:9)** *Paul is contrasting this righteousness with his own previous efforts.* *See also* [ACT 13:39](https://ref.ly/Acts13:39); [ROM 3:21](https://ref.ly/Rom3:21), [ROM 3:27–3:28](https://ref.ly/Rom3:27-Rom3:28) *It is apparent that faith is not regarded as another kind of “work” which earns salvation*; [ROM 4:1–4:8](https://ref.ly/Rom4:1-Rom4:8), [ROM 5:17](https://ref.ly/Rom5:17), [ROM 9:30–9:31](https://ref.ly/Rom9:30-Rom9:31); [GAL 3:11–3:12](https://ref.ly/Gal3:11-Gal3:12)

### Faith is centred on Jesus Christ and what he has accomplished

**[ROM 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Rom5:1-Rom5:2)** *“justified” means “declared righteous” in a legal sense.* *See also* [ROM 3:21–3:26](https://ref.ly/Rom3:21-Rom3:26), [ROM 4:18–4:25](https://ref.ly/Rom4:18-Rom4:25), [ROM 10:6–10:10](https://ref.ly/Rom10:6-Rom10:10); [GAL 3:6–3:9](https://ref.ly/Gal3:6-Gal3:9)

### Saving faith is not mere belief, but acting on the basis of that belief

[JAS 2:21–2:24](https://ref.ly/Jas2:21-Jas2:24)

* **Associated Passages:** Ecclesiastes 7:20; Isaiah 64:6; Matthew 5:20; Proverbs 21:2; Daniel 9:18; Matthew 23:28; Luke 16:15; Luke 18:9; Romans 3:10; Romans 3:20; Philippians 3:6-7; Romans 8:3-4; Ephesians 4:24; 1 John 2:29; Romans 6:13; Romans 6:16-20; Romans 8:10; Romans 14:17; Galatians 5:5; Ephesians 5:9; Philippians 1:11; Hebrews 12:11; James 3:18; 1 Peter 2:24; 1 John 3:10; Genesis 15:6; Hebrews 11:6; 1 Samuel 26:23; Psalms 32:10; Psalms 40:4; Psalms 84:12; Psalms 106:30-31; Jeremiah 17:7; Habakkuk 2:4; Hebrews 10:38; Hebrews 11:4; Hebrews 11:7; Romans 1:17; Philippians 3:8-9; Acts 13:39; Romans 3:21; Romans 3:27-28; Romans 4:1-8; Romans 5:17; Romans 9:30-31; Galatians 3:11-12; Romans 5:1-2; Romans 3:21-26; Romans 4:18-25; Romans 10:6-10; Galatians 3:6-9; James 2:21-24
