## 8158: righteousness, of believers (id: 8158)

A sincere desire to please God by keeping his law is both commanded and approved by him. However, human fallibility means that true righteousness must be the product of the Holy Spirit's work in the believer.

Righteousness includes keeping the laws of God
----------------------------------------------

**[DEU 6:25](https://ref.ly/Deut6:25)**; **[JOB 27:6](https://ref.ly/Job27:6)**; **[1JN 3:7](https://ref.ly/1John3:7)** *See also* [GEN 6:9](https://ref.ly/Gen6:9) *Noah*; [GEN 18:19](https://ref.ly/Gen18:19) *Abraham*; [DEU 6:17–6:18](https://ref.ly/Deut6:17-Deut6:18); [1KI 3:6](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:6) *David*; [1KI 15:11](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:11); [2CH 31:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:20) *Hezekiah*; [PSA 7:8](https://ref.ly/Ps7:8), [PSA 15:1–15:5](https://ref.ly/Ps15:1-Ps15:5), [PSA 17:1](https://ref.ly/Ps17:1), [PSA 32:11](https://ref.ly/Ps32:11), [PSA 45:7](https://ref.ly/Ps45:7); [ISA 26:7–26:9](https://ref.ly/Isa26:7-Isa26:9), [ISA 48:18](https://ref.ly/Isa48:18), [ISA 51:1](https://ref.ly/Isa51:1); [HOS 14:9](https://ref.ly/Hos14:9); [LUK 2:25](https://ref.ly/Luke2:25) *Simeon*; [ACT 4:19](https://ref.ly/Acts4:19); [2CO 6:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:14); [2TI 3:15–3:16](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:15-2Tim3:16)

God requires righteousness of his people
----------------------------------------

**[AMO 5:24](https://ref.ly/Amos5:24)**; **[MAT 6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:33)** *See also* [ISA 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Isa1:16-Isa1:17), [ISA 56:1](https://ref.ly/Isa56:1); [JER 22:3](https://ref.ly/Jer22:3); [HOS 10:12](https://ref.ly/Hos10:12); [ZEP 2:3](https://ref.ly/Zeph2:3); [MAT 5:6](https://ref.ly/Matt5:6); [EPH 6:14](https://ref.ly/Eph6:14); [1TI 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:11); [2TI 2:22](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:22)

God loves those who are righteous
---------------------------------

**[PSA 146:8](https://ref.ly/Ps146:8)**; **[PRO 15:9](https://ref.ly/Prov15:9)**; **[JAS 1:20](https://ref.ly/Jas1:20)** *See also* [PSA 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/Ps1:5-Ps1:6), [PSA 14:5](https://ref.ly/Ps14:5), [PSA 33:5](https://ref.ly/Ps33:5), [PSA 37:6](https://ref.ly/Ps37:6), [PSA 37:28–37:30](https://ref.ly/Ps37:28-Ps37:30), [PSA 106:3](https://ref.ly/Ps106:3); [PRO 10:16](https://ref.ly/Prov10:16)

The righteous receive blessing from God
---------------------------------------

**[PRO 12:28](https://ref.ly/Prov12:28)**; **[MAT 13:43](https://ref.ly/Matt13:43)** *See also* [PSA 5:12](https://ref.ly/Ps5:12), [PSA 34:15](https://ref.ly/Ps34:15) *the LORD watches over them*; [PSA 37:16–37:17](https://ref.ly/Ps37:16-Ps37:17), [PSA 55:22](https://ref.ly/Ps55:22), [PSA 92:12](https://ref.ly/Ps92:12), [PSA 112:4](https://ref.ly/Ps112:4); [PRO 10:2–10:3](https://ref.ly/Prov10:2-Prov10:3), [PRO 10:6–10:7](https://ref.ly/Prov10:6-Prov10:7), [PRO 10:16](https://ref.ly/Prov10:16), [PRO 10:29–10:32](https://ref.ly/Prov10:29-Prov10:32) *they are secure*; [PRO 11:4–11:6](https://ref.ly/Prov11:4-Prov11:6); [ISA 3:10](https://ref.ly/Isa3:10), [ISA 33:15–33:16](https://ref.ly/Isa33:15-Isa33:16); [DAN 12:3](https://ref.ly/Dan12:3); [JAS 5:16](https://ref.ly/Jas5:16) *their prayers are effective*

The righteous may suffer for their faith
----------------------------------------

**[MAT 5:10](https://ref.ly/Matt5:10)** *See also* [PSA 94:21](https://ref.ly/Ps94:21); [ISA 57:1](https://ref.ly/Isa57:1); [AMO 2:6](https://ref.ly/Amos2:6), [AMO 5:12](https://ref.ly/Amos5:12); [1PE 3:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:14)

* **Associated Passages:** Deuteronomy 6:25; Job 27:6; 1 John 3:7; Genesis 6:9; Genesis 18:19; Deuteronomy 6:17-18; 1 Kings 3:6; 1 Kings 15:11; 2 Chronicles 31:20; Psalms 7:8; Psalms 15:1-5; Psalms 17:1; Psalms 32:11; Psalms 45:7; Isaiah 26:7-9; Isaiah 48:18; Isaiah 51:1; Hosea 14:9; Luke 2:25; Acts 4:19; 2 Corinthians 6:14; 2 Timothy 3:15-16; Amos 5:24; Matthew 6:33; Isaiah 1:16-17; Isaiah 56:1; Jeremiah 22:3; Hosea 10:12; Zephaniah 2:3; Matthew 5:6; Ephesians 6:14; 1 Timothy 6:11; 2 Timothy 2:22; Psalms 146:8; Proverbs 15:9; James 1:20; Psalms 1:5-6; Psalms 14:5; Psalms 33:5; Psalms 37:6; Psalms 37:28-30; Psalms 106:3; Proverbs 10:16; Proverbs 12:28; Matthew 13:43; Psalms 5:12; Psalms 34:15; Psalms 37:16-17; Psalms 55:22; Psalms 92:12; Psalms 112:4; Proverbs 10:2-3; Proverbs 10:6-7; Proverbs 10:29-32; Proverbs 11:4-6; Isaiah 3:10; Isaiah 33:15-16; Daniel 12:3; James 5:16; Matthew 5:10; Psalms 94:21; Isaiah 57:1; Amos 2:6; Amos 5:12; 1 Peter 3:14
* **Associated Articles:** 1620: beatitudes, the (ID: `1620@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3233: Holy Spirit, and sanctification (ID: `3233@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5380: law, and gospel (ID: `5380@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6744: sanctification (ID: `6744@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7150: righteous, the (ID: `7150@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7449: slavery, spiritual (ID: `7449@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8201: blamelessness (ID: `8201@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8266: holiness (ID: `8266@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8453: obedience (ID: `8453@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8460: pleasing God (ID: `8460@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8794: persecution (ID: `8794@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8823: self-righteousness (ID: `8823@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8160: seeking God (id: 8160)

God's desire is that all people should seek after him and find him. Those who seek God with all their heart are rewarded, but those who fail to seek him do so to their eternal loss.

God's heart is for people to seek him
-------------------------------------

### God wants people to seek him

**[ACT 17:27](https://ref.ly/Acts17:27)** *See also* [1CH 16:11](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:11), [1CH 22:19](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:19); [PSA 14:2](https://ref.ly/Ps14:2); [ACT 15:16–15:17](https://ref.ly/Acts15:16-Acts15:17); [AMO 9:11–9:12](https://ref.ly/Amos9:11-Amos9:12); [HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)

### God calls people to seek him

**[ISA 55:6–55:7](https://ref.ly/Isa55:6-Isa55:7)** *See also* [HOS 10:12](https://ref.ly/Hos10:12); [AMO 5:4–5:6](https://ref.ly/Amos5:4-Amos5:6)

### God promises that people will seek him

**[JER 50:4](https://ref.ly/Jer50:4)** *See also* [HOS 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Hos3:4-Hos3:5), [HOS 5:13–5:15](https://ref.ly/Hos5:13-Hos5:15); [ZEP 2:3](https://ref.ly/Zeph2:3); [ZEC 8:20–8:23](https://ref.ly/Zech8:20-Zech8:23)

### God promises to be found by those who seek him

**[PRO 8:17](https://ref.ly/Prov8:17)** *See also* [DEU 4:29–4:31](https://ref.ly/Deut4:29-Deut4:31); [1CH 28:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:9); [2CH 15:1–15:2](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:1-2Chr15:2); [ISA 45:19](https://ref.ly/Isa45:19); [JER 29:11–29:14](https://ref.ly/Jer29:11-Jer29:14); [MAT 7:7–7:8](https://ref.ly/Matt7:7-Matt7:8) parallel [LUK 11:9–11:10](https://ref.ly/Luke11:9-Luke11:10)

### God's opportunity for seeking him is now and is restricted to this life

**[2CO 6:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:2)** *See also* [LUK 16:19–16:31](https://ref.ly/Luke16:19-Luke16:31)

Seeking God is an issue of the heart
------------------------------------

### Seeking God begins in the heart

**[PSA 27:8](https://ref.ly/Ps27:8)** *See also* [2CH 11:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr11:16)

### Wholeheartedness in seeking God is required

**[JER 29:13](https://ref.ly/Jer29:13)** *See also* [DEU 4:27–4:29](https://ref.ly/Deut4:27-Deut4:29); [1CH 22:17–22:19](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:17-1Chr22:19); [2CH 15:12–15:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:12-2Chr15:15); [PSA 63:1](https://ref.ly/Ps63:1)

Seeking God and his kingdom is the priority of life
---------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:33)** parallel [LUK 12:31](https://ref.ly/Luke12:31) *See also* [PSA 27:4](https://ref.ly/Ps27:4); [MAT 13:44–13:46](https://ref.ly/Matt13:44-Matt13:46)

Examples of people seeking God
------------------------------

[2KI 22:11–22:20](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:11-2Kgs22:20) *Josiah*; ; [2CH 14:2–14:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr14:2-2Chr14:7) *Asa*; [2CH 17:3–17:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr17:3-2Chr17:6), [2CH 20:1–20:4](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:1-2Chr20:4); [EZR 8:21–8:23](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:21-Ezra8:23) *Ezra*; ; [PSA 27:4–27:8](https://ref.ly/Ps27:4-Ps27:8); ; [DAN 9:2–9:3](https://ref.ly/Dan9:2-Dan9:3); ; [ACT 13:1–13:3](https://ref.ly/Acts13:1-Acts13:3)

The consequences of seeking God
-------------------------------

### It leads to life

**[AMO 5:4–5:6](https://ref.ly/Amos5:4-Amos5:6)** *See also* [PSA 69:32](https://ref.ly/Ps69:32); [ROM 2:7–2:8](https://ref.ly/Rom2:7-Rom2:8)

### It leads to forgiveness

**[2CH 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:14)** *See also* [2CH 30:18–30:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:18-2Chr30:20); [ISA 55:6–55:7](https://ref.ly/Isa55:6-Isa55:7); [JER 26:17–26:19](https://ref.ly/Jer26:17-Jer26:19)

### It leads to blessing

**[PSA 119:2](https://ref.ly/Ps119:2)** *See also* [PSA 24:3–24:6](https://ref.ly/Ps24:3-Ps24:6); [ISA 65:9–65:10](https://ref.ly/Isa65:9-Isa65:10)

### It leads to provision

**[PSA 34:8–34:10](https://ref.ly/Ps34:8-Ps34:10)** *See also* [MAT 6:31–6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:31-Matt6:33) parallel [LUK 12:29–12:31](https://ref.ly/Luke12:29-Luke12:31)

### It leads to protection

**[PSA 27:4–27:5](https://ref.ly/Ps27:4-Ps27:5)** *See also* [EZR 8:21–8:23](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:21-Ezra8:23)

### It leads to understanding and wisdom

**[PRO 28:5](https://ref.ly/Prov28:5)** *See also* [DAN 2:17–2:23](https://ref.ly/Dan2:17-Dan2:23)

### It leads to renewed strength

**[ISA 40:30–40:31](https://ref.ly/Isa40:30-Isa40:31)** *See also* [LUK 22:42–22:43](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42-Luke22:43)

### It leads to rejoicing

**[1CH 16:10](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:10)** *See also* [PSA 40:16](https://ref.ly/Ps40:16), [PSA 70:4](https://ref.ly/Ps70:4), [PSA 105:3](https://ref.ly/Ps105:3)

Hindrances to seeking God
-------------------------

### Unrighteousness

**[HOS 10:12–10:13](https://ref.ly/Hos10:12-Hos10:13)** *See also* [ISA 59:1–59:2](https://ref.ly/Isa59:1-Isa59:2)

### Pride

**[PSA 10:4](https://ref.ly/Ps10:4)** *See also* [2CH 26:16–26:18](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:16-2Chr26:18)

### Trusting in human resources

**[ISA 31:1](https://ref.ly/Isa31:1)** *See also* [2CH 16:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr16:12); [HOS 5:13–5:15](https://ref.ly/Hos5:13-Hos5:15)

### Idolatry

**[ZEP 1:4–1:6](https://ref.ly/Zeph1:4-Zeph1:6)** *See also* [ROM 1:21–1:23](https://ref.ly/Rom1:21-Rom1:23)

### Superficial religion

**[AMO 5:5–5:6](https://ref.ly/Amos5:5-Amos5:6)** *See also* [ISA 58:1–58:9](https://ref.ly/Isa58:1-Isa58:9)

Seeking God through occult practices is forbidden
-------------------------------------------------

**[1CH 10:13–10:14](https://ref.ly/1Chr10:13-1Chr10:14)** *See also* [LEV 19:31](https://ref.ly/Lev19:31), [LEV 20:6](https://ref.ly/Lev20:6); [DEU 18:10–18:12](https://ref.ly/Deut18:10-Deut18:12); [1SA 28:4–28:20](https://ref.ly/1Sam28:4-1Sam28:20); [ACT 16:16–16:18](https://ref.ly/Acts16:16-Acts16:18)

Consequences of not seeking God
-------------------------------

### Loss of life

**[2CH 15:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:13)** *See also* [DEU 13:6–13:10](https://ref.ly/Deut13:6-Deut13:10)

### Loss of salvation

**[PSA 119:155](https://ref.ly/Ps119:155)**

## 8162: spiritual vitality (id: 8162)

The quality of possessing a living faith, which is commended by Scripture.

Spiritual vitality commended
----------------------------

**[2TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3)** *See also* [JOB 17:9](https://ref.ly/Job17:9); [PSA 84:7](https://ref.ly/Ps84:7), [PSA 92:12](https://ref.ly/Ps92:12); [PRO 4:18](https://ref.ly/Prov4:18); [1TI 4:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:15); [2PE 1:5–1:7](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:7)

The means of developing spiritual vitality
------------------------------------------

### Abiding in Christ

**[JHN 15:4](https://ref.ly/John15:4)**

### Seeking to imitate Jesus Christ

**[EPH 4:15](https://ref.ly/Eph4:15)** *See also* [JHN 13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:15); [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2), [ROM 13:14](https://ref.ly/Rom13:14); [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1); [GAL 3:27](https://ref.ly/Gal3:27); [PHP 3:10](https://ref.ly/Phil3:10); [1TH 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:6); [1PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21); [1JN 2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:6), [1JN 2:28](https://ref.ly/1John2:28)

### Resisting temptation

**[1JN 2:14](https://ref.ly/1John2:14)** *See also* [MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41); [1CO 7:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:5), [1CO 10:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:13); [1TH 3:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:5); [HEB 2:18](https://ref.ly/Heb2:18); [JAS 1:2–1:3](https://ref.ly/Jas1:2-Jas1:3), [JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12); [REV 3:10](https://ref.ly/Rev3:10)

### Developing discipline

**[1TI 6:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:12)** *See also* [HEB 12:7–12:11](https://ref.ly/Heb12:7-Heb12:11); [REV 3:18–3:19](https://ref.ly/Rev3:18-Rev3:19)

### Exhorting others

[1KI 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:2); ; [2CH 15:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:7); ; [ISA 35:4](https://ref.ly/Isa35:4); ; [HAG 2:4](https://ref.ly/Hag2:4); ; [1CO 16:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:13); ; [EPH 6:10](https://ref.ly/Eph6:10); ; [2TI 2:1](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:1)

### Being filled with the Holy Spirit

**[EPH 5:18](https://ref.ly/Eph5:18)** *See also* [GAL 5:16–5:18](https://ref.ly/Gal5:16-Gal5:18); [1TH 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:5)

Obstacles to spiritual vitality
-------------------------------

### Lack of sound teaching

[2TI 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:1-2Tim4:3)

### A failure to progress beyond basic teachings

[HEB 5:12](https://ref.ly/Heb5:12); ; [1PE 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:2)

Examples of individuals with spiritual vitality
-----------------------------------------------

[1SA 2:26](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:26) *Samuel*; ; [LUK 1:80](https://ref.ly/Luke1:80) *John the Baptist*; [LUK 2:40](https://ref.ly/Luke2:40), [LUK 2:52](https://ref.ly/Luke2:52); [ACT 9:22](https://ref.ly/Acts9:22) *Paul*

The consequences of spiritual vitality
--------------------------------------

### Spiritual growth

**[GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23)**; **[2PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:18)** *See also* [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2); [2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18); [EPH 4:11–4:15](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11-Eph4:15); [PHP 3:12](https://ref.ly/Phil3:12); [COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10); [1TH 4:3–4:7](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:3-1Thess4:7)

### Loving others

**[1JN 3:23](https://ref.ly/1John3:23)** *See also* [GAL 5:6](https://ref.ly/Gal5:6); [EPH 1:15](https://ref.ly/Eph1:15), [EPH 6:23](https://ref.ly/Eph6:23); [COL 1:4–1:5](https://ref.ly/Col1:4-Col1:5); [1TI 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:5)

### Rejoicing in the Lord

**[PHP 4:4–4:7](https://ref.ly/Phil4:4-Phil4:7)** *See also* [PSA 5:11](https://ref.ly/Ps5:11), [PSA 13:5](https://ref.ly/Ps13:5), [PSA 33:21](https://ref.ly/Ps33:21); [ISA 35:10](https://ref.ly/Isa35:10); [ACT 16:34](https://ref.ly/Acts16:34); [1PE 4:12–4:13](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:12-1Pet4:13)

### Spiritual perseverance

## 8164: spirituality (id: 8164)

The quality of life generated and nourished by the Spirit of God, in which believers experience the power and presence of God in their lives. True spirituality comes from living under the control of the Holy Spirit and is evidenced by the fruit of the Spirit, spiritual maturity and growth in holiness.

The foundations of spirituality
-------------------------------

### The need for spiritual renewal

[1CO 2:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:14); ; [ROM 7:14](https://ref.ly/Rom7:14); ; [JUD 1:19](https://ref.ly/Jude1:19)

### Believers have been renewed spiritually

**[JHN 3:5–3:8](https://ref.ly/John3:5-John3:8)** *See also* [ROM 8:11](https://ref.ly/Rom8:11); [TIT 3:5](https://ref.ly/Titus3:5); [1PE 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:3), [1PE 1:23](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:23)

### Faith

**[HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)** *See also* [JHN 6:53–6:58](https://ref.ly/John6:53-John6:58), [JHN 14:1](https://ref.ly/John14:1), [JHN 20:31](https://ref.ly/John20:31); [ACT 16:31](https://ref.ly/Acts16:31); [ROM 10:9–10:10](https://ref.ly/Rom10:9-Rom10:10)

### A longing for God

**[PSA 27:8](https://ref.ly/Ps27:8)** *See also* [PSA 119:2](https://ref.ly/Ps119:2), [PSA 143:5–143:6](https://ref.ly/Ps143:5-Ps143:6); [PHP 3:10–3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:10-Phil3:14)

The nature of spirituality
--------------------------

### Living under the Spirit's control

**[ROM 8:5–8:9](https://ref.ly/Rom8:5-Rom8:9)** *See also* [ROM 8:12–8:13](https://ref.ly/Rom8:12-Rom8:13); [GAL 5:16–5:17](https://ref.ly/Gal5:16-Gal5:17); [EPH 5:18](https://ref.ly/Eph5:18)

### Reflecting Jesus Christ's character

**[2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18)** *See also* [ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29); [1JN 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/1John3:2-1John3:3)

### Intimacy with God through the Spirit

**[ROM 8:14–8:16](https://ref.ly/Rom8:14-Rom8:16)** *See also* [GAL 4:6](https://ref.ly/Gal4:6)

Evidence of spirituality
------------------------

### Bearing spiritual fruit

**[GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23)** *See also* [MAT 7:17](https://ref.ly/Matt7:17); [JHN 15:5–15:8](https://ref.ly/John15:5-John15:8); [ROM 14:17](https://ref.ly/Rom14:17); [EPH 5:8–5:9](https://ref.ly/Eph5:8-Eph5:9)

### Love for one another

**[1JN 4:7](https://ref.ly/1John4:7)** *See also* [JHN 13:34–13:35](https://ref.ly/John13:34-John13:35); [1CO 13:1–13:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:1-1Cor13:4); [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12)

### Spiritual maturity

**[1CO 3:1–3:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:1-1Cor3:3)** *See also* [1CO 14:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:20); [HEB 5:13–5:14](https://ref.ly/Heb5:13-Heb5:14)

### Showing concern for weaker believers

**[GAL 6:1](https://ref.ly/Gal6:1)** *See also* [ROM 14:1–14:3](https://ref.ly/Rom14:1-Rom14:3), [ROM 14:19–14:21](https://ref.ly/Rom14:19-Rom14:21); [1CO 8:9–8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:9-1Cor8:13)

### Understanding spiritual truths

**[1CO 2:9–2:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:9-1Cor2:13)** *See also* [JHN 14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:17), [JHN 16:13–16:15](https://ref.ly/John16:13-John16:15); [1CO 2:15–2:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:15-1Cor2:16)

### Holiness

**[TIT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Titus2:12)** *See also* [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2); [1CO 6:19–6:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:19-1Cor6:20); [GAL 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gal5:24); [COL 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Col3:1-Col3:2)

### Obedience

[JHN 15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:10); ; [1JN 2:2–2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:2-1John2:6), [1JN 5:2–5:3](https://ref.ly/1John5:2-1John5:3)

Aids to spirituality
--------------------

### Co\-operation with the Spirit

**[GAL 5:25](https://ref.ly/Gal5:25)** *See also* [ACT 7:51](https://ref.ly/Acts7:51); [EPH 4:30](https://ref.ly/Eph4:30); [1TH 5:19](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:19)

### Meditation on God's word

[JOS 1:8](https://ref.ly/Josh1:8); ; [JHN 17:7](https://ref.ly/John17:7); ; [2TI 3:15–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:15-2Tim3:17)

### Spending time with God

[LUK 6:12](https://ref.ly/Luke6:12); ; [MRK 1:35](https://ref.ly/Mark1:35); ; [ACT 4:13](https://ref.ly/Acts4:13)

### Encouragement of others

**[HEB 10:24](https://ref.ly/Heb10:24)** *See also* [COL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Col3:16); [1TH 2:11–2:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:11-1Thess2:12)

### Tests and trials

**[JAS 1:2–1:4](https://ref.ly/Jas1:2-Jas1:4)** *See also* [ROM 5:3–5:4](https://ref.ly/Rom5:3-Rom5:4); [1PE 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:6-1Pet1:7)

Examples of spirituality
------------------------

[GEN 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gen5:24) *Enoch*; ; [GEN 6:9](https://ref.ly/Gen6:9) *Noah*; [NUM 12:3](https://ref.ly/Num12:3), [NUM 12:6–12:8](https://ref.ly/Num12:6-Num12:8); [1SA 13:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam13:14); ; [ACT 13:22](https://ref.ly/Acts13:22); [ACT 6:5](https://ref.ly/Acts6:5), [ACT 6:8](https://ref.ly/Acts6:8); [ACT 11:24](https://ref.ly/Acts11:24) *Barnabas*

## 8166: theology (id: 8166)

The study of God, as he has revealed himself in Jesus Christ and in Scripture.

Theology is based on God's self\-revelation
-------------------------------------------

**[2TI 3:15–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:15-2Tim3:17)** *See also* [PSA 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/Ps1:1-Ps1:3); [ROM 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/Rom1:1-Rom1:3), [ROM 15:4](https://ref.ly/Rom15:4); [1CO 15:1–15:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:1-1Cor15:4); [2PE 1:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:19)

The benefits of theology
------------------------

### A concern for right teaching in the church

**[TIT 2:1](https://ref.ly/Titus2:1)** *See also* [HEB 6:1–6:3](https://ref.ly/Heb6:1-Heb6:3)

### A deepened understanding of God

**[PSA 119:169](https://ref.ly/Ps119:169)** *See also* [PSA 119:24](https://ref.ly/Ps119:24); [ROM 15:4](https://ref.ly/Rom15:4); [2TI 3:14–3:16](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:14-2Tim3:16)

### Spiritual illumination

**[PSA 119:130](https://ref.ly/Ps119:130)** *See also* [PSA 119:105](https://ref.ly/Ps119:105); [2PE 1:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:19); [1JN 2:8](https://ref.ly/1John2:8)

### Access to the truth

**[PSA 33:4](https://ref.ly/Ps33:4)** *See also* [PSA 119:43](https://ref.ly/Ps119:43), [PSA 119:160](https://ref.ly/Ps119:160); [COL 1:3–1:6](https://ref.ly/Col1:3-Col1:6); [REV 21:5](https://ref.ly/Rev21:5)

### An inspiration to meditation and praise

**[PSA 119:15–119:16](https://ref.ly/Ps119:15-Ps119:16)** *See also* [JOS 1:8](https://ref.ly/Josh1:8); [PSA 48:9](https://ref.ly/Ps48:9), [PSA 56:4](https://ref.ly/Ps56:4), [PSA 56:10](https://ref.ly/Ps56:10), [PSA 119:27](https://ref.ly/Ps119:27), [PSA 119:97–119:98](https://ref.ly/Ps119:97-Ps119:98), [PSA 119:148](https://ref.ly/Ps119:148), [PSA 143:5](https://ref.ly/Ps143:5)

### A life of obedience and holiness

[PSA 119:9–119:11](https://ref.ly/Ps119:9-Ps119:11); ; [MAT 7:24–7:27](https://ref.ly/Matt7:24-Matt7:27); ; [LUK 11:28](https://ref.ly/Luke11:28); ; [JHN 14:15](https://ref.ly/John14:15), [JHN 17:6](https://ref.ly/John17:6); ; [2TI 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16-2Tim3:17); ; [JAS 1:22](https://ref.ly/Jas1:22)

## 8168: way, the (id: 8168)

A term used metaphorically to refer both to the Christian faith (especially in Acts) and to Jesus Christ himself (especially in John's Gospel). Faith in Jesus Christ is the only way of salvation for sinful human beings. The term is often used with other expressions in Scripture to describe aspects of the life of the believer.

The Way refers to the Christian faith
-------------------------------------

**[ACT 9:2](https://ref.ly/Acts9:2)** *See also* [ACT 19:9](https://ref.ly/Acts19:9), [ACT 19:23](https://ref.ly/Acts19:23), [ACT 22:4](https://ref.ly/Acts22:4), [ACT 24:14](https://ref.ly/Acts24:14), [ACT 24:22](https://ref.ly/Acts24:22)

The way refers to Jesus Christ himself
--------------------------------------

**[JHN 14:6](https://ref.ly/John14:6)** *See also* [JHN 10:9](https://ref.ly/John10:9), [JHN 14:4–14:6](https://ref.ly/John14:4-John14:6); [1TI 2:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:5); [HEB 10:19–10:20](https://ref.ly/Heb10:19-Heb10:20)

Faith in Jesus Christ is the only way of salvation for sinful human beings
--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[ACT 4:12](https://ref.ly/Acts4:12)** *See also* [MRK 16:16](https://ref.ly/Mark16:16); [JHN 1:12–1:13](https://ref.ly/John1:12-John1:13), [JHN 3:15–3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:15-John3:16); [ACT 16:31](https://ref.ly/Acts16:31); [ROM 10:9](https://ref.ly/Rom10:9); [EPH 2:8](https://ref.ly/Eph2:8); [1PE 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:5)

Way used with other terms to describe the life of faith
-------------------------------------------------------

### The way of righteousness

**[MAT 21:32](https://ref.ly/Matt21:32)** *See also* [MAT 3:1–3:12](https://ref.ly/Matt3:1-Matt3:12); [2PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:21)

### The way of God

**[MAT 22:16](https://ref.ly/Matt22:16)** parallels [MRK 12:14](https://ref.ly/Mark12:14), [LUK 20:21](https://ref.ly/Luke20:21) *See also* [PSA 18:30](https://ref.ly/Ps18:30); [ISA 55:9](https://ref.ly/Isa55:9); [ACT 18:25–18:26](https://ref.ly/Acts18:25-Acts18:26); [HEB 3:10](https://ref.ly/Heb3:10); [PSA 95:10](https://ref.ly/Ps95:10)

### The way of the Lord

**[ACT 18:24–18:25](https://ref.ly/Acts18:24-Acts18:25)** *See also* [GEN 18:19](https://ref.ly/Gen18:19); [PSA 27:11](https://ref.ly/Ps27:11), [PSA 143:8](https://ref.ly/Ps143:8); [PRO 10:29](https://ref.ly/Prov10:29)

### The way of salvation

**[ACT 16:17](https://ref.ly/Acts16:17)** *See also* [MAT 7:14](https://ref.ly/Matt7:14)

### The way of peace

**[LUK 1:79](https://ref.ly/Luke1:79)** *See also* [ISA 26:3](https://ref.ly/Isa26:3), [ISA 26:12](https://ref.ly/Isa26:12), [ISA 57:20–57:21](https://ref.ly/Isa57:20-Isa57:21); [ROM 3:17](https://ref.ly/Rom3:17); [ISA 59:8](https://ref.ly/Isa59:8)

### The way of holiness

**[ISA 35:8](https://ref.ly/Isa35:8)** *See also* [HEB 9:8](https://ref.ly/Heb9:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Acts 9:2; Acts 19:9; Acts 19:23; Acts 22:4; Acts 24:14; Acts 24:22; John 14:6; John 10:9; John 14:4-6; 1 Timothy 2:5; Hebrews 10:19-20; Acts 4:12; Mark 16:16; John 1:12-13; John 3:15-16; Acts 16:31; Romans 10:9; Ephesians 2:8; 1 Peter 1:5; Matthew 21:32; Matthew 3:1-12; 2 Peter 2:21; Matthew 22:16; Mark 12:14; Luke 20:21; Psalms 18:30; Isaiah 55:9; Acts 18:25-26; Hebrews 3:10; Psalms 95:10; Acts 18:24-25; Genesis 18:19; Psalms 27:11; Psalms 143:8; Proverbs 10:29; Acts 16:17; Matthew 7:14; Luke 1:79; Isaiah 26:3; Isaiah 26:12; Isaiah 57:20-21; Romans 3:17; Isaiah 59:8; Isaiah 35:8; Hebrews 9:8

## 8201: blamelessness (id: 8201)

A quality of life apparent in an individual against whom no just charge can be made. This is exemplified supremely in the blameless life and death of Jesus Christ. Though believers remain imperfect in this life, they are counted blameless in God's sight on account of the atoning death of Jesus Christ.

Jesus Christ's human life was blameless
---------------------------------------

**[1PE 2:22](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:22)** *See also* [ISA 53:9](https://ref.ly/Isa53:9); [JHN 8:46](https://ref.ly/John8:46); [2CO 5:21](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:21); [HEB 7:26](https://ref.ly/Heb7:26); [1PE 1:19](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:19); [1JN 3:5](https://ref.ly/1John3:5)

Jesus Christ's blameless life and death were the perfect fulfilment of the OT sacrifices
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### The lamb or goat sacrificed at Passover had to be unblemished

**[EXO 12:5](https://ref.ly/Exod12:5)**

### All other animals used as sacrifices had to be without defect

*See also* [LEV 1:3](https://ref.ly/Lev1:3), [LEV 6:6](https://ref.ly/Lev6:6); [NUM 6:14](https://ref.ly/Num6:14), [NUM 28:19](https://ref.ly/Num28:19); [DEU 15:21](https://ref.ly/Deut15:21); [EZK 45:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek45:23); [MAL 1:8](https://ref.ly/Mal1:8), [MAL 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Mal1:13-Mal1:14)

### Jesus Christ's death was as the perfect lamb of God

**[HEB 9:14](https://ref.ly/Heb9:14)** *See also* [JHN 1:29](https://ref.ly/John1:29); [1CO 5:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:7); [1PE 1:19](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:19); [REV 5:6](https://ref.ly/Rev5:6), [REV 6:1](https://ref.ly/Rev6:1)

In the OT, the righteous were often described as blameless
----------------------------------------------------------

**[GEN 6:9](https://ref.ly/Gen6:9)**; **[JOB 1:1](https://ref.ly/Job1:1)** *See also* [1SA 12:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:3); [2SA 22:21–22:25](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:21-2Sam22:25); [PSA 15:1–15:5](https://ref.ly/Ps15:1-Ps15:5), [PSA 37:37](https://ref.ly/Ps37:37); [PRO 11:20](https://ref.ly/Prov11:20), [PRO 28:18](https://ref.ly/Prov28:18); [SNG 4:7](https://ref.ly/Song4:7); [LUK 1:6](https://ref.ly/Luke1:6)

God counts believers as blameless in his sight on account of Jesus Christ's death for them
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[ACT 13:39](https://ref.ly/Acts13:39)** *See also* [ROM 3:28](https://ref.ly/Rom3:28), [ROM 5:1](https://ref.ly/Rom5:1); [1CO 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:11); [GAL 3:6](https://ref.ly/Gal3:6); [EPH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Eph1:4); [PHP 3:9](https://ref.ly/Phil3:9)

Believers should be blameless in their Christian lives
------------------------------------------------------

**[1TI 5:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:7)** *See also* [2CO 6:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:3); [PHP 1:10](https://ref.ly/Phil1:10), [PHP 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Phil2:14-Phil2:15); [1PE 1:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15), [1PE 2:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:12); [2PE 3:14](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:14); [JAS 1:27](https://ref.ly/Jas1:27)

### Paul, Silas and Timothy could claim to have been blameless

[1TH 2:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:10)

### Officers of the church are to be blameless

[1TI 3:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:2), [1TI 6:14](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:14); ; [TIT 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/Titus1:6-Titus1:7)

### The administration of financial help is to be blameless

[2CO 8:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:20)

Believers will be presented blameless before God at the last day
----------------------------------------------------------------

**[1CO 1:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:8)**; **[JUD 1:24](https://ref.ly/Jude1:24)** *See also* [EPH 5:27](https://ref.ly/Eph5:27); [COL 1:22](https://ref.ly/Col1:22); [1TH 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:13), [1TH 5:23](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:23)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Peter 2:22; Isaiah 53:9; John 8:46; 2 Corinthians 5:21; Hebrews 7:26; 1 Peter 1:19; 1 John 3:5; Exodus 12:5; Leviticus 1:3; Leviticus 6:6; Numbers 6:14; Numbers 28:19; Deuteronomy 15:21; Ezekiel 45:23; Malachi 1:8; Malachi 1:13-14; Hebrews 9:14; John 1:29; 1 Corinthians 5:7; Revelation 5:6; Revelation 6:1; Genesis 6:9; Job 1:1; 1 Samuel 12:3; 2 Samuel 22:21-25; Psalms 15:1-5; Psalms 37:37; Proverbs 11:20; Proverbs 28:18; Song of Songs 4:7; Luke 1:6; Acts 13:39; Romans 3:28; Romans 5:1; 1 Corinthians 6:11; Galatians 3:6; Ephesians 1:4; Philippians 3:9; 1 Timothy 5:7; 2 Corinthians 6:3; Philippians 1:10; Philippians 2:14-15; 1 Peter 1:15; 1 Peter 2:12; 2 Peter 3:14; James 1:27; 1 Thessalonians 2:10; 1 Timothy 3:2; 1 Timothy 6:14; Titus 1:6-7; 2 Corinthians 8:20; 1 Corinthians 1:8; Jude 1:24; Ephesians 5:27; Colossians 1:22; 1 Thessalonians 3:13; 1 Thessalonians 5:23
* **Associated Articles:** 2075: Jesus Christ, sinlessness of (ID: `2075@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2315: Jesus Christ, as Lamb (ID: `2315@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2530: Jesus Christ, death of (ID: `2530@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5562: suffering, of the innocent (ID: `5562@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6115: blame (ID: `6115@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6118: blemish (ID: `6118@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6676: justification (ID: `6676@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6744: sanctification (ID: `6744@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7434: sacrifice (ID: `7434@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8277: innocence (ID: `8277@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8320: perfection (ID: `8320@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9240: last judgment (ID: `9240@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8202: boldness (id: 8202)

Courage and confidence in approaching God and also other people.

Boldness in approaching God
---------------------------

**[HEB 10:19–10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:19-Heb10:22)** *See also* [GEN 18:27](https://ref.ly/Gen18:27), [GEN 18:31](https://ref.ly/Gen18:31) *Abraham prays for Sodom*

Boldness in proclaiming the gospel to others
--------------------------------------------

**[ACT 4:29](https://ref.ly/Acts4:29)** *Persecuted Christians pray.* *See also* [ACT 4:13](https://ref.ly/Acts4:13), [ACT 4:31](https://ref.ly/Acts4:31), [ACT 9:28](https://ref.ly/Acts9:28), [ACT 13:46](https://ref.ly/Acts13:46), [ACT 14:3](https://ref.ly/Acts14:3), [ACT 18:26](https://ref.ly/Acts18:26), [ACT 19:8](https://ref.ly/Acts19:8), [ACT 28:31](https://ref.ly/Acts28:31)

Boldness in dealing with others
-------------------------------

### Inner confidence

**[PSA 138:3](https://ref.ly/Ps138:3)** *See also* [1SA 17:34–17:50](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:34-1Sam17:50); [PRO 28:1](https://ref.ly/Prov28:1); [2CO 3:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:12) *Paul concerning his ministry*

### Confident authority

**[PHM 1:8–1:9](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:8-Phlm1:9)** *See also* [ROM 15:15](https://ref.ly/Rom15:15); [2CO 10:1–10:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:1-2Cor10:2)

### Courage

**[MRK 15:43](https://ref.ly/Mark15:43)** *See also* [EXO 14:8](https://ref.ly/Exod14:8); [NUM 33:3](https://ref.ly/Num33:3)

### Persistence

**[LUK 11:8](https://ref.ly/Luke11:8)** *The friend at midnight.*

Misplaced boldness
------------------

**[2PE 2:10](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:10)** *The heretics' arrogance.* *See also* [1CO 8:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:10)

* **Associated Passages:** Hebrews 10:19-22; Genesis 18:27; Genesis 18:31; Acts 4:29; Acts 4:13; Acts 4:31; Acts 9:28; Acts 13:46; Acts 14:3; Acts 18:26; Acts 19:8; Acts 28:31; Psalms 138:3; 1 Samuel 17:34-50; Proverbs 28:1; 2 Corinthians 3:12; Philemon 1:8-9; Romans 15:15; 2 Corinthians 10:1-2; Mark 15:43; Exodus 14:8; Numbers 33:3; Luke 11:8; 2 Peter 2:10; 1 Corinthians 8:10
* **Associated Articles:** 3251: Holy Spirit, filling with (ID: `3251@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5954: strength (ID: `5954@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5968: timidity (ID: `5968@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7754: preaching (ID: `7754@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8020: faith (ID: `8020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8104: assurance (ID: `8104@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8213: confidence (ID: `8213@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8219: courage (ID: `8219@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8414: encouragement (ID: `8414@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8630: worship, results of (ID: `8630@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8652: importunity (ID: `8652@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8801: presumption (ID: `8801@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8203: character (id: 8203)

The moral and mental features that define a person, whether good or evil. The term also means moral strength, which Scripture regards as something to be highly valued.

The character of God
--------------------

### God is the Father of believers

**[EPH 1:2](https://ref.ly/Eph1:2)** *See also* [GAL 1:1](https://ref.ly/Gal1:1); [COL 1:12](https://ref.ly/Col1:12); [1TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:3), [1TH 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:13)

### God is good

**[PSA 34:8](https://ref.ly/Ps34:8)** *See also* [EXO 33:19](https://ref.ly/Exod33:19); [LAM 3:25](https://ref.ly/Lam3:25); [MAT 19:17](https://ref.ly/Matt19:17) parallel [MRK 10:18](https://ref.ly/Mark10:18); [2PE 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:3)

### God is holy

**[1SA 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:2)** *See also* [LEV 11:44–11:45](https://ref.ly/Lev11:44-Lev11:45); [ISA 6:3](https://ref.ly/Isa6:3), [ISA 43:15](https://ref.ly/Isa43:15); [EZK 39:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek39:7); [1PE 1:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15); [REV 4:8](https://ref.ly/Rev4:8)

### God is faithful

**[PSA 36:5](https://ref.ly/Ps36:5)** *See also* [DEU 7:9](https://ref.ly/Deut7:9); [1KI 8:56](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:56); [PSA 89:2](https://ref.ly/Ps89:2), [PSA 146:6](https://ref.ly/Ps146:6); [LAM 3:23](https://ref.ly/Lam3:23); [1TH 5:23–5:24](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:23-1Thess5:24)

### God is just and righteous

**[ROM 3:25–3:26](https://ref.ly/Rom3:25-Rom3:26)** *See also* [2CH 12:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr12:6); [PSA 33:5](https://ref.ly/Ps33:5); [ISA 30:18](https://ref.ly/Isa30:18); [ZEP 3:5](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:5); [ACT 17:31](https://ref.ly/Acts17:31); [REV 16:5–16:6](https://ref.ly/Rev16:5-Rev16:6)

### God is loving

**[PSA 145:17](https://ref.ly/Ps145:17)** *See also* [JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16); [ROM 5:8](https://ref.ly/Rom5:8); [EPH 2:4](https://ref.ly/Eph2:4); [TIT 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Titus3:4-Titus3:5); [HEB 12:6](https://ref.ly/Heb12:6); [1JN 4:7–4:10](https://ref.ly/1John4:7-1John4:10)

### God is merciful and compassionate

**[PSA 86:15](https://ref.ly/Ps86:15)**; **[LUK 1:50](https://ref.ly/Luke1:50)** *See also* [NEH 9:31](https://ref.ly/Neh9:31); [ISA 63:7](https://ref.ly/Isa63:7); [LAM 3:22](https://ref.ly/Lam3:22); [JON 4:2](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:2); [LUK 18:10–18:14](https://ref.ly/Luke18:10-Luke18:14); [2CO 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:3); [JAS 5:11](https://ref.ly/Jas5:11)

The character of Jesus Christ
-----------------------------

### Jesus Christ possesses the exact likeness of God

**[HEB 1:3](https://ref.ly/Heb1:3)** *See also* [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4); [COL 1:15](https://ref.ly/Col1:15)

### Jesus Christ is faithful

**[HEB 3:6](https://ref.ly/Heb3:6)** *See also* [2TH 3:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:3); [HEB 2:17](https://ref.ly/Heb2:17); [REV 1:5](https://ref.ly/Rev1:5), [REV 3:14](https://ref.ly/Rev3:14)

### Jesus Christ is holy

**[MRK 1:24](https://ref.ly/Mark1:24)** parallel [LUK 4:34](https://ref.ly/Luke4:34) *See also* [LUK 1:35](https://ref.ly/Luke1:35); [JHN 6:69](https://ref.ly/John6:69); [HEB 4:15](https://ref.ly/Heb4:15); [REV 3:7](https://ref.ly/Rev3:7)

### Jesus Christ is loving

**[2CO 5:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:14)** *See also* [JHN 15:9](https://ref.ly/John15:9); [ROM 8:35–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:35-Rom8:39); [1JN 3:16](https://ref.ly/1John3:16)

The character of the Holy Spirit
--------------------------------

### The Holy Spirit is holy

**[ROM 1:4](https://ref.ly/Rom1:4)** *See also* [ROM 15:16](https://ref.ly/Rom15:16); [1CO 6:19](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:19); [TIT 3:5](https://ref.ly/Titus3:5)

### The Holy Spirit is powerful

**[LUK 4:14](https://ref.ly/Luke4:14)** *See also* [MIC 3:8](https://ref.ly/Mic3:8); [ACT 1:8](https://ref.ly/Acts1:8); [ROM 15:13](https://ref.ly/Rom15:13), [ROM 15:19](https://ref.ly/Rom15:19); [2TI 1:7](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:7)

### The Holy Spirit is eternal

**[HEB 9:14](https://ref.ly/Heb9:14)**

### The Holy Spirit is the Spirit of truth, the Counsellor

**[JHN 14:16–14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:16-John14:17)** *See also* [JHN 14:26](https://ref.ly/John14:26), [JHN 15:26](https://ref.ly/John15:26), [JHN 16:7](https://ref.ly/John16:7)

Character as a moral strength
-----------------------------

**[ROM 5:3–5:4](https://ref.ly/Rom5:3-Rom5:4)** *See also* [RUT 3:11](https://ref.ly/Ruth3:11); [PRO 12:4](https://ref.ly/Prov12:4), [PRO 31:10](https://ref.ly/Prov31:10); [ACT 17:11](https://ref.ly/Acts17:11); [1CO 15:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:33)

The character of believers
--------------------------

### Believers should be compassionate

**[COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12)** *See also* [PSA 112:4](https://ref.ly/Ps112:4); [1PE 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:8)

### Believers should be humble

**[1PE 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:5)** *See also* [ISA 29:19](https://ref.ly/Isa29:19); [PHP 2:3](https://ref.ly/Phil2:3); [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12); [1PE 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:8)

### Believers should be joyful

**[PHP 4:4](https://ref.ly/Phil4:4)** *See also* [ROM 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rom12:12), [ROM 15:13](https://ref.ly/Rom15:13); [1TH 5:16](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:16)

### Believers should be loving

**[1JN 4:7](https://ref.ly/1John4:7)** *See also* [GAL 5:22](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22); [COL 3:14](https://ref.ly/Col3:14); [1TH 4:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:9)

### Believers should be content

**[PHP 4:11](https://ref.ly/Phil4:11)** *See also* [1TI 6:6–6:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:6-1Tim6:8); [HEB 13:5](https://ref.ly/Heb13:5)

### Believers should be holy

**[DEU 7:6](https://ref.ly/Deut7:6)**; **[1PE 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15-1Pet1:16)** *See also* [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2); [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12); [HEB 12:14](https://ref.ly/Heb12:14)

### Believers are to be poor in spirit

**[MAT 5:3](https://ref.ly/Matt5:3)**

### Believers are to be meek

**[MAT 5:5](https://ref.ly/Matt5:5)**

### Believers are to be merciful

**[MAT 5:7](https://ref.ly/Matt5:7)** *See also* [LUK 6:36](https://ref.ly/Luke6:36); [ROM 12:8](https://ref.ly/Rom12:8); [JAS 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:17)

### Believers are to be pure in heart

**[MAT 5:8](https://ref.ly/Matt5:8)** *See also* [2CO 11:2–11:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:2-2Cor11:3); [PHP 1:10](https://ref.ly/Phil1:10); [1TI 5:22](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:22); [2TI 2:22](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:22)

## 8204: chastity (id: 8204)

The state of sexual abstinence. Although Scripture commends marriage, it insists that celibacy should be honoured.

Condemnation of sexual immorality
---------------------------------

[NUM 25:1](https://ref.ly/Num25:1); ; [MAT 15:19](https://ref.ly/Matt15:19); ; [ACT 15:20](https://ref.ly/Acts15:20); ; [1CO 10:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:8); ; [REV 2:14](https://ref.ly/Rev2:14), [REV 2:20](https://ref.ly/Rev2:20), [REV 9:21](https://ref.ly/Rev9:21)

The command to avoid sexual immorality
--------------------------------------

**[ROM 13:13](https://ref.ly/Rom13:13)** *See also* [ACT 15:19–15:20](https://ref.ly/Acts15:19-Acts15:20); [1CO 6:18](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:18), [1CO 10:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:8); [EPH 5:3](https://ref.ly/Eph5:3); [1TH 4:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:3)

Believers should not associate with those who are sexually immoral
------------------------------------------------------------------

[1CO 5:9–5:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:9-1Cor5:11)

Sexual purity is commended
--------------------------

**[1CO 6:18–6:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:18-1Cor6:20)** *See also* [PSA 51:10](https://ref.ly/Ps51:10), [PSA 119:9](https://ref.ly/Ps119:9); [2TI 2:22](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:22); [1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11); [REV 14:1–14:4](https://ref.ly/Rev14:1-Rev14:4)

Chastity and marriage
---------------------

### Marriage commended for those incapable of remaining chaste

**[1CO 7:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:9)**

### The sanctity of marriage

*See also* [MRK 10:2–10:12](https://ref.ly/Mark10:2-Mark10:12)

### The condemnation of adultery

**[LEV 18:20](https://ref.ly/Lev18:20)** *See also* [LEV 20:10](https://ref.ly/Lev20:10); [EXO 20:14](https://ref.ly/Exod20:14) parallel [DEU 5:18](https://ref.ly/Deut5:18); [MAT 5:27–5:28](https://ref.ly/Matt5:27-Matt5:28); [ROM 2:22](https://ref.ly/Rom2:22)

* **Associated Passages:** Numbers 25:1; Matthew 15:19; Acts 15:20; 1 Corinthians 10:8; Revelation 2:14; Revelation 2:20; Revelation 9:21; Romans 13:13; Acts 15:19-20; 1 Corinthians 6:18; Ephesians 5:3; 1 Thessalonians 4:3; 1 Corinthians 5:9-11; 1 Corinthians 6:18-20; Psalms 51:10; Psalms 119:9; 2 Timothy 2:22; 1 Peter 2:11; Revelation 14:1-4; 1 Corinthians 7:9; Mark 10:2-12; Leviticus 18:20; Leviticus 20:10; Exodus 20:14; Deuteronomy 5:18; Matthew 5:27-28; Romans 2:22

## 8205: childlikeness (id: 8205)

An attitude of simple trust and faith, to be distinguished from childishness. It is commended by Scripture as an appropriate attitude for the believer to take towards God.

God treats his people like children
-----------------------------------

**[PSA 103:13](https://ref.ly/Ps103:13)** *See also* [NUM 11:12](https://ref.ly/Num11:12); [ISA 49:15](https://ref.ly/Isa49:15), [ISA 66:13](https://ref.ly/Isa66:13); [JER 31:20](https://ref.ly/Jer31:20); [HOS 11:1–11:4](https://ref.ly/Hos11:1-Hos11:4); [ROM 8:14–8:17](https://ref.ly/Rom8:14-Rom8:17); [GAL 4:1–4:7](https://ref.ly/Gal4:1-Gal4:7)

God's people should respond to God as children to a parent
----------------------------------------------------------

### In trust

**[PSA 131:2](https://ref.ly/Ps131:2)**

### In obedience

**[1PE 1:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:14)**

### In humility

**[LUK 9:46–9:48](https://ref.ly/Luke9:46-Luke9:48)** parallels [MAT 18:2–18:5](https://ref.ly/Matt18:2-Matt18:5), [MRK 9:33–9:37](https://ref.ly/Mark9:33-Mark9:37) *See also* [1KI 3:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:7) *Solomon*

### In innocence

**[MRK 10:13–10:15](https://ref.ly/Mark10:13-Mark10:15)** parallels [MAT 19:13–19:14](https://ref.ly/Matt19:13-Matt19:14), [LUK 18:15–18:17](https://ref.ly/Luke18:15-Luke18:17) *See also* [LUK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Luke10:21)

### In imitating a model

**[EPH 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1-Eph5:2)** *See also* [1JN 3:10](https://ref.ly/1John3:10)

Childlikeness is reflected in pastoral care
-------------------------------------------

**[1TH 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:7)** *See also* [1JN 2:28](https://ref.ly/1John2:28)

Childlikeness is to be distinguished from immature childishness
---------------------------------------------------------------

**[1CO 3:1–3:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:1-1Cor3:3)** *See also* [HEB 5:12–6:1](https://ref.ly/Heb5:12-Heb6:1)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 103:13; Numbers 11:12; Isaiah 49:15; Isaiah 66:13; Jeremiah 31:20; Hosea 11:1-4; Romans 8:14-17; Galatians 4:1-7; Psalms 131:2; 1 Peter 1:14; Luke 9:46-48; Matthew 18:2-5; Mark 9:33-37; 1 Kings 3:7; Mark 10:13-15; Matthew 19:13-14; Luke 18:15-17; Luke 10:21; Ephesians 5:1-2; 1 John 3:10; 1 Thessalonians 2:7; 1 John 2:28; 1 Corinthians 3:1-3; Hebrews 5:12-6:1
* **Associated Articles:** 1040: God, fatherhood of (ID: `1040@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5664: children (ID: `5664@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5902: maturity (ID: `5902@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8020: faith (ID: `8020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8030: trust (ID: `8030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8276: humility (ID: `8276@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8277: innocence (ID: `8277@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8305: meekness (ID: `8305@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8330: receptiveness (ID: `8330@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8351: teachableness (ID: `8351@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8453: obedience (ID: `8453@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8206: Christlikeness (id: 8206)

The process by which believers are conformed to the likeness of Jesus Christ, especially in relation to obedience to and trust in God. Through the Holy Spirit, God refashions believers in the image of his Son, who is set before them as a model of the form of the redeemed life.

Believers are to become Christlike
----------------------------------

**[1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1)**; **[PHP 2:5](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5)** *Paul is arguing that believers must allow God to make them Christlike, which is the natural goal of their process of growing in faith. Christlikeness is not achieved by people merely trying to imitate Jesus Christ, but by God making believers more like his Son in sanctification, through the Spirit.* *See also* [JHN 13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:15); [ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29); [EPH 4:11–4:13](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11-Eph4:13); [PHP 3:8–3:11](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8-Phil3:11), [PHP 3:20–3:21](https://ref.ly/Phil3:20-Phil3:21); [1JN 2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:6)

The Holy Spirit makes believers Christlike
------------------------------------------

**[2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18)** *See also* [ROM 8:5–8:9](https://ref.ly/Rom8:5-Rom8:9); [GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23); [1TH 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:6)

Christlikeness is the aim of discipleship
-----------------------------------------

**[MAT 10:25](https://ref.ly/Matt10:25)** *See also* [LUK 6:40](https://ref.ly/Luke6:40); [1JN 2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:6)

Christlikeness is based on total commitment to Jesus Christ
-----------------------------------------------------------

**[LUK 9:57–9:62](https://ref.ly/Luke9:57-Luke9:62)** *See also* [MAT 9:9](https://ref.ly/Matt9:9) parallels [MRK 2:14](https://ref.ly/Mark2:14), [LUK 5:27](https://ref.ly/Luke5:27); [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21) parallel [LUK 18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22); [JHN 1:43](https://ref.ly/John1:43), [JHN 10:27](https://ref.ly/John10:27), [JHN 12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:26), [JHN 15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:10); [2JN 1:9](https://ref.ly/2John1:9)

The demonstration of Christlikeness
-----------------------------------

### In costly sacrifice

**[MRK 8:34–8:35](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34-Mark8:35)** parallels [MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24), [LUK 9:23–9:24](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23-Luke9:24)**[1PE 2:21–2:23](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21-1Pet2:23)** *See also* [MAT 10:38](https://ref.ly/Matt10:38); [LUK 14:26–14:27](https://ref.ly/Luke14:26-Luke14:27); [JHN 12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:26), [JHN 21:19](https://ref.ly/John21:19); [PHP 3:10](https://ref.ly/Phil3:10); [1PE 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:1)

### In humility and service

**[MAT 20:26–20:28](https://ref.ly/Matt20:26-Matt20:28)** parallel [MRK 10:43–10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:43-Mark10:45) *See also* [MAT 11:29](https://ref.ly/Matt11:29); [MRK 9:35](https://ref.ly/Mark9:35); [LUK 22:24–22:26](https://ref.ly/Luke22:24-Luke22:26); [JHN 13:14–13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:14-John13:15); [PHP 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/Phil2:4-Phil2:5)

### In love for other believers

**[JHN 15:12](https://ref.ly/John15:12)**; **[1JN 3:16](https://ref.ly/1John3:16)** *See also* [JHN 13:34](https://ref.ly/John13:34), [JHN 15:17](https://ref.ly/John15:17); [EPH 5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph5:2), [EPH 5:25](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25)

### In a readiness to forgive others

**[COL 3:13](https://ref.ly/Col3:13)** *See also* [MAT 6:12](https://ref.ly/Matt6:12) parallel [LUK 11:4](https://ref.ly/Luke11:4)

### In sharing Jesus Christ's mission to the world

**[MAT 4:19](https://ref.ly/Matt4:19)** parallel [MRK 1:17](https://ref.ly/Mark1:17) *See also* [JHN 20:21](https://ref.ly/John20:21)

### By following godly examples that imitate Jesus Christ

**[1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1)** *See also* [EPH 5:1](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1); [1TH 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:5-1Thess1:6), [1TH 2:14](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:14); [HEB 6:12](https://ref.ly/Heb6:12), [HEB 13:7–13:8](https://ref.ly/Heb13:7-Heb13:8); [3JN 1:11](https://ref.ly/3John1:11)

Christlikeness is part of God's re\-creation
--------------------------------------------

**[GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27)**; **[2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4)**; **[EPH 4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:24)**; **[COL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:10)**

The process of becoming Christlike
----------------------------------

### It is the purpose for which believers are saved

**[ROM 8:28–8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:28-Rom8:29)** *See also* [EPH 2:10](https://ref.ly/Eph2:10); [2PE 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:4)

### It continues in the experience of believers

**[2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18)**

### It will be complete when believers finally share Jesus Christ's glory

**[1JN 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/1John3:2-1John3:3)** *See also* [PSA 17:15](https://ref.ly/Ps17:15); [JHN 17:24](https://ref.ly/John17:24); [1CO 15:49–15:53](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:49-1Cor15:53); [GAL 4:19](https://ref.ly/Gal4:19); [PHP 3:20–3:21](https://ref.ly/Phil3:20-Phil3:21); [COL 3:4](https://ref.ly/Col3:4); [1JN 4:17](https://ref.ly/1John4:17)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Corinthians 11:1; Philippians 2:5; John 13:15; Romans 8:29; Ephesians 4:11-13; Philippians 3:8-11; Philippians 3:20-21; 1 John 2:6; 2 Corinthians 3:18; Romans 8:5-9; Galatians 5:22-23; 1 Thessalonians 1:6; Matthew 10:25; Luke 6:40; Luke 9:57-62; Matthew 9:9; Mark 2:14; Luke 5:27; Matthew 19:21; Luke 18:22; John 1:43; John 10:27; John 12:26; John 15:10; 2 John 1:9; Mark 8:34-35; Matthew 16:24; Luke 9:23-24; 1 Peter 2:21-23; Matthew 10:38; Luke 14:26-27; John 21:19; Philippians 3:10; 1 Peter 4:1; Matthew 20:26-28; Mark 10:43-45; Matthew 11:29; Mark 9:35; Luke 22:24-26; John 13:14-15; Philippians 2:4-5; John 15:12; 1 John 3:16; John 13:34; John 15:17; Ephesians 5:2; Ephesians 5:25; Colossians 3:13; Matthew 6:12; Luke 11:4; Matthew 4:19; Mark 1:17; John 20:21; Ephesians 5:1; 1 Thessalonians 1:5-6; 1 Thessalonians 2:14; Hebrews 6:12; Hebrews 13:7-8; 3 John 1:11; Genesis 1:26-27; 2 Corinthians 4:4; Ephesians 4:24; Colossians 3:10; Romans 8:28-29; Ephesians 2:10; 2 Peter 1:4; 1 John 3:2-3; Psalms 17:15; John 17:24; 1 Corinthians 15:49-53; Galatians 4:19; Colossians 3:4; 1 John 4:17

## 8207: commitment (id: 8207)

A state of personal dedication to something or someone, which results in actively promoting and working for their good and well\-being.

* **Associated Articles:** 8208: commitment, to God (ID: `8208@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8209: commitment, to Jesus Christ (ID: `8209@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8210: commitment, to God's people (ID: `8210@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8211: commitment, to the world (ID: `8211@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8208: commitment, to God (id: 8208)

Commitment to God arises from faith in his promises, is expressed in worship and adoration and leads to obedience to his commands.

Commitment to God commanded
---------------------------

**[DEU 27:10](https://ref.ly/Deut27:10)**; **[JOS 24:14](https://ref.ly/Josh24:14)**; **[ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2)** *See also* [DEU 6:13](https://ref.ly/Deut6:13), [DEU 10:12–10:13](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12-Deut10:13), [DEU 13:4](https://ref.ly/Deut13:4); [JOS 22:5](https://ref.ly/Josh22:5) *Joshua reiterates Moses' commands*; [JDG 6:10](https://ref.ly/Judg6:10); [1SA 7:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:3), [1SA 12:24](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:24); [1CH 28:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:9) *David's instructions to Solomon*; [2CH 19:9](https://ref.ly/2Chr19:9); [JER 38:20](https://ref.ly/Jer38:20); [1TH 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:1); [2TI 2:22](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:22)

Obedience to God's commands as a sign of commitment
---------------------------------------------------

**[DEU 7:9](https://ref.ly/Deut7:9)**; **[JOS 24:24](https://ref.ly/Josh24:24)**; **[ROM 6:17](https://ref.ly/Rom6:17)** *See also* [EXO 19:8](https://ref.ly/Exod19:8); [DEU 11:22](https://ref.ly/Deut11:22); [1KI 8:61](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:61); [NEH 10:29](https://ref.ly/Neh10:29); [PSA 40:6–40:8](https://ref.ly/Ps40:6-Ps40:8) *The reference may be to the ear\-piercing that was a sign of slaves' voluntary commitment to their masters*; [JER 7:23](https://ref.ly/Jer7:23), [JER 11:3](https://ref.ly/Jer11:3), [JER 38:20](https://ref.ly/Jer38:20), [JER 42:6](https://ref.ly/Jer42:6); [HAG 1:12](https://ref.ly/Hag1:12); [ZEC 6:15](https://ref.ly/Zech6:15)JHN [14:15](https://ref.ly/Zech14:15), [JHN 15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:10)[ACT 5:29](https://ref.ly/Acts5:29); [ROM 2:13](https://ref.ly/Rom2:13)

Love for God and worship of him are hallmarks of commitment
-----------------------------------------------------------

**[DEU 30:6](https://ref.ly/Deut30:6)**; **[JHN 21:15](https://ref.ly/John21:15)** *See also* [DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5), [DEU 10:12](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12), [DEU 11:1](https://ref.ly/Deut11:1), [DEU 11:13](https://ref.ly/Deut11:13), [DEU 11:22](https://ref.ly/Deut11:22); [JOS 23:11](https://ref.ly/Josh23:11); [NEH 1:5](https://ref.ly/Neh1:5); [ISA 56:6–56:7](https://ref.ly/Isa56:6-Isa56:7); [JER 20:12](https://ref.ly/Jer20:12); [DAN 9:4](https://ref.ly/Dan9:4); [MAT 6:24](https://ref.ly/Matt6:24) parallel [LUK 16:13](https://ref.ly/Luke16:13); [MAT 22:37](https://ref.ly/Matt22:37) parallel [MRK 12:30](https://ref.ly/Mark12:30)

Benefits of commitment to God
-----------------------------

**[DEU 30:20](https://ref.ly/Deut30:20)**; **[2CH 16:9](https://ref.ly/2Chr16:9)**; **[PRO 16:3](https://ref.ly/Prov16:3)**; **[REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10)** *See also* [EXO 19:5–19:6](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5-Exod19:6), [EXO 20:6](https://ref.ly/Exod20:6); [DEU 28:1](https://ref.ly/Deut28:1); [1SA 12:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:14); [1KI 2:2–2:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:2-1Kgs2:4); [PSA 97:10](https://ref.ly/Ps97:10); [PRO 2:7–2:8](https://ref.ly/Prov2:7-Prov2:8); [ISA 1:19](https://ref.ly/Isa1:19); [JER 26:13](https://ref.ly/Jer26:13)

Examples of commitment to God
-----------------------------

Abraham: [GEN 22:17–22:18](https://ref.ly/Gen22:17-Gen22:18); ; [HEB 11:8](https://ref.ly/Heb11:8); [NUM 12:7](https://ref.ly/Num12:7) *Moses*; ; [JOS 22:2](https://ref.ly/Josh22:2) *the tribes who settled in Transjordan*; ; [1KI 15:5](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:5) *David*; ; [1KI 15:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:14) parallel [2CH 15:17](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:17) *Asa*; [2KI 20:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs20:3); ; [2CH 31:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:20); [2KI 23:25](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:25) *Josiah*; ; [NEH 13:14](https://ref.ly/Neh13:14) *Nehemiah*; ; [JHN 13:37](https://ref.ly/John13:37) *Simon Peter's good intentions*

God's commitment of gifts and tasks to his people
-------------------------------------------------

### God's commitment of gifts

[1CO 9:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:17)

### God's commitment of the faith to believers

[JUD 1:3](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3)

## 8209: commitment, to Jesus Christ (id: 8209)

Commitment to Jesus Christ is grounded in the knowledge of his saving power and divinity, and expresses itself in adoration and obedience to Jesus Christ.

Jesus Christ commanded people to make the commitment to follow him
------------------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 4:19](https://ref.ly/Matt4:19)** parallel [MRK 1:17](https://ref.ly/Mark1:17)**[MAT 9:9](https://ref.ly/Matt9:9)** parallels [MRK 2:14](https://ref.ly/Mark2:14), [LUK 5:27](https://ref.ly/Luke5:27) *See also* [MAT 19:21–19:22](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21-Matt19:22); [JHN 1:43](https://ref.ly/John1:43), [JHN 21:19](https://ref.ly/John21:19), [JHN 21:22](https://ref.ly/John21:22); [ROM 15:5](https://ref.ly/Rom15:5); [1CO 1:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:12) *There may have been a “Christ\-party” at Corinth, or in contrast with the sectarianism, Paul may be asserting his own commitment to Jesus Christ.*

Jesus Christ frequently spelt out the cost of commitment to him
---------------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 10:37–10:38](https://ref.ly/Matt10:37-Matt10:38)** parallel [LUK 14:26–14:27](https://ref.ly/Luke14:26-Luke14:27)**[MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24)** parallels [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34), [LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23)**[JHN 12:25–12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:25-John12:26)** *See also* [MAT 8:22](https://ref.ly/Matt8:22), [MAT 10:39](https://ref.ly/Matt10:39) parallels [MRK 8:35](https://ref.ly/Mark8:35), [LUK 17:33](https://ref.ly/Luke17:33); [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21) parallels [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21), [LUK 18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22); [LUK 14:28–14:33](https://ref.ly/Luke14:28-Luke14:33); [1PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21)

Jesus Christ's demand for commitment was sometimes met with a refusal
---------------------------------------------------------------------

**[LUK 9:59](https://ref.ly/Luke9:59)** *See also* [LUK 9:61](https://ref.ly/Luke9:61)

Sometimes people followed Jesus Christ without being truly committed to him
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 6:2](https://ref.ly/John6:2)** *This would have been true for many in the crowds.* *See also* [JHN 6:66](https://ref.ly/John6:66)

Some committed themselves wholeheartedly to his invitation
----------------------------------------------------------

[MAT 4:20](https://ref.ly/Matt4:20) parallel [MRK 1:18](https://ref.ly/Mark1:18); ; [MAT 4:22](https://ref.ly/Matt4:22) parallel [MRK 1:20](https://ref.ly/Mark1:20); ; [MAT 9:9](https://ref.ly/Matt9:9) parallels [MRK 2:14](https://ref.ly/Mark2:14), [LUK 5:28](https://ref.ly/Luke5:28); ; [JHN 1:40](https://ref.ly/John1:40)

Secret commitment to Jesus Christ
---------------------------------

**[JHN 12:42](https://ref.ly/John12:42)** *See also* [JHN 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/John3:1-John3:2)

True commitment to Jesus Christ is seen in love and obedience to him
--------------------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 14:21](https://ref.ly/John14:21)**; **[PHP 2:12](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12)** *In response to who Jesus Christ is and what he has done.* *See also* [JHN 8:31](https://ref.ly/John8:31), [JHN 14:15](https://ref.ly/John14:15), [JHN 14:23–14:24](https://ref.ly/John14:23-John14:24); [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1), [1CO 16:22](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:22); [EPH 6:5–6:6](https://ref.ly/Eph6:5-Eph6:6), [EPH 6:24](https://ref.ly/Eph6:24); [1JN 2:3](https://ref.ly/1John2:3), [1JN 3:22–3:24](https://ref.ly/1John3:22-1John3:24); [REV 14:4](https://ref.ly/Rev14:4)

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 4:19; Mark 1:17; Matthew 9:9; Mark 2:14; Luke 5:27; Matthew 19:21-22; John 1:43; John 21:19; John 21:22; Romans 15:5; 1 Corinthians 1:12; Matthew 10:37-38; Luke 14:26-27; Matthew 16:24; Mark 8:34; Luke 9:23; John 12:25-26; Matthew 8:22; Matthew 10:39; Mark 8:35; Luke 17:33; Matthew 19:21; Mark 10:21; Luke 18:22; Luke 14:28-33; 1 Peter 2:21; Luke 9:59; Luke 9:61; John 6:2; John 6:66; Matthew 4:20; Mark 1:18; Matthew 4:22; Mark 1:20; Luke 5:28; John 1:40; John 12:42; John 3:1-2; John 14:21; Philippians 2:12; John 8:31; John 14:15; John 14:23-24; 1 Corinthians 11:1; 1 Corinthians 16:22; Ephesians 6:5-6; Ephesians 6:24; 1 John 2:3; 1 John 3:22-24; Revelation 14:4

## 8210: commitment, to God's people (id: 8210)

Commitment to God means a commitment to his people. Believers are meant to be nourished and supported by the church, and to work towards its edification.

Commitment to the church
------------------------

**[ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42)**; **[EPH 4:3–4:4](https://ref.ly/Eph4:3-Eph4:4)**; **[COL 3:15](https://ref.ly/Col3:15)** [ROM 12:4–12:10](https://ref.ly/Rom12:4-Rom12:10); ; [1CO 12:12–12:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:12-1Cor12:27)

Commitment to other Christians is an expression of love made known in Christ
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 13:34–13:35](https://ref.ly/John13:34-John13:35)**; **[COL 3:13–3:14](https://ref.ly/Col3:13-Col3:14)**; **[1PE 1:22](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:22)** *See also* [JHN 15:12](https://ref.ly/John15:12), [JHN 15:17](https://ref.ly/John15:17); [ROM 12:10](https://ref.ly/Rom12:10), [ROM 12:16](https://ref.ly/Rom12:16), [ROM 13:8](https://ref.ly/Rom13:8); [GAL 5:13](https://ref.ly/Gal5:13); [EPH 4:32–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:32-Eph5:2); [1TH 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:12), [1TH 4:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:9); [2TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3); [HEB 13:1](https://ref.ly/Heb13:1); [1PE 2:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:17); [1JN 3:11](https://ref.ly/1John3:11), [1JN 3:23](https://ref.ly/1John3:23), [1JN 4:7](https://ref.ly/1John4:7), [1JN 4:21](https://ref.ly/1John4:21), [1JN 5:2](https://ref.ly/1John5:2)

Such commitment is expressed in mutual responsibility and concern
-----------------------------------------------------------------

**[GAL 6:2](https://ref.ly/Gal6:2)**; **[HEB 10:24–10:25](https://ref.ly/Heb10:24-Heb10:25)**; **[1PE 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:8)** *See also* [ROM 14:13](https://ref.ly/Rom14:13), [ROM 15:7](https://ref.ly/Rom15:7), [ROM 15:14](https://ref.ly/Rom15:14); [1CO 1:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:10) *Paul's concern for unity among believers*; [EPH 5:21](https://ref.ly/Eph5:21); [COL 3:13](https://ref.ly/Col3:13) *the responsibility of believers to forgive one another*; [COL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Col3:16); [1TI 5:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:11); [HEB 3:13](https://ref.ly/Heb3:13); [JAS 4:11](https://ref.ly/Jas4:11); [1PE 4:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:9), [1PE 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:5)

For its leaders, commitment to the church may prove a joy and a burden
----------------------------------------------------------------------

**[ACT 20:28](https://ref.ly/Acts20:28)** *Paul speaking to the elders of the church at Ephesus*; **[2CO 11:28](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:28)** *See also* [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24); [1TH 2:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:8), [1TH 5:12–5:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:12-1Thess5:13); [1TI 3:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:1); [HEB 13:17](https://ref.ly/Heb13:17); [1PE 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:1-1Pet5:3)

* **Associated Passages:** Acts 2:42; Ephesians 4:3-4; Colossians 3:15; Romans 12:4-10; 1 Corinthians 12:12-27; John 13:34-35; Colossians 3:13-14; 1 Peter 1:22; John 15:12; John 15:17; Romans 12:10; Romans 12:16; Romans 13:8; Galatians 5:13; Ephesians 4:32-5:2; 1 Thessalonians 3:12; 1 Thessalonians 4:9; 2 Thessalonians 1:3; Hebrews 13:1; 1 Peter 2:17; 1 John 3:11; 1 John 3:23; 1 John 4:7; 1 John 4:21; 1 John 5:2; Galatians 6:2; Hebrews 10:24-25; 1 Peter 3:8; Romans 14:13; Romans 15:7; Romans 15:14; 1 Corinthians 1:10; Ephesians 5:21; Colossians 3:13; Colossians 3:16; 1 Timothy 5:11; Hebrews 3:13; James 4:11; 1 Peter 4:9; 1 Peter 5:5; Acts 20:28; 2 Corinthians 11:28; Colossians 1:24; 1 Thessalonians 2:8; 1 Thessalonians 5:12-13; 1 Timothy 3:1; Hebrews 13:17; 1 Peter 5:1-3

## 8211: commitment, to the world (id: 8211)

Though the world is fallen, God still loves the world and is committed to it. Commitment by believers to worldly pursuits and evil is to be avoided as they are called upon to be “in the world” but “not of the world”.

Commitment to this world to be avoided because it is a fallen and sinful place
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[GAL 1:4](https://ref.ly/Gal1:4)**; **[1JN 5:19](https://ref.ly/1John5:19)** *See also* [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4); [EPH 2:2](https://ref.ly/Eph2:2), [EPH 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eph6:12); [2PE 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:4); [1JN 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/1John2:16-1John2:17), [1JN 3:1](https://ref.ly/1John3:1), [1JN 3:13](https://ref.ly/1John3:13)

Though the world is fallen, God still loves it
----------------------------------------------

**[JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16)** *See also* [2CO 5:18–5:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:18-2Cor5:20)

Preoccupation with the things of this world is incompatible with holy living
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[JAS 4:4](https://ref.ly/Jas4:4)**; **[1JN 2:15](https://ref.ly/1John2:15)** *See also* [JHN 17:14–17:16](https://ref.ly/John17:14-John17:16); [ACT 2:40](https://ref.ly/Acts2:40); [ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2); [1CO 7:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:31); [2CO 6:14–6:17](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:14-2Cor6:17); [ISA 52:11](https://ref.ly/Isa52:11); [PHP 2:15](https://ref.ly/Phil2:15); [COL 3:2](https://ref.ly/Col3:2); [TIT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Titus2:12); [JAS 1:27](https://ref.ly/Jas1:27); [1PE 1:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:14), [1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11), [1PE 4:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:3)

Commitment to the world is seen especially in materialism
---------------------------------------------------------

**[1TI 6:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17)** *See also* [MAT 6:19](https://ref.ly/Matt6:19), [MAT 19:23](https://ref.ly/Matt19:23) parallel [LUK 18:24](https://ref.ly/Luke18:24); [LUK 12:16–12:21](https://ref.ly/Luke12:16-Luke12:21)

The outcome of worldly commitment
---------------------------------

### Spiritual loss

**[LUK 9:25](https://ref.ly/Luke9:25)** parallels [MAT 16:26](https://ref.ly/Matt16:26), [MRK 8:36](https://ref.ly/Mark8:36) *See also* [MAT 13:22](https://ref.ly/Matt13:22); [2TI 4:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:10)

### God's judgment

**[1CO 11:32](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:32)** *See also* [JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31), [JHN 16:11](https://ref.ly/John16:11); [EPH 5:6](https://ref.ly/Eph5:6)

### Carelessness with regard to Jesus Christ's return

**[LUK 21:34](https://ref.ly/Luke21:34)** *See also* [MAT 24:38–24:39](https://ref.ly/Matt24:38-Matt24:39); [LUK 12:40](https://ref.ly/Luke12:40), [LUK 12:46](https://ref.ly/Luke12:46); [1TH 5:1–5:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:1-1Thess5:9)

* **Associated Passages:** Galatians 1:4; 1 John 5:19; 2 Corinthians 4:4; Ephesians 2:2; Ephesians 6:12; 2 Peter 1:4; 1 John 2:16-17; 1 John 3:1; 1 John 3:13; John 3:16; 2 Corinthians 5:18-20; James 4:4; 1 John 2:15; John 17:14-16; Acts 2:40; Romans 12:2; 1 Corinthians 7:31; 2 Corinthians 6:14-17; Isaiah 52:11; Philippians 2:15; Colossians 3:2; Titus 2:12; James 1:27; 1 Peter 1:14; 1 Peter 2:11; 1 Peter 4:3; 1 Timothy 6:17; Matthew 6:19; Matthew 19:23; Luke 18:24; Luke 12:16-21; Luke 9:25; Matthew 16:26; Mark 8:36; Matthew 13:22; 2 Timothy 4:10; 1 Corinthians 11:32; John 12:31; John 16:11; Ephesians 5:6; Luke 21:34; Matthew 24:38-39; Luke 12:40; Luke 12:46; 1 Thessalonians 5:1-9

## 8213: confidence (id: 8213)

A state of self\-assurance regarding one's status or ability, often grounded in human achievements. Scripture insists that Christian confidence is to be grounded in what God has done for believers, rather than in what they themselves have achieved.

* **Associated Articles:** 8214: confidence, basis of (ID: `8214@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8215: confidence, results of (ID: `8215@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8214: confidence, basis of (id: 8214)

The confidence of believers, is grounded in God's character, actions and trustworthy promises, rather than human achievements.

Confidence originates with God
------------------------------

### In his unchanging and faithful nature

**[NUM 23:19](https://ref.ly/Num23:19)**; **[TIT 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Titus1:1-Titus1:2)** *See also* [1SA 15:29](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:29); [PSA 33:11](https://ref.ly/Ps33:11), [PSA 102:27](https://ref.ly/Ps102:27); [PRO 3:26](https://ref.ly/Prov3:26); [ISA 49:23](https://ref.ly/Isa49:23); [MAL 3:6](https://ref.ly/Mal3:6); [2TI 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:12); [JAS 1:17](https://ref.ly/Jas1:17)

### In his covenant

**[JER 32:40](https://ref.ly/Jer32:40)**; **[HEB 9:15](https://ref.ly/Heb9:15)** *See also* [GEN 9:16](https://ref.ly/Gen9:16) *with all living creatures*; [GEN 17:7](https://ref.ly/Gen17:7) *with Abraham*; [2SA 7:13](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:13) *with the house of David*; [2SA 23:5](https://ref.ly/2Sam23:5); [PSA 89:34](https://ref.ly/Ps89:34); [ISA 54:10](https://ref.ly/Isa54:10), [ISA 55:3](https://ref.ly/Isa55:3); [EZK 16:60](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:60); [ACT 3:25](https://ref.ly/Acts3:25)

### In election

**[DEU 7:6](https://ref.ly/Deut7:6)**; **[ROM 8:28](https://ref.ly/Rom8:28)** *See also* [ISA 41:9–41:10](https://ref.ly/Isa41:9-Isa41:10); [JER 31:3](https://ref.ly/Jer31:3); [ROM 8:33](https://ref.ly/Rom8:33); [1CO 1:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:9); [1TH 5:24](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:24); [2TI 2:19](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:19)

### In his past deliverances

**[PSA 22:4–22:5](https://ref.ly/Ps22:4-Ps22:5)**; **[ROM 8:31–8:32](https://ref.ly/Rom8:31-Rom8:32)** *See also* [DEU 7:18](https://ref.ly/Deut7:18), [DEU 20:1](https://ref.ly/Deut20:1); [JOS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Josh1:5); [1SA 17:37](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:37); [1KI 8:57](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:57); [PSA 44:1–44:5](https://ref.ly/Ps44:1-Ps44:5), [PSA 78:2–78:4](https://ref.ly/Ps78:2-Ps78:4); [2CO 1:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:10)

### In his word

**[ISA 55:10–55:11](https://ref.ly/Isa55:10-Isa55:11)** *See also* [PSA 89:34](https://ref.ly/Ps89:34), [PSA 119:74](https://ref.ly/Ps119:74), [PSA 130:5](https://ref.ly/Ps130:5); [ROM 15:4](https://ref.ly/Rom15:4); [1PE 1:25](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:25); [2PE 1:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:19)

### In his promises

**[JOS 23:14](https://ref.ly/Josh23:14)**; **[HEB 10:23](https://ref.ly/Heb10:23)** *See also* [1KI 8:20](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:20); [PSA 119:140](https://ref.ly/Ps119:140); [2PE 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:4)

Confidence is centred on Jesus Christ
-------------------------------------

**[ROM 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:38-Rom8:39)** *See also* [ACT 17:31](https://ref.ly/Acts17:31); [ROM 8:1](https://ref.ly/Rom8:1); [2CO 1:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:20); [COL 1:27](https://ref.ly/Col1:27); [1TI 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:13); [HEB 7:22](https://ref.ly/Heb7:22), [HEB 7:25](https://ref.ly/Heb7:25), [HEB 9:15](https://ref.ly/Heb9:15); [1PE 2:6](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:6); [ISA 28:16](https://ref.ly/Isa28:16)

Confidence is mediated by the Holy Spirit
-----------------------------------------

**[ROM 8:16](https://ref.ly/Rom8:16)** *See also* [2CO 1:21–1:22](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:21-2Cor1:22), [2CO 5:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:5); [EPH 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Eph1:13-Eph1:14)

## 8215: confidence, results of (id: 8215)

God\-given assurance produces spiritual maturity and stability, so that believers may withstand the adverse conditions of life.

Confidence in God's protection removes fear of disaster
-------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 46:1–46:2](https://ref.ly/Ps46:1-Ps46:2)** *See also* [EXO 14:13–14:14](https://ref.ly/Exod14:13-Exod14:14); [PSA 56:3–56:4](https://ref.ly/Ps56:3-Ps56:4); [ACT 27:22–27:25](https://ref.ly/Acts27:22-Acts27:25)

Confidence in God's purposes produces hope
------------------------------------------

**[PSA 130:7](https://ref.ly/Ps130:7)**; **[2CO 1:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:10)** *See also* [PSA 25:3–25:6](https://ref.ly/Ps25:3-Ps25:6), [PSA 62:5–62:8](https://ref.ly/Ps62:5-Ps62:8), [PSA 71:5–71:7](https://ref.ly/Ps71:5-Ps71:7); [PRO 23:17–23:18](https://ref.ly/Prov23:17-Prov23:18); [ROM 5:3–5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:3-Rom5:5); [1TI 6:17–6:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17-1Tim6:18); [HEB 6:17–6:19](https://ref.ly/Heb6:17-Heb6:19)

Confidence in God's presence makes his people bold
--------------------------------------------------

**[ISA 41:8–41:10](https://ref.ly/Isa41:8-Isa41:10)** *See also* [JOS 1:5–1:9](https://ref.ly/Josh1:5-Josh1:9); [PSA 3:3–3:6](https://ref.ly/Ps3:3-Ps3:6), [PSA 20:7](https://ref.ly/Ps20:7), [PSA 23:4](https://ref.ly/Ps23:4), [PSA 27:1–27:4](https://ref.ly/Ps27:1-Ps27:4), [PSA 138:3](https://ref.ly/Ps138:3); [ISA 12:2](https://ref.ly/Isa12:2), [ISA 44:8](https://ref.ly/Isa44:8); [JER 1:8](https://ref.ly/Jer1:8); [ACT 4:13](https://ref.ly/Acts4:13), [ACT 9:27](https://ref.ly/Acts9:27), [ACT 18:9–18:11](https://ref.ly/Acts18:9-Acts18:11); [EPH 6:10–6:11](https://ref.ly/Eph6:10-Eph6:11)

Confidence in God enables believers to endure difficulties
----------------------------------------------------------

**[HAB 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Hab3:17-Hab3:19)**; **[2TI 3:10–3:11](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:10-2Tim3:11)** *See also* [JOB 19:26](https://ref.ly/Job19:26); [PSA 42:9–42:10](https://ref.ly/Ps42:9-Ps42:10); [EPH 6:13](https://ref.ly/Eph6:13); [HEB 10:32–10:35](https://ref.ly/Heb10:32-Heb10:35), [HEB 11:35–11:39](https://ref.ly/Heb11:35-Heb11:39), [HEB 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1-Heb12:2); [1PE 3:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:14), [1PE 4:12–4:19](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:12-1Pet4:19); [REV 3:10](https://ref.ly/Rev3:10)

------------------------------------------------

## 8217: conformity (id: 8217)

Correspondence in character or behaviour; believers are not to conform to the ways of this world but are to be conformed to the image of Christ.

Believers are not to conform to the ways of this world
------------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2)**; **[1PE 1:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:14)** *See also* [EXO 23:2](https://ref.ly/Exod23:2); [LEV 20:23](https://ref.ly/Lev20:23); [DEU 18:9](https://ref.ly/Deut18:9) *Israel was not to imitate the practices of surrounding nations*; [2KI 17:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:15); [EZK 11:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek11:12); [DAN 1:8](https://ref.ly/Dan1:8) *Daniel refused to conform to the ways of Babylon*; [DAN 3:12](https://ref.ly/Dan3:12); [EPH 4:17](https://ref.ly/Eph4:17); [COL 3:7–3:8](https://ref.ly/Col3:7-Col3:8); [1TH 5:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:6); [1TI 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:9-1Tim1:11); [1PE 4:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:3); [3JN 1:11](https://ref.ly/3John1:11)

Christians will be conformed to the image of Christ
---------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29)** *See also* [JHN 13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:15), [JHN 13:34](https://ref.ly/John13:34); [ROM 13:14](https://ref.ly/Rom13:14); [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1); [EPH 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1-Eph5:2); [PHP 2:5](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5)

The means of being conformed to Jesus Christ
--------------------------------------------

### In being completely united with him

**[ROM 6:3–6:10](https://ref.ly/Rom6:3-Rom6:10)**; **[2CO 4:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:10)** *See also* [ROM 8:10–8:11](https://ref.ly/Rom8:10-Rom8:11), [ROM 8:17–8:18](https://ref.ly/Rom8:17-Rom8:18); [PHP 3:10–3:11](https://ref.ly/Phil3:10-Phil3:11); [1PE 4:13](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:13)

### In his death

**[PHP 3:10](https://ref.ly/Phil3:10)** *See also* [GAL 6:14](https://ref.ly/Gal6:14); [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24), [COL 3:3](https://ref.ly/Col3:3); [1PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21), [1PE 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:1)

### In his resurrection

**[EPH 2:4–2:6](https://ref.ly/Eph2:4-Eph2:6)** *See also* [1CO 15:20–15:22](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:20-1Cor15:22); [COL 3:1](https://ref.ly/Col3:1)

## 8218: consecration (id: 8218)

The setting apart of people, things, times or places as sacred, for God to use.

Consecration is the requirement of a holy God
---------------------------------------------

**[LEV 20:7–20:8](https://ref.ly/Lev20:7-Lev20:8)** *See also* [LEV 11:44](https://ref.ly/Lev11:44), [LEV 22:32](https://ref.ly/Lev22:32)

The consecration of people
--------------------------

### The importance of personal consecration

[ROM 6:13](https://ref.ly/Rom6:13)

### Inward consecration to God is symbolised by outward cleansing

[ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1); ; [2CO 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:14-2Cor5:15); ; [1PE 2:24](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:24); ; [EXO 19:10](https://ref.ly/Exod19:10), [EXO 19:14](https://ref.ly/Exod19:14); ; [1SA 16:5](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:5); ; [2CH 30:17](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:17), [2CH 35:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr35:6); ; [PSA 50:5](https://ref.ly/Ps50:5); ; [ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)

### The consecration of all firstborn males

**[EXO 13:2](https://ref.ly/Exod13:2)**; **[LUK 2:22–2:23](https://ref.ly/Luke2:22-Luke2:23)** *See also* [EXO 13:12–13:13](https://ref.ly/Exod13:12-Exod13:13); [NUM 3:11–3:13](https://ref.ly/Num3:11-Num3:13), [NUM 8:17–8:18](https://ref.ly/Num8:17-Num8:18) *The Levites served in place of the firstborn males in Israel.*

### The consecration of priests

**[EXO 29:1](https://ref.ly/Exod29:1)** *See also* [EXO 19:22](https://ref.ly/Exod19:22); [1KI 13:33](https://ref.ly/1Kgs13:33); [2CH 30:3](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:3), [2CH 30:24](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:24)

### The consecration of the Aaronic priesthood

**[EXO 30:30](https://ref.ly/Exod30:30)** *See also* [EXO 28:41](https://ref.ly/Exod28:41); [LEV 8:30](https://ref.ly/Lev8:30); [1CH 23:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr23:13)

### The consecration of the Levitical priesthood

[1CH 15:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr15:12); ; [2CH 23:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr23:6), [2CH 29:5](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:5), [2CH 35:3](https://ref.ly/2Chr35:3)

### Special consecration is marked by a vow

[NUM 6:8](https://ref.ly/Num6:8), [NUM 6:11](https://ref.ly/Num6:11) *the Nazirite vow*

The consecration of things
--------------------------

### Altars

**[EXO 29:36–29:37](https://ref.ly/Exod29:36-Exod29:37)** *See also* [EXO 30:29](https://ref.ly/Exod30:29)EXO [40:9–40:11](https://ref.ly/Exod40:9-Exod40:11); [LEV 8:11–8:12](https://ref.ly/Lev8:11-Lev8:12)

### Offerings

[EXO 28:38](https://ref.ly/Exod28:38), [EXO 29:27](https://ref.ly/Exod29:27); ; [LEV 22:2](https://ref.ly/Lev22:2); ; [2CH 30:17](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:17)

### Garments

[EXO 28:3](https://ref.ly/Exod28:3), [EXO 29:21](https://ref.ly/Exod29:21), [EXO 40:13](https://ref.ly/Exod40:13); ; [NUM 15:39–15:40](https://ref.ly/Num15:39-Num15:40)

### Bread

[1SA 21:4](https://ref.ly/1Sam21:4), [1SA 21:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam21:6); ; [MAT 12:4](https://ref.ly/Matt12:4) parallels [MRK 2:25–2:26](https://ref.ly/Mark2:25-Mark2:26), [LUK 6:3–6:4](https://ref.ly/Luke6:3-Luke6:4)

### Meat

[HAG 2:12](https://ref.ly/Hag2:12) *The state of consecration could be transmitted*; ; [JER 11:15](https://ref.ly/Jer11:15) *True consecration should involve a right spirit.*

Certain places are consecrated
------------------------------

[EXO 19:23](https://ref.ly/Exod19:23) *Mount Sinai*; ; [EXO 29:43–29:44](https://ref.ly/Exod29:43-Exod29:44) *the Tent of Meeting*; [LEV 8:10](https://ref.ly/Lev8:10); ; [NUM 7:1](https://ref.ly/Num7:1); [1KI 8:64](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:64) parallel [2CH 7:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:7); ; [1KI 9:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:3) parallel [2CH 7:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:16); ; [2CH 29:17–29:19](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:17-2Chr29:19)

Certain times are specially consecrated
---------------------------------------

[LEV 25:10](https://ref.ly/Lev25:10) *the Year of Jubilee*; [GEN 2:3](https://ref.ly/Gen2:3); ; [EXO 20:8](https://ref.ly/Exod20:8), [EXO 20:11](https://ref.ly/Exod20:11); ; [DEU 5:12](https://ref.ly/Deut5:12)

The consecration of daily life
------------------------------

**[1TI 4:4–4:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:4-1Tim4:5)** *The reference may be to grace before eating.* *See also* [ZEC 14:20–14:21](https://ref.ly/Zech14:20-Zech14:21)

Consecration as preparation for work and worship
------------------------------------------------

[NUM 11:18](https://ref.ly/Num11:18); ; [JOS 3:5](https://ref.ly/Josh3:5), [JOS 7:13](https://ref.ly/Josh7:13)

Consecration to other gods incurs God's displeasure
---------------------------------------------------
