## 8219: courage (id: 8219)

The quality of being able to act bravely under difficulties or in the face of opposition; being prepared to do dangerous or risky things in obedience to God, in the belief that he will strengthen, guard and protect his people.

* **Associated Articles:** 8220: courage, in facing enemies (ID: `8220@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8221: courage, as strength from God (ID: `8221@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8220: courage, in facing enemies (id: 8220)

In the OT, courage is shown principally in the leading of God's people against their enemies.

God commands his people to be courageous
----------------------------------------

**[JOS 1:6–1:9](https://ref.ly/Josh1:6-Josh1:9)** *The LORD to Joshua as he was about to lead the Israelites into Canaan.* *See also* [JOS 1:18](https://ref.ly/Josh1:18), [JOS 8:1](https://ref.ly/Josh8:1), [JOS 10:8](https://ref.ly/Josh10:8); [JDG 7:9–7:11](https://ref.ly/Judg7:9-Judg7:11); [2CH 20:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:15), [2CH 20:17](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:17)

Recommended by leaders
----------------------

**[DEU 1:21](https://ref.ly/Deut1:21)** *See also* [DEU 31:1–31:8](https://ref.ly/Deut31:1-Deut31:8); [JOS 10:25](https://ref.ly/Josh10:25), [JOS 23:6](https://ref.ly/Josh23:6); [2SA 10:12](https://ref.ly/2Sam10:12); [2CH 32:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:7)

Seen in the behaviour of people of God
--------------------------------------

**[1SA 17:32](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:32)**; **[ACT 4:13](https://ref.ly/Acts4:13)** *See also* [JOS 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/Josh1:10-Josh1:11), [JOS 14:12](https://ref.ly/Josh14:12); [1SA 14:6–14:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:6-1Sam14:7), [1SA 17:45–17:47](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:45-1Sam17:47); [ACT 13:44–13:47](https://ref.ly/Acts13:44-Acts13:47) *Paul and Barnabas*; [ACT 19:8–19:10](https://ref.ly/Acts19:8-Acts19:10) *Paul at Ephesus*

* **Associated Passages:** Joshua 1:6-9; Joshua 1:18; Joshua 8:1; Joshua 10:8; Judges 7:9-11; 2 Chronicles 20:15; 2 Chronicles 20:17; Deuteronomy 1:21; Deuteronomy 31:1-8; Joshua 10:25; Joshua 23:6; 2 Samuel 10:12; 2 Chronicles 32:7; 1 Samuel 17:32; Acts 4:13; Joshua 1:10-11; Joshua 14:12; 1 Samuel 14:6-7; 1 Samuel 17:45-47; Acts 13:44-47; Acts 19:8-10
* **Associated Articles:** 5766: attitudes, to life (ID: `5766@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5968: timidity (ID: `5968@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7733: leaders (ID: `7733@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8202: boldness (ID: `8202@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8213: confidence (ID: `8213@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8414: encouragement (ID: `8414@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8485: spiritual warfare, as conflict (ID: `8485@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8727: enemies (ID: `8727@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8221: courage, as strength from God (id: 8221)

God gives strength to his people. He enables them to be courageous through his gift of faith. God proves himself faithful to his promises and enables his people to trust him in everyday life.

Courage through faithful obedience
----------------------------------

**[1CH 22:11–22:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:11-1Chr22:13)** *See also* [1CH 28:20](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:20); [GEN 12:1–12:4](https://ref.ly/Gen12:1-Gen12:4); [HEB 11:8](https://ref.ly/Heb11:8); [GEN 22:1–22:5](https://ref.ly/Gen22:1-Gen22:5); [HEB 11:17–11:19](https://ref.ly/Heb11:17-Heb11:19); [2CH 15:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:8), [2CH 19:8–19:11](https://ref.ly/2Chr19:8-2Chr19:11); [EZR 7:27–7:28](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:27-Ezra7:28), [EZR 10:1–10:4](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:1-Ezra10:4); [MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39) parallels [MRK 14:35–14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:35-Mark14:36), [LUK 22:41–22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:41-Luke22:42)

Courage in the face of wrongdoing
---------------------------------

**[2SA 12:7–12:9](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:7-2Sam12:9)** *The prophet accuses the king of adultery and murder.* *See also* [2CH 26:16–26:18](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:16-2Chr26:18) *Azariah and Uzziah*; [MRK 6:18](https://ref.ly/Mark6:18) *John the Baptist and Herod*; [HEB 11:7](https://ref.ly/Heb11:7), [HEB 11:24–11:27](https://ref.ly/Heb11:24-Heb11:27)

Courage under pressure
----------------------

**[PSA 46:1–46:3](https://ref.ly/Ps46:1-Ps46:3)** *See also* [PSA 10:17](https://ref.ly/Ps10:17), [PSA 27:3](https://ref.ly/Ps27:3); [ISA 12:2](https://ref.ly/Isa12:2) *Isaiah's encouragement of the exiles of Israel*; [ACT 27:22](https://ref.ly/Acts27:22); [1CO 16:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:13); [2CO 6:4–6:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:4-2Cor6:10); [HEB 3:6](https://ref.ly/Heb3:6), [HEB 11:32–11:39](https://ref.ly/Heb11:32-Heb11:39); [MAT 14:27](https://ref.ly/Matt14:27) parallels [MRK 6:50](https://ref.ly/Mark6:50), [JHN 6:20](https://ref.ly/John6:20)

Courageous witness
------------------

**[ACT 4:18–4:20](https://ref.ly/Acts4:18-Acts4:20)** *See also* [MAT 10:19–10:26](https://ref.ly/Matt10:19-Matt10:26) parallels [MRK 13:9–13:11](https://ref.ly/Mark13:9-Mark13:11), [LUK 21:12–21:15](https://ref.ly/Luke21:12-Luke21:15); [ACT 23:11](https://ref.ly/Acts23:11); [PHP 1:14](https://ref.ly/Phil1:14), [PHP 1:20](https://ref.ly/Phil1:20)

Courage in prayer
-----------------

**[HEB 4:14–4:16](https://ref.ly/Heb4:14-Heb4:16)** *See also* [GEN 18:27–18:28](https://ref.ly/Gen18:27-Gen18:28); [1CH 17:25](https://ref.ly/1Chr17:25) parallel [2SA 7:27](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:27)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Chronicles 22:11-13; 1 Chronicles 28:20; Genesis 12:1-4; Hebrews 11:8; Genesis 22:1-5; Hebrews 11:17-19; 2 Chronicles 15:8; 2 Chronicles 19:8-11; Ezra 7:27-28; Ezra 10:1-4; Matthew 26:39; Mark 14:35-36; Luke 22:41-42; 2 Samuel 12:7-9; 2 Chronicles 26:16-18; Mark 6:18; Hebrews 11:7; Hebrews 11:24-27; Psalms 46:1-3; Psalms 10:17; Psalms 27:3; Isaiah 12:2; Acts 27:22; 1 Corinthians 16:13; 2 Corinthians 6:4-10; Hebrews 3:6; Hebrews 11:32-39; Matthew 14:27; Mark 6:50; John 6:20; Acts 4:18-20; Matthew 10:19-26; Mark 13:9-11; Luke 21:12-15; Acts 23:11; Philippians 1:14; Philippians 1:20; Hebrews 4:14-16; Genesis 18:27-28; 1 Chronicles 17:25; 2 Samuel 7:27
* **Associated Articles:** 5622: witnesses (ID: `5622@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8020: faith (ID: `8020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8495: witnessing (ID: `8495@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8754: fear (ID: `8754@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8223: dedication (id: 8223)

The single\-minded devoting of a person, object or action to the honour of God.

Personal dedication to God must be wholehearted
-----------------------------------------------

**[JOS 22:5](https://ref.ly/Josh22:5)** *See also* [DEU 10:20](https://ref.ly/Deut10:20); [JOS 24:14–24:15](https://ref.ly/Josh24:14-Josh24:15); [1CH 28:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:9); [NEH 10:28–10:29](https://ref.ly/Neh10:28-Neh10:29); [PSA 119:106](https://ref.ly/Ps119:106); [MAT 22:37](https://ref.ly/Matt22:37) parallels [MRK 12:30](https://ref.ly/Mark12:30), [LUK 10:27](https://ref.ly/Luke10:27); [DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5)

OT dedication to the worship and service of God
-----------------------------------------------

### Dedication of individuals

**[NUM 6:1–6:8](https://ref.ly/Num6:1-Num6:8)** *See also* [JDG 13:5](https://ref.ly/Judg13:5), [JDG 13:7](https://ref.ly/Judg13:7), [JDG 16:17](https://ref.ly/Judg16:17); [1SA 1:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:11); [PRO 20:25](https://ref.ly/Prov20:25)

### Dedication of property

**[LEV 27:1–27:8](https://ref.ly/Lev27:1-Lev27:8)** *See also* [LEV 27:9–27:27](https://ref.ly/Lev27:9-Lev27:27)

### Dedication of animals

**[LEV 1:1–1:4](https://ref.ly/Lev1:1-Lev1:4)**

### Dedication of the priesthood

**[NUM 18:6](https://ref.ly/Num18:6)** *See also* [EXO 28:41](https://ref.ly/Exod28:41); [LEV 21:10–21:12](https://ref.ly/Lev21:10-Lev21:12); [DEU 10:8](https://ref.ly/Deut10:8); [1CH 15:2](https://ref.ly/1Chr15:2), [1CH 23:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr23:13)

### Dedication of the tabernacle and its furnishings

**[NUM 7:1](https://ref.ly/Num7:1)** *See also* [NUM 7:10](https://ref.ly/Num7:10), [NUM 7:84](https://ref.ly/Num7:84), [NUM 7:88](https://ref.ly/Num7:88)

### Dedication of the temple and its contents

[1KI 7:51](https://ref.ly/1Kgs7:51) parallel [2CH 5:1](https://ref.ly/2Chr5:1); ; [1KI 8:63–8:64](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:63-1Kgs8:64), [1KI 15:15](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:15); ; [2CH 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Chr2:4), [2CH 7:9](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:9); ; [EZR 6:16–6:18](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:16-Ezra6:18); ; [LUK 21:5](https://ref.ly/Luke21:5)

### Dedication of particular items of value

**[1KI 7:51](https://ref.ly/1Kgs7:51)** parallel [2CH 5:1](https://ref.ly/2Chr5:1) *See also* [1KI 15:15](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:15); [1CH 29:1–29:5](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:1-1Chr29:5); [2CH 3:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr3:6)

### Dedication of the booty of war

**[2SA 8:11–8:12](https://ref.ly/2Sam8:11-2Sam8:12)** parallel [1CH 18:11](https://ref.ly/1Chr18:11) *See also* [NUM 31:28](https://ref.ly/Num31:28); [JOS 6:19](https://ref.ly/Josh6:19), [JOS 7:1](https://ref.ly/Josh7:1), [JOS 7:10–7:13](https://ref.ly/Josh7:10-Josh7:13); [1CH 26:27](https://ref.ly/1Chr26:27)

NT dedication to God and his service
------------------------------------

### Dedication is more usually applied to people than things

**[ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)** *See also* [MAT 6:24](https://ref.ly/Matt6:24) parallel [LUK 16:13](https://ref.ly/Luke16:13); [MAT 19:29](https://ref.ly/Matt19:29); [ACT 4:36–4:37](https://ref.ly/Acts4:36-Acts4:37); [ROM 6:13](https://ref.ly/Rom6:13), [ROM 6:16](https://ref.ly/Rom6:16), [ROM 6:19](https://ref.ly/Rom6:19); [1CO 16:1–16:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:1-1Cor16:2); [1TI 5:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:11); [1PE 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15-1Pet1:16); [LEV 11:44](https://ref.ly/Lev11:44)

### Particular work and time may be given over to the service of God

**[ACT 6:1–6:4](https://ref.ly/Acts6:1-Acts6:4)** *See also* [ACT 1:14](https://ref.ly/Acts1:14), [ACT 13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2); [ROM 1:1](https://ref.ly/Rom1:1)

### Service for others is to be dedicated to God and done in his name

**[COL 3:17](https://ref.ly/Col3:17)** *See also* [1CO 10:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:31); [EPH 5:21](https://ref.ly/Eph5:21), [EPH 6:5–6:7](https://ref.ly/Eph6:5-Eph6:7)

* **Associated Passages:** Joshua 22:5; Deuteronomy 10:20; Joshua 24:14-15; 1 Chronicles 28:9; Nehemiah 10:28-29; Psalms 119:106; Matthew 22:37; Mark 12:30; Luke 10:27; Deuteronomy 6:5; Numbers 6:1-8; Judges 13:5; Judges 13:7; Judges 16:17; 1 Samuel 1:11; Proverbs 20:25; Leviticus 27:1-8; Leviticus 27:9-27; Leviticus 1:1-4; Numbers 18:6; Exodus 28:41; Leviticus 21:10-12; Deuteronomy 10:8; 1 Chronicles 15:2; 1 Chronicles 23:13; Numbers 7:1; Numbers 7:10; Numbers 7:84; Numbers 7:88; 1 Kings 7:51; 2 Chronicles 5:1; 1 Kings 8:63-64; 1 Kings 15:15; 2 Chronicles 2:4; 2 Chronicles 7:9; Ezra 6:16-18; Luke 21:5; 1 Chronicles 29:1-5; 2 Chronicles 3:6; 2 Samuel 8:11-12; 1 Chronicles 18:11; Numbers 31:28; Joshua 6:19; Joshua 7:1; Joshua 7:10-13; 1 Chronicles 26:27; Romans 12:1; Matthew 6:24; Luke 16:13; Matthew 19:29; Acts 4:36-37; Romans 6:13; Romans 6:16; Romans 6:19; 1 Corinthians 16:1-2; 1 Timothy 5:11; 1 Peter 1:15-16; Leviticus 11:44; Acts 6:1-4; Acts 1:14; Acts 13:2; Romans 1:1; Colossians 3:17; 1 Corinthians 10:31; Ephesians 5:21; Ephesians 6:5-7

## 8224: dependence (id: 8224)

Reliance upon God or upon others. Dependence on God for help with spiritual and physical needs arises out of an awareness of human helplessness, though dependence may be wrongly directed. People may look to others for encouragement and support, but over\-dependence is not commended.

Dependence arising from a sense of helplessness
-----------------------------------------------

### Physical helplessness

**[PSA 18:6](https://ref.ly/Ps18:6)** *See also* [PSA 107:4–107:6](https://ref.ly/Ps107:4-Ps107:6), [PSA 116:6](https://ref.ly/Ps116:6); [MRK 4:38](https://ref.ly/Mark4:38) parallels [MAT 8:25](https://ref.ly/Matt8:25), [LUK 8:24](https://ref.ly/Luke8:24); [MRK 5:25–5:26](https://ref.ly/Mark5:25-Mark5:26) parallels [MAT 9:20](https://ref.ly/Matt9:20), [LUK 8:43](https://ref.ly/Luke8:43)

### Spiritual helplessness

[ISA 64:6](https://ref.ly/Isa64:6); ; [MRK 9:17–9:18](https://ref.ly/Mark9:17-Mark9:18) parallels [MAT 17:14–17:16](https://ref.ly/Matt17:14-Matt17:16), [LUK 9:38–9:40](https://ref.ly/Luke9:38-Luke9:40); ; [ROM 5:6](https://ref.ly/Rom5:6), [ROM 7:18](https://ref.ly/Rom7:18)

Dependence on God encouraged
----------------------------

### God is to be trusted

**[HEB 4:16](https://ref.ly/Heb4:16)** *See also* [EXO 14:31](https://ref.ly/Exod14:31); [DEU 8:3](https://ref.ly/Deut8:3); [PSA 4:5](https://ref.ly/Ps4:5), [PSA 9:10](https://ref.ly/Ps9:10), [PSA 20:7](https://ref.ly/Ps20:7), [PSA 37:3](https://ref.ly/Ps37:3); [PRO 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5-Prov3:6); [NAM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Nah1:7); [JHN 15:4–15:5](https://ref.ly/John15:4-John15:5)

### God is a refuge

**[PSA 46:1](https://ref.ly/Ps46:1)** *See also* [DEU 33:27](https://ref.ly/Deut33:27); [PSA 62:8](https://ref.ly/Ps62:8), [PSA 71:1](https://ref.ly/Ps71:1)

### God can help those who depend on him

**[HEB 13:6](https://ref.ly/Heb13:6)** *See also* [PSA 118:6–118:7](https://ref.ly/Ps118:6-Ps118:7), [PSA 22:4–22:5](https://ref.ly/Ps22:4-Ps22:5), [PSA 33:18–33:20](https://ref.ly/Ps33:18-Ps33:20), [PSA 94:17–94:18](https://ref.ly/Ps94:17-Ps94:18)

### God will help those who depend on him

**[LUK 11:13](https://ref.ly/Luke11:13)** parallel [MAT 7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:11) *See also* [PSA 121:2–121:4](https://ref.ly/Ps121:2-Ps121:4), [PSA 145:18–145:19](https://ref.ly/Ps145:18-Ps145:19); [JAS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5)

### Examples of failure to depend on God

[NUM 20:12](https://ref.ly/Num20:12); ; [DEU 1:32](https://ref.ly/Deut1:32), [DEU 9:23](https://ref.ly/Deut9:23); ; [2KI 17:14](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:14); ; [PSA 49:6](https://ref.ly/Ps49:6), [PSA 49:13](https://ref.ly/Ps49:13); ; [ISA 42:17](https://ref.ly/Isa42:17)

Dependence on God for physical help
-----------------------------------

**[2CH 20:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:12)** *Jehoshaphat and the people of Judah.* *See also* [2KI 19:14](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:14) parallel [ISA 37:14](https://ref.ly/Isa37:14) *Hezekiah*; [2CH 13:18](https://ref.ly/2Chr13:18) *the men of Judah*[2CH 14:11](https://ref.ly/2Chr14:11), [2CH 16:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr16:8)[PSA 22:9–22:10](https://ref.ly/Ps22:9-Ps22:10) *David*; [MAT 9:27–9:28](https://ref.ly/Matt9:27-Matt9:28) *two blind men*; [JHN 2:3–2:5](https://ref.ly/John2:3-John2:5) *Mary*; [2CO 1:8–1:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:8-2Cor1:10) *Paul*

Dependence on God for spiritual needs
-------------------------------------

**[MRK 10:14–10:15](https://ref.ly/Mark10:14-Mark10:15)** parallels [MAT 19:14](https://ref.ly/Matt19:14), [LUK 18:16–18:17](https://ref.ly/Luke18:16-Luke18:17) *Childlike dependence is necessary for those who would enter God's kingdom*; **[JHN 3:27](https://ref.ly/John3:27)** *See also* [RUT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:12); [LUK 23:40–23:42](https://ref.ly/Luke23:40-Luke23:42), [LUK 24:47–24:49](https://ref.ly/Luke24:47-Luke24:49); [2CO 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:4-2Cor3:5)

Dependence on God expressed in prayer
-------------------------------------

**[PSA 5:2](https://ref.ly/Ps5:2)** *See also* [PSA 22:24](https://ref.ly/Ps22:24), [PSA 88:13](https://ref.ly/Ps88:13), [PSA 102:1](https://ref.ly/Ps102:1), [PSA 119:147](https://ref.ly/Ps119:147), [PSA 130:1–130:2](https://ref.ly/Ps130:1-Ps130:2)

Examples of those crying out in dependence on God
-------------------------------------------------

[EXO 2:23](https://ref.ly/Exod2:23) *the Israelites in Egypt*; ; [JOB 30:28](https://ref.ly/Job30:28) *Job in his suffering*; ; [ISA 30:19](https://ref.ly/Isa30:19) *the people of Jerusalem*; ; [LAM 3:55](https://ref.ly/Lam3:55) *Jeremiah*; ; [JON 2:2](https://ref.ly/Jonah2:2) *Jonah from within the fish*; ; [LUK 18:13](https://ref.ly/Luke18:13) *the tax collector in the temple*; ; [ACT 12:5](https://ref.ly/Acts12:5) *the church praying for Peter*; ; [2CO 1:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:11) *the Corinthians praying for Paul*

Misplaced dependence
--------------------

### Dependence on surrounding nations

**[JER 2:18](https://ref.ly/Jer2:18)** *See also* [2KI 18:20–18:21](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:20-2Kgs18:21) parallel [ISA 36:5–36:6](https://ref.ly/Isa36:5-Isa36:6); [ISA 31:1](https://ref.ly/Isa31:1)

### Dependence on false gods and religions

**[PSA 40:4](https://ref.ly/Ps40:4)** *See also* [DEU 31:20](https://ref.ly/Deut31:20); [ISA 42:17](https://ref.ly/Isa42:17); [COL 2:8](https://ref.ly/Col2:8)

### Dependence on human strength and resources

**[JER 17:5](https://ref.ly/Jer17:5)**; **[ROM 9:16](https://ref.ly/Rom9:16)** *See also* [PSA 33:16–33:17](https://ref.ly/Ps33:16-Ps33:17), [PSA 118:8–118:9](https://ref.ly/Ps118:8-Ps118:9), [PSA 127:1–127:2](https://ref.ly/Ps127:1-Ps127:2); [EPH 2:8–2:9](https://ref.ly/Eph2:8-Eph2:9)

### Dependence on sinful behaviour

[ISA 30:12](https://ref.ly/Isa30:12), [ISA 59:4](https://ref.ly/Isa59:4)

The futility of misplaced dependence
------------------------------------

**[PRO 25:19](https://ref.ly/Prov25:19)**; **[JER 2:13](https://ref.ly/Jer2:13)** *See also* [ISA 8:6–8:8](https://ref.ly/Isa8:6-Isa8:8), [ISA 31:3](https://ref.ly/Isa31:3); [HOS 10:13–10:14](https://ref.ly/Hos10:13-Hos10:14); [ACT 12:20](https://ref.ly/Acts12:20); [1TH 4:11–4:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:11-1Thess4:12)

A proper dependence on others is commended
------------------------------------------

### Human help can strengthen

**[GAL 6:2](https://ref.ly/Gal6:2)** *See also* [ECC 4:9–4:12](https://ref.ly/Eccl4:9-Eccl4:12)

### Examples of a right dependence on others

[LEV 21:3](https://ref.ly/Lev21:3) *a priest's support for an unmarried sister*; [DEU 15:11](https://ref.ly/Deut15:11); ; [MAT 25:35–25:36](https://ref.ly/Matt25:35-Matt25:36); [1SA 29:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam29:6) *Achish found David to be a reliable soldier*; ; [ISA 8:2](https://ref.ly/Isa8:2) *Uriah and Zechariah were reliable witnesses*; ; [2TI 2:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:2) *Reliable teachers are a blessing to the church.*

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 18:6; Psalms 107:4-6; Psalms 116:6; Mark 4:38; Matthew 8:25; Luke 8:24; Mark 5:25-26; Matthew 9:20; Luke 8:43; Isaiah 64:6; Mark 9:17-18; Matthew 17:14-16; Luke 9:38-40; Romans 5:6; Romans 7:18; Hebrews 4:16; Exodus 14:31; Deuteronomy 8:3; Psalms 4:5; Psalms 9:10; Psalms 20:7; Psalms 37:3; Proverbs 3:5-6; Nahum 1:7; John 15:4-5; Psalms 46:1; Deuteronomy 33:27; Psalms 62:8; Psalms 71:1; Hebrews 13:6; Psalms 118:6-7; Psalms 22:4-5; Psalms 33:18-20; Psalms 94:17-18; Luke 11:13; Matthew 7:11; Psalms 121:2-4; Psalms 145:18-19; James 1:5; Numbers 20:12; Deuteronomy 1:32; Deuteronomy 9:23; 2 Kings 17:14; Psalms 49:6; Psalms 49:13; Isaiah 42:17; 2 Chronicles 20:12; 2 Kings 19:14; Isaiah 37:14; 2 Chronicles 13:18; 2 Chronicles 14:11; 2 Chronicles 16:8; Psalms 22:9-10; Matthew 9:27-28; John 2:3-5; 2 Corinthians 1:8-10; Mark 10:14-15; Matthew 19:14; Luke 18:16-17; John 3:27; Ruth 2:12; Luke 23:40-42; Luke 24:47-49; 2 Corinthians 3:4-5; Psalms 5:2; Psalms 22:24; Psalms 88:13; Psalms 102:1; Psalms 119:147; Psalms 130:1-2; Exodus 2:23; Job 30:28; Isaiah 30:19; Lamentations 3:55; Jonah 2:2; Luke 18:13; Acts 12:5; 2 Corinthians 1:11; Jeremiah 2:18; 2 Kings 18:20-21; Isaiah 36:5-6; Isaiah 31:1; Psalms 40:4; Deuteronomy 31:20; Colossians 2:8; Jeremiah 17:5; Romans 9:16; Psalms 33:16-17; Psalms 118:8-9; Psalms 127:1-2; Ephesians 2:8-9; Isaiah 30:12; Isaiah 59:4; Proverbs 25:19; Jeremiah 2:13; Isaiah 8:6-8; Isaiah 31:3; Hosea 10:13-14; Acts 12:20; 1 Thessalonians 4:11-12; Galatians 6:2; Ecclesiastes 4:9-12; Leviticus 21:3; Deuteronomy 15:11; Matthew 25:35-36; 1 Samuel 29:6; Isaiah 8:2; 2 Timothy 2:2

## 8225: devotion (id: 8225)

Wholehearted commitment to God, to another person or to a task. God's people are encouraged to show such commitment.

God's people are to be wholehearted in their devotion to him
------------------------------------------------------------

**[DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5)**; **[ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)** *See also* [DEU 30:1–30:3](https://ref.ly/Deut30:1-Deut30:3); [JDG 5:2](https://ref.ly/Judg5:2); [PSA 119:2](https://ref.ly/Ps119:2); [JER 29:13](https://ref.ly/Jer29:13)

Examples of devotion to God
---------------------------

**[PSA 42:1](https://ref.ly/Ps42:1)**; **[PHP 3:7–3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:7-Phil3:8)** [NUM 14:6–14:9](https://ref.ly/Num14:6-Num14:9), [NUM 32:11–32:12](https://ref.ly/Num32:11-Num32:12); ; [JOS 14:7–14:12](https://ref.ly/Josh14:7-Josh14:12); [2KI 23:1–23:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:1-2Kgs23:3) parallel [2CH 34:29–34:32](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:29-2Chr34:32) *Josiah and his subjects*; ; [2CH 15:12–15:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:12-2Chr15:15) *the people of Judah*; [PSA 27:1–27:4](https://ref.ly/Ps27:1-Ps27:4), [PSA 40:7–40:8](https://ref.ly/Ps40:7-Ps40:8), [PSA 84:2](https://ref.ly/Ps84:2), [PSA 119:57](https://ref.ly/Ps119:57), [PSA 119:135–119:136](https://ref.ly/Ps119:135-Ps119:136); [1CO 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:2), [1CO 9:26–9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:26-1Cor9:27); ; [2CO 1:8–1:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:8-2Cor1:10); ; [PHP 3:13–3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:13-Phil3:14); ; [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24), [COL 1:28–1:29](https://ref.ly/Col1:28-Col1:29)

Examples of devotion to other people
------------------------------------

**[MAT 26:35](https://ref.ly/Matt26:35)** parallel [MRK 14:31](https://ref.ly/Mark14:31)**[JHN 6:68](https://ref.ly/John6:68)** *See also* [RUT 1:15–1:17](https://ref.ly/Ruth1:15-Ruth1:17) *Ruth to Naomi*[1SA 19:4–19:5](https://ref.ly/1Sam19:4-1Sam19:5), [1SA 20:12–20:13](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:12-1Sam20:13), [1SA 20:41–20:42](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:41-1Sam20:42)EPH [5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/1Sam5:22-1Sam5:23), [EPH 5:28–5:29](https://ref.ly/Eph5:28-Eph5:29); [COL 3:18–3:19](https://ref.ly/Col3:18-Col3:19)[2CO 8:1–8:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:1-2Cor8:5) *the Macedonian churches to Christians in poverty*

---------------------------------------

### The leaders and people of Israel to building the temple

### The disciples devoted themselves to the ministry of the church

## 8226: discernment (id: 8226)

The sound judgment which makes possible the distinguishing of good from evil, and the recognition of God's right ways for his people. It is necessary for the understanding of spiritual realities and, on a practical level, for right government and the avoidance of life's pitfalls.

* **Associated Articles:** 8227: discernment, nature of (ID: `8227@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8228: discernment, examples of (ID: `8228@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8227: discernment, nature of (id: 8227)

Discernment is given by God, through his Holy Spirit. It is received through God's word and through the insight of a renewed mind. Discerning believers seek to grow in their understanding and knowledge of God's truth.

Discernment as sound judgment
-----------------------------

### Judging the right course

**[PRO 15:21](https://ref.ly/Prov15:21)**; **[PHP 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9-Phil1:10)** *See also* [PRO 3:21–3:23](https://ref.ly/Prov3:21-Prov3:23), [PRO 8:8–8:9](https://ref.ly/Prov8:8-Prov8:9), [PRO 10:21](https://ref.ly/Prov10:21), [PRO 11:12](https://ref.ly/Prov11:12), [PRO 18:1](https://ref.ly/Prov18:1), [PRO 24:30](https://ref.ly/Prov24:30); [HOS 14:9](https://ref.ly/Hos14:9)

### Distinguishing good from evil

**[2SA 14:17](https://ref.ly/2Sam14:17)** *See also* [GEN 3:22](https://ref.ly/Gen3:22); [JOB 6:30](https://ref.ly/Job6:30), [JOB 34:3–34:4](https://ref.ly/Job34:3-Job34:4); [ISA 7:15](https://ref.ly/Isa7:15)

### Distinguishing holy from common

[LEV 10:10](https://ref.ly/Lev10:10), [LEV 11:47](https://ref.ly/Lev11:47); ; [EZK 22:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:26), [EZK 44:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek44:23)

### Seeing through outward appearances

**[PRO 28:11](https://ref.ly/Prov28:11)** *See also* [1SA 16:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:7); [ISA 11:3](https://ref.ly/Isa11:3)

### Understanding the significance of events

**[DEU 32:29–32:30](https://ref.ly/Deut32:29-Deut32:30)** *See also* [1CH 12:32](https://ref.ly/1Chr12:32); [EST 1:13](https://ref.ly/Esth1:13); [MAT 24:32–24:33](https://ref.ly/Matt24:32-Matt24:33) parallel [MRK 13:28–13:29](https://ref.ly/Mark13:28-Mark13:29); [LUK 12:54–12:56](https://ref.ly/Luke12:54-Luke12:56)

### Exercising judgment to rule

**[1KI 3:9](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:9)** *See also* [PRO 8:14–8:16](https://ref.ly/Prov8:14-Prov8:16), [PRO 28:2](https://ref.ly/Prov28:2), [PRO 28:16](https://ref.ly/Prov28:16); [JER 23:5](https://ref.ly/Jer23:5)

Discernment as insight into spiritual realities
-----------------------------------------------

### Distinguishing between spirits

**[1CO 12:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:10)** *See also* [1KI 22:19–22:23](https://ref.ly/1Kgs22:19-1Kgs22:23) parallel [2CH 18:18–18:22](https://ref.ly/2Chr18:18-2Chr18:22); [1TI 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1); [1JN 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/1John4:1-1John4:3)

### Discerning true and false prophecy

[DEU 13:1–13:3](https://ref.ly/Deut13:1-Deut13:3), [DEU 18:21–18:22](https://ref.ly/Deut18:21-Deut18:22); ; [1CO 14:29](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:29)

Characteristics of discerning people
------------------------------------

### The discerning grow in wisdom

**[PRO 1:5](https://ref.ly/Prov1:5)** *See also* [PRO 9:9](https://ref.ly/Prov9:9), [PRO 10:14](https://ref.ly/Prov10:14), [PRO 14:6](https://ref.ly/Prov14:6), [PRO 15:14](https://ref.ly/Prov15:14), [PRO 17:24](https://ref.ly/Prov17:24), [PRO 18:15](https://ref.ly/Prov18:15)

### The discerning accept rebuke

[PRO 17:10](https://ref.ly/Prov17:10), [PRO 19:25](https://ref.ly/Prov19:25)

### The discerning keep God's law

[1CH 22:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:12); ; [PSA 119:34](https://ref.ly/Ps119:34); ; [PRO 28:7](https://ref.ly/Prov28:7)

The source of discernment
-------------------------

### Discernment is given by God

**[DAN 2:21](https://ref.ly/Dan2:21)** *See also* [PRO 9:10](https://ref.ly/Prov9:10); [DAN 2:27–2:28](https://ref.ly/Dan2:27-Dan2:28); [1CO 2:12–2:15](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:12-1Cor2:15)

### Discernment through God's word

**[HEB 5:14](https://ref.ly/Heb5:14)** *See also* [PSA 19:7](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7), [PSA 119:98–119:100](https://ref.ly/Ps119:98-Ps119:100), [PSA 119:130](https://ref.ly/Ps119:130); [ROM 2:18](https://ref.ly/Rom2:18)

### Discernment through a renewed mind

**[ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2)** *See also* [JER 31:33](https://ref.ly/Jer31:33); [1CO 2:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:16)

### Asking for discernment

**[PSA 119:66](https://ref.ly/Ps119:66)** *See also* [PSA 119:27](https://ref.ly/Ps119:27), [PSA 119:125](https://ref.ly/Ps119:125); [JAS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5)

## 8228: discernment, examples of (id: 8228)

Perfect discernment is displayed by God and Jesus Christ. Evil spirits also have discernment, about the person and work of Christ. Discernment has been evident in the rulers and spiritual leaders of God's people, but Israel, like children and the foolish who lack judgment, failed to discern God's purpose and truth.

God's discernment
-----------------

**[PSA 139:1–139:4](https://ref.ly/Ps139:1-Ps139:4)** *See also* [JOB 31:4](https://ref.ly/Job31:4), [JOB 34:21](https://ref.ly/Job34:21); [HEB 4:13](https://ref.ly/Heb4:13); [1JN 3:20](https://ref.ly/1John3:20); [PSA 19:12](https://ref.ly/Ps19:12) *God alone knows our hidden faults.*

Jesus Christ's discernment
--------------------------

**[JHN 2:25](https://ref.ly/John2:25)** *See also* [MAT 9:4](https://ref.ly/Matt9:4) parallels [MRK 2:8](https://ref.ly/Mark2:8), [LUK 5:22](https://ref.ly/Luke5:22) *Jesus Christ discerns the thoughts of the teachers of the law*; [MAT 16:23](https://ref.ly/Matt16:23) parallel [MRK 8:33](https://ref.ly/Mark8:33) *Jesus Christ discerns the source of Peter's words*; [MAT 22:18](https://ref.ly/Matt22:18) parallels [MRK 12:15](https://ref.ly/Mark12:15), [LUK 20:23](https://ref.ly/Luke20:23) *Jesus Christ discerns the true motive of his questioners*; [JHN 1:47](https://ref.ly/John1:47) *Jesus Christ sees into the heart of Nathaniel*; [JHN 8:16](https://ref.ly/John8:16) *Jesus Christ has perfect discernment of right and wrong.*

Evil spirits' discernment
-------------------------

**[MRK 1:23–1:24](https://ref.ly/Mark1:23-Mark1:24)** parallel [LUK 4:33–4:34](https://ref.ly/Luke4:33-Luke4:34) *See also* [MRK 1:34](https://ref.ly/Mark1:34) parallel [LUK 4:41](https://ref.ly/Luke4:41); [ACT 16:17](https://ref.ly/Acts16:17)

Discernment in those who govern
-------------------------------

Joseph: [GEN 41:39](https://ref.ly/Gen41:39); ; [ACT 7:10](https://ref.ly/Acts7:10); [1KI 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:12); ; [2CH 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr2:12); [JOB 12:20](https://ref.ly/Job12:20) *elders*

Examples of spiritual discernment
---------------------------------

**[2KI 4:9](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:9)** *See also* [JHN 4:19](https://ref.ly/John4:19), [JHN 4:42](https://ref.ly/John4:42)**[1KI 22:19–22:23](https://ref.ly/1Kgs22:19-1Kgs22:23)** parallel [2CH 18:18–18:22](https://ref.ly/2Chr18:18-2Chr18:22) *Micaiah discerns that a lying spirit is responsible for false prophecy.* *See also* [JER 23:16–23:22](https://ref.ly/Jer23:16-Jer23:22) *Jeremiah knows that the false prophets' message is not from God*; [ACT 5:3](https://ref.ly/Acts5:3) *Peter is aware of the deception of Ananias and Sapphira*; [ACT 8:23](https://ref.ly/Acts8:23) *Peter discerns the true condition of Simon's heart*; [ACT 16:18](https://ref.ly/Acts16:18) *Paul discerns the spiritual source of a girl's fortune\-telling ability.*

Futher examples of discernment
------------------------------

[2SA 14:18–14:20](https://ref.ly/2Sam14:18-2Sam14:20) *David sees through Joab's ruse*; ; [1KI 3:24–3:28](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:24-1Kgs3:28) *Solomon discerns a child's true mother*; ; [NEH 6:12–6:13](https://ref.ly/Neh6:12-Neh6:13) *Nehemiah sees through the plot against him.*

Lack of discernment
-------------------

### Young children lack discernment

**[DEU 1:39](https://ref.ly/Deut1:39)** *See also* [ISA 7:15–7:16](https://ref.ly/Isa7:15-Isa7:16); [JON 4:11](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:11)

### Israel's lack of discernment

**[DEU 32:28](https://ref.ly/Deut32:28)**; **[LUK 12:54–12:56](https://ref.ly/Luke12:54-Luke12:56)** *See also* [ISA 1:3](https://ref.ly/Isa1:3), [ISA 5:13](https://ref.ly/Isa5:13), [ISA 44:18–44:19](https://ref.ly/Isa44:18-Isa44:19); [EZK 12:2](https://ref.ly/Ezek12:2); [ACT 28:27](https://ref.ly/Acts28:27); [ISA 6:9–6:10](https://ref.ly/Isa6:9-Isa6:10)

### Those who lack judgment

**[PRO 6:32](https://ref.ly/Prov6:32), [PRO 10:21](https://ref.ly/Prov10:21)** *See also* [PRO 7:7](https://ref.ly/Prov7:7), [PRO 9:4](https://ref.ly/Prov9:4), [PRO 12:11](https://ref.ly/Prov12:11), [PRO 18:1](https://ref.ly/Prov18:1), [PRO 24:30](https://ref.ly/Prov24:30)

### Other examples of lack of discernment

[PSA 82:5](https://ref.ly/Ps82:5) *the “gods” in the heavenly assembly*; ; [MIC 4:12](https://ref.ly/Mic4:12) *the nations who fail to discern God's plan*

## 8230: discipline (id: 8230)

Loving and corrective training that leads to maturity and responsibility on the part of those who experience it.

* **Associated Articles:** 8231: discipline, divine (ID: `8231@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8232: discipline, in the family (ID: `8232@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8231: discipline, divine (id: 8231)

God disciplines his people through his word, through their experiences and through punishment, so that they may live in ways pleasing to him.

The nature of God's discipline
------------------------------

### It is a sign of God's love

**[HEB 12:6](https://ref.ly/Heb12:6)** *See also* [PRO 3:12](https://ref.ly/Prov3:12); [PSA 119:75](https://ref.ly/Ps119:75); [REV 3:19](https://ref.ly/Rev3:19)

### It is a sign of belonging to God's family

**[HEB 12:6](https://ref.ly/Heb12:6)** *See also* [PRO 3:12](https://ref.ly/Prov3:12); [DEU 8:5](https://ref.ly/Deut8:5); [2SA 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:14); [HEB 12:7](https://ref.ly/Heb12:7)

### It trains God's people

**[HEB 12:11](https://ref.ly/Heb12:11)**

The means of God's discipline
-----------------------------

### The use of Scripture

**[2TI 3:16](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16)** *See also* [DEU 4:36](https://ref.ly/Deut4:36), [DEU 29:29](https://ref.ly/Deut29:29); [ISA 8:11](https://ref.ly/Isa8:11)

### The knowledge of God's grace

**[TIT 2:11–2:12](https://ref.ly/Titus2:11-Titus2:12)**

### Instructive experiences

*See also* [DEU 8:1–8:5](https://ref.ly/Deut8:1-Deut8:5), [DEU 11:2–11:7](https://ref.ly/Deut11:2-Deut11:7); [PSA 90:12](https://ref.ly/Ps90:12); [ISA 48:17](https://ref.ly/Isa48:17)

### Painful experiences

**[HEB 12:7](https://ref.ly/Heb12:7)** *See also* [2CO 12:7–12:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:7-2Cor12:10); [HEB 12:5](https://ref.ly/Heb12:5), [HEB 12:11](https://ref.ly/Heb12:11); [1PE 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:6-1Pet1:7)

### Punishment

**[HEB 12:6](https://ref.ly/Heb12:6)** *See also* [PRO 3:12](https://ref.ly/Prov3:12); [LEV 26:18](https://ref.ly/Lev26:18), [LEV 26:21](https://ref.ly/Lev26:21), [LEV 26:23–26:24](https://ref.ly/Lev26:23-Lev26:24), [LEV 26:27–26:28](https://ref.ly/Lev26:27-Lev26:28); [2SA 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:14); [PSA 73:14](https://ref.ly/Ps73:14); [JER 32:19](https://ref.ly/Jer32:19); [HOS 5:2](https://ref.ly/Hos5:2), [HOS 7:15–7:16](https://ref.ly/Hos7:15-Hos7:16); [1CO 11:32](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:32)

God disciplines all and only his children
-----------------------------------------

**[HEB 12:8](https://ref.ly/Heb12:8)** *See also* [HEB 12:6](https://ref.ly/Heb12:6)

The goals of God's discipline
-----------------------------

### Respectful submission to God

**[HEB 12:9](https://ref.ly/Heb12:9)**

### The good of God's people

**[HEB 12:10](https://ref.ly/Heb12:10)** *See also* [JOB 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/Job5:17-Job5:18); [PSA 94:12](https://ref.ly/Ps94:12), [PSA 119:67](https://ref.ly/Ps119:67), [PSA 119:71](https://ref.ly/Ps119:71), [PSA 119:75](https://ref.ly/Ps119:75)

### Spiritual growth

**[HEB 12:11](https://ref.ly/Heb12:11)** *See also* [PRO 1:2–1:3](https://ref.ly/Prov1:2-Prov1:3)

### Preparation for heaven

**[2CO 4:17–4:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:17-2Cor4:18)** *See also* [ROM 8:18](https://ref.ly/Rom8:18); [JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12)

Believers should not despise God's discipline
---------------------------------------------

**[JOB 5:17](https://ref.ly/Job5:17)** *See also* [HEB 12:5](https://ref.ly/Heb12:5); [PRO 3:11](https://ref.ly/Prov3:11)

Divine discipline in the church
-------------------------------

### By reproof

[2CO 7:8](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:8), [2CO 13:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:2); ; [2TH 3:15](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:15)

### For the benefit of sinners

### As a warning to others

[1TI 5:20](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:20)

### To be exercised with kindness

[2CO 2:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:6); ; [GAL 6:1](https://ref.ly/Gal6:1)

### The role of witnesses

[MAT 18:16](https://ref.ly/Matt18:16); ; [1TI 5:19](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:19)

## 8232: discipline, in the family (id: 8232)

Parents' loving, corrective training of their children, by verbal instruction and punishments, so that they grow up in the way God wants.

Parents are to discipline their children
----------------------------------------

**[HEB 12:7](https://ref.ly/Heb12:7)** *See also* [DEU 8:5](https://ref.ly/Deut8:5); [HEB 12:9–12:11](https://ref.ly/Heb12:9-Heb12:11)

Parents discipline out of love for their children
-------------------------------------------------

**[PRO 13:24](https://ref.ly/Prov13:24)** *See also* [PRO 3:12](https://ref.ly/Prov3:12)

The means of parental discipline
--------------------------------

### Training

**[PRO 22:6](https://ref.ly/Prov22:6)** *See also* [GEN 18:19](https://ref.ly/Gen18:19); [DEU 6:7](https://ref.ly/Deut6:7); [PRO 29:17](https://ref.ly/Prov29:17); [EPH 6:4](https://ref.ly/Eph6:4); [COL 3:21](https://ref.ly/Col3:21)

### Correction

**[PRO 22:15](https://ref.ly/Prov22:15)** *See also* [PRO 19:18](https://ref.ly/Prov19:18), [PRO 23:13–23:14](https://ref.ly/Prov23:13-Prov23:14), [PRO 29:15](https://ref.ly/Prov29:15)

### Verbal instruction

**[EPH 6:4](https://ref.ly/Eph6:4)** *See also* [DEU 4:9](https://ref.ly/Deut4:9), [DEU 6:7](https://ref.ly/Deut6:7), [DEU 6:20–6:25](https://ref.ly/Deut6:20-Deut6:25), [DEU 11:19](https://ref.ly/Deut11:19), [DEU 31:13](https://ref.ly/Deut31:13); [PSA 78:5](https://ref.ly/Ps78:5); [PRO 1:8](https://ref.ly/Prov1:8), [PRO 6:20](https://ref.ly/Prov6:20); [2TI 3:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:15)

### Punishment

**[PRO 23:13–23:14](https://ref.ly/Prov23:13-Prov23:14)** *See also* [PRO 22:15](https://ref.ly/Prov22:15), [PRO 29:15](https://ref.ly/Prov29:15)

The purpose of parental discipline is to impart wisdom
------------------------------------------------------

**[PRO 29:15](https://ref.ly/Prov29:15)** *See also* [PRO 19:18](https://ref.ly/Prov19:18), [PRO 22:15](https://ref.ly/Prov22:15), [PRO 29:17](https://ref.ly/Prov29:17); [HEB 12:9](https://ref.ly/Heb12:9), [HEB 12:11](https://ref.ly/Heb12:11)

## 8234: doctrine (id: 8234)

The body of teachings of the Christian faith concerning its central beliefs. Doctrine is grounded in Scripture and aims to maintain the integrity of Christianity by distinguishing it from non\-Christian beliefs. Doctrine is of central importance in Christian preaching and teaching in that it equips the people of God for effective and faithful service in his world.

* **Associated Articles:** 8235: doctrine, nature of (ID: `8235@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8236: doctrine, purpose of (ID: `8236@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8237: doctrine, false (ID: `8237@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8235: doctrine, nature of (id: 8235)

The teachings of Scripture, especially as expressed as a formulation and summary of revealed truth.

Doctrine communicated
---------------------

### In the OT

**[EZR 7:10](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:10)** *See also* [DEU 33:10](https://ref.ly/Deut33:10); [PSA 78:1–78:4](https://ref.ly/Ps78:1-Ps78:4), [PSA 119:33–119:36](https://ref.ly/Ps119:33-Ps119:36); [PRO 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/Prov4:1-Prov4:2); [MAL 2:6](https://ref.ly/Mal2:6)

### In the ministry of Jesus Christ

**[MAT 4:23](https://ref.ly/Matt4:23)** *See also* [MAT 9:35](https://ref.ly/Matt9:35); [MRK 6:6](https://ref.ly/Mark6:6), [MRK 6:34](https://ref.ly/Mark6:34); [LUK 6:6](https://ref.ly/Luke6:6), [LUK 13:10](https://ref.ly/Luke13:10), [LUK 13:22](https://ref.ly/Luke13:22), [LUK 19:47](https://ref.ly/Luke19:47), [LUK 20:1](https://ref.ly/Luke20:1), [LUK 21:37](https://ref.ly/Luke21:37); [JHN 6:59](https://ref.ly/John6:59)MAT [7:28–7:29](https://ref.ly/John7:28-John7:29), [MAT 13:54](https://ref.ly/Matt13:54), [MAT 22:23–22:33](https://ref.ly/Matt22:23-Matt22:33); [MRK 1:21–1:22](https://ref.ly/Mark1:21-Mark1:22) parallel [LUK 4:31–4:32](https://ref.ly/Luke4:31-Luke4:32)

### In the ministry of the apostles

**[ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42)** *See also* [ACT 4:2](https://ref.ly/Acts4:2), [ACT 5:42](https://ref.ly/Acts5:42), [ACT 18:11](https://ref.ly/Acts18:11)**[2TI 1:13](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:13)** *See also* [1CO 15:3–15:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:3-1Cor15:5); [PHP 2:5–2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5-Phil2:11); [1TI 3:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:16); [TIT 2:1–2:10](https://ref.ly/Titus2:1-Titus2:10); [HEB 5:11–6:2](https://ref.ly/Heb5:11-Heb6:2)

### In the church

**[EPH 4:11](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11)** *See also* [ACT 13:1](https://ref.ly/Acts13:1); [ROM 12:7](https://ref.ly/Rom12:7); [1CO 12:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:28), [1CO 14:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:26); [1TI 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17); [JAS 3:1](https://ref.ly/Jas3:1)

True doctrine is from God
-------------------------

## 8236: doctrine, purpose of (id: 8236)

Sound doctrine is intended to shape and mould the people of God for life and service in the world.

The purpose of doctrine for the individual
------------------------------------------

### It leads to repentance

**[2TI 2:25](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:25)**

### It leads to salvation

**[1TI 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:16)** *See also* [JHN 20:31](https://ref.ly/John20:31); [1CO 1:21–1:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:21-1Cor1:24); [2TI 3:14–3:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:14-2Tim3:15)

### It is necessary for Christian maturity and effective service

**[2TI 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16-2Tim3:17)** *See also* [PSA 19:7–19:8](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7-Ps19:8); [ACT 2:42–2:43](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42-Acts2:43); [EPH 4:11–4:14](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11-Eph4:14); [HEB 5:13–5:14](https://ref.ly/Heb5:13-Heb5:14)

### It makes possible a defence of the faith

**[1PE 3:15–3:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15-1Pet3:16)** *See also* [COL 2:2–2:4](https://ref.ly/Col2:2-Col2:4); [JUD 1:3](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3)

### It leads to enrichment and blessing

**[DEU 32:1–32:4](https://ref.ly/Deut32:1-Deut32:4)** *See also* [PSA 19:7–19:11](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7-Ps19:11), [PSA 119:97–119:104](https://ref.ly/Ps119:97-Ps119:104); [ISA 55:10–55:13](https://ref.ly/Isa55:10-Isa55:13); [EZK 3:1–3:3](https://ref.ly/Ezek3:1-Ezek3:3)

### It leads to perfection

**[COL 1:28](https://ref.ly/Col1:28)**

Doctrine as the basis of faithful ministry in the church
--------------------------------------------------------

**[TIT 1:9](https://ref.ly/Titus1:9)** *See also* [1TI 4:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:6), [1TI 4:13–4:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:13-1Tim4:16); [2TI 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:13-2Tim1:14), [2TI 2:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:2); [TIT 2:1](https://ref.ly/Titus2:1)

* **Associated Passages:** 2 Timothy 2:25; 1 Timothy 4:16; John 20:31; 1 Corinthians 1:21-24; 2 Timothy 3:14-15; 2 Timothy 3:16-17; Psalms 19:7-8; Acts 2:42-43; Ephesians 4:11-14; Hebrews 5:13-14; 1 Peter 3:15-16; Colossians 2:2-4; Jude 1:3; Deuteronomy 32:1-4; Psalms 19:7-11; Psalms 119:97-104; Isaiah 55:10-13; Ezekiel 3:1-3; Colossians 1:28; Titus 1:9; 1 Timothy 4:6; 1 Timothy 4:13-16; 2 Timothy 1:13-14; 2 Timothy 2:2; Titus 2:1

## 8237: doctrine, false (id: 8237)

Teaching that distorts or contradicts the revealed truth of God, causing division and distress in the church by leading people away from the truth.

False doctrine deviates from the truth
--------------------------------------

### It contradicts the gospel of Jesus Christ

**[JUD 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3-Jude1:4)** *See also* [1CO 3:10–3:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:10-1Cor3:13); [2CO 11:3–11:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:3-2Cor11:4); [GAL 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/Gal1:6-Gal1:7); [1TI 6:3–6:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:3-1Tim6:4); [2JN 1:7](https://ref.ly/2John1:7)

### It may be of human origin

**[COL 2:8](https://ref.ly/Col2:8)** *See also* [COL 2:20–2:23](https://ref.ly/Col2:20-Col2:23); [MAT 15:8–15:9](https://ref.ly/Matt15:8-Matt15:9) parallel [MRK 7:6–7:7](https://ref.ly/Mark7:6-Mark7:7); [ISA 29:13](https://ref.ly/Isa29:13)

It may be of demonic origin
---------------------------

**[1TI 4:1–4:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1-1Tim4:5)** *See also* [1JN 4:2–4:3](https://ref.ly/1John4:2-1John4:3)

The dangers of false doctrine
-----------------------------

### It leads to instability and confusion

**[EPH 4:14](https://ref.ly/Eph4:14)** *See also* [ACT 15:24](https://ref.ly/Acts15:24); [GAL 1:7](https://ref.ly/Gal1:7); [1TI 1:18–1:20](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:18-1Tim1:20); [2TI 2:16–2:18](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:16-2Tim2:18); [TIT 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/Titus1:10-Titus1:11); [HEB 13:9](https://ref.ly/Heb13:9); [2PE 3:17](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:17)

### It causes division

**[ROM 16:17–16:18](https://ref.ly/Rom16:17-Rom16:18)** *See also* [1TI 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:3-1Tim1:4)

### It leads to severe punishment

**[GAL 1:8–1:9](https://ref.ly/Gal1:8-Gal1:9)** *See also* [2CO 11:13–11:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:13-2Cor11:15); [2PE 2:1](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:1), [2PE 2:17](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:17); [REV 2:14–2:16](https://ref.ly/Rev2:14-Rev2:16)

False doctrine is to be dealt with by the church
------------------------------------------------

**[TIT 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/Titus1:10-Titus1:11)** *See also* [1TI 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:3); [TIT 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Titus1:13-Titus1:14)

False doctrine will be common in later times
--------------------------------------------

**[1TI 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1)** *See also* [MRK 13:5–13:6](https://ref.ly/Mark13:5-Mark13:6) parallel [LUK 21:8](https://ref.ly/Luke21:8); [2TH 2:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:3); [2TI 4:3–4:4](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:3-2Tim4:4)

* **Associated Passages:** Jude 1:3-4; 1 Corinthians 3:10-13; 2 Corinthians 11:3-4; Galatians 1:6-7; 1 Timothy 6:3-4; 2 John 1:7; Colossians 2:8; Colossians 2:20-23; Matthew 15:8-9; Mark 7:6-7; Isaiah 29:13; 1 Timothy 4:1-5; 1 John 4:2-3; Ephesians 4:14; Acts 15:24; Galatians 1:7; 1 Timothy 1:18-20; 2 Timothy 2:16-18; Titus 1:10-11; Hebrews 13:9; 2 Peter 3:17; Romans 16:17-18; 1 Timothy 1:3-4; Galatians 1:8-9; 2 Corinthians 11:13-15; 2 Peter 2:1; 2 Peter 2:17; Revelation 2:14-16; 1 Timothy 1:3; Titus 1:13-14; 1 Timothy 4:1; Mark 13:5-6; Luke 21:8; 2 Thessalonians 2:3; 2 Timothy 4:3-4

## 8239: earnestness (id: 8239)

An attitude characterised by seriousness and commitment. Scripture commends earnestness in believers' attitudes towards God and in the concerns of the gospel.

The significance of earnestness
-------------------------------

### In repentance

**[JOL 2:12](https://ref.ly/Joel2:12)** *See also* [1SA 7:2–7:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:2-1Sam7:3); [REV 3:19](https://ref.ly/Rev3:19)

### In seeking God

**[JER 29:13](https://ref.ly/Jer29:13)** *See also* [PSA 119:2](https://ref.ly/Ps119:2); [HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)

### In salvation

**[LUK 13:24](https://ref.ly/Luke13:24)** *See also* [MAT 7:24–7:27](https://ref.ly/Matt7:24-Matt7:27) parallel [LUK 6:47–6:49](https://ref.ly/Luke6:47-Luke6:49); [HEB 2:3](https://ref.ly/Heb2:3), [HEB 6:11](https://ref.ly/Heb6:11); [JAS 1:22](https://ref.ly/Jas1:22), [JAS 2:14](https://ref.ly/Jas2:14)

### In love for God

**[DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5)** *See also* [MAT 22:37](https://ref.ly/Matt22:37) parallels [MRK 12:30](https://ref.ly/Mark12:30), [LUK 10:27](https://ref.ly/Luke10:27)

### In prayer

**[2CH 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:14)** *See also* [ISA 62:6–62:7](https://ref.ly/Isa62:6-Isa62:7); [MAT 6:5–6:6](https://ref.ly/Matt6:5-Matt6:6)

### In trusting God

**[PRO 3:5](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5)** *See also* [ISA 26:3–26:4](https://ref.ly/Isa26:3-Isa26:4)

### In spiritual progress

**[PHP 2:12–2:13](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12-Phil2:13)** *See also* [1CO 9:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:24); [HEB 12:1](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1); [2PE 1:5–1:11](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:11)

### In serving God

**[MAT 6:24](https://ref.ly/Matt6:24)** parallel [LUK 16:13](https://ref.ly/Luke16:13) *See also* [DEU 18:6–18:7](https://ref.ly/Deut18:6-Deut18:7); [LUK 9:57–9:62](https://ref.ly/Luke9:57-Luke9:62); [1CO 12:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:31), [1CO 14:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:1); [2TI 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:15)

Examples of earnestness
-----------------------

### In seeking God

**[PSA 63:1](https://ref.ly/Ps63:1)** *See also* [2CH 15:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:15); [HOS 5:15](https://ref.ly/Hos5:15)

### In prayer

**[ACT 12:5](https://ref.ly/Acts12:5)** *See also* [1TH 3:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:10); [JAS 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/Jas5:17-Jas5:18)

### In evangelism

**[1CO 9:19–9:22](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:19-1Cor9:22)** *See also* [1TH 2:2–2:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:2-1Thess2:9)

### In Christian living

**[PHP 3:13–3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:13-Phil3:14)** *See also* [1CO 9:25–9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:25-1Cor9:27); [2CO 8:7–8:8](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:7-2Cor8:8)

### Regarding personal needs

[MAT 9:18](https://ref.ly/Matt9:18) parallels [MRK 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Mark5:22-Mark5:23), [LUK 8:41–8:42](https://ref.ly/Luke8:41-Luke8:42); ; [LUK 7:4](https://ref.ly/Luke7:4)

### Jesus Christ's own earnestness

**[MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39)** parallels [MRK 14:35](https://ref.ly/Mark14:35), [LUK 22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42) *See also* [JHN 2:17](https://ref.ly/John2:17), [JHN 4:34](https://ref.ly/John4:34)

Earnest concern for the people of God
-------------------------------------

### For Israel

**[LUK 19:41](https://ref.ly/Luke19:41)**; **[ROM 9:1–9:3](https://ref.ly/Rom9:1-Rom9:3)** *See also* [NEH 1:2–1:4](https://ref.ly/Neh1:2-Neh1:4); [ISA 22:4](https://ref.ly/Isa22:4), [ISA 62:1](https://ref.ly/Isa62:1); [JER 4:19–4:21](https://ref.ly/Jer4:19-Jer4:21), [JER 8:21](https://ref.ly/Jer8:21), [JER 9:1](https://ref.ly/Jer9:1), [JER 13:17](https://ref.ly/Jer13:17); [LAM 3:48](https://ref.ly/Lam3:48); [MIC 1:8–1:9](https://ref.ly/Mic1:8-Mic1:9); [MAT 23:37](https://ref.ly/Matt23:37) parallel [LUK 13:34](https://ref.ly/Luke13:34); [ROM 10:1](https://ref.ly/Rom10:1)

### For the church

**[2CO 11:28–11:29](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:28-2Cor11:29)** *See also* [ACT 20:31](https://ref.ly/Acts20:31); [ROM 1:11](https://ref.ly/Rom1:11); [2CO 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:4), [2CO 11:2–11:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:2-2Cor11:3); [GAL 4:19–4:20](https://ref.ly/Gal4:19-Gal4:20); [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24), [COL 1:28–1:29](https://ref.ly/Col1:28-Col1:29), [COL 2:1](https://ref.ly/Col2:1); [1TH 2:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:17)

Earnestness may be misdirected
------------------------------

**[ROM 11:7](https://ref.ly/Rom11:7)** *See also* [ACT 26:7](https://ref.ly/Acts26:7)

## 8240: ethics (id: 8240)

Principles, both theoretical and practical, for righteous living in the sight of God. Scripture provides detailed guidance concerning the conduct of believers, as well as examples of individuals whose lives illustrate positive and negative aspects of behaviour.

* **Associated Articles:** 8241: ethics, basis of (ID: `8241@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8242: ethics, personal (ID: `8242@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8243: ethics, social (ID: `8243@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8244: ethics, and grace (ID: `8244@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8245: ethics, incentives towards (ID: `8245@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8241: ethics, basis of (id: 8241)

The ultimate foundation of ethics is the character and will of God, which is made known supremely through Jesus Christ and in Scripture.

The foundation of ethics is the revealed righteousness of God
-------------------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 1:18–1:20](https://ref.ly/Rom1:18-Rom1:20)** *See also* [PSA 97:6](https://ref.ly/Ps97:6); [ROM 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Rom2:14-Rom2:15)

The basis of ethics revealed in Scripture
-----------------------------------------

### All Scripture

**[2TI 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16-2Tim3:17)**

### The word of God

**[LUK 11:28](https://ref.ly/Luke11:28)**; **[JAS 1:22](https://ref.ly/Jas1:22)** *See also* [PSA 103:20](https://ref.ly/Ps103:20), [PSA 119:17](https://ref.ly/Ps119:17); [JHN 17:6](https://ref.ly/John17:6); [REV 3:8](https://ref.ly/Rev3:8)

### The commandments of God

[DEU 11:26–11:28](https://ref.ly/Deut11:26-Deut11:28); ; [JDG 2:17](https://ref.ly/Judg2:17); ; [2CH 34:29–34:31](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:29-2Chr34:31)

### The will of God

**[MRK 3:35](https://ref.ly/Mark3:35)** *See also* [PSA 143:10](https://ref.ly/Ps143:10); [COL 4:12](https://ref.ly/Col4:12)

### The commandments of Jesus Christ

**[JHN 15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:10)** *See also* [JHN 13:34](https://ref.ly/John13:34), [JHN 14:15](https://ref.ly/John14:15), [JHN 15:12–15:17](https://ref.ly/John15:12-John15:17); [1CO 14:37](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:37)

### The example of Jesus Christ

**[JHN 13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:15)** *See also* [ROM 15:2–15:3](https://ref.ly/Rom15:2-Rom15:3), [ROM 15:7](https://ref.ly/Rom15:7); [2CO 8:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:9); [EPH 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1-Eph5:2), [EPH 5:25](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25); [PHP 2:5](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5); [COL 3:13](https://ref.ly/Col3:13); [1PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21)

### The ethical teaching of Jesus Christ

In the Sermon on the Mount: [MAT 5:22](https://ref.ly/Matt5:22), [MAT 5:28](https://ref.ly/Matt5:28), [MAT 5:32](https://ref.ly/Matt5:32), [MAT 5:34](https://ref.ly/Matt5:34), [MAT 5:39](https://ref.ly/Matt5:39), [MAT 5:44](https://ref.ly/Matt5:44), [MAT 7:29](https://ref.ly/Matt7:29); [JHN 1:9](https://ref.ly/John1:9), [JHN 3:18–3:19](https://ref.ly/John3:18-John3:19), [JHN 5:19](https://ref.ly/John5:19), [JHN 12:48–12:49](https://ref.ly/John12:48-John12:49), [JHN 13:34](https://ref.ly/John13:34), [JHN 14:6](https://ref.ly/John14:6), [JHN 15:22](https://ref.ly/John15:22), [JHN 17:6](https://ref.ly/John17:6)

Areas of life in which ethical conduct is expected of believers
---------------------------------------------------------------

### In sexual behaviour

**[ROM 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Rom1:26-Rom1:27)** *See also* [LEV 18:22–18:23](https://ref.ly/Lev18:22-Lev18:23); [1CO 5:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:1)

### In government

**[ROM 13:1](https://ref.ly/Rom13:1)** *See also* [MAT 22:21](https://ref.ly/Matt22:21) parallels [MRK 12:17](https://ref.ly/Mark12:17), [LUK 20:25](https://ref.ly/Luke20:25); [JHN 19:11](https://ref.ly/John19:11); [ROM 13:2–13:5](https://ref.ly/Rom13:2-Rom13:5); [1PE 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13-1Pet2:14)

### In rewarding individuals

**[1CO 9:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:7)**

### In punishing individuals

**[GAL 6:7](https://ref.ly/Gal6:7)**

## 8242: ethics, personal (id: 8242)

Scripture teaches that individuals have a responsibility before God for their conduct.

Ethical principles in relationships generally
---------------------------------------------

**[MAT 7:12](https://ref.ly/Matt7:12), [MAT 22:39](https://ref.ly/Matt22:39)** parallel [MRK 12:31](https://ref.ly/Mark12:31) *See also* [EXO 20:13–20:17](https://ref.ly/Exod20:13-Exod20:17) parallel [DEU 5:17–5:21](https://ref.ly/Deut5:17-Deut5:21); [LEV 19:18](https://ref.ly/Lev19:18); [LUK 6:31](https://ref.ly/Luke6:31); [ROM 12:9–12:10](https://ref.ly/Rom12:9-Rom12:10); [GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10); [1TI 5:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:10); [1PE 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:8)

The importance of thoughts and motives
--------------------------------------

**[MAT 6:1–6:4](https://ref.ly/Matt6:1-Matt6:4)** *See also* [EXO 21:13–21:14](https://ref.ly/Exod21:13-Exod21:14); [MAT 5:22](https://ref.ly/Matt5:22), [MAT 5:28](https://ref.ly/Matt5:28); [PHP 4:8](https://ref.ly/Phil4:8); [JAS 1:15](https://ref.ly/Jas1:15)

Personal ethics in relation to God
----------------------------------

### Idolatry prohibited

**[EXO 20:4](https://ref.ly/Exod20:4)** parallel [DEU 5:8](https://ref.ly/Deut5:8) *See also* [LEV 26:1](https://ref.ly/Lev26:1); [JOS 24:14](https://ref.ly/Josh24:14); [ACT 14:15](https://ref.ly/Acts14:15); [1JN 5:21](https://ref.ly/1John5:21); [REV 22:9](https://ref.ly/Rev22:9)

### God's name to be honoured

**[EXO 20:7](https://ref.ly/Exod20:7)** parallel [DEU 5:11](https://ref.ly/Deut5:11) *See also* [LEV 19:12](https://ref.ly/Lev19:12); [DEU 28:58](https://ref.ly/Deut28:58); [MAT 5:34](https://ref.ly/Matt5:34), [MAT 6:9](https://ref.ly/Matt6:9) parallel [LUK 11:2](https://ref.ly/Luke11:2); [JAS 5:12](https://ref.ly/Jas5:12)

### Sabbath observance

**[EXO 20:8](https://ref.ly/Exod20:8)** parallel [DEU 5:12](https://ref.ly/Deut5:12) *See also* [EXO 31:15](https://ref.ly/Exod31:15), [EXO 34:21](https://ref.ly/Exod34:21); [LEV 26:2](https://ref.ly/Lev26:2); [NEH 10:31](https://ref.ly/Neh10:31); [ISA 56:2](https://ref.ly/Isa56:2)

### Obedience to God's commands

**[ACT 5:29](https://ref.ly/Acts5:29)** *See also* [DEU 26:16](https://ref.ly/Deut26:16); [MAT 7:21](https://ref.ly/Matt7:21)

Personal ethics and human relationships
---------------------------------------

### Wives and husbands

**[EPH 5:22](https://ref.ly/Eph5:22), [EPH 5:25](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25)** *See also* [GEN 2:24](https://ref.ly/Gen2:24); [DEU 24:5](https://ref.ly/Deut24:5); [MAT 19:6](https://ref.ly/Matt19:6) parallel [MRK 10:9](https://ref.ly/Mark10:9); [1CO 7:10–7:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:10-1Cor7:11); [COL 3:18–3:19](https://ref.ly/Col3:18-Col3:19); [1PE 3:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:1), [1PE 3:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:7)

### Children and parents

### The extended family

## 8243: ethics, social (id: 8243)

Scripture sees ethics as embracing the life of society as a whole, and not simply individual relationships.

The benefits of social ethics
-----------------------------

**[PRO 14:34](https://ref.ly/Prov14:34)** *See also* [2SA 23:3–23:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam23:3-2Sam23:4); [PSA 2:10–2:12](https://ref.ly/Ps2:10-Ps2:12); [PRO 11:11](https://ref.ly/Prov11:11), [PRO 16:12](https://ref.ly/Prov16:12), [PRO 25:5](https://ref.ly/Prov25:5), [PRO 28:2](https://ref.ly/Prov28:2), [PRO 29:4](https://ref.ly/Prov29:4); [ISA 54:14](https://ref.ly/Isa54:14)

Believers are to behave ethically in society
--------------------------------------------

### Praying for rulers

**[1TI 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1-1Tim2:2)** *See also* [EZR 6:10](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:10); [PSA 20:9](https://ref.ly/Ps20:9), [PSA 72:1](https://ref.ly/Ps72:1)

### Submitting to the authorities

**[ROM 13:1](https://ref.ly/Rom13:1)**; **[TIT 3:1](https://ref.ly/Titus3:1)**; **[1PE 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13-1Pet2:14)** *See also* [EXO 22:28](https://ref.ly/Exod22:28); [DEU 17:12](https://ref.ly/Deut17:12); [1SA 24:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam24:6); [1KI 21:10](https://ref.ly/1Kgs21:10); [PRO 24:21](https://ref.ly/Prov24:21); [ECC 8:2](https://ref.ly/Eccl8:2); [ACT 23:5](https://ref.ly/Acts23:5); [ROM 13:5](https://ref.ly/Rom13:5); [1PE 2:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:17)

### Paying taxes

**[MAT 22:21](https://ref.ly/Matt22:21)** parallels [MRK 12:17](https://ref.ly/Mark12:17), [LUK 20:25](https://ref.ly/Luke20:25) *See also* [LEV 27:30](https://ref.ly/Lev27:30); [DEU 14:28](https://ref.ly/Deut14:28); [NEH 10:32](https://ref.ly/Neh10:32); [MAT 17:27](https://ref.ly/Matt17:27); [ROM 13:6–13:7](https://ref.ly/Rom13:6-Rom13:7)

Specific areas of social concern
--------------------------------

### Promoting justice

**[DEU 16:19–16:20](https://ref.ly/Deut16:19-Deut16:20)**; **[MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8)** *See also* [EXO 23:8](https://ref.ly/Exod23:8); [LEV 19:15](https://ref.ly/Lev19:15); [DEU 27:19](https://ref.ly/Deut27:19); [PRO 21:3](https://ref.ly/Prov21:3); [ISA 1:17](https://ref.ly/Isa1:17), [ISA 10:1](https://ref.ly/Isa10:1), [ISA 56:1](https://ref.ly/Isa56:1); [1TI 5:21](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:21)

### Helping the poor

**[DEU 15:7–15:9](https://ref.ly/Deut15:7-Deut15:9)** *See also* [LEV 25:35](https://ref.ly/Lev25:35), [LEV 25:39](https://ref.ly/Lev25:39); [DEU 24:12](https://ref.ly/Deut24:12); [PRO 19:17](https://ref.ly/Prov19:17); [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21) parallels [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21), [LUK 18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22); [LUK 11:41](https://ref.ly/Luke11:41), [LUK 12:33](https://ref.ly/Luke12:33); [ROM 12:13](https://ref.ly/Rom12:13); [GAL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Gal2:10); [JAS 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/Jas2:3-Jas2:4)

### Feeding the hungry

**[DEU 26:12](https://ref.ly/Deut26:12)** *See also* [EXO 23:11](https://ref.ly/Exod23:11); [LEV 19:9–19:10](https://ref.ly/Lev19:9-Lev19:10), [LEV 23:22](https://ref.ly/Lev23:22); [ISA 58:10](https://ref.ly/Isa58:10); [MAT 15:32](https://ref.ly/Matt15:32) parallel [MRK 8:2–8:3](https://ref.ly/Mark8:2-Mark8:3); [LUK 3:11](https://ref.ly/Luke3:11); [ROM 12:20](https://ref.ly/Rom12:20); [PRO 25:21](https://ref.ly/Prov25:21)

### Protecting the vulnerable

**[PSA 82:3–82:4](https://ref.ly/Ps82:3-Ps82:4)**; **[JAS 1:27](https://ref.ly/Jas1:27)** *See also* [EXO 22:22](https://ref.ly/Exod22:22), [EXO 23:9](https://ref.ly/Exod23:9); [LEV 25:25](https://ref.ly/Lev25:25); [DEU 24:17](https://ref.ly/Deut24:17); [PSA 41:1](https://ref.ly/Ps41:1); [PRO 23:10](https://ref.ly/Prov23:10); [ISA 58:7](https://ref.ly/Isa58:7); [JER 22:3](https://ref.ly/Jer22:3), [JER 22:16](https://ref.ly/Jer22:16); [ACT 20:35](https://ref.ly/Acts20:35)

### Peacemaking

**[MAT 5:9](https://ref.ly/Matt5:9)** *See also* [PRO 12:20](https://ref.ly/Prov12:20); [ROM 12:18](https://ref.ly/Rom12:18), [ROM 14:19](https://ref.ly/Rom14:19); [HEB 12:14](https://ref.ly/Heb12:14); [JAS 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:17)

### Showing concern for the environment

**[GEN 2:15](https://ref.ly/Gen2:15)** *See also* [GEN 1:26–1:28](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:28); [LEV 25:2–25:5](https://ref.ly/Lev25:2-Lev25:5); [NEH 10:31](https://ref.ly/Neh10:31); [PSA 115:16](https://ref.ly/Ps115:16)

## 8244: ethics, and grace (id: 8244)

Ethical conduct on the part of believers rests upon both the grace of God and human obedience.

People are unable to fulfil the law of God without divine grace
---------------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 15:19](https://ref.ly/Matt15:19)** parallel [MRK 7:21–7:22](https://ref.ly/Mark7:21-Mark7:22)**[ROM 7:14–7:15](https://ref.ly/Rom7:14-Rom7:15)** *See also* [GEN 6:5](https://ref.ly/Gen6:5); [1KI 8:46](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:46); [PSA 51:5](https://ref.ly/Ps51:5), [PSA 64:6](https://ref.ly/Ps64:6); [ISA 53:6](https://ref.ly/Isa53:6); [ROM 1:21](https://ref.ly/Rom1:21), [ROM 3:23](https://ref.ly/Rom3:23); [GAL 3:22](https://ref.ly/Gal3:22); [1JN 1:8](https://ref.ly/1John1:8)

Ethical conduct also depends on human obedience
-----------------------------------------------

**[DEU 26:16](https://ref.ly/Deut26:16)**; **[PHP 2:12](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12)** *See also* [DEU 4:40](https://ref.ly/Deut4:40), [DEU 6:17](https://ref.ly/Deut6:17); [JOS 1:8](https://ref.ly/Josh1:8), [JOS 22:5](https://ref.ly/Josh22:5); [1KI 2:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:3), [1KI 11:38](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:38); [2KI 17:13](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:13); [JER 7:23](https://ref.ly/Jer7:23); [MAT 5:48](https://ref.ly/Matt5:48), [MAT 7:21](https://ref.ly/Matt7:21), [MAT 19:17](https://ref.ly/Matt19:17); [ROM 6:19](https://ref.ly/Rom6:19); [2CO 7:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:1); [1TI 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:11); [2PE 1:5–1:7](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:7), [2PE 3:14](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:14); [1JN 3:3](https://ref.ly/1John3:3)

God assists believers' ethical endeavours
-----------------------------------------

### He enlightens their minds

**[PSA 119:130](https://ref.ly/Ps119:130)** *See also* [DEU 4:1](https://ref.ly/Deut4:1); [PSA 119:144](https://ref.ly/Ps119:144); [PRO 6:23](https://ref.ly/Prov6:23); [MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8); [ROM 7:7](https://ref.ly/Rom7:7); [1CO 2:12–2:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:12-1Cor2:14)

### He gives them his Spirit

**[GAL 5:16](https://ref.ly/Gal5:16)** *See also* [EZK 36:27](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:27); [JHN 14:15–14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:15-John14:17); [ROM 8:3–8:5](https://ref.ly/Rom8:3-Rom8:5), [ROM 8:9](https://ref.ly/Rom8:9), [ROM 8:13](https://ref.ly/Rom8:13); [GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23); [2TH 2:13](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:13); [1PE 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:2)

### He gives them spiritual resources

**[2PE 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:3)** *See also* [1KI 8:58](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:58); [PSA 19:13](https://ref.ly/Ps19:13); [JHN 15:5](https://ref.ly/John15:5); [1CO 10:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:13); [EPH 6:11](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11), [EPH 6:13](https://ref.ly/Eph6:13); [PHP 2:13](https://ref.ly/Phil2:13); [2TI 1:7](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:7); [HEB 2:18](https://ref.ly/Heb2:18); [JAS 4:6](https://ref.ly/Jas4:6)

God will bring believers to ethical perfection
----------------------------------------------

### He will deliver them from the power of sin

**[ROM 7:24–7:25](https://ref.ly/Rom7:24-Rom7:25)** *See also* [1CO 1:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:8); [EPH 4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:24); [COL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:10); [PHP 1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:6); [1TH 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:13); [JUD 1:24](https://ref.ly/Jude1:24)

### He will make them like Jesus Christ

**[1JN 3:2](https://ref.ly/1John3:2)** *See also* [ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29); [2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18)

### He is preparing them for a righteous existence

**[2PE 3:13](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:13)** *See also* [MAT 13:41–13:43](https://ref.ly/Matt13:41-Matt13:43); [REV 21:8](https://ref.ly/Rev21:8), [REV 21:27](https://ref.ly/Rev21:27), [REV 22:15](https://ref.ly/Rev22:15)

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 15:19; Mark 7:21-22; Romans 7:14-15; Genesis 6:5; 1 Kings 8:46; Psalms 51:5; Psalms 64:6; Isaiah 53:6; Romans 1:21; Romans 3:23; Galatians 3:22; 1 John 1:8; Deuteronomy 26:16; Philippians 2:12; Deuteronomy 4:40; Deuteronomy 6:17; Joshua 1:8; Joshua 22:5; 1 Kings 2:3; 1 Kings 11:38; 2 Kings 17:13; Jeremiah 7:23; Matthew 5:48; Matthew 7:21; Matthew 19:17; Romans 6:19; 2 Corinthians 7:1; 1 Timothy 6:11; 2 Peter 1:5-7; 2 Peter 3:14; 1 John 3:3; Psalms 119:130; Deuteronomy 4:1; Psalms 119:144; Proverbs 6:23; Micah 6:8; Romans 7:7; 1 Corinthians 2:12-14; Galatians 5:16; Ezekiel 36:27; John 14:15-17; Romans 8:3-5; Romans 8:9; Romans 8:13; Galatians 5:22-23; 2 Thessalonians 2:13; 1 Peter 1:2; 2 Peter 1:3; 1 Kings 8:58; Psalms 19:13; John 15:5; 1 Corinthians 10:13; Ephesians 6:11; Ephesians 6:13; Philippians 2:13; 2 Timothy 1:7; Hebrews 2:18; James 4:6; Romans 7:24-25; 1 Corinthians 1:8; Ephesians 4:24; Colossians 3:10; Philippians 1:6; 1 Thessalonians 3:13; Jude 1:24; 1 John 3:2; Romans 8:29; 2 Corinthians 3:18; 2 Peter 3:13; Matthew 13:41-43; Revelation 21:8; Revelation 21:27; Revelation 22:15

## 8245: ethics, incentives towards (id: 8245)

God's ethical demands are reinforced by a variety of sanctions and incentives.

Sanctions promoting ethical behaviour
-------------------------------------

### The authorities

**[ROM 13:3–13:4](https://ref.ly/Rom13:3-Rom13:4)** *See also* [DEU 16:18](https://ref.ly/Deut16:18), [DEU 17:11–17:12](https://ref.ly/Deut17:11-Deut17:12), [DEU 25:1](https://ref.ly/Deut25:1); [PSA 82:3–82:4](https://ref.ly/Ps82:3-Ps82:4); [1TI 2:1–2:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1-1Tim2:4); [1PE 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13-1Pet2:14)

### God treats people as they treat others

**[MAT 6:14–6:15](https://ref.ly/Matt6:14-Matt6:15)** *See also* [2SA 12:9–12:10](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:9-2Sam12:10); [MAT 5:7](https://ref.ly/Matt5:7), [MAT 7:2](https://ref.ly/Matt7:2), [MAT 18:35](https://ref.ly/Matt18:35); [JAS 2:13](https://ref.ly/Jas2:13)

### Unethical behaviour renders worship unacceptable

**[ISA 58:4](https://ref.ly/Isa58:4)** *See also* [ISA 1:13–1:15](https://ref.ly/Isa1:13-Isa1:15); [EZK 33:31](https://ref.ly/Ezek33:31); [ZEC 7:5](https://ref.ly/Zech7:5), [ZEC 7:9–7:10](https://ref.ly/Zech7:9-Zech7:10); [MAT 23:23](https://ref.ly/Matt23:23) parallel [LUK 11:42](https://ref.ly/Luke11:42); [TIT 1:16](https://ref.ly/Titus1:16)

### The withdrawal of God's fellowship

**[ISA 59:2](https://ref.ly/Isa59:2)** *See also* [PSA 51:11](https://ref.ly/Ps51:11), [PSA 66:18](https://ref.ly/Ps66:18); [HOS 5:6](https://ref.ly/Hos5:6); [MIC 3:4](https://ref.ly/Mic3:4); [EPH 4:30](https://ref.ly/Eph4:30)

### God's judgment

**[GAL 6:8](https://ref.ly/Gal6:8)** *See also* [DEU 28:15](https://ref.ly/Deut28:15); [ISA 1:23–1:24](https://ref.ly/Isa1:23-Isa1:24); [1CO 6:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:9); [2CO 5:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:10); [COL 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Col3:5-Col3:6); [HEB 12:14](https://ref.ly/Heb12:14)

Incentives to correct ethical behaviour
---------------------------------------

### A new life in Christ

**[EPH 5:8](https://ref.ly/Eph5:8)** *See also* [ROM 6:2](https://ref.ly/Rom6:2), [ROM 6:13](https://ref.ly/Rom6:13); [2CO 5:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:15); [COL 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:9-Col3:10)

### God's goodness and love

**[EPH 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1-Eph5:2)** *See also* [EXO 20:2](https://ref.ly/Exod20:2); [ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1); [2CO 8:8–8:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:8-2Cor8:9); [TIT 2:14](https://ref.ly/Titus2:14); [1JN 3:16](https://ref.ly/1John3:16)

### Pleasing God

**[HEB 13:16](https://ref.ly/Heb13:16)** *See also* [2CO 5:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:9); [COL 3:20](https://ref.ly/Col3:20); [1TH 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:3-1Thess2:4), [1TH 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:1); [1JN 3:22](https://ref.ly/1John3:22)

### True worship is made possible

**[PSA 24:3–24:4](https://ref.ly/Ps24:3-Ps24:4)** *See also* [PRO 21:3](https://ref.ly/Prov21:3); [HOS 6:6](https://ref.ly/Hos6:6); [ISA 58:6–58:7](https://ref.ly/Isa58:6-Isa58:7); [MRK 12:33](https://ref.ly/Mark12:33); [JAS 1:27](https://ref.ly/Jas1:27)

### God's fellowship

**[JHN 14:23](https://ref.ly/John14:23)** *See also* [DEU 10:12–10:13](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12-Deut10:13); [PSA 15:1–15:5](https://ref.ly/Ps15:1-Ps15:5); [REV 21:7](https://ref.ly/Rev21:7)

### God's blessing

**[DEU 16:20](https://ref.ly/Deut16:20)** *See also* [DEU 28:2](https://ref.ly/Deut28:2); [PSA 1:3](https://ref.ly/Ps1:3), [PSA 84:11](https://ref.ly/Ps84:11); [ISA 56:1–56:2](https://ref.ly/Isa56:1-Isa56:2), [ISA 58:9–58:14](https://ref.ly/Isa58:9-Isa58:14); [MAT 6:18](https://ref.ly/Matt6:18)

### Future reward

**[LUK 14:13–14:14](https://ref.ly/Luke14:13-Luke14:14)** *See also* [MAT 10:42](https://ref.ly/Matt10:42) parallel [MRK 9:41](https://ref.ly/Mark9:41); [MAT 25:34–25:36](https://ref.ly/Matt25:34-Matt25:36); [LUK 6:35](https://ref.ly/Luke6:35); [ROM 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rom2:10); [COL 3:24](https://ref.ly/Col3:24); [REV 22:12](https://ref.ly/Rev22:12)

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 13:3-4; Deuteronomy 16:18; Deuteronomy 17:11-12; Deuteronomy 25:1; Psalms 82:3-4; 1 Timothy 2:1-4; 1 Peter 2:13-14; Matthew 6:14-15; 2 Samuel 12:9-10; Matthew 5:7; Matthew 7:2; Matthew 18:35; James 2:13; Isaiah 58:4; Isaiah 1:13-15; Ezekiel 33:31; Zechariah 7:5; Zechariah 7:9-10; Matthew 23:23; Luke 11:42; Titus 1:16; Isaiah 59:2; Psalms 51:11; Psalms 66:18; Hosea 5:6; Micah 3:4; Ephesians 4:30; Galatians 6:8; Deuteronomy 28:15; Isaiah 1:23-24; 1 Corinthians 6:9; 2 Corinthians 5:10; Colossians 3:5-6; Hebrews 12:14; Ephesians 5:8; Romans 6:2; Romans 6:13; 2 Corinthians 5:15; Colossians 3:9-10; Ephesians 5:1-2; Exodus 20:2; Romans 12:1; 2 Corinthians 8:8-9; Titus 2:14; 1 John 3:16; Hebrews 13:16; 2 Corinthians 5:9; Colossians 3:20; 1 Thessalonians 2:3-4; 1 Thessalonians 4:1; 1 John 3:22; Psalms 24:3-4; Proverbs 21:3; Hosea 6:6; Isaiah 58:6-7; Mark 12:33; James 1:27; John 14:23; Deuteronomy 10:12-13; Psalms 15:1-5; Revelation 21:7; Deuteronomy 16:20; Deuteronomy 28:2; Psalms 1:3; Psalms 84:11; Isaiah 56:1-2; Isaiah 58:9-14; Matthew 6:18; Luke 14:13-14; Matthew 10:42; Mark 9:41; Matthew 25:34-36; Luke 6:35; Romans 2:10; Colossians 3:24; Revelation 22:12

## 8248: faithfulness (id: 8248)

Commitment to a relationship with God or fellow human beings; seen in that loyalty, devotion and service which is a reflection of God's own faithfulness. Scripture points to the faithfulness of Jesus Christ as an example for believers.

* **Associated Articles:** 8249: faithfulness, of God (ID: `8249@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8250: faithfulness, of Jesus Christ (ID: `8250@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8251: faithfulness, to God (ID: `8251@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8252: faithfulness, in human relationships (ID: `8252@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8253: faithfulness, examples of (ID: `8253@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8249: faithfulness, of God (id: 8249)

See [1035: God, faithfulness of](1035.md)



## 8250: faithfulness, of Jesus Christ (id: 8250)

See [2021: Jesus Christ, faithfulness of](2021.md)



## 8251: faithfulness, to God (id: 8251)

The proper response to God by his covenant people; seen in a steadfast commitment which reflects God's own faithfulness to the covenant. Encouraged in all believers, it is especially important in leaders.

Faithfulness is the proper response to God by his covenant people
-----------------------------------------------------------------

### God's covenant with his people requires faithfulness

**[1KI 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:3-1Kgs2:4)** *See also* [EXO 19:5](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5); [DEU 5:32–5:33](https://ref.ly/Deut5:32-Deut5:33), [DEU 10:12–10:13](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12-Deut10:13), [DEU 29:9](https://ref.ly/Deut29:9); [ISA 1:26](https://ref.ly/Isa1:26)

### Faithfulness to God seen as marital fidelity

**[HOS 2:20](https://ref.ly/Hos2:20)** *See also* [ISA 54:5](https://ref.ly/Isa54:5); [JER 2:2](https://ref.ly/Jer2:2); [EZK 16:8](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:8); [EPH 1:1](https://ref.ly/Eph1:1), [EPH 5:22–5:25](https://ref.ly/Eph5:22-Eph5:25)

### Faithfulness to God reflects God's faithfulness

**[DEU 7:9](https://ref.ly/Deut7:9)** *See also* [1SA 2:35](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:35); [1CO 10:12–10:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:12-1Cor10:13); [HEB 4:14–4:16](https://ref.ly/Heb4:14-Heb4:16), [HEB 10:23](https://ref.ly/Heb10:23); [1PE 4:19](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:19)

Faithfulness is seen as steadfast commitment to God
---------------------------------------------------

### In unwavering devotion

**[MIC 4:5](https://ref.ly/Mic4:5)** *See also* [JOS 24:14–24:15](https://ref.ly/Josh24:14-Josh24:15); [LUK 9:62](https://ref.ly/Luke9:62); [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10)

### In obedience

[DEU 11:13](https://ref.ly/Deut11:13); ; [EZK 18:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:9)

### In service

[1SA 12:24](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:24); ; [2CH 19:9](https://ref.ly/2Chr19:9), [2CH 34:10–34:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:10-2Chr34:12) parallel [2KI 22:4–22:7](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:4-2Kgs22:7); ; [EZK 44:15](https://ref.ly/Ezek44:15), [EZK 48:11](https://ref.ly/Ezek48:11); ; [1TI 1:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:12)

### In giving

[2CH 31:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:12) *Faithfulness to God is expressed in giving to him for the benefit of others*; ; [2CO 8:1–8:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:1-2Cor8:5)

### In prayer

[ROM 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rom12:12); ; [1TH 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:17)

### In patient endurance

[2TI 2:11–2:13](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:11-2Tim2:13); ; [HEB 10:36](https://ref.ly/Heb10:36); ; [REV 13:10](https://ref.ly/Rev13:10), [REV 14:12](https://ref.ly/Rev14:12)

### In fulfilling vows

[NUM 30:2](https://ref.ly/Num30:2); ; [DEU 23:21–23:23](https://ref.ly/Deut23:21-Deut23:23); ; [PSA 22:25](https://ref.ly/Ps22:25), [PSA 61:8](https://ref.ly/Ps61:8); ; [ECC 5:4](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:4); ; [JON 2:9](https://ref.ly/Jonah2:9)

Faithfulness is especially important in leaders
-----------------------------------------------

**[1CO 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:1-1Cor4:2)**; **[3JN 1:3](https://ref.ly/3John1:3)** *See also* [EXO 18:21](https://ref.ly/Exod18:21); [1TI 4:13–4:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:13-1Tim4:16), [1TI 6:20](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:20); [2TI 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:13-2Tim1:14), [2TI 2:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:2), [2TI 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:15), [2TI 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:1-2Tim4:2)

Encouragements to faithfulness
------------------------------

### The call to faithfulness

**[1CO 15:58](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:58)** *See also* [PRO 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5-Prov3:6); [ISA 26:4](https://ref.ly/Isa26:4); [JHN 14:1](https://ref.ly/John14:1); [1CO 16:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:13); [GAL 5:1](https://ref.ly/Gal5:1); [EPH 6:13](https://ref.ly/Eph6:13)

### God watches over the faithful

**[PSA 97:10](https://ref.ly/Ps97:10)** *See also* [PSA 31:23](https://ref.ly/Ps31:23), [PSA 37:28](https://ref.ly/Ps37:28), [PSA 86:2](https://ref.ly/Ps86:2); [PRO 2:8](https://ref.ly/Prov2:8)

### God rewards faithfulness

**[1SA 26:23](https://ref.ly/1Sam26:23)**; **[MAT 25:21](https://ref.ly/Matt25:21)** parallel [LUK 19:17](https://ref.ly/Luke19:17) *See also* [PSA 101:6](https://ref.ly/Ps101:6); [PRO 28:20](https://ref.ly/Prov28:20); [MAT 24:45–24:47](https://ref.ly/Matt24:45-Matt24:47) parallel [LUK 12:42–12:44](https://ref.ly/Luke12:42-Luke12:44); [2TI 4:6–4:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:6-2Tim4:8); [REV 17:14](https://ref.ly/Rev17:14), [REV 20:4](https://ref.ly/Rev20:4)

Lack of faithfulness
--------------------

**[HOS 4:1](https://ref.ly/Hos4:1)** *See also* [PSA 12:1](https://ref.ly/Ps12:1), [PSA 78:8](https://ref.ly/Ps78:8), [PSA 78:37](https://ref.ly/Ps78:37); [HOS 1:2](https://ref.ly/Hos1:2), [HOS 5:7](https://ref.ly/Hos5:7), [HOS 9:1](https://ref.ly/Hos9:1)

## 8252: faithfulness, in human relationships (id: 8252)

Loyalty and commitment within human relationships is important in the life of God's people. It is seen particularly in fidelity within marriage, fulfilling family obligations, honouring vows, dutiful service and trustworthy speech and conduct.

Faithfulness within society
---------------------------

### It is important in the life of God's people

**[HOS 12:6](https://ref.ly/Hos12:6)** *The word translated “love” is the Hebrew word “hesed”, which here expresses the loyalty and faithfulness that should characterise the life of God's people.* *See also* [MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8); [MAT 23:23](https://ref.ly/Matt23:23) parallel [LUK 11:42](https://ref.ly/Luke11:42)

### It is a reflection of God's faithfulness to his people

**[PSA 89:14](https://ref.ly/Ps89:14)** *See also* [DEU 32:4](https://ref.ly/Deut32:4); [ISA 11:4–11:5](https://ref.ly/Isa11:4-Isa11:5)

Faithfulness in marriage
------------------------

**[HEB 13:4](https://ref.ly/Heb13:4)** *See also* [MAL 2:11](https://ref.ly/Mal2:11), [MAL 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Mal2:14-Mal2:15); [MAT 5:27–5:28](https://ref.ly/Matt5:27-Matt5:28); [EXO 20:14](https://ref.ly/Exod20:14); [EPH 5:33](https://ref.ly/Eph5:33); [1TI 5:9](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:9)

Faithfulness in family relationships
------------------------------------

**[1TI 5:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:4), [1TI 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:8)** *See also* [GEN 24:47–24:51](https://ref.ly/Gen24:47-Gen24:51) *fulfilling family obligations in marriage arrangements*; [GEN 47:28–47:31](https://ref.ly/Gen47:28-Gen47:31) *fulfilling family obligations regarding burial*[RUT 1:16–1:18](https://ref.ly/Ruth1:16-Ruth1:18), [RUT 2:11–2:12](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:11-Ruth2:12)[1SA 2:19](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:19) *Hannah visits Samuel regularly.*[PRO 31:15](https://ref.ly/Prov31:15), [PRO 31:21](https://ref.ly/Prov31:21), [PRO 31:27–31:28](https://ref.ly/Prov31:27-Prov31:28)[JHN 19:25–19:27](https://ref.ly/John19:25-John19:27) *Jesus Christ provides for his mother.*

Faithfulness to vows and covenants
----------------------------------

**[NUM 30:2](https://ref.ly/Num30:2)** [GEN 29:18](https://ref.ly/Gen29:18), [GEN 29:30](https://ref.ly/Gen29:30); [GEN 50:25](https://ref.ly/Gen50:25); ; [EXO 13:19](https://ref.ly/Exod13:19); [JOS 2:14](https://ref.ly/Josh2:14), [JOS 6:25](https://ref.ly/Josh6:25); [JOS 9:15–9:20](https://ref.ly/Josh9:15-Josh9:20) *Joshua and the Gibeonites*; [1SA 18:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:3), [1SA 20:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:8), [1SA 20:42](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:42), [1SA 23:16](https://ref.ly/1Sam23:16); [1KI 20:34](https://ref.ly/1Kgs20:34) *Ben\-Hadad and Ahab*

Faithfulness in speech
----------------------

### In carrying messages

**[PRO 13:17](https://ref.ly/Prov13:17)** *See also* [PRO 25:13](https://ref.ly/Prov25:13)

### In telling the truth

[PRO 12:17](https://ref.ly/Prov12:17), [PRO 14:5](https://ref.ly/Prov14:5)

### In bringing God's word

**[JER 23:28](https://ref.ly/Jer23:28)** *See also* [2CO 2:17](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:17), [2CO 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:2); [2TI 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:15)

Faithfulness in conduct
-----------------------

### In serving others

**[3JN 1:5](https://ref.ly/3John1:5)** *See also* [ROM 16:1–16:2](https://ref.ly/Rom16:1-Rom16:2); [GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10); [1PE 4:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:10)

### In intercession

[ROM 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Rom1:9-Rom1:10); ; [EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18); ; [COL 4:2–4:4](https://ref.ly/Col4:2-Col4:4)

### In giving

**[2CO 8:7–8:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:7-2Cor8:11)** *See also* [2CH 31:5–31:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:5-2Chr31:10); [PHP 4:15–4:18](https://ref.ly/Phil4:15-Phil4:18)

### In handling money

**[2KI 12:13–12:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs12:13-2Kgs12:15)** *See also* [2KI 22:7](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:7); [2CH 31:12–31:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:12-2Chr31:15); [MAT 25:21](https://ref.ly/Matt25:21); [LUK 16:10](https://ref.ly/Luke16:10), [LUK 19:17](https://ref.ly/Luke19:17)

The rarity of true faithfulness
-------------------------------

**[PRO 20:6](https://ref.ly/Prov20:6)** *See also* [PSA 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Ps12:1-Ps12:2); [ISA 57:1](https://ref.ly/Isa57:1); [JER 17:9](https://ref.ly/Jer17:9)

## 8253: faithfulness, examples of (id: 8253)

Those who show loyalty, reliability and devotion in their relationships with God and others.
