-------

**[NEH 9:7–9:8](https://ref.ly/Neh9:7-Neh9:8)** *See also* [GAL 3:9](https://ref.ly/Gal3:9); [HEB 11:8–11:12](https://ref.ly/Heb11:8-Heb11:12)

David
-----

**[1SA 29:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam29:6)** *David, fleeing from Saul, shelters with Achish, king of Gath.* *See also* [2SA 9:6–9:7](https://ref.ly/2Sam9:6-2Sam9:7), [2SA 22:22–22:24](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:22-2Sam22:24)

----

## 8255: fruit, spiritual (id: 8255)

The spiritual life and growth of believers is likened to a fruit\-bearing tree. As the fruit is evidence of the health and vigour of the tree, so the believer's life, attitudes and behaviour should reflect the presence of the Holy Spirit.

Believers should exhibit evidence of their conversion
-----------------------------------------------------

**[JAS 3:13](https://ref.ly/Jas3:13)** *See also* [MAT 3:8](https://ref.ly/Matt3:8) parallel [LUK 3:8–3:9](https://ref.ly/Luke3:8-Luke3:9); [MAT 7:15–7:20](https://ref.ly/Matt7:15-Matt7:20), [MAT 12:33](https://ref.ly/Matt12:33); [JHN 15:16](https://ref.ly/John15:16); [ROM 7:4–7:5](https://ref.ly/Rom7:4-Rom7:5); [TIT 3:14](https://ref.ly/Titus3:14); [JAS 2:14–2:26](https://ref.ly/Jas2:14-Jas2:26)

The nature of spiritual fruit
-----------------------------

**[GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23)** *See also* [ROM 8:5–8:6](https://ref.ly/Rom8:5-Rom8:6); [PHP 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9-Phil1:11); [JAS 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:17)

The sources of spiritual fruit
------------------------------

### Acceptance of the gospel

**[LUK 8:15](https://ref.ly/Luke8:15)** parallels [MAT 13:23](https://ref.ly/Matt13:23), [MRK 4:20](https://ref.ly/Mark4:20)

### The old way of life put to death

**[JHN 12:24](https://ref.ly/John12:24)** *See also* [ROM 6:6](https://ref.ly/Rom6:6), [ROM 6:11–6:14](https://ref.ly/Rom6:11-Rom6:14), [ROM 8:13–8:14](https://ref.ly/Rom8:13-Rom8:14); [GAL 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gal5:24); [EPH 4:22–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22-Eph4:24); [COL 3:5–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:5-Col3:10)

### Actively living a new life in Jesus Christ

**[GAL 6:7–6:9](https://ref.ly/Gal6:7-Gal6:9)** *See also* [ROM 6:11–6:14](https://ref.ly/Rom6:11-Rom6:14); [GAL 5:25](https://ref.ly/Gal5:25); [EPH 5:8–5:9](https://ref.ly/Eph5:8-Eph5:9); [COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10), [COL 3:12–3:15](https://ref.ly/Col3:12-Col3:15); [2TI 2:22](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:22); [2PE 1:5–1:8](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:8); [TIT 3:14](https://ref.ly/Titus3:14); [1JN 3:18](https://ref.ly/1John3:18)

### Remaining close to Jesus Christ

**[JHN 15:4–15:5](https://ref.ly/John15:4-John15:5)**

### Submission to God's discipline

**[HEB 12:10–12:11](https://ref.ly/Heb12:10-Heb12:11)** *See also* [JHN 15:1–15:2](https://ref.ly/John15:1-John15:2)

## 8256: fruitfulness (id: 8256)

Fruitfulness is seen as a sign of blessing and closeness to God, just as barrenness may be seen as a sign of God's disfavour. Scripture stresses that faith is given in order that it may bear fruit.

* **Associated Articles:** 8257: fruitfulness, natural (ID: `8257@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8258: fruitfulness, spiritual (ID: `8258@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8257: fruitfulness, natural (id: 8257)

In the OT fruitfulness is often used as a way of referring to God's material and physical blessings.

God's blessing on creation generally
------------------------------------

**[GEN 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/Gen1:11-Gen1:12), [GEN 1:22](https://ref.ly/Gen1:22)** *See also* [GEN 8:17](https://ref.ly/Gen8:17)

Fruitfulness in the promised land
---------------------------------

**[LEV 25:18–25:19](https://ref.ly/Lev25:18-Lev25:19)** *God's blessing was seen in terms of material prosperity.* *See also* [LEV 26:3–26:4](https://ref.ly/Lev26:3-Lev26:4); [DEU 32:13](https://ref.ly/Deut32:13), [DEU 33:13–33:16](https://ref.ly/Deut33:13-Deut33:16); [EZK 34:27](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:27); [AMO 9:14](https://ref.ly/Amos9:14); [ZEC 8:12](https://ref.ly/Zech8:12)

Fruitfulness in family relationships
------------------------------------

### Such fruitfulness promised

**[GEN 13:16](https://ref.ly/Gen13:16)** *See also* [GEN 15:5](https://ref.ly/Gen15:5), [GEN 17:6](https://ref.ly/Gen17:6), [GEN 17:20](https://ref.ly/Gen17:20), [GEN 22:17](https://ref.ly/Gen22:17); [LEV 26:9](https://ref.ly/Lev26:9); [DEU 7:13](https://ref.ly/Deut7:13), [DEU 28:4](https://ref.ly/Deut28:4), [DEU 28:11](https://ref.ly/Deut28:11), [DEU 30:9](https://ref.ly/Deut30:9); [PSA 128:3](https://ref.ly/Ps128:3); [JER 23:3](https://ref.ly/Jer23:3); [EZK 36:11](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:11)

### Such fruitfulness commanded

**[GEN 1:28](https://ref.ly/Gen1:28)** *See also* [GEN 9:1](https://ref.ly/Gen9:1), [GEN 9:7](https://ref.ly/Gen9:7), [GEN 35:11](https://ref.ly/Gen35:11), [GEN 48:3–48:4](https://ref.ly/Gen48:3-Gen48:4)

### Examples of such fruitfulness

**[PSA 105:24](https://ref.ly/Ps105:24)** *See also* [GEN 41:52](https://ref.ly/Gen41:52), [GEN 47:27](https://ref.ly/Gen47:27), [GEN 49:22](https://ref.ly/Gen49:22); [EXO 1:7](https://ref.ly/Exod1:7); [PSA 107:37–107:38](https://ref.ly/Ps107:37-Ps107:38)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 1:11-12; Genesis 1:22; Genesis 8:17; Leviticus 25:18-19; Leviticus 26:3-4; Deuteronomy 32:13; Deuteronomy 33:13-16; Ezekiel 34:27; Amos 9:14; Zechariah 8:12; Genesis 13:16; Genesis 15:5; Genesis 17:6; Genesis 17:20; Genesis 22:17; Leviticus 26:9; Deuteronomy 7:13; Deuteronomy 28:4; Deuteronomy 28:11; Deuteronomy 30:9; Psalms 128:3; Jeremiah 23:3; Ezekiel 36:11; Genesis 1:28; Genesis 9:1; Genesis 9:7; Genesis 35:11; Genesis 48:3-4; Psalms 105:24; Genesis 41:52; Genesis 47:27; Genesis 49:22; Exodus 1:7; Psalms 107:37-38

## 8258: fruitfulness, spiritual (id: 8258)

Fruitfulness is used by Scripture as a symbol of spiritual maturity and well\-being.

Spiritual fruitfulness described
--------------------------------

**[GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23)** *The results of the Holy Spirit's activity in the life of a Christian believer.* *See also* [PSA 92:12](https://ref.ly/Ps92:12); [PRO 11:30](https://ref.ly/Prov11:30); [ISA 32:17](https://ref.ly/Isa32:17); [JER 11:16](https://ref.ly/Jer11:16); [EZK 19:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek19:10); [EPH 5:9](https://ref.ly/Eph5:9); [COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10); [JAS 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:17)

Spiritual fruitfulness expected in God's people
-----------------------------------------------

**[JHN 15:16](https://ref.ly/John15:16)** *See also* [ISA 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Isa5:1-Isa5:2); [MAT 7:16–7:20](https://ref.ly/Matt7:16-Matt7:20) parallel [LUK 6:43–6:44](https://ref.ly/Luke6:43-Luke6:44) *Such fruitfuless, seen in a person's behaviour, is evidence of their true character*; [ROM 7:4](https://ref.ly/Rom7:4)

The conditions for spiritual fruitfulness
-----------------------------------------

### Spiritual fruitfulness through an intimate relationship with Jesus Christ

**[JHN 15:4–15:5](https://ref.ly/John15:4-John15:5)**

### Spiritual fruitfulness through a commitment to God's word

**[PSA 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/Ps1:1-Ps1:3)** *See also* [MAT 13:23](https://ref.ly/Matt13:23); [JHN 15:2–15:3](https://ref.ly/John15:2-John15:3)

### Spiritual fruitfulness through a death to self\-interest

**[JHN 12:24](https://ref.ly/John12:24)** *Although Jesus Christ is speaking here primarily of his own death, the principle remains true for Christian living.*

* **Associated Passages:** Galatians 5:22-23; Psalms 92:12; Proverbs 11:30; Isaiah 32:17; Jeremiah 11:16; Ezekiel 19:10; Ephesians 5:9; Colossians 1:10; James 3:17; John 15:16; Isaiah 5:1-2; Matthew 7:16-20; Luke 6:43-44; Romans 7:4; John 15:4-5; Psalms 1:1-3; Matthew 13:23; John 15:2-3; John 12:24
* **Associated Articles:** 1610: Scripture (ID: `1610@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3254: Holy Spirit, fruit of (ID: `3254@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5902: maturity (ID: `5902@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6744: sanctification (ID: `6744@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6754: union with Christ (ID: `6754@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8102: abiding in Christ (ID: `8102@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8255: fruit, spiritual (ID: `8255@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8347: spiritual growth (ID: `8347@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8356: unselfishness (ID: `8356@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8260: generosity (id: 8260)

The free and liberal bestowal of wealth, possessions or food upon others. The generosity of God is shown in his free bestowal of grace upon undeserving sinners.

* **Associated Articles:** 8261: generosity, God's (ID: `8261@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8262: generosity, human (ID: `8262@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8261: generosity, God's (id: 8261)

The generosity of God is evident in the way in which he deals with his creation, and supremely with sinners. God bestows his gracious gifts upon sinners in salvation, in sanctification and through the coming of the Holy Spirit.

God's generous heart
--------------------

**[EPH 1:7–1:9](https://ref.ly/Eph1:7-Eph1:9)** *See also* [EXO 34:6–34:7](https://ref.ly/Exod34:6-Exod34:7); [PSA 33:18–33:22](https://ref.ly/Ps33:18-Ps33:22); [MAT 7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:11); [LUK 15:22–15:24](https://ref.ly/Luke15:22-Luke15:24); [ROM 11:35–11:36](https://ref.ly/Rom11:35-Rom11:36)

God's generosity evident in creation
------------------------------------

**[PSA 65:9–65:13](https://ref.ly/Ps65:9-Ps65:13)** *See also* [PSA 33:5](https://ref.ly/Ps33:5), [PSA 68:9](https://ref.ly/Ps68:9)

God's generosity evident in providence
--------------------------------------

**[ACT 14:17](https://ref.ly/Acts14:17)** *See also* [GEN 24:35](https://ref.ly/Gen24:35); [NUM 14:8](https://ref.ly/Num14:8); [DEU 28:11](https://ref.ly/Deut28:11), [DEU 33:23](https://ref.ly/Deut33:23); [PSA 66:12](https://ref.ly/Ps66:12), [PSA 78:15](https://ref.ly/Ps78:15), [PSA 132:15](https://ref.ly/Ps132:15), [PSA 145:7](https://ref.ly/Ps145:7), [PSA 147:6](https://ref.ly/Ps147:6); [JER 31:12–31:14](https://ref.ly/Jer31:12-Jer31:14), [JER 33:6–33:9](https://ref.ly/Jer33:6-Jer33:9); [MAL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Mal3:10); [1TI 6:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17)

God's generosity experienced in salvation
-----------------------------------------

**[EPH 1:3](https://ref.ly/Eph1:3)** *See also* [JHN 1:16](https://ref.ly/John1:16); [ROM 5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:5), [ROM 10:12](https://ref.ly/Rom10:12); [EPH 2:7](https://ref.ly/Eph2:7), [EPH 3:8](https://ref.ly/Eph3:8); [COL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Col2:10); [1JN 3:1](https://ref.ly/1John3:1)

### His love and mercifulness towards sinners

[PSA 116:5](https://ref.ly/Ps116:5), [PSA 130:7](https://ref.ly/Ps130:7); ; [ISA 55:7](https://ref.ly/Isa55:7); ; [HOS 14:4](https://ref.ly/Hos14:4); ; [EPH 2:7](https://ref.ly/Eph2:7); ; [1JN 3:1](https://ref.ly/1John3:1)

### Redemption through the death of Jesus Christ

[ROM 3:24](https://ref.ly/Rom3:24); ; [EPH 1:7](https://ref.ly/Eph1:7); ; [1TI 1:14–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:14-1Tim1:16); ; [TIT 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/Titus2:13-Titus2:14); ; [1PE 1:18–1:19](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:18-1Pet1:19)

### His gift of eternal life

[JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16), [JHN 10:28](https://ref.ly/John10:28); ; [ROM 3:23–3:24](https://ref.ly/Rom3:23-Rom3:24), [ROM 5:17](https://ref.ly/Rom5:17), [ROM 6:23](https://ref.ly/Rom6:23); ; [1TI 1:14–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:14-1Tim1:16)

God's generosity experienced in sanctification
----------------------------------------------

**[2PE 1:2–1:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:2-2Pet1:3)** *See also* [PSA 23:5](https://ref.ly/Ps23:5), [PSA 36:7–36:8](https://ref.ly/Ps36:7-Ps36:8); [EZK 47:1–47:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek47:1-Ezek47:12); [PHP 2:12–2:13](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12-Phil2:13), [PHP 4:19](https://ref.ly/Phil4:19); [JUD 1:2](https://ref.ly/Jude1:2)

### The gift of the Holy Spirit

**[JOL 2:28–2:29](https://ref.ly/Joel2:28-Joel2:29)** *See also* [ACT 2:17–2:18](https://ref.ly/Acts2:17-Acts2:18); [EZK 39:29](https://ref.ly/Ezek39:29); [JHN 3:34](https://ref.ly/John3:34); [ACT 10:45](https://ref.ly/Acts10:45); [ROM 5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:5); [TIT 3:6](https://ref.ly/Titus3:6)

### Wisdom

**[JAS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5)** *See also* [COL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Col2:2)

### Comfort, strength and encouragement

**[2CO 1:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:5)** *See also* [EPH 3:16](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16); [2TH 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:16-2Thess2:17)

God's generosity in heaven
--------------------------

### Inheritance

**[1CO 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:9)** *See also* [EPH 1:18](https://ref.ly/Eph1:18)

### Reward

**[PRO 28:20](https://ref.ly/Prov28:20)** *See also* [HEB 10:35](https://ref.ly/Heb10:35); [REV 21:1–21:4](https://ref.ly/Rev21:1-Rev21:4)

## 8262: generosity, human (id: 8262)

Believers should be generous in their dealings with others, following the example of God himself.

Motivations for generosity
--------------------------

### God's example

**[2CO 8:7–8:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:7-2Cor8:9)** *See also* [1JN 3:16–3:18](https://ref.ly/1John3:16-1John3:18)

### God's dealings with believers

**[EPH 4:32–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:32-Eph5:2)** *See also* [MAT 10:7–10:8](https://ref.ly/Matt10:7-Matt10:8), [MAT 18:21–18:35](https://ref.ly/Matt18:21-Matt18:35)

Demonstrations of generosity
----------------------------

### In material giving

**[ACT 4:32–4:37](https://ref.ly/Acts4:32-Acts4:37)** *See also* [LEV 25:35](https://ref.ly/Lev25:35); [DEU 15:7–15:8](https://ref.ly/Deut15:7-Deut15:8); [MAT 5:42](https://ref.ly/Matt5:42), [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21); [2CO 8:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:3), [2CO 9:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:5)

### In support of God's work

**[PHP 4:16](https://ref.ly/Phil4:16)** *See also* [EXO 36:5](https://ref.ly/Exod36:5); [NUM 7:13–7:17](https://ref.ly/Num7:13-Num7:17); [1CH 28:14–28:18](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:14-1Chr28:18), [1CH 29:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:9); [2CH 31:9–31:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:9-2Chr31:10); [MRK 12:41–12:44](https://ref.ly/Mark12:41-Mark12:44) parallel [LUK 21:1–21:4](https://ref.ly/Luke21:1-Luke21:4); [GAL 6:6](https://ref.ly/Gal6:6); [1TI 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17-1Tim5:18)

### In worship

**[MAT 26:6–26:7](https://ref.ly/Matt26:6-Matt26:7)** *See also* [EXO 35:22](https://ref.ly/Exod35:22); [1KI 3:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:4), [1KI 8:63](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:63); [2CH 1:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr1:6), [2CH 5:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr5:6); [EZR 6:9](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:9); [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2); [PHP 2:17](https://ref.ly/Phil2:17)

### In acts of mercy

**[LUK 10:33–10:35](https://ref.ly/Luke10:33-Luke10:35)** *See also* [2KI 6:22](https://ref.ly/2Kgs6:22); [2CH 28:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr28:15)

### In giving presents

**[1KI 10:13](https://ref.ly/1Kgs10:13)** *See also* [GEN 24:53](https://ref.ly/Gen24:53), [GEN 32:17–32:21](https://ref.ly/Gen32:17-Gen32:21), [GEN 45:21–45:23](https://ref.ly/Gen45:21-Gen45:23); [2KI 5:5](https://ref.ly/2Kgs5:5), [2KI 8:9](https://ref.ly/2Kgs8:9)

Meanness and covetousness the opposites of generosity
-----------------------------------------------------

**[ECC 5:13](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:13)** *See also* [2SA 12:2–12:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:2-2Sam12:4); [ISA 43:23–43:24](https://ref.ly/Isa43:23-Isa43:24); [MIC 2:2](https://ref.ly/Mic2:2); [MAL 3:8–3:9](https://ref.ly/Mal3:8-Mal3:9); [MAT 25:45](https://ref.ly/Matt25:45); [LUK 12:15](https://ref.ly/Luke12:15)

Generosity rewarded
-------------------

**[MAL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Mal3:10)** *See also* [PSA 37:25–37:26](https://ref.ly/Ps37:25-Ps37:26), [PSA 112:5](https://ref.ly/Ps112:5), [PSA 112:9](https://ref.ly/Ps112:9); [PRO 11:24–11:25](https://ref.ly/Prov11:24-Prov11:25), [PRO 22:9](https://ref.ly/Prov22:9); [ISA 58:10](https://ref.ly/Isa58:10); [LUK 6:38](https://ref.ly/Luke6:38); [2CO 9:6–9:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:6-2Cor9:9); [GAL 6:9–6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:9-Gal6:10)

## 8264: gentleness (id: 8264)

An expression of compassion, seen in God's dealings with the frail and weak, and expected of believers in their dealings with others.

The gentleness of God
---------------------

### In dealing with the wayward

**[ISA 40:1–40:2](https://ref.ly/Isa40:1-Isa40:2)**; **[LUK 1:76–1:79](https://ref.ly/Luke1:76-Luke1:79)** *See also* [ISA 30:18–30:19](https://ref.ly/Isa30:18-Isa30:19), [ISA 54:8](https://ref.ly/Isa54:8), [ISA 63:15](https://ref.ly/Isa63:15) *God's gentleness is not always evident*; [HOS 2:13–2:15](https://ref.ly/Hos2:13-Hos2:15); [ROM 2:4](https://ref.ly/Rom2:4) *God's gentle dealings are not always appreciated.*

### In caring for the weak

**[ISA 40:11](https://ref.ly/Isa40:11)** *See also* [1KI 19:12](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:12)

The gentleness of Jesus Christ
------------------------------

**[MAT 11:29](https://ref.ly/Matt11:29)** *See also* [ZEC 9:9](https://ref.ly/Zech9:9); [MAT 21:4–21:5](https://ref.ly/Matt21:4-Matt21:5), [MAT 12:18–12:21](https://ref.ly/Matt12:18-Matt12:21); [ISA 42:1–42:3](https://ref.ly/Isa42:1-Isa42:3); [2CO 10:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:1); [PHP 2:1](https://ref.ly/Phil2:1); [HEB 5:2](https://ref.ly/Heb5:2)

Examples of Jesus Christ's gentleness
-------------------------------------

[MRK 1:40–1:42](https://ref.ly/Mark1:40-Mark1:42), [MRK 5:25–5:34](https://ref.ly/Mark5:25-Mark5:34), [MRK 10:13–10:16](https://ref.ly/Mark10:13-Mark10:16); ; [JHN 8:3–8:11](https://ref.ly/John8:3-John8:11)

Gentleness as strength esteemed by God
--------------------------------------

**[PRO 15:1](https://ref.ly/Prov15:1)**; **[JAS 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:17)** *See also* [PRO 25:15](https://ref.ly/Prov25:15); [MAT 5:5](https://ref.ly/Matt5:5); [1PE 3:1–3:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:1-1Pet3:4)

Gentleness as a mark of Christian character
-------------------------------------------

**[COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12)** *See also* [GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23); [EPH 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:1-Eph4:2); [1TI 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:11)

Believers are to reflect God's gentleness in their dealings with people
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### In correcting the wayward

**[GAL 6:1](https://ref.ly/Gal6:1)** *See also* [2TI 2:24–2:25](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:24-2Tim2:25)

### In reasoning with unbelievers

**[1PE 3:15–3:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15-1Pet3:16)**

### In nurturing new believers

*See also* [1TH 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:7)

### In showing consideration to all

**[TIT 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Titus3:1-Titus3:2)** *See also* [EPH 4:32](https://ref.ly/Eph4:32); [PHP 4:5](https://ref.ly/Phil4:5)

## 8265: godliness (id: 8265)

Reverence for or devotion to God, producing a practical awareness of God in every aspect of life.

Examples of godliness in the OT
-------------------------------

[GEN 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gen5:24) *Enoch*; ; [GEN 6:9](https://ref.ly/Gen6:9) *Noah*; ; [1KI 18:3–18:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:3-1Kgs18:4) *Obadiah*; ; [2CH 31:20–31:21](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:20-2Chr31:21) *Hezekiah*; ; [JOB 1:1](https://ref.ly/Job1:1) *Job*

Examples of godliness in the NT
-------------------------------

[LUK 2:25](https://ref.ly/Luke2:25) *Simeon*; ; [LUK 2:37](https://ref.ly/Luke2:37) *Anna*; ; [JHN 1:47](https://ref.ly/John1:47) *Nathanael*; [JHN 8:29](https://ref.ly/John8:29); ; [HEB 5:7](https://ref.ly/Heb5:7); [ACT 2:5](https://ref.ly/Acts2:5), [ACT 8:2](https://ref.ly/Acts8:2); [ACT 10:2](https://ref.ly/Acts10:2), [ACT 10:7](https://ref.ly/Acts10:7); [ACT 11:24](https://ref.ly/Acts11:24) *Barnabas*; ; [ACT 22:12](https://ref.ly/Acts22:12) *Ananias*

God has a special concern for the godly
---------------------------------------

**[PSA 4:3](https://ref.ly/Ps4:3)** *“the godly” (sometimes translated “the saints”) is often used in the OT to refer to God's people.* *See also* [PSA 32:6](https://ref.ly/Ps32:6); [JHN 9:31](https://ref.ly/John9:31)

Godly living
------------

### Godliness should be seen in the lives of believers

**[2PE 3:11](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:11)** *See also* [1TI 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:2), [1TI 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:11); [TIT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Titus2:12)

### Jesus Christ is the beginning and end of godliness

**[1TI 3:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:16)** *The model and the power for godly living derives from the incarnate Christ.* *See also* [HEB 5:7](https://ref.ly/Heb5:7); [2PE 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:3)

### The basis for godly living is true teaching about Jesus Christ

**[1TI 6:3–6:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:3-1Tim6:4)** *See also* [TIT 1:1](https://ref.ly/Titus1:1)

### Godly living demands self\-discipline

[1CO 9:24–9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:24-1Cor9:27); ; [2CO 10:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:5); ; [1TI 4:7–4:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:7-1Tim4:8)

### Sorrow for sin is a sign of godliness

[2CO 7:10–7:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:10-2Cor7:11)

The benefits of godliness
-------------------------

### Its value in both this world and the next

**[1TI 4:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:8)**

### Its present blessings

**[DEU 4:40](https://ref.ly/Deut4:40)**; **[1TI 6:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:6)** *See also* [ISA 3:10](https://ref.ly/Isa3:10); [TIT 3:8](https://ref.ly/Titus3:8)

### The promise of future blessing

**[TIT 2:11–2:13](https://ref.ly/Titus2:11-Titus2:13)** *See also* [2PE 3:11–3:12](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:11-2Pet3:12)

Godliness does not guarantee escape from suffering
--------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 12:1](https://ref.ly/Ps12:1)** *See also* [MIC 7:2](https://ref.ly/Mic7:2); [2TI 3:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:12); [2PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:9)

Apparent godliness may not be genuine
-------------------------------------

[1TI 6:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:5); ; [2TI 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:4-2Tim3:5)

## 8266: holiness (id: 8266)

The quality of God that sets him utterly apart from his world, especially in terms of his purity and sanctity. The holiness of God is also manifested in the persons and work of Jesus Christ and the Holy Spirit. Believers are called upon to become like God in his holiness.

* **Associated Articles:** 8267: holiness, of God (ID: `8267@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8268: holiness, of Jesus Christ (ID: `8268@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8269: holiness, as separation from the worldly (ID: `8269@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8270: holiness, as set apart for God (ID: `8270@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8271: holiness, purpose of (ID: `8271@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8272: holiness, believers' growth in (ID: `8272@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8273: holiness, ethical aspects of (ID: `8273@DictionaryBibleThemes`)

## 8268: holiness, of Jesus Christ (id: 8268)

See [2030: Jesus Christ, holiness of](2030.md)



## 8269: holiness, as separation from the worldly (id: 8269)

God's people are called to holiness, which involves being distinct from other people. In the OT, this is seen in the command to separate from other nations and from everything that can compromise commitment to the LORD. In the NT believers are called to distance themselves from the ways and values of the world, which can be dishonouring to God and destructive to obedience to him.

Israel is to be set apart from other nations
--------------------------------------------

**[LEV 20:23–20:26](https://ref.ly/Lev20:23-Lev20:26)** *See also* [EXO 33:15–33:16](https://ref.ly/Exod33:15-Exod33:16); [LEV 15:31](https://ref.ly/Lev15:31), [LEV 18:29–18:30](https://ref.ly/Lev18:29-Lev18:30); [DEU 7:1–7:6](https://ref.ly/Deut7:1-Deut7:6), [DEU 23:9–23:14](https://ref.ly/Deut23:9-Deut23:14); [EZR 9:1–9:2](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:1-Ezra9:2), [EZR 9:10–9:12](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:10-Ezra9:12); [ISA 52:11](https://ref.ly/Isa52:11)

-----------------------------------------------------------

### Corpses

What is holy must be kept separate
----------------------------------

### The Israelites must distinguish between the holy and the common

### Unclean people and things must be removed

**[NUM 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/Num5:1-Num5:3)**; **[EZR 10:10–10:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:10-Ezra10:11)** *See also* [LEV 7:22–7:27](https://ref.ly/Lev7:22-Lev7:27), [LEV 13:45–13:46](https://ref.ly/Lev13:45-Lev13:46), [LEV 19:5–19:8](https://ref.ly/Lev19:5-Lev19:8); [NUM 19:13](https://ref.ly/Num19:13), [NUM 19:20](https://ref.ly/Num19:20); [DEU 23:10–23:14](https://ref.ly/Deut23:10-Deut23:14); [2CH 26:21](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:21)

### Unclean people are not to approach what is sacred

[LEV 7:20–7:21](https://ref.ly/Lev7:20-Lev7:21), [LEV 22:3–22:6](https://ref.ly/Lev22:3-Lev22:6)

The holy must be treated with respect
-------------------------------------

[LEV 5:14–5:16](https://ref.ly/Lev5:14-Lev5:16)

### Warnings against contempt for the holy

**[LEV 22:1–22:2](https://ref.ly/Lev22:1-Lev22:2)** *See also* [EXO 19:10–19:13](https://ref.ly/Exod19:10-Exod19:13), [EXO 28:42–28:43](https://ref.ly/Exod28:42-Exod28:43), [EXO 30:18–30:21](https://ref.ly/Exod30:18-Exod30:21), [EXO 31:14–31:15](https://ref.ly/Exod31:14-Exod31:15); [NUM 4:15](https://ref.ly/Num4:15), [NUM 4:17–4:20](https://ref.ly/Num4:17-Num4:20); [HEB 10:28–10:29](https://ref.ly/Heb10:28-Heb10:29)

### Examples of contempt for the holy

---------------------------------------------------------------

## 8270: holiness, as set apart for God (id: 8270)

Believers are holy, in that they are called to be set apart from the world as God's own people. Likewise certain days and articles are holy because they are set apart for God alone.

Believers are called to be a holy people, set apart for God
-----------------------------------------------------------

### The nation of Israel

**[DEU 7:6](https://ref.ly/Deut7:6)** *See also* [EXO 19:5–19:6](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5-Exod19:6); [LEV 20:26](https://ref.ly/Lev20:26); [DEU 26:18–26:19](https://ref.ly/Deut26:18-Deut26:19)

### Christians

**[EPH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Eph1:4)**; **[1PE 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15-1Pet1:16)** *See also* [1CO 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:2); [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12); [2TI 1:9](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:9); [1PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9)

## 8271: holiness, purpose of (id: 8271)

God in his holiness desires a holy people amongst whom he can dwell, and who can effectively worship, witness to and serve him as they prepare for a future with God and to be like God.

The goal of holiness is to be like God
--------------------------------------

**[LEV 19:2](https://ref.ly/Lev19:2)**; **[MAT 5:48](https://ref.ly/Matt5:48)** *See also* [ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29); [HEB 12:10](https://ref.ly/Heb12:10); [1PE 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15-1Pet1:16); [1JN 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/1John3:2-1John3:3)

God dwells with holy people
---------------------------

### God dwelt with the people of Israel

**[DEU 23:14](https://ref.ly/Deut23:14)** *See also* [EXO 29:42–29:46](https://ref.ly/Exod29:42-Exod29:46); [NUM 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/Num5:1-Num5:3); [1KI 9:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:3); [EZK 37:26–37:28](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:26-Ezek37:28); [ZEC 2:10–2:12](https://ref.ly/Zech2:10-Zech2:12)

### God dwells with Christians

**[EPH 2:19–2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:19-Eph2:22)** *See also* [1CO 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:16-1Cor3:17)

Holiness is required for acceptable worship
-------------------------------------------

**[HEB 10:19–10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:19-Heb10:22)** *See also* [LEV 22:17–22:22](https://ref.ly/Lev22:17-Lev22:22); [2CH 29:15–29:31](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:15-2Chr29:31); [ISA 56:6–56:7](https://ref.ly/Isa56:6-Isa56:7); [MAT 15:7–15:9](https://ref.ly/Matt15:7-Matt15:9) parallel [MRK 7:6](https://ref.ly/Mark7:6); [ISA 29:13](https://ref.ly/Isa29:13); [ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)

Holiness is needed for effective witness
----------------------------------------

**[1PE 2:9–2:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9-1Pet2:12)** *See also* [EZK 20:41](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:41), [EZK 36:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:20), [EZK 39:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek39:7); [1PE 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:1-1Pet3:2)

Holiness is needed for godly service
------------------------------------

**[HEB 9:13–9:14](https://ref.ly/Heb9:13-Heb9:14)** *See also* [EXO 28:41](https://ref.ly/Exod28:41); [LEV 21:6–21:8](https://ref.ly/Lev21:6-Lev21:8); [2CH 35:3](https://ref.ly/2Chr35:3); [ZEP 3:9](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:9); [LUK 1:74–1:75](https://ref.ly/Luke1:74-Luke1:75); [2TI 2:20–2:21](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:20-2Tim2:21); [TIT 2:14](https://ref.ly/Titus2:14)

Holiness leads to a future hope
-------------------------------

### Holy people will see God

**[HEB 12:14](https://ref.ly/Heb12:14)** *See also* [MAT 5:8](https://ref.ly/Matt5:8); [1TH 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:13); [2TH 1:10](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:10)

### Holy people will receive eternal life

**[ROM 6:22](https://ref.ly/Rom6:22)** *See also* [2PE 3:11](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:11)

### Holy people will inherit the kingdom

**[COL 1:12](https://ref.ly/Col1:12)** *See also* [DAN 7:18](https://ref.ly/Dan7:18), [DAN 7:22](https://ref.ly/Dan7:22), [DAN 7:27](https://ref.ly/Dan7:27); [EPH 1:18](https://ref.ly/Eph1:18); [REV 20:6](https://ref.ly/Rev20:6)

### Holy people will judge the world

[1CO 6:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:2)

### Believers' ultimate destiny is to share God's holiness for ever

**[EPH 5:25–5:27](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25-Eph5:27)**; **[REV 21:2–21:3](https://ref.ly/Rev21:2-Rev21:3)**

* **Associated Passages:** Leviticus 19:2; Matthew 5:48; Romans 8:29; Hebrews 12:10; 1 Peter 1:15-16; 1 John 3:2-3; Deuteronomy 23:14; Exodus 29:42-46; Numbers 5:1-3; 1 Kings 9:3; Ezekiel 37:26-28; Zechariah 2:10-12; Ephesians 2:19-22; 1 Corinthians 3:16-17; Hebrews 10:19-22; Leviticus 22:17-22; 2 Chronicles 29:15-31; Isaiah 56:6-7; Matthew 15:7-9; Mark 7:6; Isaiah 29:13; Romans 12:1; 1 Peter 2:9-12; Ezekiel 20:41; Ezekiel 36:20; Ezekiel 39:7; 1 Peter 3:1-2; Hebrews 9:13-14; Exodus 28:41; Leviticus 21:6-8; 2 Chronicles 35:3; Zephaniah 3:9; Luke 1:74-75; 2 Timothy 2:20-21; Titus 2:14; Hebrews 12:14; Matthew 5:8; 1 Thessalonians 3:13; 2 Thessalonians 1:10; Romans 6:22; 2 Peter 3:11; Colossians 1:12; Daniel 7:18; Daniel 7:22; Daniel 7:27; Ephesians 1:18; Revelation 20:6; 1 Corinthians 6:2; Ephesians 5:25-27; Revelation 21:2-3
* **Associated Articles:** 7922: fellowship, with God (ID: `7922@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8154: righteousness (ID: `8154@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8206: Christlikeness (ID: `8206@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8265: godliness (ID: `8265@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8474: seeing God (ID: `8474@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8495: witnessing (ID: `8495@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8622: worship (ID: `8622@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9160: new heavens and new earth (ID: `9160@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9410: heaven (ID: `9410@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9610: hope (ID: `9610@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8272: holiness, believers' growth in (id: 8272)

Believers are enabled to grow in holiness on account of the sacrificial death of Jesus Christ, foreshadowed by the OT sacrificial system, and through the sanctifying work of the Holy Spirit.

Holiness begins with God's initiative
-------------------------------------

### God chooses who and what is to be holy

**[2CH 7:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:16)** parallel [1KI 9:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:3) *See also* [EXO 20:11](https://ref.ly/Exod20:11); [NUM 16:7](https://ref.ly/Num16:7); [2CH 29:11](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:11); [ZEC 2:12](https://ref.ly/Zech2:12)

### God chooses and calls his people to holiness

**[DEU 7:6](https://ref.ly/Deut7:6)**; **[EPH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Eph1:4)** *See also* [DEU 14:2](https://ref.ly/Deut14:2); [ROM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Rom1:7); [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12); [1PE 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:2), [1PE 1:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15)

Holiness is conferred by the holy God
-------------------------------------

### Holiness is conferred by the presence of God

**[EXO 29:42–29:43](https://ref.ly/Exod29:42-Exod29:43)** *See also* [EXO 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Exod3:4-Exod3:5), [EXO 19:23](https://ref.ly/Exod19:23); [2CH 7:1–7:2](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:1-2Chr7:2)

### Holiness is conferred through covenant relationship with God

**[EXO 19:5–19:6](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5-Exod19:6)** *See also* [DEU 28:9](https://ref.ly/Deut28:9); [EZK 37:26–37:28](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:26-Ezek37:28); [1PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9)

### Holiness is conferred by the sovereign action of God

**[1TH 5:23](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:23)** *See also* [LEV 20:8](https://ref.ly/Lev20:8); [ISA 4:3–4:4](https://ref.ly/Isa4:3-Isa4:4); [EZK 36:25](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:25); [ZEP 1:7](https://ref.ly/Zeph1:7); [ACT 15:9](https://ref.ly/Acts15:9); [HEB 2:11](https://ref.ly/Heb2:11)

Holiness through the OT rituals
-------------------------------

### Cleansing from what is unclean

**[NUM 8:6–8:7](https://ref.ly/Num8:6-Num8:7)** *See also* [EXO 19:14](https://ref.ly/Exod19:14); [NUM 19:9](https://ref.ly/Num19:9); [NEH 12:30](https://ref.ly/Neh12:30)

### Purification and atonement through sacrifice

**[NUM 8:12–8:14](https://ref.ly/Num8:12-Num8:14)** *The OT sacrificial system and holiness laws foreshadow the perfect sacrifice of Jesus Christ that enables believers to grow in holiness through faith.* *See also* [EXO 29:35–29:37](https://ref.ly/Exod29:35-Exod29:37); [LEV 8:14–8:15](https://ref.ly/Lev8:14-Lev8:15), [LEV 16:5–16:10](https://ref.ly/Lev16:5-Lev16:10), [LEV 16:15–16:22](https://ref.ly/Lev16:15-Lev16:22), [LEV 16:29–16:30](https://ref.ly/Lev16:29-Lev16:30)

### Consecration by anointing

**[LEV 8:10–8:12](https://ref.ly/Lev8:10-Lev8:12)** *See also* [EXO 29:21](https://ref.ly/Exod29:21), [EXO 40:9](https://ref.ly/Exod40:9)

Holiness through Jesus Christ
-----------------------------

### Through the sacrifice of Jesus Christ

**[HEB 10:10](https://ref.ly/Heb10:10)** *See also* [EPH 5:25–5:27](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25-Eph5:27); [COL 1:22](https://ref.ly/Col1:22); [HEB 1:3](https://ref.ly/Heb1:3), [HEB 9:13–9:14](https://ref.ly/Heb9:13-Heb9:14), [HEB 9:23–9:28](https://ref.ly/Heb9:23-Heb9:28), [HEB 10:14](https://ref.ly/Heb10:14), [HEB 10:19–10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:19-Heb10:22), [HEB 13:12](https://ref.ly/Heb13:12); [1JN 1:7](https://ref.ly/1John1:7), [1JN 2:2](https://ref.ly/1John2:2), [1JN 4:10](https://ref.ly/1John4:10)

### Through relationship with Jesus Christ

**[1CO 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:2)** *See also* [1CO 1:30](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:30)

Holiness through the sanctifying work of the Holy Spirit
--------------------------------------------------------

**[2TH 2:13](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:13)** *See also* [JHN 3:5–3:8](https://ref.ly/John3:5-John3:8); [ROM 15:16](https://ref.ly/Rom15:16); [1CO 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:11); [1TH 4:7–4:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:7-1Thess4:8); [TIT 3:5](https://ref.ly/Titus3:5); [1PE 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:2)

The human response to holiness
------------------------------

### Repentance

**[1JN 1:9](https://ref.ly/1John1:9)** *See also* [EZR 9:1–9:7](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:1-Ezra9:7), [EZR 10:1–10:4](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:1-Ezra10:4); [PSA 51:1–51:10](https://ref.ly/Ps51:1-Ps51:10); [ACT 2:38](https://ref.ly/Acts2:38); [ROM 6:11–6:13](https://ref.ly/Rom6:11-Rom6:13); [JAS 4:8](https://ref.ly/Jas4:8)

### Faith

**[GAL 5:5](https://ref.ly/Gal5:5)** *See also* [ROM 1:17–1:18](https://ref.ly/Rom1:17-Rom1:18); [2TH 2:13](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:13)

### Obedience

**[1PE 1:22](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:22)** *See also* [PSA 119:9](https://ref.ly/Ps119:9); [JHN 17:17](https://ref.ly/John17:17); [ROM 6:16–6:19](https://ref.ly/Rom6:16-Rom6:19)

* **Associated Passages:** 2 Chronicles 7:16; 1 Kings 9:3; Exodus 20:11; Numbers 16:7; 2 Chronicles 29:11; Zechariah 2:12; Deuteronomy 7:6; Ephesians 1:4; Deuteronomy 14:2; Romans 1:7; Colossians 3:12; 1 Peter 1:2; 1 Peter 1:15; Exodus 29:42-43; Exodus 3:4-5; Exodus 19:23; 2 Chronicles 7:1-2; Exodus 19:5-6; Deuteronomy 28:9; Ezekiel 37:26-28; 1 Peter 2:9; 1 Thessalonians 5:23; Leviticus 20:8; Isaiah 4:3-4; Ezekiel 36:25; Zephaniah 1:7; Acts 15:9; Hebrews 2:11; Numbers 8:6-7; Exodus 19:14; Numbers 19:9; Nehemiah 12:30; Numbers 8:12-14; Exodus 29:35-37; Leviticus 8:14-15; Leviticus 16:5-10; Leviticus 16:15-22; Leviticus 16:29-30; Leviticus 8:10-12; Exodus 29:21; Exodus 40:9; Hebrews 10:10; Ephesians 5:25-27; Colossians 1:22; Hebrews 1:3; Hebrews 9:13-14; Hebrews 9:23-28; Hebrews 10:14; Hebrews 10:19-22; Hebrews 13:12; 1 John 1:7; 1 John 2:2; 1 John 4:10; 1 Corinthians 1:2; 1 Corinthians 1:30; 2 Thessalonians 2:13; John 3:5-8; Romans 15:16; 1 Corinthians 6:11; 1 Thessalonians 4:7-8; Titus 3:5; 1 John 1:9; Ezra 9:1-7; Ezra 10:1-4; Psalms 51:1-10; Acts 2:38; Romans 6:11-13; James 4:8; Galatians 5:5; Romans 1:17-18; 1 Peter 1:22; Psalms 119:9; John 17:17; Romans 6:16-19

## 8273: holiness, ethical aspects of (id: 8273)

Behaviour that reflects the holy character of God himself is to be expressed in both social and personal dimensions of life.

Holiness in practice is a reflection of God's own character
-----------------------------------------------------------

**[1PE 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15-1Pet1:16)** *See also* [LEV 11:44–11:45](https://ref.ly/Lev11:44-Lev11:45), [LEV 19:2](https://ref.ly/Lev19:2), [LEV 20:7](https://ref.ly/Lev20:7); [EPH 4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:24); [1JN 3:3](https://ref.ly/1John3:3)

Holiness demands a different way of life
----------------------------------------

### Shunning practices that defile

**[LEV 18:1–18:3](https://ref.ly/Lev18:1-Lev18:3)**; **[EPH 5:11–5:12](https://ref.ly/Eph5:11-Eph5:12)**; **[1TI 5:22](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:22)** *See also* [LEV 18:21–18:24](https://ref.ly/Lev18:21-Lev18:24), [LEV 18:29–18:30](https://ref.ly/Lev18:29-Lev18:30), [LEV 20:1–20:3](https://ref.ly/Lev20:1-Lev20:3), [LEV 20:6–20:7](https://ref.ly/Lev20:6-Lev20:7), [LEV 20:23–20:26](https://ref.ly/Lev20:23-Lev20:26), [LEV 21:7](https://ref.ly/Lev21:7); [2CO 6:17–7:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:17-2Cor7:1); [GAL 5:19–5:21](https://ref.ly/Gal5:19-Gal5:21), [GAL 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gal5:24); [EPH 5:3–5:7](https://ref.ly/Eph5:3-Eph5:7); [COL 3:5–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:5-Col3:10)

### Obedience to God's law

**[LEV 20:7–20:8](https://ref.ly/Lev20:7-Lev20:8)** *See also* [LEV 18:4–18:5](https://ref.ly/Lev18:4-Lev18:5), [LEV 19:37](https://ref.ly/Lev19:37); [DEU 6:25](https://ref.ly/Deut6:25), [DEU 28:9](https://ref.ly/Deut28:9); [PSA 119:9](https://ref.ly/Ps119:9); [ROM 7:12](https://ref.ly/Rom7:12); [1PE 1:22](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:22)

Holiness is expressed in social behaviour
-----------------------------------------

### Care for the disadvantaged

**[LEV 19:9–19:10](https://ref.ly/Lev19:9-Lev19:10)** *See also* [LEV 19:14](https://ref.ly/Lev19:14), [LEV 19:33–19:34](https://ref.ly/Lev19:33-Lev19:34); [1TI 5:3–5:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:3-1Tim5:4), [1TI 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:8); [JAS 1:27](https://ref.ly/Jas1:27)

### A concern for truth and justice

**[LEV 19:15–19:16](https://ref.ly/Lev19:15-Lev19:16)** *See also* [LEV 19:11–19:13](https://ref.ly/Lev19:11-Lev19:13), [LEV 19:35–19:37](https://ref.ly/Lev19:35-Lev19:37)

### Loving one's neighbour

**[LEV 19:18](https://ref.ly/Lev19:18)** *See also* [LEV 19:16–19:17](https://ref.ly/Lev19:16-Lev19:17) *Most of the OT law can be seen as an expression of holiness.*

Holiness is expressed in family and sexual relations
----------------------------------------------------

**[1TH 4:3–4:7](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:3-1Thess4:7)** *See also* [LEV 18:5–18:20](https://ref.ly/Lev18:5-Lev18:20), [LEV 18:22–18:23](https://ref.ly/Lev18:22-Lev18:23), [LEV 19:3](https://ref.ly/Lev19:3), [LEV 20:9](https://ref.ly/Lev20:9); [EPH 5:3](https://ref.ly/Eph5:3); [1CO 6:13–6:15](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:13-1Cor6:15), [1CO 6:18–6:19](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:18-1Cor6:19)

Holiness is seen in personal character
--------------------------------------

**[COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12)** *See also* [EPH 4:23–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:23-Eph4:24), [EPH 4:32–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:32-Eph5:2); [2TI 2:22](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:22)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Peter 1:15-16; Leviticus 11:44-45; Leviticus 19:2; Leviticus 20:7; Ephesians 4:24; 1 John 3:3; Leviticus 18:1-3; Ephesians 5:11-12; 1 Timothy 5:22; Leviticus 18:21-24; Leviticus 18:29-30; Leviticus 20:1-3; Leviticus 20:6-7; Leviticus 20:23-26; Leviticus 21:7; 2 Corinthians 6:17-7:1; Galatians 5:19-21; Galatians 5:24; Ephesians 5:3-7; Colossians 3:5-10; Leviticus 20:7-8; Leviticus 18:4-5; Leviticus 19:37; Deuteronomy 6:25; Deuteronomy 28:9; Psalms 119:9; Romans 7:12; 1 Peter 1:22; Leviticus 19:9-10; Leviticus 19:14; Leviticus 19:33-34; 1 Timothy 5:3-4; 1 Timothy 5:8; James 1:27; Leviticus 19:15-16; Leviticus 19:11-13; Leviticus 19:35-37; Leviticus 19:18; Leviticus 19:16-17; 1 Thessalonians 4:3-7; Leviticus 18:5-20; Leviticus 18:22-23; Leviticus 19:3; Leviticus 20:9; Ephesians 5:3; 1 Corinthians 6:13-15; 1 Corinthians 6:18-19; Colossians 3:12; Ephesians 4:23-24; Ephesians 4:32-5:2; 2 Timothy 2:22

## 8275: honesty (id: 8275)

Behaviour, in action and words, that aims to convey truth. This quality is an essential aspect of God's own nature and purposes, and is required of those whom he calls to be his people.

Honesty is integral to the gospel
---------------------------------

### The honesty of God

**[2SA 7:28](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:28)** *See also* [PSA 19:7](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7), [PSA 33:4](https://ref.ly/Ps33:4), [PSA 111:7](https://ref.ly/Ps111:7), [PSA 119:142](https://ref.ly/Ps119:142), [PSA 119:151](https://ref.ly/Ps119:151); [ISA 45:19](https://ref.ly/Isa45:19); [JER 10:10](https://ref.ly/Jer10:10); [JHN 7:28](https://ref.ly/John7:28); [ROM 3:4](https://ref.ly/Rom3:4); [1TH 1:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:9); [1JN 5:20](https://ref.ly/1John5:20); [REV 3:7](https://ref.ly/Rev3:7), [REV 15:2–15:3](https://ref.ly/Rev15:2-Rev15:3), [REV 19:9](https://ref.ly/Rev19:9)

The honesty demanded of believers
---------------------------------

**[PSA 15:1–15:2](https://ref.ly/Ps15:1-Ps15:2)**; **[2CO 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:2)** *See also* [EXO 18:21](https://ref.ly/Exod18:21)LEV [19:35–19:36](https://ref.ly/Exod19:35-Exod19:36); [DEU 25:13–25:16](https://ref.ly/Deut25:13-Deut25:16)[1KI 9:4–9:5](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:4-1Kgs9:5); [PRO 11:1](https://ref.ly/Prov11:1); [EZK 45:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek45:10); [ZEC 8:16–8:17](https://ref.ly/Zech8:16-Zech8:17); [JHN 4:23–4:24](https://ref.ly/John4:23-John4:24); [ROM 1:18](https://ref.ly/Rom1:18); [1CO 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:8)EPH [4:15](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:15), [EPH 4:25](https://ref.ly/Eph4:25)[PHP 4:81](https://ref.ly/Phil4:81)TI [3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8); [TIT 1:7](https://ref.ly/Titus1:7)[TIT 2:7–2:8](https://ref.ly/Titus2:7-Titus2:8)

The honesty of Jesus Christ
---------------------------

**[1PE 2:22](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:22)** *See also* [MAT 22:16](https://ref.ly/Matt22:16) parallel [MRK 12:14](https://ref.ly/Mark12:14) *Jesus Christ's opponents flattering Jesus Christ, but nevertheless speaking the truth.*

Other examples of honest behaviour commended by Scripture
---------------------------------------------------------

Jacob: [GEN 30:33](https://ref.ly/Gen30:33), [GEN 43:12](https://ref.ly/Gen43:12); [1SA 12:3–12:5](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:3-1Sam12:5) *Samuel*; ; [1KI 17:24](https://ref.ly/1Kgs17:24) *Elijah*; ; [1CH 29:17](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:17) *David*; ; [JOB 27:4](https://ref.ly/Job27:4) *Job*; ; [DAN 6:4](https://ref.ly/Dan6:4) *Daniel*; [ACT 24:16](https://ref.ly/Acts24:16); ; [2CO 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:12), [2CO 2:17](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:17), [2CO 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:2)

The cost of honesty
-------------------

**[JER 26:15](https://ref.ly/Jer26:15)** *See also* [PRO 17:26](https://ref.ly/Prov17:26), [PRO 29:10](https://ref.ly/Prov29:10), [PRO 29:27](https://ref.ly/Prov29:27); [ISA 59:14–59:15](https://ref.ly/Isa59:14-Isa59:15); [AMO 5:10](https://ref.ly/Amos5:10); [JHN 8:45–8:46](https://ref.ly/John8:45-John8:46), [JHN 18:23](https://ref.ly/John18:23); [GAL 4:16](https://ref.ly/Gal4:16)

## 8276: humility (id: 8276)

An attitude of lowliness and obedience, grounded in the recognition of one's status before God as his creatures.

God commands humility
---------------------

**[MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8)**; **[JAS 4:10](https://ref.ly/Jas4:10)**; **[1PE 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:8)** *See also* [EXO 10:3](https://ref.ly/Exod10:3); [PRO 16:19](https://ref.ly/Prov16:19); [ISA 57:15](https://ref.ly/Isa57:15), [ISA 58:5](https://ref.ly/Isa58:5); [ZEP 2:3](https://ref.ly/Zeph2:3); [LUK 14:9–14:11](https://ref.ly/Luke14:9-Luke14:11); [ROM 12:3](https://ref.ly/Rom12:3) *sober assessment of oneself*; [1CO 1:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:28); [EPH 4:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:2); [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12); [TIT 3:2](https://ref.ly/Titus3:2); [JAS 3:13](https://ref.ly/Jas3:13); [1PE 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:5)

God exalts the humble
---------------------

**[LUK 1:52](https://ref.ly/Luke1:52)** *See also* [2SA 7:8](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:8); [1KI 14:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs14:7)

Believers should humble themselves before God
---------------------------------------------

**[2CH 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:14)**; **[1PE 5:6](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:6)** *See also* [2SA 22:281](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:281)KI [21:29](https://ref.ly/2Sam21:29); [2KI 22:19](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:19); [2CH 12:6–12:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr12:6-2Chr12:7), [2CH 12:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr12:12), [2CH 30:11](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:11), [2CH 33:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr33:12), [2CH 33:19](https://ref.ly/2Chr33:19), [2CH 34:27](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:27)PSA [18:27](https://ref.ly/2Chr18:27), [PSA 25:9](https://ref.ly/Ps25:9), [PSA 138:6](https://ref.ly/Ps138:6), [PSA 147:6](https://ref.ly/Ps147:6), [PSA 149:4](https://ref.ly/Ps149:4); [PRO 3:34](https://ref.ly/Prov3:34), [PRO 18:12](https://ref.ly/Prov18:12); [JAS 4:6](https://ref.ly/Jas4:6); [ISA 29:19](https://ref.ly/Isa29:19), [ISA 38:15](https://ref.ly/Isa38:15), [ISA 57:15](https://ref.ly/Isa57:15); [PRO 15:33](https://ref.ly/Prov15:33), [PRO 22:4](https://ref.ly/Prov22:4)[PSA 35:13](https://ref.ly/Ps35:13); [JER 44:10](https://ref.ly/Jer44:10) *lack of humility linked with disobedience*

God humbles his people to renew and restore them
------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 44:9](https://ref.ly/Ps44:9)** *See also* [LEV 26:41](https://ref.ly/Lev26:41); [DEU 8:2](https://ref.ly/Deut8:2), [DEU 8:16](https://ref.ly/Deut8:16); [1KI 11:39](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:39); [2CH 28:19](https://ref.ly/2Chr28:19); [PSA 107:39](https://ref.ly/Ps107:39); [ISA 9:1](https://ref.ly/Isa9:1); [2CO 12:21](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:21)

God humbles the proud
---------------------

**[LUK 18:14](https://ref.ly/Luke18:14)** *See also* [1SA 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:7); [ISA 2:11](https://ref.ly/Isa2:11), [ISA 2:17](https://ref.ly/Isa2:17), [ISA 5:15](https://ref.ly/Isa5:15), [ISA 13:11](https://ref.ly/Isa13:11), [ISA 23:9](https://ref.ly/Isa23:9), [ISA 25:11](https://ref.ly/Isa25:11), [ISA 26:5](https://ref.ly/Isa26:5); [DAN 4:37](https://ref.ly/Dan4:37)

Examples of humble people
-------------------------

### Outstanding individuals

[GEN 32:10](https://ref.ly/Gen32:10) *Jacob*; ; [GEN 41:16](https://ref.ly/Gen41:16) *Joseph*; ; [NUM 12:3](https://ref.ly/Num12:3) *Moses*; ; [1SA 9:21](https://ref.ly/1Sam9:21) *Saul*; [1SA 18:18](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:18); ; [2SA 7:18](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:18); [1KI 3:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:7) *Solomon*; ; [DAN 2:30](https://ref.ly/Dan2:30) *Daniel*; ; [MAT 3:14](https://ref.ly/Matt3:14) *John the Baptist*; ; [LUK 1:43](https://ref.ly/Luke1:43) *Elizabeth*; ; [LUK 1:48](https://ref.ly/Luke1:48) *Mary, the mother of Jesus Christ*; [1TI 1:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:15); ; [ACT 20:19](https://ref.ly/Acts20:19)

### Other examples

[2SA 16:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam16:4); ; [PRO 6:3](https://ref.ly/Prov6:3), [PRO 11:2](https://ref.ly/Prov11:2), [PRO 16:19](https://ref.ly/Prov16:19), [PRO 29:23](https://ref.ly/Prov29:23); ; [DAN 5:22](https://ref.ly/Dan5:22); ; [MAT 8:8](https://ref.ly/Matt8:8), [MAT 15:27](https://ref.ly/Matt15:27), [MAT 18:4](https://ref.ly/Matt18:4)

The example of Jesus Christ
---------------------------

**[PHP 2:5–2:8](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5-Phil2:8)** [ISA 53:3–53:5](https://ref.ly/Isa53:3-Isa53:5), [ISA 53:7–53:8](https://ref.ly/Isa53:7-Isa53:8); ; [ZEC 9:9](https://ref.ly/Zech9:9) parallels [MAT 21:5](https://ref.ly/Matt21:5), [JHN 12:15](https://ref.ly/John12:15); [MAT 11:29](https://ref.ly/Matt11:29), [MAT 20:28](https://ref.ly/Matt20:28); ; [LUK 22:26–22:27](https://ref.ly/Luke22:26-Luke22:27); ; [JHN 13:4](https://ref.ly/John13:4); ; [2CO 8:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:9)

## 8277: innocence (id: 8277)

The state of being devoid of guilt, experience of sin or evil motives or thoughts. Scripture commends this state to believers.

* **Associated Articles:** 8278: innocence, teaching on (ID: `8278@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8279: innocence, examples of (ID: `8279@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8278: innocence, teaching on (id: 8278)

A highly valued quality to be eagerly sought. The OT stresses that the innocent deserve justice rather than evil. In the NT believers are encouraged to attain innocence.

Exhortations to be innocent
---------------------------

**[MAT 10:16](https://ref.ly/Matt10:16)** *See also* [PSA 32:2](https://ref.ly/Ps32:2); [ROM 16:19](https://ref.ly/Rom16:19); [PHP 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Phil2:14-Phil2:15); [1TH 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:13), [1TH 5:23](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:23); [2PE 3:14](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:14)

Ascribing innocence to people
-----------------------------

### Innocence is ultimately established by God

**[1CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:4)** *See also* [COL 1:21–1:22](https://ref.ly/Col1:21-Col1:22)

### The need to acquit the innocent

**[1KI 8:32](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:32)** *See also* [EXO 23:7](https://ref.ly/Exod23:7); [NUM 5:29–5:31](https://ref.ly/Num5:29-Num5:31); [DEU 25:1](https://ref.ly/Deut25:1); [PRO 17:15](https://ref.ly/Prov17:15), [PRO 18:5](https://ref.ly/Prov18:5)

### The danger of acquitting the guilty

**[PRO 17:15](https://ref.ly/Prov17:15)** *See also* [PRO 24:23–24:24](https://ref.ly/Prov24:23-Prov24:24)

The rewards of innocence
------------------------

**[PSA 15:1–15:5](https://ref.ly/Ps15:1-Ps15:5)** *See also* [REV 14:1–14:5](https://ref.ly/Rev14:1-Rev14:5)

The characteristics of innocence
--------------------------------

**[PRO 21:8](https://ref.ly/Prov21:8)** *See also* [PHP 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Phil2:14-Phil2:15), [PHP 4:8](https://ref.ly/Phil4:8)

The shedding of innocent blood
------------------------------

### Its prohibition

**[DEU 19:8–19:10](https://ref.ly/Deut19:8-Deut19:10)** *See also* [JER 22:3](https://ref.ly/Jer22:3)

### The guilt associated with it

**[JER 26:15](https://ref.ly/Jer26:15)** *See also* [DEU 19:11–19:13](https://ref.ly/Deut19:11-Deut19:13); [2KI 21:16](https://ref.ly/2Kgs21:16); [PSA 106:38](https://ref.ly/Ps106:38); [PRO 6:16–6:17](https://ref.ly/Prov6:16-Prov6:17); [ISA 59:7](https://ref.ly/Isa59:7); [JER 7:2–7:8](https://ref.ly/Jer7:2-Jer7:8)

### The need to purge the guilt

**[1KI 2:31–2:33](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:31-1Kgs2:33)** *See also* [DEU 21:1–21:9](https://ref.ly/Deut21:1-Deut21:9)

### The right to be avenged

**[2SA 4:9–4:11](https://ref.ly/2Sam4:9-2Sam4:11)** *See also* [NUM 35:16–35:28](https://ref.ly/Num35:16-Num35:28)

### Examples of those shedding innocent blood

**[MAT 27:3–27:4](https://ref.ly/Matt27:3-Matt27:4)** *See also* [2KI 24:1–24:4](https://ref.ly/2Kgs24:1-2Kgs24:4); [JON 1:14](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:14)

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 10:16; Psalms 32:2; Romans 16:19; Philippians 2:14-15; 1 Thessalonians 3:13; 1 Thessalonians 5:23; 2 Peter 3:14; 1 Corinthians 4:4; Colossians 1:21-22; 1 Kings 8:32; Exodus 23:7; Numbers 5:29-31; Deuteronomy 25:1; Proverbs 17:15; Proverbs 18:5; Proverbs 24:23-24; Psalms 15:1-5; Revelation 14:1-5; Proverbs 21:8; Philippians 4:8; Deuteronomy 19:8-10; Jeremiah 22:3; Jeremiah 26:15; Deuteronomy 19:11-13; 2 Kings 21:16; Psalms 106:38; Proverbs 6:16-17; Isaiah 59:7; Jeremiah 7:2-8; 1 Kings 2:31-33; Deuteronomy 21:1-9; 2 Samuel 4:9-11; Numbers 35:16-28; Matthew 27:3-4; 2 Kings 24:1-4; Jonah 1:14

## 8279: innocence, examples of (id: 8279)

Innocence is displayed most purely in Jesus Christ but is also ascribed to others.

Examples of innocence
---------------------

### Innocence before the fall

**[GEN 2:25](https://ref.ly/Gen2:25)**

### The innocence of Jesus Christ

**[1PE 2:22](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:22)** *See also* [ISA 53:9](https://ref.ly/Isa53:9); [MAT 27:19](https://ref.ly/Matt27:19); [LUK 23:41](https://ref.ly/Luke23:41); [JHN 8:46](https://ref.ly/John8:46); [2CO 5:21](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:21); [HEB 4:15](https://ref.ly/Heb4:15); [1JN 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/1John3:4-1John3:5)

### Innocence in others

**[JOB 9:21](https://ref.ly/Job9:21)**; **[JHN 1:47](https://ref.ly/John1:47)** *See also* [GEN 6:9](https://ref.ly/Gen6:9) *Noah*; [JDG 21:20–21:22](https://ref.ly/Judg21:20-Judg21:22) *the assembly of Israel*; [2SA 11:6–11:13](https://ref.ly/2Sam11:6-2Sam11:13) *Uriah*; [JOB 9:15](https://ref.ly/Job9:15) *Job*; [DAN 6:22](https://ref.ly/Dan6:22) *Daniel*; [2CO 7:10–7:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:10-2Cor7:11) *the Corinthians*

The varied experiences of innocence
-----------------------------------

### Loss of innocence

[GEN 3:1–3:13](https://ref.ly/Gen3:1-Gen3:13)

### The innocent wronged

**[ISA 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Isa5:22-Isa5:23)** *See also* [1SA 19:4–19:5](https://ref.ly/1Sam19:4-1Sam19:5); [2SA 13:1–13:14](https://ref.ly/2Sam13:1-2Sam13:14); [ISA 29:20–29:21](https://ref.ly/Isa29:20-Isa29:21); [MAT 2:16](https://ref.ly/Matt2:16), [MAT 12:1–12:7](https://ref.ly/Matt12:1-Matt12:7); [JAS 5:6](https://ref.ly/Jas5:6)

### Admissions of lack of innocence

**[2KI 10:9](https://ref.ly/2Kgs10:9)** *See also* [GEN 44:1–44:16](https://ref.ly/Gen44:1-Gen44:16)

### Claims to innocence

**[JOB 34:5–34:6](https://ref.ly/Job34:5-Job34:6)** *See also* [GEN 20:1–20:5](https://ref.ly/Gen20:1-Gen20:5); [2SA 3:26–3:28](https://ref.ly/2Sam3:26-2Sam3:28); [ISA 50:8–50:9](https://ref.ly/Isa50:8-Isa50:9); [ACT 20:25–20:27](https://ref.ly/Acts20:25-Acts20:27)

### False claims to innocence

**[JER 2:34–2:35](https://ref.ly/Jer2:34-Jer2:35)** *See also* [MAT 27:24](https://ref.ly/Matt27:24)

### Washing hands to signify innocence

**[MAT 27:24](https://ref.ly/Matt27:24)** *See also* [PSA 26:6](https://ref.ly/Ps26:6), [PSA 73:13](https://ref.ly/Ps73:13)

### A distorted view of innocence

**[PRO 16:2](https://ref.ly/Prov16:2)** *See also* [JOB 4:7](https://ref.ly/Job4:7), [JOB 9:23](https://ref.ly/Job9:23), [JOB 9:28](https://ref.ly/Job9:28)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 2:25; 1 Peter 2:22; Isaiah 53:9; Matthew 27:19; Luke 23:41; John 8:46; 2 Corinthians 5:21; Hebrews 4:15; 1 John 3:4-5; Job 9:21; John 1:47; Genesis 6:9; Judges 21:20-22; 2 Samuel 11:6-13; Job 9:15; Daniel 6:22; 2 Corinthians 7:10-11; Genesis 3:1-13; Isaiah 5:22-23; 1 Samuel 19:4-5; 2 Samuel 13:1-14; Isaiah 29:20-21; Matthew 2:16; Matthew 12:1-7; James 5:6; 2 Kings 10:9; Genesis 44:1-16; Job 34:5-6; Genesis 20:1-5; 2 Samuel 3:26-28; Isaiah 50:8-9; Acts 20:25-27; Jeremiah 2:34-35; Matthew 27:24; Psalms 26:6; Psalms 73:13; Proverbs 16:2; Job 4:7; Job 9:23; Job 9:28

## 8281: insight (id: 8281)

The spiritual quality that enables a person to appreciate God's mind and will in matters of behaviour, truth and providence, especially where right perception is not obvious. Insight is akin to wisdom and understanding. It is given by God and is to be sought by believers.

Insight is given by God
-----------------------

**[2TI 2:7](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:7)** *See also* [PRO 2:6](https://ref.ly/Prov2:6)

### Insight through angelic instruction

[JOB 33:23](https://ref.ly/Job33:23); ; [DAN 9:20–9:22](https://ref.ly/Dan9:20-Dan9:22)

### Insight through Jesus Christ's teaching

**[LUK 24:45–24:47](https://ref.ly/Luke24:45-Luke24:47)** *See also* [LUK 24:27](https://ref.ly/Luke24:27); [MAT 16:12](https://ref.ly/Matt16:12)

### Insight through the Holy Spirit

**[1CO 2:9–2:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:9-1Cor2:13)** *See also* [ISA 64:4](https://ref.ly/Isa64:4); [EPH 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Eph3:4-Eph3:5)

### Human insight cannot comprehend spiritual truth

**[1CO 2:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:14)** *See also* [JOB 9:11](https://ref.ly/Job9:11); [1CO 1:20–1:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:20-1Cor1:21)

Insight into spiritual truth
----------------------------

### Insight into the truth about Jesus Christ

**[COL 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Col2:2-Col2:3)** *See also* [JHN 16:12–16:15](https://ref.ly/John16:12-John16:15)

### Insight into the believer's hope and power

[EPH 1:18–1:19](https://ref.ly/Eph1:18-Eph1:19)

### Insight into the make\-up of the church

[ACT 10:34–10:35](https://ref.ly/Acts10:34-Acts10:35); ; [EPH 3:2–3:6](https://ref.ly/Eph3:2-Eph3:6)

### Insight into the number of the beast

[REV 13:18](https://ref.ly/Rev13:18)

Insight into the providence of God
----------------------------------

### Joseph's insight

**[GEN 50:20](https://ref.ly/Gen50:20)** *See also* [GEN 45:4–45:8](https://ref.ly/Gen45:4-Gen45:8)

### David's insight

[2SA 5:12](https://ref.ly/2Sam5:12) parallel [1CH 14:2](https://ref.ly/1Chr14:2)

### Job's insight

**[JOB 42:1–42:6](https://ref.ly/Job42:1-Job42:6)** *Job does not learn why he has suffered, but reaffirms his trust in God's superior wisdom and power.* *See also* [JOB 15:9](https://ref.ly/Job15:9) *Human insight into Job's suffering did not bring enlightenment*; [JOB 26:3](https://ref.ly/Job26:3), [JOB 34:35](https://ref.ly/Job34:35)

Insight into correct behaviour
------------------------------

**[PHP 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9-Phil1:11)** *See also* [PRO 28:7](https://ref.ly/Prov28:7); [COL 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:9-Col1:10); [PSA 19:12](https://ref.ly/Ps19:12) *discerning one's own faults*; [PSA 119:34](https://ref.ly/Ps119:34) *understanding God's law*; [PRO 5:1–5:4](https://ref.ly/Prov5:1-Prov5:4) *avoiding evil*

Insight into the truth about people
-----------------------------------

[2KI 4:8–4:9](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:8-2Kgs4:9) *The Shunammite woman recognises Elisha as a man of God*; ; [NEH 6:1–6:2](https://ref.ly/Neh6:1-Neh6:2) *Nehemiah discerns the motives of his enemies*; ; [MAT 9:3–9:4](https://ref.ly/Matt9:3-Matt9:4) parallels [MRK 2:6–2:8](https://ref.ly/Mark2:6-Mark2:8), [LUK 5:21–5:22](https://ref.ly/Luke5:21-Luke5:22) *Jesus Christ is aware of the evil thoughts of the Pharisees and the teachers of the law*; ; [JHN 4:19](https://ref.ly/John4:19) *The woman of Samaria understands some of the truth about Jesus Christ.*

Insight is to be sought
-----------------------

**[PRO 2:3–2:5](https://ref.ly/Prov2:3-Prov2:5)** *See also* [PRO 3:21](https://ref.ly/Prov3:21), [PRO 18:15](https://ref.ly/Prov18:15)

### Asking God for insight

**[JAS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5)** *See also* [1KI 3:9–3:12](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:9-1Kgs3:12) parallel [2CH 1:10–1:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr1:10-2Chr1:12)

### Insight through meditation on God's word

**[PSA 119:98–119:100](https://ref.ly/Ps119:98-Ps119:100)** *See also* [PSA 119:104](https://ref.ly/Ps119:104); [DAN 9:2](https://ref.ly/Dan9:2); [MAT 22:29](https://ref.ly/Matt22:29) parallel [MRK 12:24](https://ref.ly/Mark12:24)

Examples of people of insight
-----------------------------

[1KI 4:29–4:34](https://ref.ly/1Kgs4:29-1Kgs4:34) *Solomon*; ; [1CH 27:32](https://ref.ly/1Chr27:32) *Jonathan, David's uncle*; ; [DAN 5:11](https://ref.ly/Dan5:11) *Daniel*

Examples of lack of insight
---------------------------

[MAT 16:9–16:11](https://ref.ly/Matt16:9-Matt16:11) parallel [MRK 8:17–8:21](https://ref.ly/Mark8:17-Mark8:21) *Jesus Christ's disciples*; ; [MAT 16:22](https://ref.ly/Matt16:22) parallel [MRK 8:32](https://ref.ly/Mark8:32) *Simon Peter*; ; [LUK 24:25](https://ref.ly/Luke24:25) *Cleopas and his companion*; ; [JHN 3:10](https://ref.ly/John3:10) *Nicodemus*; ; [JHN 20:2](https://ref.ly/John20:2) *Mary Magdalene*

* **Associated Passages:** 2 Timothy 2:7; Proverbs 2:6; Job 33:23; Daniel 9:20-22; Luke 24:45-47; Luke 24:27; Matthew 16:12; 1 Corinthians 2:9-13; Isaiah 64:4; Ephesians 3:4-5; 1 Corinthians 2:14; Job 9:11; 1 Corinthians 1:20-21; Colossians 2:2-3; John 16:12-15; Ephesians 1:18-19; Acts 10:34-35; Ephesians 3:2-6; Revelation 13:18; Genesis 50:20; Genesis 45:4-8; 2 Samuel 5:12; 1 Chronicles 14:2; Job 42:1-6; Job 15:9; Job 26:3; Job 34:35; Philippians 1:9-11; Proverbs 28:7; Colossians 1:9-10; Psalms 19:12; Psalms 119:34; Proverbs 5:1-4; 2 Kings 4:8-9; Nehemiah 6:1-2; Matthew 9:3-4; Mark 2:6-8; Luke 5:21-22; John 4:19; Proverbs 2:3-5; Proverbs 3:21; Proverbs 18:15; James 1:5; 1 Kings 3:9-12; 2 Chronicles 1:10-12; Psalms 119:98-100; Psalms 119:104; Daniel 9:2; Matthew 22:29; Mark 12:24; 1 Kings 4:29-34; 1 Chronicles 27:32; Daniel 5:11; Matthew 16:9-11; Mark 8:17-21; Matthew 16:22; Mark 8:32; Luke 24:25; John 3:10; John 20:2
* **Associated Articles:** 1180: God, wisdom of (ID: `1180@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1441: revelation, necessity of (ID: `1441@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1466: vision (ID: `1466@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1614: Scripture, understanding (ID: `1614@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2045: Jesus Christ, knowledge of (ID: `2045@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5026: knowledge (ID: `5026@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5149: eyes (ID: `5149@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5191: thought (ID: `5191@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8226: discernment (ID: `8226@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8319: perception, spiritual (ID: `8319@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8355: understanding (ID: `8355@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8361: wisdom (ID: `8361@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8419: enlightenment (ID: `8419@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8474: seeing God (ID: `8474@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8282: intolerance (id: 8282)

Unwillingness to allow or permit something beyond certain levels. God's intolerance should be the model for God's people, but they should avoid becoming wrongly intolerant.

God is intolerant of evil
-------------------------

### God is pure and cannot tolerate evil

**[HAB 1:13](https://ref.ly/Hab1:13)** *See also* [NUM 25:3](https://ref.ly/Num25:3); [JOS 7:1](https://ref.ly/Josh7:1); [2SA 6:7](https://ref.ly/2Sam6:7) parallel [1CH 13:10](https://ref.ly/1Chr13:10); [2KI 17:11](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:11); [PSA 5:6](https://ref.ly/Ps5:6); [ROM 1:18](https://ref.ly/Rom1:18); [REV 21:27](https://ref.ly/Rev21:27)

### God demonstrates his intolerance as the last resort

**[JER 44:22](https://ref.ly/Jer44:22)** *See also* [EXO 4:10–4:14](https://ref.ly/Exod4:10-Exod4:14), [EXO 34:6–34:7](https://ref.ly/Exod34:6-Exod34:7); [NUM 14:18](https://ref.ly/Num14:18); [NEH 9:30](https://ref.ly/Neh9:30); [ACT 17:30](https://ref.ly/Acts17:30); [ROM 2:3–2:5](https://ref.ly/Rom2:3-Rom2:5)

Human intolerance should reflect God's attitudes
------------------------------------------------

### Human intolerance of God's enemies

**[JDG 5:31](https://ref.ly/Judg5:31)** *See also* [1SA 17:26](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:26); [PSA 69:9](https://ref.ly/Ps69:9); [MAT 26:51](https://ref.ly/Matt26:51) parallels [MRK 14:47](https://ref.ly/Mark14:47), [LUK 22:50](https://ref.ly/Luke22:50); [JHN 18:10](https://ref.ly/John18:10); [EPH 5:6–5:7](https://ref.ly/Eph5:6-Eph5:7)

### Human intolerance of ungodliness

**[EXO 32:19–32:20](https://ref.ly/Exod32:19-Exod32:20)** *See also* [DEU 6:13–6:15](https://ref.ly/Deut6:13-Deut6:15); [PSA 119:115](https://ref.ly/Ps119:115); [1TI 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:7); [2TI 2:16](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:16), [2TI 3:5](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:5); [TIT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Titus2:12)

### Human intolerance of error

**[TIT 3:10](https://ref.ly/Titus3:10)** *See also* [ACT 17:11](https://ref.ly/Acts17:11), [ACT 20:30–20:31](https://ref.ly/Acts20:30-Acts20:31); [GAL 5:11–5:12](https://ref.ly/Gal5:11-Gal5:12); [EPH 5:6–5:7](https://ref.ly/Eph5:6-Eph5:7); [COL 2:8](https://ref.ly/Col2:8); [HEB 13:9](https://ref.ly/Heb13:9)

### Human intolerance of evil and sinfulness

**[REV 2:20](https://ref.ly/Rev2:20)** *See also* [JOB 28:28](https://ref.ly/Job28:28); [PSA 34:14](https://ref.ly/Ps34:14), [PSA 101:4–101:5](https://ref.ly/Ps101:4-Ps101:5); [MAT 5:30](https://ref.ly/Matt5:30); [ROM 6:12](https://ref.ly/Rom6:12), [ROM 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rom12:9); [EPH 4:25](https://ref.ly/Eph4:25); [2TH 3:6](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:6); [REV 2:2](https://ref.ly/Rev2:2)

Human intolerance can be misguided
----------------------------------

### It can be a form of hypocrisy

**[LUK 6:41–6:42](https://ref.ly/Luke6:41-Luke6:42)** *See also* [MAT 23:29–23:30](https://ref.ly/Matt23:29-Matt23:30); [LUK 13:14–13:15](https://ref.ly/Luke13:14-Luke13:15); [JHN 12:5–12:6](https://ref.ly/John12:5-John12:6)

### It can amount to exclusiveness

**[MAT 23:13](https://ref.ly/Matt23:13)** *See also* [ACT 15:1](https://ref.ly/Acts15:1)

### It can be a form of oppression

Intolerance of minority, afflicted or underprivileged groups oftens leads to oppression: [EXO 1:11–1:14](https://ref.ly/Exod1:11-Exod1:14), [EXO 23:9](https://ref.ly/Exod23:9); ; [PRO 14:31](https://ref.ly/Prov14:31), [PRO 28:3](https://ref.ly/Prov28:3); ; [ECC 5:8](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:8); ; [MAT 20:31](https://ref.ly/Matt20:31) parallels [MRK 10:48](https://ref.ly/Mark10:48), [LUK 18:39](https://ref.ly/Luke18:39)

### It can be harshly condemnatory

**[JHN 8:5](https://ref.ly/John8:5)** *See also* [NUM 21:4–21:5](https://ref.ly/Num21:4-Num21:5); [EST 3:8](https://ref.ly/Esth3:8); [MAT 23:34–23:35](https://ref.ly/Matt23:34-Matt23:35); [JHN 7:45–7:51](https://ref.ly/John7:45-John7:51), [JHN 16:2](https://ref.ly/John16:2)

### It can be a form of bigotry

**[JHN 15:19](https://ref.ly/John15:19)** *See also* [NUM 11:27–11:29](https://ref.ly/Num11:27-Num11:29); [JDG 12:5–12:6](https://ref.ly/Judg12:5-Judg12:6); [MAT 21:15–21:16](https://ref.ly/Matt21:15-Matt21:16), [MAT 23:16](https://ref.ly/Matt23:16), [MAT 23:18](https://ref.ly/Matt23:18)

Intolerance is usually a matter of decision
-------------------------------------------

### Intolerance leading to a good decision

**[LUK 18:4–18:5](https://ref.ly/Luke18:4-Luke18:5)** *See also* [LUK 11:7–11:8](https://ref.ly/Luke11:7-Luke11:8)

### Intolerance leading to a bad decision

**[MAT 19:13–19:14](https://ref.ly/Matt19:13-Matt19:14)** parallels [MRK 10:13–10:14](https://ref.ly/Mark10:13-Mark10:14), [LUK 18:15–18:16](https://ref.ly/Luke18:15-Luke18:16) *The disciples' intolerance is counteracted by Jesus Christ's tolerance.*

* **Associated Passages:** Habakkuk 1:13; Numbers 25:3; Joshua 7:1; 2 Samuel 6:7; 1 Chronicles 13:10; 2 Kings 17:11; Psalms 5:6; Romans 1:18; Revelation 21:27; Jeremiah 44:22; Exodus 4:10-14; Exodus 34:6-7; Numbers 14:18; Nehemiah 9:30; Acts 17:30; Romans 2:3-5; Judges 5:31; 1 Samuel 17:26; Psalms 69:9; Matthew 26:51; Mark 14:47; Luke 22:50; John 18:10; Ephesians 5:6-7; Exodus 32:19-20; Deuteronomy 6:13-15; Psalms 119:115; 1 Timothy 4:7; 2 Timothy 2:16; 2 Timothy 3:5; Titus 2:12; Titus 3:10; Acts 17:11; Acts 20:30-31; Galatians 5:11-12; Colossians 2:8; Hebrews 13:9; Revelation 2:20; Job 28:28; Psalms 34:14; Psalms 101:4-5; Matthew 5:30; Romans 6:12; Romans 12:9; Ephesians 4:25; 2 Thessalonians 3:6; Revelation 2:2; Luke 6:41-42; Matthew 23:29-30; Luke 13:14-15; John 12:5-6; Matthew 23:13; Acts 15:1; Exodus 1:11-14; Exodus 23:9; Proverbs 14:31; Proverbs 28:3; Ecclesiastes 5:8; Matthew 20:31; Mark 10:48; Luke 18:39; John 8:5; Numbers 21:4-5; Esther 3:8; Matthew 23:34-35; John 7:45-51; John 16:2; John 15:19; Numbers 11:27-29; Judges 12:5-6; Matthew 21:15-16; Matthew 23:16; Matthew 23:18; Luke 18:4-5; Luke 11:7-8; Matthew 19:13-14; Mark 10:13-14; Luke 18:15-16
* **Associated Articles:** 1025: God, anger of (ID: `1025@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1095: God, patience of (ID: `1095@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1125: God, righteousness of (ID: `1125@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5883: impatience (ID: `5883@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6020: sin (ID: `6020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8326: purity, moral and spiritual (ID: `8326@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8353: tolerance (ID: `8353@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8734: evil (ID: `8734@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8750: false teachings (ID: `8750@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8771: idolatry, objections to (ID: `8771@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8790: oppression (ID: `8790@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8800: prejudice (ID: `8800@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8283: joy (id: 8283)

A quality or attitude of delight and happiness, which is ultimately grounded in the work of God as Father, Son and Holy Spirit. Among the many situations in which joy is experienced, Scripture recognises as supreme being accepted in the presence of God.

* **Associated Articles:** 8284: joy, of God (ID: `8284@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8285: joy, of Jesus Christ (ID: `8285@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8286: joy, of Holy Spirit (ID: `8286@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8287: joy, and human experience (ID: `8287@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8288: joy, of Israel (ID: `8288@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8289: joy, of the church (ID: `8289@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8284: joy, of God (id: 8284)

See [1070: God, joy of](1070.md)



## 8285: joy, of Jesus Christ (id: 8285)

See [2039: Jesus Christ, joy of](2039.md)



## 8286: joy, of Holy Spirit (id: 8286)

See [3020: Holy Spirit, joy of](3020.md)



## 8287: joy, and human experience (id: 8287)

Joy is experienced naturally in many circumstances of life and in human relationships. It is especially important in the life of God's people, who experience joy in response to all that God has done for them.

Poetic images of joy in creation
--------------------------------

**[PSA 96:11–96:13](https://ref.ly/Ps96:11-Ps96:13)** parallel [1CH 16:31–16:33](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:31-1Chr16:33) *See also* [JOB 39:13](https://ref.ly/Job39:13); [PSA 65:12–65:13](https://ref.ly/Ps65:12-Ps65:13), [PSA 89:12](https://ref.ly/Ps89:12), [PSA 97:1](https://ref.ly/Ps97:1), [PSA 100:1](https://ref.ly/Ps100:1); [ISA 35:1–35:2](https://ref.ly/Isa35:1-Isa35:2), [ISA 49:13](https://ref.ly/Isa49:13)

Joy arising from specific circumstances
---------------------------------------

### Joy because of the birth of children

**[LUK 1:13–1:15](https://ref.ly/Luke1:13-Luke1:15)** *See also* [GEN 30:12–30:13](https://ref.ly/Gen30:12-Gen30:13); [LUK 1:58](https://ref.ly/Luke1:58)

### Joy because of victory and deliverance

[EXO 18:9](https://ref.ly/Exod18:9); ; [1SA 18:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:6); ; [JER 41:13](https://ref.ly/Jer41:13); ; [ZEC 10:7](https://ref.ly/Zech10:7)

### Joy because of the behaviour of others

**[PRO 15:30](https://ref.ly/Prov15:30)** *See also* [PRO 23:24–23:25](https://ref.ly/Prov23:24-Prov23:25); [MAT 14:6–14:7](https://ref.ly/Matt14:6-Matt14:7); [HEB 13:17](https://ref.ly/Heb13:17)

### Joy because of God's blessings in everyday life

**[ECC 5:19–5:20](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:19-Eccl5:20)**

Joy arising from relationships
------------------------------

**[PHP 4:1](https://ref.ly/Phil4:1)** *See also* [PRO 5:18](https://ref.ly/Prov5:18); [SNG 1:4](https://ref.ly/Song1:4), [SNG 3:11](https://ref.ly/Song3:11); [ROM 12:15](https://ref.ly/Rom12:15), [ROM 15:26–15:27](https://ref.ly/Rom15:26-Rom15:27); [1CO 12:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:26); [PHP 1:4–1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:4-Phil1:6); [PHM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:7)

God's people find their joy in him
----------------------------------

**[PSA 4:7](https://ref.ly/Ps4:7), [PSA 16:11](https://ref.ly/Ps16:11)**; **[HAB 3:17–3:18](https://ref.ly/Hab3:17-Hab3:18)**; **[PHP 3:1](https://ref.ly/Phil3:1)** *See also* [1CH 16:10](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:10); [PSA 43:4](https://ref.ly/Ps43:4); [PHP 1:23–1:26](https://ref.ly/Phil1:23-Phil1:26) *knowing Jesus Christ*; [PHP 4:4](https://ref.ly/Phil4:4)

### God himself gives joy to his people

[NEH 12:43](https://ref.ly/Neh12:43); ; [JOB 8:21](https://ref.ly/Job8:21); ; [ECC 2:26](https://ref.ly/Eccl2:26); ; [ISA 9:3](https://ref.ly/Isa9:3); ; [ACT 13:52](https://ref.ly/Acts13:52), [ACT 14:15–14:17](https://ref.ly/Acts14:15-Acts14:17)

### Reasons for God's people to know joy

[1SA 2:1](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:1) *God's deliverance*; ; [2CH 6:41](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:41) *God's goodness*; ; [JOB 22:22–22:26](https://ref.ly/Job22:22-Job22:26) *repentance*; ; [PSA 19:8](https://ref.ly/Ps19:8) *the rightness of God's precepts*; ; [PSA 94:19](https://ref.ly/Ps94:19) *God's consolation*; ; [PSA 122:1](https://ref.ly/Ps122:1) *being in God's presence*; ; [ISA 25:9](https://ref.ly/Isa25:9) *God's salvation*; ; [ISA 58:13–58:14](https://ref.ly/Isa58:13-Isa58:14) *honouring the Sabbath*; ; [JER 15:16](https://ref.ly/Jer15:16) *God's words*; ; [JER 31:12](https://ref.ly/Jer31:12) *God's generosity*; ; [LUK 1:46–1:49](https://ref.ly/Luke1:46-Luke1:49) *recognition by God*; ; [ROM 15:13](https://ref.ly/Rom15:13) *trusting God*

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 96:11-13; 1 Chronicles 16:31-33; Job 39:13; Psalms 65:12-13; Psalms 89:12; Psalms 97:1; Psalms 100:1; Isaiah 35:1-2; Isaiah 49:13; Luke 1:13-15; Genesis 30:12-13; Luke 1:58; Exodus 18:9; 1 Samuel 18:6; Jeremiah 41:13; Zechariah 10:7; Proverbs 15:30; Proverbs 23:24-25; Matthew 14:6-7; Hebrews 13:17; Ecclesiastes 5:19-20; Philippians 4:1; Proverbs 5:18; Song of Songs 1:4; Song of Songs 3:11; Romans 12:15; Romans 15:26-27; 1 Corinthians 12:26; Philippians 1:4-6; Philemon 1:7; Psalms 4:7; Psalms 16:11; Habakkuk 3:17-18; Philippians 3:1; 1 Chronicles 16:10; Psalms 43:4; Philippians 1:23-26; Philippians 4:4; Nehemiah 12:43; Job 8:21; Ecclesiastes 2:26; Isaiah 9:3; Acts 13:52; Acts 14:15-17; 1 Samuel 2:1; 2 Chronicles 6:41; Job 22:22-26; Psalms 19:8; Psalms 94:19; Psalms 122:1; Isaiah 25:9; Isaiah 58:13-14; Jeremiah 15:16; Jeremiah 31:12; Luke 1:46-49; Romans 15:13

## 8288: joy, of Israel (id: 8288)

Joy is characteristic of Israel's corporate worship, especially the great festivals.

Joy expressed in and through Israel's life of worship
-----------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 100:1–100:4](https://ref.ly/Ps100:1-Ps100:4)** *See also* [NUM 10:10](https://ref.ly/Num10:10); [DEU 27:6–27:7](https://ref.ly/Deut27:6-Deut27:7); [PSA 98:4–98:6](https://ref.ly/Ps98:4-Ps98:6), [PSA 132:6–132:9](https://ref.ly/Ps132:6-Ps132:9), [PSA 149:2–149:5](https://ref.ly/Ps149:2-Ps149:5); [ISA 30:29](https://ref.ly/Isa30:29); [ZEC 8:19](https://ref.ly/Zech8:19)LEV [23:39–23:41](https://ref.ly/Zech23:39-Zech23:41); [DEU 16:13–16:152](https://ref.ly/Deut16:13-Deut16:152)CH [30:21–30:23](https://ref.ly/Deut30:21-Deut30:23), [2CH 30:26–30:27](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:26-2Chr30:27)

Joy expressed by the individual as a result of faith
----------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 16:8–16:9](https://ref.ly/Ps16:8-Ps16:9), [PSA 28:7](https://ref.ly/Ps28:7)** *See also* [JOB 6:10](https://ref.ly/Job6:10), [JOB 33:26](https://ref.ly/Job33:26); [PSA 5:11](https://ref.ly/Ps5:11), [PSA 21:1](https://ref.ly/Ps21:1), [PSA 71:23](https://ref.ly/Ps71:23), [PSA 92:4](https://ref.ly/Ps92:4), [PSA 104:34](https://ref.ly/Ps104:34), [PSA 119:14](https://ref.ly/Ps119:14), [PSA 119:174](https://ref.ly/Ps119:174); [PRO 10:28](https://ref.ly/Prov10:28); [ISA 61:10](https://ref.ly/Isa61:10)

Joy experienced by the nation as the people of God
--------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 20:5](https://ref.ly/Ps20:5)**; **[ISA 51:11](https://ref.ly/Isa51:11)**; **[JER 31:12–31:13](https://ref.ly/Jer31:12-Jer31:13)** *See also* [DEU 26:11](https://ref.ly/Deut26:11); [PSA 53:6](https://ref.ly/Ps53:6), [PSA 105:43](https://ref.ly/Ps105:43), [PSA 145:7](https://ref.ly/Ps145:7)

### Joy predicted in prophetic assurances of restoration and blessing

**[ISA 51:3](https://ref.ly/Isa51:3)** *See also* [ISA 52:8–52:9](https://ref.ly/Isa52:8-Isa52:9), [ISA 55:12](https://ref.ly/Isa55:12), [ISA 60:4–60:5](https://ref.ly/Isa60:4-Isa60:5), [ISA 66:10–66:11](https://ref.ly/Isa66:10-Isa66:11); [JER 30:18–30:19](https://ref.ly/Jer30:18-Jer30:19), [JER 31:4](https://ref.ly/Jer31:4), [JER 31:7](https://ref.ly/Jer31:7); [JOL 2:21–2:23](https://ref.ly/Joel2:21-Joel2:23); [ZEP 3:14](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:14); [ZEC 9:9](https://ref.ly/Zech9:9)

Joy at times of national celebration
------------------------------------

### The anointing of kings

**[1KI 1:39–1:40](https://ref.ly/1Kgs1:39-1Kgs1:40)** *See also* [1CH 29:21–29:22](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:21-1Chr29:22); [2CH 23:12–23:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr23:12-2Chr23:13)

### The consecration of the temple

**[1KI 8:64–8:66](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:64-1Kgs8:66)** parallel [2CH 7:1–7:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:1-2Chr7:10) *See also* [1CH 29:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:9), [1CH 29:17](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:17)

### Consecration of the temple in the reign of King Hezekiah

**[2CH 29:36](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:36)**

### Deliverance of the Jews through Queen Esther

**[EST 8:15–8:17](https://ref.ly/Esth8:15-Esth8:17)** *See also* [EST 9:20–9:22](https://ref.ly/Esth9:20-Esth9:22)

### The rebuilding of the temple and Jerusalem

**[EZR 6:16](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:16)** *See also* [EZR 3:10–3:13](https://ref.ly/Ezra3:10-Ezra3:13), [EZR 6:22](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:22); [NEH 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/Neh3:16-Neh3:17), [NEH 12:27](https://ref.ly/Neh12:27)

Other nations encouraged to share Israel's joy
----------------------------------------------
