## 8289: joy, of the church (id: 8289)

The church is to rejoice in the salvation brought about by Jesus Christ's faithful life and death, and by the power of his resurrection. Even in adversity, believers know the joy of Jesus Christ.

Joy at the coming of Jesus Christ
---------------------------------

**[LUK 2:8–2:11](https://ref.ly/Luke2:8-Luke2:11)** *See also* [JHN 3:27–3:29](https://ref.ly/John3:27-John3:29), [JHN 8:56](https://ref.ly/John8:56)

Joy as the hallmark of the kingdom of God
-----------------------------------------

**[GAL 5:22](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22)** *See also* [MAT 13:44](https://ref.ly/Matt13:44); [LUK 10:17–10:21](https://ref.ly/Luke10:17-Luke10:21), [LUK 15:4–15:10](https://ref.ly/Luke15:4-Luke15:10) parallel [MAT 18:12–18:14](https://ref.ly/Matt18:12-Matt18:14); [JHN 4:34–4:36](https://ref.ly/John4:34-John4:36), [JHN 16:20–16:24](https://ref.ly/John16:20-John16:24), [JHN 17:13](https://ref.ly/John17:13); [ROM 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rom12:12), [ROM 14:17–14:18](https://ref.ly/Rom14:17-Rom14:18); [1TH 5:16–5:18](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:16-1Thess5:18)

### Jesus Christ promises joy to his disciples

**[JHN 15:9–15:11](https://ref.ly/John15:9-John15:11)** *See also* [MAT 5:11–5:12](https://ref.ly/Matt5:11-Matt5:12) parallel [LUK 6:22–6:23](https://ref.ly/Luke6:22-Luke6:23); [JHN 16:20–16:24](https://ref.ly/John16:20-John16:24), [JHN 17:13](https://ref.ly/John17:13)

### Joy among believers

**[ACT 2:46–2:47](https://ref.ly/Acts2:46-Acts2:47)** *See also* [ACT 15:1–15:3](https://ref.ly/Acts15:1-Acts15:3); [ROM 15:31–15:32](https://ref.ly/Rom15:31-Rom15:32); [2CO 2:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:3); [PHP 2:17–2:18](https://ref.ly/Phil2:17-Phil2:18)

Joy experienced in relationship with Jesus Christ
-------------------------------------------------

**[1PE 1:8–1:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:8-1Pet1:9)** *See also* [JHN 15:7–15:11](https://ref.ly/John15:7-John15:11); [HEB 12:22–12:24](https://ref.ly/Heb12:22-Heb12:24); [REV 19:7](https://ref.ly/Rev19:7)

### Joy experienced through conversion

**[ACT 16:33–16:34](https://ref.ly/Acts16:33-Acts16:34)** *See also* [ACT 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/Acts8:38-Acts8:39); [ROM 5:11](https://ref.ly/Rom5:11)

Joy experienced even in adversity
---------------------------------

**[ACT 5:41](https://ref.ly/Acts5:41)**; **[1PE 4:12–4:13](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:12-1Pet4:13)** *See also* [MAT 5:11–5:12](https://ref.ly/Matt5:11-Matt5:12) parallel [LUK 6:22–6:23](https://ref.ly/Luke6:22-Luke6:23); [2CO 7:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:4), [2CO 8:1–8:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:1-2Cor8:2), [2CO 12:7–12:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:7-2Cor12:10), [2CO 13:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:9); [PHP 2:17–2:18](https://ref.ly/Phil2:17-Phil2:18); [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24); [1TH 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:6); [HEB 10:34](https://ref.ly/Heb10:34); [JAS 1:2–1:3](https://ref.ly/Jas1:2-Jas1:3); [1PE 1:3–1:6](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:3-1Pet1:6)

Joy experienced by the apostles
-------------------------------

### Joy because of the believers' faith and obedience

**[ROM 16:19](https://ref.ly/Rom16:19)**; **[3JN 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/3John1:3-3John1:4)** *See also* [2CO 7:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:4); [PHP 1:23–1:26](https://ref.ly/Phil1:23-Phil1:26), [PHP 4:1](https://ref.ly/Phil4:1); [COL 2:5](https://ref.ly/Col2:5); [1TH 2:19–2:20](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:19-1Thess2:20), [1TH 3:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:9)

### Joy because of the believers' love and concern

**[2CO 7:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:7)** *See also* [2CO 7:12–7:13](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:12-2Cor7:13); [PHP 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/Phil2:1-Phil2:2) *the Philippians' love for one another*; [PHM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:7)

### Joy because of the believers' partnership in the gospel

**[PHP 1:4–1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:4-Phil1:6)**

## 8291: kindness (id: 8291)

The quality of compassion and generosity, characteristic of God's dealings towards the weak and poor, and demanded of believers. The kindness is also shown in the words and deeds of Jesus Christ.

The kindness of God
-------------------

### To all

**[ACT 14:17](https://ref.ly/Acts14:17)** *Paul to the pagans at Lystra.* *See also* [JER 9:24](https://ref.ly/Jer9:24); [LUK 6:35](https://ref.ly/Luke6:35)

### To his people

**[ISA 63:7](https://ref.ly/Isa63:7)** *See also* [EZR 9:9](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:9); [ISA 54:8](https://ref.ly/Isa54:8); [HOS 11:4](https://ref.ly/Hos11:4)

### To the king

**[2SA 22:51](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:51)** *See also* [1KI 3:6](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:6)

### To individuals

[GEN 19:19](https://ref.ly/Gen19:19) *Lot*; ; [GEN 24:27](https://ref.ly/Gen24:27) *Abraham*; ; [GEN 32:10](https://ref.ly/Gen32:10) *Jacob*; ; [GEN 39:21](https://ref.ly/Gen39:21) *Joseph*; ; [RUT 1:8](https://ref.ly/Ruth1:8) *Ruth*; ; [RUT 2:20](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:20) *Naomi*; ; [JOB 10:12](https://ref.ly/Job10:12) *Job*; ; [2SA 9:1–9:13](https://ref.ly/2Sam9:1-2Sam9:13) *Mephibosheth through David*

The kindness of Jesus Christ
----------------------------

**[MAT 9:36](https://ref.ly/Matt9:36)** *See also* [MAT 14:14](https://ref.ly/Matt14:14), [MAT 20:34](https://ref.ly/Matt20:34); [MRK 8:2–8:3](https://ref.ly/Mark8:2-Mark8:3); [LUK 7:13](https://ref.ly/Luke7:13); [ACT 20:35](https://ref.ly/Acts20:35); [HEB 4:15](https://ref.ly/Heb4:15)

### Its demonstration in the gospel

**[TIT 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Titus3:4-Titus3:5)** *See also* [ROM 11:22](https://ref.ly/Rom11:22) *God's grace extending to the Gentiles while the Jews are judged for their unbelief*; [EPH 2:7](https://ref.ly/Eph2:7)

Failure to acknowledge God's kindness is a sin
----------------------------------------------

**[PSA 106:7](https://ref.ly/Ps106:7)** *See also* [2CH 32:24–32:25](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:24-2Chr32:25); [ROM 2:4](https://ref.ly/Rom2:4)

Kindness encouraged in people
-----------------------------

### In the OT

**[PRO 14:21](https://ref.ly/Prov14:21)**; **[DAN 4:27](https://ref.ly/Dan4:27)** *See also* [PRO 11:16–11:17](https://ref.ly/Prov11:16-Prov11:17), [PRO 12:25](https://ref.ly/Prov12:25), [PRO 14:31](https://ref.ly/Prov14:31), [PRO 19:17](https://ref.ly/Prov19:17), [PRO 28:8](https://ref.ly/Prov28:8)

### In the NT

**[EPH 4:32](https://ref.ly/Eph4:32)** *See also* [1CO 4:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:13), [1CO 13:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:4); [2CO 6:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:6); [GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23) *seen as the result of the Holy Spirit's work in the believer*; [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12); [1TH 5:15](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:15); [2TI 2:24](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:24) *a necessary characteristic of a church leader*; [TIT 2:5](https://ref.ly/Titus2:5); [2PE 1:7](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:7)

Examples of human kindness
--------------------------

### By unbelievers

[1SA 15:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:6) *the Kenites to Israel*; ; [2KI 25:28](https://ref.ly/2Kgs25:28) *the king of Babylon to Jehoiachin*; ; [ACT 27:3](https://ref.ly/Acts27:3) *the centurion Julius to Paul*; ; [ACT 28:2](https://ref.ly/Acts28:2) *the Maltese islanders to Paul and his companions*

### By God's people

[GEN 21:23](https://ref.ly/Gen21:23) *Abraham to Abimelech*; ; [GEN 47:29](https://ref.ly/Gen47:29) *Joseph to Jacob*; ; [GEN 50:21](https://ref.ly/Gen50:21) *Joseph to his brothers when he might have been expected to settle old scores*; ; [JOS 2:12–2:14](https://ref.ly/Josh2:12-Josh2:14) *the spies to Rahab*; [RUT 2:13](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:13), [RUT 3:10](https://ref.ly/Ruth3:10); [1SA 20:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:8), [1SA 20:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:14); [2SA 2:5](https://ref.ly/2Sam2:5) *The men of Gilead have their kindness rewarded*; ; [1KI 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:7) *Solomon to Barzillai*; ; [ACT 4:9](https://ref.ly/Acts4:9) *Peter to a beggar*

When kindness fails
-------------------

### The failure to show kindness

**[PSA 109:16](https://ref.ly/Ps109:16)** *See also* [JDG 8:35](https://ref.ly/Judg8:35) *the Israelites to Gideon's family*; [2CH 10:7–10:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr10:7-2Chr10:8) *Rehoboam to the Israelites*; [JOB 24:21](https://ref.ly/Job24:21) *evil men to needy women*

### Failure to respond to kindness

[2SA 10:2–10:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam10:2-2Sam10:4)

### Failure to remember kindness

[2CH 24:22](https://ref.ly/2Chr24:22)

## 8292: love (id: 8292)

A caring commitment, in which affection and delight are shown to others, which is grounded in the nature of God himself. In his words and actions, and supremely in the death of Jesus Christ on the cross, God demonstrates the nature of love and defines the direction in which human love in all its forms should develop.

* **Associated Articles:** 8293: love, of God (ID: `8293@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8294: love, and Jesus Christ (ID: `8294@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8295: love, and Holy Spirit (ID: `8295@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8296: love, nature of (ID: `8296@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8297: love, for God (ID: `8297@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8298: love, for one another (ID: `8298@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8299: love, in relationships (ID: `8299@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8300: love, and the world (ID: `8300@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8301: love, and enemies (ID: `8301@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8302: love, abuse of (ID: `8302@DictionaryBibleThemes`)

## 8296: love, nature of (id: 8296)

Scripture offers an understanding of the source, character and value of love, based on the nature and actions of God.

God is the source of love
-------------------------

### His very character is love

**[1JN 4:7–4:8](https://ref.ly/1John4:7-1John4:8)** *See also* [1TH 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:12); [2TI 1:7](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:7); [1JN 4:16](https://ref.ly/1John4:16), [1JN 4:19](https://ref.ly/1John4:19)

### The love of God is revealed in the cross of Jesus Christ

**[1JN 3:16](https://ref.ly/1John3:16), [1JN 4:10](https://ref.ly/1John4:10)** *See also* [JHN 15:13](https://ref.ly/John15:13); [EPH 5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph5:2), [EPH 5:25](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25)

### Love is part of the Holy Spirit's fruit

**[GAL 5:22](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22)** *See also* [ROM 5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:5), [ROM 15:30](https://ref.ly/Rom15:30); [COL 1:8](https://ref.ly/Col1:8)

The loving\-kindness of God referred to in the OT
-------------------------------------------------

**[JER 31:3](https://ref.ly/Jer31:3)** *See also* [EXO 15:13](https://ref.ly/Exod15:13), [EXO 34:6](https://ref.ly/Exod34:6); [2CH 6:42](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:42); [PSA 6:4](https://ref.ly/Ps6:4), [PSA 32:10](https://ref.ly/Ps32:10), [PSA 51:1](https://ref.ly/Ps51:1), [PSA 107:43](https://ref.ly/Ps107:43); [ISA 54:10](https://ref.ly/Isa54:10), [ISA 63:7](https://ref.ly/Isa63:7); [LAM 3:22](https://ref.ly/Lam3:22); [HOS 2:19](https://ref.ly/Hos2:19)

The love of God in the NT
-------------------------

### To describe God's love for humanity

**[JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16)** *See also* [JHN 5:42](https://ref.ly/John5:42), [JHN 15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:10); [ROM 8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:39); [2CO 13:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:14); [EPH 2:4](https://ref.ly/Eph2:4); [HEB 12:6](https://ref.ly/Heb12:6); [1JN 3:1](https://ref.ly/1John3:1)

### To describe love for God

[LUK 10:27](https://ref.ly/Luke10:27); ; [JHN 14:21](https://ref.ly/John14:21), [JHN 21:15](https://ref.ly/John21:15); ; [ROM 8:28](https://ref.ly/Rom8:28); ; [1TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:3); ; [JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12); ; [1PE 1:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:8); ; [1JN 5:3](https://ref.ly/1John5:3)

### To describe brotherly love

[JHN 13:35](https://ref.ly/John13:35); ; [ROM 13:8](https://ref.ly/Rom13:8); ; [1CO 16:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:24); ; [2CO 8:8](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:8); ; [GAL 5:13](https://ref.ly/Gal5:13); ; [EPH 4:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:2); ; [PHP 1:9](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9); ; [COL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Col2:2); ; [PHM 1:5](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:5)

### To describe love expressed by eating together

[2PE 2:13](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:13); ; [JUD 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jude1:12)

### To describe love in a negative sense

[LUK 11:43](https://ref.ly/Luke11:43); ; [JHN 3:19](https://ref.ly/John3:19), [JHN 12:43](https://ref.ly/John12:43); ; [2TI 4:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:10); ; [2PE 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:15); ; [1JN 2:15](https://ref.ly/1John2:15)

Characteristics of love
-----------------------

**[1CO 13:4–13:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:4-1Cor13:8)** *See also* [ROM 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rom12:9); [1TI 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:5); [1PE 1:22](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:22); [1JN 4:18](https://ref.ly/1John4:18)

Love is shown by deeds
----------------------

**[1JN 3:17–3:18](https://ref.ly/1John3:17-1John3:18)** *See also* [JHN 14:15](https://ref.ly/John14:15), [JHN 14:23](https://ref.ly/John14:23); [ROM 5:8](https://ref.ly/Rom5:8), [ROM 14:15](https://ref.ly/Rom14:15); [GAL 2:20](https://ref.ly/Gal2:20); [1JN 4:9](https://ref.ly/1John4:9), [1JN 5:2–5:3](https://ref.ly/1John5:2-1John5:3); [2JN 1:6](https://ref.ly/2John1:6); [3JN 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/3John1:5-3John1:6)

The pre\-eminence of love
-------------------------

**[1CO 13:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:13)** *See also* [MAT 22:37–22:39](https://ref.ly/Matt22:37-Matt22:39) parallel [MRK 12:29–12:31](https://ref.ly/Mark12:29-Mark12:31); [ROM 13:9–13:10](https://ref.ly/Rom13:9-Rom13:10); [1CO 12:31–13:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:31-1Cor13:3); [GAL 5:6](https://ref.ly/Gal5:6); [EPH 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:17-Eph3:19); [COL 3:14](https://ref.ly/Col3:14); [2PE 1:7](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:7); [1JN 2:10](https://ref.ly/1John2:10)

## 8297: love, for God (id: 8297)

Scripture teaches believers to love God and shows how such love should be expressed in worship and practical service.

Believers' response to God's love
---------------------------------

**[1JN 4:19](https://ref.ly/1John4:19)** *See also* [DEU 7:7–7:8](https://ref.ly/Deut7:7-Deut7:8); [PSA 116:1](https://ref.ly/Ps116:1); [JHN 15:16](https://ref.ly/John15:16); [EPH 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/Eph2:4-Eph2:5); [1JN 4:10](https://ref.ly/1John4:10)

Love for God is commanded
-------------------------

**[MAT 22:37–22:38](https://ref.ly/Matt22:37-Matt22:38)** parallel [MRK 12:29–12:30](https://ref.ly/Mark12:29-Mark12:30) *See also* [DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5), [DEU 10:12](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12), [DEU 11:1](https://ref.ly/Deut11:1); [JOS 22:5](https://ref.ly/Josh22:5), [JOS 23:11](https://ref.ly/Josh23:11); [PSA 31:23](https://ref.ly/Ps31:23)

Loving God involves loving Jesus Christ
---------------------------------------

**[JHN 8:42](https://ref.ly/John8:42)** *See also* [JHN 5:42](https://ref.ly/John5:42), [JHN 15:23](https://ref.ly/John15:23)

Expressing love for God
-----------------------

### Delight in worship and in God's house

**[PSA 27:4](https://ref.ly/Ps27:4)** *See also* [PSA 26:8](https://ref.ly/Ps26:8), [PSA 43:4](https://ref.ly/Ps43:4), [PSA 65:4](https://ref.ly/Ps65:4), [PSA 84:2](https://ref.ly/Ps84:2), [PSA 122:1](https://ref.ly/Ps122:1), [PSA 122:6](https://ref.ly/Ps122:6); [ACT 2:46–2:47](https://ref.ly/Acts2:46-Acts2:47)

### Love for God's word

**[PSA 119:97](https://ref.ly/Ps119:97)** *See also* [PSA 1:2](https://ref.ly/Ps1:2), [PSA 19:7–19:8](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7-Ps19:8), [PSA 19:10](https://ref.ly/Ps19:10), [PSA 119:16](https://ref.ly/Ps119:16), [PSA 119:35](https://ref.ly/Ps119:35), [PSA 119:72](https://ref.ly/Ps119:72), [PSA 119:163](https://ref.ly/Ps119:163); [JER 15:16](https://ref.ly/Jer15:16); [EZK 3:3](https://ref.ly/Ezek3:3)

### Self\-sacrifice

**[LUK 14:33](https://ref.ly/Luke14:33)** *See also* [JHN 21:15–21:17](https://ref.ly/John21:15-John21:17); [ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1); [PHP 3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8)

### Giving

**[1CH 29:3](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:3)** *See also* [EXO 25:2](https://ref.ly/Exod25:2), [EXO 35:5](https://ref.ly/Exod35:5); [1CH 29:6](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:6), [1CH 29:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:9); [2CO 8:4–8:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:4-2Cor8:5), [2CO 8:8](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:8), [2CO 9:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:7)

### Obeying God

**[1JN 5:3](https://ref.ly/1John5:3)** *See also* [PSA 40:8](https://ref.ly/Ps40:8); [JHN 14:15](https://ref.ly/John14:15), [JHN 14:23](https://ref.ly/John14:23), [JHN 15:14](https://ref.ly/John15:14); [2JN 1:6](https://ref.ly/2John1:6)

### Loving others

**[1JN 4:21](https://ref.ly/1John4:21)** *See also* [JHN 13:35](https://ref.ly/John13:35), [JHN 15:12](https://ref.ly/John15:12); [1JN 4:11](https://ref.ly/1John4:11)

The blessings of loving God
---------------------------

**[JHN 14:15–14:16](https://ref.ly/John14:15-John14:16)** *See also* [JHN 14:23](https://ref.ly/John14:23), [JHN 16:27](https://ref.ly/John16:27); [1PE 1:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:8)

Examples of love for God and Jesus Christ
-----------------------------------------

**[PSA 18:1](https://ref.ly/Ps18:1)** *See also* [PSA 73:25](https://ref.ly/Ps73:25); [MAT 26:7](https://ref.ly/Matt26:7) parallel [MRK 14:3](https://ref.ly/Mark14:3); [JHN 12:3](https://ref.ly/John12:3); [LUK 2:37](https://ref.ly/Luke2:37), [LUK 7:47](https://ref.ly/Luke7:47), [LUK 24:53](https://ref.ly/Luke24:53); [JHN 11:16](https://ref.ly/John11:16), [JHN 21:16](https://ref.ly/John21:16); [ACT 21:13](https://ref.ly/Acts21:13); [HEB 6:10](https://ref.ly/Heb6:10)

## 8298: love, for one another (id: 8298)

Scripture instructs God's people to love one another and illustrates what this means in practice.

Reasons for loving one another
------------------------------

### God commands it

**[GAL 5:14](https://ref.ly/Gal5:14)** *See also* [LEV 19:18](https://ref.ly/Lev19:18)LEV [19:34](https://ref.ly/Lev19:34); [DEU 10:19](https://ref.ly/Deut10:19)[MAT 22:39](https://ref.ly/Matt22:39) parallel [MRK 12:31](https://ref.ly/Mark12:31) *the second greatest commandment*; [JHN 15:12](https://ref.ly/John15:12) *Jesus Christ commands his disciples to love one another*; [ROM 13:10](https://ref.ly/Rom13:10); [1TH 4:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:9); [HEB 13:1](https://ref.ly/Heb13:1); [JAS 2:8](https://ref.ly/Jas2:8); [1PE 1:22](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:22), [1PE 2:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:17); [1JN 3:23](https://ref.ly/1John3:23), [1JN 4:21](https://ref.ly/1John4:21); [2JN 1:5](https://ref.ly/2John1:5)

### God has taken the initiative in showing love

**[1JN 4:11](https://ref.ly/1John4:11)** *See also* [MAL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Mal2:10); [1CO 8:11–8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:11-1Cor8:13); [1JN 3:16](https://ref.ly/1John3:16)

### God's people are known by their love

**[JHN 13:35](https://ref.ly/John13:35)** *See also* [1JN 2:10](https://ref.ly/1John2:10), [1JN 3:14](https://ref.ly/1John3:14), [1JN 4:7](https://ref.ly/1John4:7), [1JN 4:16](https://ref.ly/1John4:16), [1JN 4:20](https://ref.ly/1John4:20)

### Love maintains fellowship

**[1PE 4:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:8)** *See also* [PRO 10:12](https://ref.ly/Prov10:12), [PRO 17:9](https://ref.ly/Prov17:9); [EPH 4:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:2)

### Love promotes sacrificial service

**[1TH 2:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:8)** *See also* [PRO 17:17](https://ref.ly/Prov17:17); [2CO 12:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:15); [GAL 5:13](https://ref.ly/Gal5:13); [PHP 2:30](https://ref.ly/Phil2:30), [PHP 4:10](https://ref.ly/Phil4:10); [1TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:3)

Expressing love for one another
-------------------------------

### In caring for the sick

**[MAT 25:36](https://ref.ly/Matt25:36)** *See also* [JOB 2:11](https://ref.ly/Job2:11); [GAL 4:14](https://ref.ly/Gal4:14)

### In meeting material needs

**[MAT 25:35](https://ref.ly/Matt25:35)** *See also* [DEU 15:7–15:8](https://ref.ly/Deut15:7-Deut15:8); [1JN 3:17](https://ref.ly/1John3:17)

### In affectionate greetings

**[2CO 13:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:12)** *See also* [GEN 33:4](https://ref.ly/Gen33:4), [GEN 45:14–45:15](https://ref.ly/Gen45:14-Gen45:15); [ACT 20:37](https://ref.ly/Acts20:37); [ROM 16:16](https://ref.ly/Rom16:16); [1CO 16:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:20); [1PE 5:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:14)

Examples of the demonstration of love for one another
-----------------------------------------------------

[GEN 14:14–14:16](https://ref.ly/Gen14:14-Gen14:16) *Abraham for Lot*; ; [EXO 32:31–32:32](https://ref.ly/Exod32:31-Exod32:32) *Moses for Israel*; ; [1SA 18:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:3) *Jonathan*; ; [LUK 7:2–7:6](https://ref.ly/Luke7:2-Luke7:6) *the Roman centurion for his servant*; ; [LUK 10:29–10:37](https://ref.ly/Luke10:29-Luke10:37) *the good Samaritan*; ; [ACT 4:32](https://ref.ly/Acts4:32), [ACT 16:33](https://ref.ly/Acts16:33) *the Philippian jailer*; ; [ACT 20:38](https://ref.ly/Acts20:38); ; [ROM 16:4](https://ref.ly/Rom16:4); ; [2CO 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:4); ; [EPH 1:15](https://ref.ly/Eph1:15); ; [PHP 1:8](https://ref.ly/Phil1:8), [PHP 4:1](https://ref.ly/Phil4:1); ; [2TI 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:16-2Tim1:17) *Onesiphorus*; ; [PHM 1:12](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:12); ; [3JN 1:6](https://ref.ly/3John1:6)

### Paul's love for his churches

Corinth: [2CO 1:3–1:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:3-2Cor1:6), [2CO 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:4); [GAL 4:19](https://ref.ly/Gal4:19) *Galatia*; [PHP 1:3](https://ref.ly/Phil1:3), [PHP 1:7](https://ref.ly/Phil1:7), [PHP 4:1](https://ref.ly/Phil4:1); [1TH 2:7–2:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:7-1Thess2:8), [1TH 3:7–3:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:7-1Thess3:10), [1TH 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:12)

## 8299: love, in relationships (id: 8299)

Human love is ennobled by being patterned on God's love for his people. It is also safeguarded by God's commands.

The love between husband and wife
---------------------------------

### Conjugal love is commanded

**[COL 3:18–3:19](https://ref.ly/Col3:18-Col3:19)** *See also* [GEN 2:24](https://ref.ly/Gen2:24); [DEU 24:5](https://ref.ly/Deut24:5); [PRO 5:18–5:20](https://ref.ly/Prov5:18-Prov5:20); [ECC 9:9](https://ref.ly/Eccl9:9); [EPH 5:22](https://ref.ly/Eph5:22), [EPH 5:28](https://ref.ly/Eph5:28), [EPH 5:33](https://ref.ly/Eph5:33); [1PE 3:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:7)

### It is patterned on God's love for his people

**[ISA 54:5](https://ref.ly/Isa54:5)**; **[EPH 5:25–5:27](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25-Eph5:27)** *See also* [ISA 62:5](https://ref.ly/Isa62:5); [JER 3:14](https://ref.ly/Jer3:14); [EZK 16:8](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:8); [HOS 2:19](https://ref.ly/Hos2:19); [2CO 11:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:2); [REV 19:7](https://ref.ly/Rev19:7)

The power of human love
-----------------------

**[SNG 8:6–8:7](https://ref.ly/Song8:6-Song8:7)** *See also* [GEN 29:20](https://ref.ly/Gen29:20), [GEN 29:30](https://ref.ly/Gen29:30); [PRO 6:34–6:35](https://ref.ly/Prov6:34-Prov6:35)

Examples of love in courtship and marriage
------------------------------------------

[GEN 24:67](https://ref.ly/Gen24:67) *Isaac and Rebekah*; ; [GEN 29:18](https://ref.ly/Gen29:18) *Jacob and Rachel*; ; [JDG 16:4](https://ref.ly/Judg16:4) *Samson and Delilah*; ; [1SA 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:5) *Elkanah and Hannah*; ; [EST 2:17](https://ref.ly/Esth2:17) *Xerxes and Esther*; ; [SNG 1:2](https://ref.ly/Song1:2), [SNG 4:10](https://ref.ly/Song4:10); ; [HOS 3:1](https://ref.ly/Hos3:1); ; [MAT 1:19](https://ref.ly/Matt1:19) *Joseph and Mary*

Safeguards on human love
------------------------

### Sexual immorality is condemned

**[1CO 7:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:2)** *See also* [LEV 18:22](https://ref.ly/Lev18:22) *homosexual acts forbidden*; [LEV 19:29](https://ref.ly/Lev19:29) *prostitution forbidden*; [DEU 23:17–23:18](https://ref.ly/Deut23:17-Deut23:18); [MAT 5:32](https://ref.ly/Matt5:32); [ACT 15:29](https://ref.ly/Acts15:29); [ROM 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Rom1:26-Rom1:27); [1CO 5:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:1), [1CO 6:18](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:18), [1CO 10:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:8); [EPH 5:3](https://ref.ly/Eph5:3); [COL 3:5](https://ref.ly/Col3:5); [1TH 4:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:3)

### Adultery is condemned

**[EXO 20:14](https://ref.ly/Exod20:14)** *See also* [LEV 20:10](https://ref.ly/Lev20:10); [DEU 5:18](https://ref.ly/Deut5:18); [PRO 6:24](https://ref.ly/Prov6:24); [1CO 6:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:9); [HEB 13:4](https://ref.ly/Heb13:4)

### Restrictions on divorce

**[MAT 19:9](https://ref.ly/Matt19:9)** *See also* [MAL 2:16](https://ref.ly/Mal2:16); [MAT 5:32](https://ref.ly/Matt5:32); [MRK 10:11–10:12](https://ref.ly/Mark10:11-Mark10:12); [LUK 16:18](https://ref.ly/Luke16:18); [1CO 7:10–7:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:10-1Cor7:11)

### Lust is condemned

**[MAT 5:28](https://ref.ly/Matt5:28)** *See also* [JOB 31:1](https://ref.ly/Job31:1); [PRO 6:25](https://ref.ly/Prov6:25); [1CO 7:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:9); [EPH 4:19](https://ref.ly/Eph4:19); [1TH 4:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:5)

### Polygamy is forbidden

**[1TI 3:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:2)** *See also* [DEU 17:17](https://ref.ly/Deut17:17); [MAL 2:15](https://ref.ly/Mal2:15); [1TI 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:12); [TIT 1:6](https://ref.ly/Titus1:6)

## 8300: love, and the world (id: 8300)

Scripture promotes the love of family, home and country and contains many examples of such love.

Parental love
-------------

### Aspects of parental love

**[PRO 13:24](https://ref.ly/Prov13:24)**; **[EPH 6:4](https://ref.ly/Eph6:4)** *See also* [DEU 6:7](https://ref.ly/Deut6:7); [2CO 12:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:14); [COL 3:21](https://ref.ly/Col3:21); [1TI 3:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:4); [2TI 3:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:15)

### Examples of maternal love

[GEN 21:16](https://ref.ly/Gen21:16) *Hagar*; ; [EXO 2:3](https://ref.ly/Exod2:3) *Moses' mother*; ; [JDG 5:28](https://ref.ly/Judg5:28); ; [1SA 2:19](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:19) *Hannah*; ; [2SA 21:10](https://ref.ly/2Sam21:10); ; [1KI 3:26](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:26), [1KI 17:18](https://ref.ly/1Kgs17:18); [2KI 4:20](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:20), [2KI 4:27](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:27); [MAT 15:22](https://ref.ly/Matt15:22) parallel [MRK 7:26](https://ref.ly/Mark7:26); ; [LUK 2:48](https://ref.ly/Luke2:48), [LUK 7:12–7:13](https://ref.ly/Luke7:12-Luke7:13) *the widow of Nain*; ; [JHN 19:25](https://ref.ly/John19:25)

### Examples of paternal love

[GEN 22:2](https://ref.ly/Gen22:2) *Abraham*; ; [GEN 31:28](https://ref.ly/Gen31:28), [GEN 37:35](https://ref.ly/Gen37:35), [GEN 42:38](https://ref.ly/Gen42:38); [2SA 12:16](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:16), [2SA 13:39](https://ref.ly/2Sam13:39); [MRK 5:23](https://ref.ly/Mark5:23) parallel [LUK 8:41–8:42](https://ref.ly/Luke8:41-Luke8:42) *Jairus*

Love for parents
----------------

**[EXO 20:12](https://ref.ly/Exod20:12)**; **[1TI 5:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:4)** *See also* [GEN 46:29](https://ref.ly/Gen46:29) *Joseph*; [LEV 19:3](https://ref.ly/Lev19:3); [JDG 11:36](https://ref.ly/Judg11:36); [1SA 22:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam22:3) *David*; [1KI 19:20](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:20) *Elisha*; [JER 35:8](https://ref.ly/Jer35:8); [MAT 15:4](https://ref.ly/Matt15:4) parallel [MRK 7:10](https://ref.ly/Mark7:10); [LUK 2:51](https://ref.ly/Luke2:51); [JHN 19:26–19:27](https://ref.ly/John19:26-John19:27); [EPH 6:1](https://ref.ly/Eph6:1); [COL 3:20](https://ref.ly/Col3:20)

Other instances of family love
------------------------------

[GEN 34:7](https://ref.ly/Gen34:7), [GEN 45:14–45:15](https://ref.ly/Gen45:14-Gen45:15) *Joseph and his brothers*; ; [RUT 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Ruth1:16-Ruth1:17); ; [2SA 13:22](https://ref.ly/2Sam13:22); [EST 2:7](https://ref.ly/Esth2:7), [EST 2:11](https://ref.ly/Esth2:11)

Love of home and country
------------------------

### Examples of love of home

[GEN 31:30](https://ref.ly/Gen31:30), [GEN 49:29](https://ref.ly/Gen49:29), [GEN 50:25](https://ref.ly/Gen50:25); ; [NUM 10:30](https://ref.ly/Num10:30); ; [RUT 1:6](https://ref.ly/Ruth1:6); ; [2SA 10:12](https://ref.ly/2Sam10:12), [2SA 19:37](https://ref.ly/2Sam19:37), [2SA 23:15](https://ref.ly/2Sam23:15); ; [NEH 4:14](https://ref.ly/Neh4:14)

### Exhortations to patriotism

**[PSA 122:6](https://ref.ly/Ps122:6), [PSA 137:5–137:6](https://ref.ly/Ps137:5-Ps137:6)** *See also* [2SA 1:20](https://ref.ly/2Sam1:20); [EST 4:8](https://ref.ly/Esth4:8); [JER 51:50](https://ref.ly/Jer51:50)

### Examples of patriotism

[1SA 17:26](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:26), [1SA 27:8–27:10](https://ref.ly/1Sam27:8-1Sam27:10); ; [NEH 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/Neh1:3-Neh1:4), [NEH 2:5](https://ref.ly/Neh2:5); ; [EST 8:6](https://ref.ly/Esth8:6); ; [PSA 137:1](https://ref.ly/Ps137:1); ; [JER 51:51](https://ref.ly/Jer51:51); ; [ROM 9:3](https://ref.ly/Rom9:3)

## 8301: love, and enemies (id: 8301)

God loves even those who oppose him and believers must follow his example in loving their enemies.

God's love for sinners
----------------------

**[ISA 53:6](https://ref.ly/Isa53:6)**; **[JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16)**; **[2PE 3:9](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:9)** *See also* [GEN 18:32](https://ref.ly/Gen18:32); [LAM 3:33](https://ref.ly/Lam3:33); [EZK 18:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:23); [MAT 5:45](https://ref.ly/Matt5:45); [ROM 5:8](https://ref.ly/Rom5:8), [ROM 8:32](https://ref.ly/Rom8:32); [2CO 5:19](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:19); [1JN 4:9–4:10](https://ref.ly/1John4:9-1John4:10)

The example of Jesus Christ
---------------------------

**[MAT 23:37](https://ref.ly/Matt23:37)** parallel [LUK 13:34](https://ref.ly/Luke13:34)**[1PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:18)** *See also* [ISA 53:5](https://ref.ly/Isa53:5); [MAT 20:28](https://ref.ly/Matt20:28) parallel [MRK 10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:45); [LUK 23:34](https://ref.ly/Luke23:34); [ROM 5:6](https://ref.ly/Rom5:6); [2CO 5:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:14), [2CO 8:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:9); [HEB 13:12](https://ref.ly/Heb13:12); [1PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21), [1PE 2:24](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:24); [1JN 2:2](https://ref.ly/1John2:2)

God's people must love their enemies
------------------------------------

**[LEV 19:18](https://ref.ly/Lev19:18)**; **[LUK 6:35–6:36](https://ref.ly/Luke6:35-Luke6:36)** *See also* [EXO 23:4](https://ref.ly/Exod23:4); [PRO 24:17](https://ref.ly/Prov24:17), [PRO 25:21](https://ref.ly/Prov25:21); [MAT 5:44](https://ref.ly/Matt5:44); [LUK 6:27](https://ref.ly/Luke6:27); [COL 3:13](https://ref.ly/Col3:13); [1TH 5:15](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:15); [2TI 2:25](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:25); [1PE 3:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:9)

Examples of love for enemies
----------------------------

[GEN 50:20–50:21](https://ref.ly/Gen50:20-Gen50:21) *Joseph*; ; [NUM 12:13](https://ref.ly/Num12:13); ; [1SA 24:17](https://ref.ly/1Sam24:17), [1SA 26:21](https://ref.ly/1Sam26:21); ; [2SA 19:23](https://ref.ly/2Sam19:23); ; [2KI 6:22](https://ref.ly/2Kgs6:22) *the king of Israel*; ; [ACT 7:60](https://ref.ly/Acts7:60) *Stephen*; ; [ACT 9:17](https://ref.ly/Acts9:17) *Ananias*; ; [1CO 4:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:12)

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 53:6; John 3:16; 2 Peter 3:9; Genesis 18:32; Lamentations 3:33; Ezekiel 18:23; Matthew 5:45; Romans 5:8; Romans 8:32; 2 Corinthians 5:19; 1 John 4:9-10; Matthew 23:37; Luke 13:34; 1 Peter 3:18; Isaiah 53:5; Matthew 20:28; Mark 10:45; Luke 23:34; Romans 5:6; 2 Corinthians 5:14; 2 Corinthians 8:9; Hebrews 13:12; 1 Peter 2:21; 1 Peter 2:24; 1 John 2:2; Leviticus 19:18; Luke 6:35-36; Exodus 23:4; Proverbs 24:17; Proverbs 25:21; Matthew 5:44; Luke 6:27; Colossians 3:13; 1 Thessalonians 5:15; 2 Timothy 2:25; 1 Peter 3:9; Genesis 50:20-21; Numbers 12:13; 1 Samuel 24:17; 1 Samuel 26:21; 2 Samuel 19:23; 2 Kings 6:22; Acts 7:60; Acts 9:17; 1 Corinthians 4:12

## 8302: love, abuse of (id: 8302)

Scripture warns that love can be misdirected and shows a number of examples.

Exaggerated love of self
------------------------

### Self\-interest is condemned

**[PHP 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/Phil2:3-Phil2:4)** *See also* [MAT 16:25](https://ref.ly/Matt16:25) parallels [MRK 8:35](https://ref.ly/Mark8:35), [LUK 9:24](https://ref.ly/Luke9:24); [ROM 14:15](https://ref.ly/Rom14:15), [ROM 15:1](https://ref.ly/Rom15:1); [1CO 8:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:9), [1CO 10:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:24); [GAL 5:26](https://ref.ly/Gal5:26); [JAS 3:14–3:15](https://ref.ly/Jas3:14-Jas3:15)

### Examples of self\-love

[EST 6:6](https://ref.ly/Esth6:6) *Haman*; ; [ISA 5:8](https://ref.ly/Isa5:8); ; [DAN 4:30](https://ref.ly/Dan4:30) *Nebuchadnezzar*; ; [2TI 3:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:2); ; [JAS 5:5](https://ref.ly/Jas5:5)

Love of prestige
----------------

### Pride in one's position or reputation is condemned

**[PRO 25:27](https://ref.ly/Prov25:27)**; **[1CO 13:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:4)** *See also* [PRO 21:4](https://ref.ly/Prov21:4), [PRO 25:6–25:7](https://ref.ly/Prov25:6-Prov25:7); [MAT 23:12](https://ref.ly/Matt23:12) parallel [LUK 14:11](https://ref.ly/Luke14:11); [ROM 12:10](https://ref.ly/Rom12:10); [JAS 3:1](https://ref.ly/Jas3:1)

### Examples of the love of prestige

[2SA 15:1](https://ref.ly/2Sam15:1) *Absalom*; ; [1KI 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Kgs1:5) *Adonijah*; ; [ISA 14:13](https://ref.ly/Isa14:13) *the king of Babylon*; ; [JER 46:5](https://ref.ly/Jer46:5); ; [EZK 28:2](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:2); ; [MAT 20:21](https://ref.ly/Matt20:21), [MAT 23:6–23:7](https://ref.ly/Matt23:6-Matt23:7) parallel [LUK 20:46](https://ref.ly/Luke20:46); ; [LUK 14:7](https://ref.ly/Luke14:7), [LUK 22:24](https://ref.ly/Luke22:24); ; [JHN 12:43](https://ref.ly/John12:43) *the man of lawlessness*; ; [2TH 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:4); ; [3JN 1:9](https://ref.ly/3John1:9)

Love of the world
-----------------

### Love of the world is condemned

**[1JN 2:15](https://ref.ly/1John2:15)** *See also* [EXO 23:2](https://ref.ly/Exod23:2); [MAT 16:26](https://ref.ly/Matt16:26) parallels [MRK 8:36–8:37](https://ref.ly/Mark8:36-Mark8:37), [LUK 9:25](https://ref.ly/Luke9:25); [ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2); [COL 3:2](https://ref.ly/Col3:2); [2TI 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:4); [TIT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Titus2:12); [JAS 4:4](https://ref.ly/Jas4:4)

### Examples of the love of the world

[MAT 24:38](https://ref.ly/Matt24:38); ; [LUK 14:18](https://ref.ly/Luke14:18) *those invited to the great banquet*; ; [2TI 4:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:10) *Demas*

Love of money
-------------

### Love of money is condemned

**[1TI 6:9–6:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:9-1Tim6:10)** *See also* [PSA 62:10](https://ref.ly/Ps62:10); [PRO 28:20](https://ref.ly/Prov28:20); [ECC 5:10](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:10); [LUK 12:15](https://ref.ly/Luke12:15)

### Examples of the love of riches

[JOS 7:21](https://ref.ly/Josh7:21) *Achan*; ; [2KI 5:20](https://ref.ly/2Kgs5:20) *Gehazi*; ; [MIC 3:11](https://ref.ly/Mic3:11); ; [MAT 19:22](https://ref.ly/Matt19:22) parallels [MRK 10:22](https://ref.ly/Mark10:22), [LUK 18:23](https://ref.ly/Luke18:23) *the rich young man*; ; [MAT 26:15](https://ref.ly/Matt26:15) *Judas Iscariot*; ; [LUK 16:14](https://ref.ly/Luke16:14); ; [JHN 12:6](https://ref.ly/John12:6); ; [ACT 16:19](https://ref.ly/Acts16:19), [ACT 24:26](https://ref.ly/Acts24:26) *Felix*; ; [2PE 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:15)

Love of sin
-----------

### The love of sin is condemned

**[2TH 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:12)** *See also* [JOB 15:16](https://ref.ly/Job15:16); [PRO 2:14](https://ref.ly/Prov2:14), [PRO 17:19](https://ref.ly/Prov17:19); [ROM 1:32](https://ref.ly/Rom1:32); [2PE 2:10](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:10)

### Examples of the love of sinning

[1KI 21:25](https://ref.ly/1Kgs21:25) *Ahab and Jezebel*; ; [JER 14:10](https://ref.ly/Jer14:10); ; [MIC 3:2](https://ref.ly/Mic3:2); ; [2PE 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:13-2Pet2:14)

Love of other gods
------------------

### Idolatry is condemned

**[DEU 6:13–6:14](https://ref.ly/Deut6:13-Deut6:14)** *See also* [EXO 20:3](https://ref.ly/Exod20:3); [LEV 26:1](https://ref.ly/Lev26:1); [DEU 12:30](https://ref.ly/Deut12:30); [ACT 17:29](https://ref.ly/Acts17:29); [1JN 5:21](https://ref.ly/1John5:21)

### Examples of the love of idols

[EXO 32:4](https://ref.ly/Exod32:4) *the golden calf*; ; [JDG 2:11–2:12](https://ref.ly/Judg2:11-Judg2:12); ; [2KI 17:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:15); ; [DAN 5:4](https://ref.ly/Dan5:4) *Belshazzar*; ; [ACT 17:16](https://ref.ly/Acts17:16) *the city of Athens*; ; [ROM 1:23](https://ref.ly/Rom1:23)

## 8304: loyalty (id: 8304)

A commitment to an ongoing relationship and to the attitude and behaviour demanded by it. It is evident in human relationships and also in the covenant relationship between God and his people.

God's loyalty to his people
---------------------------

### God's covenant loyalty

**[DEU 7:9](https://ref.ly/Deut7:9)** *See also* [1KI 8:23](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:23) parallel [2CH 6:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:14); [NEH 1:5](https://ref.ly/Neh1:5); [PSA 25:10](https://ref.ly/Ps25:10), [PSA 89:28](https://ref.ly/Ps89:28), [PSA 103:17–103:18](https://ref.ly/Ps103:17-Ps103:18), [PSA 106:45](https://ref.ly/Ps106:45); [ISA 54:10](https://ref.ly/Isa54:10), [ISA 55:3](https://ref.ly/Isa55:3)

### God's faithfulness to his promises

**[HEB 10:23](https://ref.ly/Heb10:23)** *See also* [1KI 8:56](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:56); [PSA 91:14–91:16](https://ref.ly/Ps91:14-Ps91:16); [1CO 1:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:9)

Loyalty to God
--------------

### The loyalty of God's people

**[1CH 29:18](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:18)**; **[JER 2:2](https://ref.ly/Jer2:2)** *See also* [1KI 8:61](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:61); [2CH 32:32](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:32), [2CH 35:26](https://ref.ly/2Chr35:26), [2CH 17:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr17:6)

### Examples of those loyal to God

[NUM 12:7](https://ref.ly/Num12:7) *Moses*; ; [NUM 14:24](https://ref.ly/Num14:24) *Caleb*; ; [JOS 24:14–24:15](https://ref.ly/Josh24:14-Josh24:15) *Joshua and his family*; ; [JOB 23:11](https://ref.ly/Job23:11) *Job*; ; [ISA 38:3](https://ref.ly/Isa38:3) *Hezekiah*; ; [ACT 4:19](https://ref.ly/Acts4:19) *Peter and John*; ; [ACT 20:24](https://ref.ly/Acts20:24) *Paul*

### Failure to show loyalty to God

**[HOS 6:4](https://ref.ly/Hos6:4)** *See also* [PSA 78:8](https://ref.ly/Ps78:8), [PSA 78:37](https://ref.ly/Ps78:37)

### Divided loyalties

**[2KI 17:33](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:33)** *See also* [MAT 6:24](https://ref.ly/Matt6:24); [LUK 16:13](https://ref.ly/Luke16:13); [1CO 10:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:21); [JAS 1:8](https://ref.ly/Jas1:8)

Loyalty in human relationships
------------------------------

### Loyalty and covenant

**[1SA 20:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:8)**

### The loyalty of friends

**[1SA 20:42](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:42)**; **[PRO 17:17](https://ref.ly/Prov17:17)** *See also* [2SA 16:17](https://ref.ly/2Sam16:17); [PRO 27:10](https://ref.ly/Prov27:10)

### Loyalty within the family

**[RUT 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Ruth1:16-Ruth1:17)** *See also* [GEN 20:13](https://ref.ly/Gen20:13), [GEN 38:8](https://ref.ly/Gen38:8), [GEN 47:29](https://ref.ly/Gen47:29); [DEU 25:5](https://ref.ly/Deut25:5); [RUT 3:9](https://ref.ly/Ruth3:9); [1CO 7:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:3)

### Loyalty to those in authority

**[ROM 13:1](https://ref.ly/Rom13:1)** *See also* [EZR 7:26](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:26); [ECC 8:2](https://ref.ly/Eccl8:2); [MAT 17:27](https://ref.ly/Matt17:27), [MAT 22:21](https://ref.ly/Matt22:21); [TIT 3:1](https://ref.ly/Titus3:1); [1PE 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13-1Pet2:14)

### Examples of loyalty to rulers

**[2SA 15:21](https://ref.ly/2Sam15:21)** *See also* [1SA 22:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam22:14) *David's loyalty to Saul*; [2SA 3:8](https://ref.ly/2Sam3:8) *Abner's loyalty to Saul's family*; [1KI 12:20](https://ref.ly/1Kgs12:20) *the loyalty of Judah to David's house*; [1CH 12:33](https://ref.ly/1Chr12:33) *the men of Zebulun's loyalty to David*

The loyalty of believers
------------------------

**[ROM 12:10](https://ref.ly/Rom12:10)**; **[PHP 4:3](https://ref.ly/Phil4:3)** *See also* [1CO 4:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:17) *Timothy*; [1CO 16:15–16:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:15-1Cor16:16) *the household of Stephanas*; [COL 1:7](https://ref.ly/Col1:7) *Epaphras*; [COL 4:7](https://ref.ly/Col4:7) *Tychicus*; [COL 4:9](https://ref.ly/Col4:9) *Onesimus*

## 8305: meekness (id: 8305)

An attitude of humble, submissive and expectant trust in God, and a loving, patient and gentle attitude towards others.

Meekness required by God
------------------------

**[ZEP 2:3](https://ref.ly/Zeph2:3)** *See also* [PRO 16:19](https://ref.ly/Prov16:19); [1PE 3:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:4)

God's promises to the meek
--------------------------

**[PSA 37:11](https://ref.ly/Ps37:11)**; **[MAT 5:5](https://ref.ly/Matt5:5)**; **[1PE 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:5)** *See also* [PSA 25:9](https://ref.ly/Ps25:9), [PSA 69:32](https://ref.ly/Ps69:32) *In Scripture, “the poor” frequently represent the humble, godly poor*; [PSA 147:6](https://ref.ly/Ps147:6); [ISA 29:19](https://ref.ly/Isa29:19), [ISA 66:2](https://ref.ly/Isa66:2); [ZEP 3:11–3:12](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:11-Zeph3:12); [JAS 4:6](https://ref.ly/Jas4:6)

God acts to save the meek
-------------------------

**[PSA 34:5–34:6](https://ref.ly/Ps34:5-Ps34:6)** *See also* [2SA 22:28](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:28); [PSA 10:12](https://ref.ly/Ps10:12), [PSA 10:17](https://ref.ly/Ps10:17), [PSA 18:27](https://ref.ly/Ps18:27), [PSA 45:4](https://ref.ly/Ps45:4), [PSA 76:9](https://ref.ly/Ps76:9), [PSA 149:4](https://ref.ly/Ps149:4); [PRO 3:34](https://ref.ly/Prov3:34)

Meekness is a correct attitude in prayer
----------------------------------------

**[PSA 40:17](https://ref.ly/Ps40:17)** *See also* [PSA 70:5](https://ref.ly/Ps70:5)

Godly wisdom produces meekness
------------------------------

**[JAS 3:13](https://ref.ly/Jas3:13)**

--------------------

**[NUM 12:3](https://ref.ly/Num12:3)**

-------------------------------------------------

## 8306: mercifulness (id: 8306)

An attitude of compassion and care, grounded in the nature of God himself, made manifest in the life and ministry of Jesus Christ, and expected of believers.

The mercifulness of God
-----------------------

**[DEU 4:31](https://ref.ly/Deut4:31)**; **[PSA 78:38](https://ref.ly/Ps78:38)**; **[JER 3:12](https://ref.ly/Jer3:12)** *See also* [DEU 7:7–7:8](https://ref.ly/Deut7:7-Deut7:8); [NEH 9:31](https://ref.ly/Neh9:31); [ZEC 1:16](https://ref.ly/Zech1:16); [LUK 1:50–1:54](https://ref.ly/Luke1:50-Luke1:54); [JAS 5:11](https://ref.ly/Jas5:11)

The expression of God's mercifulness
------------------------------------

### In the forgiveness of sins

**[PSA 78:38](https://ref.ly/Ps78:38)** *See also* [2SA 24:14](https://ref.ly/2Sam24:14); [1KI 8:50](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:50); [PSA 26:11](https://ref.ly/Ps26:11), [PSA 51:1](https://ref.ly/Ps51:1); [DAN 9:9](https://ref.ly/Dan9:9)

### In response to prayer

**[PSA 6:2](https://ref.ly/Ps6:2), [PSA 27:7](https://ref.ly/Ps27:7)** *See also* [1KI 8:28](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:28); [PSA 9:13](https://ref.ly/Ps9:13)

The mercifulness of Jesus Christ
--------------------------------

**[MAT 9:36](https://ref.ly/Matt9:36)**; **[HEB 2:17](https://ref.ly/Heb2:17)** *See also* [MAT 8:16](https://ref.ly/Matt8:16); [HEB 4:16](https://ref.ly/Heb4:16)

The mercifulness expected of believers
--------------------------------------

**[LUK 6:36](https://ref.ly/Luke6:36)** *See also* [MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8); [ZEC 7:9](https://ref.ly/Zech7:9); [MAT 9:13](https://ref.ly/Matt9:13), [MAT 18:21–18:35](https://ref.ly/Matt18:21-Matt18:35) *the parable of the unmerciful servant*; [MAT 23:23](https://ref.ly/Matt23:23); [LUK 10:29–10:37](https://ref.ly/Luke10:29-Luke10:37) *the parable of the good Samaritan*; [ROM 12:8](https://ref.ly/Rom12:8); [EPH 4:32–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:32-Eph5:2); [JAS 2:12–2:13](https://ref.ly/Jas2:12-Jas2:13), [JAS 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:17); [JUD 1:22–1:23](https://ref.ly/Jude1:22-Jude1:23)

The blessing promised to the merciful
-------------------------------------

**[MAT 5:7](https://ref.ly/Matt5:7)** *Jesus Christ to his disciples.*

## 8307: moderation (id: 8307)

The classic virtue of temperate conduct, especially the avoidance of extremes. Scripture commends moderation as a way of life for Christians, while stressing the need for total commitment to God.

The ideal of moderation
-----------------------

**[ECC 7:16–7:18](https://ref.ly/Eccl7:16-Eccl7:18)**

Moderation in a legal context
-----------------------------

**[EXO 21:23–21:25](https://ref.ly/Exod21:23-Exod21:25)** *The purpose of this legislation was not to encourage vengeance but to moderate or restrain it.* *See also* [LEV 24:17–24:22](https://ref.ly/Lev24:17-Lev24:22); [NUM 35:9–35:15](https://ref.ly/Num35:9-Num35:15) parallels [DEU 4:41–4:43](https://ref.ly/Deut4:41-Deut4:43), [DEU 19:1–19:10](https://ref.ly/Deut19:1-Deut19:10) *One purpose of cities of refuge was to moderate the revenge of families of the murdered.*

Moderation in personal and social relations
-------------------------------------------

**[PRO 17:27](https://ref.ly/Prov17:27)** *See also* [GEN 43:29–43:31](https://ref.ly/Gen43:29-Gen43:31); [PRO 12:16](https://ref.ly/Prov12:16), [PRO 23:4](https://ref.ly/Prov23:4); [GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23)

Moderation in personal ethics
-----------------------------

**[TIT 2:11–2:12](https://ref.ly/Titus2:11-Titus2:12)** *See also* [PRO 15:16](https://ref.ly/Prov15:16) *Moderation in matters of wealth is affirmed.*[MAT 5:33–5:37](https://ref.ly/Matt5:33-Matt5:37); [COL 4:6](https://ref.ly/Col4:6)[EPH 5:18](https://ref.ly/Eph5:18); [1TH 5:6–5:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:6-1Thess5:8); [1TI 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:2-1Tim3:3), [1TI 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:8), [1TI 3:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:11); [TIT 1:7–1:8](https://ref.ly/Titus1:7-Titus1:8), [TIT 2:2–2:8](https://ref.ly/Titus2:2-Titus2:8)

Moderation in religious activity
--------------------------------

**[ECC 7:16–7:17](https://ref.ly/Eccl7:16-Eccl7:17)** *See also* [MAT 23:23–23:26](https://ref.ly/Matt23:23-Matt23:26); [1CO 14:26–14:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:26-1Cor14:33)

Moderation must not lead to being spiritually lukewarm
------------------------------------------------------

**[REV 3:15–3:16](https://ref.ly/Rev3:15-Rev3:16)** *See also* [REV 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Rev3:1-Rev3:2)

* **Associated Passages:** Ecclesiastes 7:16-18; Exodus 21:23-25; Leviticus 24:17-22; Numbers 35:9-15; Deuteronomy 4:41-43; Deuteronomy 19:1-10; Proverbs 17:27; Genesis 43:29-31; Proverbs 12:16; Proverbs 23:4; Galatians 5:22-23; Titus 2:11-12; Proverbs 15:16; Matthew 5:33-37; Colossians 4:6; Ephesians 5:18; 1 Thessalonians 5:6-8; 1 Timothy 3:2-3; 1 Timothy 3:8; 1 Timothy 3:11; Titus 1:7-8; Titus 2:2-8; Ecclesiastes 7:16-17; Matthew 23:23-26; 1 Corinthians 14:26-33; Revelation 3:15-16; Revelation 3:1-2
* **Associated Articles:** 5494: revenge (ID: `5494@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5850: excess (ID: `5850@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5856: extravagance (ID: `5856@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5934: restraint (ID: `5934@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7338: cities of refuge (ID: `7338@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8207: commitment (ID: `8207@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8240: ethics (ID: `8240@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8307: moderation (ID: `8307@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8339: self-control (ID: `8339@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8370: zeal (ID: `8370@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8308: modesty (id: 8308)

An attitude of humility, avoiding improper self\-exaltation or excessive flamboyance. Scripture urges modesty in personal behaviour, forms of dress and forms of behaviour.

Modesty as an attitude of humility
----------------------------------

**[ROM 12:3](https://ref.ly/Rom12:3)** *See also* [PRO 25:6–25:7](https://ref.ly/Prov25:6-Prov25:7), [PRO 29:23](https://ref.ly/Prov29:23); [LUK 22:25–22:27](https://ref.ly/Luke22:25-Luke22:27) parallels [MAT 20:25–20:28](https://ref.ly/Matt20:25-Matt20:28), [MRK 10:42–10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:42-Mark10:45); [ROM 11:20–11:21](https://ref.ly/Rom11:20-Rom11:21); [2CO 10:13–10:16](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:13-2Cor10:16), [2CO 12:5–12:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:5-2Cor12:6); [PHP 2:5–2:8](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5-Phil2:8); [1PE 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:5)

Believers should dress modestly
-------------------------------

**[1TI 2:9–2:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:9-1Tim2:10)** *See also* [ISA 3:16–3:24](https://ref.ly/Isa3:16-Isa3:24); [1PE 3:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:3)

Examples of those who acted with modesty
----------------------------------------

[GEN 32:9–32:10](https://ref.ly/Gen32:9-Gen32:10) *Jacob*; ; [GEN 41:15–41:16](https://ref.ly/Gen41:15-Gen41:16) *Joseph*; ; [JDG 6:15](https://ref.ly/Judg6:15) *Gideon*; ; [1SA 9:19–9:21](https://ref.ly/1Sam9:19-1Sam9:21) *Saul*; ; [2SA 7:18](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:18) *David*; ; [JER 1:6](https://ref.ly/Jer1:6) *Jeremiah*; ; [DAN 2:27–2:30](https://ref.ly/Dan2:27-Dan2:30) *Daniel*; ; [MAT 8:5–8:9](https://ref.ly/Matt8:5-Matt8:9) parallel [LUK 7:6–7:8](https://ref.ly/Luke7:6-Luke7:8) *a centurion*

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 12:3; Proverbs 25:6-7; Proverbs 29:23; Luke 22:25-27; Matthew 20:25-28; Mark 10:42-45; Romans 11:20-21; 2 Corinthians 10:13-16; 2 Corinthians 12:5-6; Philippians 2:5-8; 1 Peter 5:5; 1 Timothy 2:9-10; Isaiah 3:16-24; 1 Peter 3:3; Genesis 32:9-10; Genesis 41:15-16; Judges 6:15; 1 Samuel 9:19-21; 2 Samuel 7:18; Jeremiah 1:6; Daniel 2:27-30; Matthew 8:5-9; Luke 7:6-8

## 8309: morality (id: 8309)

Conformity to the standards of right living, especially in the sight of God. Scripture stresses that morality is grounded in the nature of God himself, and provides practical guidance concerning moral living and decision\-making.

* **Associated Articles:** 8310: morality, and creation (ID: `8310@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8311: morality, and redemption (ID: `8311@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8310: morality, and creation (id: 8310)

Human beings have been created moral creatures in the likeness of God, who is the source and standard of all that is good.

Morality is grounded in the nature of God himself
-------------------------------------------------

**[DEU 32:4](https://ref.ly/Deut32:4)**; **[LUK 18:18–18:19](https://ref.ly/Luke18:18-Luke18:19)** *See also* [EXO 33:19](https://ref.ly/Exod33:19), [EXO 34:5–34:7](https://ref.ly/Exod34:5-Exod34:7); [PSA 25:8–25:9](https://ref.ly/Ps25:8-Ps25:9), [PSA 119:68](https://ref.ly/Ps119:68)

Human beings are morally aware
------------------------------

### They are created in God's image

[GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27)

### They have a conscience

**[ROM 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Rom2:14-Rom2:15)** *See also* [2CO 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:2)

### They have been given a moral law

[GEN 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/Gen2:16-Gen2:17); ; [MRK 10:6–10:9](https://ref.ly/Mark10:6-Mark10:9); ; [GEN 2:23–2:24](https://ref.ly/Gen2:23-Gen2:24) *Standards for marriage are implicit in the creation.*

### They are capable of sharing moral ideals

[JHN 1:9](https://ref.ly/John1:9); ; [ROM 13:1–13:7](https://ref.ly/Rom13:1-Rom13:7); ; [EPH 3:15](https://ref.ly/Eph3:15) *“whole family” is literally “all fatherhood”, implying that every understanding of fatherhood and family is derived from God*; ; [PHP 4:8](https://ref.ly/Phil4:8) *refering to pagan virtues*; ; [TIT 3:1](https://ref.ly/Titus3:1); ; [1PE 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13-1Pet2:14)

### Immoral acts are unnatural

[ROM 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Rom1:26-Rom1:27)

### God's judgment implies moral responsibility

[JER 17:10](https://ref.ly/Jer17:10); ; [EZK 18:20–18:21](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:20-Ezek18:21); ; [AMO 1:6](https://ref.ly/Amos1:6); ; [ROM 2:5–2:11](https://ref.ly/Rom2:5-Rom2:11)

Human beings are morally flawed
-------------------------------

**[ROM 3:23](https://ref.ly/Rom3:23)** *See also* [PSA 64:6](https://ref.ly/Ps64:6); [ISA 32:6](https://ref.ly/Isa32:6); [JER 17:9](https://ref.ly/Jer17:9); [ROM 1:28–1:32](https://ref.ly/Rom1:28-Rom1:32), [ROM 8:7](https://ref.ly/Rom8:7); [1TI 4:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:2)

* **Associated Passages:** Deuteronomy 32:4; Luke 18:18-19; Exodus 33:19; Exodus 34:5-7; Psalms 25:8-9; Psalms 119:68; Genesis 1:26-27; Romans 2:14-15; 2 Corinthians 4:2; Genesis 2:16-17; Mark 10:6-9; Genesis 2:23-24; John 1:9; Romans 13:1-7; Ephesians 3:15; Philippians 4:8; Titus 3:1; 1 Peter 2:13-14; Romans 1:26-27; Jeremiah 17:10; Ezekiel 18:20-21; Amos 1:6; Romans 2:5-11; Romans 3:23; Psalms 64:6; Isaiah 32:6; Jeremiah 17:9; Romans 1:28-32; Romans 8:7; 1 Timothy 4:2
* **Associated Articles:** 1050: God, goodness of (ID: `1050@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1065: God, holiness of (ID: `1065@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1075: God, justice of (ID: `1075@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4007: creation, and God (ID: `4007@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5004: human race, and sin (ID: `5004@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5008: conscience (ID: `5008@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5020: human nature (ID: `5020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5051: responsibility (ID: `5051@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6020: sin (ID: `6020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6187: immorality (ID: `6187@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8321: perfection, divine (ID: `8321@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8311: morality, and redemption (id: 8311)

The morality which is appropriate for God's own people is expressed in the OT law, and in the person and teaching of Jesus Christ.

Relationship with God is expressed in moral terms
-------------------------------------------------

### In the moral standards God expects of his people

**[LEV 11:44–11:45](https://ref.ly/Lev11:44-Lev11:45)**; **[MAT 5:48](https://ref.ly/Matt5:48)** *See also* [MAT 5:43–5:44](https://ref.ly/Matt5:43-Matt5:44) parallel [LUK 6:27–6:28](https://ref.ly/Luke6:27-Luke6:28); [LUK 6:35–6:36](https://ref.ly/Luke6:35-Luke6:36); [EPH 4:31–5:3](https://ref.ly/Eph4:31-Eph5:3); [1PE 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15-1Pet1:16); [3JN 1:11](https://ref.ly/3John1:11)

### In God's moral laws

**[ISA 51:4](https://ref.ly/Isa51:4)**; **[ROM 7:12](https://ref.ly/Rom7:12)** *See also* [EXO 20:1–20:7](https://ref.ly/Exod20:1-Exod20:7); [DEU 6:25](https://ref.ly/Deut6:25); [PSA 119:137–119:138](https://ref.ly/Ps119:137-Ps119:138), [PSA 147:19–147:20](https://ref.ly/Ps147:19-Ps147:20); [PRO 29:18](https://ref.ly/Prov29:18); [ISA 51:7](https://ref.ly/Isa51:7)

### In God's denunciation of immorality and religious hypocrisy

**[AMO 2:6–2:7](https://ref.ly/Amos2:6-Amos2:7)** *See also* [ISA 1:15–1:23](https://ref.ly/Isa1:15-Isa1:23); [AMO 5:21–5:24](https://ref.ly/Amos5:21-Amos5:24); [MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8); [EPH 5:5](https://ref.ly/Eph5:5); [COL 3:5–3:7](https://ref.ly/Col3:5-Col3:7)

### In the life and teaching of Jesus Christ

**[JHN 1:14](https://ref.ly/John1:14)** *See also* [MAT 5:17–5:20](https://ref.ly/Matt5:17-Matt5:20); [JHN 1:17–1:18](https://ref.ly/John1:17-John1:18), [JHN 3:19](https://ref.ly/John3:19); [HEB 4:15](https://ref.ly/Heb4:15)

The incentive for moral change lies in what God has done in redemption
----------------------------------------------------------------------

### In the OT

**[DEU 24:17–24:18](https://ref.ly/Deut24:17-Deut24:18)** *See also* [LEV 19:13–19:18](https://ref.ly/Lev19:13-Lev19:18), [LEV 19:35–19:36](https://ref.ly/Lev19:35-Lev19:36); [DEU 15:12–15:15](https://ref.ly/Deut15:12-Deut15:15), [DEU 24:21–24:22](https://ref.ly/Deut24:21-Deut24:22)

### In the NT

**[1CO 6:19–6:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:19-1Cor6:20)** *See also* [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2)

Moral change brought about by God's work of renewal
---------------------------------------------------

**[EZK 36:26–36:27](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:26-Ezek36:27)**; **[1CO 6:9–6:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:9-1Cor6:11)** *See also* [ROM 8:3–8:4](https://ref.ly/Rom8:3-Rom8:4), [ROM 8:11–8:14](https://ref.ly/Rom8:11-Rom8:14); [GAL 5:19–5:24](https://ref.ly/Gal5:19-Gal5:24); [EPH 4:22–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22-Eph4:24); [PHP 2:12–2:13](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12-Phil2:13); [COL 3:8–3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:8-Col3:12); [HEB 8:10](https://ref.ly/Heb8:10); [JER 31:33](https://ref.ly/Jer31:33)

* **Associated Passages:** Leviticus 11:44-45; Matthew 5:48; Matthew 5:43-44; Luke 6:27-28; Luke 6:35-36; Ephesians 4:31-5:3; 1 Peter 1:15-16; 3 John 1:11; Isaiah 51:4; Romans 7:12; Exodus 20:1-7; Deuteronomy 6:25; Psalms 119:137-138; Psalms 147:19-20; Proverbs 29:18; Isaiah 51:7; Amos 2:6-7; Isaiah 1:15-23; Amos 5:21-24; Micah 6:8; Ephesians 5:5; Colossians 3:5-7; John 1:14; Matthew 5:17-20; John 1:17-18; John 3:19; Hebrews 4:15; Deuteronomy 24:17-18; Leviticus 19:13-18; Leviticus 19:35-36; Deuteronomy 15:12-15; Deuteronomy 24:21-22; 1 Corinthians 6:19-20; Romans 12:1-2; Ezekiel 36:26-27; 1 Corinthians 6:9-11; Romans 8:3-4; Romans 8:11-14; Galatians 5:19-24; Ephesians 4:22-24; Philippians 2:12-13; Colossians 3:8-12; Hebrews 8:10; Jeremiah 31:33
* **Associated Articles:** 5375: law (ID: `5375@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5769: behaviour (ID: `5769@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6720: redemption (ID: `6720@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6744: sanctification (ID: `6744@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8154: righteousness (ID: `8154@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8240: ethics (ID: `8240@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8266: holiness (ID: `8266@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8324: purity (ID: `8324@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8313: nurture (id: 8313)

The activity of caring for others and nourishing them in the life of faith. This is necessary not only for children in the home but also for new or weak believers in the church.

The nurture of children in the home
-----------------------------------

### By parental instruction and example

**[DEU 4:9–4:10](https://ref.ly/Deut4:9-Deut4:10)** *See also* [DEU 6:4–6:9](https://ref.ly/Deut6:4-Deut6:9), [DEU 11:18–11:21](https://ref.ly/Deut11:18-Deut11:21); [PRO 22:6](https://ref.ly/Prov22:6); [EPH 6:4](https://ref.ly/Eph6:4); [COL 3:21](https://ref.ly/Col3:21); [2TI 1:5](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:5), [2TI 3:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:15)

### Examples of parental care

**[PRO 1:8–1:10](https://ref.ly/Prov1:8-Prov1:10)** *See also* [PRO 2:1–2:5](https://ref.ly/Prov2:1-Prov2:5), [PRO 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Prov3:1-Prov3:2), [PRO 4:1–4:4](https://ref.ly/Prov4:1-Prov4:4), [PRO 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Prov5:1-Prov5:2), [PRO 6:1–6:3](https://ref.ly/Prov6:1-Prov6:3), [PRO 6:20–6:24](https://ref.ly/Prov6:20-Prov6:24)

The nurture of young believers in the church
--------------------------------------------

### By the caring attitude of leaders

**[1TH 2:7–2:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:7-1Thess2:12)** *See also* [JHN 21:15–21:17](https://ref.ly/John21:15-John21:17); [ACT 20:18–20:20](https://ref.ly/Acts20:18-Acts20:20); [1CO 4:14–4:15](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:14-1Cor4:15); [1TH 3:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:10); [TIT 1:9](https://ref.ly/Titus1:9); [1PE 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:1-1Pet5:3)

### By the leader's pattern of life

**[TIT 2:6–2:7](https://ref.ly/Titus2:6-Titus2:7)** *See also* [ACT 20:33–20:35](https://ref.ly/Acts20:33-Acts20:35); [1CO 4:16–4:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:16-1Cor4:17), [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1); [PHP 4:9](https://ref.ly/Phil4:9); [1TH 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:5-1Thess1:6)

### By the caring attitude of fellow believers

**[1TH 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:14-1Thess5:15)** *See also* [ROM 14:1](https://ref.ly/Rom14:1); [1CO 8:9–8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:9-1Cor8:13); [GAL 6:1–6:2](https://ref.ly/Gal6:1-Gal6:2); [1TH 5:11](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:11); [TIT 2:3–2:5](https://ref.ly/Titus2:3-Titus2:5)

### By appropriate teaching

**[1PE 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:2)** *See also* [1CO 3:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:2), [1CO 14:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:20); [HEB 5:11–5:14](https://ref.ly/Heb5:11-Heb5:14)

### By encouraging spiritual growth

**[2PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:18)** *See also* [2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18); [EPH 4:15](https://ref.ly/Eph4:15); [2TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3)

* **Associated Passages:** Deuteronomy 4:9-10; Deuteronomy 6:4-9; Deuteronomy 11:18-21; Proverbs 22:6; Ephesians 6:4; Colossians 3:21; 2 Timothy 1:5; 2 Timothy 3:15; Proverbs 1:8-10; Proverbs 2:1-5; Proverbs 3:1-2; Proverbs 4:1-4; Proverbs 5:1-2; Proverbs 6:1-3; Proverbs 6:20-24; 1 Thessalonians 2:7-12; John 21:15-17; Acts 20:18-20; 1 Corinthians 4:14-15; 1 Thessalonians 3:10; Titus 1:9; 1 Peter 5:1-3; Titus 2:6-7; Acts 20:33-35; 1 Corinthians 4:16-17; 1 Corinthians 11:1; Philippians 4:9; 1 Thessalonians 1:5-6; 1 Thessalonians 5:14-15; Romans 14:1; 1 Corinthians 8:9-13; Galatians 6:1-2; 1 Thessalonians 5:11; Titus 2:3-5; 1 Peter 2:2; 1 Corinthians 3:2; 1 Corinthians 14:20; Hebrews 5:11-14; 2 Peter 3:18; 2 Corinthians 3:18; Ephesians 4:15; 2 Thessalonians 1:3

## 8314: orthodoxy (id: 8314)

The holding of religious beliefs that are in harmony with the accepted views of the community of faith. Right belief (orthodoxy) is to show itself in right practice (orthopraxis).

* **Associated Articles:** 8315: orthodoxy, in OT (ID: `8315@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8316: orthodoxy, in NT (ID: `8316@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8315: orthodoxy, in OT (id: 8315)

The acceptance of God's revelation of himself to his people that should lead to worship and obedience.

Foundational truths about Israel's God
--------------------------------------

### God is one

**[DEU 6:4](https://ref.ly/Deut6:4)**

### God is unique

**[DEU 4:39](https://ref.ly/Deut4:39)** *See also* [DEU 4:35](https://ref.ly/Deut4:35); [PSA 97:9](https://ref.ly/Ps97:9); [ISA 44:6–44:8](https://ref.ly/Isa44:6-Isa44:8)

### God is self\-existent

**[EXO 3:14](https://ref.ly/Exod3:14)**

### God is the Creator

**[ISA 40:28](https://ref.ly/Isa40:28)** *See also* [GEN 1:1](https://ref.ly/Gen1:1), [GEN 2:7](https://ref.ly/Gen2:7); [JOB 38:4](https://ref.ly/Job38:4)

### God will not tolerate rivals

[EXO 20:3–20:6](https://ref.ly/Exod20:3-Exod20:6) parallel [DEU 5:7–5:8](https://ref.ly/Deut5:7-Deut5:8); ; [DEU 8:19–8:20](https://ref.ly/Deut8:19-Deut8:20), [DEU 13:6–13:8](https://ref.ly/Deut13:6-Deut13:8); ; [ISA 42:8](https://ref.ly/Isa42:8)

### God commands universal worship

**[PSA 86:9–86:10](https://ref.ly/Ps86:9-Ps86:10)** *See also* [ISA 19:21](https://ref.ly/Isa19:21); [ZEC 8:20–8:22](https://ref.ly/Zech8:20-Zech8:22)

Right belief is passed on through the community of faith
--------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 145:4](https://ref.ly/Ps145:4)** *See also* [EXO 12:24–12:27](https://ref.ly/Exod12:24-Exod12:27); [DEU 6:6–6:8](https://ref.ly/Deut6:6-Deut6:8), [DEU 6:20–6:25](https://ref.ly/Deut6:20-Deut6:25); [JOS 4:20–4:24](https://ref.ly/Josh4:20-Josh4:24); [PSA 78:2–78:6](https://ref.ly/Ps78:2-Ps78:6)

Right belief demands right practice
-----------------------------------

### Reverent fear

**[DEU 10:12–10:13](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12-Deut10:13)**

### Worship

*See also* [DEU 12:4–12:7](https://ref.ly/Deut12:4-Deut12:7); [2KI 17:35–17:39](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:35-2Kgs17:39); [1CH 16:28–16:29](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:28-1Chr16:29) parallel [PSA 96:7–96:9](https://ref.ly/Ps96:7-Ps96:9); [PSA 95:6–95:7](https://ref.ly/Ps95:6-Ps95:7)

### Observance of festivals

[DEU 16:1–16:2](https://ref.ly/Deut16:1-Deut16:2), [DEU 16:9–16:17](https://ref.ly/Deut16:9-Deut16:17)

### Offering acceptable sacrifices

[LEV 1:2–1:4](https://ref.ly/Lev1:2-Lev1:4), [LEV 5:5–5:6](https://ref.ly/Lev5:5-Lev5:6); ; [MAL 1:7–1:8](https://ref.ly/Mal1:7-Mal1:8)

### Faithfulness to the covenant

[DEU 29:9–29:15](https://ref.ly/Deut29:9-Deut29:15); ; [PSA 25:10](https://ref.ly/Ps25:10)

### Devotion to God

**[DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5)** *See also* [DEU 11:1](https://ref.ly/Deut11:1); [1CH 22:19](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:19); [PSA 31:23](https://ref.ly/Ps31:23); [HOS 6:6](https://ref.ly/Hos6:6)

### Trust in God's faithfulness

**[PSA 4:5](https://ref.ly/Ps4:5), [PSA 33:4](https://ref.ly/Ps33:4)** *See also* [PSA 37:3–37:5](https://ref.ly/Ps37:3-Ps37:5), [PSA 115:9–115:11](https://ref.ly/Ps115:9-Ps115:11), [PSA 119:89–119:93](https://ref.ly/Ps119:89-Ps119:93)

### Obedience

**[DEU 5:32](https://ref.ly/Deut5:32)** *See also* [DEU 6:1–6:3](https://ref.ly/Deut6:1-Deut6:3), [DEU 26:16–26:19](https://ref.ly/Deut26:16-Deut26:19); [1SA 15:22](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:22); [ISA 30:21](https://ref.ly/Isa30:21); [JER 7:21–7:23](https://ref.ly/Jer7:21-Jer7:23)

### Justice in society

**[MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8)** *See also* [PSA 106:3](https://ref.ly/Ps106:3); [PRO 21:3](https://ref.ly/Prov21:3); [ISA 1:11–1:17](https://ref.ly/Isa1:11-Isa1:17), [ISA 56:1](https://ref.ly/Isa56:1)

Walking in God's ways
---------------------

### God's ways are right

**[HOS 14:9](https://ref.ly/Hos14:9)** *See also* [PRO 10:29](https://ref.ly/Prov10:29)

### Walking in God's ways brings his blessing

[GEN 18:19](https://ref.ly/Gen18:19); ; [DEU 5:33](https://ref.ly/Deut5:33), [DEU 28:9](https://ref.ly/Deut28:9), [DEU 30:19–30:20](https://ref.ly/Deut30:19-Deut30:20)

### Examples of kings who walked in God's ways

[2SA 22:22](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:22) parallel [PSA 18:21](https://ref.ly/Ps18:21) *David*; ; [2CH 14:2–14:4](https://ref.ly/2Chr14:2-2Chr14:4) parallel [1KI 15:11–15:12](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:11-1Kgs15:12) *Asa*; ; [2CH 17:3–17:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr17:3-2Chr17:6) *Jehoshaphat*; ; [2CH 26:4](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:4) parallel [2KI 15:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs15:3) *Uzziah (and Amaziah)*; ; [2CH 29:2](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:2) parallel [2KI 18:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:3) *Hezekiah*; ; [2CH 34:2](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:2) parallel [2KI 22:2](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:2) *Josiah*

* **Associated Passages:** Deuteronomy 6:4; Deuteronomy 4:39; Deuteronomy 4:35; Psalms 97:9; Isaiah 44:6-8; Exodus 3:14; Isaiah 40:28; Genesis 1:1; Genesis 2:7; Job 38:4; Exodus 20:3-6; Deuteronomy 5:7-8; Deuteronomy 8:19-20; Deuteronomy 13:6-8; Isaiah 42:8; Psalms 86:9-10; Isaiah 19:21; Zechariah 8:20-22; Psalms 145:4; Exodus 12:24-27; Deuteronomy 6:6-8; Deuteronomy 6:20-25; Joshua 4:20-24; Psalms 78:2-6; Deuteronomy 10:12-13; Deuteronomy 12:4-7; 2 Kings 17:35-39; 1 Chronicles 16:28-29; Psalms 96:7-9; Psalms 95:6-7; Deuteronomy 16:1-2; Deuteronomy 16:9-17; Leviticus 1:2-4; Leviticus 5:5-6; Malachi 1:7-8; Deuteronomy 29:9-15; Psalms 25:10; Deuteronomy 6:5; Deuteronomy 11:1; 1 Chronicles 22:19; Psalms 31:23; Hosea 6:6; Psalms 4:5; Psalms 33:4; Psalms 37:3-5; Psalms 115:9-11; Psalms 119:89-93; Deuteronomy 5:32; Deuteronomy 6:1-3; Deuteronomy 26:16-19; 1 Samuel 15:22; Isaiah 30:21; Jeremiah 7:21-23; Micah 6:8; Psalms 106:3; Proverbs 21:3; Isaiah 1:11-17; Isaiah 56:1; Hosea 14:9; Proverbs 10:29; Genesis 18:19; Deuteronomy 5:33; Deuteronomy 28:9; Deuteronomy 30:19-20; 2 Samuel 22:22; Psalms 18:21; 2 Chronicles 14:2-4; 1 Kings 15:11-12; 2 Chronicles 17:3-6; 2 Chronicles 26:4; 2 Kings 15:3; 2 Chronicles 29:2; 2 Kings 18:3; 2 Chronicles 34:2; 2 Kings 22:2
* **Associated Articles:** 1349: covenant, God's at Sinai (ID: `1349@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5359: justice (ID: `5359@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7354: feasts and festivals (ID: `7354@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7435: sacrifice, in OT (ID: `7435@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8030: trust (ID: `8030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8138: monotheism (ID: `8138@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8207: commitment (ID: `8207@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8225: devotion (ID: `8225@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8251: faithfulness, to God (ID: `8251@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8453: obedience (ID: `8453@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8622: worship (ID: `8622@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8768: idolatry (ID: `8768@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8316: orthodoxy, in NT (id: 8316)

Acceptance of the truth, especially about Jesus Christ, that is revealed by the Holy Spirit in the gospel and is passed on through the teaching of sound doctrine.

Orthodoxy is based on Jesus Christ who is the truth
---------------------------------------------------

**[EPH 4:21](https://ref.ly/Eph4:21)** *See also* [JHN 1:14](https://ref.ly/John1:14), [JHN 14:6](https://ref.ly/John14:6)

Orthodoxy is revealed in the gospel
-----------------------------------

**[GAL 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/Gal1:11-Gal1:12)**; **[2TI 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:13-2Tim1:14)** *See also* [2CO 11:3–11:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:3-2Cor11:4); [GAL 1:6–1:9](https://ref.ly/Gal1:6-Gal1:9), [GAL 2:5](https://ref.ly/Gal2:5), [GAL 2:14](https://ref.ly/Gal2:14); [COL 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/Col1:5-Col1:6); [1TI 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:9-1Tim1:11)

Orthodoxy is expressed in simple summaries of faith
---------------------------------------------------

**[1TI 3:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:16)** *See also* [ROM 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/Rom1:3-Rom1:4); [1CO 15:3–15:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:3-1Cor15:5); [PHP 2:5–2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5-Phil2:11)

Orthodoxy is maintained through God's true ministers
----------------------------------------------------

**[1TI 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:7)** *See also* [1TI 4:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:6); [2TI 2:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:2), [2TI 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:15)

Orthodoxy must be defended against error
----------------------------------------

**[TIT 1:9](https://ref.ly/Titus1:9)** *See also* [1TI 6:20–6:21](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:20-1Tim6:21)

Orthodoxy is shown by the attitude to the incarnation
-----------------------------------------------------

**[1JN 4:2–4:3](https://ref.ly/1John4:2-1John4:3)** *See also* [1JN 4:15](https://ref.ly/1John4:15), [1JN 5:1](https://ref.ly/1John5:1), [1JN 5:10](https://ref.ly/1John5:10)

Orthodoxy is revealed by the Holy Spirit
----------------------------------------

**[JHN 16:13](https://ref.ly/John16:13)** *See also* [JHN 14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:17), [JHN 14:26](https://ref.ly/John14:26), [JHN 15:26](https://ref.ly/John15:26); [1JN 2:27](https://ref.ly/1John2:27)

Orthodoxy is demonstrated in believers' behaviour
-------------------------------------------------

### Walking as children of light

[JHN 3:19–3:21](https://ref.ly/John3:19-John3:21); ; [EPH 5:8](https://ref.ly/Eph5:8); ; [1JN 1:7](https://ref.ly/1John1:7)

### Following Jesus Christ's example

[JHN 13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:15); ; [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1); ; [1PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21); ; [1JN 2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:6)

### Loving and obeying Jesus Christ

[JHN 14:15](https://ref.ly/John14:15), [JHN 14:21](https://ref.ly/John14:21), [JHN 14:23](https://ref.ly/John14:23), [JHN 15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:10); ; [1JN 2:3–2:5](https://ref.ly/1John2:3-1John2:5)

### Right belief requires right action

**[JAS 2:19](https://ref.ly/Jas2:19)** *See also* [JAS 2:14–2:18](https://ref.ly/Jas2:14-Jas2:18), [JAS 2:20–2:26](https://ref.ly/Jas2:20-Jas2:26)

Signs of a fall from orthodoxy
------------------------------

### False prophecy

**[1JN 4:1](https://ref.ly/1John4:1)** *See also* [MAT 7:22–7:23](https://ref.ly/Matt7:22-Matt7:23); [MRK 13:21–13:22](https://ref.ly/Mark13:21-Mark13:22) parallel [MAT 24:11](https://ref.ly/Matt24:11)

### Empty religion

**[MAT 15:9](https://ref.ly/Matt15:9)** parallel [MRK 7:7](https://ref.ly/Mark7:7) *See also* [ISA 29:13](https://ref.ly/Isa29:13); [MRK 7:8–7:9](https://ref.ly/Mark7:8-Mark7:9) parallel [MAT 15:3](https://ref.ly/Matt15:3)

### False teaching

**[1TI 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1-1Tim4:2)**; **[2TI 4:3–4:4](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:3-2Tim4:4)** *See also* [1TI 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:6-1Tim1:7), [1TI 6:3–6:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:3-1Tim6:5); [TIT 1:10–1:14](https://ref.ly/Titus1:10-Titus1:14); [2PE 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:1-2Pet2:2)

Examples of false teachings contrary to orthodoxy
-------------------------------------------------

### Christians are obliged to obey the entire OT law

[GAL 5:1–5:12](https://ref.ly/Gal5:1-Gal5:12)

### Justification comes only through the OT law

[GAL 2:15–2:21](https://ref.ly/Gal2:15-Gal2:21)

### The resurrection has already taken place

[2TI 2:16–2:18](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:16-2Tim2:18)

### Christians do not sin

**[1JN 1:8–1:10](https://ref.ly/1John1:8-1John1:10)**

* **Associated Passages:** Ephesians 4:21; John 1:14; John 14:6; Galatians 1:11-12; 2 Timothy 1:13-14; 2 Corinthians 11:3-4; Galatians 1:6-9; Galatians 2:5; Galatians 2:14; Colossians 1:5-6; 1 Timothy 1:9-11; 1 Timothy 3:16; Romans 1:3-4; 1 Corinthians 15:3-5; Philippians 2:5-11; 1 Timothy 2:7; 1 Timothy 4:6; 2 Timothy 2:2; 2 Timothy 2:15; Titus 1:9; 1 Timothy 6:20-21; 1 John 4:2-3; 1 John 4:15; 1 John 5:1; 1 John 5:10; John 16:13; John 14:17; John 14:26; John 15:26; 1 John 2:27; John 3:19-21; Ephesians 5:8; 1 John 1:7; John 13:15; 1 Corinthians 11:1; 1 Peter 2:21; 1 John 2:6; John 14:15; John 14:21; John 14:23; John 15:10; 1 John 2:3-5; James 2:19; James 2:14-18; James 2:20-26; 1 John 4:1; Matthew 7:22-23; Mark 13:21-22; Matthew 24:11; Matthew 15:9; Mark 7:7; Isaiah 29:13; Mark 7:8-9; Matthew 15:3; 1 Timothy 4:1-2; 2 Timothy 4:3-4; 1 Timothy 1:6-7; 1 Timothy 6:3-5; Titus 1:10-14; 2 Peter 2:1-2; Galatians 5:1-12; Galatians 2:15-21; 2 Timothy 2:16-18; 1 John 1:8-10

## 8318: patience (id: 8318)

The quality of forbearance and self\-control which shows itself particularly in a willingness to wait upon God and his will. Believers are called upon to be patient in their expectations of God's actions, and in their relationships with one another.

God's patience
--------------

**[EXO 34:6–34:7](https://ref.ly/Exod34:6-Exod34:7)**; **[ROM 2:4](https://ref.ly/Rom2:4)** *See also* [NEH 9:30](https://ref.ly/Neh9:30); [ISA 48:9](https://ref.ly/Isa48:9), [ISA 65:2](https://ref.ly/Isa65:2); [JOL 2:13](https://ref.ly/Joel2:13); [JON 4:2](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:2); [NAM 1:3](https://ref.ly/Nah1:3); [ACT 17:30](https://ref.ly/Acts17:30); [ROM 3:25](https://ref.ly/Rom3:25), [ROM 9:22](https://ref.ly/Rom9:22); [1PE 3:20](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:20); [2PE 3:9](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:9)

The patience of Jesus Christ
----------------------------

**[1TI 1:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:16)** *See also* [MAT 17:17](https://ref.ly/Matt17:17) parallels [MRK 9:19](https://ref.ly/Mark9:19), [LUK 9:41](https://ref.ly/Luke9:41); [JHN 14:9](https://ref.ly/John14:9); [2PE 3:15](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:15); [REV 2:21](https://ref.ly/Rev2:21)

Other examples of patience
--------------------------

[2TH 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:4) *the Thessalonian believers*; ; [HEB 6:15](https://ref.ly/Heb6:15); ; [JAS 5:11](https://ref.ly/Jas5:11) *Job*; [REV 1:9](https://ref.ly/Rev1:9), [REV 2:2](https://ref.ly/Rev2:2)

Patience is part of the fruit of the Spirit
-------------------------------------------

**[GAL 5:22](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22)** *See also* [COL 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/Col1:10-Col1:11)

God's people should exercise patience
-------------------------------------

**[PRO 19:11](https://ref.ly/Prov19:11)**; **[COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12)** *See also* [PRO 14:29](https://ref.ly/Prov14:29), [PRO 16:32](https://ref.ly/Prov16:32), [PRO 25:15](https://ref.ly/Prov25:15); [MAT 6:14–6:15](https://ref.ly/Matt6:14-Matt6:15), [MAT 18:35](https://ref.ly/Matt18:35)

People who need particular patience
-----------------------------------

### Christian leaders

**[2TI 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:2)** *See also* [2TI 3:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:10)

### Christian masters

**[EPH 6:9](https://ref.ly/Eph6:9)**

Patience is necessary in church life
------------------------------------

**[EPH 4:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:2)** *See also* [ROM 15:1](https://ref.ly/Rom15:1); [COL 3:13](https://ref.ly/Col3:13); [1TH 5:14](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:14)

God's word is to be received with patience
------------------------------------------

**[HEB 13:22](https://ref.ly/Heb13:22)** *See also* [PRO 2:1–2:5](https://ref.ly/Prov2:1-Prov2:5); [2TI 4:3](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:3)

Patience is a characteristic of love
------------------------------------

**[1CO 13:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:4)**

Patience is an aspect of faith and hope
---------------------------------------

**[PSA 33:20](https://ref.ly/Ps33:20)**; **[JAS 5:7–5:8](https://ref.ly/Jas5:7-Jas5:8)** [PSA 5:2](https://ref.ly/Ps5:2), [PSA 27:14](https://ref.ly/Ps27:14), [PSA 37:7](https://ref.ly/Ps37:7), [PSA 37:34](https://ref.ly/Ps37:34), [PSA 38:15](https://ref.ly/Ps38:15); [PSA 119:166](https://ref.ly/Ps119:166), [PSA 130:5–130:6](https://ref.ly/Ps130:5-Ps130:6); ; [PRO 20:22](https://ref.ly/Prov20:22); ; [ISA 8:17](https://ref.ly/Isa8:17), [ISA 30:18](https://ref.ly/Isa30:18); ; [LAM 3:24](https://ref.ly/Lam3:24), [LAM 3:26](https://ref.ly/Lam3:26); ; [MIC 7:7](https://ref.ly/Mic7:7); ; [ZEP 3:8](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:8); ; [ACT 1:4](https://ref.ly/Acts1:4) *Jesus Christ's instructions to the apostles to wait for the Holy Spirit*; ; [ROM 8:25](https://ref.ly/Rom8:25), [ROM 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rom12:12); ; [TIT 2:13](https://ref.ly/Titus2:13); ; [HEB 6:12](https://ref.ly/Heb6:12), [HEB 6:15](https://ref.ly/Heb6:15) *the example of Abraham*; ; [JAS 5:10](https://ref.ly/Jas5:10); ; [REV 6:11](https://ref.ly/Rev6:11)

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 34:6-7; Romans 2:4; Nehemiah 9:30; Isaiah 48:9; Isaiah 65:2; Joel 2:13; Jonah 4:2; Nahum 1:3; Acts 17:30; Romans 3:25; Romans 9:22; 1 Peter 3:20; 2 Peter 3:9; 1 Timothy 1:16; Matthew 17:17; Mark 9:19; Luke 9:41; John 14:9; 2 Peter 3:15; Revelation 2:21; 2 Thessalonians 1:4; Hebrews 6:15; James 5:11; Revelation 1:9; Revelation 2:2; Galatians 5:22; Colossians 1:10-11; Proverbs 19:11; Colossians 3:12; Proverbs 14:29; Proverbs 16:32; Proverbs 25:15; Matthew 6:14-15; Matthew 18:35; 2 Timothy 4:2; 2 Timothy 3:10; Ephesians 6:9; Ephesians 4:2; Romans 15:1; Colossians 3:13; 1 Thessalonians 5:14; Hebrews 13:22; Proverbs 2:1-5; 2 Timothy 4:3; 1 Corinthians 13:4; Psalms 33:20; James 5:7-8; Psalms 5:2; Psalms 27:14; Psalms 37:7; Psalms 37:34; Psalms 38:15; Psalms 119:166; Psalms 130:5-6; Proverbs 20:22; Isaiah 8:17; Isaiah 30:18; Lamentations 3:24; Lamentations 3:26; Micah 7:7; Zephaniah 3:8; Acts 1:4; Romans 8:25; Romans 12:12; Titus 2:13; Hebrews 6:12; James 5:10; Revelation 6:11
