## 8341: separation (id: 8341)

A setting apart. Separation is at the heart of the biblical idea of holiness. God is separate from his creation and has set apart his people from the world. Sin causes alienation between God and humanity, making necessary the reconciling work of Jesus Christ. The end of the age will bring the final separation between the righteous and the wicked.

### God is without equal

**[EXO 15:11](https://ref.ly/Exod15:11)** *See also* [PSA 89:6](https://ref.ly/Ps89:6); [ISA 40:25–40:26](https://ref.ly/Isa40:25-Isa40:26)

### God is separate from his creation

**[ISA 40:22](https://ref.ly/Isa40:22)** *See also* [GEN 1:1](https://ref.ly/Gen1:1); [ISA 29:16](https://ref.ly/Isa29:16), [ISA 45:11–45:12](https://ref.ly/Isa45:11-Isa45:12); [ROM 1:25](https://ref.ly/Rom1:25)

The separateness of God's people
--------------------------------

**[DEU 7:6](https://ref.ly/Deut7:6)** *See also* [EXO 19:5–19:6](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5-Exod19:6); [DEU 14:2](https://ref.ly/Deut14:2); [PSA 135:4](https://ref.ly/Ps135:4)**[1PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9)** *See also* [1CO 6:19–6:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:19-1Cor6:20); [TIT 2:14](https://ref.ly/Titus2:14)

### Separation from the world

**[LEV 20:26](https://ref.ly/Lev20:26)** *See also* [NUM 23:9](https://ref.ly/Num23:9); [NEH 9:2](https://ref.ly/Neh9:2), [NEH 10:28](https://ref.ly/Neh10:28)**[JHN 15:18–15:19](https://ref.ly/John15:18-John15:19)** *See also* [JHN 17:16](https://ref.ly/John17:16); [PHP 3:20](https://ref.ly/Phil3:20); [1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11)

### Separation from sin

**[2CO 6:17](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:17)** *See also* [ISA 52:11](https://ref.ly/Isa52:11); [LEV 15:31](https://ref.ly/Lev15:31); [EZR 6:21](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:21); [1CO 6:18](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:18), [1CO 15:34](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:34); [2CO 7:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:1)

### Avoidance of evil association

**[1CO 15:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:33)** *See also* [PRO 13:20](https://ref.ly/Prov13:20)DEU [7:2–7:3](https://ref.ly/Prov7:2-Prov7:3); [JOS 23:7](https://ref.ly/Josh23:7)[EZR 4:3](https://ref.ly/Ezra4:3), [EZR 10:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:11); [PSA 119:115](https://ref.ly/Ps119:115); [2CO 6:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:14)

### Excommunication

Israelites refusing to follow God's commands to be cut off from God's people: [LEV 18:29](https://ref.ly/Lev18:29); ; [NUM 15:30](https://ref.ly/Num15:30), [NUM 19:20](https://ref.ly/Num19:20); ; [MAT 18:15–18:17](https://ref.ly/Matt18:15-Matt18:17) *separation from unrepentant believers*; ; [ROM 16:17](https://ref.ly/Rom16:17) *separation from false teachers*; ; [1CO 5:9–5:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:9-1Cor5:13) *separation from wilfully sinful believers*; ; [2TH 3:6](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:6) *separation from wilfully disobedient believers*; ; [TIT 3:9–3:11](https://ref.ly/Titus3:9-Titus3:11) *separation from divisive people*

### Separation for service to God

[NUM 6:2–6:3](https://ref.ly/Num6:2-Num6:3) *the Nazirites*; ; [NUM 16:9](https://ref.ly/Num16:9) *the Levites*; ; [1CH 23:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr23:13) *Aaron and his descendants*; ; [1CH 25:1](https://ref.ly/1Chr25:1) *prophets*; ; [JER 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jer1:5) *Jeremiah*; [ROM 1:1](https://ref.ly/Rom1:1); ; [GAL 1:15](https://ref.ly/Gal1:15)

### Separation of holy places

[EXO 26:33](https://ref.ly/Exod26:33) *the Most Holy Place separated by a curtain*; ; [EXO 33:7](https://ref.ly/Exod33:7) *the Tent of Meeting placed outside the camp*; ; [EZK 42:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek42:20) *Ezekiel's temple separated by a wall*

Separation caused by sin
------------------------

### Separation from God

**[ISA 59:2](https://ref.ly/Isa59:2)** *See also* [HAB 1:13](https://ref.ly/Hab1:13); [EPH 4:18](https://ref.ly/Eph4:18); [COL 1:21](https://ref.ly/Col1:21)

### Separation at the final judgment

**[MAT 25:32–25:33](https://ref.ly/Matt25:32-Matt25:33)** *See also* [MAT 13:40–13:42](https://ref.ly/Matt13:40-Matt13:42), [MAT 13:47–13:50](https://ref.ly/Matt13:47-Matt13:50)

Separation of people from one another
-------------------------------------

[RUT 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Ruth1:16-Ruth1:17) *Ruth will not be separated from Naomi*; ; [2KI 2:11](https://ref.ly/2Kgs2:11) *Elisha separated from Elijah*; ; [PHM 1:15](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:15) *Philemon separated from Onesimus*; ; [JHN 4:9](https://ref.ly/John4:9) *separation between Jews and Samaritans*; ; [EPH 2:11–2:12](https://ref.ly/Eph2:11-Eph2:12) *separation between Jews and Gentiles*

### The pain of separation

**[ACT 20:37–20:38](https://ref.ly/Acts20:37-Acts20:38)** *See also* [1SA 20:41](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:41); [JHN 16:20](https://ref.ly/John16:20) *Jesus Christ foretells his death and resurrection*; [2TI 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:4)

### The pain of separation through death

**[ACT 8:2](https://ref.ly/Acts8:2)** *See also* [GEN 37:33–37:35](https://ref.ly/Gen37:33-Gen37:35); [JER 31:15](https://ref.ly/Jer31:15); [MAT 2:18](https://ref.ly/Matt2:18)

### Husband and wife not to be separated

**[MAT 19:5–19:6](https://ref.ly/Matt19:5-Matt19:6)** parallel [MRK 10:7–10:9](https://ref.ly/Mark10:7-Mark10:9) *See also* [GEN 2:24](https://ref.ly/Gen2:24); [1CO 7:10–7:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:10-1Cor7:13)

Reconciliation through Jesus Christ ends the separation from God
----------------------------------------------------------------

**[2CO 5:18–5:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:18-2Cor5:20)** *See also* [MAT 27:46](https://ref.ly/Matt27:46) parallel [MRK 15:34](https://ref.ly/Mark15:34); [PSA 22:1](https://ref.ly/Ps22:1) *Reconciliation with God is possible because Jesus Christ bore the punishment of separation from God that human sin deserves*; [MAT 27:51](https://ref.ly/Matt27:51) parallels [MRK 15:38](https://ref.ly/Mark15:38), [LUK 23:45](https://ref.ly/Luke23:45); [ROM 8:35–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:35-Rom8:39) *Nothing can separate believers from God's love shown in Christ*; [EPH 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Eph2:14-Eph2:15) *Jew and Gentile reconciled through mutual reconciliation to God*

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 15:11; Psalms 89:6; Isaiah 40:25-26; Isaiah 40:22; Genesis 1:1; Isaiah 29:16; Isaiah 45:11-12; Romans 1:25; Deuteronomy 7:6; Exodus 19:5-6; Deuteronomy 14:2; Psalms 135:4; 1 Peter 2:9; 1 Corinthians 6:19-20; Titus 2:14; Leviticus 20:26; Numbers 23:9; Nehemiah 9:2; Nehemiah 10:28; John 15:18-19; John 17:16; Philippians 3:20; 1 Peter 2:11; 2 Corinthians 6:17; Isaiah 52:11; Leviticus 15:31; Ezra 6:21; 1 Corinthians 6:18; 1 Corinthians 15:34; 2 Corinthians 7:1; 1 Corinthians 15:33; Proverbs 13:20; Proverbs 7:2-3; Joshua 23:7; Ezra 4:3; Ezra 10:11; Psalms 119:115; 2 Corinthians 6:14; Leviticus 18:29; Numbers 15:30; Numbers 19:20; Matthew 18:15-17; Romans 16:17; 1 Corinthians 5:9-13; 2 Thessalonians 3:6; Titus 3:9-11; Numbers 6:2-3; Numbers 16:9; 1 Chronicles 23:13; 1 Chronicles 25:1; Jeremiah 1:5; Romans 1:1; Galatians 1:15; Exodus 26:33; Exodus 33:7; Ezekiel 42:20; Isaiah 59:2; Habakkuk 1:13; Ephesians 4:18; Colossians 1:21; Matthew 25:32-33; Matthew 13:40-42; Matthew 13:47-50; Ruth 1:16-17; 2 Kings 2:11; Philemon 1:15; John 4:9; Ephesians 2:11-12; Acts 20:37-38; 1 Samuel 20:41; John 16:20; 2 Timothy 1:4; Acts 8:2; Genesis 37:33-35; Jeremiah 31:15; Matthew 2:18; Matthew 19:5-6; Mark 10:7-9; Genesis 2:24; 1 Corinthians 7:10-13; 2 Corinthians 5:18-20; Matthew 27:46; Mark 15:34; Psalms 22:1; Matthew 27:51; Mark 15:38; Luke 23:45; Romans 8:35-39; Ephesians 2:14-15
* **Associated Articles:** 1065: God, holiness of (ID: `1065@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5004: human race, and sin (ID: `5004@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5675: divorce (ID: `5675@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6026: sin, God's judgment on (ID: `6026@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6109: alienation (ID: `6109@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6717: reconciliation, of the world to God (ID: `6717@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7025: church, unity and fellowship of (ID: `7025@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7344: curtain (ID: `7344@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7922: fellowship, with God (ID: `7922@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8270: holiness, as set apart for God (ID: `8270@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9020: death (ID: `9020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9240: last judgment (ID: `9240@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8342: servanthood (id: 8342)

The state of being the servant of others, especially of God. Scripture stresses the privileges and responsibilities of being a servant of God and points to Jesus Christ as the model of servanthood.

* **Associated Articles:** 8343: servanthood, in society (ID: `8343@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8344: servanthood, in life of believers (ID: `8344@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8345: servanthood, and worship of God (ID: `8345@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8343: servanthood, in society (id: 8343)

Servants and slaves were an important feature of everyday life in biblical times. The idea of servanthood is used both literally and metaphorically throughout Scripture.

Laws of servanthood
-------------------

**[EXO 21:2–21:6](https://ref.ly/Exod21:2-Exod21:6)** parallel [DEU 15:12–15:18](https://ref.ly/Deut15:12-Deut15:18) *The words “servant” and “slave” are the same in Hebrew, but according to OT law, an Israelite servant was to be accorded more rights than a foreign slave.* *See also* [GEN 17:13](https://ref.ly/Gen17:13); [EXO 12:44](https://ref.ly/Exod12:44), [EXO 20:10](https://ref.ly/Exod20:10) parallel [DEU 5:14](https://ref.ly/Deut5:14); [LEV 25:39–25:55](https://ref.ly/Lev25:39-Lev25:55); [DEU 21:10–21:14](https://ref.ly/Deut21:10-Deut21:14), [DEU 29:10–29:11](https://ref.ly/Deut29:10-Deut29:11); [1CH 2:34–2:35](https://ref.ly/1Chr2:34-1Chr2:35)

Citizens referred to as servants of the king
--------------------------------------------

**[1SA 17:34](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:34)** *See also* [2SA 18:29](https://ref.ly/2Sam18:29); [2KI 5:6](https://ref.ly/2Kgs5:6); [EZR 4:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra4:11); [PRO 14:35](https://ref.ly/Prov14:35); [MAT 18:23](https://ref.ly/Matt18:23)

Kings as servants of other kings
--------------------------------

**[2KI 16:7](https://ref.ly/2Kgs16:7)** *See also* [2SA 10:19](https://ref.ly/2Sam10:19) parallel [1CH 19:19](https://ref.ly/1Chr19:19); [2KI 17:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:3), [2KI 24:1](https://ref.ly/2Kgs24:1); [ISA 60:10](https://ref.ly/Isa60:10)

Servant as a self\-designated title of respect
----------------------------------------------

**[2SA 9:2](https://ref.ly/2Sam9:2)** *See also* [GEN 19:2](https://ref.ly/Gen19:2), [GEN 32:4](https://ref.ly/Gen32:4); [1SA 17:34](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:34); [2SA 14:6](https://ref.ly/2Sam14:6); [2KI 2:15–2:16](https://ref.ly/2Kgs2:15-2Kgs2:16), [2KI 4:1](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:1), [2KI 6:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs6:3); [DAN 1:12–1:13](https://ref.ly/Dan1:12-Dan1:13), [DAN 2:4](https://ref.ly/Dan2:4)

Servanthood in Proverbs
-----------------------

**[PRO 14:35](https://ref.ly/Prov14:35)** *See also* [PRO 11:29](https://ref.ly/Prov11:29), [PRO 12:9](https://ref.ly/Prov12:9), [PRO 17:2](https://ref.ly/Prov17:2), [PRO 29:19](https://ref.ly/Prov29:19), [PRO 30:10](https://ref.ly/Prov30:10), [PRO 30:21–30:23](https://ref.ly/Prov30:21-Prov30:23)

Servanthood in the NT
---------------------

**[MAT 23:8–23:12](https://ref.ly/Matt23:8-Matt23:12)** *See also* [MAT 6:24](https://ref.ly/Matt6:24); [LUK 17:7–17:10](https://ref.ly/Luke17:7-Luke17:10); [JHN 15:20](https://ref.ly/John15:20); [ROM 12:3–12:8](https://ref.ly/Rom12:3-Rom12:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 21:2-6; Deuteronomy 15:12-18; Genesis 17:13; Exodus 12:44; Exodus 20:10; Deuteronomy 5:14; Leviticus 25:39-55; Deuteronomy 21:10-14; Deuteronomy 29:10-11; 1 Chronicles 2:34-35; 1 Samuel 17:34; 2 Samuel 18:29; 2 Kings 5:6; Ezra 4:11; Proverbs 14:35; Matthew 18:23; 2 Kings 16:7; 2 Samuel 10:19; 1 Chronicles 19:19; 2 Kings 17:3; 2 Kings 24:1; Isaiah 60:10; 2 Samuel 9:2; Genesis 19:2; Genesis 32:4; 2 Samuel 14:6; 2 Kings 2:15-16; 2 Kings 4:1; 2 Kings 6:3; Daniel 1:12-13; Daniel 2:4; Proverbs 11:29; Proverbs 12:9; Proverbs 17:2; Proverbs 29:19; Proverbs 30:10; Proverbs 30:21-23; Matthew 23:8-12; Matthew 6:24; Luke 17:7-10; John 15:20; Romans 12:3-8
* **Associated Articles:** 5219: authority, of human institutions (ID: `5219@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5257: civil authorities (ID: `5257@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5404: masters (ID: `5404@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5520: servants (ID: `5520@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5700: headship (ID: `5700@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7446: slavery (ID: `7446@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8344: servanthood, in life of believers (id: 8344)

Servanthood as an expression of subservience is an integral aspect of a person's relationship with God.

Servants of God in the OT
-------------------------

### Abraham

**[GEN 18:5](https://ref.ly/Gen18:5)** *See also* [GEN 26:24](https://ref.ly/Gen26:24); [DEU 9:27](https://ref.ly/Deut9:27); [PSA 105:6](https://ref.ly/Ps105:6), [PSA 105:42](https://ref.ly/Ps105:42)

### Moses

**[EXO 14:31](https://ref.ly/Exod14:31)** *See also* [NUM 12:7–12:8](https://ref.ly/Num12:7-Num12:8); [DEU 34:5](https://ref.ly/Deut34:5); [JOS 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Josh1:1-Josh1:2), [JOS 1:7](https://ref.ly/Josh1:7), [JOS 1:13](https://ref.ly/Josh1:13), [JOS 1:15](https://ref.ly/Josh1:15), [JOS 8:31](https://ref.ly/Josh8:31), [JOS 8:33](https://ref.ly/Josh8:33), [JOS 11:15](https://ref.ly/Josh11:15), [JOS 22:2](https://ref.ly/Josh22:2), [JOS 22:4–22:5](https://ref.ly/Josh22:4-Josh22:5); [2KI 18:12](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:12); [2CH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Chr1:3); [HEB 3:5](https://ref.ly/Heb3:5); [REV 15:3](https://ref.ly/Rev15:3)

### Joshua

**[JDG 2:8](https://ref.ly/Judg2:8)** *See also* [JOS 24:29](https://ref.ly/Josh24:29)

### David

**[2SA 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Sam3:18)** *See also* [2SA 7:5](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:5) parallel [1CH 17:4](https://ref.ly/1Chr17:4); [2SA 7:8](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:8) parallel [1CH 17:7](https://ref.ly/1Chr17:7); [2SA 7:18–7:20](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:18-2Sam7:20), [2SA 7:25](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:25); [1CH 21:8](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:8); [PSA 78:70](https://ref.ly/Ps78:70), [PSA 89:3](https://ref.ly/Ps89:3), [PSA 89:20](https://ref.ly/Ps89:20), [PSA 132:10](https://ref.ly/Ps132:10); [EZK 34:23–34:24](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:23-Ezek34:24); [LUK 1:69](https://ref.ly/Luke1:69); [ACT 4:25–4:26](https://ref.ly/Acts4:25-Acts4:26)

----------------------------

### Jesus Christ's teaching on servanthood

**[MAT 6:24](https://ref.ly/Matt6:24)** parallel [LUK 16:13](https://ref.ly/Luke16:13) *See also* [MAT 25:31–25:46](https://ref.ly/Matt25:31-Matt25:46); [JHN 12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:26), [JHN 13:13–13:17](https://ref.ly/John13:13-John13:17), [JHN 15:15](https://ref.ly/John15:15), [JHN 15:20](https://ref.ly/John15:20)

### Parables on servanthood

[MAT 20:1–20:16](https://ref.ly/Matt20:1-Matt20:16), [MAT 24:45–24:51](https://ref.ly/Matt24:45-Matt24:51) parallel [LUK 12:42–12:46](https://ref.ly/Luke12:42-Luke12:46); ; [MAT 25:14–25:30](https://ref.ly/Matt25:14-Matt25:30) parallel [LUK 19:12–19:27](https://ref.ly/Luke19:12-Luke19:27); ; [LUK 12:35–12:40](https://ref.ly/Luke12:35-Luke12:40), [LUK 17:7–17:10](https://ref.ly/Luke17:7-Luke17:10)

Servants of God in the NT
-------------------------

**[ACT 16:17](https://ref.ly/Acts16:17)** *See also* [ACT 2:18](https://ref.ly/Acts2:18), [ACT 4:29](https://ref.ly/Acts4:29); [2PE 1:1](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:1); [JUD 1:1](https://ref.ly/Jude1:1)

Paul as a servant
-----------------

### A servant of God

**[ROM 15:17](https://ref.ly/Rom15:17)** *See also* [ROM 1:9](https://ref.ly/Rom1:9); [2CO 6:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:4); [2TI 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:3)

### A servant of Jesus Christ

**[ROM 1:1](https://ref.ly/Rom1:1)** *See also* [GAL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Gal1:10); [PHP 1:1](https://ref.ly/Phil1:1)

### A servant of the gospel

**[EPH 3:7](https://ref.ly/Eph3:7)** *See also* [COL 1:23](https://ref.ly/Col1:23)

### A servant of the church

**[2CO 4:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:5)** *See also* [2CO 13:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:4); [COL 1:24–1:25](https://ref.ly/Col1:24-Col1:25)

Christian servanthood
---------------------

### Gifts of service

**[1PE 4:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:10)** *See also* [ROM 12:7](https://ref.ly/Rom12:7); [1CO 12:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:5); [EPH 4:12](https://ref.ly/Eph4:12); [1PE 2:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:16)

## 8345: servanthood, and worship of God (id: 8345)

The biblical understanding of servanthood has its foundation in people serving God in worship. The terms for “service” and “worship” are often interchangeable.

Worship is a central aspect of serving God
------------------------------------------

**[EXO 3:12](https://ref.ly/Exod3:12)** *See also* [EXO 4:23](https://ref.ly/Exod4:23), [EXO 8:1](https://ref.ly/Exod8:1), [EXO 8:20](https://ref.ly/Exod8:20), [EXO 10:8](https://ref.ly/Exod10:8); [JOS 22:27](https://ref.ly/Josh22:27); [PSA 100:2](https://ref.ly/Ps100:2), [PSA 102:22](https://ref.ly/Ps102:22); [LUK 4:8](https://ref.ly/Luke4:8)

Worship entails total obedience, not merely correct religious observances
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[DEU 10:12–10:13](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12-Deut10:13)** *See also* [AMO 5:22–5:24](https://ref.ly/Amos5:22-Amos5:24); [MIC 6:6–6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:6-Mic6:8)

Worship and service to God must be exclusive
--------------------------------------------

**[MAT 4:10](https://ref.ly/Matt4:10)** parallel [LUK 4:8](https://ref.ly/Luke4:8) *See also* [DEU 6:13](https://ref.ly/Deut6:13)

Serving false gods
------------------

### Worshipping false gods forbidden

**[EXO 20:3–20:5](https://ref.ly/Exod20:3-Exod20:5)** parallel [DEU 5:8–5:9](https://ref.ly/Deut5:8-Deut5:9) *See also* [EXO 23:24](https://ref.ly/Exod23:24), [EXO 34:14](https://ref.ly/Exod34:14); [JOS 23:7](https://ref.ly/Josh23:7)

### Warnings against serving false gods

**[2CH 7:19–7:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:19-2Chr7:20)** *See also* [DEU 7:3–7:4](https://ref.ly/Deut7:3-Deut7:4); [JOS 23:16](https://ref.ly/Josh23:16), [JOS 24:20](https://ref.ly/Josh24:20)

### Examples of idolatrous service

**[1KI 16:31](https://ref.ly/1Kgs16:31)** *See also* [JDG 2:11](https://ref.ly/Judg2:11), [JDG 2:13](https://ref.ly/Judg2:13); [2KI 17:33](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:33); [JER 2:20](https://ref.ly/Jer2:20), [JER 11:10](https://ref.ly/Jer11:10); [ROM 1:25](https://ref.ly/Rom1:25)

### Refusal to serve false gods

**[DAN 3:12](https://ref.ly/Dan3:12)** *See also* [JOS 24:16–24:18](https://ref.ly/Josh24:16-Josh24:18); [DAN 3:18](https://ref.ly/Dan3:18), [DAN 3:28–3:29](https://ref.ly/Dan3:28-Dan3:29)

### Judgment for serving false gods

**[JDG 10:11–10:13](https://ref.ly/Judg10:11-Judg10:13)** *See also* [JDG 10:6–10:10](https://ref.ly/Judg10:6-Judg10:10); [EZK 20:30–20:38](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:30-Ezek20:38)

The service of the Levites and the priesthood
---------------------------------------------

### Consecration of the priesthood

**[EXO 29:1](https://ref.ly/Exod29:1)** *See also* [EXO 28:1](https://ref.ly/Exod28:1), [EXO 28:41](https://ref.ly/Exod28:41), [EXO 29:44](https://ref.ly/Exod29:44), [EXO 40:12–40:16](https://ref.ly/Exod40:12-Exod40:16); [NUM 3:9–3:13](https://ref.ly/Num3:9-Num3:13)

### Service in the Tent of Meeting

[NUM 4:3](https://ref.ly/Num4:3), [NUM 4:23](https://ref.ly/Num4:23), [NUM 4:30](https://ref.ly/Num4:30), [NUM 4:35](https://ref.ly/Num4:35), [NUM 4:39](https://ref.ly/Num4:39), [NUM 4:43](https://ref.ly/Num4:43), [NUM 18:7](https://ref.ly/Num18:7)

### Service in the temple

**[1CH 23:2–23:5](https://ref.ly/1Chr23:2-1Chr23:5)** *See also* [1CH 23:24–23:32](https://ref.ly/1Chr23:24-1Chr23:32), [1CH 24:3](https://ref.ly/1Chr24:3), [1CH 24:5](https://ref.ly/1Chr24:5), [1CH 24:19](https://ref.ly/1Chr24:19), [1CH 25:1](https://ref.ly/1Chr25:1), [1CH 25:6–25:8](https://ref.ly/1Chr25:6-1Chr25:8) *musicians and singers*; [1CH 26:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr26:12) *gatekeepers*; [1CH 26:20](https://ref.ly/1Chr26:20) *treasurers*; [1CH 26:29–26:32](https://ref.ly/1Chr26:29-1Chr26:32); [EZR 7:7](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:7), [EZR 8:20](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:20); [NEH 7:46](https://ref.ly/Neh7:46), [NEH 7:60](https://ref.ly/Neh7:60)

### The promise of restored service in the new temple

**[EZK 44:15](https://ref.ly/Ezek44:15)** *See also* [EZK 44:10–44:14](https://ref.ly/Ezek44:10-Ezek44:14), [EZK 44:24](https://ref.ly/Ezek44:24), [EZK 45:5](https://ref.ly/Ezek45:5)

### Examples of priestly service

[LUK 1:5](https://ref.ly/Luke1:5), [LUK 1:8–1:10](https://ref.ly/Luke1:8-Luke1:10), [LUK 1:23](https://ref.ly/Luke1:23)

### The true service of Jesus Christ as high priest

**[HEB 8:1–8:2](https://ref.ly/Heb8:1-Heb8:2)** *Hebrews sees the OT priesthood and its services as superseded by Jesus Christ.* *See also* [HEB 8:3–8:6](https://ref.ly/Heb8:3-Heb8:6)

The Christian's life as an act of worship
-----------------------------------------

**[ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)** *See also* [REV 1:6](https://ref.ly/Rev1:6), [REV 5:10](https://ref.ly/Rev5:10)

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 3:12; Exodus 4:23; Exodus 8:1; Exodus 8:20; Exodus 10:8; Joshua 22:27; Psalms 100:2; Psalms 102:22; Luke 4:8; Deuteronomy 10:12-13; Amos 5:22-24; Micah 6:6-8; Matthew 4:10; Deuteronomy 6:13; Exodus 20:3-5; Deuteronomy 5:8-9; Exodus 23:24; Exodus 34:14; Joshua 23:7; 2 Chronicles 7:19-20; Deuteronomy 7:3-4; Joshua 23:16; Joshua 24:20; 1 Kings 16:31; Judges 2:11; Judges 2:13; 2 Kings 17:33; Jeremiah 2:20; Jeremiah 11:10; Romans 1:25; Daniel 3:12; Joshua 24:16-18; Daniel 3:18; Daniel 3:28-29; Judges 10:11-13; Judges 10:6-10; Ezekiel 20:30-38; Exodus 29:1; Exodus 28:1; Exodus 28:41; Exodus 29:44; Exodus 40:12-16; Numbers 3:9-13; Numbers 4:3; Numbers 4:23; Numbers 4:30; Numbers 4:35; Numbers 4:39; Numbers 4:43; Numbers 18:7; 1 Chronicles 23:2-5; 1 Chronicles 23:24-32; 1 Chronicles 24:3; 1 Chronicles 24:5; 1 Chronicles 24:19; 1 Chronicles 25:1; 1 Chronicles 25:6-8; 1 Chronicles 26:12; 1 Chronicles 26:20; 1 Chronicles 26:29-32; Ezra 7:7; Ezra 8:20; Nehemiah 7:46; Nehemiah 7:60; Ezekiel 44:15; Ezekiel 44:10-14; Ezekiel 44:24; Ezekiel 45:5; Luke 1:5; Luke 1:8-10; Luke 1:23; Hebrews 8:1-2; Hebrews 8:3-6; Romans 12:1; Revelation 1:6; Revelation 5:10

## 8347: spiritual growth (id: 8347)

Scripture uses a number of images to emphasise that believers are meant to grow in their faith, understanding, holiness and commitment. It also provides advice on how this may be achieved.

* **Associated Articles:** 8348: spiritual growth, nature of (ID: `8348@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8349: spiritual growth, means of (ID: `8349@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8348: spiritual growth, nature of (id: 8348)

Having given spiritual life to his people, God expects them to grow to maturity.

God desires the spiritual growth of his people
----------------------------------------------

**[MAT 5:48](https://ref.ly/Matt5:48)**; **[HEB 6:1](https://ref.ly/Heb6:1)** *See also* [2CO 13:9–13:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:9-2Cor13:11); [EPH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Eph1:4), [EPH 2:10](https://ref.ly/Eph2:10), [EPH 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:17-Eph3:19); [PHP 3:12](https://ref.ly/Phil3:12); [1TH 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:1), [1TH 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:7); [2TI 1:9](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:9)

Christlikeness is the goal of spiritual growth
----------------------------------------------

**[ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29)** *See also* [EPH 4:13–4:15](https://ref.ly/Eph4:13-Eph4:15); [PHP 2:5](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5); [1JN 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/1John3:2-1John3:3)

Aspects of spiritual growth
---------------------------

### Growth in grace

**[2PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:18)** *See also* [PRO 4:18](https://ref.ly/Prov4:18); [1PE 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:1-1Pet2:3)

### Growth in faith

**[2TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3)** *See also* [2CO 10:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:15)

### Growth in love

**[1TH 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:12)** *See also* [ROM 5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:5); [1CO 14:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:1); [PHP 1:9](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9); [1TH 4:9–4:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:9-1Thess4:10); [HEB 10:24](https://ref.ly/Heb10:24); [1JN 4:7–4:21](https://ref.ly/1John4:7-1John4:21), [1JN 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/1John5:1-1John5:3)

### Growth in understanding

**[PSA 119:27](https://ref.ly/Ps119:27)**; **[1CO 14:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:20)** *See also* [PSA 119:97–119:99](https://ref.ly/Ps119:97-Ps119:99); [ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2), [ROM 16:19](https://ref.ly/Rom16:19); [1CO 13:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:11); [EPH 1:17–1:19](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17-Eph1:19); [PHP 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9-Phil1:10); [COL 1:9](https://ref.ly/Col1:9); [HEB 5:14](https://ref.ly/Heb5:14)

### Growth in holiness

**[2CO 7:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:1)** *See also* [EPH 5:25–5:26](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25-Eph5:26); [HEB 2:11](https://ref.ly/Heb2:11), [HEB 10:10–10:14](https://ref.ly/Heb10:10-Heb10:14), [HEB 12:14](https://ref.ly/Heb12:14), [HEB 13:12](https://ref.ly/Heb13:12); [1PE 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15-1Pet1:16)

### Growth in fruitfulness

**[JHN 15:16](https://ref.ly/John15:16)** *See also* [MAT 13:23](https://ref.ly/Matt13:23) parallels [MRK 4:20](https://ref.ly/Mark4:20), [LUK 8:15](https://ref.ly/Luke8:15); [JHN 15:2](https://ref.ly/John15:2), [JHN 15:8](https://ref.ly/John15:8); [PHP 1:11](https://ref.ly/Phil1:11); [COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10)

### Growth in contentment

**[PHP 4:11–4:12](https://ref.ly/Phil4:11-Phil4:12)** *See also* [1TI 6:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:6); [HEB 13:5](https://ref.ly/Heb13:5)

Examples of spiritual growth
----------------------------

### In individuals

[1SA 2:26](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:26) *Samuel*; ; [LUK 1:80](https://ref.ly/Luke1:80) *John the Baptist*; [LUK 2:40](https://ref.ly/Luke2:40), [LUK 2:52](https://ref.ly/Luke2:52); [ACT 9:22](https://ref.ly/Acts9:22); ; [1CO 9:26–9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:26-1Cor9:27); ; [PHP 3:12–3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:12-Phil3:14); [ACT 18:26](https://ref.ly/Acts18:26) *Apollos*; ; [PHM 1:11](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:11) *Onesimus*; ; [3JN 1:2–1:3](https://ref.ly/3John1:2-3John1:3) *Gaius*

### In the church

[ACT 9:31](https://ref.ly/Acts9:31), [ACT 11:26](https://ref.ly/Acts11:26), [ACT 16:5](https://ref.ly/Acts16:5); ; [2CO 10:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:15); ; [COL 1:6](https://ref.ly/Col1:6); ; [1TH 2:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:13); ; [2TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3)

## 8349: spiritual growth, means of (id: 8349)

God has provided various means by which believers may grow spiritually.

God supplies the resources for spiritual growth
-----------------------------------------------

**[PHP 2:13](https://ref.ly/Phil2:13)**; **[2PE 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:3)** *See also* [JHN 1:16](https://ref.ly/John1:16), [JHN 4:14](https://ref.ly/John4:14), [JHN 15:2](https://ref.ly/John15:2), [JHN 15:5](https://ref.ly/John15:5); [1CO 10:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:13); [2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18), [2CO 9:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:10); [GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23); [PHP 1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:6); [COL 2:19](https://ref.ly/Col2:19); [JAS 1:17](https://ref.ly/Jas1:17), [JAS 4:6](https://ref.ly/Jas4:6); [JUD 1:24](https://ref.ly/Jude1:24)

God's people must make efforts to grow spiritually
--------------------------------------------------

**[PHP 2:12](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12)**; **[2PE 1:5–1:9](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:9)** *See also* [ROM 6:19](https://ref.ly/Rom6:19); [2CO 7:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:1); [GAL 5:16](https://ref.ly/Gal5:16), [GAL 5:25](https://ref.ly/Gal5:25); [EPH 5:15–5:16](https://ref.ly/Eph5:15-Eph5:16), [EPH 6:11–6:13](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11-Eph6:13); [1TI 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:7), [1TI 6:11–6:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:11-1Tim6:12); [2TI 1:6](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:6); [2PE 3:14](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:14); [1JN 3:3](https://ref.ly/1John3:3); [JUD 1:20](https://ref.ly/Jude1:20)

Specific means of spiritual growth
----------------------------------

### Death to self\-interest

**[COL 3:5](https://ref.ly/Col3:5)** *See also* [MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24) parallels [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34), [LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23); [ROM 6:6](https://ref.ly/Rom6:6), [ROM 6:12](https://ref.ly/Rom6:12), [ROM 8:13](https://ref.ly/Rom8:13); [EPH 4:22](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22); [COL 3:9](https://ref.ly/Col3:9); [1PE 1:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:14), [1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11)

### The Scriptures

**[2TI 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16-2Tim3:17)** *See also* [JOS 1:8](https://ref.ly/Josh1:8); [PSA 19:7–19:8](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7-Ps19:8), [PSA 119:9–119:11](https://ref.ly/Ps119:9-Ps119:11); [JHN 17:17](https://ref.ly/John17:17); [EPH 6:17](https://ref.ly/Eph6:17); [COL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Col3:16); [1PE 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:2); [1JN 2:14](https://ref.ly/1John2:14)

### Prayer

**[MAT 6:13](https://ref.ly/Matt6:13)** parallel [LUK 11:4](https://ref.ly/Luke11:4)**[COL 4:2](https://ref.ly/Col4:2)** *See also* [1CH 16:11](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:11); [MAT 7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:11) parallel [LUK 11:13](https://ref.ly/Luke11:13); [MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41) parallels [MRK 14:38](https://ref.ly/Mark14:38), [LUK 22:46](https://ref.ly/Luke22:46); [JHN 16:24](https://ref.ly/John16:24); [ACT 4:29–4:31](https://ref.ly/Acts4:29-Acts4:31); [EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18); [1TH 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:17); [JAS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5)

### Focusing on Jesus Christ

**[HEB 3:1](https://ref.ly/Heb3:1)** *See also* [MAT 11:29](https://ref.ly/Matt11:29); [JHN 13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:15); [ROM 15:5](https://ref.ly/Rom15:5); [PHP 2:5](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5); [HEB 12:2–12:3](https://ref.ly/Heb12:2-Heb12:3); [1PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21); [1JN 2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:6)

The role of the Holy Spirit in spiritual growth
-----------------------------------------------

**[EPH 3:16–3:18](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16-Eph3:18)** *See also* [EPH 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Eph1:13-Eph1:14), [EPH 1:17](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17), [EPH 2:19–2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:19-Eph2:22)

### Christian leadership

**[EPH 4:11–4:13](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11-Eph4:13)** *See also* [1CO 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:16), [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1); [PHP 1:25](https://ref.ly/Phil1:25), [PHP 3:17](https://ref.ly/Phil3:17); [HEB 13:7](https://ref.ly/Heb13:7), [HEB 13:17](https://ref.ly/Heb13:17); [1PE 5:2–5:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:2-1Pet5:3)

### Faith in God

**[EPH 6:16](https://ref.ly/Eph6:16)** *See also* [HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6); [1JN 5:4](https://ref.ly/1John5:4)

### Suffering and testing

**[ROM 5:3–5:4](https://ref.ly/Rom5:3-Rom5:4)** *See also* [JOB 23:10](https://ref.ly/Job23:10); [PSA 119:67](https://ref.ly/Ps119:67); [ZEC 13:9](https://ref.ly/Zech13:9); [HEB 12:10–12:11](https://ref.ly/Heb12:10-Heb12:11); [1PE 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:6-1Pet1:7); [JAS 1:2–1:4](https://ref.ly/Jas1:2-Jas1:4)

### Perseverance

**[HEB 12:1](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1)** *See also* [PHP 3:12–3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:12-Phil3:14); [1TI 4:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:15)

### Cultivating wholesome thinking

**[PHP 4:8](https://ref.ly/Phil4:8)**

God will bring the spiritual growth of believers to completion
--------------------------------------------------------------

**[1JN 3:2](https://ref.ly/1John3:2)** *See also* [EPH 5:25–5:27](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25-Eph5:27); [PHP 1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:6); [JUD 1:24–1:25](https://ref.ly/Jude1:24-Jude1:25); [REV 21:2](https://ref.ly/Rev21:2)

## 8351: teachableness (id: 8351)

A quality in those who desire to learn, present in the disciples of Jesus Christ and seen in Christ's relationship to his Father. Unwillingness to receive the truth leads to spiritual darkness.

The importance of teachableness
-------------------------------

### For spiritual growth

**[HEB 12:5–12:12](https://ref.ly/Heb12:5-Heb12:12)** *See also* [HEB 5:11–5:14](https://ref.ly/Heb5:11-Heb5:14)

### For a life of obedience

**[PHP 4:9](https://ref.ly/Phil4:9)** *See also* [JAS 1:25](https://ref.ly/Jas1:25); [REV 3:3](https://ref.ly/Rev3:3)

### For discerning God's guidance

**[PRO 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5-Prov3:6)** *See also* [PSA 25:4–25:5](https://ref.ly/Ps25:4-Ps25:5); [ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2)

The requirements for teachableness
----------------------------------

### Eagerness to learn

**[PRO 18:15](https://ref.ly/Prov18:15)**; **[ISA 50:4–50:5](https://ref.ly/Isa50:4-Isa50:5)** *See also* [2CH 26:3–26:5](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:3-2Chr26:5); [PSA 27:11](https://ref.ly/Ps27:11), [PSA 43:3](https://ref.ly/Ps43:3), [PSA 86:11](https://ref.ly/Ps86:11), [PSA 119:9–119:11](https://ref.ly/Ps119:9-Ps119:11), [PSA 139:23–139:24](https://ref.ly/Ps139:23-Ps139:24), [PSA 143:8–143:10](https://ref.ly/Ps143:8-Ps143:10)

### Willingness to learn

From God: [EXO 15:26](https://ref.ly/Exod15:26); ; [DEU 5:27](https://ref.ly/Deut5:27); [EXO 20:18–20:19](https://ref.ly/Exod20:18-Exod20:19); ; [DEU 18:15](https://ref.ly/Deut18:15), [DEU 31:12](https://ref.ly/Deut31:12); ; [NEH 8:3](https://ref.ly/Neh8:3), [NEH 8:9](https://ref.ly/Neh8:9); [PSA 34:11](https://ref.ly/Ps34:11); ; [PRO 4:10–4:13](https://ref.ly/Prov4:10-Prov4:13), [PRO 4:20–4:21](https://ref.ly/Prov4:20-Prov4:21), [PRO 8:32–8:33](https://ref.ly/Prov8:32-Prov8:33), [PRO 13:1](https://ref.ly/Prov13:1), [PRO 23:22–23:23](https://ref.ly/Prov23:22-Prov23:23); [PRO 1:5](https://ref.ly/Prov1:5), [PRO 19:20](https://ref.ly/Prov19:20), [PRO 22:17](https://ref.ly/Prov22:17), [PRO 25:12](https://ref.ly/Prov25:12); [MAT 12:42](https://ref.ly/Matt12:42) parallel [LUK 11:31](https://ref.ly/Luke11:31); ; [MAT 17:5](https://ref.ly/Matt17:5) parallels [MRK 9:7](https://ref.ly/Mark9:7), [LUK 9:35](https://ref.ly/Luke9:35); ; [JHN 10:27](https://ref.ly/John10:27); [LUK 12:11–12:12](https://ref.ly/Luke12:11-Luke12:12); ; [REV 2:7](https://ref.ly/Rev2:7)

### Readiness to ask for help

**[ACT 8:30–8:31](https://ref.ly/Acts8:30-Acts8:31)** *See also* [MRK 4:10](https://ref.ly/Mark4:10), [MRK 9:11](https://ref.ly/Mark9:11), [MRK 9:28](https://ref.ly/Mark9:28), [MRK 10:10](https://ref.ly/Mark10:10), [MRK 13:4](https://ref.ly/Mark13:4); [LUK 3:12](https://ref.ly/Luke3:12), [LUK 11:1](https://ref.ly/Luke11:1)

### Readiness to pray for wisdom

**[JAS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5)** *See also* [2CH 20:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:12); [PSA 143:8–143:10](https://ref.ly/Ps143:8-Ps143:10)

### Readiness to pray for spiritual insight

**[EPH 1:17–1:19](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17-Eph1:19)** *See also* [EPH 3:16–3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16-Eph3:19); [COL 1:9](https://ref.ly/Col1:9)

### Humility

**[1CO 3:18–3:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:18-1Cor3:20)** *See also* [JOB 6:24](https://ref.ly/Job6:24); [PRO 11:2](https://ref.ly/Prov11:2); [MAT 11:29](https://ref.ly/Matt11:29), [MAT 18:3–18:4](https://ref.ly/Matt18:3-Matt18:4); [1CO 8:1–8:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:1-1Cor8:2); [JAS 1:21](https://ref.ly/Jas1:21)

### Living by truth already known

**[JHN 8:31–8:32](https://ref.ly/John8:31-John8:32)** *See also* [2PE 1:5–1:8](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:8)

Jesus Christ was willing to be taught by the Father
---------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 15:15](https://ref.ly/John15:15)** *See also* [JHN 5:30](https://ref.ly/John5:30), [JHN 8:26–8:28](https://ref.ly/John8:26-John8:28)

Hindrances to teachableness
---------------------------

### The activity of the devil

**[2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4)** *See also* [2TI 2:25–2:26](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:25-2Tim2:26)

### Not having the Holy Spirit

**[1CO 2:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:14)**

### Unwillingness to be taught

**[ISA 48:17–48:18](https://ref.ly/Isa48:17-Isa48:18)** *See also* [PSA 32:9](https://ref.ly/Ps32:9), [PSA 81:11–81:12](https://ref.ly/Ps81:11-Ps81:12); [MAT 13:14–13:15](https://ref.ly/Matt13:14-Matt13:15) parallels [MRK 4:12](https://ref.ly/Mark4:12), [LUK 8:10](https://ref.ly/Luke8:10); [ISA 6:9–6:10](https://ref.ly/Isa6:9-Isa6:10); [LUK 11:52](https://ref.ly/Luke11:52) *The “key to knowledge” is the fulfilment of the OT Scriptures in Jesus Christ*; [LUK 16:31](https://ref.ly/Luke16:31), [LUK 19:41–19:44](https://ref.ly/Luke19:41-Luke19:44); [JAS 1:22–1:24](https://ref.ly/Jas1:22-Jas1:24)

### Reliance on the wisdom of the world

**[1CO 1:19–1:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:19-1Cor1:20)** *See also* [ISA 29:14](https://ref.ly/Isa29:14); [ROM 1:21–1:23](https://ref.ly/Rom1:21-Rom1:23); [2CO 10:4–10:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:4-2Cor10:5)

### Being afraid to ask questions

**[MRK 9:32](https://ref.ly/Mark9:32)** parallel [LUK 9:45](https://ref.ly/Luke9:45)

## 8352: thankfulness (id: 8352)

Heartfelt gratitude to God, expressed in response to his love and mercy.

Thankfulness for God's goodness
-------------------------------

**[PSA 100:4–100:5](https://ref.ly/Ps100:4-Ps100:5)** *See also* [1CH 16:8](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:8), [1CH 16:34–16:35](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:34-1Chr16:35); [2CH 7:3–7:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:3-2Chr7:6); [EZR 3:10–3:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra3:10-Ezra3:11); [PSA 68:19](https://ref.ly/Ps68:19), [PSA 106:1](https://ref.ly/Ps106:1), [PSA 116:12–116:14](https://ref.ly/Ps116:12-Ps116:14), [PSA 136:1–136:3](https://ref.ly/Ps136:1-Ps136:3), [PSA 136:26](https://ref.ly/Ps136:26); [ISA 63:7](https://ref.ly/Isa63:7); [1TH 5:18](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:18); [HEB 12:28](https://ref.ly/Heb12:28)

Thankfulness for deliverance
----------------------------

### From adversity

**[PSA 35:9–35:10](https://ref.ly/Ps35:9-Ps35:10)** *See also* [PSA 31:7–31:8](https://ref.ly/Ps31:7-Ps31:8), [PSA 31:21–31:23](https://ref.ly/Ps31:21-Ps31:23), [PSA 44:6–44:8](https://ref.ly/Ps44:6-Ps44:8), [PSA 66:8–66:9](https://ref.ly/Ps66:8-Ps66:9), [PSA 66:16–66:20](https://ref.ly/Ps66:16-Ps66:20), [PSA 103:1–103:5](https://ref.ly/Ps103:1-Ps103:5)

### From slavery in Egypt

**[EXO 15:20–15:21](https://ref.ly/Exod15:20-Exod15:21)** *See also* [EXO 15:1–15:18](https://ref.ly/Exod15:1-Exod15:18); [PSA 105:1–105:45](https://ref.ly/Ps105:1-Ps105:45), [PSA 136:1–136:26](https://ref.ly/Ps136:1-Ps136:26)

### From the power of death

**[1CO 15:53–15:57](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:53-1Cor15:57)**

Thankfulness for answered prayer
--------------------------------

**[1SA 2:1–2:10](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:1-1Sam2:10)** *See also* [PSA 30:1–30:12](https://ref.ly/Ps30:1-Ps30:12), [PSA 66:16–66:20](https://ref.ly/Ps66:16-Ps66:20), [PSA 138:1–138:5](https://ref.ly/Ps138:1-Ps138:5); [JHN 11:40](https://ref.ly/John11:40)

Thankfulness for others
-----------------------

**[PHM 1:4](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:4)** *See also* [NEH 11:17](https://ref.ly/Neh11:17); [ROM 1:8](https://ref.ly/Rom1:8); [PHP 4:6](https://ref.ly/Phil4:6); [COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10), [COL 4:2](https://ref.ly/Col4:2); [1TI 2:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1); [2TI 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:3)

Thankfulness for Jesus Christ
-----------------------------

**[2CO 9:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:15)** *See also* [LUK 2:25–2:32](https://ref.ly/Luke2:25-Luke2:32), [LUK 2:36–2:38](https://ref.ly/Luke2:36-Luke2:38); [COL 2:6](https://ref.ly/Col2:6), [COL 3:15–3:17](https://ref.ly/Col3:15-Col3:17)

Thankfulness for God's provision
--------------------------------

**[MAT 14:19](https://ref.ly/Matt14:19)** parallels [MRK 6:41](https://ref.ly/Mark6:41), [LUK 9:16](https://ref.ly/Luke9:16), [JHN 6:11](https://ref.ly/John6:11) *See also* [PSA 147:7–147:9](https://ref.ly/Ps147:7-Ps147:9); [MAT 15:36](https://ref.ly/Matt15:36) parallel [MRK 8:6](https://ref.ly/Mark8:6); [MAT 26:26–26:27](https://ref.ly/Matt26:26-Matt26:27) parallels [MRK 14:22–14:23](https://ref.ly/Mark14:22-Mark14:23), [LUK 22:17–22:19](https://ref.ly/Luke22:17-Luke22:19); [LUK 24:30](https://ref.ly/Luke24:30); [ACT 27:35](https://ref.ly/Acts27:35); [ROM 14:6](https://ref.ly/Rom14:6); [1TI 4:3](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:3)

## 8353: tolerance (id: 8353)

The virtue of being prepared to accept people and their viewpoints. While commended within the church, Scripture insists that believers must have a vital concern for maintaining and defending the truth.

Toleration should be exercised for the benefit of those whose faith is weak
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 14:1](https://ref.ly/Rom14:1)** *See also* [ROM 14:2–14:6](https://ref.ly/Rom14:2-Rom14:6), [ROM 14:13–14:22](https://ref.ly/Rom14:13-Rom14:22); [1CO 8:8–8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:8-1Cor8:13)

Examples of tolerance
---------------------

By Jesus Christ: [MAT 19:13–19:14](https://ref.ly/Matt19:13-Matt19:14) parallels [MRK 10:13–10:14](https://ref.ly/Mark10:13-Mark10:14), [LUK 18:15–18:16](https://ref.ly/Luke18:15-Luke18:16) *in contrast to the disciples' intolerance*; ; [MRK 9:33–9:36](https://ref.ly/Mark9:33-Mark9:36) parallel [LUK 9:46–9:47](https://ref.ly/Luke9:46-Luke9:47); ; [MRK 9:38–9:40](https://ref.ly/Mark9:38-Mark9:40) parallel [LUK 9:49–9:50](https://ref.ly/Luke9:49-Luke9:50); [PHP 1:17–1:18](https://ref.ly/Phil1:17-Phil1:18) *by Paul*

Limits to toleration
--------------------

### Evil cannot be tolerated

**[HAB 1:13](https://ref.ly/Hab1:13)**

### Wickedness cannot be tolerated

**[REV 2:2](https://ref.ly/Rev2:2)**

### Serious doctrinal errors cannot be tolerated

**[GAL 2:4](https://ref.ly/Gal2:4)**; **[2TH 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:1-2Thess2:3)** *See also* [1TI 6:3–6:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:3-1Tim6:5), [1TI 6:20–6:21](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:20-1Tim6:21); [2TI 4:3–4:4](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:3-2Tim4:4); [2PE 2:1](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:1)

### Sexual sin should not be tolerated

[1CO 5:1–5:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:1-1Cor5:5), [1CO 6:18–6:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:18-1Cor6:20); ; [REV 2:14](https://ref.ly/Rev2:14)

### Idolatry should not be tolerated

[1CO 10:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:7); ; [1JN 5:21](https://ref.ly/1John5:21)

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 14:1; Romans 14:2-6; Romans 14:13-22; 1 Corinthians 8:8-13; Matthew 19:13-14; Mark 10:13-14; Luke 18:15-16; Mark 9:33-36; Luke 9:46-47; Mark 9:38-40; Luke 9:49-50; Philippians 1:17-18; Habakkuk 1:13; Revelation 2:2; Galatians 2:4; 2 Thessalonians 2:1-3; 1 Timothy 6:3-5; 1 Timothy 6:20-21; 2 Timothy 4:3-4; 2 Peter 2:1; 1 Corinthians 5:1-5; 1 Corinthians 6:18-20; Revelation 2:14; 1 Corinthians 10:7; 1 John 5:21
* **Associated Articles:** 1095: God, patience of (ID: `1095@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1460: truth (ID: `1460@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5661: brothers (ID: `5661@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5762: attitudes, God's to people (ID: `5762@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6237: sexual sin, nature of (ID: `6237@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6602: acceptance (ID: `6602@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8026: faith, growth in (ID: `8026@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8282: intolerance (ID: `8282@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8298: love, for one another (ID: `8298@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8318: patience (ID: `8318@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8354: trustworthiness (id: 8354)

That quality of truthfulness and dependability which rewards faith. God is trustworthy and his people are called to be trustworthy in their dealings with other people. Scripture warns against pinning one's hopes on people and things that will prove untrustworthy.

God is trustworthy
------------------

### God's words are trustworthy

**[2SA 7:28](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:28)** *See also* [PSA 19:7](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7), [PSA 111:7](https://ref.ly/Ps111:7); [DAN 2:45](https://ref.ly/Dan2:45); [1TI 1:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:15), [1TI 4:9–4:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:9-1Tim4:10); [REV 21:5](https://ref.ly/Rev21:5)

### God rewards trust in him

**[PSA 22:4–22:5](https://ref.ly/Ps22:4-Ps22:5)** *See also* [PSA 20:6–20:8](https://ref.ly/Ps20:6-Ps20:8), [PSA 21:7](https://ref.ly/Ps21:7), [PSA 125:1](https://ref.ly/Ps125:1); [ISA 25:9](https://ref.ly/Isa25:9); [2TI 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:12)

Qualities of those who are trustworthy
--------------------------------------

### Integrity in business dealings

**[DEU 25:13–25:16](https://ref.ly/Deut25:13-Deut25:16)** *See also* [LEV 19:36](https://ref.ly/Lev19:36); [PRO 11:1](https://ref.ly/Prov11:1), [PRO 20:23](https://ref.ly/Prov20:23); [HOS 12:7](https://ref.ly/Hos12:7); [MIC 6:11](https://ref.ly/Mic6:11)

### Honesty in handling money

**[2KI 12:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs12:15)** *See also* [2KI 22:7](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:7); [LUK 16:10–16:12](https://ref.ly/Luke16:10-Luke16:12)

### Not corrupted by greed

**[EXO 18:21](https://ref.ly/Exod18:21)** *Qualities of the elders appointed by Moses.* *See also* [1SA 8:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam8:3); [PRO 13:11](https://ref.ly/Prov13:11); [EZK 28:18](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:18); [1TI 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:8)

### Ability to keep confidences

**[PRO 11:13](https://ref.ly/Prov11:13)** *See also* [PRO 20:19](https://ref.ly/Prov20:19), [PRO 25:9](https://ref.ly/Prov25:9)

### Truthfulness

**[PRO 12:17](https://ref.ly/Prov12:17)** *See also* [PRO 16:13](https://ref.ly/Prov16:13); [ZEC 8:16–8:17](https://ref.ly/Zech8:16-Zech8:17); [EPH 4:15](https://ref.ly/Eph4:15), [EPH 4:25](https://ref.ly/Eph4:25)**[PRO 13:17](https://ref.ly/Prov13:17)** *See also* [PRO 24:26](https://ref.ly/Prov24:26), [PRO 25:13](https://ref.ly/Prov25:13), [PRO 27:6](https://ref.ly/Prov27:6)

### Faithfulness with what is entrusted

**[LUK 12:48](https://ref.ly/Luke12:48)** *See also* [MAT 25:14–25:27](https://ref.ly/Matt25:14-Matt25:27) parallel [LUK 19:12–19:23](https://ref.ly/Luke19:12-Luke19:23)**[1CO 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:1-1Cor4:2)**[1CO 9:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:17); [1TI 6:20](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:20); [2TI 1:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:14); [JUD 1:3](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3)

Trustworthiness required in leaders
-----------------------------------

**[1PE 5:2–5:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:2-1Pet5:3)** *See also* [1TI 3:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:11) *trustworthiness also required in wives of deacons (NIV text) or deaconesses (NIV footnote)*; [TIT 1:7](https://ref.ly/Titus1:7)

Examples of people considered trustworthy
-----------------------------------------

[GEN 39:6](https://ref.ly/Gen39:6) *Joseph*; ; [NUM 12:7](https://ref.ly/Num12:7) *Moses*; ; [1SA 27:12](https://ref.ly/1Sam27:12) *David. Though trusted by Achish, David was deceiving him*; ; [2KI 22:5–22:7](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:5-2Kgs22:7) parallel [2CH 34:10–34:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:10-2Chr34:12) *those supervising work on the temple*; ; [NEH 13:13](https://ref.ly/Neh13:13) *Nehemiah's treasurers*; ; [DAN 6:4](https://ref.ly/Dan6:4) *Daniel*; ; [ACT 12:20](https://ref.ly/Acts12:20) *Blastus, Herod's treasurer*; ; [1TH 2:4](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:4) *Paul, approved by God*

People proving to be untrustworthy
----------------------------------

[ISA 2:22](https://ref.ly/Isa2:22); ; [JER 17:5](https://ref.ly/Jer17:5); ; [EZK 16:15](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:15)

### Oneself

[PSA 49:13](https://ref.ly/Ps49:13); ; [PRO 28:26](https://ref.ly/Prov28:26)

### People in positions of power

[PSA 146:3](https://ref.ly/Ps146:3); ; [ISA 20:5](https://ref.ly/Isa20:5)

### Friends and family

## 8355: understanding (id: 8355)

God\-given perception of the nature and meaning of things, resulting in sound judgment and decision\-making; in particular the ability to discern spiritual truth and to apply it to human disposition and conduct.

The source of understanding
---------------------------

### Understanding belongs to God

**[JOB 12:13](https://ref.ly/Job12:13)**; **[PSA 136:5](https://ref.ly/Ps136:5)** *See also* [PSA 147:5](https://ref.ly/Ps147:5); [PRO 3:19](https://ref.ly/Prov3:19); [JER 51:15](https://ref.ly/Jer51:15), [JER 15:15](https://ref.ly/Jer15:15) *God's understanding gives rise to compassion.*

### Understanding is a gift from God

**[PRO 2:6](https://ref.ly/Prov2:6)**; **[ISA 29:24](https://ref.ly/Isa29:24)** *See also* [1KI 4:29](https://ref.ly/1Kgs4:29); [JOB 38:36](https://ref.ly/Job38:36); [ISA 32:3–32:4](https://ref.ly/Isa32:3-Isa32:4); [DAN 1:17](https://ref.ly/Dan1:17), [DAN 2:21](https://ref.ly/Dan2:21), [DAN 2:30](https://ref.ly/Dan2:30), [DAN 9:22](https://ref.ly/Dan9:22); [ROM 15:21](https://ref.ly/Rom15:21); [ISA 52:15](https://ref.ly/Isa52:15)

Understanding spiritual truth
-----------------------------

### Understanding truth about God

**[1JN 5:20](https://ref.ly/1John5:20)** *See also* [PRO 2:5](https://ref.ly/Prov2:5), [PRO 9:10](https://ref.ly/Prov9:10); [ISA 40:21](https://ref.ly/Isa40:21), [ISA 40:28](https://ref.ly/Isa40:28), [ISA 43:10](https://ref.ly/Isa43:10); [JER 9:24](https://ref.ly/Jer9:24); [JHN 10:38](https://ref.ly/John10:38); [ROM 1:20](https://ref.ly/Rom1:20)

### Understanding God's purposes

[DEU 9:6](https://ref.ly/Deut9:6) *God's reason for choosing Israel*; ; [1CH 28:19](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:19) *God's plans for the temple*; ; [JOB 34:10–34:11](https://ref.ly/Job34:10-Job34:11) *the reason for Job's suffering*; ; [PSA 73:16–73:17](https://ref.ly/Ps73:16-Ps73:17) *God's dealings with the wicked*; ; [ISA 57:1–57:2](https://ref.ly/Isa57:1-Isa57:2) *God's purpose in taking the righteous*; ; [JER 9:12–9:13](https://ref.ly/Jer9:12-Jer9:13) *the reason for the exile*; [JER 23:20](https://ref.ly/Jer23:20), [JER 30:24](https://ref.ly/Jer30:24); [DAN 8:15–8:16](https://ref.ly/Dan8:15-Dan8:16) *God's purposes in history*; [EPH 5:17](https://ref.ly/Eph5:17); ; [COL 1:9](https://ref.ly/Col1:9)

### Understanding God's word

**[PSA 119:73](https://ref.ly/Ps119:73)**; **[LUK 24:45](https://ref.ly/Luke24:45)** *See also* [NEH 8:8](https://ref.ly/Neh8:8), [NEH 8:12](https://ref.ly/Neh8:12); [PSA 119:27](https://ref.ly/Ps119:27), [PSA 119:125](https://ref.ly/Ps119:125); [MAT 24:15](https://ref.ly/Matt24:15) parallel [MRK 13:14](https://ref.ly/Mark13:14); [LUK 24:27](https://ref.ly/Luke24:27); [ACT 8:30–8:31](https://ref.ly/Acts8:30-Acts8:31); [JHN 12:16](https://ref.ly/John12:16)

### Understanding Jesus Christ's teaching

[MAT 13:11](https://ref.ly/Matt13:11) parallels [MRK 4:11](https://ref.ly/Mark4:11), [LUK 8:10](https://ref.ly/Luke8:10); ; [MAT 16:12](https://ref.ly/Matt16:12), [MAT 17:13](https://ref.ly/Matt17:13); ; [MRK 4:33](https://ref.ly/Mark4:33), [MRK 8:17](https://ref.ly/Mark8:17); ; [JHN 2:22](https://ref.ly/John2:22)

### Understanding God's salvation

**[EPH 1:18](https://ref.ly/Eph1:18)** *See also* [ISA 41:20](https://ref.ly/Isa41:20); [ROM 13:11](https://ref.ly/Rom13:11); [EPH 1:9](https://ref.ly/Eph1:9), [EPH 3:4](https://ref.ly/Eph3:4), [EPH 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:17-Eph3:19); [COL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Col2:2); [PHM 1:6](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:6)

Human understanding is limited
------------------------------

**[JOB 36:26](https://ref.ly/Job36:26), [JOB 37:5](https://ref.ly/Job37:5)**; **[PRO 3:5](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5)** *See also* [JOB 26:14](https://ref.ly/Job26:14), [JOB 36:29](https://ref.ly/Job36:29), [JOB 42:3](https://ref.ly/Job42:3); [PRO 20:24](https://ref.ly/Prov20:24); [ECC 11:5](https://ref.ly/Eccl11:5); [ISA 40:13–40:14](https://ref.ly/Isa40:13-Isa40:14), [ISA 55:8–55:9](https://ref.ly/Isa55:8-Isa55:9); [1CO 13:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:12)

Gaining understanding
---------------------

### Through faith

**[HEB 11:3](https://ref.ly/Heb11:3)** *See also* [MAT 16:8–16:9](https://ref.ly/Matt16:8-Matt16:9)

### Through God's Spirit

**[1CO 2:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:12)** *See also* [1CH 28:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:12); [JOB 32:8](https://ref.ly/Job32:8); [ISA 11:2](https://ref.ly/Isa11:2); [JHN 14:26](https://ref.ly/John14:26), [JHN 16:13–16:15](https://ref.ly/John16:13-John16:15); [1CO 2:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:14); [EPH 1:17](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17)

### Through God's word

**[PSA 119:130](https://ref.ly/Ps119:130)** *See also* [DEU 4:6](https://ref.ly/Deut4:6); [PSA 111:10](https://ref.ly/Ps111:10); [DAN 9:2](https://ref.ly/Dan9:2); [JHN 20:9](https://ref.ly/John20:9)

### Through wise teaching

**[PSA 49:3](https://ref.ly/Ps49:3)** *See also* [JOB 8:8–8:10](https://ref.ly/Job8:8-Job8:10); [PRO 1:2](https://ref.ly/Prov1:2), [PRO 4:1](https://ref.ly/Prov4:1), [PRO 15:32](https://ref.ly/Prov15:32); [ECC 12:9](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:9)

Lack of understanding of spiritual truth
----------------------------------------

### Not knowing God

**[ISA 1:3](https://ref.ly/Isa1:3)** *See also* [DEU 32:28–32:29](https://ref.ly/Deut32:28-Deut32:29); [ISA 27:11](https://ref.ly/Isa27:11); [JER 4:22](https://ref.ly/Jer4:22); [ROM 10:19](https://ref.ly/Rom10:19); [DEU 32:21](https://ref.ly/Deut32:21)

### Lack of understanding due to hardened hearts

**[DEU 29:4](https://ref.ly/Deut29:4)**; **[ISA 6:9–6:10](https://ref.ly/Isa6:9-Isa6:10)** *See also* [JOB 17:4](https://ref.ly/Job17:4); [ISA 44:18](https://ref.ly/Isa44:18), [ISA 48:8](https://ref.ly/Isa48:8); [JER 5:21](https://ref.ly/Jer5:21); [EZK 12:2](https://ref.ly/Ezek12:2); [MAT 13:13–13:15](https://ref.ly/Matt13:13-Matt13:15) parallels [MRK 4:11–4:12](https://ref.ly/Mark4:11-Mark4:12), [LUK 8:10](https://ref.ly/Luke8:10); [MRK 6:52](https://ref.ly/Mark6:52); [JHN 12:40](https://ref.ly/John12:40); [ACT 28:26–28:27](https://ref.ly/Acts28:26-Acts28:27); [EPH 4:18](https://ref.ly/Eph4:18)

### Not understanding God's purposes

[PSA 82:5](https://ref.ly/Ps82:5), [PSA 92:6–92:7](https://ref.ly/Ps92:6-Ps92:7); ; [ISA 5:13](https://ref.ly/Isa5:13), [ISA 19:12](https://ref.ly/Isa19:12); ; [MIC 4:12](https://ref.ly/Mic4:12); ; [LUK 12:56](https://ref.ly/Luke12:56); ; [1CO 2:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:8)

### Not understanding Jesus Christ's teaching

[MAT 13:19](https://ref.ly/Matt13:19); [MRK 4:13](https://ref.ly/Mark4:13), [MRK 9:32](https://ref.ly/Mark9:32); ; [JHN 4:32–4:33](https://ref.ly/John4:32-John4:33), [JHN 8:27](https://ref.ly/John8:27), [JHN 11:13](https://ref.ly/John11:13), [JHN 16:18](https://ref.ly/John16:18); [LUK 2:50](https://ref.ly/Luke2:50) *by Jesus Christ's parents*; [JHN 2:20–2:21](https://ref.ly/John2:20-John2:21), [JHN 6:51–6:52](https://ref.ly/John6:51-John6:52), [JHN 8:43](https://ref.ly/John8:43); [JHN 4:11](https://ref.ly/John4:11) *by the Samaritan woman*

Understanding people and situations
-----------------------------------

[1CH 12:32](https://ref.ly/1Chr12:32); ; [EST 1:13](https://ref.ly/Esth1:13); ; [JOB 13:1](https://ref.ly/Job13:1); ; [PRO 20:5](https://ref.ly/Prov20:5); ; [JHN 7:24](https://ref.ly/John7:24)

-----------------------

Those who have understanding
----------------------------

### The wise

[DEU 32:29](https://ref.ly/Deut32:29); ; [1KI 4:29](https://ref.ly/1Kgs4:29); ; [PRO 8:14](https://ref.ly/Prov8:14); ; [HOS 14:9](https://ref.ly/Hos14:9)

### Good leaders

The results of understanding
----------------------------

### Seeking God

**[PSA 14:2](https://ref.ly/Ps14:2)** *See also* [PSA 53:2](https://ref.ly/Ps53:2); [ROM 3:11](https://ref.ly/Rom3:11)

### Obedience

**[PSA 119:34](https://ref.ly/Ps119:34)** *See also* [NEH 10:28](https://ref.ly/Neh10:28); [PSA 32:9](https://ref.ly/Ps32:9), [PSA 119:100](https://ref.ly/Ps119:100); [PRO 28:7](https://ref.ly/Prov28:7)

### Taking the right path

**[PRO 2:9](https://ref.ly/Prov2:9)** *See also* [PSA 119:104](https://ref.ly/Ps119:104); [PRO 15:21](https://ref.ly/Prov15:21)

### Life

[PSA 119:144](https://ref.ly/Ps119:144); ; [PRO 16:22](https://ref.ly/Prov16:22)

### Sensible living

[JOB 28:28](https://ref.ly/Job28:28) *avoidance of evil*; ; [PRO 11:12](https://ref.ly/Prov11:12) *slowness to criticise*; ; [PRO 12:11](https://ref.ly/Prov12:11) *conscientious labour*; ; [PRO 13:15](https://ref.ly/Prov13:15) *winning favour*; ; [PRO 17:27](https://ref.ly/Prov17:27) *showing restraint and an even temper*; ; [JAS 3:13](https://ref.ly/Jas3:13) *good deeds and humility*

The results of a lack of understanding
--------------------------------------

### Foolish behaviour

[PRO 6:32](https://ref.ly/Prov6:32) *committing adultery*; ; [PRO 7:7](https://ref.ly/Prov7:7) *being easily seduced*; ; [PRO 17:18](https://ref.ly/Prov17:18) *making rash commitments*; ; [PRO 18:1–18:2](https://ref.ly/Prov18:1-Prov18:2) *selfishness and self\-importance*; ; [PRO 24:30–24:31](https://ref.ly/Prov24:30-Prov24:31) *idleness leading to ruin*; ; [HOS 4:11](https://ref.ly/Hos4:11) *Drunkenness clouds understanding.*

### Death

## 8356: unselfishness (id: 8356)

Putting the concerns and interests of others before one's own. Jesus Christ was the supreme example of this and believers should follow his example, denying themselves in order to serve others.

The supreme example of selflessness is that of Jesus Christ himself
-------------------------------------------------------------------

### In his life and work

**[JHN 5:30](https://ref.ly/John5:30)**; **[ROM 15:3](https://ref.ly/Rom15:3)** *See also* [MAT 15:32](https://ref.ly/Matt15:32); [JHN 13:3–13:5](https://ref.ly/John13:3-John13:5); [2CO 8:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:9)

### In his dying for others

**[MAT 20:26–20:28](https://ref.ly/Matt20:26-Matt20:28)** parallel [MRK 10:43–10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:43-Mark10:45)**[PHP 2:5–2:8](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5-Phil2:8)** *See also* [ISA 53:3–53:12](https://ref.ly/Isa53:3-Isa53:12); [JHN 10:17–10:18](https://ref.ly/John10:17-John10:18); [ROM 5:6–5:8](https://ref.ly/Rom5:6-Rom5:8); [1CO 15:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:3); [2CO 5:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:14); [1TH 5:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:10); [1PE 2:22–2:24](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:22-1Pet2:24), [1PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:18); [1TI 2:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:6)

Unselfishness is a result of a relationship with Jesus Christ
-------------------------------------------------------------

### Christian discipleship begins with a denial of self\-interest

**[MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24)** parallels [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34), [LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23)**[MRK 10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:45)** *See also* [ROM 6:6](https://ref.ly/Rom6:6); [2CO 5:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:15); [EPH 4:22](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22); [COL 3:9](https://ref.ly/Col3:9)

### It springs from an experience of life with Jesus Christ

**[PHP 1:21–1:24](https://ref.ly/Phil1:21-Phil1:24)** *See also* [PHP 3:7–3:11](https://ref.ly/Phil3:7-Phil3:11)

### It is inspired by the example of Jesus Christ

**[PHP 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/Phil2:4-Phil2:5)** *See also* [JHN 13:14–13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:14-John13:15); [1JN 3:16](https://ref.ly/1John3:16), [1JN 4:19–4:21](https://ref.ly/1John4:19-1John4:21)

### It is the result of the Spirit's work in the believer

[GAL 5:22–5:26](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:26)

Putting others first is fundamental in Christian behaviour
----------------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 12:10](https://ref.ly/Rom12:10)**; **[1CO 10:23–10:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:23-1Cor10:24)** *This was particularly so when it came to the exercise of personal scruples.* *See also* [ROM 14:7](https://ref.ly/Rom14:7), [ROM 15:1–15:2](https://ref.ly/Rom15:1-Rom15:2); [1CO 8:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:9); [EPH 4:32–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:32-Eph5:2); [COL 3:13](https://ref.ly/Col3:13); [1TI 6:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:18)

Unselfishness involves a proper attitude to one's own self\-importance
----------------------------------------------------------------------

**[PHP 2:3](https://ref.ly/Phil2:3)** *See also* [ROM 12:16](https://ref.ly/Rom12:16); [GAL 6:2–6:3](https://ref.ly/Gal6:2-Gal6:3); [EPH 4:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:2), [EPH 5:21](https://ref.ly/Eph5:21); [1PE 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:8), [1PE 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:5)

Unselfishness is expressed in Christian service
-----------------------------------------------

**[LUK 22:26](https://ref.ly/Luke22:26)**; **[GAL 5:13](https://ref.ly/Gal5:13)** *See also* [1PE 4:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:10), [1PE 5:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:2)

Examples of unselfish behaviour
-------------------------------

### Those who put others first

[GEN 13:8–13:9](https://ref.ly/Gen13:8-Gen13:9) *Abraham*; ; [EXO 32:31–32:32](https://ref.ly/Exod32:31-Exod32:32) *Moses*; ; [RUT 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Ruth1:16-Ruth1:17) *Ruth*; ; [1SA 12:3–12:5](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:3-1Sam12:5) *Samuel*; ; [NEH 5:14–5:18](https://ref.ly/Neh5:14-Neh5:18) *Nehemiah*; ; [MRK 12:41–12:44](https://ref.ly/Mark12:41-Mark12:44) *a poor widow*; ; [MAT 15:21–15:28](https://ref.ly/Matt15:21-Matt15:28) *a mother*; ; [MAT 26:6–26:13](https://ref.ly/Matt26:6-Matt26:13) parallel [MRK 14:3–14:9](https://ref.ly/Mark14:3-Mark14:9) *a woman with a jar of perfume*; ; [JHN 3:27–3:30](https://ref.ly/John3:27-John3:30) *John the Baptist*; ; [ACT 4:32–4:37](https://ref.ly/Acts4:32-Acts4:37) *the first Christians*; ; [ROM 16:3–16:4](https://ref.ly/Rom16:3-Rom16:4) *Priscilla and Aquila*; ; [1CO 16:15](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:15) *the household of Stephanas*; ; [PHP 2:20–2:21](https://ref.ly/Phil2:20-Phil2:21) *Timothy*; ; [PHP 2:29–2:30](https://ref.ly/Phil2:29-Phil2:30) *Epaphroditus*

### Paul's ministry was motivated by the interests of others

**[1CO 10:32–10:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:32-1Cor10:33), [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1)** *See also* [ACT 20:33–20:35](https://ref.ly/Acts20:33-Acts20:35); [1CO 9:3–9:15](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:3-1Cor9:15), [1CO 9:19–9:23](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:19-1Cor9:23); [2CO 11:23–11:29](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:23-2Cor11:29), [2CO 13:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:4); [PHP 2:17](https://ref.ly/Phil2:17); [1TH 2:8–2:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:8-1Thess2:9), [1TH 2:19–2:20](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:19-1Thess2:20)

## 8357: weakness (id: 8357)

A lack of strength, whether physical or spiritual. Scripture attributes weakness to human sin and foolishness and urges believers to find their true strength in God alone.

* **Associated Articles:** 8358: weakness, physical (ID: `8358@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8359: weakness, spiritual (ID: `8359@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8358: weakness, physical (id: 8358)

Lack of human strength may have a number of causes. Believers should be caring and compassionate towards the weak.

Causes of human physical weakness
---------------------------------

### Sin

**[ROM 8:3](https://ref.ly/Rom8:3)** *See also* [PSA 90:10](https://ref.ly/Ps90:10); [ROM 5:6](https://ref.ly/Rom5:6); [HEB 5:2](https://ref.ly/Heb5:2)

### Divine action

**[GEN 32:25](https://ref.ly/Gen32:25)** *Through wrestling with God, Jacob carried a physical reminder for the rest of his life.* *See also* [GEN 32:32](https://ref.ly/Gen32:32); [HEB 11:21](https://ref.ly/Heb11:21)

### Disobedience

**[JDG 16:20](https://ref.ly/Judg16:20)** *See also* [JDG 16:7](https://ref.ly/Judg16:7), [JDG 16:11](https://ref.ly/Judg16:11), [JDG 16:13](https://ref.ly/Judg16:13), [JDG 16:17](https://ref.ly/Judg16:17); [JOB 18:7](https://ref.ly/Job18:7); [EZK 7:17](https://ref.ly/Ezek7:17), [EZK 21:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek21:7); [1CO 11:30](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:30)

### Satanic action

**[2CO 12:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:7)** *See also* [ISA 14:12](https://ref.ly/Isa14:12); [MRK 9:17–9:18](https://ref.ly/Mark9:17-Mark9:18); [LUK 13:11](https://ref.ly/Luke13:11)

### Disease or disability

[PSA 6:2](https://ref.ly/Ps6:2), [PSA 31:9–31:10](https://ref.ly/Ps31:9-Ps31:10); ; [JHN 5:7](https://ref.ly/John5:7); ; [GAL 4:13–4:14](https://ref.ly/Gal4:13-Gal4:14)

### Weakness from birth

**[ACT 3:2](https://ref.ly/Acts3:2)**

### Weakness in old age

**[GEN 27:1](https://ref.ly/Gen27:1)** *See also* [2SA 19:34–19:37](https://ref.ly/2Sam19:34-2Sam19:37); [1KI 1:1](https://ref.ly/1Kgs1:1)

### Persecution

**[2CO 11:30](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:30)** *See also* [NUM 11:14–11:15](https://ref.ly/Num11:14-Num11:15); [1KI 19:3–19:6](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:3-1Kgs19:6); [MAT 26:38](https://ref.ly/Matt26:38), [MAT 27:32](https://ref.ly/Matt27:32) *The physical weakness of Jesus Christ after flogging led to Simon carrying the cross*; [ACT 14:19–14:20](https://ref.ly/Acts14:19-Acts14:20); [1CO 2:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:3) *Weakness and fear are often associated*; [2CO 11:23–11:29](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:23-2Cor11:29)

### Being faced with opposition

[NUM 13:18](https://ref.ly/Num13:18); ; [2SA 3:29](https://ref.ly/2Sam3:29); ; [NEH 6:9](https://ref.ly/Neh6:9)

Corporate weakness
------------------

**[2CH 20:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:12)** *See also* [LEV 26:36](https://ref.ly/Lev26:36); [JDG 6:15](https://ref.ly/Judg6:15); [2SA 3:1](https://ref.ly/2Sam3:1); [LAM 1:6](https://ref.ly/Lam1:6)

## 8359: weakness, spiritual (id: 8359)

Human standards of strength and weakness are overturned by God's perspective and may be used for his glory.

Spiritual weakness leads to increased reliance on God
-----------------------------------------------------

**[2CO 12:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:10)** *See also* [MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41) parallel [MRK 14:38](https://ref.ly/Mark14:38); [ROM 4:19](https://ref.ly/Rom4:19); [1CO 1:27–1:29](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:27-1Cor1:29), [1CO 2:2–2:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:2-1Cor2:5)

Weakness demonstrates the power of God
--------------------------------------

**[1CO 1:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:27)** *See also* [ISA 40:29–40:31](https://ref.ly/Isa40:29-Isa40:31), [ISA 50:4](https://ref.ly/Isa50:4); [JER 31:25](https://ref.ly/Jer31:25); [2CO 12:5–12:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:5-2Cor12:10)

God helps those who are weak
----------------------------

**[ROM 8:26](https://ref.ly/Rom8:26)** *See also* [ISA 40:29](https://ref.ly/Isa40:29); [EZK 34:16](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:16); [JOL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Joel3:10); [HEB 11:34](https://ref.ly/Heb11:34)

Spiritual weakness should not be despised
-----------------------------------------

**[ROM 15:1](https://ref.ly/Rom15:1)** *See also* [MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41) parallel [MRK 14:38](https://ref.ly/Mark14:38); [ROM 14:1](https://ref.ly/Rom14:1); [1CO 4:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:10), [1CO 8:7–8:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:7-1Cor8:12), [1CO 9:22](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:22)

-----------------------------

### The importance of overcoming weakness

**[HEB 12:12](https://ref.ly/Heb12:12)** *See also* [JOS 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/Josh1:6-Josh1:7); [JOL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Joel3:10); [MAT 6:28–6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:28-Matt6:33); [1CO 16:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:13); [HEB 11:11](https://ref.ly/Heb11:11)

### Weakness can be overcome by trusting in God

**[ROM 4:20](https://ref.ly/Rom4:20)** *See also* [MAT 8:26](https://ref.ly/Matt8:26), [MAT 14:30–14:31](https://ref.ly/Matt14:30-Matt14:31); [2TI 1:6–1:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:6-2Tim1:8); [JAS 1:6](https://ref.ly/Jas1:6)

## 8361: wisdom (id: 8361)

The quality of knowledge, discernment and understanding characteristic of God himself. True wisdom, seen in the ministry of Jesus Christ, is a gift of the Holy Spirit. Scripture affirms that true human wisdom is a gift from God and points out the folly of trusting in mere human wisdom.

* **Associated Articles:** 8362: wisdom, of God (ID: `8362@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8363: wisdom, of Jesus Christ (ID: `8363@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8364: wisdom, of Holy Spirit (ID: `8364@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8365: wisdom, nature of human (ID: `8365@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8366: wisdom, source of human (ID: `8366@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8367: wisdom, importance of human (ID: `8367@DictionaryBibleThemes`)

## 8365: wisdom, nature of human (id: 8365)

The human quality which enables the planning and successful achievement of a desired goal. It may be expressed as technical skill, practical instruction and astuteness in political affairs. True wisdom includes spiritual discernment and, above all, the reverence and knowledge of God.

Wisdom as human skill
---------------------

### For work on the tabernacle

**[EXO 36:1](https://ref.ly/Exod36:1)** *See also* [EXO 28:3](https://ref.ly/Exod28:3) *making the priestly robes*; [EXO 31:2–31:6](https://ref.ly/Exod31:2-Exod31:6) parallel [EXO 35:30–35:35](https://ref.ly/Exod35:30-Exod35:35) *craftsmanship and design in metalwork, stone, wood, embroidery and weaving*; [EXO 35:25–35:26](https://ref.ly/Exod35:25-Exod35:26) *spinning*; [EXO 36:8](https://ref.ly/Exod36:8) *making and hanging curtains*

### For work on the temple

**[1CH 22:15](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:15)** *See also* [1CH 28:21](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:21); [2CH 2:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr2:7), [2CH 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr2:13-2Chr2:14) parallel [1KI 7:13–7:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs7:13-1Kgs7:14) *Huram\-Abi, skilled in bronze work*

### Other skills

Making idols: [ISA 40:20](https://ref.ly/Isa40:20); ; [JER 10:9](https://ref.ly/Jer10:9); [JER 9:17](https://ref.ly/Jer9:17) *professional mourning*; ; [EZK 27:8–27:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek27:8-Ezek27:9) *seamanship*

-----------------------------------------

**[PRO 14:8](https://ref.ly/Prov14:8)**; **[ECC 12:11](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:11)** *See also* [PRO 6:6](https://ref.ly/Prov6:6), [PRO 10:5](https://ref.ly/Prov10:5), [PRO 10:8–10:9](https://ref.ly/Prov10:8-Prov10:9), [PRO 19:11](https://ref.ly/Prov19:11), [PRO 20:1](https://ref.ly/Prov20:1), [PRO 21:20](https://ref.ly/Prov21:20), [PRO 29:11](https://ref.ly/Prov29:11); [ECC 7:7](https://ref.ly/Eccl7:7), [ECC 10:12](https://ref.ly/Eccl10:12)

**[1CO 1:18–1:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:18-1Cor1:25)** *See also* [1CO 4:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:10)
