* **Associated Articles:** 1020: God, all-knowing (ID: `1020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4813: depth (ID: `4813@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5029: knowledge, of God (ID: `5029@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5033: knowledge of good and evil (ID: `5033@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5481: proverb (ID: `5481@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5531: skill (ID: `5531@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5894: intelligence (ID: `5894@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5922: prudence (ID: `5922@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5948: shrewdness (ID: `5948@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8281: insight (ID: `8281@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8319: perception, spiritual (ID: `8319@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8355: understanding (ID: `8355@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8366: wisdom, source of human (id: 8366)

True wisdom belongs to God and may be given by him alone. It cannot be received by those who put confidence in worldly wisdom which is based upon human cleverness and insight without God's revelation and which will come to nothing.

True wisdom comes from God
--------------------------

### It is given by God alone

**[JOB 12:13](https://ref.ly/Job12:13)** *See also* [EXO 28:3](https://ref.ly/Exod28:3); [JOB 38:36](https://ref.ly/Job38:36); [ECC 2:26](https://ref.ly/Eccl2:26); [JAS 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:17)

### It is received through God's word

**[PSA 19:7](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7)** *See also* [PSA 119:99–119:100](https://ref.ly/Ps119:99-Ps119:100), [PSA 119:130](https://ref.ly/Ps119:130); [ECC 8:5](https://ref.ly/Eccl8:5); [JER 8:8–8:9](https://ref.ly/Jer8:8-Jer8:9); [HOS 4:6](https://ref.ly/Hos4:6); [MAT 7:24](https://ref.ly/Matt7:24); [COL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Col3:16); [2TI 3:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:15)

### It is received through submission to God

**[PRO 15:33](https://ref.ly/Prov15:33)** *See also* [ISA 33:6](https://ref.ly/Isa33:6)

### It is imparted by God's Spirit

**[EPH 1:17](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17)** *See also* [EXO 31:3](https://ref.ly/Exod31:3) parallel [EXO 35:31](https://ref.ly/Exod35:31); [JOB 32:8](https://ref.ly/Job32:8); [DAN 4:18](https://ref.ly/Dan4:18), [DAN 5:14](https://ref.ly/Dan5:14); [ACT 6:3](https://ref.ly/Acts6:3), [ACT 6:10](https://ref.ly/Acts6:10); [1CO 12:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:8); [EPH 3:5](https://ref.ly/Eph3:5)

### It is given in response to prayer

**[JAS 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5)** *See also* [1KI 3:9](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:9) parallel [2CH 1:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr1:10); [PRO 2:3–2:6](https://ref.ly/Prov2:3-Prov2:6); [DAN 10:12](https://ref.ly/Dan10:12); [COL 1:9](https://ref.ly/Col1:9)

The emptiness of worldly wisdom
-------------------------------

### Worldly wisdom is foolishness to God

**[1CO 3:19–3:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:19-1Cor3:20)** *See also* [JOB 5:13](https://ref.ly/Job5:13); [PSA 94:11](https://ref.ly/Ps94:11); [ROM 1:21–1:23](https://ref.ly/Rom1:21-Rom1:23)

### God cannot be known by worldly wisdom

**[1CO 1:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:21)** *See also* [ECC 8:16–8:17](https://ref.ly/Eccl8:16-Eccl8:17); [ISA 55:9](https://ref.ly/Isa55:9); [ROM 11:33–11:34](https://ref.ly/Rom11:33-Rom11:34); [1CO 1:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:17), [1CO 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:4-1Cor2:5), [1CO 2:11–2:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:11-1Cor2:13)

### Worldly wisdom builds pride and false hope

**[ISA 47:10](https://ref.ly/Isa47:10)** *See also* [PRO 3:7](https://ref.ly/Prov3:7), [PRO 26:12](https://ref.ly/Prov26:12), [PRO 28:11](https://ref.ly/Prov28:11); [ISA 5:21](https://ref.ly/Isa5:21); [JER 9:23](https://ref.ly/Jer9:23); [COL 2:231](https://ref.ly/Col2:231)CO [4:10](https://ref.ly/Col4:10); [2CO 11:18–11:19](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:18-2Cor11:19)

### Worldly wisdom will be confounded

**[ISA 29:14](https://ref.ly/Isa29:14)** *See also* [1CO 1:19–1:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:19-1Cor1:20); [JOB 5:12–5:13](https://ref.ly/Job5:12-Job5:13); [PRO 21:30](https://ref.ly/Prov21:30); [ISA 19:11](https://ref.ly/Isa19:11), [ISA 44:25](https://ref.ly/Isa44:25); [JER 51:57](https://ref.ly/Jer51:57); [EZK 28:6–28:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:6-Ezek28:7), [EZK 28:17](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:17); [1CO 1:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:25)

The revelation of divine wisdom
-------------------------------

### It is revealed in Jesus Christ

**[1CO 1:23–1:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:23-1Cor1:24)** *God's wisdom, which is hidden from those who rely on human wisdom, is the message of Christ crucified.* *See also* [1CO 1:30](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:30), [1CO 2:6–2:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:6-1Cor2:8); [COL 1:15–1:17](https://ref.ly/Col1:15-Col1:17)

### It is rejected by the worldly\-wise

**[1CO 2:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:14)** *See also* [1CO 1:18](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:18), [1CO 1:22–1:23](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:22-1Cor1:23)

### It is revealed to the unlearned

**[MAT 11:25](https://ref.ly/Matt11:25)** parallel [LUK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Luke10:21)**[1CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:18)** *God's wisdom may be received only by those willing to give up all reliance on their own human insight and understanding.* *See also* [1CO 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:26-1Cor1:27)

### It is revealed through the church

**[EPH 3:10](https://ref.ly/Eph3:10)**

### God\-given wisdom is superior to worldly wisdom

**[LUK 21:15](https://ref.ly/Luke21:15)** *See also* [GEN 41:15](https://ref.ly/Gen41:15); [EXO 7:11–7:12](https://ref.ly/Exod7:11-Exod7:12); [1KI 4:30](https://ref.ly/1Kgs4:30); [DAN 1:20](https://ref.ly/Dan1:20), [DAN 5:7](https://ref.ly/Dan5:7); [ACT 6:10](https://ref.ly/Acts6:10)

* **Associated Passages:** Job 12:13; Exodus 28:3; Job 38:36; Ecclesiastes 2:26; James 3:17; Psalms 19:7; Psalms 119:99-100; Psalms 119:130; Ecclesiastes 8:5; Jeremiah 8:8-9; Hosea 4:6; Matthew 7:24; Colossians 3:16; 2 Timothy 3:15; Proverbs 15:33; Isaiah 33:6; Ephesians 1:17; Exodus 31:3; Exodus 35:31; Job 32:8; Daniel 4:18; Daniel 5:14; Acts 6:3; Acts 6:10; 1 Corinthians 12:8; Ephesians 3:5; James 1:5; 1 Kings 3:9; 2 Chronicles 1:10; Proverbs 2:3-6; Daniel 10:12; Colossians 1:9; 1 Corinthians 3:19-20; Job 5:13; Psalms 94:11; Romans 1:21-23; 1 Corinthians 1:21; Ecclesiastes 8:16-17; Isaiah 55:9; Romans 11:33-34; 1 Corinthians 1:17; 1 Corinthians 2:4-5; 1 Corinthians 2:11-13; Isaiah 47:10; Proverbs 3:7; Proverbs 26:12; Proverbs 28:11; Isaiah 5:21; Jeremiah 9:23; Colossians 2:231; Colossians 4:10; 2 Corinthians 11:18-19; Isaiah 29:14; 1 Corinthians 1:19-20; Job 5:12-13; Proverbs 21:30; Isaiah 19:11; Isaiah 44:25; Jeremiah 51:57; Ezekiel 28:6-7; Ezekiel 28:17; 1 Corinthians 1:25; 1 Corinthians 1:23-24; 1 Corinthians 1:30; 1 Corinthians 2:6-8; Colossians 1:15-17; 1 Corinthians 2:14; 1 Corinthians 1:18; 1 Corinthians 1:22-23; Matthew 11:25; Luke 10:21; 1 Corinthians 3:18; 1 Corinthians 1:26-27; Ephesians 3:10; Luke 21:15; Genesis 41:15; Exodus 7:11-12; 1 Kings 4:30; Daniel 1:20; Daniel 5:7
* **Associated Articles:** 1180: God, wisdom of (ID: `1180@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1439: revelation (ID: `1439@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2045: Jesus Christ, knowledge of (ID: `2045@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2081: Jesus Christ, wisdom of (ID: `2081@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3050: Holy Spirit, wisdom of (ID: `3050@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3281: Holy Spirit, inspiration of (ID: `3281@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5118: Solomon (ID: `5118@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5191: thought (ID: `5191@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5441: philosophy (ID: `5441@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5457: power, human (ID: `5457@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8674: study (ID: `8674@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8755: folly (ID: `8755@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8367: wisdom, importance of human (id: 8367)

True wisdom may bring material reward but its value far exceeds earthly riches. To those who receive it, it opens a path to life and security and equips for leadership and right conduct.

The supreme value of true wisdom
--------------------------------

### It is priceless

**[PRO 4:7](https://ref.ly/Prov4:7)** *See also* [PRO 3:13](https://ref.ly/Prov3:13), [PRO 8:10–8:11](https://ref.ly/Prov8:10-Prov8:11)

### It leads to life

**[PRO 15:24](https://ref.ly/Prov15:24)** *See also* [PRO 11:30](https://ref.ly/Prov11:30), [PRO 13:14](https://ref.ly/Prov13:14), [PRO 16:22](https://ref.ly/Prov16:22), [PRO 24:14](https://ref.ly/Prov24:14); [DAN 12:3](https://ref.ly/Dan12:3)

### It brings prosperity

**[PRO 8:18](https://ref.ly/Prov8:18)** *The benefits of wisdom may include material prosperity, but more important is the moral and spiritual prosperity which it brings.* *See also* [PRO 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Prov3:1-Prov3:2), [PRO 19:8](https://ref.ly/Prov19:8), [PRO 19:8](https://ref.ly/Prov19:8), [PRO 21:20–21:21](https://ref.ly/Prov21:20-Prov21:21), [PRO 24:3](https://ref.ly/Prov24:3); [JER 10:21](https://ref.ly/Jer10:21)

### It gives security

**[PRO 4:6](https://ref.ly/Prov4:6)** *See also* [PRO 1:33](https://ref.ly/Prov1:33), [PRO 2:6–2:11](https://ref.ly/Prov2:6-Prov2:11), [PRO 14:3](https://ref.ly/Prov14:3), [PRO 28:26](https://ref.ly/Prov28:26); [ECC 8:5](https://ref.ly/Eccl8:5)

The application of wisdom
-------------------------

### It touches the whole person

**[1KI 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:12)** *In Hebrew, the “heart” represents the centre of human personality.* *See also* [JOB 38:36](https://ref.ly/Job38:36); [PSA 51:6](https://ref.ly/Ps51:6); [PRO 2:2](https://ref.ly/Prov2:2), [PRO 16:23](https://ref.ly/Prov16:23), [PRO 22:17](https://ref.ly/Prov22:17)

### It results in right action

**[COL 4:5](https://ref.ly/Col4:5)**; **[JAS 3:13](https://ref.ly/Jas3:13)** *See also* [PSA 119:34](https://ref.ly/Ps119:34); [PRO 1:3](https://ref.ly/Prov1:3), [PRO 4:11](https://ref.ly/Prov4:11), [PRO 15:21](https://ref.ly/Prov15:21), [PRO 23:19](https://ref.ly/Prov23:19); [JER 4:22](https://ref.ly/Jer4:22); [HOS 14:9](https://ref.ly/Hos14:9); [ROM 16:19](https://ref.ly/Rom16:19); [EPH 5:15](https://ref.ly/Eph5:15); [COL 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:9-Col1:10); [JAS 3:14–3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:14-Jas3:17)

### It results in watchfulness

**[MAT 25:1–25:10](https://ref.ly/Matt25:1-Matt25:10)** *See also* [PRO 14:8](https://ref.ly/Prov14:8), [PRO 22:3](https://ref.ly/Prov22:3) parallel [PRO 27:12](https://ref.ly/Prov27:12)

Wisdom is necessary for leaders
-------------------------------

### Wisdom to govern

**[PRO 8:15–8:16](https://ref.ly/Prov8:15-Prov8:16)**; **[ACT 6:3](https://ref.ly/Acts6:3)** *See also* [DEU 1:13](https://ref.ly/Deut1:13); [1KI 5:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs5:7); [1CH 22:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:12); [PSA 2:10](https://ref.ly/Ps2:10), [PSA 105:22](https://ref.ly/Ps105:22); [PRO 28:2](https://ref.ly/Prov28:2); [ECC 1:16](https://ref.ly/Eccl1:16); [ISA 56:11](https://ref.ly/Isa56:11); [JER 3:15](https://ref.ly/Jer3:15)

### Wisdom to administer justice

**[1KI 3:28](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:28)** *See also* [1KI 3:9](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:9) parallel [2CH 1:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr1:10); [PSA 37:30](https://ref.ly/Ps37:30); [PRO 20:26](https://ref.ly/Prov20:26), [PRO 24:23](https://ref.ly/Prov24:23); [MAT 24:45](https://ref.ly/Matt24:45) parallel [LUK 12:42](https://ref.ly/Luke12:42); [1CO 6:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:5)

The teaching of wisdom
----------------------

### The wise give instruction

**[ECC 12:9](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:9)** *See also* [PSA 37:30](https://ref.ly/Ps37:30), [PSA 49:3](https://ref.ly/Ps49:3); [PRO 1:20–1:21](https://ref.ly/Prov1:20-Prov1:21), [PRO 5:1](https://ref.ly/Prov5:1), [PRO 8:1](https://ref.ly/Prov8:1), [PRO 16:21](https://ref.ly/Prov16:21), [PRO 31:26](https://ref.ly/Prov31:26); [DAN 11:33](https://ref.ly/Dan11:33); [1CO 2:6–2:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:6-1Cor2:7); [COL 1:28](https://ref.ly/Col1:28), [COL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Col3:16)

### The wise listen to instruction

**[PRO 1:5](https://ref.ly/Prov1:5), [PRO 15:31](https://ref.ly/Prov15:31)** *See also* [PRO 4:1](https://ref.ly/Prov4:1), [PRO 9:9](https://ref.ly/Prov9:9), [PRO 10:8](https://ref.ly/Prov10:8), [PRO 13:20](https://ref.ly/Prov13:20), [PRO 15:12](https://ref.ly/Prov15:12), [PRO 19:20](https://ref.ly/Prov19:20)

Examples of those endowed with wisdom
-------------------------------------

[ACT 7:10](https://ref.ly/Acts7:10) *Joseph*; ; [DEU 1:15](https://ref.ly/Deut1:15) *the elders of Israel*; ; [DEU 34:9](https://ref.ly/Deut34:9) *Joshua*; [2SA 14:20](https://ref.ly/2Sam14:20); ; [PSA 78:72](https://ref.ly/Ps78:72); [1KI 3:16–3:28](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:16-1Kgs3:28), [1KI 4:29–4:34](https://ref.ly/1Kgs4:29-1Kgs4:34), [1KI 10:4–10:8](https://ref.ly/1Kgs10:4-1Kgs10:8) parallel [2CH 9:3–9:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr9:3-2Chr9:7); ; [1CH 22:12–22:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:12-1Chr22:13); ; [MAT 12:42](https://ref.ly/Matt12:42) parallel [LUK 11:31](https://ref.ly/Luke11:31); [EZR 7:25](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:25) *Ezra*; ; [ISA 11:2](https://ref.ly/Isa11:2) *the Messiah*; ; [DAN 1:17](https://ref.ly/Dan1:17) *Daniel and his three friends*; [DAN 2:19–2:23](https://ref.ly/Dan2:19-Dan2:23), [DAN 2:27–2:28](https://ref.ly/Dan2:27-Dan2:28), [DAN 5:11–5:12](https://ref.ly/Dan5:11-Dan5:12); [2PE 3:15](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:15) *Paul*

* **Associated Passages:** Proverbs 4:7; Proverbs 3:13; Proverbs 8:10-11; Proverbs 15:24; Proverbs 11:30; Proverbs 13:14; Proverbs 16:22; Proverbs 24:14; Daniel 12:3; Proverbs 8:18; Proverbs 3:1-2; Proverbs 19:8; Proverbs 21:20-21; Proverbs 24:3; Jeremiah 10:21; Proverbs 4:6; Proverbs 1:33; Proverbs 2:6-11; Proverbs 14:3; Proverbs 28:26; Ecclesiastes 8:5; 1 Kings 3:12; Job 38:36; Psalms 51:6; Proverbs 2:2; Proverbs 16:23; Proverbs 22:17; Colossians 4:5; James 3:13; Psalms 119:34; Proverbs 1:3; Proverbs 4:11; Proverbs 15:21; Proverbs 23:19; Jeremiah 4:22; Hosea 14:9; Romans 16:19; Ephesians 5:15; Colossians 1:9-10; James 3:14-17; Matthew 25:1-10; Proverbs 14:8; Proverbs 22:3; Proverbs 27:12; Proverbs 8:15-16; Acts 6:3; Deuteronomy 1:13; 1 Kings 5:7; 1 Chronicles 22:12; Psalms 2:10; Psalms 105:22; Proverbs 28:2; Ecclesiastes 1:16; Isaiah 56:11; Jeremiah 3:15; 1 Kings 3:28; 1 Kings 3:9; 2 Chronicles 1:10; Psalms 37:30; Proverbs 20:26; Proverbs 24:23; Matthew 24:45; Luke 12:42; 1 Corinthians 6:5; Ecclesiastes 12:9; Psalms 49:3; Proverbs 1:20-21; Proverbs 5:1; Proverbs 8:1; Proverbs 16:21; Proverbs 31:26; Daniel 11:33; 1 Corinthians 2:6-7; Colossians 1:28; Colossians 3:16; Proverbs 1:5; Proverbs 15:31; Proverbs 4:1; Proverbs 9:9; Proverbs 10:8; Proverbs 13:20; Proverbs 15:12; Proverbs 19:20; Acts 7:10; Deuteronomy 1:15; Deuteronomy 34:9; 2 Samuel 14:20; Psalms 78:72; 1 Kings 3:16-28; 1 Kings 4:29-34; 1 Kings 10:4-8; 2 Chronicles 9:3-7; 1 Chronicles 22:12-13; Matthew 12:42; Luke 11:31; Ezra 7:25; Isaiah 11:2; Daniel 1:17; Daniel 2:19-23; Daniel 2:27-28; Daniel 5:11-12; 2 Peter 3:15
* **Associated Articles:** 5035: mind (ID: `5035@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5725: old age (ID: `5725@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5852: experience (ID: `5852@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5903: maturity, physical (ID: `5903@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7733: leaders (ID: `7733@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7793: teachers (ID: `7793@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8226: discernment (ID: `8226@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8305: meekness (ID: `8305@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8463: priority, of faith, hope and love (ID: `8463@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8492: watchfulness, of leaders (ID: `8492@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8701: affluence (ID: `8701@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8808: riches (ID: `8808@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8369: worthiness (id: 8369)

Only God truly merits honour and praise but he graciously considers those who humbly serve him with wholehearted devotion to be worthy disciples.

God the Father is worthy of honour and praise
---------------------------------------------

**[PSA 145:3](https://ref.ly/Ps145:3)** *See also* [2SA 22:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:4) parallel [PSA 18:3](https://ref.ly/Ps18:3); [1CH 16:25](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:25) parallel [PSA 96:4](https://ref.ly/Ps96:4); [PSA 48:1](https://ref.ly/Ps48:1); [REV 4:11](https://ref.ly/Rev4:11)

Jesus Christ is worthy of honour and praise
-------------------------------------------

**[REV 5:12](https://ref.ly/Rev5:12)** *See also* [MAT 3:17](https://ref.ly/Matt3:17) parallels [MRK 1:11](https://ref.ly/Mark1:11), [LUK 3:22](https://ref.ly/Luke3:22); [MAT 17:5](https://ref.ly/Matt17:5) parallels [MRK 9:7](https://ref.ly/Mark9:7), [LUK 9:35](https://ref.ly/Luke9:35); [PHP 2:9–2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:9-Phil2:11); [HEB 2:9](https://ref.ly/Heb2:9), [HEB 3:3](https://ref.ly/Heb3:3); [2PE 1:17](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:17); [REV 5:9](https://ref.ly/Rev5:9)

People are considered worthy by others
--------------------------------------

**[LUK 7:4–7:5](https://ref.ly/Luke7:4-Luke7:5)** *Note that the centurion did not consider himself to be worthy ([Lk 7:7](https://ref.ly/Luke7:7)).* *See also* [GEN 39:4](https://ref.ly/Gen39:4), [GEN 41:38–41:40](https://ref.ly/Gen41:38-Gen41:40); [1SA 16:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:6); [1KI 1:42](https://ref.ly/1Kgs1:42); [DAN 1:18–1:20](https://ref.ly/Dan1:18-Dan1:20), [DAN 2:46–2:48](https://ref.ly/Dan2:46-Dan2:48), [DAN 3:28–3:30](https://ref.ly/Dan3:28-Dan3:30); [ACT 14:11–14:13](https://ref.ly/Acts14:11-Acts14:13)

God considers no person (other than Jesus Christ) to be worthy by nature
------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[REV 5:4](https://ref.ly/Rev5:4)** *See also* [PSA 14:3](https://ref.ly/Ps14:3), [PSA 143:2](https://ref.ly/Ps143:2); [ECC 7:20](https://ref.ly/Eccl7:20); [ROM 3:10–3:12](https://ref.ly/Rom3:10-Rom3:12), [ROM 3:23](https://ref.ly/Rom3:23)

Worthiness, like righteousness, is credited to a person by God
--------------------------------------------------------------

**[2TH 1:11](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:11)** *See also* [LUK 20:35](https://ref.ly/Luke20:35); [ROM 2:29](https://ref.ly/Rom2:29); [2CO 10:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:18)

Examples of people who are considered worthy by God
---------------------------------------------------

### Those who put God first and deny themselves

**[MAT 10:37–10:38](https://ref.ly/Matt10:37-Matt10:38)** *See also* [1SA 2:30](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:30); [LUK 9:62](https://ref.ly/Luke9:62); [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2)

### Those who suffer persecution for the sake of Jesus Christ

**[ACT 5:41](https://ref.ly/Acts5:41)** *See also* [MAT 5:10–5:12](https://ref.ly/Matt5:10-Matt5:12); [2TH 1:5](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:5); [1PE 2:19–2:20](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:19-1Pet2:20)

### Those whose lives show Christlike godliness

**[COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10)** *See also* [1SA 16:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:7); [EPH 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:1-Eph4:2); [1TH 2:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:12); [1TI 3:8–3:9](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:8-1Tim3:9), [1TI 3:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:11); [TIT 2:2](https://ref.ly/Titus2:2); [REV 3:4](https://ref.ly/Rev3:4)

### Those who stand firm for the gospel

[PHP 1:27](https://ref.ly/Phil1:27); ; [1TH 2:4](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:4); ; [2TI 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:15)

### Those who are faithful in the use of resources which God has given them

**[MAT 25:21–25:23](https://ref.ly/Matt25:21-Matt25:23)** *See also* [MAT 24:45–24:47](https://ref.ly/Matt24:45-Matt24:47) parallel [LUK 12:42–12:44](https://ref.ly/Luke12:42-Luke12:44); [LUK 19:17](https://ref.ly/Luke19:17); [1TI 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17)

### Those who welcome God's people

**[MAT 10:11](https://ref.ly/Matt10:11)** *See also* [MAT 10:41–10:42](https://ref.ly/Matt10:41-Matt10:42); [ROM 16:2](https://ref.ly/Rom16:2); [3JN 1:6](https://ref.ly/3John1:6)

Examples of worthy people
-------------------------

[GEN 6:8–6:9](https://ref.ly/Gen6:8-Gen6:9) *Noah*; ; [DEU 1:36](https://ref.ly/Deut1:36) *Caleb*; ; [DEU 34:10](https://ref.ly/Deut34:10) *Moses*; ; [JOB 1:8](https://ref.ly/Job1:8) *Job*; [DAN 9:23](https://ref.ly/Dan9:23), [DAN 10:19](https://ref.ly/Dan10:19); [LUK 1:28](https://ref.ly/Luke1:28) *Mary*; ; [JAS 2:23](https://ref.ly/Jas2:23) *Abraham*

## 8370: zeal (id: 8370)

A single\-minded desire, characterised by enthusiasm and devotion. In Scripture it is often directed towards God, but God is also credited with zeal for his people and for the honour of his name. Misdirected or inappropriate zeal can degenerate into fanaticism.

Zeal for God
------------

**[1KI 19:9–19:10](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:9-1Kgs19:10)** *See also* [NUM 25:1–25:13](https://ref.ly/Num25:1-Num25:13); [1KI 19:13–19:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:13-1Kgs19:14); [2KI 10:15–10:28](https://ref.ly/2Kgs10:15-2Kgs10:28); [PRO 23:17](https://ref.ly/Prov23:17)

Zeal for God's house
--------------------

**[PSA 69:7–69:9](https://ref.ly/Ps69:7-Ps69:9)** *See also* [JHN 2:13–2:17](https://ref.ly/John2:13-John2:17)

Zeal for God's service
----------------------

**[ROM 12:11](https://ref.ly/Rom12:11)** *See also* [NEH 3:20](https://ref.ly/Neh3:20); [2CO 8:16–8:22](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:16-2Cor8:22)

Zeal for God's law
------------------

**[ACT 21:20](https://ref.ly/Acts21:20)** *See also* [PSA 119:137–119:144](https://ref.ly/Ps119:137-Ps119:144)

Zeal for the nation
-------------------

**[2SA 21:2](https://ref.ly/2Sam21:2)**

God's zeal
----------

### Manifested in wrath against sin

**[ISA 42:13](https://ref.ly/Isa42:13)** *See also* [NUM 25:10–25:11](https://ref.ly/Num25:10-Num25:11); [DEU 29:18–29:21](https://ref.ly/Deut29:18-Deut29:21); [ISA 59:12–59:19](https://ref.ly/Isa59:12-Isa59:19); [EZK 5:8–5:13](https://ref.ly/Ezek5:8-Ezek5:13), [EZK 36:5–36:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:5-Ezek36:7), [EZK 38:18–38:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek38:18-Ezek38:23)

### Manifested in concern for his people

**[ISA 26:11](https://ref.ly/Isa26:11)** *See also* [2KI 19:29–19:31](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:29-2Kgs19:31) parallel [ISA 37:30–37:32](https://ref.ly/Isa37:30-Isa37:32); [ISA 9:1–9:7](https://ref.ly/Isa9:1-Isa9:7), [ISA 63:15](https://ref.ly/Isa63:15); [EZK 39:25](https://ref.ly/Ezek39:25)

Misdirected zeal
----------------

**[PRO 19:2](https://ref.ly/Prov19:2)** *See also* [ACT 21:40–22:5](https://ref.ly/Acts21:40-Acts22:5); [ROM 10:1–10:4](https://ref.ly/Rom10:1-Rom10:4); [1CO 13:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:3); [GAL 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Gal1:13-Gal1:14), [GAL 4:17–4:18](https://ref.ly/Gal4:17-Gal4:18); [PHP 3:6](https://ref.ly/Phil3:6)

Zeal for national identity: the Zealots
---------------------------------------

**[ACT 1:13](https://ref.ly/Acts1:13)** *See also* [MAT 10:2–10:4](https://ref.ly/Matt10:2-Matt10:4) parallels [MRK 3:16–3:19](https://ref.ly/Mark3:16-Mark3:19), [LUK 6:14–6:16](https://ref.ly/Luke6:14-Luke6:16)

## 8401: challenges (id: 8401)

God makes demands on his people and, often through spiritual leaders, confronts believers with their sin. He also calls to account false gods and those who exalt themselves against him. The wicked vainly challenge God by questioning his authority, seeking to resist his power and opposing his people.

God's challenge to his people
-----------------------------

### The challenge to obedience

**[DEU 30:15–30:18](https://ref.ly/Deut30:15-Deut30:18)** *See also* [EXO 19:5–19:6](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5-Exod19:6); [DEU 29:9](https://ref.ly/Deut29:9); [AMO 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/Amos5:14-Amos5:15)

### The challenge to serve him alone

**[1KI 18:21](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:21)** *See also* [JOS 24:14–24:15](https://ref.ly/Josh24:14-Josh24:15); [JER 3:12–3:14](https://ref.ly/Jer3:12-Jer3:14)

### The challenge to discipleship

**[MAT 16:24–16:26](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24-Matt16:26)** parallels [MRK 8:34–8:36](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34-Mark8:36), [LUK 9:23–9:25](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23-Luke9:25) *See also* [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21) parallels [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21), [LUK 18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22); [LUK 9:57–9:62](https://ref.ly/Luke9:57-Luke9:62) parallel [MAT 8:19–8:22](https://ref.ly/Matt8:19-Matt8:22); [JHN 21:17–21:19](https://ref.ly/John21:17-John21:19)

Challenging one another's sin
-----------------------------

### The call to rebuke and admonish

**[LUK 17:3](https://ref.ly/Luke17:3)**; **[COL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Col3:16)** *See also* [LEV 19:17](https://ref.ly/Lev19:17); [1TH 5:14](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:14); [2TH 3:14–3:15](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:14-2Thess3:15); [2TI 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:2); [TIT 2:15](https://ref.ly/Titus2:15), [TIT 3:10](https://ref.ly/Titus3:10)

### Sin challenged by spiritual leaders

**[NEH 9:30](https://ref.ly/Neh9:30)** *See also* [NEH 9:26](https://ref.ly/Neh9:26)

### Examples of leaders who challenged the sins of others

[2SA 12:1–12:7](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:1-2Sam12:7) *The prophet Nathan challenges David*; ; [2CH 26:18](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:18) *Azariah the priest challenges Uzziah*; ; [EZK 16:2](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:2) *Ezekiel was called to confront Jerusalem*; ; [HOS 2:2](https://ref.ly/Hos2:2) *Hosea challenges the unfaithfulness of Israel*; ; [ACT 5:3–5:4](https://ref.ly/Acts5:3-Acts5:4) *Peter confronts Ananias*; ; [GAL 2:11–2:14](https://ref.ly/Gal2:11-Gal2:14) *Paul challenges Peter.*

God's sovereignty is unchallengeable
------------------------------------

### It cannot be questioned

**[ISA 45:9–45:11](https://ref.ly/Isa45:9-Isa45:11)** *See also* [JOB 9:12](https://ref.ly/Job9:12); [JER 18:6](https://ref.ly/Jer18:6)

### His purposes cannot be thwarted

**[ISA 14:27](https://ref.ly/Isa14:27)** *See also* [JOB 42:2](https://ref.ly/Job42:2); [ISA 46:10](https://ref.ly/Isa46:10); [DAN 4:35](https://ref.ly/Dan4:35), [DAN 5:21](https://ref.ly/Dan5:21)

### No\-one can stand against him

**[JER 49:19](https://ref.ly/Jer49:19)** *See also* [JER 50:44](https://ref.ly/Jer50:44); [2CH 20:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:6); [JOB 41:10](https://ref.ly/Job41:10)

God's challenge to the wicked
-----------------------------

### He challenges false gods

**[1KI 18:22–18:24](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:22-1Kgs18:24)** *See also* [ISA 41:1](https://ref.ly/Isa41:1), [ISA 41:21–41:23](https://ref.ly/Isa41:21-Isa41:23)

### He challenges human pride

**[ISA 23:9](https://ref.ly/Isa23:9)** *See also* [ISA 13:19](https://ref.ly/Isa13:19); [EZK 28:2](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:2); [DAN 5:20](https://ref.ly/Dan5:20)

Challenges to God and his people
--------------------------------

### To God

**[ISA 14:13–14:14](https://ref.ly/Isa14:13-Isa14:14)**; **[ACT 4:26–4:27](https://ref.ly/Acts4:26-Acts4:27)** *See also* [PSA 2:2](https://ref.ly/Ps2:2); [GEN 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Gen3:4-Gen3:5) *The serpent challenges God's word*; [ISA 5:19](https://ref.ly/Isa5:19) *Isaiah's opponents challenge God to do what he has announced.*[DAN 11:36](https://ref.ly/Dan11:36); [2TH 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:4); [REV 13:5–13:6](https://ref.ly/Rev13:5-Rev13:6)[MAT 4:1](https://ref.ly/Matt4:1) parallels [MRK 1:12–1:13](https://ref.ly/Mark1:12-Mark1:13), [LUK 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/Luke4:1-Luke4:2) *Jesus Christ is tempted by the devil*; [MAT 16:22](https://ref.ly/Matt16:22) *Jesus Christ is challenged by Peter*; [JHN 8:13](https://ref.ly/John8:13) *the Pharisees challenge Jesus Christ*

### To God's people

**[1SA 17:8–17:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:8-1Sam17:11)**; **[PSA 42:10](https://ref.ly/Ps42:10)** *See also* [PSA 42:3](https://ref.ly/Ps42:3), [PSA 79:10](https://ref.ly/Ps79:10); [DAN 7:25](https://ref.ly/Dan7:25), [DAN 8:11](https://ref.ly/Dan8:11); [JOL 2:17](https://ref.ly/Joel2:17); [EPH 6:10–6:12](https://ref.ly/Eph6:10-Eph6:12) *God's people are equipped to stand against the devil's attacks*; [REV 13:7](https://ref.ly/Rev13:7)

Further examples of challenges
------------------------------

[JDG 14:4](https://ref.ly/Judg14:4); ; [2KI 14:8](https://ref.ly/2Kgs14:8) parallel [2CH 25:17](https://ref.ly/2Chr25:17)

* **Associated Passages:** Deuteronomy 30:15-18; Exodus 19:5-6; Deuteronomy 29:9; Amos 5:14-15; 1 Kings 18:21; Joshua 24:14-15; Jeremiah 3:12-14; Matthew 16:24-26; Mark 8:34-36; Luke 9:23-25; Matthew 19:21; Mark 10:21; Luke 18:22; Luke 9:57-62; Matthew 8:19-22; John 21:17-19; Luke 17:3; Colossians 3:16; Leviticus 19:17; 1 Thessalonians 5:14; 2 Thessalonians 3:14-15; 2 Timothy 4:2; Titus 2:15; Titus 3:10; Nehemiah 9:30; Nehemiah 9:26; 2 Samuel 12:1-7; 2 Chronicles 26:18; Ezekiel 16:2; Hosea 2:2; Acts 5:3-4; Galatians 2:11-14; Isaiah 45:9-11; Job 9:12; Jeremiah 18:6; Isaiah 14:27; Job 42:2; Isaiah 46:10; Daniel 4:35; Daniel 5:21; Jeremiah 49:19; Jeremiah 50:44; 2 Chronicles 20:6; Job 41:10; 1 Kings 18:22-24; Isaiah 41:1; Isaiah 41:21-23; Isaiah 23:9; Isaiah 13:19; Ezekiel 28:2; Daniel 5:20; Isaiah 14:13-14; Acts 4:26-27; Psalms 2:2; Genesis 3:4-5; Isaiah 5:19; Daniel 11:36; 2 Thessalonians 2:4; Revelation 13:5-6; Matthew 4:1; Mark 1:12-13; Luke 4:1-2; Matthew 16:22; John 8:13; 1 Samuel 17:8-11; Psalms 42:10; Psalms 42:3; Psalms 79:10; Daniel 7:25; Daniel 8:11; Joel 2:17; Ephesians 6:10-12; Revelation 13:7; Judges 14:4; 2 Kings 14:8; 2 Chronicles 25:17

## 8402: claims (id: 8402)

The assertion of rights and recognition due. God as Creator and Redeemer makes claims on his world and on his people. The claims of Jesus Christ about himself as God and Messiah call for a response. In human relationships, too, claims are made by individuals about themselves and, as a result, on others.

The basis for God's claims
--------------------------

### God's ownership of the world

**[PSA 24:1–24:2](https://ref.ly/Ps24:1-Ps24:2)** *See also* [DEU 10:14](https://ref.ly/Deut10:14); [JOB 41:11](https://ref.ly/Job41:11); [PSA 47:9](https://ref.ly/Ps47:9), [PSA 89:11](https://ref.ly/Ps89:11); [EZK 18:4](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:4)

### God owns his people as Creator

[DEU 32:6](https://ref.ly/Deut32:6); ; [ISA 43:6–43:7](https://ref.ly/Isa43:6-Isa43:7), [ISA 43:15](https://ref.ly/Isa43:15)

### God owns his people as Redeemer

**[1CO 6:19–6:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:19-1Cor6:20)** *See also* [EXO 20:2–20:3](https://ref.ly/Exod20:2-Exod20:3) parallel [DEU 5:6–5:7](https://ref.ly/Deut5:6-Deut5:7); [LEV 25:55](https://ref.ly/Lev25:55); [ISA 43:1](https://ref.ly/Isa43:1); [ROM 14:8](https://ref.ly/Rom14:8)

The priority of God's claims
----------------------------

### God's claim to first place

**[MAT 6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:33)** parallel [LUK 12:31](https://ref.ly/Luke12:31)

### God's claim on the firstborn

*See also* [EXO 13:2](https://ref.ly/Exod13:2), [EXO 34:19](https://ref.ly/Exod34:19); [LEV 27:26](https://ref.ly/Lev27:26); [NUM 3:13](https://ref.ly/Num3:13); [NEH 10:36](https://ref.ly/Neh10:36)

### God's claim to the firstfruits

[DEU 26:1–26:2](https://ref.ly/Deut26:1-Deut26:2); ; [NEH 10:35](https://ref.ly/Neh10:35); ; [PRO 3:9](https://ref.ly/Prov3:9)

### God's claim to the tithe

[LEV 27:30](https://ref.ly/Lev27:30); ; [MAL 3:8–3:10](https://ref.ly/Mal3:8-Mal3:10)

Acknowledging God's claims on human life
----------------------------------------

### Wholehearted devotion to God

**[DEU 6:4–6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:4-Deut6:5)** *See also* [MAT 22:37](https://ref.ly/Matt22:37) parallel [MRK 12:30](https://ref.ly/Mark12:30)

### Obedience to God's law

**[LEV 18:4–18:5](https://ref.ly/Lev18:4-Lev18:5)** *See also* [LEV 19:37](https://ref.ly/Lev19:37), [LEV 22:31](https://ref.ly/Lev22:31); [EZK 20:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:19)

### The call to holiness

**[LEV 11:45](https://ref.ly/Lev11:45)** *See also* [LEV 19:2](https://ref.ly/Lev19:2), [LEV 20:7](https://ref.ly/Lev20:7), [LEV 20:26](https://ref.ly/Lev20:26); [1PE 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15-1Pet1:16)

### Honouring God's name

[LEV 19:12](https://ref.ly/Lev19:12), [LEV 22:32–22:33](https://ref.ly/Lev22:32-Lev22:33)

### Observing the Sabbath

[LEV 19:3](https://ref.ly/Lev19:3), [LEV 19:30](https://ref.ly/Lev19:30), [LEV 26:2](https://ref.ly/Lev26:2); ; [EZK 20:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:20)

### Not worshipping idols

[LEV 19:4](https://ref.ly/Lev19:4), [LEV 26:1](https://ref.ly/Lev26:1); ; [JDG 6:10](https://ref.ly/Judg6:10); ; [ISA 42:8](https://ref.ly/Isa42:8)

The claims of Jesus Christ
--------------------------

### Jesus Christ's claim to fulfil the OT

**[MAT 5:17](https://ref.ly/Matt5:17)** *See also* [LUK 4:17–4:21](https://ref.ly/Luke4:17-Luke4:21), [LUK 24:27](https://ref.ly/Luke24:27); [JHN 5:39](https://ref.ly/John5:39)

### Jesus' claim to be the Messiah

**[LUK 23:2](https://ref.ly/Luke23:2)** *See also* [MAT 23:10](https://ref.ly/Matt23:10); [MRK 9:41](https://ref.ly/Mark9:41); [LUK 22:67](https://ref.ly/Luke22:67); [JHN 4:25–4:26](https://ref.ly/John4:25-John4:26)

### Jesus Christ's claim to be king of the Jews

[MAT 27:11](https://ref.ly/Matt27:11) parallels [MRK 15:2](https://ref.ly/Mark15:2), [LUK 23:3](https://ref.ly/Luke23:3); ; [JHN 19:12](https://ref.ly/John19:12), [JHN 19:21](https://ref.ly/John19:21)

### Jesus Christ's claim to divinity

**[JHN 10:33](https://ref.ly/John10:33), [JHN 19:7](https://ref.ly/John19:7)** *See also* [MAT 26:63–26:64](https://ref.ly/Matt26:63-Matt26:64) parallels [MRK 14:61–14:62](https://ref.ly/Mark14:61-Mark14:62), [LUK 22:70](https://ref.ly/Luke22:70); [MAT 27:43](https://ref.ly/Matt27:43); [MRK 2:7](https://ref.ly/Mark2:7) parallel [LUK 5:21](https://ref.ly/Luke5:21) *Forgiveness of sin was recognised as the prerogative of God alone. Jesus Christ's claim to forgive sin is thus a claim to be God*; [JHN 10:30](https://ref.ly/John10:30), [JHN 14:9](https://ref.ly/John14:9)

### Jesus Christ's claim to universal lordship

**[MAT 28:18](https://ref.ly/Matt28:18)** *See also* [MAT 25:31–25:32](https://ref.ly/Matt25:31-Matt25:32); [LUK 22:69](https://ref.ly/Luke22:69); [JHN 17:2](https://ref.ly/John17:2)

### The \`\`I am'' claims of Jesus Christ

**[JHN 8:58](https://ref.ly/John8:58)** *See also* [JHN 6:35](https://ref.ly/John6:35) *the bread of life*; [JHN 8:12](https://ref.ly/John8:12) *the light of the world*; [JHN 10:7](https://ref.ly/John10:7) *the gate for the sheep*; [JHN 10:11](https://ref.ly/John10:11) *the good shepherd*; [JHN 11:25](https://ref.ly/John11:25) *the resurrection and the life*; [JHN 14:6](https://ref.ly/John14:6) *the way and the truth and the life*; [JHN 15:1](https://ref.ly/John15:1) *the true vine*

### The need to acknowledge Jesus Christ's claims

**[JHN 8:24–8:30](https://ref.ly/John8:24-John8:30)** *See also* [JHN 14:11](https://ref.ly/John14:11)

Human claims
------------

### Those making claims about themselves

[PSA 73:9](https://ref.ly/Ps73:9) *the proud boasting of the wicked*; ; [JER 23:34](https://ref.ly/Jer23:34) *false prophets claim to speak God's word*; ; [MAT 24:5](https://ref.ly/Matt24:5) parallels [MRK 13:6](https://ref.ly/Mark13:6), [LUK 21:8](https://ref.ly/Luke21:8) *false Christs*; ; [ACT 5:36](https://ref.ly/Acts5:36) *Theudas*; ; [ACT 8:9](https://ref.ly/Acts8:9) *Simon the sorcerer claimed to be someone great*; ; [ROM 1:22](https://ref.ly/Rom1:22) *idolaters claim to be wise*; ; [JUD 1:16](https://ref.ly/Jude1:16) *false teachers in the church*; ; [REV 2:2](https://ref.ly/Rev2:2) *false apostles*

### Claims must be verified by actions

**[JAS 2:14](https://ref.ly/Jas2:14)** *See also* [PRO 20:6](https://ref.ly/Prov20:6); [TIT 1:16](https://ref.ly/Titus1:16); [1JN 1:6](https://ref.ly/1John1:6), [1JN 2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:6), [1JN 2:9](https://ref.ly/1John2:9)

### Making claims on others

[2SA 15:3](https://ref.ly/2Sam15:3) *grievances brought for judgment*; ; [2SA 19:43](https://ref.ly/2Sam19:43) *Israel's claim on David as their king*; ; [NEH 2:20](https://ref.ly/Neh2:20) *Nehemiah's enemies have no claim on Jerusalem.*

### Claims made about others

[PSA 35:20](https://ref.ly/Ps35:20) *false accusations made against the righteous*; ; [MAT 5:11](https://ref.ly/Matt5:11) parallel [LUK 6:22](https://ref.ly/Luke6:22) *Believers will be slandered by their enemies*; ; [LUK 11:18–11:20](https://ref.ly/Luke11:18-Luke11:20) parallel [MAT 12:26–12:28](https://ref.ly/Matt12:26-Matt12:28) *The Jews claim that Jesus Christ's powers are demonic*; ; [ROM 3:8](https://ref.ly/Rom3:8) *slanderous claims made against Paul*

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 24:1-2; Deuteronomy 10:14; Job 41:11; Psalms 47:9; Psalms 89:11; Ezekiel 18:4; Deuteronomy 32:6; Isaiah 43:6-7; Isaiah 43:15; 1 Corinthians 6:19-20; Exodus 20:2-3; Deuteronomy 5:6-7; Leviticus 25:55; Isaiah 43:1; Romans 14:8; Matthew 6:33; Luke 12:31; Exodus 13:2; Exodus 34:19; Leviticus 27:26; Numbers 3:13; Nehemiah 10:36; Deuteronomy 26:1-2; Nehemiah 10:35; Proverbs 3:9; Leviticus 27:30; Malachi 3:8-10; Deuteronomy 6:4-5; Matthew 22:37; Mark 12:30; Leviticus 18:4-5; Leviticus 19:37; Leviticus 22:31; Ezekiel 20:19; Leviticus 11:45; Leviticus 19:2; Leviticus 20:7; Leviticus 20:26; 1 Peter 1:15-16; Leviticus 19:12; Leviticus 22:32-33; Leviticus 19:3; Leviticus 19:30; Leviticus 26:2; Ezekiel 20:20; Leviticus 19:4; Leviticus 26:1; Judges 6:10; Isaiah 42:8; Matthew 5:17; Luke 4:17-21; Luke 24:27; John 5:39; Luke 23:2; Matthew 23:10; Mark 9:41; Luke 22:67; John 4:25-26; Matthew 27:11; Mark 15:2; Luke 23:3; John 19:12; John 19:21; John 10:33; John 19:7; Matthew 26:63-64; Mark 14:61-62; Luke 22:70; Matthew 27:43; Mark 2:7; Luke 5:21; John 10:30; John 14:9; Matthew 28:18; Matthew 25:31-32; Luke 22:69; John 17:2; John 8:58; John 6:35; John 8:12; John 10:7; John 10:11; John 11:25; John 14:6; John 15:1; John 8:24-30; John 14:11; Psalms 73:9; Jeremiah 23:34; Matthew 24:5; Mark 13:6; Luke 21:8; Acts 5:36; Acts 8:9; Romans 1:22; Jude 1:16; Revelation 2:2; James 2:14; Proverbs 20:6; Titus 1:16; 1 John 1:6; 1 John 2:6; 1 John 2:9; 2 Samuel 15:3; 2 Samuel 19:43; Nehemiah 2:20; Psalms 35:20; Matthew 5:11; Luke 6:22; Luke 11:18-20; Matthew 12:26-28; Romans 3:8

## 8403: commands (id: 8403)

Demands made of his people, or obligations laid upon his people, by God. Scripture stresses that being the people of God involves responsibilities as well as privileges, and sets out the demands which God justly makes of his people.

* **Associated Articles:** 8404: commands, in OT (ID: `8404@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8405: commands, in NT (ID: `8405@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8404: commands, in OT (id: 8404)

The OT sets out the commands of God to his people Israel, indicating both their extent and their importance.

The reason for God's commands: the need to be holy
--------------------------------------------------

**[LEV 11:44–11:45](https://ref.ly/Lev11:44-Lev11:45)** *See also* [LEV 19:2](https://ref.ly/Lev19:2), [LEV 20:7–20:8](https://ref.ly/Lev20:7-Lev20:8), [LEV 20:26](https://ref.ly/Lev20:26), [LEV 21:8](https://ref.ly/Lev21:8)

God's commands to Israel
------------------------

**[DEU 5:31–5:33](https://ref.ly/Deut5:31-Deut5:33)** *See also* [EXO 16:23–16:24](https://ref.ly/Exod16:23-Exod16:24), [EXO 17:1](https://ref.ly/Exod17:1), [EXO 25:22](https://ref.ly/Exod25:22), [EXO 34:32](https://ref.ly/Exod34:32); [NUM 9:18–9:20](https://ref.ly/Num9:18-Num9:20); [DEU 15:11](https://ref.ly/Deut15:11) *The LORD commands generosity and kindness to the poor*; [DEU 15:15](https://ref.ly/Deut15:15), [DEU 24:17–24:18](https://ref.ly/Deut24:17-Deut24:18), [DEU 24:21–24:22](https://ref.ly/Deut24:21-Deut24:22); [2CH 29:25–29:26](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:25-2Chr29:26); [NEH 8:1](https://ref.ly/Neh8:1), [NEH 9:13–9:14](https://ref.ly/Neh9:13-Neh9:14)

Demands made by God upon individuals
------------------------------------

[GEN 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/Gen2:16-Gen2:17) *Adam*; ; [GEN 7:16](https://ref.ly/Gen7:16) *Noah*; ; [GEN 21:4](https://ref.ly/Gen21:4) *Abraham*; [LEV 6:9](https://ref.ly/Lev6:9); ; [NUM 33:38](https://ref.ly/Num33:38); [NUM 24:13](https://ref.ly/Num24:13) *Baalam*; [DEU 31:23](https://ref.ly/Deut31:23); ; [JOS 4:16–4:17](https://ref.ly/Josh4:16-Josh4:17); [2SA 5:25](https://ref.ly/2Sam5:25) *King David*; ; [1KI 3:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:14) *King Solomon*; ; [1KI 18:36](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:36) *Elijah*; [JER 1:7](https://ref.ly/Jer1:7), [JER 26:2](https://ref.ly/Jer26:2); [EZK 37:9–37:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:9-Ezek37:10) *Ezekiel*

-------------------------------------

### The universe

### The living creation

[2CH 7:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:13); ; [JOB 39:27](https://ref.ly/Job39:27); ; [AMO 9:3](https://ref.ly/Amos9:3); ; [JON 2:10](https://ref.ly/Jonah2:10)

### The angels

---------------------------------------

Commands given by kings
-----------------------

### Over Israel and Judah

[1KI 2:46](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:46); ; [1CH 28:20–28:21](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:20-1Chr28:21); ; [2CH 14:4](https://ref.ly/2Chr14:4)

### Over heathen nations

Parental commands
-----------------

[DEU 32:44–32:46](https://ref.ly/Deut32:44-Deut32:46); ; [PRO 3:1](https://ref.ly/Prov3:1), [PRO 6:20](https://ref.ly/Prov6:20), [PRO 7:1–7:2](https://ref.ly/Prov7:1-Prov7:2)

The nature of God's commands
----------------------------

**[PSA 19:7–19:10](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7-Ps19:10)** *See also* [1CH 16:15](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:15); [PSA 119:86](https://ref.ly/Ps119:86), [PSA 119:96](https://ref.ly/Ps119:96), [PSA 119:151](https://ref.ly/Ps119:151), [PSA 119:172](https://ref.ly/Ps119:172)

God's commands are to be loved
------------------------------

**[PSA 119:47–119:48](https://ref.ly/Ps119:47-Ps119:48)** *See also* [1KI 8:61](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:61); [1CH 29:19](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:19); [JOB 23:12](https://ref.ly/Job23:12); [PSA 112:1](https://ref.ly/Ps112:1), [PSA 119:16](https://ref.ly/Ps119:16), [PSA 119:35](https://ref.ly/Ps119:35), [PSA 119:127–119:128](https://ref.ly/Ps119:127-Ps119:128), [PSA 119:131](https://ref.ly/Ps119:131), [PSA 119:143](https://ref.ly/Ps119:143)

God's commands are to be obeyed
-------------------------------

### God commands obedience

**[ECC 12:13](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:13)** *See also* [DEU 4:2](https://ref.ly/Deut4:2), [DEU 26:16–26:18](https://ref.ly/Deut26:16-Deut26:18); [JOS 22:5](https://ref.ly/Josh22:5); [JER 7:22–7:23](https://ref.ly/Jer7:22-Jer7:23)

### Warnings against and examples of disobedience

**[2KI 17:13–17:14](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:13-2Kgs17:14)** *See also* [1SA 13:13–13:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam13:13-1Sam13:14); [1KI 11:10–11:11](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:10-1Kgs11:11); [LAM 1:18](https://ref.ly/Lam1:18); [DAN 9:4–9:6](https://ref.ly/Dan9:4-Dan9:6)

### The consequences of obedience

**[DEU 6:1–6:3](https://ref.ly/Deut6:1-Deut6:3)** *See also* [GEN 26:4–26:5](https://ref.ly/Gen26:4-Gen26:5); [EXO 15:26](https://ref.ly/Exod15:26); [DEU 4:1](https://ref.ly/Deut4:1), [DEU 8:1](https://ref.ly/Deut8:1); [1KI 11:38](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:38)

### The consequences of disobedience

**[1SA 12:14–12:15](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:14-1Sam12:15)** *See also* [DEU 11:26–11:28](https://ref.ly/Deut11:26-Deut11:28), [DEU 30:1–30:3](https://ref.ly/Deut30:1-Deut30:3); [1KI 9:4–9:9](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:4-1Kgs9:9); [NEH 1:7–1:9](https://ref.ly/Neh1:7-Neh1:9); [JER 22:4–22:5](https://ref.ly/Jer22:4-Jer22:5)

## 8405: commands, in NT (id: 8405)

The NT sets out the commands of God and Jesus Christ for the church.

Commands made by God
--------------------

**[MAT 22:36–22:40](https://ref.ly/Matt22:36-Matt22:40)** parallel [MRK 12:28–12:31](https://ref.ly/Mark12:28-Mark12:31) *See also* [MAT 15:3](https://ref.ly/Matt15:3) parallel [MRK 7:9](https://ref.ly/Mark7:9); [MRK 7:8](https://ref.ly/Mark7:8); [ACT 13:46–13:47](https://ref.ly/Acts13:46-Acts13:47), [ACT 17:30](https://ref.ly/Acts17:30); [ROM 1:32](https://ref.ly/Rom1:32); [1TI 1:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:1); [TIT 1:3](https://ref.ly/Titus1:3); [1JN 3:23](https://ref.ly/1John3:23), [1JN 4:21](https://ref.ly/1John4:21); [2JN 1:4](https://ref.ly/2John1:4)

Commands made by Jesus Christ
-----------------------------

### In the Gospels

**[JHN 13:34](https://ref.ly/John13:34)** *See also* [MAT 8:26–8:27](https://ref.ly/Matt8:26-Matt8:27) parallels [MRK 4:39–4:41](https://ref.ly/Mark4:39-Mark4:41), [LUK 8:24–8:25](https://ref.ly/Luke8:24-Luke8:25); [MAT 28:19–28:20](https://ref.ly/Matt28:19-Matt28:20); [MRK 1:25–1:27](https://ref.ly/Mark1:25-Mark1:27) parallel [LUK 4:35–4:36](https://ref.ly/Luke4:35-Luke4:36); [MRK 5:43](https://ref.ly/Mark5:43) parallel [LUK 8:56](https://ref.ly/Luke8:56); [MRK 9:25](https://ref.ly/Mark9:25); [JHN 15:12](https://ref.ly/John15:12), [JHN 15:17](https://ref.ly/John15:17)

### In the rest of the NT

**[1CO 9:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:14)** *See also* [ACT 10:42](https://ref.ly/Acts10:42); [1CO 7:10–7:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:10-1Cor7:11), [1CO 14:37](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:37); [1TH 4:2](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:2), [1TH 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:16); [2PE 3:2](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:2) *“the command” (see [2Pe 2:21](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:21)) here refers to Christianity considered as a body of ethical teaching*

Commands made by the apostles
-----------------------------

**[1JN 2:7–2:8](https://ref.ly/1John2:7-1John2:8)** *They received the command to love at the beginning of their Christian experience.* *See also* [ACT 10:48](https://ref.ly/Acts10:48), [ACT 16:4](https://ref.ly/Acts16:4) *The Greek word translated “decisions” literally means “decrees”*; [ACT 16:18](https://ref.ly/Acts16:18); [2TH 3:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:4), [2TH 3:6](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:6), [2TH 3:11–3:121](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:11-2Thess3:121)TI [1:3–1:5](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3-2Thess1:5), [1TI 4:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:11), [1TI 6:17–6:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17-1Tim6:18)[1TI 6:13–6:14](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:13-1Tim6:14)

Obedience to the NT commands
----------------------------

### Obedience is a requirement

**[1JN 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/1John2:3-1John2:4)** *See also* [MAT 5:19](https://ref.ly/Matt5:19) *“these commandments” probably refers to the OT law as fulfilled by Jesus Christ (see [Mt 5:17–18](https://ref.ly/Matt5:17-Matt5:18))*; [MAT 19:17](https://ref.ly/Matt19:17); [LUK 17:10](https://ref.ly/Luke17:10); [JHN 15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:10); [1CO 7:19](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:19); [2PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:21); [1JN 3:21–3:24](https://ref.ly/1John3:21-1John3:24); [2JN 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/2John1:5-2John1:6); [REV 14:12](https://ref.ly/Rev14:12)

### Obedience is an expression of love and faithfulness

**[JHN 14:21](https://ref.ly/John14:21)** *See also* [JHN 14:15](https://ref.ly/John14:15), [JHN 15:14](https://ref.ly/John15:14); [1JN 5:2–5:3](https://ref.ly/1John5:2-1John5:3); [REV 12:17](https://ref.ly/Rev12:17)

Commands given by secular authorities
-------------------------------------

[MAT 8:9](https://ref.ly/Matt8:9) parallel [LUK 7:8](https://ref.ly/Luke7:8) *the Roman centurion*; ; [MAT 14:9–14:10](https://ref.ly/Matt14:9-Matt14:10) parallel [MRK 6:27](https://ref.ly/Mark6:27) *Herod orders the beheading of John the Baptist*; ; [MAT 27:64–27:65](https://ref.ly/Matt27:64-Matt27:65); ; [LUK 2:1](https://ref.ly/Luke2:1); ; [ACT 12:19](https://ref.ly/Acts12:19), [ACT 16:22–16:24](https://ref.ly/Acts16:22-Acts16:24), [ACT 18:2](https://ref.ly/Acts18:2) *Claudius ordered all the Jews to leave Rome*; ; [ACT 21:34](https://ref.ly/Acts21:34), [ACT 23:10](https://ref.ly/Acts23:10), [ACT 23:35](https://ref.ly/Acts23:35), [ACT 25:6](https://ref.ly/Acts25:6), [ACT 25:17](https://ref.ly/Acts25:17), [ACT 25:21](https://ref.ly/Acts25:21), [ACT 25:23](https://ref.ly/Acts25:23)

## 8407: confession, of Jesus Christ (id: 8407)

A public declaration of faith in Jesus Christ, acknowledging both his divinity and his lordship. Without such, salvation is impossible.

Confession of faith in Jesus Christ is necessary for salvation
--------------------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 10:9–10:10](https://ref.ly/Rom10:9-Rom10:10)** *See also* [MAT 10:32–10:33](https://ref.ly/Matt10:32-Matt10:33) parallel [LUK 12:8–12:9](https://ref.ly/Luke12:8-Luke12:9); [MRK 8:38](https://ref.ly/Mark8:38); [2TI 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:12); [1JN 4:15](https://ref.ly/1John4:15), [1JN 2:23](https://ref.ly/1John2:23)

Confessing Jesus Christ as Lord is only possible by the Holy Spirit
-------------------------------------------------------------------

**[1CO 12:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:3)**

Results of confessing faith in Jesus Christ
-------------------------------------------

### Baptism

**[ACT 2:38–2:41](https://ref.ly/Acts2:38-Acts2:41)** *See also* [ACT 18:8](https://ref.ly/Acts18:8), [ACT 22:16](https://ref.ly/Acts22:16)

### A change in lifestyle

**[MAT 7:21–7:23](https://ref.ly/Matt7:21-Matt7:23)**; **[2TI 2:19](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:19)** *See also* [LUK 19:8–19:9](https://ref.ly/Luke19:8-Luke19:9); [1TI 6:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:12); [HEB 13:15](https://ref.ly/Heb13:15); [1JN 1:6](https://ref.ly/1John1:6), [1JN 2:4](https://ref.ly/1John2:4)

### Persecution

**[JHN 9:22](https://ref.ly/John9:22)** *See also* [JHN 12:42–12:43](https://ref.ly/John12:42-John12:43); [2TI 3:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:12)

Demons confessed Jesus Christ's divinity
----------------------------------------

**[LUK 4:41](https://ref.ly/Luke4:41)** *See also* [MAT 8:28–8:29](https://ref.ly/Matt8:28-Matt8:29) parallels [MRK 5:7](https://ref.ly/Mark5:7), [LUK 8:28](https://ref.ly/Luke8:28)

Ultimately all will confess Jesus Christ's lordship
---------------------------------------------------

**[PHP 2:9–2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:9-Phil2:11)**

Notable confessions of faith in Jesus Christ
--------------------------------------------

**[JHN 1:49](https://ref.ly/John1:49)** *See also* [MAT 14:33](https://ref.ly/Matt14:33), [MAT 16:16](https://ref.ly/Matt16:16) parallels [MRK 8:29](https://ref.ly/Mark8:29), [LUK 9:20](https://ref.ly/Luke9:20); [JHN 6:69](https://ref.ly/John6:69), [JHN 11:27](https://ref.ly/John11:27), [JHN 20:28](https://ref.ly/John20:28)

The refusal to confess Jesus Christ
-----------------------------------

**[MAT 10:32–10:33](https://ref.ly/Matt10:32-Matt10:33)** parallel [LUK 12:8–12:9](https://ref.ly/Luke12:8-Luke12:9) *See also* [2TI 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:12)

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 10:9-10; Matthew 10:32-33; Luke 12:8-9; Mark 8:38; 2 Timothy 2:12; 1 John 4:15; 1 John 2:23; 1 Corinthians 12:3; Acts 2:38-41; Acts 18:8; Acts 22:16; Matthew 7:21-23; 2 Timothy 2:19; Luke 19:8-9; 1 Timothy 6:12; Hebrews 13:15; 1 John 1:6; 1 John 2:4; John 9:22; John 12:42-43; 2 Timothy 3:12; Luke 4:41; Matthew 8:28-29; Mark 5:7; Luke 8:28; Philippians 2:9-11; John 1:49; Matthew 14:33; Matthew 16:16; Mark 8:29; Luke 9:20; John 6:69; John 11:27; John 20:28

## 8408: decision-making (id: 8408)

The ability to arrive at a decision after due consideration of all the factors involved. The Christian life involves making decisions at many levels. Scripture offers guidance concerning how such decisions should be made, and provides examples of good and bad decision\-making.

* **Associated Articles:** 8409: decision-making, and providence (ID: `8409@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8410: decision-making, examples of (ID: `8410@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8409: decision-making, and providence (id: 8409)

People need guidance from God about how they should make up their minds on difficult issues. God gives them this through the Holy Spirit, the Scriptures, individuals, groups and other external means.

Decisions should be grounded in a relationship with God
-------------------------------------------------------

**[PRO 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5-Prov3:6)** *See also* [PSA 23:1–23:3](https://ref.ly/Ps23:1-Ps23:3), [PSA 25:4–25:5](https://ref.ly/Ps25:4-Ps25:5), [PSA 25:8–25:9](https://ref.ly/Ps25:8-Ps25:9), [PSA 25:12](https://ref.ly/Ps25:12); [PRO 9:10](https://ref.ly/Prov9:10) *Wisdom involves making right moral decisions*; [MAT 6:31–6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:31-Matt6:33) parallel [LUK 12:29–12:31](https://ref.ly/Luke12:29-Luke12:31)

God guides decision\-making
---------------------------

### Through Scripture

**[2TI 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16-2Tim3:17)** *See also* [PSA 19:7–19:11](https://ref.ly/Ps19:7-Ps19:11), [PSA 119:9](https://ref.ly/Ps119:9), [PSA 119:11](https://ref.ly/Ps119:11), [PSA 119:98–119:100](https://ref.ly/Ps119:98-Ps119:100), [PSA 119:104–119:105](https://ref.ly/Ps119:104-Ps119:105), [PSA 119:130](https://ref.ly/Ps119:130)MAT [4:4](https://ref.ly/Ps4:4) parallel [LUK 4:4](https://ref.ly/Luke4:4); [DEU 8:3](https://ref.ly/Deut8:3); [MAT 4:7](https://ref.ly/Matt4:7) parallel [LUK 4:12](https://ref.ly/Luke4:12); [DEU 6:16](https://ref.ly/Deut6:16); [MAT 4:10](https://ref.ly/Matt4:10) parallel [LUK 4:8](https://ref.ly/Luke4:8); [DEU 6:13](https://ref.ly/Deut6:13)

### Through supernatural intervention

**[ACT 18:9](https://ref.ly/Acts18:9)** *See also* [GEN 28:10–28:15](https://ref.ly/Gen28:10-Gen28:15); [1SA 16:6–16:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:6-1Sam16:7), [1SA 16:12](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:12); [ISA 30:19–30:21](https://ref.ly/Isa30:19-Isa30:21); [JER 32:6–32:9](https://ref.ly/Jer32:6-Jer32:9); [ACT 9:10–9:16](https://ref.ly/Acts9:10-Acts9:16), [ACT 10:9–10:16](https://ref.ly/Acts10:9-Acts10:16), [ACT 11:27–11:30](https://ref.ly/Acts11:27-Acts11:30), [ACT 21:10–21:11](https://ref.ly/Acts21:10-Acts21:11), [ACT 26:19](https://ref.ly/Acts26:19); [1CO 14:29–14:30](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:29-1Cor14:30)

### Through prayer

**[JAS 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5-Jas1:6)** *See also* [1KI 3:9–3:12](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:9-1Kgs3:12); [PRO 2:3–2:6](https://ref.ly/Prov2:3-Prov2:6); [MAT 7:7–7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:7-Matt7:11) parallel [LUK 11:9–11:13](https://ref.ly/Luke11:9-Luke11:13); [MAT 21:22](https://ref.ly/Matt21:22); [EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18)

### Through circumstances

**[ACT 6:1–6:4](https://ref.ly/Acts6:1-Acts6:4)** *See also* [NUM 13:1–13:3](https://ref.ly/Num13:1-Num13:3); [DEU 32:28–32:29](https://ref.ly/Deut32:28-Deut32:29); [JOS 2:23–2:24](https://ref.ly/Josh2:23-Josh2:24); [RUT 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:2-Ruth2:3); [1KI 3:26–3:28](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:26-1Kgs3:28); [ACT 15:19–15:22](https://ref.ly/Acts15:19-Acts15:22), [ACT 16:3](https://ref.ly/Acts16:3), [ACT 20:3](https://ref.ly/Acts20:3), [ACT 20:16](https://ref.ly/Acts20:16); [1CO 16:8–16:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:8-1Cor16:9)

The work of the Holy Spirit in decision\-making
-----------------------------------------------

**[JHN 14:16–14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:16-John14:17)** *See also* [JHN 14:26](https://ref.ly/John14:26), [JHN 16:13–16:15](https://ref.ly/John16:13-John16:15); [ACT 8:29](https://ref.ly/Acts8:29), [ACT 10:19](https://ref.ly/Acts10:19), [ACT 13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2), [ACT 15:28](https://ref.ly/Acts15:28), [ACT 16:6–16:10](https://ref.ly/Acts16:6-Acts16:10); [1JN 2:20](https://ref.ly/1John2:20), [1JN 2:27](https://ref.ly/1John2:27)

Motivation in decision\-making
------------------------------

**[MAT 6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:33)**; **[COL 3:17](https://ref.ly/Col3:17)** *See also* [PSA 139:23–139:24](https://ref.ly/Ps139:23-Ps139:24); [MAT 20:25–20:28](https://ref.ly/Matt20:25-Matt20:28), [MAT 23:23](https://ref.ly/Matt23:23); [ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1); [1CO 10:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:31); [2CO 5:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:9); [PHP 4:8–4:9](https://ref.ly/Phil4:8-Phil4:9); [1TH 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:1), [1TH 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:8); [1PE 2:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:12), [1PE 4:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:11)

Humility is essential for divine guidance
-----------------------------------------

**[PSA 25:9](https://ref.ly/Ps25:9)** *See also* [DEU 10:12–10:13](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12-Deut10:13); [PSA 25:14](https://ref.ly/Ps25:14), [PSA 34:9–34:10](https://ref.ly/Ps34:9-Ps34:10), [PSA 73:1](https://ref.ly/Ps73:1), [PSA 84:11](https://ref.ly/Ps84:11); [ISA 58:9–58:11](https://ref.ly/Isa58:9-Isa58:11); [DAN 9:20–9:23](https://ref.ly/Dan9:20-Dan9:23)

The need to test guidance
-------------------------

**[1TH 5:19–5:22](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:19-1Thess5:22)**

* **Associated Passages:** Proverbs 3:5-6; Psalms 23:1-3; Psalms 25:4-5; Psalms 25:8-9; Psalms 25:12; Proverbs 9:10; Matthew 6:31-33; Luke 12:29-31; 2 Timothy 3:16-17; Psalms 19:7-11; Psalms 119:9; Psalms 119:11; Psalms 119:98-100; Psalms 119:104-105; Psalms 119:130; Psalms 4:4; Luke 4:4; Deuteronomy 8:3; Matthew 4:7; Luke 4:12; Deuteronomy 6:16; Matthew 4:10; Luke 4:8; Deuteronomy 6:13; Acts 18:9; Genesis 28:10-15; 1 Samuel 16:6-7; 1 Samuel 16:12; Isaiah 30:19-21; Jeremiah 32:6-9; Acts 9:10-16; Acts 10:9-16; Acts 11:27-30; Acts 21:10-11; Acts 26:19; 1 Corinthians 14:29-30; James 1:5-6; 1 Kings 3:9-12; Proverbs 2:3-6; Matthew 7:7-11; Luke 11:9-13; Matthew 21:22; Ephesians 6:18; Acts 6:1-4; Numbers 13:1-3; Deuteronomy 32:28-29; Joshua 2:23-24; Ruth 2:2-3; 1 Kings 3:26-28; Acts 15:19-22; Acts 16:3; Acts 20:3; Acts 20:16; 1 Corinthians 16:8-9; John 14:16-17; John 14:26; John 16:13-15; Acts 8:29; Acts 10:19; Acts 13:2; Acts 15:28; Acts 16:6-10; 1 John 2:20; 1 John 2:27; Matthew 6:33; Colossians 3:17; Psalms 139:23-24; Matthew 20:25-28; Matthew 23:23; Romans 12:1; 1 Corinthians 10:31; 2 Corinthians 5:9; Philippians 4:8-9; 1 Thessalonians 4:1; 1 Thessalonians 5:8; 1 Peter 2:12; 1 Peter 4:11; Psalms 25:9; Deuteronomy 10:12-13; Psalms 25:14; Psalms 34:9-10; Psalms 73:1; Psalms 84:11; Isaiah 58:9-11; Daniel 9:20-23; 1 Thessalonians 5:19-22

## 8410: decision-making, examples of (id: 8410)

Scripture provides examples of good and bad decision\-making, as well as offering guidance as to how decisions ought to be made.

Examples of good decision\-making
---------------------------------

**[JOS 24:15](https://ref.ly/Josh24:15)** *See also* [GEN 13:8–13:9](https://ref.ly/Gen13:8-Gen13:9), [GEN 35:2–35:4](https://ref.ly/Gen35:2-Gen35:4); [EXO 18:24–18:25](https://ref.ly/Exod18:24-Exod18:25), [EXO 32:26](https://ref.ly/Exod32:26); [RUT 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/Ruth1:15-Ruth1:16); [1SA 14:6–14:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:6-1Sam14:7), [1SA 24:4–24:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam24:4-1Sam24:7); [NEH 4:21–4:23](https://ref.ly/Neh4:21-Neh4:23); [EST 4:15–4:16](https://ref.ly/Esth4:15-Esth4:16); [PSA 27:4](https://ref.ly/Ps27:4); [DAN 1:8](https://ref.ly/Dan1:8), [DAN 3:18](https://ref.ly/Dan3:18); [MAT 4:19–4:20](https://ref.ly/Matt4:19-Matt4:20); [MRK 2:14](https://ref.ly/Mark2:14)[LUK 10:38–10:42](https://ref.ly/Luke10:38-Luke10:42), [LUK 19:8](https://ref.ly/Luke19:8); [ACT 4:36–4:37](https://ref.ly/Acts4:36-Acts4:37), [ACT 5:35–5:39](https://ref.ly/Acts5:35-Acts5:39); [HEB 11:25–11:26](https://ref.ly/Heb11:25-Heb11:26)

Examples of bad decision\-making
--------------------------------

**[GEN 3:6](https://ref.ly/Gen3:6)** *See also* [GEN 12:10–12:13](https://ref.ly/Gen12:10-Gen12:13), [GEN 13:10–13:11](https://ref.ly/Gen13:10-Gen13:11), [GEN 16:1–16:3](https://ref.ly/Gen16:1-Gen16:3); [EXO 32:1–32:4](https://ref.ly/Exod32:1-Exod32:4); [NUM 13:31](https://ref.ly/Num13:31), [NUM 16:1–16:3](https://ref.ly/Num16:1-Num16:3); [JOS 7:21](https://ref.ly/Josh7:21) *Achan disobeyed the LORD's instructions*; [JDG 8:23–8:27](https://ref.ly/Judg8:23-Judg8:27), [JDG 14:3](https://ref.ly/Judg14:3), [JDG 16:1](https://ref.ly/Judg16:1); [1SA 13:8–13:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam13:8-1Sam13:9) *Saul made the offering in Samuel's absence*; [2SA 11:2–11:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam11:2-2Sam11:4); [1KI 12:8–12:15](https://ref.ly/1Kgs12:8-1Kgs12:15) *Rehoboam followed bad advice*; [2KI 24:1](https://ref.ly/2Kgs24:1); [HOS 2:5](https://ref.ly/Hos2:5); [JON 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:1-Jonah1:3); [MRK 10:22](https://ref.ly/Mark10:22); [LUK 15:13](https://ref.ly/Luke15:13); [ACT 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Acts5:1-Acts5:2), [ACT 24:27](https://ref.ly/Acts24:27); [MAT 26:14–26:16](https://ref.ly/Matt26:14-Matt26:16) parallels [MRK 14:10–14:11](https://ref.ly/Mark14:10-Mark14:11), [LUK 22:4–22:6](https://ref.ly/Luke22:4-Luke22:6) *Judas decided to betray Jesus Christ for money*; [MRK 15:1](https://ref.ly/Mark15:1) parallel [MAT 27:1–27:2](https://ref.ly/Matt27:1-Matt27:2) *the decision to put Jesus Christ to death*

The sovereignty of God in decision\-making
------------------------------------------

**[GEN 50:19–50:20](https://ref.ly/Gen50:19-Gen50:20)** *See also* [GEN 45:8](https://ref.ly/Gen45:8); [NUM 24:13](https://ref.ly/Num24:13) *Balaam could only curse or bless at the LORD's bidding*; [JDG 6:39–6:40](https://ref.ly/Judg6:39-Judg6:40), [JDG 14:4](https://ref.ly/Judg14:4); [1SA 2:25](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:25); [2CH 25:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr25:20); [PSA 103:13–103:14](https://ref.ly/Ps103:13-Ps103:14); [JOL 2:25–2:26](https://ref.ly/Joel2:25-Joel2:26); [MIC 7:8–7:9](https://ref.ly/Mic7:8-Mic7:9)ACT [2:23–2:24](https://ref.ly/Mic2:23-Mic2:24), [ACT 4:27–4:28](https://ref.ly/Acts4:27-Acts4:28)[ROM 8:28–8:30](https://ref.ly/Rom8:28-Rom8:30)

Decisions have to be made
-------------------------

**[DEU 30:19–30:20](https://ref.ly/Deut30:19-Deut30:20)** *See also* [1KI 18:21](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:21); [EZK 18:30](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:30); [MAT 27:17](https://ref.ly/Matt27:17), [MAT 27:21](https://ref.ly/Matt27:21); [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21); [ACT 2:38–2:40](https://ref.ly/Acts2:38-Acts2:40), [ACT 16:30–16:31](https://ref.ly/Acts16:30-Acts16:31); [2CO 1:15–1:17](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:15-2Cor1:17); [GAL 3:2](https://ref.ly/Gal3:2)

Good decision\-making involves consideration for others
-------------------------------------------------------

**[MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8)** *See also* [JOB 31:16–31:23](https://ref.ly/Job31:16-Job31:23); [ISA 1:17](https://ref.ly/Isa1:17); [JER 22:3](https://ref.ly/Jer22:3); [AMO 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/Amos5:14-Amos5:15); [MAT 5:13–5:16](https://ref.ly/Matt5:13-Matt5:16), [MAT 25:35–25:36](https://ref.ly/Matt25:35-Matt25:36); [JAS 1:27](https://ref.ly/Jas1:27)

All decision\-making must be subject to the will of God
-------------------------------------------------------

**[JAS 4:13–4:15](https://ref.ly/Jas4:13-Jas4:15)** *See also* [PSA 127:1](https://ref.ly/Ps127:1); [MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39), [MAT 26:42](https://ref.ly/Matt26:42); [LUK 12:16–12:21](https://ref.ly/Luke12:16-Luke12:21)

## 8412: decisions (id: 8412)

The end result of a process of reflection upon possible courses of action, informed and sustained by a concern to please God.

Factors that should affect believers' decision\-making
------------------------------------------------------

### Desire to know God's will

**[PSA 25:4–25:5](https://ref.ly/Ps25:4-Ps25:5)** *See also* [PSA 143:8](https://ref.ly/Ps143:8); [HOS 4:6](https://ref.ly/Hos4:6) *Ignoring God's will leads to destruction*; [JHN 10:27](https://ref.ly/John10:27), [JHN 14:15–14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:15-John14:17)

### Confidence in God's readiness to reveal his will

**[PSA 25:8–25:9](https://ref.ly/Ps25:8-Ps25:9)** *See also* [PSA 16:7](https://ref.ly/Ps16:7), [PSA 25:12–25:14](https://ref.ly/Ps25:12-Ps25:14), [PSA 48:14](https://ref.ly/Ps48:14), [PSA 73:23–73:24](https://ref.ly/Ps73:23-Ps73:24); [PRO 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5-Prov3:6); [ISA 30:19–30:21](https://ref.ly/Isa30:19-Isa30:21); [JER 9:23–9:24](https://ref.ly/Jer9:23-Jer9:24)

### Belief in God's overall plan for his people

**[ROM 8:28–8:30](https://ref.ly/Rom8:28-Rom8:30)** *See also* [EPH 1:3–1:14](https://ref.ly/Eph1:3-Eph1:14); [PHP 2:12–2:13](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12-Phil2:13); [HEB 11:39–11:40](https://ref.ly/Heb11:39-Heb11:40)

### God's promise to guide believers in their decisions

**[ISA 58:11](https://ref.ly/Isa58:11)** *See also* [PSA 32:8–32:9](https://ref.ly/Ps32:8-Ps32:9); [ISA 42:16](https://ref.ly/Isa42:16), [ISA 48:17](https://ref.ly/Isa48:17); [JHN 14:26](https://ref.ly/John14:26), [JHN 16:13](https://ref.ly/John16:13)

### Knowledge of scriptural principles

**[MRK 12:29–12:31](https://ref.ly/Mark12:29-Mark12:31)** parallel [MAT 22:35–22:40](https://ref.ly/Matt22:35-Matt22:40) *See also* [DEU 6:4–6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:4-Deut6:5); [LEV 19:18](https://ref.ly/Lev19:18); [EXO 20:1–20:17](https://ref.ly/Exod20:1-Exod20:17) parallel [DEU 5:6–5:21](https://ref.ly/Deut5:6-Deut5:21); [MAT 7:12](https://ref.ly/Matt7:12) parallel [LUK 6:31](https://ref.ly/Luke6:31); [ROM 13:9–13:10](https://ref.ly/Rom13:9-Rom13:10); [GAL 5:14](https://ref.ly/Gal5:14); [JAS 2:8](https://ref.ly/Jas2:8)

### A willingness to trust God

**[HEB 11:17–11:19](https://ref.ly/Heb11:17-Heb11:19)** *See also* [GEN 15:4–15:6](https://ref.ly/Gen15:4-Gen15:6); [2CH 20:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:20); [PSA 25:1–25:2](https://ref.ly/Ps25:1-Ps25:2), [PSA 31:5](https://ref.ly/Ps31:5), [PSA 143:8](https://ref.ly/Ps143:8); [ISA 12:2](https://ref.ly/Isa12:2); [LUK 1:45](https://ref.ly/Luke1:45); [ROM 4:3](https://ref.ly/Rom4:3), [ROM 4:20–4:24](https://ref.ly/Rom4:20-Rom4:24); [GAL 2:16](https://ref.ly/Gal2:16), [GAL 2:20](https://ref.ly/Gal2:20); [HEB 11:1–11:39](https://ref.ly/Heb11:1-Heb11:39)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 25:4-5; Psalms 143:8; Hosea 4:6; John 10:27; John 14:15-17; Psalms 25:8-9; Psalms 16:7; Psalms 25:12-14; Psalms 48:14; Psalms 73:23-24; Proverbs 3:5-6; Isaiah 30:19-21; Jeremiah 9:23-24; Romans 8:28-30; Ephesians 1:3-14; Philippians 2:12-13; Hebrews 11:39-40; Isaiah 58:11; Psalms 32:8-9; Isaiah 42:16; Isaiah 48:17; John 14:26; John 16:13; Mark 12:29-31; Matthew 22:35-40; Deuteronomy 6:4-5; Leviticus 19:18; Exodus 20:1-17; Deuteronomy 5:6-21; Matthew 7:12; Luke 6:31; Romans 13:9-10; Galatians 5:14; James 2:8; Hebrews 11:17-19; Genesis 15:4-6; 2 Chronicles 20:20; Psalms 25:1-2; Psalms 31:5; Isaiah 12:2; Luke 1:45; Romans 4:3; Romans 4:20-24; Galatians 2:16; Galatians 2:20; Hebrews 11:1-39

## 8413: edification (id: 8413)

The building up and strengthening in the faith of believers and churches. Believers are strengthened by God and are urged, too, to build up one another. The church is edified through God's word, through the Holy Spirit and the proper use of spiritual gifts, through the church's appointed ministries and through the mutual love, support and encouragement of its members.

God edifies his people by strengthening them
--------------------------------------------

**[ISA 40:29–40:31](https://ref.ly/Isa40:29-Isa40:31)**; **[EZK 34:16](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:16)** *See also* [PSA 29:11](https://ref.ly/Ps29:11), [PSA 73:26](https://ref.ly/Ps73:26); [ISA 40:11](https://ref.ly/Isa40:11), [ISA 41:10](https://ref.ly/Isa41:10); [2TH 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:16-2Thess2:17), [2TH 3:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:3); [HEB 13:9](https://ref.ly/Heb13:9)

The edification of believers
----------------------------

### God builds up the community of faith

**[1PE 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:4-1Pet2:5)** *See also* [JER 24:6–24:7](https://ref.ly/Jer24:6-Jer24:7), [JER 31:4](https://ref.ly/Jer31:4), [JER 42:10](https://ref.ly/Jer42:10); [EPH 2:19–2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:19-Eph2:22)

### Believers are to build themselves up

**[JUD 1:20](https://ref.ly/Jude1:20)** *See also* [COL 2:6–2:7](https://ref.ly/Col2:6-Col2:7)

### Believers are to build one another up

**[ROM 15:2](https://ref.ly/Rom15:2)** *See also* [ROM 14:19](https://ref.ly/Rom14:19); [EPH 4:29](https://ref.ly/Eph4:29); [HEB 3:13](https://ref.ly/Heb3:13)

The means of edification
------------------------

### God's word

**[ACT 20:32](https://ref.ly/Acts20:32)** *See also* [PSA 119:28](https://ref.ly/Ps119:28); [ROM 4:20](https://ref.ly/Rom4:20) *Abraham was strengthened in his faith by his acceptance of God's promise*; [ROM 15:4](https://ref.ly/Rom15:4); [2TI 3:15–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:15-2Tim3:17); [1PE 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:2)

### The Holy Spirit

**[EPH 3:16](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16)** *See also* [ACT 9:31](https://ref.ly/Acts9:31)

### Spiritual gifts

**[1CO 14:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:26)** *See also* [ROM 1:11](https://ref.ly/Rom1:11); [1CO 12:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:7), [1CO 14:3–14:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:3-1Cor14:4), [1CO 14:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:12)

### Appointed ministries

**[EPH 4:11–4:12](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11-Eph4:12)** [JER 3:15](https://ref.ly/Jer3:15), [JER 23:4](https://ref.ly/Jer23:4); ; [EZK 34:4](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:4); ; [ZEC 11:16](https://ref.ly/Zech11:16); [ACT 15:41](https://ref.ly/Acts15:41), [ACT 18:23](https://ref.ly/Acts18:23); ; [2CO 12:19](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:19); [ACT 16:4–16:5](https://ref.ly/Acts16:4-Acts16:5) *The message from the Jerusalem apostles results in believers being strengthened.*; [2CO 10:8](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:8), [2CO 13:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:10)

### Love and encouragement

**[EPH 4:15–4:16](https://ref.ly/Eph4:15-Eph4:16)**; **[1TH 5:11](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:11)** *See also* [ROM 1:12](https://ref.ly/Rom1:12), [ROM 14:20–14:21](https://ref.ly/Rom14:20-Rom14:21); [1CO 8:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:1), [1CO 8:10–8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:10-1Cor8:13), [1CO 10:23–10:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:23-1Cor10:24); [HEB 12:12–12:13](https://ref.ly/Heb12:12-Heb12:13); [ISA 35:3–35:4](https://ref.ly/Isa35:3-Isa35:4)

Examples of those who edified others
------------------------------------

[DEU 3:28](https://ref.ly/Deut3:28) *Moses*; ; [JOB 4:3–4:4](https://ref.ly/Job4:3-Job4:4) *Job*; ; [ISA 40:1–40:2](https://ref.ly/Isa40:1-Isa40:2) *Isaiah*; ; [LUK 22:32](https://ref.ly/Luke22:32) *Simon Peter*; ; [ACT 14:22](https://ref.ly/Acts14:22) *Paul and Barnabas*; ; [ACT 15:32](https://ref.ly/Acts15:32) *Judas and Silas*; ; [1TH 3:2](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:2) *Timothy*; ; [PHM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:7) *Philemon*

The goal of edification
-----------------------

**[EPH 4:13](https://ref.ly/Eph4:13)** [EPH 4:14](https://ref.ly/Eph4:14); ; [PHP 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9-Phil1:10); ; [HEB 5:14](https://ref.ly/Heb5:14); [1TH 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:13) *Edification results in right living.*

## 8414: encouragement (id: 8414)

Giving someone confidence and courage to do something. Scripture encourages believers to trust in God and to rely on the enabling of the Holy Spirit.

* **Associated Articles:** 8415: encouragement, examples of (ID: `8415@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8416: encouragement, promises of God's (ID: `8416@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8415: encouragement, examples of (id: 8415)

Believers can encourage one another to have greater confidence in God and so to be bolder in living out their faith.

In the OT
---------

**[2CH 32:6–32:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:6-2Chr32:7)** *King Hezekiah encourages his people.* *See also* [JDG 20:21–20:22](https://ref.ly/Judg20:21-Judg20:22); [1SA 23:16](https://ref.ly/1Sam23:16); [1CH 11:10](https://ref.ly/1Chr11:10); [2CH 30:22](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:22), [2CH 35:2](https://ref.ly/2Chr35:2) *King Josiah*; [NEH 9:26](https://ref.ly/Neh9:26); [DAN 2:18](https://ref.ly/Dan2:18); [ZEC 8:20–8:22](https://ref.ly/Zech8:20-Zech8:22); [MAL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Mal3:16)

In the NT
---------

**[ACT 11:22–11:23](https://ref.ly/Acts11:22-Acts11:23)**; **[1TH 2:11–2:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:11-1Thess2:12)** *See also* [ACT 4:36](https://ref.ly/Acts4:36), [ACT 13:43](https://ref.ly/Acts13:43), [ACT 14:21–14:22](https://ref.ly/Acts14:21-Acts14:22) *Paul and Barnabas*; [ACT 15:32](https://ref.ly/Acts15:32), [ACT 16:40](https://ref.ly/Acts16:40), [ACT 18:27–18:28](https://ref.ly/Acts18:27-Acts18:28), [ACT 20:1–20:2](https://ref.ly/Acts20:1-Acts20:2) *after Paul's ministry in Ephesus*; [ROM 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/Rom1:11-Rom1:12) *Paul to the church at Rome*; [2CO 7:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:4), [2CO 7:13](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:13); [EPH 6:21–6:22](https://ref.ly/Eph6:21-Eph6:22) *Paul's fellow\-worker, Tychicus*; [PHP 1:14](https://ref.ly/Phil1:14) *Paul in prison*; [COL 4:8](https://ref.ly/Col4:8); [1TH 3:2](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:2) *Timothy*; [1TH 3:7](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:7); [PHM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:7); [HEB 13:22](https://ref.ly/Heb13:22); [1PE 5:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:12)

Encouragement as exhortation in the life of faith
-------------------------------------------------

**[COL 1:28](https://ref.ly/Col1:28)** *Paul describes his ministry.* *See also* [LUK 3:18](https://ref.ly/Luke3:18) *John the Baptist*; [ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1), [ROM 15:30](https://ref.ly/Rom15:30); [1CO 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:16), [1CO 16:15–16:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:15-1Cor16:16); [2CO 2:7–2:8](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:7-2Cor2:8) *dealing with a repentant member*; [2CO 6:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:1); [EPH 4:1](https://ref.ly/Eph4:1); [1TH 4:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:10); [HEB 13:19](https://ref.ly/Heb13:19); [1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11); [JUD 1:3](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3)

Commands to encourage others
----------------------------

**[ISA 35:3–35:4](https://ref.ly/Isa35:3-Isa35:4)** [DEU 1:38](https://ref.ly/Deut1:38), [DEU 3:28](https://ref.ly/Deut3:28); [2SA 19:7](https://ref.ly/2Sam19:7) *to David*; ; [ISA 1:17](https://ref.ly/Isa1:17); ; [ROM 12:6–12:8](https://ref.ly/Rom12:6-Rom12:8), [ROM 15:2](https://ref.ly/Rom15:2); ; [1CO 14:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:12); ; [COL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Col3:16); ; [1TH 4:18](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:18), [1TH 5:11](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:11), [1TH 5:14](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:14); ; [1TI 5:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:1); ; [2TI 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:2); ; [TIT 1:9](https://ref.ly/Titus1:9) *the church overseer*; ; [TIT 2:15](https://ref.ly/Titus2:15); ; [HEB 3:13](https://ref.ly/Heb3:13), [HEB 10:25](https://ref.ly/Heb10:25)

Failure to encourage
--------------------

**[EZK 34:4](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:4)** *Condemnation of Israel's leaders.* *See also* [JOB 16:2](https://ref.ly/Job16:2); [PSA 69:20](https://ref.ly/Ps69:20); [ECC 4:1](https://ref.ly/Eccl4:1); [EZK 16:49](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:49); [ZEC 10:2](https://ref.ly/Zech10:2)

Refusing to be comforted
------------------------

**[GEN 37:34–37:35](https://ref.ly/Gen37:34-Gen37:35)** *See also* [PSA 77:2](https://ref.ly/Ps77:2); [JER 31:15](https://ref.ly/Jer31:15); [MAT 2:18](https://ref.ly/Matt2:18)

Scripture censures those who encourage others to do evil
--------------------------------------------------------

**[2CH 22:2–22:3](https://ref.ly/2Chr22:2-2Chr22:3)** *See also* [2SA 11:25](https://ref.ly/2Sam11:25) *after David and Joab had arranged Uriah's death*; [PSA 64:5](https://ref.ly/Ps64:5) *evildoers*; [ISA 41:7](https://ref.ly/Isa41:7) *makers of idols*; [JER 23:14](https://ref.ly/Jer23:14), [JER 29:8](https://ref.ly/Jer29:8); [EZK 13:22–13:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek13:22-Ezek13:23); [1CO 8:9–8:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:9-1Cor8:10)

## 8416: encouragement, promises of God's (id: 8416)

God promises continual support for his people, particularly when they become weary, depressed or disillusioned.

God's encouragement affirmed
----------------------------

**[PSA 10:17–10:18](https://ref.ly/Ps10:17-Ps10:18)** *See also* [1CH 29:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:12); [PSA 89:20–89:21](https://ref.ly/Ps89:20-Ps89:21); [ISA 41:10](https://ref.ly/Isa41:10), [ISA 49:13](https://ref.ly/Isa49:13); [JER 29:11](https://ref.ly/Jer29:11); [ZEC 1:17](https://ref.ly/Zech1:17); [ACT 20:32](https://ref.ly/Acts20:32); [1PE 5:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:10)

Means by which God encourages believers
---------------------------------------

### Meditation on his law and word

**[JOS 1:8–1:9](https://ref.ly/Josh1:8-Josh1:9)**; **[ROM 15:4](https://ref.ly/Rom15:4)** *See also* [PSA 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/Ps1:1-Ps1:3); [HEB 12:5](https://ref.ly/Heb12:5)

### Experience of the Holy Spirit

**[JHN 14:16–14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:16-John14:17)** *The word used for Spirit here means “Counsellor” or “one who encourages or comforts”.* *See also* [ACT 9:31](https://ref.ly/Acts9:31); [ROM 8:18–8:27](https://ref.ly/Rom8:18-Rom8:27); [PHP 2:1](https://ref.ly/Phil2:1)

Experience of God's encouragement
---------------------------------

**[2CO 4:16–4:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:16-2Cor4:18)** *See also* [1SA 30:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam30:6); [PSA 86:17](https://ref.ly/Ps86:17); [ISA 52:9](https://ref.ly/Isa52:9); [DAN 10:18–10:19](https://ref.ly/Dan10:18-Dan10:19); [ACT 9:31](https://ref.ly/Acts9:31), [ACT 23:11](https://ref.ly/Acts23:11); [2CO 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:3-2Cor1:4); [2TI 4:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:17); [HEB 6:18](https://ref.ly/Heb6:18), [HEB 12:5](https://ref.ly/Heb12:5); [1PE 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:3)

### God's encouragement experienced through the words and actions of others

[JDG 7:11](https://ref.ly/Judg7:11) *Gideon and the dream of the Midianite soldier*; ; [2CH 15:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:8); ; [EZR 6:22](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:22) *the returned exiles helped by the king of Assyria*; ; [ACT 28:15](https://ref.ly/Acts28:15); ; [2CO 7:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:4), [2CO 7:13](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:13)

Commands to be encouraged
-------------------------

**[1CO 16:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:13)** *See also* [DEU 31:6–31:8](https://ref.ly/Deut31:6-Deut31:8); [JOS 1:6–1:8](https://ref.ly/Josh1:6-Josh1:8), [JOS 1:18](https://ref.ly/Josh1:18), [JOS 10:25](https://ref.ly/Josh10:25); [1CH 22:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:13), [1CH 28:20](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:20); [2CH 19:11](https://ref.ly/2Chr19:11), [2CH 32:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:7) *King Hezekiah*; [EZR 10:4](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:4); [PSA 27:14](https://ref.ly/Ps27:14); [ISA 54:2](https://ref.ly/Isa54:2) *growth of the nation of Israel after the exile*; [MAT 14:27](https://ref.ly/Matt14:27) parallel [MRK 6:50](https://ref.ly/Mark6:50)ACT [27:22](https://ref.ly/Mark27:22), [ACT 27:25](https://ref.ly/Acts27:25), [ACT 27:36](https://ref.ly/Acts27:36)

Effects of being encouraged
---------------------------

**[ISA 40:30–40:31](https://ref.ly/Isa40:30-Isa40:31)** *See also* [PSA 25:3](https://ref.ly/Ps25:3); [ROM 15:5](https://ref.ly/Rom15:5); [1CO 14:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:3); [2CO 3:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:12); [PHP 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/Phil2:1-Phil2:2); [COL 2:2](https://ref.ly/Col2:2); [1TH 2:11–2:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:11-1Thess2:12)

Prayers for encouragement
-------------------------

## 8418: endurance (id: 8418)

The ability to persevere in a task or calling. The Christian is called to endure in the face of trial or opposition, and his endurance brings spiritual rewards.

Endurance commended as a virtue for God's people
------------------------------------------------

**[JOS 1:7](https://ref.ly/Josh1:7)**; **[GAL 6:9](https://ref.ly/Gal6:9)** *See also* [DEU 5:32](https://ref.ly/Deut5:32); [JOS 23:8](https://ref.ly/Josh23:8); [JOB 17:9](https://ref.ly/Job17:9); [ACT 11:23](https://ref.ly/Acts11:23), [ACT 13:43](https://ref.ly/Acts13:43), [ACT 14:22](https://ref.ly/Acts14:22); [EPH 4:14](https://ref.ly/Eph4:14); [1TI 6:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:11); [2TI 2:3](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:3); [1PE 2:20](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:20); [REV 13:10](https://ref.ly/Rev13:10)

Endurance is a hallmark of true Christian profession
----------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 10:22](https://ref.ly/Matt10:22)** parallel [MRK 13:13](https://ref.ly/Mark13:13)**[LUK 9:62](https://ref.ly/Luke9:62)** *See also* [ACT 20:24](https://ref.ly/Acts20:24); [2TI 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:12)

Christian endurance originates with God
---------------------------------------

**[ROM 15:5](https://ref.ly/Rom15:5)** *See also* [2CO 1:8–1:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:8-2Cor1:9); [COL 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/Col1:10-Col1:11); [2TH 3:5](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:5)

Christian endurance involves standing firm
------------------------------------------

**[1CO 15:58](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:58)**; **[PHP 1:27](https://ref.ly/Phil1:27)** *See also* [GAL 5:1](https://ref.ly/Gal5:1); [PHP 4:1](https://ref.ly/Phil4:1); [2TH 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:15); [2TI 3:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:14), [2TI 4:5](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:5)

The results of enduring
-----------------------

### Salvation

**[HEB 10:36](https://ref.ly/Heb10:36)**; **[JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12)** *See also* [ROM 2:7](https://ref.ly/Rom2:7), [ROM 15:4](https://ref.ly/Rom15:4); [1TI 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:16); [2TI 2:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:10); [HEB 12:7–12:9](https://ref.ly/Heb12:7-Heb12:9)

### Protection

**[REV 3:10](https://ref.ly/Rev3:10)** *See also* [2TH 3:3–3:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:3-2Thess3:4)

### Spiritual fruit

**[JAS 1:4](https://ref.ly/Jas1:4)** *See also* [LUK 8:15](https://ref.ly/Luke8:15); [ROM 5:3–5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:3-Rom5:5)

### Encouragement for others

**[2CO 1:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:6)** *See also* [1PE 5:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:9); [HEB 12:1–12:3](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1-Heb12:3); [REV 1:9](https://ref.ly/Rev1:9)

Examples of endurance
---------------------
