## 8419: enlightenment (id: 8419)

The illumination of the mind, especially by the word of God, leading to delight and increased pleasure in God.

Enlightenment as God\-given understanding and insight
-----------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 43:3](https://ref.ly/Ps43:3)**; **[MIC 7:8–7:9](https://ref.ly/Mic7:8-Mic7:9)**; **[JHN 8:12](https://ref.ly/John8:12)**; **[EPH 1:18](https://ref.ly/Eph1:18)** *See also* [2SA 22:29](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:29); [EZR 9:8](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:8); [JOB 29:2–29:3](https://ref.ly/Job29:2-Job29:3); [PSA 18:28](https://ref.ly/Ps18:28), [PSA 36:10](https://ref.ly/Ps36:10), [PSA 97:11](https://ref.ly/Ps97:11); [ISA 9:2](https://ref.ly/Isa9:2), [ISA 42:6](https://ref.ly/Isa42:6), [ISA 42:16](https://ref.ly/Isa42:16), [ISA 49:6](https://ref.ly/Isa49:6), [ISA 60:1](https://ref.ly/Isa60:1); [DAN 2:22](https://ref.ly/Dan2:22); [LUK 2:32](https://ref.ly/Luke2:32); [JHN 1:9](https://ref.ly/John1:9), [JHN 9:5](https://ref.ly/John9:5), [JHN 12:46](https://ref.ly/John12:46); [ACT 13:47](https://ref.ly/Acts13:47), [ACT 26:18](https://ref.ly/Acts26:18), [ACT 26:23](https://ref.ly/Acts26:23); [2CO 4:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:6); [HEB 6:4](https://ref.ly/Heb6:4), [HEB 10:32](https://ref.ly/Heb10:32); [1PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9)

Enlightenment through the word of God
-------------------------------------

**[PSA 119:130](https://ref.ly/Ps119:130)** *See also* [PSA 19:8](https://ref.ly/Ps19:8); [PRO 6:23](https://ref.ly/Prov6:23); [ISA 51:4](https://ref.ly/Isa51:4); [2PE 1:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:19)

God needs no enlightenment
--------------------------

**[ISA 40:14](https://ref.ly/Isa40:14)**

## 8420: equipping (id: 8420)

The providing of all necessary facilities for achieving a task. Scripture suggests that God does not provide tasks for believers without also providing the gifts which are needed to equip believers for those tasks.

* **Associated Articles:** 8421: equipping, physical (ID: `8421@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8422: equipping, spiritual (ID: `8422@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8421: equipping, physical (id: 8421)

Scripture provides illustrations of situations in which people are equipped to carry out physical actions.

Manual workers are equipped for their tasks
-------------------------------------------

**[1KI 5:13–5:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs5:13-1Kgs5:14)** *See also* [GEN 4:22](https://ref.ly/Gen4:22), [GEN 11:3](https://ref.ly/Gen11:3), [GEN 24:15](https://ref.ly/Gen24:15); [EXO 25:1–25:9](https://ref.ly/Exod25:1-Exod25:9); [1KI 5:10](https://ref.ly/1Kgs5:10), [1KI 19:21](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:21); [EZR 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/Ezra1:5-Ezra1:6); [NEH 2:7–2:8](https://ref.ly/Neh2:7-Neh2:8)

## 8422: equipping, spiritual (id: 8422)

Scripture provides examples of individuals who have been equipped to carry out tasks or responsibilities of a spiritual nature.

Jesus Christ was equipped for his work
--------------------------------------

**[ISA 61:1–61:2](https://ref.ly/Isa61:1-Isa61:2)** *See also* [PSA 72:1](https://ref.ly/Ps72:1); [ISA 50:4–50:7](https://ref.ly/Isa50:4-Isa50:7); [MAT 12:18](https://ref.ly/Matt12:18); [ISA 42:1](https://ref.ly/Isa42:1); [LUK 4:18–4:19](https://ref.ly/Luke4:18-Luke4:19), [LUK 19:31](https://ref.ly/Luke19:31); [JHN 3:34](https://ref.ly/John3:34); [ACT 10:38](https://ref.ly/Acts10:38); [HEB 10:5](https://ref.ly/Heb10:5)

God's people are equipped for service
-------------------------------------

### In the OT

**[EXO 4:10–4:12](https://ref.ly/Exod4:10-Exod4:12)** [EXO 31:1–31:6](https://ref.ly/Exod31:1-Exod31:6), [EXO 35:30–36:2](https://ref.ly/Exod35:30-Exod36:2); [LEV 8:7–8:9](https://ref.ly/Lev8:7-Lev8:9); ; [JDG 3:10](https://ref.ly/Judg3:10); [JDG 6:14](https://ref.ly/Judg6:14), [JDG 6:34](https://ref.ly/Judg6:34); [JDG 11:29](https://ref.ly/Judg11:29), [JDG 14:19](https://ref.ly/Judg14:19) *Samson*; ; [1SA 10:10](https://ref.ly/1Sam10:10); [1KI 3:7–3:9](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:7-1Kgs3:9); ; [2CH 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr2:12); [2KI 2:9](https://ref.ly/2Kgs2:9) *Elisha*; ; [NEH 13:9](https://ref.ly/Neh13:9); ; [ISA 6:6–6:7](https://ref.ly/Isa6:6-Isa6:7); ; [JER 1:9](https://ref.ly/Jer1:9); ; [EZK 1:1](https://ref.ly/Ezek1:1), [EZK 3:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek3:23)

### In the NT

**[2TI 2:20–2:21](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:20-2Tim2:21)** *See also* [MAT 4:19](https://ref.ly/Matt4:19); [LUK 1:15](https://ref.ly/Luke1:15) *John the Baptist*; [LUK 1:41](https://ref.ly/Luke1:41), [LUK 1:67](https://ref.ly/Luke1:67) *Zechariah*; [LUK 12:33](https://ref.ly/Luke12:33); [ACT 4:8](https://ref.ly/Acts4:8) *Peter*; [ACT 6:3](https://ref.ly/Acts6:3), [ACT 9:17](https://ref.ly/Acts9:17) *Ananias*; [ACT 11:24](https://ref.ly/Acts11:24) *Barnabas*; [ROM 13:12](https://ref.ly/Rom13:12); [EPH 4:12](https://ref.ly/Eph4:12), [EPH 6:11–6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11-Eph6:18); [PHP 4:19](https://ref.ly/Phil4:19); [2TI 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16-2Tim3:17); [HEB 13:20–13:21](https://ref.ly/Heb13:20-Heb13:21); [1PE 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15)

Believers are equipped for spiritual tasks
------------------------------------------

### By the call of Jesus Christ

**[MAT 4:19](https://ref.ly/Matt4:19)** parallel [MRK 1:17](https://ref.ly/Mark1:17) *See also* [MRK 10:24–10:31](https://ref.ly/Mark10:24-Mark10:31); [LUK 9:1–9:2](https://ref.ly/Luke9:1-Luke9:2), [LUK 10:1–10:3](https://ref.ly/Luke10:1-Luke10:3); [JHN 1:35–1:42](https://ref.ly/John1:35-John1:42)

### By spiritual gifts

**[1CO 12:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:7)** *See also* [ACT 6:3–6:6](https://ref.ly/Acts6:3-Acts6:6); [ROM 12:6–12:8](https://ref.ly/Rom12:6-Rom12:8); [1CO 12:8–12:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:8-1Cor12:11), [1CO 12:27–12:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:27-1Cor12:31); [EPH 4:7](https://ref.ly/Eph4:7), [EPH 4:11–4:12](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11-Eph4:12)

### By the word of God

**[2TI 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:15)** *See also* [COL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Col3:16); [2TI 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16-2Tim3:17); [2PE 1:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:19); [1JN 2:14](https://ref.ly/1John2:14)

### By the empowering of the Holy Spirit

[ACT 2:4](https://ref.ly/Acts2:4), [ACT 4:31](https://ref.ly/Acts4:31), [ACT 13:9](https://ref.ly/Acts13:9); ; [EPH 5:18](https://ref.ly/Eph5:18)

### For spiritual conflict

**[EPH 6:11](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11)** *See also* [ROM 13:12](https://ref.ly/Rom13:12); [EPH 4:20–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:20-Eph4:24), [EPH 6:12–6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:12-Eph6:18); [COL 3:12–3:15](https://ref.ly/Col3:12-Col3:15); [1TH 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:8); [1TI 6:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:12); [HEB 13:21](https://ref.ly/Heb13:21); [1PE 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15)

## 8424: evangelism (id: 8424)

The proclamation of the good news of Jesus Christ, which arises naturally from believers' love for God and appreciation of all that God has done for them. The NT stresses the importance of evangelism, and provides guidance as to how it should be carried out.

* **Associated Articles:** 8425: evangelism, nature of (ID: `8425@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8426: evangelism, motivation for (ID: `8426@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8427: evangelism, kinds of (ID: `8427@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8425: evangelism, nature of (id: 8425)

Evangelism focuses on the proclaiming of the good news of the coming of the kingdom of God in Christ, including the forgiveness of sins and the hope of eternal life, through the death and resurrection of Jesus Christ.

Evangelism as the proclamation of good news
-------------------------------------------

**[ISA 52:7](https://ref.ly/Isa52:7)**; **[MRK 16:15](https://ref.ly/Mark16:15)** *See also* [2SA 18:31](https://ref.ly/2Sam18:31); [2KI 7:9](https://ref.ly/2Kgs7:9); [ISA 40:9](https://ref.ly/Isa40:9), [ISA 41:27](https://ref.ly/Isa41:27); [NAM 1:15](https://ref.ly/Nah1:15); [ACT 14:7](https://ref.ly/Acts14:7), [ACT 14:15](https://ref.ly/Acts14:15); [ROM 10:15](https://ref.ly/Rom10:15), [ROM 15:16](https://ref.ly/Rom15:16); [1TI 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:7); [2TI 1:11](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:11)

Jesus Christ as the focus of evangelism
---------------------------------------

### The gospel message is revealed by God

**[GAL 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/Gal1:11-Gal1:12)** *See also* [ROM 16:25–16:26](https://ref.ly/Rom16:25-Rom16:26); [GAL 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/Gal1:15-Gal1:16); [EPH 3:3–3:6](https://ref.ly/Eph3:3-Eph3:6)

### The gospel message centres on Jesus Christ

**[MRK 1:1](https://ref.ly/Mark1:1)**; **[EPH 3:8](https://ref.ly/Eph3:8)** *See also* [LUK 1:19](https://ref.ly/Luke1:19), [LUK 2:10](https://ref.ly/Luke2:10), [LUK 3:16–3:18](https://ref.ly/Luke3:16-Luke3:18); [ACT 11:20](https://ref.ly/Acts11:20); [ROM 1:9](https://ref.ly/Rom1:9); [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4)

### The announcement of God's kingdom

**[ACT 28:31](https://ref.ly/Acts28:31)** *See also* [MAT 24:14](https://ref.ly/Matt24:14); [MRK 1:14–1:15](https://ref.ly/Mark1:14-Mark1:15); [LUK 4:43](https://ref.ly/Luke4:43), [LUK 8:1](https://ref.ly/Luke8:1), [LUK 9:2](https://ref.ly/Luke9:2); [ACT 8:12](https://ref.ly/Acts8:12)

### God's promises are fulfilled in Jesus Christ

**[LUK 4:18–4:19](https://ref.ly/Luke4:18-Luke4:19)** *See also* [ISA 61:1–61:2](https://ref.ly/Isa61:1-Isa61:2); [MAT 11:3–11:5](https://ref.ly/Matt11:3-Matt11:5) parallel [LUK 7:20–7:22](https://ref.ly/Luke7:20-Luke7:22); [ACT 5:42](https://ref.ly/Acts5:42), [ACT 8:35](https://ref.ly/Acts8:35), [ACT 9:22](https://ref.ly/Acts9:22), [ACT 13:32–13:33](https://ref.ly/Acts13:32-Acts13:33); [ROM 1:2–1:4](https://ref.ly/Rom1:2-Rom1:4)

### Jesus Christ's death and resurrection

**[1CO 15:3–15:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:3-1Cor15:4)** *See also* [ACT 2:22–2:24](https://ref.ly/Acts2:22-Acts2:24), [ACT 3:15](https://ref.ly/Acts3:15), [ACT 17:18](https://ref.ly/Acts17:18); [1CO 15:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:14), [1CO 1:23](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:23); [2TI 2:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:8)

### The announcement of God's salvation

**[ROM 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Rom1:16-Rom1:17)** *See also* [PSA 40:10](https://ref.ly/Ps40:10), [PSA 96:2–96:3](https://ref.ly/Ps96:2-Ps96:3) parallel [1CH 16:23–16:24](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:23-1Chr16:24); [1CO 1:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:21), [1CO 15:1–15:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:1-1Cor15:2); [EPH 1:13](https://ref.ly/Eph1:13); [2TH 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:13-2Thess2:14)

### The call to repentance for the forgiveness of sins

**[LUK 24:47](https://ref.ly/Luke24:47)** *See also* [MAT 4:17](https://ref.ly/Matt4:17), [MAT 12:41](https://ref.ly/Matt12:41) parallel [LUK 11:32](https://ref.ly/Luke11:32); [MRK 1:4](https://ref.ly/Mark1:4) parallels [MAT 3:2](https://ref.ly/Matt3:2), [LUK 3:3](https://ref.ly/Luke3:3); [ACT 2:38](https://ref.ly/Acts2:38)

### The announcement of peace with God

**[ACT 10:36](https://ref.ly/Acts10:36)** *See also* [EPH 2:17–2:18](https://ref.ly/Eph2:17-Eph2:18), [EPH 6:15](https://ref.ly/Eph6:15)

Evangelism and miracles
-----------------------

**[MAT 4:23](https://ref.ly/Matt4:23)** *Miracles are part of the gospel proclamation, demonstrating that the kingdom of God has come*; **[1CO 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:4-1Cor2:5)** *See also* [MAT 9:35](https://ref.ly/Matt9:35), [MAT 10:7–10:8](https://ref.ly/Matt10:7-Matt10:8); [LUK 9:6](https://ref.ly/Luke9:6), [LUK 11:20](https://ref.ly/Luke11:20); [ROM 15:18–15:19](https://ref.ly/Rom15:18-Rom15:19); [1TH 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:5); [HEB 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/Heb2:3-Heb2:4)

## 8426: evangelism, motivation for (id: 8426)

Evangelism arises from a natural response to the grace of God, a concern for those who have yet to hear the good news and a desire to be faithful to the great commission to bring the good news to the ends of the earth. Evangelism is guided and directed by the Holy Spirit.

Motives for evangelism
----------------------

### Recognising God's call

**[2TI 1:11](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:11)** *See also* [ISA 6:8–6:9](https://ref.ly/Isa6:8-Isa6:9); [JON 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:1-Jonah1:2); [ACT 22:14–22:15](https://ref.ly/Acts22:14-Acts22:15); [2CO 4:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:1); [1TI 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:7)

### A divine compulsion

**[1CO 9:16–9:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:16-1Cor9:17)** *See also* [JER 20:9](https://ref.ly/Jer20:9); [AMO 3:8](https://ref.ly/Amos3:8); [ACT 4:20](https://ref.ly/Acts4:20)

### A God\-given responsibility

**[EZK 3:17–3:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek3:17-Ezek3:20)** *See also* [EZK 33:7–33:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek33:7-Ezek33:9); [1CO 3:10–3:15](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:10-1Cor3:15); [2CO 5:10–5:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:10-2Cor5:11)

### A desire to win the lost

**[ROM 10:1](https://ref.ly/Rom10:1)**; **[1CO 9:19–9:23](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:19-1Cor9:23)** *See also* [ACT 20:19–20:20](https://ref.ly/Acts20:19-Acts20:20); [ROM 1:14–1:15](https://ref.ly/Rom1:14-Rom1:15), [ROM 9:1–9:3](https://ref.ly/Rom9:1-Rom9:3), [ROM 11:14](https://ref.ly/Rom11:14), [ROM 15:17–15:20](https://ref.ly/Rom15:17-Rom15:20); [2CO 5:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:20)

### A recognition of coming judgment

**[JUD 1:23](https://ref.ly/Jude1:23)** *See also* [JAS 5:20](https://ref.ly/Jas5:20); [2PE 3:9](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:9)

### Responding to God's grace

**[2CO 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:14-2Cor5:15)** *See also* [2CO 5:18–5:19](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:18-2Cor5:19); [EPH 3:7](https://ref.ly/Eph3:7); [1TI 1:12–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:12-1Tim1:16)

### Confidence in the gospel

**[ROM 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Rom1:16-Rom1:17)** *See also* [ISA 55:10–55:11](https://ref.ly/Isa55:10-Isa55:11); [1CO 1:17–1:18](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:17-1Cor1:18); [2CO 10:4–10:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:4-2Cor10:5); [2TI 1:8–1:9](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:8-2Tim1:9)

God directs and guides evangelism
---------------------------------

### Divine guidance in evangelism

**[ACT 8:26–8:29](https://ref.ly/Acts8:26-Acts8:29), [ACT 16:6–16:10](https://ref.ly/Acts16:6-Acts16:10)** *See also* [ACT 5:19–5:20](https://ref.ly/Acts5:19-Acts5:20), [ACT 9:10–9:11](https://ref.ly/Acts9:10-Acts9:11), [ACT 10:19–10:20](https://ref.ly/Acts10:19-Acts10:20), [ACT 11:12](https://ref.ly/Acts11:12), [ACT 13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2), [ACT 18:9–18:11](https://ref.ly/Acts18:9-Acts18:11)

### God opens the door for evangelism

**[2CO 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:12)** *See also* [ACT 14:27](https://ref.ly/Acts14:27); [1CO 16:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:9); [COL 4:3](https://ref.ly/Col4:3); [REV 3:8](https://ref.ly/Rev3:8)

### Areas of ministry assigned by God

**[GAL 2:7–2:9](https://ref.ly/Gal2:7-Gal2:9)** *See also* [ACT 9:15](https://ref.ly/Acts9:15)

The Holy Spirit empowers evangelism
-----------------------------------

**[ACT 1:8](https://ref.ly/Acts1:8)** *See also* [MAT 10:19–10:20](https://ref.ly/Matt10:19-Matt10:20) parallels [MRK 13:11](https://ref.ly/Mark13:11), [LUK 12:11–12:12](https://ref.ly/Luke12:11-Luke12:12); [JHN 15:26–15:27](https://ref.ly/John15:26-John15:27); [1TH 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:5)

Evangelism as a result of persecution
-------------------------------------

**[ACT 8:4–8:5](https://ref.ly/Acts8:4-Acts8:5)** *See also* [ACT 11:19–11:21](https://ref.ly/Acts11:19-Acts11:21), [ACT 13:50–13:51](https://ref.ly/Acts13:50-Acts13:51), [ACT 14:6–14:7](https://ref.ly/Acts14:6-Acts14:7), [ACT 18:2](https://ref.ly/Acts18:2)

* **Associated Passages:** 2 Timothy 1:11; Isaiah 6:8-9; Jonah 1:1-2; Acts 22:14-15; 2 Corinthians 4:1; 1 Timothy 2:7; 1 Corinthians 9:16-17; Jeremiah 20:9; Amos 3:8; Acts 4:20; Ezekiel 3:17-20; Ezekiel 33:7-9; 1 Corinthians 3:10-15; 2 Corinthians 5:10-11; Romans 10:1; 1 Corinthians 9:19-23; Acts 20:19-20; Romans 1:14-15; Romans 9:1-3; Romans 11:14; Romans 15:17-20; 2 Corinthians 5:20; Jude 1:23; James 5:20; 2 Peter 3:9; 2 Corinthians 5:14-15; 2 Corinthians 5:18-19; Ephesians 3:7; 1 Timothy 1:12-16; Romans 1:16-17; Isaiah 55:10-11; 1 Corinthians 1:17-18; 2 Corinthians 10:4-5; 2 Timothy 1:8-9; Acts 8:26-29; Acts 16:6-10; Acts 5:19-20; Acts 9:10-11; Acts 10:19-20; Acts 11:12; Acts 13:2; Acts 18:9-11; 2 Corinthians 2:12; Acts 14:27; 1 Corinthians 16:9; Colossians 4:3; Revelation 3:8; Galatians 2:7-9; Acts 9:15; Acts 1:8; Matthew 10:19-20; Mark 13:11; Luke 12:11-12; John 15:26-27; 1 Thessalonians 1:5; Acts 8:4-5; Acts 11:19-21; Acts 13:50-51; Acts 14:6-7; Acts 18:2
* **Associated Articles:** 3030: Holy Spirit, power of (ID: `3030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3212: Holy Spirit, and mission (ID: `3212@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5046: opportunities (ID: `5046@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5806: compassion (ID: `5806@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6620: calling (ID: `6620@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7724: evangelists (ID: `7724@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8124: guidance (ID: `8124@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8239: earnestness (ID: `8239@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8370: zeal (ID: `8370@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8489: urgency (ID: `8489@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8495: witnessing (ID: `8495@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8794: persecution (ID: `8794@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8427: evangelism, kinds of (id: 8427)

Scripture recognises that evangelism takes place in a variety of contexts, and offers models for evangelism in today's church.

Public evangelism
-----------------

### Preaching in synagogues

**[ACT 14:1](https://ref.ly/Acts14:1)** *Paul begins his evangelism in Gentile cities by building links within the Jewish community.* [ACT 13:14–13:16](https://ref.ly/Acts13:14-Acts13:16), [ACT 13:42–13:44](https://ref.ly/Acts13:42-Acts13:44); [ACT 17:2](https://ref.ly/Acts17:2) *in Thessalonica*; ; [ACT 17:10](https://ref.ly/Acts17:10) *in Berea*; ; [ACT 17:17](https://ref.ly/Acts17:17) *in Athens*; ; [ACT 18:4](https://ref.ly/Acts18:4) *in Corinth*; ; [ACT 19:8](https://ref.ly/Acts19:8) *in Ephesus*

### Preaching in recognised meeting\-places

**[ACT 17:19–17:23](https://ref.ly/Acts17:19-Acts17:23)** *See also* [ACT 5:25](https://ref.ly/Acts5:25), [ACT 10:27–10:28](https://ref.ly/Acts10:27-Acts10:28), [ACT 16:13](https://ref.ly/Acts16:13), [ACT 19:9](https://ref.ly/Acts19:9)

### Making a public defence to accusers

**[ACT 21:37–22:1](https://ref.ly/Acts21:37-Acts22:1)** *See also* [ACT 4:7–4:12](https://ref.ly/Acts4:7-Acts4:12), [ACT 7:1–7:2](https://ref.ly/Acts7:1-Acts7:2), [ACT 24:10](https://ref.ly/Acts24:10), [ACT 26:1](https://ref.ly/Acts26:1)

Personal evangelism
-------------------

### Giving personal testimony

**[1JN 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/1John1:1-1John1:3)** *See also* [MRK 5:19](https://ref.ly/Mark5:19); [JHN 4:39](https://ref.ly/John4:39); [ACT 26:9–26:18](https://ref.ly/Acts26:9-Acts26:18); [1CO 7:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:16); [1PE 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:1-1Pet3:2)

### Evangelism in homes

**[ACT 10:24–10:25](https://ref.ly/Acts10:24-Acts10:25)** *Peter visits Cornelius' home to speak to those assembled.* [LUK 5:29](https://ref.ly/Luke5:29); ; [ACT 18:26](https://ref.ly/Acts18:26), [ACT 28:30–28:31](https://ref.ly/Acts28:30-Acts28:31); [ACT 9:17](https://ref.ly/Acts9:17) parallel [ACT 22:12](https://ref.ly/Acts22:12); ; [ACT 16:32–16:34](https://ref.ly/Acts16:32-Acts16:34)

Evangelism in strategic areas
-----------------------------

### Going to major centres

[ACT 16:12](https://ref.ly/Acts16:12) *Philippi*; ; [ACT 17:1](https://ref.ly/Acts17:1) *Thessalonica*; ; [ACT 17:15](https://ref.ly/Acts17:15) *Athens*; ; [ACT 18:1](https://ref.ly/Acts18:1) *Corinth*; ; [ACT 18:19](https://ref.ly/Acts18:19) *Ephesus*; [ACT 23:11](https://ref.ly/Acts23:11), [ACT 28:14](https://ref.ly/Acts28:14)

### Going into new territories

[ROM 15:20](https://ref.ly/Rom15:20), [ROM 15:23–15:24](https://ref.ly/Rom15:23-Rom15:24); ; [2CO 10:15–10:16](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:15-2Cor10:16)

Evangelism among strategic people
---------------------------------

### Speaking to prominent people

**[ACT 18:8](https://ref.ly/Acts18:8)** *Though the gospel is for all people without distinction, evangelism among certain people and groups enabled the message to spead further.* *See also* [ACT 13:7](https://ref.ly/Acts13:7) *Paul before Sergius Paulus, proconsul of Cyprus*; [ACT 24:24](https://ref.ly/Acts24:24) *Paul before Felix and his wife*; [ACT 25:8–25:9](https://ref.ly/Acts25:8-Acts25:9) *Paul before Festus*; [ACT 25:11–25:12](https://ref.ly/Acts25:11-Acts25:12) *Paul appeals to Caesar*; [ACT 26:2–26:3](https://ref.ly/Acts26:2-Acts26:3) *Paul before King Agrippa*; [ACT 28:7–28:8](https://ref.ly/Acts28:7-Acts28:8) *Paul in the home of the chief official on Malta*

### Evangelising households

**[ACT 16:34](https://ref.ly/Acts16:34)** *The conversion of the head of the household was often accompanied by the conversion of the whole family group.* *See also* [JHN 4:53](https://ref.ly/John4:53); [ACT 11:14](https://ref.ly/Acts11:14), [ACT 18:8](https://ref.ly/Acts18:8)

Using literature in evangelism
------------------------------

**[JHN 20:30–20:31](https://ref.ly/John20:30-John20:31)** *See also* [LUK 1:1–1:4](https://ref.ly/Luke1:1-Luke1:4); [ACT 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Acts1:1-Acts1:2)

Appealing to Scripture in evangelism
------------------------------------

**[ACT 26:22–26:23](https://ref.ly/Acts26:22-Acts26:23)** *See also* [ACT 8:35](https://ref.ly/Acts8:35), [ACT 10:43](https://ref.ly/Acts10:43), [ACT 13:22–13:23](https://ref.ly/Acts13:22-Acts13:23); [ROM 1:2–1:3](https://ref.ly/Rom1:2-Rom1:3), [ROM 16:25–16:26](https://ref.ly/Rom16:25-Rom16:26); [1CO 15:3–15:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:3-1Cor15:4)

Signs and wonders in evangelism
-------------------------------

### Miracles confirm the message

**[ACT 8:6](https://ref.ly/Acts8:6)** *See also* [MRK 16:17–16:20](https://ref.ly/Mark16:17-Mark16:20); [ACT 4:14](https://ref.ly/Acts4:14), [ACT 19:10–19:12](https://ref.ly/Acts19:10-Acts19:12); [1CO 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:4-1Cor2:5); [HEB 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/Heb2:3-Heb2:4)

### Miracles give opportunity for preaching

**[ACT 3:9–3:16](https://ref.ly/Acts3:9-Acts3:16)** *See also* [ACT 2:5–2:14](https://ref.ly/Acts2:5-Acts2:14), [ACT 14:8–14:11](https://ref.ly/Acts14:8-Acts14:11), [ACT 16:26–16:31](https://ref.ly/Acts16:26-Acts16:31)

### Miracles result in people believing

**[ACT 9:40–9:42](https://ref.ly/Acts9:40-Acts9:42)** *See also* [JHN 7:31](https://ref.ly/John7:31), [JHN 11:45](https://ref.ly/John11:45); [ACT 9:33–9:35](https://ref.ly/Acts9:33-Acts9:35), [ACT 13:10–13:12](https://ref.ly/Acts13:10-Acts13:12)

The response to evangelism
--------------------------

### Acceptance of the message

**[ACT 2:37–2:41](https://ref.ly/Acts2:37-Acts2:41)** *See also* [ACT 4:4](https://ref.ly/Acts4:4), [ACT 17:4](https://ref.ly/Acts17:4), [ACT 17:34](https://ref.ly/Acts17:34), [ACT 19:17–19:20](https://ref.ly/Acts19:17-Acts19:20); [1TH 2:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:13)

### Rejection of the message

**[HEB 4:2](https://ref.ly/Heb4:2)** *See also* [ROM 10:16](https://ref.ly/Rom10:16); [ACT 13:50–13:51](https://ref.ly/Acts13:50-Acts13:51), [ACT 17:32](https://ref.ly/Acts17:32), [ACT 18:6](https://ref.ly/Acts18:6)

* **Associated Passages:** Acts 14:1; Acts 13:14-16; Acts 13:42-44; Acts 17:2; Acts 17:10; Acts 17:17; Acts 18:4; Acts 19:8; Acts 17:19-23; Acts 5:25; Acts 10:27-28; Acts 16:13; Acts 19:9; Acts 21:37-22:1; Acts 4:7-12; Acts 7:1-2; Acts 24:10; Acts 26:1; 1 John 1:1-3; Mark 5:19; John 4:39; Acts 26:9-18; 1 Corinthians 7:16; 1 Peter 3:1-2; Acts 10:24-25; Luke 5:29; Acts 18:26; Acts 28:30-31; Acts 9:17; Acts 22:12; Acts 16:32-34; Acts 16:12; Acts 17:1; Acts 17:15; Acts 18:1; Acts 18:19; Acts 23:11; Acts 28:14; Romans 15:20; Romans 15:23-24; 2 Corinthians 10:15-16; Acts 18:8; Acts 13:7; Acts 24:24; Acts 25:8-9; Acts 25:11-12; Acts 26:2-3; Acts 28:7-8; Acts 16:34; John 4:53; Acts 11:14; John 20:30-31; Luke 1:1-4; Acts 1:1-2; Acts 26:22-23; Acts 8:35; Acts 10:43; Acts 13:22-23; Romans 1:2-3; Romans 16:25-26; 1 Corinthians 15:3-4; Acts 8:6; Mark 16:17-20; Acts 4:14; Acts 19:10-12; 1 Corinthians 2:4-5; Hebrews 2:3-4; Acts 3:9-16; Acts 2:5-14; Acts 14:8-11; Acts 16:26-31; Acts 9:40-42; John 7:31; John 11:45; Acts 9:33-35; Acts 13:10-12; Acts 2:37-41; Acts 4:4; Acts 17:4; Acts 17:34; Acts 19:17-20; 1 Thessalonians 2:13; Hebrews 4:2; Romans 10:16; Acts 13:50-51; Acts 17:32; Acts 18:6
* **Associated Articles:** 1448: signs (ID: `1448@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5340: house (ID: `5340@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5622: witnesses (ID: `5622@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5680: family (ID: `5680@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7456: synagogue (ID: `7456@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7739: missionaries (ID: `7739@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7948: mission (ID: `7948@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8428: example (id: 8428)

A person who acts as an illustration or model. Scripture provides examples of both good and bad conduct for the guidance of believers.

Scripture provides examples to inform and warn believers
--------------------------------------------------------

### Israel is an example to believers

**[1CO 10:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:6)** *See also* [1CO 10:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:11)

### Job as an example of perseverance and patience

**[JAS 5:10–5:11](https://ref.ly/Jas5:10-Jas5:11)**

### The example of Jesus Christ is of special importance to Christians

**[JHN 13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:15)**; **[1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1)** *See also* [MAT 11:29](https://ref.ly/Matt11:29), [MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24); [PHP 2:5–2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5-Phil2:11); [1TI 1:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:16); [HEB 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Heb3:1-Heb3:2), [HEB 12:2](https://ref.ly/Heb12:2); [1PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21)

### The apostles set an example for believers to follow

**[PHP 3:17](https://ref.ly/Phil3:17)** *See also* [2TH 3:7](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:7)

### Christian leaders are to provide examples to their people

**[1PE 5:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:3)**; **[TIT 2:7](https://ref.ly/Titus2:7)** *See also* [1TI 4:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:12)

### Examples drawn from everyday life

[GAL 3:15](https://ref.ly/Gal3:15); ; [JAS 3:4](https://ref.ly/Jas3:4)

Biblical examples to be imitated
--------------------------------

### Faith

[MAT 15:22](https://ref.ly/Matt15:22) *a Canaanite woman*; ; [JHN 4:4–4:29](https://ref.ly/John4:4-John4:29) *a Samaritan woman*; ; [JHN 20:24–20:29](https://ref.ly/John20:24-John20:29) *doubting Thomas*; ; [ROM 4:18–4:21](https://ref.ly/Rom4:18-Rom4:21) *Abraham*; ; [HEB 11:4–11:38](https://ref.ly/Heb11:4-Heb11:38) *various OT figures*

### Forgiving one's enemies and assailants

[GEN 33:1–33:11](https://ref.ly/Gen33:1-Gen33:11) *Esau*; ; [GEN 45:5–45:15](https://ref.ly/Gen45:5-Gen45:15) *Joseph*; ; [1SA 24:8–24:22](https://ref.ly/1Sam24:8-1Sam24:22) *David*; ; [LUK 23:34](https://ref.ly/Luke23:34) *Jesus Christ*; ; [ACT 7:59](https://ref.ly/Acts7:59) *Stephen*

### Generous giving

[RUT 2:15–2:19](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:15-Ruth2:19) *Boaz*; ; [JOB 29:11–29:16](https://ref.ly/Job29:11-Job29:16) *Job*; ; [MRK 12:41–12:44](https://ref.ly/Mark12:41-Mark12:44) *a widow*; ; [ACT 10:2](https://ref.ly/Acts10:2) *Cornelius*

### Praise

[EXO 15:1–15:2](https://ref.ly/Exod15:1-Exod15:2) *Moses*; ; [EXO 18:9–18:12](https://ref.ly/Exod18:9-Exod18:12) *Jethro*; ; [1CH 29:10–29:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:10-1Chr29:13) *David*; ; [DAN 2:19–2:23](https://ref.ly/Dan2:19-Dan2:23) *Daniel*; ; [LUK 1:57–1:68](https://ref.ly/Luke1:57-Luke1:68) *Zechariah*

Biblical examples to be avoided
-------------------------------

[LEV 20:23](https://ref.ly/Lev20:23); ; [PRO 22:24–22:25](https://ref.ly/Prov22:24-Prov22:25); ; [EZK 20:18](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:18); ; [HEB 4:11](https://ref.ly/Heb4:11); ; [2PE 3:17](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:17)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Corinthians 10:6; 1 Corinthians 10:11; James 5:10-11; John 13:15; 1 Corinthians 11:1; Matthew 11:29; Matthew 16:24; Philippians 2:5-11; 1 Timothy 1:16; Hebrews 3:1-2; Hebrews 12:2; 1 Peter 2:21; Philippians 3:17; 2 Thessalonians 3:7; 1 Peter 5:3; Titus 2:7; 1 Timothy 4:12; Galatians 3:15; James 3:4; Matthew 15:22; John 4:4-29; John 20:24-29; Romans 4:18-21; Hebrews 11:4-38; Genesis 33:1-11; Genesis 45:5-15; 1 Samuel 24:8-22; Luke 23:34; Acts 7:59; Ruth 2:15-19; Job 29:11-16; Mark 12:41-44; Acts 10:2; Exodus 15:1-2; Exodus 18:9-12; 1 Chronicles 29:10-13; Daniel 2:19-23; Luke 1:57-68; Leviticus 20:23; Proverbs 22:24-25; Ezekiel 20:18; Hebrews 4:11; 2 Peter 3:17

## 8429: fasting (id: 8429)

Abstaining from food, and possibly drink, for a limited period of time as a mark of religious commitment and devotion or as an expression of repentance for sins.

* **Associated Articles:** 8430: fasting, nature of (ID: `8430@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8431: fasting, reasons for (ID: `8431@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8432: fasting, practice of (ID: `8432@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8430: fasting, nature of (id: 8430)

Scripture frequently refers to individuals fasting and describes the different kinds of fast which may be undertaken.

Kinds of fasting
----------------

### Abstaining from food and drink

**[EZR 10:6](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:6)** *See also* [DAN 9:3](https://ref.ly/Dan9:3); [ACT 23:12](https://ref.ly/Acts23:12)

### Abstaining from food only

**[1SA 1:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:7)** *See also* [DAN 6:18](https://ref.ly/Dan6:18)

The duration of fasting
-----------------------

### One day: the normal fast period

[LEV 23:32](https://ref.ly/Lev23:32); ; [JDG 20:26](https://ref.ly/Judg20:26); ; [2SA 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Sam1:12)

### Three days

[EST 4:16](https://ref.ly/Esth4:16); ; [ACT 9:9](https://ref.ly/Acts9:9)

### Seven days

[1SA 31:13](https://ref.ly/1Sam31:13) parallel [1CH 10:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr10:12); ; [2SA 12:16–12:20](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:16-2Sam12:20)

### Forty days

These 40\-day fasts are all in unique circumstances and are not prescribed: [EXO 34:28](https://ref.ly/Exod34:28); ; [1KI 19:8](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:8); ; [MAT 4:2](https://ref.ly/Matt4:2) parallel [LUK 4:2](https://ref.ly/Luke4:2)

Regular observances of fasting
------------------------------

### Those prescribed by the Law

**[LEV 16:29–16:31](https://ref.ly/Lev16:29-Lev16:31)** *NIV footnote at verse 29\.* *See also* [LEV 23:26–23:32](https://ref.ly/Lev23:26-Lev23:32); [NUM 29:7](https://ref.ly/Num29:7); [ACT 27:9](https://ref.ly/Acts27:9)

### Those observed in Jewish tradition

**[ZEC 8:19](https://ref.ly/Zech8:19)** *See also* [EST 9:30–9:31](https://ref.ly/Esth9:30-Esth9:31); [ZEC 7:2–7:5](https://ref.ly/Zech7:2-Zech7:5)

### Those observed by the Pharisees

[LUK 18:11–18:12](https://ref.ly/Luke18:11-Luke18:12)

Involuntary fasts
-----------------

### Those imposed by decree

**[2CH 20:3](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:3)** *See also* [1SA 14:241](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:241)KI [13:8–13:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam13:8-1Sam13:9), [1KI 13:16](https://ref.ly/1Kgs13:16)[1KI 21:9](https://ref.ly/1Kgs21:9); [JER 36:9](https://ref.ly/Jer36:9)

### Those imposed by circumstances

[ACT 27:33](https://ref.ly/Acts27:33); ; [2CO 6:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:5), [2CO 11:27](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:27)

Voluntary fasts
---------------

**[NEH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Neh1:4)** *See also* [LUK 2:37](https://ref.ly/Luke2:37)

* **Associated Passages:** Ezra 10:6; Daniel 9:3; Acts 23:12; 1 Samuel 1:7; Daniel 6:18; Leviticus 23:32; Judges 20:26; 2 Samuel 1:12; Esther 4:16; Acts 9:9; 1 Samuel 31:13; 1 Chronicles 10:12; 2 Samuel 12:16-20; Exodus 34:28; 1 Kings 19:8; Matthew 4:2; Luke 4:2; Leviticus 16:29-31; Leviticus 23:26-32; Numbers 29:7; Acts 27:9; Zechariah 8:19; Esther 9:30-31; Zechariah 7:2-5; Luke 18:11-12; 2 Chronicles 20:3; 1 Samuel 14:241; 1 Samuel 13:8-9; 1 Kings 13:16; 1 Kings 21:9; Jeremiah 36:9; Acts 27:33; 2 Corinthians 6:5; 2 Corinthians 11:27; Nehemiah 1:4; Luke 2:37
* **Associated Articles:** 2575: Jesus Christ, temptation of (ID: `2575@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4293: water (ID: `4293@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4438: eating (ID: `4438@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5104: Moses, foreshadower of Jesus Christ (ID: `5104@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5773: abstinence, as a discipline (ID: `5773@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7550: Pharisees (ID: `7550@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8475: self-denial (ID: `8475@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8431: fasting, reasons for (id: 8431)

Scripture identifies a number of situations in which fasting is appropriate.

Situations in which fasting is appropriate
------------------------------------------

### Bereavement

**[1CH 10:11–10:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr10:11-1Chr10:12)** parallel [1SA 31:11–31:13](https://ref.ly/1Sam31:11-1Sam31:13) *See also* [2SA 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/2Sam1:11-2Sam1:12), [2SA 3:31–3:35](https://ref.ly/2Sam3:31-2Sam3:35)

### Distress

**[EST 4:3](https://ref.ly/Esth4:3)** *See also* [1SA 1:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:7), [1SA 20:34](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:34); [1KI 21:4–21:6](https://ref.ly/1Kgs21:4-1Kgs21:6); [PSA 109:24](https://ref.ly/Ps109:24); [DAN 6:18](https://ref.ly/Dan6:18); [ACT 27:33](https://ref.ly/Acts27:33)

### Penitence

**[1SA 7:5–7:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:5-1Sam7:6)** *See also* [NEH 9:1–9:3](https://ref.ly/Neh9:1-Neh9:3); [DAN 9:3–9:6](https://ref.ly/Dan9:3-Dan9:6) *Daniel identifies himself with the sin of the people*; [DAN 9:20](https://ref.ly/Dan9:20); [JOL 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Joel1:13-Joel1:14), [JOL 2:12–2:15](https://ref.ly/Joel2:12-Joel2:15); [JON 3:5–3:9](https://ref.ly/Jonah3:5-Jonah3:9)

### Seeking God's intervention

**[2SA 12:15–12:17](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:15-2Sam12:17)** *See also* [2CH 20:2–20:4](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:2-2Chr20:4); [EZR 8:21](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:21); [EST 4:15–4:16](https://ref.ly/Esth4:15-Esth4:16); [PSA 35:13–35:14](https://ref.ly/Ps35:13-Ps35:14)

### Seeking guidance

**[JDG 20:26–20:28](https://ref.ly/Judg20:26-Judg20:28)** *See also* [DEU 9:9](https://ref.ly/Deut9:9) *Moses fasts before the revelation of the Law*; [DAN 9:1–9:3](https://ref.ly/Dan9:1-Dan9:3), [DAN 9:20–9:23](https://ref.ly/Dan9:20-Dan9:23), [DAN 10:1–10:2](https://ref.ly/Dan10:1-Dan10:2), [DAN 10:12](https://ref.ly/Dan10:12); [ACT 13:1–13:3](https://ref.ly/Acts13:1-Acts13:3) *The church receives direction through the Holy Spirit while fasting.*

### Indicating earnestness

[ACT 23:12–23:13](https://ref.ly/Acts23:12-Acts23:13)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Chronicles 10:11-12; 1 Samuel 31:11-13; 2 Samuel 1:11-12; 2 Samuel 3:31-35; Esther 4:3; 1 Samuel 1:7; 1 Samuel 20:34; 1 Kings 21:4-6; Psalms 109:24; Daniel 6:18; Acts 27:33; 1 Samuel 7:5-6; Nehemiah 9:1-3; Daniel 9:3-6; Daniel 9:20; Joel 1:13-14; Joel 2:12-15; Jonah 3:5-9; 2 Samuel 12:15-17; 2 Chronicles 20:2-4; Ezra 8:21; Esther 4:15-16; Psalms 35:13-14; Judges 20:26-28; Deuteronomy 9:9; Daniel 9:1-3; Daniel 9:20-23; Daniel 10:1-2; Daniel 10:12; Acts 13:1-3; Acts 23:12-13
* **Associated Articles:** 5795: bereavement (ID: `5795@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6624: confession, of sin (ID: `6624@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8124: guidance (ID: `8124@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8160: seeking God (ID: `8160@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8276: humility (ID: `8276@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8432: fasting, practice of (id: 8432)

Although fasting is a negative practice, it is not an end in itself but is to be undertaken for a positive purpose.

Fasting is not an end in itself
-------------------------------

### Fasting as empty ritual is condemned

**[JER 14:11–14:12](https://ref.ly/Jer14:11-Jer14:12)** *See also* [ISA 58:1–58:7](https://ref.ly/Isa58:1-Isa58:7); [ZEC 7:4–7:7](https://ref.ly/Zech7:4-Zech7:7)

### Fasting as mere show is condemned

**[MAT 6:16–6:18](https://ref.ly/Matt6:16-Matt6:18)** *See also* [MAT 9:14–9:15](https://ref.ly/Matt9:14-Matt9:15) parallels [MRK 2:18–2:20](https://ref.ly/Mark2:18-Mark2:20), [LUK 5:33–5:35](https://ref.ly/Luke5:33-Luke5:35) *Jesus Christ repudiated fasting for its own sake whilst granting that there is a time and a place for it.*

### Fasting imposed for false motives

[1SA 14:24–14:30](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:24-1Sam14:30)

Attitudes appropriate to fasting
--------------------------------

### Humility

**[PSA 35:13](https://ref.ly/Ps35:13)** *See also* [1KI 21:27–21:29](https://ref.ly/1Kgs21:27-1Kgs21:29); [EZR 8:21](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:21); [PSA 69:10](https://ref.ly/Ps69:10)

### Repentance

**[1SA 7:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:6)** *See also* [NEH 9:1–9:3](https://ref.ly/Neh9:1-Neh9:3); [JOL 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Joel1:13-Joel1:14), [JOL 2:12–2:15](https://ref.ly/Joel2:12-Joel2:15)

Fasting and prayer
------------------

**[NEH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Neh1:4)** *See also* [EZR 8:21–8:23](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:21-Ezra8:23); [PSA 35:13](https://ref.ly/Ps35:13); [DAN 9:3](https://ref.ly/Dan9:3); [MAT 17:20](https://ref.ly/Matt17:20) parallel [MRK 9:29](https://ref.ly/Mark9:29); [LUK 2:37](https://ref.ly/Luke2:37), [LUK 5:33](https://ref.ly/Luke5:33); [ACT 13:3](https://ref.ly/Acts13:3), [ACT 14:23](https://ref.ly/Acts14:23); [1CO 7:3–7:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:3-1Cor7:5) *The motivation here is similar to that in abstaining from food.*

Fasting and worship
-------------------

**[ACT 13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2)** *See also* [LUK 2:37](https://ref.ly/Luke2:37)

* **Associated Passages:** Jeremiah 14:11-12; Isaiah 58:1-7; Zechariah 7:4-7; Matthew 6:16-18; Matthew 9:14-15; Mark 2:18-20; Luke 5:33-35; 1 Samuel 14:24-30; Psalms 35:13; 1 Kings 21:27-29; Ezra 8:21; Psalms 69:10; 1 Samuel 7:6; Nehemiah 9:1-3; Joel 1:13-14; Joel 2:12-15; Nehemiah 1:4; Ezra 8:21-23; Daniel 9:3; Matthew 17:20; Mark 9:29; Luke 2:37; Luke 5:33; Acts 13:3; Acts 14:23; 1 Corinthians 7:3-5; Acts 13:2
* **Associated Articles:** 6732: repentance (ID: `6732@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8620: prayer, practicalities of (ID: `8620@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8622: worship (ID: `8622@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8434: giving (id: 8434)

Dedicating or offering something or oneself to others or to God. Scripture stresses the importance of giving. The generosity and love of God in giving his only Son to die for his people is understood to lead to an obligation, on their part, to love God and others in return.

* **Associated Articles:** 8435: giving, of oneself (ID: `8435@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8436: giving, of possessions (ID: `8436@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8437: giving, of talents (ID: `8437@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8438: giving, of time (ID: `8438@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8435: giving, of oneself (id: 8435)

The submission of the self to the will of God, in thanksgiving and service.

Jesus Christ's self\-giving as an example to believers
------------------------------------------------------

**[1JN 3:16](https://ref.ly/1John3:16)** *See also* [MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24) parallels [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34), [LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23); [MRK 10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:45); [JHN 15:13](https://ref.ly/John15:13); [ROM 15:3](https://ref.ly/Rom15:3); [GAL 1:4](https://ref.ly/Gal1:4); [EPH 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1-Eph5:2), [EPH 5:25](https://ref.ly/Eph5:25); [PHP 2:5–2:8](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5-Phil2:8); [TIT 2:14](https://ref.ly/Titus2:14)

Why self\-giving is reasonable service to God
---------------------------------------------

### God's people belong to him by creation

**[DEU 32:6](https://ref.ly/Deut32:6)** *See also* [PSA 100:3](https://ref.ly/Ps100:3); [REV 4:11](https://ref.ly/Rev4:11)

### God's people belong to him by redemption

**[1CO 6:19–6:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:19-1Cor6:20)** *See also* [REV 5:9](https://ref.ly/Rev5:9)

### All good things are given by God

**[1CH 29:14](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:14)** *See also* [DEU 8:18](https://ref.ly/Deut8:18); [ACT 17:25](https://ref.ly/Acts17:25); [1CO 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:7); [1TI 6:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17)

God's people giving themselves
------------------------------

### To God

**[ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)** *See also* [2CO 8:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:5)

### To one another

**[2CO 8:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:5)** *See also* [1CO 16:15](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:15)

### To holy living

**[ROM 6:19](https://ref.ly/Rom6:19)** *See also* [PRO 23:26](https://ref.ly/Prov23:26); [ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)

### To the service of God

**[1CO 15:58](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:58)** *See also* [JDG 5:2](https://ref.ly/Judg5:2); [1CH 29:5](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:5); [2CH 17:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr17:16); [PSA 40:7–40:8](https://ref.ly/Ps40:7-Ps40:8); [ISA 6:8](https://ref.ly/Isa6:8); [ACT 6:4](https://ref.ly/Acts6:4); [ROM 1:9](https://ref.ly/Rom1:9); [1TI 4:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:15)

### To a life of self\-denial

**[LUK 14:33](https://ref.ly/Luke14:33)** *See also* [MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24) parallels [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34), [LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23); [LUK 14:26](https://ref.ly/Luke14:26); [ROM 15:2](https://ref.ly/Rom15:2); [1CO 8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:13), [1CO 10:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:33); [2CO 12:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:15); [PHP 3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8)

### To martyrdom

**[DAN 3:28](https://ref.ly/Dan3:28)** *See also* [ACT 20:24](https://ref.ly/Acts20:24), [ACT 21:13](https://ref.ly/Acts21:13); [REV 12:11](https://ref.ly/Rev12:11)

-----------------------

## 8436: giving, of possessions (id: 8436)

Making one's possession available for God's service in the way in which he directs, as a practical recognition that all possessions come from him.

Ministries that require the giving of material possessions
----------------------------------------------------------

### The relief of the poor

**[PRO 28:27](https://ref.ly/Prov28:27)** *See also* [LEV 25:25](https://ref.ly/Lev25:25); [DEU 15:7–15:8](https://ref.ly/Deut15:7-Deut15:8); [ISA 58:7](https://ref.ly/Isa58:7); [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21) parallels [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21), [LUK 18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22); [LUK 12:33](https://ref.ly/Luke12:33); [ROM 12:13](https://ref.ly/Rom12:13); [GAL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Gal2:10)

### The support of God's servants

**[1TI 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17-1Tim5:18)** *See also* [NUM 3:48](https://ref.ly/Num3:48), [NUM 5:9](https://ref.ly/Num5:9); [2KI 4:8–4:10](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:8-2Kgs4:10); [MAT 10:10](https://ref.ly/Matt10:10); [GAL 6:6](https://ref.ly/Gal6:6); [PHP 4:15–4:18](https://ref.ly/Phil4:15-Phil4:18)

### The care of widows and orphans

**[JAS 1:27](https://ref.ly/Jas1:27)** *See also* [DEU 26:12](https://ref.ly/Deut26:12); [RUT 2:5–2:12](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:5-Ruth2:12); [1TI 5:3–5:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:3-1Tim5:4)

Motives for the giving of material possessions
----------------------------------------------

### Obedience to God

**[2CO 9:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:7)** *See also* [EXO 30:11–30:16](https://ref.ly/Exod30:11-Exod30:16); [LEV 12:6–12:8](https://ref.ly/Lev12:6-Lev12:8); [DEU 14:28](https://ref.ly/Deut14:28); [MAL 3:8–3:10](https://ref.ly/Mal3:8-Mal3:10); [MAT 22:21](https://ref.ly/Matt22:21) parallels [MRK 12:17](https://ref.ly/Mark12:17), [LUK 20:25](https://ref.ly/Luke20:25); [ROM 13:6–13:7](https://ref.ly/Rom13:6-Rom13:7)

### Gratitude for God's generosity

**[1CH 29:14](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:14)** *See also* [GEN 28:20–28:22](https://ref.ly/Gen28:20-Gen28:22); [DEU 26:9–26:10](https://ref.ly/Deut26:9-Deut26:10); [1SA 1:27–1:28](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:27-1Sam1:28)

### Love for others

**[1JN 3:17](https://ref.ly/1John3:17)** *See also* [2CH 28:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr28:15); [MAT 7:9–7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:9-Matt7:11); [LUK 10:33–10:35](https://ref.ly/Luke10:33-Luke10:35)

The manner of giving material possessions
-----------------------------------------

### Willingly and cheerfully

**[MAT 10:8](https://ref.ly/Matt10:8)** *See also* [EXO 25:2](https://ref.ly/Exod25:2), [EXO 35:5](https://ref.ly/Exod35:5), [EXO 35:22](https://ref.ly/Exod35:22); [2KI 12:4](https://ref.ly/2Kgs12:4); [1CH 29:6](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:6), [1CH 29:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:9), [1CH 29:17](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:17); [2CH 24:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr24:10), [2CH 35:7–35:9](https://ref.ly/2Chr35:7-2Chr35:9); [EZR 8:28](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:28); [2CO 8:11–8:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:11-2Cor8:12)

### Unostentatiously

[MAT 6:1–6:4](https://ref.ly/Matt6:1-Matt6:4)

### Regularly

[1CO 16:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:2)

### Generously

[EXO 36:5](https://ref.ly/Exod36:5); ; [NUM 7:13](https://ref.ly/Num7:13); ; [1CH 29:3–29:4](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:3-1Chr29:4); ; [LUK 6:38](https://ref.ly/Luke6:38); ; [2CO 8:2–8:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:2-2Cor8:3); ; [1TI 6:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:18)

God measures his people's giving
--------------------------------

### With a reckoning different from the world's

[2CH 6:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:8); ; [MRK 12:41–12:44](https://ref.ly/Mark12:41-Mark12:44) parallel [LUK 21:1–21:4](https://ref.ly/Luke21:1-Luke21:4)

### With regard for people's capacity to give

[LEV 14:30](https://ref.ly/Lev14:30), [LEV 27:8](https://ref.ly/Lev27:8); ; [DEU 16:17](https://ref.ly/Deut16:17); ; [EZR 2:69](https://ref.ly/Ezra2:69); ; [ACT 11:29](https://ref.ly/Acts11:29); ; [2CO 8:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:12)

God rewards the giver appropriately
-----------------------------------

**[PHP 4:18–4:19](https://ref.ly/Phil4:18-Phil4:19)** *See also* [2CH 31:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:10); [PRO 11:25](https://ref.ly/Prov11:25), [PRO 22:9](https://ref.ly/Prov22:9), [PRO 28:27](https://ref.ly/Prov28:27); [ECC 11:1](https://ref.ly/Eccl11:1) *encouragement to be enterprising in giving*; [ISA 58:10](https://ref.ly/Isa58:10); [MAT 10:42](https://ref.ly/Matt10:42), [MAT 25:34–25:36](https://ref.ly/Matt25:34-Matt25:36); [LUK 16:9](https://ref.ly/Luke16:9); [ACT 20:35](https://ref.ly/Acts20:35); [2CO 9:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:6)

### God's reward overwhelming the giver

**[PRO 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Prov3:9-Prov3:10)** *See also* [MAL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Mal3:10); [LUK 6:38](https://ref.ly/Luke6:38)

God's giving: the model for his people's giving
-----------------------------------------------

**[MAT 10:8](https://ref.ly/Matt10:8)** *See also* [2CO 8:8–8:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:8-2Cor8:9), [2CO 9:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:15)

## 8437: giving, of talents (id: 8437)

All human abilities and skills derive from God and are to be dedicated to his glory and the good of others.

Talents are given and sustained by God
--------------------------------------

**[1CO 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:7)** [EXO 28:3](https://ref.ly/Exod28:3), [EXO 31:3–31:6](https://ref.ly/Exod31:3-Exod31:6), [EXO 35:31–35:35](https://ref.ly/Exod35:31-Exod35:35), [EXO 36:1–36:2](https://ref.ly/Exod36:1-Exod36:2); [DEU 8:18](https://ref.ly/Deut8:18); ; [2SA 22:34–22:35](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:34-2Sam22:35); ; [PSA 18:33–18:34](https://ref.ly/Ps18:33-Ps18:34); ; [MAT 25:15](https://ref.ly/Matt25:15) parallel [LUK 19:13](https://ref.ly/Luke19:13); ; [ACT 7:10](https://ref.ly/Acts7:10); ; [ROM 12:6](https://ref.ly/Rom12:6); ; [1CO 12:7–12:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:7-1Cor12:8); ; [2CO 3:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:5); ; [EPH 3:7](https://ref.ly/Eph3:7), [EPH 4:7](https://ref.ly/Eph4:7)

Talents differ
--------------

**[MAT 25:15](https://ref.ly/Matt25:15)** *See also* [2CH 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr2:13-2Chr2:14); [ROM 12:6](https://ref.ly/Rom12:6); [1CO 7:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:7), [1CO 12:4–12:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:4-1Cor12:6); [EPH 4:11](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11)

Talents need to be developed
----------------------------

**[2TI 1:6](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:6)** *See also* [MAT 25:16–25:30](https://ref.ly/Matt25:16-Matt25:30) parallel [LUK 19:12–19:26](https://ref.ly/Luke19:12-Luke19:26); [1TI 4:14](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:14)

Talents are to be devoted to God
--------------------------------

### For his own glory

**[1PE 4:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:11)** *See also* [EXO 35:10](https://ref.ly/Exod35:10), [EXO 35:25](https://ref.ly/Exod35:25); [1KI 7:40](https://ref.ly/1Kgs7:40); [1CH 9:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr9:13); [PSA 33:2–33:3](https://ref.ly/Ps33:2-Ps33:3), [PSA 137:4–137:5](https://ref.ly/Ps137:4-Ps137:5); [1CO 10:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:31)

### For the good of others

**[1PE 4:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:10)** *See also* [1CO 12:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:7), [1CO 14:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:12); [EPH 4:12](https://ref.ly/Eph4:12)

Talents are to be accounted for
-------------------------------

**[MAT 25:19](https://ref.ly/Matt25:19)** parallel [LUK 19:15](https://ref.ly/Luke19:15) *See also* [MAT 21:34](https://ref.ly/Matt21:34) parallels [MRK 12:2](https://ref.ly/Mark12:2), [LUK 20:10](https://ref.ly/Luke20:10); [LUK 12:48](https://ref.ly/Luke12:48)

Rewards according to use or misuse of talents
---------------------------------------------

**[MAT 25:21](https://ref.ly/Matt25:21)** *See also* [MAT 25:23–25:30](https://ref.ly/Matt25:23-Matt25:30) parallel [LUK 19:17–19:26](https://ref.ly/Luke19:17-Luke19:26)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Corinthians 4:7; Exodus 28:3; Exodus 31:3-6; Exodus 35:31-35; Exodus 36:1-2; Deuteronomy 8:18; 2 Samuel 22:34-35; Psalms 18:33-34; Matthew 25:15; Luke 19:13; Acts 7:10; Romans 12:6; 1 Corinthians 12:7-8; 2 Corinthians 3:5; Ephesians 3:7; Ephesians 4:7; 2 Chronicles 2:13-14; 1 Corinthians 7:7; 1 Corinthians 12:4-6; Ephesians 4:11; 2 Timothy 1:6; Matthew 25:16-30; Luke 19:12-26; 1 Timothy 4:14; 1 Peter 4:11; Exodus 35:10; Exodus 35:25; 1 Kings 7:40; 1 Chronicles 9:13; Psalms 33:2-3; Psalms 137:4-5; 1 Corinthians 10:31; 1 Peter 4:10; 1 Corinthians 12:7; 1 Corinthians 14:12; Ephesians 4:12; Matthew 25:19; Luke 19:15; Matthew 21:34; Mark 12:2; Luke 20:10; Luke 12:48; Matthew 25:21; Matthew 25:23-30; Luke 19:17-26
* **Associated Articles:** 3281: Holy Spirit, inspiration of (ID: `3281@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5051: responsibility (ID: `5051@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5272: craftsmen (ID: `5272@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5840: eagerness (ID: `5840@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5889: ingratitude (ID: `5889@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7966: spiritual gifts (ID: `7966@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8248: faithfulness (ID: `8248@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8256: fruitfulness (ID: `8256@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8342: servanthood (ID: `8342@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8742: faithlessness (ID: `8742@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8783: neglect (ID: `8783@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8438: giving, of time (id: 8438)

People are stewards of a deposit of time given by God, and will be held responsible for the way in which they use it.

Time is governed by God
-----------------------

### God determines every lifespan

**[JOB 14:5](https://ref.ly/Job14:5)** *See also* [PSA 31:15](https://ref.ly/Ps31:15), [PSA 74:16–74:17](https://ref.ly/Ps74:16-Ps74:17), [PSA 139:16](https://ref.ly/Ps139:16); [ACT 17:26](https://ref.ly/Acts17:26)

### God will demand an account of how time has been spent

**[ECC 3:17](https://ref.ly/Eccl3:17)** *See also* [MAT 12:36](https://ref.ly/Matt12:36); [1PE 4:3–4:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:3-1Pet4:5)

Time may be squandered
----------------------

### In ungodly living

**[1PE 4:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:3)** *See also* [JOL 2:25](https://ref.ly/Joel2:25); [EPH 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Eph2:2-Eph2:3); [COL 3:5–3:7](https://ref.ly/Col3:5-Col3:7)

### By neglecting God\-given opportunities

**[JER 8:20](https://ref.ly/Jer8:20)** *See also* [PRO 20:4](https://ref.ly/Prov20:4); [MAT 25:11–25:12](https://ref.ly/Matt25:11-Matt25:12); [LUK 13:25](https://ref.ly/Luke13:25), [LUK 19:44](https://ref.ly/Luke19:44); [ACT 24:25](https://ref.ly/Acts24:25); [REV 2:21](https://ref.ly/Rev2:21)

Time may be saved
-----------------

### By understanding its brevity

**[PSA 90:12](https://ref.ly/Ps90:12)** *See also* [JHN 12:35](https://ref.ly/John12:35); [1CO 7:29–7:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:29-1Cor7:31)

### By remembering its uncertainty

**[JHN 9:4](https://ref.ly/John9:4)** *See also* [ECC 8:5–8:7](https://ref.ly/Eccl8:5-Eccl8:7); [JAS 4:13–4:15](https://ref.ly/Jas4:13-Jas4:15)

### By making the most of present opportunities

**[EPH 5:16](https://ref.ly/Eph5:16)** *See also* [PSA 32:6](https://ref.ly/Ps32:6); [ECC 12:1](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:1); [EST 4:14](https://ref.ly/Esth4:14); [MAT 4:17](https://ref.ly/Matt4:17); [MRK 1:15](https://ref.ly/Mark1:15); [2CO 6:1–6:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:1-2Cor6:2); [GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10); [COL 4:5](https://ref.ly/Col4:5); [HEB 3:7–3:13](https://ref.ly/Heb3:7-Heb3:13)

### By allocating it wisely

**[1CH 12:32](https://ref.ly/1Chr12:32)** *See also* [EXO 18:13–18:26](https://ref.ly/Exod18:13-Exod18:26); [ACT 6:1–6:4](https://ref.ly/Acts6:1-Acts6:4)

Time is to be spent wisely
--------------------------

### In worship and meditation

**[PSA 119:164](https://ref.ly/Ps119:164)** *See also* [PSA 4:4](https://ref.ly/Ps4:4), [PSA 55:17](https://ref.ly/Ps55:17); [LAM 3:40](https://ref.ly/Lam3:40); [DAN 6:10](https://ref.ly/Dan6:10), [DAN 6:13](https://ref.ly/Dan6:13); [MRK 1:35](https://ref.ly/Mark1:35); [1CO 11:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:28)

### In work

**[PSA 104:23](https://ref.ly/Ps104:23)** *See also* [EXO 20:9](https://ref.ly/Exod20:9) parallel [DEU 5:13](https://ref.ly/Deut5:13); [ROM 13:6](https://ref.ly/Rom13:6)

### In rest

**[EXO 20:8–20:10](https://ref.ly/Exod20:8-Exod20:10)** *See also* [LEV 16:29](https://ref.ly/Lev16:29); [MRK 6:31](https://ref.ly/Mark6:31)

### With one's family

**[DEU 24:5](https://ref.ly/Deut24:5)** *See also* [DEU 6:7](https://ref.ly/Deut6:7); [ECC 9:9](https://ref.ly/Eccl9:9); [1TI 3:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:4)

### In fellowship

**[1CO 16:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:7)** *See also* [ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42), [ACT 20:7](https://ref.ly/Acts20:7); [HEB 10:25](https://ref.ly/Heb10:25)

Time is to be allocated according to priorities
-----------------------------------------------

**[LUK 10:41–10:42](https://ref.ly/Luke10:41-Luke10:42)** *See also* [PSA 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/Ps1:1-Ps1:3); [HAG 1:2–1:4](https://ref.ly/Hag1:2-Hag1:4); [MAT 6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:33); [ACT 13:46–13:47](https://ref.ly/Acts13:46-Acts13:47), [ACT 17:16–17:17](https://ref.ly/Acts17:16-Acts17:17)

* **Associated Passages:** Job 14:5; Psalms 31:15; Psalms 74:16-17; Psalms 139:16; Acts 17:26; Ecclesiastes 3:17; Matthew 12:36; 1 Peter 4:3-5; 1 Peter 4:3; Joel 2:25; Ephesians 2:2-3; Colossians 3:5-7; Jeremiah 8:20; Proverbs 20:4; Matthew 25:11-12; Luke 13:25; Luke 19:44; Acts 24:25; Revelation 2:21; Psalms 90:12; John 12:35; 1 Corinthians 7:29-31; John 9:4; Ecclesiastes 8:5-7; James 4:13-15; Ephesians 5:16; Psalms 32:6; Ecclesiastes 12:1; Esther 4:14; Matthew 4:17; Mark 1:15; 2 Corinthians 6:1-2; Galatians 6:10; Colossians 4:5; Hebrews 3:7-13; 1 Chronicles 12:32; Exodus 18:13-26; Acts 6:1-4; Psalms 119:164; Psalms 4:4; Psalms 55:17; Lamentations 3:40; Daniel 6:10; Daniel 6:13; Mark 1:35; 1 Corinthians 11:28; Psalms 104:23; Exodus 20:9; Deuteronomy 5:13; Romans 13:6; Exodus 20:8-10; Leviticus 16:29; Mark 6:31; Deuteronomy 24:5; Deuteronomy 6:7; Ecclesiastes 9:9; 1 Timothy 3:4; 1 Corinthians 16:7; Acts 2:42; Acts 20:7; Hebrews 10:25; Luke 10:41-42; Psalms 1:1-3; Haggai 1:2-4; Matthew 6:33; Acts 13:46-47; Acts 17:16-17
* **Associated Articles:** 1310: God, as judge (ID: `1310@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4903: time (ID: `4903@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5047: opportunities, in life (ID: `5047@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5057: rest, physical (ID: `5057@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5385: leisure (ID: `5385@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5628: work (ID: `5628@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5680: family (ID: `5680@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7925: fellowship, among believers (ID: `7925@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8361: wisdom (ID: `8361@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8461: priorities (ID: `8461@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8622: worship (ID: `8622@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8755: folly (ID: `8755@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8440: glorifying God (id: 8440)

The giving of glory to God through acts of praise and obedience. Believers are to glorify God in their lives, as Jesus Christ glorified him in his life.

Believers are to glorify God
----------------------------

**[PSA 96:1–96:9](https://ref.ly/Ps96:1-Ps96:9)** parallel [1CH 16:23–16:29](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:23-1Chr16:29)**[ISA 42:12](https://ref.ly/Isa42:12)** *See also* [ISA 43:5–43:7](https://ref.ly/Isa43:5-Isa43:7), [ISA 66:18–66:19](https://ref.ly/Isa66:18-Isa66:19); [HAB 2:14](https://ref.ly/Hab2:14)

### God is entitled to be glorified

**[PSA 96:4–96:9](https://ref.ly/Ps96:4-Ps96:9)** parallel [1CH 16:25–16:29](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:25-1Chr16:29) *See also* [PSA 29:1–29:2](https://ref.ly/Ps29:1-Ps29:2), [PSA 115:1](https://ref.ly/Ps115:1); [ISA 24:14–24:15](https://ref.ly/Isa24:14-Isa24:15)

### Glorifying God is the believer's natural response to him

**[PSA 118:28](https://ref.ly/Ps118:28)** *See also* [PSA 34:3](https://ref.ly/Ps34:3), [PSA 69:30](https://ref.ly/Ps69:30), [PSA 86:12](https://ref.ly/Ps86:12)

God is glorified in Jesus Christ
--------------------------------

**[JHN 13:31](https://ref.ly/John13:31)** *See also* [JHN 14:13](https://ref.ly/John14:13), [JHN 17:4](https://ref.ly/John17:4)

Reasons for glorifying God
--------------------------

### His holiness

**[PSA 99:9](https://ref.ly/Ps99:9)** *See also* [REV 15:4](https://ref.ly/Rev15:4)

### His great deeds

**[PSA 86:8–86:10](https://ref.ly/Ps86:8-Ps86:10)** *See also* [ISA 25:1](https://ref.ly/Isa25:1); [2CO 4:13–4:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:13-2Cor4:15)

### His loving mercy

**[PSA 63:3](https://ref.ly/Ps63:3)** *See also* [PSA 115:1](https://ref.ly/Ps115:1); [ROM 15:8–15:9](https://ref.ly/Rom15:8-Rom15:9)

### His righteous judgments

**[REV 14:7](https://ref.ly/Rev14:7)** *See also* [EZK 28:22–28:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:22-Ezek28:23); [ROM 11:33–11:36](https://ref.ly/Rom11:33-Rom11:36); [REV 11:13](https://ref.ly/Rev11:13)

Means of glorifying God
-----------------------

### By praising God

**[REV 4:11](https://ref.ly/Rev4:11), [REV 7:12](https://ref.ly/Rev7:12)** *See also* [LUK 2:13](https://ref.ly/Luke2:13); [ROM 11:33–11:36](https://ref.ly/Rom11:33-Rom11:36), [ROM 16:27](https://ref.ly/Rom16:27); [HEB 13:20–13:21](https://ref.ly/Heb13:20-Heb13:21); [1PE 4:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:11); [2PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:18); [JUD 1:25](https://ref.ly/Jude1:25)

### By living for God

**[1CO 10:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:31)** *See also* [ROM 4:20](https://ref.ly/Rom4:20); [1CO 6:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:20); [2TH 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:11-2Thess1:12); [1PE 4:10–4:13](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:10-1Pet4:13)

### By doing good works and bearing fruit

**[JHN 15:8](https://ref.ly/John15:8)**; **[PHP 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9-Phil1:11)** *See also* [MAT 5:16](https://ref.ly/Matt5:16); [GAL 5:22–5:26](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:26); [HEB 13:20–13:21](https://ref.ly/Heb13:20-Heb13:21); [1PE 2:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:12)

Examples of glorifying God
--------------------------

[1CH 29:10–29:13](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:10-1Chr29:13) *David*; ; [DAN 4:34–4:37](https://ref.ly/Dan4:34-Dan4:37) *Nebuchadnezzar*; ; [LUK 1:46](https://ref.ly/Luke1:46) *Mary, the mother of Jesus Christ*; ; [LUK 2:13](https://ref.ly/Luke2:13) *the angels*; ; [LUK 2:20](https://ref.ly/Luke2:20) *the shepherds*; [JHN 13:31–13:32](https://ref.ly/John13:31-John13:32), [JHN 17:1–17:4](https://ref.ly/John17:1-John17:4); [REV 4:11](https://ref.ly/Rev4:11), [REV 7:12](https://ref.ly/Rev7:12)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 96:1-9; 1 Chronicles 16:23-29; Isaiah 42:12; Isaiah 43:5-7; Isaiah 66:18-19; Habakkuk 2:14; Psalms 96:4-9; 1 Chronicles 16:25-29; Psalms 29:1-2; Psalms 115:1; Isaiah 24:14-15; Psalms 118:28; Psalms 34:3; Psalms 69:30; Psalms 86:12; John 13:31; John 14:13; John 17:4; Psalms 99:9; Revelation 15:4; Psalms 86:8-10; Isaiah 25:1; 2 Corinthians 4:13-15; Psalms 63:3; Romans 15:8-9; Revelation 14:7; Ezekiel 28:22-23; Romans 11:33-36; Revelation 11:13; Revelation 4:11; Revelation 7:12; Luke 2:13; Romans 16:27; Hebrews 13:20-21; 1 Peter 4:11; 2 Peter 3:18; Jude 1:25; 1 Corinthians 10:31; Romans 4:20; 1 Corinthians 6:20; 2 Thessalonians 1:11-12; 1 Peter 4:10-13; John 15:8; Philippians 1:9-11; Matthew 5:16; Galatians 5:22-26; 1 Peter 2:12; 1 Chronicles 29:10-13; Daniel 4:34-37; Luke 1:46; Luke 2:20; John 13:31-32; John 17:1-4

## 8441: goals (id: 8441)

Jesus Christ's basic aim was to do his Father's will. Believers have the same objective, which Jesus Christ and the Holy Spirit enable them to achieve.

God's goals
-----------

### To live with his people

**[LEV 26:11–26:12](https://ref.ly/Lev26:11-Lev26:12)** *See also* [PSA 23:6](https://ref.ly/Ps23:6); [ZEC 2:10](https://ref.ly/Zech2:10); [JHN 14:23](https://ref.ly/John14:23); [REV 21:3](https://ref.ly/Rev21:3)

### To build his church in Christ

**[MAT 16:18](https://ref.ly/Matt16:18)** *See also* [EPH 2:19–2:22](https://ref.ly/Eph2:19-Eph2:22); [REV 21:2](https://ref.ly/Rev21:2)

### To perfect his church in Christ

**[EPH 5:26–5:27](https://ref.ly/Eph5:26-Eph5:27)** *See also* [PSA 138:8](https://ref.ly/Ps138:8); [PHP 1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:6); [COL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Col2:10)

Jesus Christ's goals
--------------------

### To do his Father's will

**[JHN 6:38](https://ref.ly/John6:38)** *See also* [MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39) parallels [MRK 14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:36), [LUK 22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42); [JHN 4:34](https://ref.ly/John4:34), [JHN 5:30](https://ref.ly/John5:30); [HEB 10:7](https://ref.ly/Heb10:7), [HEB 10:9](https://ref.ly/Heb10:9)

### To preach the gospel

**[LUK 4:43](https://ref.ly/Luke4:43)** parallel [MRK 1:38](https://ref.ly/Mark1:38) *See also* [LUK 4:18–4:19](https://ref.ly/Luke4:18-Luke4:19); [ISA 61:1–61:2](https://ref.ly/Isa61:1-Isa61:2)

### To save the lost

**[LUK 19:10](https://ref.ly/Luke19:10)** *See also* [MAT 15:21–15:28](https://ref.ly/Matt15:21-Matt15:28) parallel [MRK 7:24–7:30](https://ref.ly/Mark7:24-Mark7:30); [LUK 15:7](https://ref.ly/Luke15:7) parallel [MAT 18:14](https://ref.ly/Matt18:14); [LUK 15:10](https://ref.ly/Luke15:10)

### Jesus Christ achieved his goals

**[JHN 17:4](https://ref.ly/John17:4)** *See also* [LUK 13:32](https://ref.ly/Luke13:32); [JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31), [JHN 19:28](https://ref.ly/John19:28), [JHN 19:30](https://ref.ly/John19:30)

Believers' goals
----------------

### To please God

**[2CO 5:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:9)** *See also* [ROM 14:18](https://ref.ly/Rom14:18); [EPH 5:10](https://ref.ly/Eph5:10), [EPH 5:17](https://ref.ly/Eph5:17); [COL 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:9-Col1:10)

### To know God

**[PHP 3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8)** *See also* [JHN 17:3](https://ref.ly/John17:3); [PHP 3:10](https://ref.ly/Phil3:10); [2PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:18)

### To be faithful to Jesus Christ

**[JHN 15:4](https://ref.ly/John15:4)** *See also* [MAT 10:22](https://ref.ly/Matt10:22) parallel [MRK 13:13](https://ref.ly/Mark13:13); [MAT 24:13](https://ref.ly/Matt24:13); [PHP 3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:14); [2TI 4:7](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:7); [HEB 12:2](https://ref.ly/Heb12:2); [REV 2:26](https://ref.ly/Rev2:26)

### To love one another

**[JHN 13:34](https://ref.ly/John13:34)** *See also* [MAT 22:34–22:40](https://ref.ly/Matt22:34-Matt22:40) parallels [MRK 12:28–12:31](https://ref.ly/Mark12:28-Mark12:31), [LUK 10:25–10:28](https://ref.ly/Luke10:25-Luke10:28); [JHN 15:12](https://ref.ly/John15:12); [1CO 13:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:13), [1CO 16:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:14); [1TI 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:5); [1JN 4:11–4:12](https://ref.ly/1John4:11-1John4:12)

### To live at peace

**[ROM 12:18](https://ref.ly/Rom12:18)** *See also* [MRK 9:50](https://ref.ly/Mark9:50); [2CO 13:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:11); [1TH 4:11](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:11)

### To spread the gospel

**[MAT 28:19–28:20](https://ref.ly/Matt28:19-Matt28:20)** *See also* [ACT 20:24](https://ref.ly/Acts20:24); [ROM 11:14](https://ref.ly/Rom11:14), [ROM 15:20](https://ref.ly/Rom15:20); [1CO 9:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:16); [2TI 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:2)

### To grow to maturity

**[EPH 4:13](https://ref.ly/Eph4:13)** *See also* [MAT 5:48](https://ref.ly/Matt5:48); [ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29); [2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18), [2CO 7:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:1), [2CO 13:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:11)

### Believers' final goal is heaven

**[REV 7:9–7:10](https://ref.ly/Rev7:9-Rev7:10)** *See also* [JHN 6:40](https://ref.ly/John6:40); [1CO 15:51–15:52](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:51-1Cor15:52); [2CO 5:4–5:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:4-2Cor5:5); [1TH 4:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:17); [1JN 3:2](https://ref.ly/1John3:2)

### God guarantees that believers will reach their goal

**[JHN 14:2–14:3](https://ref.ly/John14:2-John14:3)** *See also* [JHN 6:39](https://ref.ly/John6:39); [ROM 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:38-Rom8:39); [EPH 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Eph1:13-Eph1:14); [PHP 1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:6); [2TI 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:12), [2TI 2:11–2:13](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:11-2Tim2:13); [REV 3:5](https://ref.ly/Rev3:5), [REV 3:21](https://ref.ly/Rev3:21)

## 8442: good works (id: 8442)

Acts designed specifically to benefit others, which are characteristic of God. He requires and enables his people to do good, although such is contrary to their sinful human nature. Salvation does not depend on good works, but leads to them.

Good works are characteristic of God
------------------------------------

**[JER 32:36–32:40](https://ref.ly/Jer32:36-Jer32:40)** *See also* [PSA 119:17](https://ref.ly/Ps119:17), [PSA 119:65](https://ref.ly/Ps119:65), [PSA 125:1–125:4](https://ref.ly/Ps125:1-Ps125:4); [JER 32:41](https://ref.ly/Jer32:41); [MIC 2:7](https://ref.ly/Mic2:7); [ZEC 8:14–8:15](https://ref.ly/Zech8:14-Zech8:15); [ACT 10:37–10:38](https://ref.ly/Acts10:37-Acts10:38)

Good works are unnatural for sinful human beings
------------------------------------------------

**[JER 13:23](https://ref.ly/Jer13:23)** *See also* [PSA 5:9](https://ref.ly/Ps5:9), [PSA 10:7](https://ref.ly/Ps10:7), [PSA 14:1–14:3](https://ref.ly/Ps14:1-Ps14:3) parallel [PSA 53:1–53:3](https://ref.ly/Ps53:1-Ps53:3); [PSA 36:1–36:4](https://ref.ly/Ps36:1-Ps36:4), [PSA 140:3](https://ref.ly/Ps140:3); [ECC 7:20](https://ref.ly/Eccl7:20); [ISA 59:7–59:8](https://ref.ly/Isa59:7-Isa59:8); [JER 4:22](https://ref.ly/Jer4:22); [ROM 3:9–3:18](https://ref.ly/Rom3:9-Rom3:18), [ROM 7:13–7:23](https://ref.ly/Rom7:13-Rom7:23)

God's people are encouraged to do good works
--------------------------------------------

**[GAL 6:9–6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:9-Gal6:10)** *See also* [PSA 37:3](https://ref.ly/Ps37:3); [ECC 3:12](https://ref.ly/Eccl3:12); [MAT 5:38–5:48](https://ref.ly/Matt5:38-Matt5:48) parallel [LUK 6:27–6:36](https://ref.ly/Luke6:27-Luke6:36); [1PE 3:8–3:13](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:8-1Pet3:13); [PSA 34:12–34:16](https://ref.ly/Ps34:12-Ps34:16); [1PE 4:19](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:19)

God is pleased with the good works of his people
------------------------------------------------

**[HEB 13:16](https://ref.ly/Heb13:16)** *See also* [1PE 2:20](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:20), [1PE 2:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:15), [1PE 3:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:17)

Good works will be rewarded
---------------------------

**[JHN 5:28–5:29](https://ref.ly/John5:28-John5:29)** *See also* [LUK 6:35](https://ref.ly/Luke6:35); [ROM 2:5–2:11](https://ref.ly/Rom2:5-Rom2:11); [GAL 6:9–6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:9-Gal6:10); [1TI 6:17–6:19](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17-1Tim6:19)

Good works as evidence of repentance
------------------------------------

**[PSA 34:14](https://ref.ly/Ps34:14)** *See also* [PSA 37:27](https://ref.ly/Ps37:27); [2TI 2:20–2:21](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:20-2Tim2:21); [JAS 2:14–2:21](https://ref.ly/Jas2:14-Jas2:21), [JAS 2:26](https://ref.ly/Jas2:26), [JAS 3:13](https://ref.ly/Jas3:13); [1PE 3:10–3:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:10-1Pet3:12)

Good works as evidence of God's grace in the lives of believers
---------------------------------------------------------------

**[2CO 9:8](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:8)** *See also* [ACT 9:36](https://ref.ly/Acts9:36); [PHP 2:12–2:13](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12-Phil2:13); [COL 1:10–1:12](https://ref.ly/Col1:10-Col1:12)

Good works are the purpose of the new creation
----------------------------------------------

**[EPH 2:10](https://ref.ly/Eph2:10)** *See also* [2TI 2:21](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:21), [2TI 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16-2Tim3:17); [1PE 2:13–2:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13-1Pet2:15)

Jesus Christ criticised for doing good works on the Sabbath
-----------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 12:9–12:14](https://ref.ly/Matt12:9-Matt12:14)** parallels [MRK 3:1–3:6](https://ref.ly/Mark3:1-Mark3:6), [LUK 6:6–6:11](https://ref.ly/Luke6:6-Luke6:11) *See also* [LUK 13:10–13:17](https://ref.ly/Luke13:10-Luke13:17); [JHN 9:1–9:41](https://ref.ly/John9:1-John9:41)

## 8443: growth (id: 8443)

The process of development and maturing, used to refer to the progress of the kingdom of God and the spiritual development of believers. Scripture uses images of growth (such as seeds, plants and infants) to stress the dynamic nature of personal faith and the kingdom of God.

Images of growth
----------------

### Infancy to maturity

**[EPH 4:13–4:15](https://ref.ly/Eph4:13-Eph4:15)** *See also* [1CO 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:1-1Cor3:2), [1CO 13:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:11), [1CO 14:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:20); [HEB 5:12–5:14](https://ref.ly/Heb5:12-Heb5:14); [1PE 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:2)

### Seeds and plants

**[LUK 8:14–8:15](https://ref.ly/Luke8:14-Luke8:15)** parallels [MAT 13:22–13:23](https://ref.ly/Matt13:22-Matt13:23), [MRK 4:19–4:20](https://ref.ly/Mark4:19-Mark4:20) *See also* [2CO 9:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:10)

The apostles worked and prayed for growth in believers
------------------------------------------------------

**[2CO 13:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:9)** *See also* [COL 1:28](https://ref.ly/Col1:28), [COL 4:12](https://ref.ly/Col4:12)

Dimensions of spiritual growth
------------------------------

### In faith

**[2CO 10:15–10:16](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:15-2Cor10:16)** *See also* [2TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3)

### In knowledge

**[2PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:18)** *See also* [EPH 1:17–1:18](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17-Eph1:18), [EPH 3:16–3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16-Eph3:19); [COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10); [2PE 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:3), [2PE 1:6](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:6)

### In love

**[1TH 4:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:10)** *See also* [PHP 1:9](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9); [1TH 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:12); [2PE 1:7–1:8](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:7-2Pet1:8)

Growth comes from God
---------------------

**[COL 2:19](https://ref.ly/Col2:19)** *See also* [1CO 3:6–3:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:6-1Cor3:7); [2CO 9:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:10); [PHP 1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:6)

Growth comes through discipleship
---------------------------------

### Putting away the sinful self

**[1PE 2:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:1)** *See also* [ROM 8:13–8:14](https://ref.ly/Rom8:13-Rom8:14); [2CO 7:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor7:1); [GAL 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gal5:24); [EPH 4:22–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22-Eph4:24); [COL 3:5–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:5-Col3:10)

### Moving on from basic teaching

**[HEB 6:1–6:2](https://ref.ly/Heb6:1-Heb6:2)** *See also* [HEB 5:11–5:14](https://ref.ly/Heb5:11-Heb5:14)

### Maturing in thinking

**[1CO 14:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:20)** *See also* [ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)

### Persevering in faith

**[JAS 1:4](https://ref.ly/Jas1:4)** *See also* [PHP 2:12](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12), [PHP 3:12](https://ref.ly/Phil3:12); [2PE 1:5–1:8](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:8)

### Contributing to growth in the church by exercising gifts

**[EPH 4:11–4:12](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11-Eph4:12)** *See also* [1CO 14:1–14:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:1-1Cor14:5); [EPH 4:13–4:16](https://ref.ly/Eph4:13-Eph4:16)

Examples of spiritual growth in some of God's servants
------------------------------------------------------

**[1SA 2:26](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:26)**; **[LUK 2:52](https://ref.ly/Luke2:52)** *See also* [LUK 1:80](https://ref.ly/Luke1:80); [ACT 9:22](https://ref.ly/Acts9:22)

The growth of the kingdom of God
--------------------------------

### God promises that his kingdom will grow

**[COL 1:6](https://ref.ly/Col1:6)** *See also* [MAT 13:31–13:33](https://ref.ly/Matt13:31-Matt13:33) parallels [MRK 4:30–4:32](https://ref.ly/Mark4:30-Mark4:32), [LUK 13:18–13:21](https://ref.ly/Luke13:18-Luke13:21); [MRK 4:26–4:29](https://ref.ly/Mark4:26-Mark4:29)

### The early church experienced rapid numerical growth

**[ACT 4:4](https://ref.ly/Acts4:4)** *See also* [ACT 2:41](https://ref.ly/Acts2:41), [ACT 2:47](https://ref.ly/Acts2:47), [ACT 5:14](https://ref.ly/Acts5:14), [ACT 6:7](https://ref.ly/Acts6:7), [ACT 9:31](https://ref.ly/Acts9:31), [ACT 11:21](https://ref.ly/Acts11:21), [ACT 14:1](https://ref.ly/Acts14:1), [ACT 16:5](https://ref.ly/Acts16:5)

* **Associated Passages:** Ephesians 4:13-15; 1 Corinthians 3:1-2; 1 Corinthians 13:11; 1 Corinthians 14:20; Hebrews 5:12-14; 1 Peter 2:2; Luke 8:14-15; Matthew 13:22-23; Mark 4:19-20; 2 Corinthians 9:10; 2 Corinthians 13:9; Colossians 1:28; Colossians 4:12; 2 Corinthians 10:15-16; 2 Thessalonians 1:3; 2 Peter 3:18; Ephesians 1:17-18; Ephesians 3:16-19; Colossians 1:10; 2 Peter 1:3; 2 Peter 1:6; 1 Thessalonians 4:10; Philippians 1:9; 1 Thessalonians 3:12; 2 Peter 1:7-8; Colossians 2:19; 1 Corinthians 3:6-7; Philippians 1:6; 1 Peter 2:1; Romans 8:13-14; 2 Corinthians 7:1; Galatians 5:24; Ephesians 4:22-24; Colossians 3:5-10; Hebrews 6:1-2; Hebrews 5:11-14; Romans 12:1; James 1:4; Philippians 2:12; Philippians 3:12; 2 Peter 1:5-8; Ephesians 4:11-12; 1 Corinthians 14:1-5; Ephesians 4:13-16; 1 Samuel 2:26; Luke 2:52; Luke 1:80; Acts 9:22; Colossians 1:6; Matthew 13:31-33; Mark 4:30-32; Luke 13:18-21; Mark 4:26-29; Acts 4:4; Acts 2:41; Acts 2:47; Acts 5:14; Acts 6:7; Acts 9:31; Acts 11:21; Acts 14:1; Acts 16:5
