## 8444: honouring God (id: 8444)

Giving the reverence and respect to God which is his due. All God's people have a duty to honour him in every aspect of their lives, while unbelievers and even animals can also honour him.

God's people must honour him
----------------------------

**[PSA 22:23](https://ref.ly/Ps22:23)** *See also* [MAL 1:6](https://ref.ly/Mal1:6), [MAL 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/Mal2:1-Mal2:2); [JHN 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/John5:22-John5:23)

Ways of honouring God
---------------------

### By worshipping him

**[DAN 4:34](https://ref.ly/Dan4:34)** *See also* [ISA 43:22–43:24](https://ref.ly/Isa43:22-Isa43:24); [1TI 1:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:17), [1TI 6:15–6:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:15-1Tim6:16); [REV 4:8–4:11](https://ref.ly/Rev4:8-Rev4:11), [REV 5:6–5:14](https://ref.ly/Rev5:6-Rev5:14), [REV 7:9–7:12](https://ref.ly/Rev7:9-Rev7:12)

### By holy living

**[1CO 6:18–6:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:18-1Cor6:20)** *See also* [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2); [2CO 8:23](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:23); [EPH 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1-Eph5:3); [1TH 4:7–4:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:7-1Thess4:8); [1PE 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:15-1Pet1:16)

### By keeping the Sabbath and religious feasts

**[LEV 19:30](https://ref.ly/Lev19:30)** *See also* [EXO 20:8–20:11](https://ref.ly/Exod20:8-Exod20:11) parallel [DEU 5:12–5:15](https://ref.ly/Deut5:12-Deut5:15); [EXO 12:42](https://ref.ly/Exod12:42), [EXO 31:12–31:17](https://ref.ly/Exod31:12-Exod31:17); [LEV 26:2](https://ref.ly/Lev26:2); [ISA 58:13–58:14](https://ref.ly/Isa58:13-Isa58:14)

### By showing kindness to others

**[PRO 14:31](https://ref.ly/Prov14:31)** *See also* [DEU 26:12–26:15](https://ref.ly/Deut26:12-Deut26:15); [MAT 10:40–10:42](https://ref.ly/Matt10:40-Matt10:42)

### By honouring his name and his word

**[ACT 19:13–19:17](https://ref.ly/Acts19:13-Acts19:17)** *See also* [JDG 13:17](https://ref.ly/Judg13:17); [ISA 26:13](https://ref.ly/Isa26:13); [MAL 3:16](https://ref.ly/Mal3:16); [ACT 13:48](https://ref.ly/Acts13:48); [2TH 3:1](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:1)

### By acknowledging him as God

**[DAN 3:28–3:29](https://ref.ly/Dan3:28-Dan3:29)** *See also* [1SA 6:4–6:5](https://ref.ly/1Sam6:4-1Sam6:5); [ISA 43:20](https://ref.ly/Isa43:20); [REV 14:7](https://ref.ly/Rev14:7)

### By giving tithes and offerings to him

**[PRO 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Prov3:9-Prov3:10)** *See also* [DEU 26:1–26:11](https://ref.ly/Deut26:1-Deut26:11); [MAL 3:6–3:12](https://ref.ly/Mal3:6-Mal3:12); [2CO 8:19–8:21](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:19-2Cor8:21)

### By proclaiming his deeds

**[ISA 63:7](https://ref.ly/Isa63:7)** *See also* [1CH 16:23–16:26](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:23-1Chr16:26); [PSA 145:3–145:7](https://ref.ly/Ps145:3-Ps145:7); [ISA 12:4–12:6](https://ref.ly/Isa12:4-Isa12:6); [DAN 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/Dan4:1-Dan4:3)

### By obeying him

**[NUM 27:12–27:14](https://ref.ly/Num27:12-Num27:14)** *See also* [NUM 20:7–20:12](https://ref.ly/Num20:7-Num20:12)

God honours those who honour him
--------------------------------

**[1SA 2:27–2:30](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:27-1Sam2:30)** *See also* [LEV 10:1–10:3](https://ref.ly/Lev10:1-Lev10:3); [2CH 26:18](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:18); [JHN 12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:26)

God requires sincerity from those who honour him
------------------------------------------------

**[MRK 7:5–7:13](https://ref.ly/Mark7:5-Mark7:13)** parallel [MAT 15:1–15:9](https://ref.ly/Matt15:1-Matt15:9) *See also* [ISA 29:13](https://ref.ly/Isa29:13); [ACT 5:1–5:11](https://ref.ly/Acts5:1-Acts5:11)

All people will ultimately honour God
-------------------------------------

**[JER 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jer3:17)** *See also* [ISA 60:9](https://ref.ly/Isa60:9); [ROM 14:9–14:12](https://ref.ly/Rom14:9-Rom14:12); [ISA 45:23–45:24](https://ref.ly/Isa45:23-Isa45:24); [PHP 2:9–2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:9-Phil2:11)

Jesus Christ is to be honoured as God
-------------------------------------

**[MAT 17:5](https://ref.ly/Matt17:5)** parallels [MRK 9:7](https://ref.ly/Mark9:7), [LUK 9:35](https://ref.ly/Luke9:35)**[JHN 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/John5:22-John5:23)** *See also* [REV 5:12–5:13](https://ref.ly/Rev5:12-Rev5:13)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 22:23; Malachi 1:6; Malachi 2:1-2; John 5:22-23; Daniel 4:34; Isaiah 43:22-24; 1 Timothy 1:17; 1 Timothy 6:15-16; Revelation 4:8-11; Revelation 5:6-14; Revelation 7:9-12; 1 Corinthians 6:18-20; Romans 12:1-2; 2 Corinthians 8:23; Ephesians 5:1-3; 1 Thessalonians 4:7-8; 1 Peter 1:15-16; Leviticus 19:30; Exodus 20:8-11; Deuteronomy 5:12-15; Exodus 12:42; Exodus 31:12-17; Leviticus 26:2; Isaiah 58:13-14; Proverbs 14:31; Deuteronomy 26:12-15; Matthew 10:40-42; Acts 19:13-17; Judges 13:17; Isaiah 26:13; Malachi 3:16; Acts 13:48; 2 Thessalonians 3:1; Daniel 3:28-29; 1 Samuel 6:4-5; Isaiah 43:20; Revelation 14:7; Proverbs 3:9-10; Deuteronomy 26:1-11; Malachi 3:6-12; 2 Corinthians 8:19-21; Isaiah 63:7; 1 Chronicles 16:23-26; Psalms 145:3-7; Isaiah 12:4-6; Daniel 4:1-3; Numbers 27:12-14; Numbers 20:7-12; 1 Samuel 2:27-30; Leviticus 10:1-3; 2 Chronicles 26:18; John 12:26; Mark 7:5-13; Matthew 15:1-9; Isaiah 29:13; Acts 5:1-11; Jeremiah 3:17; Isaiah 60:9; Romans 14:9-12; Isaiah 45:23-24; Philippians 2:9-11; Matthew 17:5; Mark 9:7; Luke 9:35; Revelation 5:12-13
* **Associated Articles:** 5878: honour (ID: `5878@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7930: Lord's Day, the (ID: `7930@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8266: holiness (ID: `8266@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8334: reverence, and God's nature (ID: `8334@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8440: glorifying God (ID: `8440@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8453: obedience (ID: `8453@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8470: respect, for God's character (ID: `8470@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8622: worship (ID: `8622@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8632: adoration (ID: `8632@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8660: magnifying God (ID: `8660@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8664: praise (ID: `8664@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8445: hospitality (id: 8445)

Acts of generosity and friendship towards strangers. God's people are called to be hospitable as part of their duty to others and in gratitude for the salvation they have received from God. Showing hospitality includes the responsibility to protect those received as guests.

* **Associated Articles:** 8446: hospitality, a duty of God's people (ID: `8446@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8447: hospitality, examples of (ID: `8447@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8446: hospitality, a duty of God's people (id: 8446)

Hospitality is commanded by God
-------------------------------

**[HEB 13:2](https://ref.ly/Heb13:2)** *See also* [ISA 58:6–58:7](https://ref.ly/Isa58:6-Isa58:7); [JHN 13:12–13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:12-John13:15); [ROM 12:13](https://ref.ly/Rom12:13); [1PE 4:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:9)

Hospitality is a responsibility of leaders
------------------------------------------

**[1TI 3:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:2)** *See also* [1TI 5:9–5:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:9-1Tim5:10); [TIT 1:8](https://ref.ly/Titus1:8)

Hospitality indicates true discipleship
---------------------------------------

**[JOB 31:32](https://ref.ly/Job31:32)** *See also* [MAT 25:35](https://ref.ly/Matt25:35)

Hospitality crosses social barriers
-----------------------------------

### Of race

**[LEV 19:33–19:34](https://ref.ly/Lev19:33-Lev19:34)** *See also* [EXO 22:21](https://ref.ly/Exod22:21), [EXO 23:9](https://ref.ly/Exod23:9)

### Of class and status

**[LUK 14:12–14:14](https://ref.ly/Luke14:12-Luke14:14)** *See also* [JAS 2:2–2:4](https://ref.ly/Jas2:2-Jas2:4)

Hospitality is to be offered to Christian ministers
---------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 16:1–16:2](https://ref.ly/Rom16:1-Rom16:2)** *See also* [COL 4:10](https://ref.ly/Col4:10); [3JN 1:5–1:10](https://ref.ly/3John1:5-3John1:10)

Hospitality is to be refused to false teachers
----------------------------------------------

[2JN 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/2John1:10-2John1:11)

Hospitality as a picture of salvation
-------------------------------------

**[PSA 23:5–23:6](https://ref.ly/Ps23:5-Ps23:6)**; **[REV 3:20](https://ref.ly/Rev3:20)** *Jesus Christ comes as a willing guest to the repentant, as a sign of renewed fellowship.* *See also* [ISA 25:6](https://ref.ly/Isa25:6); [MAT 22:1–22:14](https://ref.ly/Matt22:1-Matt22:14); [LUK 14:15–14:24](https://ref.ly/Luke14:15-Luke14:24), [LUK 19:1–19:10](https://ref.ly/Luke19:1-Luke19:10); [JHN 14:2–14:3](https://ref.ly/John14:2-John14:3)

Warnings against inhospitable behaviour
---------------------------------------

**[DEU 23:3–23:4](https://ref.ly/Deut23:3-Deut23:4)** *See also* [MAT 10:14](https://ref.ly/Matt10:14) parallels [MRK 6:11](https://ref.ly/Mark6:11), [LUK 9:5](https://ref.ly/Luke9:5); [MAT 25:41–25:45](https://ref.ly/Matt25:41-Matt25:45)

* **Associated Passages:** Hebrews 13:2; Isaiah 58:6-7; John 13:12-15; Romans 12:13; 1 Peter 4:9; 1 Timothy 3:2; 1 Timothy 5:9-10; Titus 1:8; Job 31:32; Matthew 25:35; Leviticus 19:33-34; Exodus 22:21; Exodus 23:9; Luke 14:12-14; James 2:2-4; Romans 16:1-2; Colossians 4:10; 3 John 1:5-10; 2 John 1:10-11; Psalms 23:5-6; Revelation 3:20; Isaiah 25:6; Matthew 22:1-14; Luke 14:15-24; Luke 19:1-10; John 14:2-3; Deuteronomy 23:3-4; Matthew 10:14; Mark 6:11; Luke 9:5; Matthew 25:41-45
* **Associated Articles:** 5051: responsibility (ID: `5051@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5690: friends (ID: `5690@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5699: guests (ID: `5699@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5765: attitudes, to other people (ID: `5765@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6672: grace, in human relationships (ID: `6672@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7530: foreigners (ID: `7530@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7733: leaders (ID: `7733@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8260: generosity (ID: `8260@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8291: kindness (ID: `8291@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8434: giving (ID: `8434@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9410: heaven (ID: `9410@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8447: hospitality, examples of (id: 8447)

Scripture provides many examples of friendship and generosity towards strangers, and encourages believers to be hospitable in turn.

Examples of hospitality in the OT
---------------------------------

**[GEN 18:2–18:5](https://ref.ly/Gen18:2-Gen18:5)** *See also* [GEN 19:1–19:3](https://ref.ly/Gen19:1-Gen19:3) *Lot entertains visitors from God*; [GEN 24:22–24:25](https://ref.ly/Gen24:22-Gen24:25) *Abraham's servant is welcomed in Rebekah's home*; [EXO 2:20](https://ref.ly/Exod2:20) *Moses is welcomed by a priest of Midian*; [JDG 13:15](https://ref.ly/Judg13:15) *Manoah receives the angel of the LORD.*[JDG 19:1–19:4](https://ref.ly/Judg19:1-Judg19:4), [JDG 19:20–19:21](https://ref.ly/Judg19:20-Judg19:21)[2SA 17:27–17:29](https://ref.ly/2Sam17:27-2Sam17:29) *hospitality shown to David and his people*; [1KI 17:7–17:16](https://ref.ly/1Kgs17:7-1Kgs17:16) *The widow of Zarephath cares for Elijah despite her poverty*; [2KI 4:8–4:10](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:8-2Kgs4:10) *a Shunammite provides for Elisha*; [NEH 5:17](https://ref.ly/Neh5:17) *Nehemiah shows hospitality to fellow Jews.*

Hospitality shown to Jesus Christ
---------------------------------

**[MAT 9:10](https://ref.ly/Matt9:10)** parallels [MRK 2:15](https://ref.ly/Mark2:15), [LUK 5:29](https://ref.ly/Luke5:29) *Jesus Christ received hospitality from people of all social backgrounds.* *See also* [MAT 8:14–8:15](https://ref.ly/Matt8:14-Matt8:15) parallels [MRK 1:29–1:31](https://ref.ly/Mark1:29-Mark1:31), [LUK 4:38–4:39](https://ref.ly/Luke4:38-Luke4:39) *at Peter's house*[MAT 26:6–26:7](https://ref.ly/Matt26:6-Matt26:7) parallel [MRK 14:3](https://ref.ly/Mark14:3); [JHN 12:1–12:3](https://ref.ly/John12:1-John12:3)[LUK 7:36](https://ref.ly/Luke7:36) *at the house of Simon the Pharisee*; [LUK 10:38](https://ref.ly/Luke10:38) *at the home of Mary and Martha*; [LUK 14:1](https://ref.ly/Luke14:1) *at the house of a prominent Pharisee*; [LUK 19:5–19:7](https://ref.ly/Luke19:5-Luke19:7) *at Zacchaeus' house*; [LUK 24:29](https://ref.ly/Luke24:29) *with disciples in Emmaus*; [JHN 2:2](https://ref.ly/John2:2) *at the wedding at Cana*

Hospitality assisted the mission of the apostles
------------------------------------------------

### Hospitality shown to the disciples

**[MAT 10:11–10:12](https://ref.ly/Matt10:11-Matt10:12)** parallels [MRK 6:10](https://ref.ly/Mark6:10), [LUK 9:4](https://ref.ly/Luke9:4) *Jesus Christ sends out the Twelve.* *See also* [LUK 10:5–10:7](https://ref.ly/Luke10:5-Luke10:7)

### Hospitality shown to Peter

[ACT 10:32](https://ref.ly/Acts10:32) *at the home of Simon the tanner*; ; [ACT 10:48](https://ref.ly/Acts10:48) *with Cornelius and his family*

### Hospitality shown to Paul and his companions

[ACT 16:15](https://ref.ly/Acts16:15) *at the home of Lydia*; ; [ACT 16:34](https://ref.ly/Acts16:34) *at the house of the Philippian jailer*; ; [ACT 18:2–18:3](https://ref.ly/Acts18:2-Acts18:3) *with Aquila and Priscilla in Corinth*; ; [ACT 21:8](https://ref.ly/Acts21:8) *at the house of Philip*; ; [ACT 21:16](https://ref.ly/Acts21:16) *at the home of Mnason in Jerusalem*; ; [ACT 28:2](https://ref.ly/Acts28:2) *on Malta*; ; [ACT 28:7](https://ref.ly/Acts28:7) *at the home of Publius*; ; [ROM 16:23](https://ref.ly/Rom16:23) *with Gaius*; ; [PHM 1:22](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:22) *as a guest of Philemon*

Christians opened their homes for gatherings of believers
---------------------------------------------------------

**[1CO 16:19](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:19)** *See also* [ACT 2:46](https://ref.ly/Acts2:46); [ROM 16:3–16:5](https://ref.ly/Rom16:3-Rom16:5); [COL 4:15](https://ref.ly/Col4:15); [PHM 1:2](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:2)

Examples of inhospitable behaviour
----------------------------------

**[1SA 25:10–25:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam25:10-1Sam25:11)** *See also* [NUM 20:18](https://ref.ly/Num20:18) *Edom*; [NUM 21:21–21:23](https://ref.ly/Num21:21-Num21:23) *Sihon*; [DEU 23:3–23:4](https://ref.ly/Deut23:3-Deut23:4) *Ammonites and Moabites*; [JDG 19:15](https://ref.ly/Judg19:15) *Gibeah*; [LUK 9:52–9:53](https://ref.ly/Luke9:52-Luke9:53) *a Samaritan village*

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 18:2-5; Genesis 19:1-3; Genesis 24:22-25; Exodus 2:20; Judges 13:15; Judges 19:1-4; Judges 19:20-21; 2 Samuel 17:27-29; 1 Kings 17:7-16; 2 Kings 4:8-10; Nehemiah 5:17; Matthew 9:10; Mark 2:15; Luke 5:29; Matthew 8:14-15; Mark 1:29-31; Luke 4:38-39; Matthew 26:6-7; Mark 14:3; John 12:1-3; Luke 7:36; Luke 10:38; Luke 14:1; Luke 19:5-7; Luke 24:29; John 2:2; Matthew 10:11-12; Mark 6:10; Luke 9:4; Luke 10:5-7; Acts 10:32; Acts 10:48; Acts 16:15; Acts 16:34; Acts 18:2-3; Acts 21:8; Acts 21:16; Acts 28:2; Acts 28:7; Romans 16:23; Philemon 1:22; 1 Corinthians 16:19; Acts 2:46; Romans 16:3-5; Colossians 4:15; Philemon 1:2; 1 Samuel 25:10-11; Numbers 20:18; Numbers 21:21-23; Deuteronomy 23:3-4; Judges 19:15; Luke 9:52-53
* **Associated Articles:** 2339: Jesus Christ, example of (ID: `2339@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2354: Jesus Christ, mission of (ID: `2354@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4438: eating (ID: `4438@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4476: meals (ID: `4476@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5339: home (ID: `5339@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5355: invitations (ID: `5355@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5976: visiting (ID: `5976@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7020: church, the (ID: `7020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7948: mission (ID: `7948@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8342: servanthood (ID: `8342@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8449: imitating (id: 8449)

Following the example or copying the actions of another person. Christians are called upon to become Christlike. Becoming like Jesus Christ is, however, the result, not the condition, of conversion.

The people of God are to imitate God
------------------------------------

**[LEV 11:44–11:45](https://ref.ly/Lev11:44-Lev11:45)** *See also* [LEV 19:2](https://ref.ly/Lev19:2), [LEV 20:7](https://ref.ly/Lev20:7), [LEV 20:26](https://ref.ly/Lev20:26), [LEV 21:8](https://ref.ly/Lev21:8); [1PE 1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:16); [EPH 5:1](https://ref.ly/Eph5:1)

The people of God are to imitate Jesus Christ
---------------------------------------------

### Jesus Christ is the example for believers

**[MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24)** parallels [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34), [LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23)**[JHN 13:15](https://ref.ly/John13:15)** *See also* [MAT 11:29](https://ref.ly/Matt11:29); [JHN 13:34](https://ref.ly/John13:34); [ROM 13:14](https://ref.ly/Rom13:14); [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1); [EPH 5:2](https://ref.ly/Eph5:2); [PHP 2:5](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5); [COL 3:13](https://ref.ly/Col3:13); [1PE 2:21](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21), [1PE 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:1)

### God works in believers making them like Jesus Christ

**[ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29)** *See also* [2CO 4:10–4:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:10-2Cor4:12); [COL 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:9-Col3:10)

Good examples to imitate
------------------------

### Paul's example

**[1CO 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:16)** *See also* [1CO 11:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:1); [PHP 3:17](https://ref.ly/Phil3:17), [PHP 4:9](https://ref.ly/Phil4:9); [1TH 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:6); [2TH 3:7–3:9](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:7-2Thess3:9)

### Christians are to imitate the good example of other believers

[2CO 9:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:2); ; [1TH 2:14](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:14); ; [HEB 6:12](https://ref.ly/Heb6:12)

### Christian leaders are to set examples which can be imitated

**[1TI 4:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:12)** *See also* [TIT 2:7–2:8](https://ref.ly/Titus2:7-Titus2:8); [HEB 13:7](https://ref.ly/Heb13:7); [1PE 5:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:3)

### Believers are to imitate the good example of those who have gone before

[HEB 12:1](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1); ; [JAS 5:10–5:11](https://ref.ly/Jas5:10-Jas5:11)

God's people are not to imitate bad examples
--------------------------------------------

### Israel must not imitate other nations

[LEV 20:23](https://ref.ly/Lev20:23); ; [DEU 18:9](https://ref.ly/Deut18:9); ; [2KI 17:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:15)

### God's people must not imitate the ungodly

[EXO 23:2](https://ref.ly/Exod23:2); ; [PSA 1:1](https://ref.ly/Ps1:1); ; [PRO 1:10–1:15](https://ref.ly/Prov1:10-Prov1:15); ; [MAT 23:2–23:3](https://ref.ly/Matt23:2-Matt23:3); ; [1CO 15:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:33); ; [2PE 3:17](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:17); ; [1JN 3:11–3:12](https://ref.ly/1John3:11-1John3:12); ; [REV 2:14](https://ref.ly/Rev2:14)

No\-one can obtain salvation by imitating Jesus Christ
------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 3:16–3:18](https://ref.ly/John3:16-John3:18)** *Jesus Christ teaches that salvation (eternal life) is a consequence of faith in him. He never links salvation with imitating him or any other act or acts.* *See also* [EPH 2:8–2:9](https://ref.ly/Eph2:8-Eph2:9); [2TI 1:8–1:9](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:8-2Tim1:9)

* **Associated Passages:** Leviticus 11:44-45; Leviticus 19:2; Leviticus 20:7; Leviticus 20:26; Leviticus 21:8; 1 Peter 1:16; Ephesians 5:1; Matthew 16:24; Mark 8:34; Luke 9:23; John 13:15; Matthew 11:29; John 13:34; Romans 13:14; 1 Corinthians 11:1; Ephesians 5:2; Philippians 2:5; Colossians 3:13; 1 Peter 2:21; 1 Peter 4:1; Romans 8:29; 2 Corinthians 4:10-12; Colossians 3:9-10; 1 Corinthians 4:16; Philippians 3:17; Philippians 4:9; 1 Thessalonians 1:6; 2 Thessalonians 3:7-9; 2 Corinthians 9:2; 1 Thessalonians 2:14; Hebrews 6:12; 1 Timothy 4:12; Titus 2:7-8; Hebrews 13:7; 1 Peter 5:3; Hebrews 12:1; James 5:10-11; Leviticus 20:23; Deuteronomy 18:9; 2 Kings 17:15; Exodus 23:2; Psalms 1:1; Proverbs 1:10-15; Matthew 23:2-3; 1 Corinthians 15:33; 2 Peter 3:17; 1 John 3:11-12; Revelation 2:14; John 3:16-18; Ephesians 2:8-9; 2 Timothy 1:8-9
* **Associated Articles:** 2339: Jesus Christ, example of (ID: `2339@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6510: salvation (ID: `6510@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7733: leaders (ID: `7733@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8217: conformity (ID: `8217@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8428: example (ID: `8428@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8450: martyrdom (id: 8450)

The term “martyr” comes from the Greek word for “witness”, reminding believers that the supreme act of witness for the gospel is to give up one's life for its sake.

Jesus Christ as martyr
----------------------

### Jesus Christ had to suffer and die

**[MRK 8:31](https://ref.ly/Mark8:31)** *In that Jesus Christ gives up his life, he may be thought of as a martyr. But the NT stresses that he is far more than this. Through his death alone come all the benefits of salvation, in which all believers can share.* *See also* [ISA 53:10](https://ref.ly/Isa53:10)

### Jesus Christ's life is given as a ransom for believers

**[MAT 20:28](https://ref.ly/Matt20:28)** parallel [MRK 10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:45) *See also* [LUK 9:22](https://ref.ly/Luke9:22); [JHN 10:11](https://ref.ly/John10:11); [ACT 2:23](https://ref.ly/Acts2:23)

Other examples of martyrdom
---------------------------

### Abel

[GEN 4:8](https://ref.ly/Gen4:8); ; [MAT 23:35](https://ref.ly/Matt23:35) parallel [LUK 11:51](https://ref.ly/Luke11:51); ; [HEB 11:4](https://ref.ly/Heb11:4), [HEB 12:24](https://ref.ly/Heb12:24); ; [1JN 3:12](https://ref.ly/1John3:12)

### Zechariah

[2CH 24:20–24:21](https://ref.ly/2Chr24:20-2Chr24:21); ; [LUK 11:51](https://ref.ly/Luke11:51)

### John the Baptist

[MAT 14:10–14:12](https://ref.ly/Matt14:10-Matt14:12) parallel [MRK 6:27–6:29](https://ref.ly/Mark6:27-Mark6:29)

### Stephen

[ACT 7:58](https://ref.ly/Acts7:58), [ACT 22:20](https://ref.ly/Acts22:20) *Stephen is the first martyr of the Christian church.*

### James

[ACT 12:2](https://ref.ly/Acts12:2)

### Peter

[JHN 21:18–21:19](https://ref.ly/John21:18-John21:19)

### Antipas

[REV 2:13](https://ref.ly/Rev2:13)

### Unnamed martyrs

[1KI 19:10](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:10); ; [ROM 11:3](https://ref.ly/Rom11:3); ; [NEH 9:26](https://ref.ly/Neh9:26); ; [MAT 23:30–23:34](https://ref.ly/Matt23:30-Matt23:34); ; [LUK 11:47–11:49](https://ref.ly/Luke11:47-Luke11:49); ; [ACT 7:52](https://ref.ly/Acts7:52); ; [ROM 8:35–8:36](https://ref.ly/Rom8:35-Rom8:36); ; [HEB 11:35](https://ref.ly/Heb11:35), [HEB 11:37](https://ref.ly/Heb11:37); ; [JAS 5:6](https://ref.ly/Jas5:6); ; [REV 11:7](https://ref.ly/Rev11:7), [REV 13:15](https://ref.ly/Rev13:15), [REV 16:6](https://ref.ly/Rev16:6), [REV 17:6](https://ref.ly/Rev17:6)

Noble qualities of martyrs
--------------------------

### Courage

**[DAN 3:16–3:18](https://ref.ly/Dan3:16-Dan3:18)**

### Prayerfulness

**[ACT 7:59–7:60](https://ref.ly/Acts7:59-Acts7:60)**

### Self\-denial

**[REV 12:11](https://ref.ly/Rev12:11)** *See also* [MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24) parallel [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34); [LUK 9:24](https://ref.ly/Luke9:24)

### Serenity

**[ACT 7:55–7:56](https://ref.ly/Acts7:55-Acts7:56)**

### Steadfastness

**[REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10)** *See also* [HEB 11:35](https://ref.ly/Heb11:35)**[ACT 21:13](https://ref.ly/Acts21:13)** *See also* [DAN 3:16–3:18](https://ref.ly/Dan3:16-Dan3:18)

Martyrdom must be recognised as a possibility for all believers
---------------------------------------------------------------

**[LUK 21:16](https://ref.ly/Luke21:16)** *See also* [MAT 10:21](https://ref.ly/Matt10:21) parallel [MRK 13:12](https://ref.ly/Mark13:12); [MAT 24:9](https://ref.ly/Matt24:9); [JHN 16:2](https://ref.ly/John16:2), [JHN 21:18–21:19](https://ref.ly/John21:18-John21:19)

Reasons for martyrdom
---------------------

### Refusal to engage in false worship

**[DAN 3:6](https://ref.ly/Dan3:6)** *See also* [DAN 3:16–3:18](https://ref.ly/Dan3:16-Dan3:18), [DAN 6:7](https://ref.ly/Dan6:7), [DAN 11:30–11:33](https://ref.ly/Dan11:30-Dan11:33); [REV 13:15](https://ref.ly/Rev13:15)

### Courageous confrontation

**[NEH 9:26](https://ref.ly/Neh9:26)** *See also* [MAT 14:2–14:12](https://ref.ly/Matt14:2-Matt14:12) parallel [MRK 6:17–6:29](https://ref.ly/Mark6:17-Mark6:29); [ACT 7:51–7:58](https://ref.ly/Acts7:51-Acts7:58); [REV 11:7–11:10](https://ref.ly/Rev11:7-Rev11:10)

### Public confession of Jesus Christ

**[MAT 24:9](https://ref.ly/Matt24:9)** *See also* [MRK 13:12–13:13](https://ref.ly/Mark13:12-Mark13:13); [LUK 21:16–21:17](https://ref.ly/Luke21:16-Luke21:17)

### A holy life

**[1JN 3:12](https://ref.ly/1John3:12)**

Methods of martyrdom
--------------------

### Beheading

*See also* [MAT 14:10](https://ref.ly/Matt14:10); [MRK 6:16](https://ref.ly/Mark6:16); [LUK 9:9](https://ref.ly/Luke9:9); [REV 20:4](https://ref.ly/Rev20:4)

[DAN 3:11](https://ref.ly/Dan3:11); ; [1CO 13:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:3)

### Mutilation

[HEB 11:37](https://ref.ly/Heb11:37)

### Stoning

[ACT 7:58](https://ref.ly/Acts7:58); ; [HEB 11:37](https://ref.ly/Heb11:37)

### The sword

[ACT 12:2](https://ref.ly/Acts12:2); ; [HEB 11:37](https://ref.ly/Heb11:37)

### Torture

[HEB 11:35](https://ref.ly/Heb11:35)

Retribution for instigators of martyrdom
----------------------------------------

**[REV 6:9–6:10](https://ref.ly/Rev6:9-Rev6:10)** *See also* [MAT 23:35](https://ref.ly/Matt23:35); [ACT 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Acts12:1-Acts12:2), [ACT 12:23](https://ref.ly/Acts12:23)

Rewards of martyrdom
--------------------

**[REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10)** *See also* [MAT 10:39](https://ref.ly/Matt10:39); [REV 20:4](https://ref.ly/Rev20:4)

## 8451: mortification (id: 8451)

The act of self\-denial or the “putting to death” of sinful instincts in order to have freedom from sin and to live in the power of the Holy Spirit. The NT stresses that this act of humiliation comes about through the grace of God. It is the result of, not the condition for, conversion.

Examples of mortification through humility
------------------------------------------

**[2SA 10:1–10:5](https://ref.ly/2Sam10:1-2Sam10:5)** *See also* [MAT 27:3–27:5](https://ref.ly/Matt27:3-Matt27:5)

Examples of mortification through self\-denial
----------------------------------------------

**[LEV 16:29–16:31](https://ref.ly/Lev16:29-Lev16:31)** *See also* [EXO 19:15](https://ref.ly/Exod19:15); [LEV 23:27–23:32](https://ref.ly/Lev23:27-Lev23:32); [NUM 29:7](https://ref.ly/Num29:7)

Mortification as the basis for discipleship
-------------------------------------------

### Self\-denial is essential

**[MRK 8:34–8:35](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34-Mark8:35)** parallels [MAT 16:24–16:25](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24-Matt16:25), [LUK 9:23–9:24](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23-Luke9:24) *See also* [1JN 3:16](https://ref.ly/1John3:16)

### The necessity of putting to death sinful human nature and the world's values

**[ROM 8:13](https://ref.ly/Rom8:13)**; **[COL 3:5](https://ref.ly/Col3:5)** *See also* [MAT 5:29–5:30](https://ref.ly/Matt5:29-Matt5:30); [GAL 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gal5:24), [GAL 6:14](https://ref.ly/Gal6:14); [1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11)

Dying to self is a means of knowing freedom from sin
----------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 6:6–6:7](https://ref.ly/Rom6:6-Rom6:7)** *See also* [EPH 4:22–4:23](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22-Eph4:23)

The importance of sharing in the death of Christ
------------------------------------------------

**[GAL 2:20](https://ref.ly/Gal2:20)** *See also* [ROM 6:3](https://ref.ly/Rom6:3), [ROM 7:4](https://ref.ly/Rom7:4); [2CO 4:11–4:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:11-2Cor4:12); [PHP 3:10](https://ref.ly/Phil3:10); [COL 2:20](https://ref.ly/Col2:20); [2TI 2:11](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:11)

The example of Paul
-------------------

**[1CO 9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:27)** *See also* [2CO 11:23–11:33](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:23-2Cor11:33); [GAL 6:17](https://ref.ly/Gal6:17)

Mortification is not the same as self\-infliction
-------------------------------------------------

**[COL 2:23](https://ref.ly/Col2:23)** *See also* [PHP 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/Phil3:2-Phil3:3); [COL 2:20–2:22](https://ref.ly/Col2:20-Col2:22); [1TI 4:1–4:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1-1Tim4:5)

* **Associated Passages:** 2 Samuel 10:1-5; Matthew 27:3-5; Leviticus 16:29-31; Exodus 19:15; Leviticus 23:27-32; Numbers 29:7; Mark 8:34-35; Matthew 16:24-25; Luke 9:23-24; 1 John 3:16; Romans 8:13; Colossians 3:5; Matthew 5:29-30; Galatians 5:24; Galatians 6:14; 1 Peter 2:11; Romans 6:6-7; Ephesians 4:22-23; Galatians 2:20; Romans 6:3; Romans 7:4; 2 Corinthians 4:11-12; Philippians 3:10; Colossians 2:20; 2 Timothy 2:11; 1 Corinthians 9:27; 2 Corinthians 11:23-33; Galatians 6:17; Colossians 2:23; Philippians 3:2-3; Colossians 2:20-22; 1 Timothy 4:1-5
* **Associated Articles:** 5879: humiliation (ID: `5879@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5947: shame (ID: `5947@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6030: sin, avoidance of (ID: `6030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6166: flesh, sinful nature (ID: `6166@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6658: freedom (ID: `6658@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8114: discipleship (ID: `8114@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8429: fasting (ID: `8429@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8475: self-denial (ID: `8475@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8477: self-examination (ID: `8477@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8452: neighbours, duty to (id: 8452)

Scripture defines the identity of neighbours in various ways, and indicates the nature and extent of believers' obligations to them.

Neighbours defined
------------------

### Those who live nearby

**[PRO 3:29](https://ref.ly/Prov3:29)** *See also* [EXO 3:22](https://ref.ly/Exod3:22), [EXO 12:4](https://ref.ly/Exod12:4); [DEU 19:14](https://ref.ly/Deut19:14); [2KI 4:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:3); [PRO 27:10](https://ref.ly/Prov27:10); [LUK 15:4–15:6](https://ref.ly/Luke15:4-Luke15:6)

### Those of the same race

**[LEV 19:18](https://ref.ly/Lev19:18)** *See also* [1SA 15:27–15:28](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:27-1Sam15:28), [1SA 28:17](https://ref.ly/1Sam28:17); [1CH 12:38–12:40](https://ref.ly/1Chr12:38-1Chr12:40)

### Peoples of surrounding nations

**[DEU 1:7](https://ref.ly/Deut1:7)** *See also* [JOS 9:16](https://ref.ly/Josh9:16); [1SA 7:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:14); [EZR 9:1](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:1); [NEH 9:30](https://ref.ly/Neh9:30), [NEH 10:28](https://ref.ly/Neh10:28), [NEH 10:31](https://ref.ly/Neh10:31); [PSA 76:11](https://ref.ly/Ps76:11); [EZK 16:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:26)

### Those who show mercy to people in need

**[LUK 10:29–10:37](https://ref.ly/Luke10:29-Luke10:37)**

### Fellow Christians

**[EPH 4:25](https://ref.ly/Eph4:25)** *See also* [ROM 15:1–15:2](https://ref.ly/Rom15:1-Rom15:2); [GAL 5:13–5:16](https://ref.ly/Gal5:13-Gal5:16); [JAS 4:11–4:12](https://ref.ly/Jas4:11-Jas4:12)

Duties to neighbours
--------------------

### Love

**[MAT 22:34–22:39](https://ref.ly/Matt22:34-Matt22:39)** parallels [MRK 12:28–12:34](https://ref.ly/Mark12:28-Mark12:34), [LUK 10:25–10:28](https://ref.ly/Luke10:25-Luke10:28) *See also* [LEV 19:18](https://ref.ly/Lev19:18); [DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5); [MAT 19:19](https://ref.ly/Matt19:19); [ROM 13:8–13:10](https://ref.ly/Rom13:8-Rom13:10); [GAL 5:14](https://ref.ly/Gal5:14); [JAS 2:8–2:9](https://ref.ly/Jas2:8-Jas2:9)

### Assistance

**[EXO 23:4–23:5](https://ref.ly/Exod23:4-Exod23:5)** *See also* [DEU 22:1–22:4](https://ref.ly/Deut22:1-Deut22:4); [PRO 14:21](https://ref.ly/Prov14:21); [MAT 25:34–25:40](https://ref.ly/Matt25:34-Matt25:40)

### Fair treatment

**[EXO 22:14](https://ref.ly/Exod22:14)** *See also* [EXO 20:17](https://ref.ly/Exod20:17); [LEV 6:2–6:5](https://ref.ly/Lev6:2-Lev6:5), [LEV 19:15](https://ref.ly/Lev19:15); [DEU 5:21](https://ref.ly/Deut5:21)

### Honest dealings

**[LEV 19:13](https://ref.ly/Lev19:13)** *See also* [ZEC 8:16–8:17](https://ref.ly/Zech8:16-Zech8:17); [EPH 4:25](https://ref.ly/Eph4:25)

### Forgiveness

**[EPH 4:32](https://ref.ly/Eph4:32)** *See also* [MAT 18:21–18:35](https://ref.ly/Matt18:21-Matt18:35); [LUK 17:3–17:4](https://ref.ly/Luke17:3-Luke17:4); [ROM 15:1–15:2](https://ref.ly/Rom15:1-Rom15:2); [COL 3:13](https://ref.ly/Col3:13)

### Reproof

**[LEV 19:17](https://ref.ly/Lev19:17)** *See also* [LUK 17:3](https://ref.ly/Luke17:3); [GAL 6:1–6:2](https://ref.ly/Gal6:1-Gal6:2)

Prohibition of negative actions towards neighbours
--------------------------------------------------

### False witness

**[EXO 20:16](https://ref.ly/Exod20:16)** parallel [DEU 5:20](https://ref.ly/Deut5:20) *See also* [LEV 19:16](https://ref.ly/Lev19:16); [PRO 24:28](https://ref.ly/Prov24:28)

### Oppression

**[JER 22:13](https://ref.ly/Jer22:13)** *See also* [PRO 3:28](https://ref.ly/Prov3:28)

### Judgment

**[JAS 4:12](https://ref.ly/Jas4:12)** *See also* [MAT 7:1–7:2](https://ref.ly/Matt7:1-Matt7:2); [LUK 6:41–6:42](https://ref.ly/Luke6:41-Luke6:42); [ROM 14:13](https://ref.ly/Rom14:13)

## 8453: obedience (id: 8453)

A willingness to submit to the authority of someone else and to actually do what one is asked or told to do. Scripture lays particular emphasis upon the need for believers to obey God, stressing his trustworthiness. This obedience is especially clear in the life and death of Jesus Christ.

* **Associated Articles:** 8454: obedience, to God (ID: `8454@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8455: obedience, of Jesus Christ (ID: `8455@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8456: obedience, to human authorities (ID: `8456@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8454: obedience, to God (id: 8454)

A willingness to submit oneself to the will of God and to put it into effect. Scripture emphasises the necessity for God's laws to be followed, gives examples and reasons, and describes the rewards.

Obedience is demanded of God's people
-------------------------------------

**[LEV 25:18](https://ref.ly/Lev25:18)**; **[1SA 15:22](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:22)** *See also* [DEU 26:16](https://ref.ly/Deut26:16), [DEU 32:46](https://ref.ly/Deut32:46); [ROM 6:16–6:18](https://ref.ly/Rom6:16-Rom6:18); [1PE 1:14–1:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:14-1Pet1:16)

### Examples of obedience in the OT

**[JOS 11:15](https://ref.ly/Josh11:15)** *See also* [GEN 6:22](https://ref.ly/Gen6:22), [GEN 12:1–12:4](https://ref.ly/Gen12:1-Gen12:4), [GEN 22:2–22:3](https://ref.ly/Gen22:2-Gen22:3); [EXO 40:16](https://ref.ly/Exod40:16); [JON 3:3](https://ref.ly/Jonah3:3)

### The example of Jesus Christ

**[MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39)** parallels [MRK 14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:36), [LUK 22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42)**[JHN 14:31](https://ref.ly/John14:31)** *See also* [JHN 17:4](https://ref.ly/John17:4); [ROM 5:19](https://ref.ly/Rom5:19); [PHP 2:8](https://ref.ly/Phil2:8); [HEB 5:8](https://ref.ly/Heb5:8)

Jesus Christ is obeyed
----------------------

### By the wind and the waves

**[MAT 8:26–8:27](https://ref.ly/Matt8:26-Matt8:27)** parallels [MRK 4:39–4:41](https://ref.ly/Mark4:39-Mark4:41), [LUK 8:24–8:25](https://ref.ly/Luke8:24-Luke8:25)

### By evil spirits

**[MRK 1:27](https://ref.ly/Mark1:27)** parallel [LUK 4:36](https://ref.ly/Luke4:36)

Obedience and love
------------------

**[JHN 14:15](https://ref.ly/John14:15)**; **[1JN 5:3](https://ref.ly/1John5:3)** *See also* [PSA 119:167](https://ref.ly/Ps119:167); [1JN 2:5](https://ref.ly/1John2:5), [1JN 3:10](https://ref.ly/1John3:10); [2JN 1:6](https://ref.ly/2John1:6)

Obedience and faith
-------------------

**[HEB 11:8](https://ref.ly/Heb11:8)**; **[MAT 7:21](https://ref.ly/Matt7:21)** *Obedience to the will of God demonstrates the reality of a person's faith in Jesus Christ.* *See also* [ROM 1:5](https://ref.ly/Rom1:5); [JAS 2:14–2:26](https://ref.ly/Jas2:14-Jas2:26)

God rewards those who obey him
------------------------------

**[EXO 19:5](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5)**; **[JHN 15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:10)** *See also* [DEU 5:29](https://ref.ly/Deut5:29); [1KI 3:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:14); [2KI 18:5–18:7](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:5-2Kgs18:7); [MAT 7:21](https://ref.ly/Matt7:21), [MAT 7:24–7:25](https://ref.ly/Matt7:24-Matt7:25) parallel [LUK 6:47–6:48](https://ref.ly/Luke6:47-Luke6:48); [MAT 12:50](https://ref.ly/Matt12:50) parallels [MRK 3:35](https://ref.ly/Mark3:35), [LUK 8:21](https://ref.ly/Luke8:21); [JHN 12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:26), [JHN 14:21](https://ref.ly/John14:21), [JHN 14:23](https://ref.ly/John14:23), [JHN 21:4–21:6](https://ref.ly/John21:4-John21:6); [1JN 2:17](https://ref.ly/1John2:17)

Obedience to the word of God
----------------------------

**[MAT 7:24–7:27](https://ref.ly/Matt7:24-Matt7:27)**; **[JAS 1:22](https://ref.ly/Jas1:22)** *See also* [PSA 119:9–119:11](https://ref.ly/Ps119:9-Ps119:11); [JON 3:3](https://ref.ly/Jonah3:3); [LUK 11:28](https://ref.ly/Luke11:28); [JHN 17:6](https://ref.ly/John17:6); [JAS 2:14–2:20](https://ref.ly/Jas2:14-Jas2:20)

Examples of people who obeyed God
---------------------------------

[GEN 6:9](https://ref.ly/Gen6:9) *Noah*; [GEN 12:1–12:4](https://ref.ly/Gen12:1-Gen12:4), [GEN 17:23](https://ref.ly/Gen17:23); [PSA 119:30](https://ref.ly/Ps119:30), [PSA 119:100–119:106](https://ref.ly/Ps119:100-Ps119:106); [ACT 4:19–4:20](https://ref.ly/Acts4:19-Acts4:20), [ACT 5:29](https://ref.ly/Acts5:29); [PHP 3:7–3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:7-Phil3:14) *Paul*

## 8455: obedience, of Jesus Christ (id: 8455)

## 8456: obedience, to human authorities (id: 8456)

Scripture teaches that all people, Christians included, should submit not only to God himself but also to divinely instituted secular authorities.

Obedience is owed to rulers
---------------------------

**[ROM 13:1–13:7](https://ref.ly/Rom13:1-Rom13:7)** *See also* [1TI 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1-1Tim2:3); [TIT 3:1](https://ref.ly/Titus3:1); [1PE 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13-1Pet2:14), [1PE 2:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:17)

### Jesus Christ expounds this principle

**[MRK 12:17](https://ref.ly/Mark12:17)** parallels [MAT 22:21](https://ref.ly/Matt22:21), [LUK 20:25](https://ref.ly/Luke20:25)

Obedience is owed to church leaders
-----------------------------------

**[HEB 13:17](https://ref.ly/Heb13:17)** *See also* [1PE 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:5)

Obedience is owed within the household
--------------------------------------

**[EPH 6:1–6:3](https://ref.ly/Eph6:1-Eph6:3)** *See also* [PRO 15:5](https://ref.ly/Prov15:5); [COL 3:20](https://ref.ly/Col3:20)

### Jesus Christ sets the example

**[LUK 2:51](https://ref.ly/Luke2:51)**

Obedience to secular authority is limited by obedience to God
-------------------------------------------------------------

**[ACT 5:29](https://ref.ly/Acts5:29)** *See also* [ACT 4:19](https://ref.ly/Acts4:19)

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 13:1-7; 1 Timothy 2:1-3; Titus 3:1; 1 Peter 2:13-14; 1 Peter 2:17; Mark 12:17; Matthew 22:21; Luke 20:25; Hebrews 13:17; 1 Peter 5:5; Ephesians 6:1-3; Proverbs 15:5; Colossians 3:20; Luke 2:51; Acts 5:29; Acts 4:19
* **Associated Articles:** 2036: Jesus Christ, humility of (ID: `2036@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2520: Jesus Christ, childhood of (ID: `2520@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5215: authority (ID: `5215@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5257: civil authorities (ID: `5257@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5359: justice (ID: `5359@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5375: law (ID: `5375@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5520: servants (ID: `5520@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5540: society (ID: `5540@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5668: children, responsibilities to parents (ID: `5668@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5959: submission (ID: `5959@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6224: rebellion, against human authority (ID: `6224@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8304: loyalty (ID: `8304@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8458: peacemakers (id: 8458)

The commendation of peacemakers
-------------------------------

**[MAT 5:9](https://ref.ly/Matt5:9)** *See also* [PRO 12:20](https://ref.ly/Prov12:20); [ROM 14:19](https://ref.ly/Rom14:19)

The importance of pursuing peace
--------------------------------

[ECC 10:4](https://ref.ly/Eccl10:4); ; [ROM 12:18](https://ref.ly/Rom12:18); ; [TIT 1:6](https://ref.ly/Titus1:6); ; [HEB 12:14](https://ref.ly/Heb12:14); ; [JAS 3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:17)

Examples of peacemakers
-----------------------

[GEN 13:8–13:9](https://ref.ly/Gen13:8-Gen13:9) *Abraham*; ; [1SA 25:14–25:31](https://ref.ly/1Sam25:14-1Sam25:31) *Abigail*; ; [EST 10:3](https://ref.ly/Esth10:3) *Mordecai*; ; [ISA 53:5](https://ref.ly/Isa53:5) *the suffering servant*

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 5:9; Proverbs 12:20; Romans 14:19; Ecclesiastes 10:4; Romans 12:18; Titus 1:6; Hebrews 12:14; James 3:17; Genesis 13:8-9; 1 Samuel 25:14-31; Esther 10:3; Isaiah 53:5
* **Associated Articles:** 1620: beatitudes, the (ID: `1620@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3215: Holy Spirit, and peace (ID: `3215@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5834: disagreement (ID: `5834@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6684: mediator (ID: `6684@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6700: peace (ID: `6700@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6716: reconciliation (ID: `6716@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6754: union with Christ (ID: `6754@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8459: perseverance (id: 8459)

Enduring in a course of action or belief. In its negative sense, it can mean being stubborn; in its positive sense, it means continuing commitment to the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Human perseverance in sin
-------------------------

**[2KI 17:41](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:41)**; **[ISA 1:5](https://ref.ly/Isa1:5)**; **[ROM 1:32](https://ref.ly/Rom1:32)** *See also* [EXO 9:1–9:3](https://ref.ly/Exod9:1-Exod9:3); [DEU 29:19](https://ref.ly/Deut29:19); [JDG 14:17](https://ref.ly/Judg14:17); [2KI 13:11](https://ref.ly/2Kgs13:11); [DAN 12:10](https://ref.ly/Dan12:10)

God's perseverance in calling Israel to obedience
-------------------------------------------------

**[NEH 9:30–9:31](https://ref.ly/Neh9:30-Neh9:31)** *See also* [EXO 32:14](https://ref.ly/Exod32:14); [1KI 3:6](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:6); [ISA 40:28](https://ref.ly/Isa40:28); [JER 26:13](https://ref.ly/Jer26:13); [JON 3:10](https://ref.ly/Jonah3:10)

Jesus Christ's perseverance with those who would not believe
------------------------------------------------------------

**[HEB 12:1–12:3](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1-Heb12:3)** *See also* [MAT 17:17](https://ref.ly/Matt17:17) parallel [MRK 9:19](https://ref.ly/Mark9:19); [2TH 3:5](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:5)

Christians' perseverance in faith
---------------------------------

**[COL 2:6–2:7](https://ref.ly/Col2:6-Col2:7), [COL 1:10–1:12](https://ref.ly/Col1:10-Col1:12)** *See also* [MAT 24:12–24:13](https://ref.ly/Matt24:12-Matt24:13), [MAT 10:22](https://ref.ly/Matt10:22); [JHN 15:4–15:10](https://ref.ly/John15:4-John15:10); [ROM 11:22](https://ref.ly/Rom11:22); [1CO 1:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:8); [2CO 10:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:15); [PHP 2:12](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12); [COL 1:23](https://ref.ly/Col1:23); [2TH 3:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:4); [HEB 6:1](https://ref.ly/Heb6:1), [HEB 10:36–10:38](https://ref.ly/Heb10:36-Heb10:38); [2PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:18)

### Perseverance in prayer

**[LUK 18:1–18:8](https://ref.ly/Luke18:1-Luke18:8)** *See also* [LUK 11:5–11:13](https://ref.ly/Luke11:5-Luke11:13); [ROM 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rom12:12); [EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18); [1TH 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:17)

Perseverance arises from suffering
----------------------------------

**[ROM 5:3](https://ref.ly/Rom5:3)** *See also* [ROM 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rom12:12); [2CO 1:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:6); [2TH 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:4); [2TI 3:10–3:11](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:10-2Tim3:11); [JAS 1:2–1:3](https://ref.ly/Jas1:2-Jas1:3); [1PE 4:19](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:19); [REV 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Rev2:2-Rev2:3), [REV 2:19](https://ref.ly/Rev2:19)

Perseverance builds and demonstrates Christian character
--------------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 5:4](https://ref.ly/Rom5:4)** *See also* [1CO 13:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:7); [2CO 1:21–1:22](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:21-2Cor1:22), [2CO 12:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:12); [JAS 1:4](https://ref.ly/Jas1:4); [2PE 1:5–1:8](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:8)

Encouragements for Christians to persevere
------------------------------------------

## 8460: pleasing God (id: 8460)

An essential aspect of the life of believers that is more than a matter of external observance, but a total and heartfelt commitment to God.

Pleasing God is commanded
-------------------------

**[ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)**; **[EPH 5:8–5:10](https://ref.ly/Eph5:8-Eph5:10)** *See also* [2CO 5:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:9); [GAL 6:8](https://ref.ly/Gal6:8); [COL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:10), [COL 3:20](https://ref.ly/Col3:20); [1TH 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:1); [1TI 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1-1Tim2:3), [1TI 5:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:4)

It is more important to please God than to please people
--------------------------------------------------------

[GAL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Gal1:10), [GAL 1:15–1:16](https://ref.ly/Gal1:15-Gal1:16); ; [1TH 2:4](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:4)

Pleasing God involves inward attitudes, not simply external observance
----------------------------------------------------------------------

**[1CH 29:17](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:17)**; **[PSA 51:16–51:17](https://ref.ly/Ps51:16-Ps51:17)**; **[ROM 14:17–14:18](https://ref.ly/Rom14:17-Rom14:18)** *See also* [PSA 5:4](https://ref.ly/Ps5:4), [PSA 69:30–69:31](https://ref.ly/Ps69:30-Ps69:31), [PSA 147:10–147:11](https://ref.ly/Ps147:10-Ps147:11), [PSA 149:4](https://ref.ly/Ps149:4); [PRO 11:20](https://ref.ly/Prov11:20), [PRO 12:22](https://ref.ly/Prov12:22), [PRO 15:8](https://ref.ly/Prov15:8); [ECC 5:4](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:4); [ISA 1:11–1:13](https://ref.ly/Isa1:11-Isa1:13); [EZK 18:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:23), [EZK 33:11](https://ref.ly/Ezek33:11); [HAG 1:7](https://ref.ly/Hag1:7); [MAL 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/Mal2:13-Mal2:14); [ROM 8:8](https://ref.ly/Rom8:8); [GAL 1:10](https://ref.ly/Gal1:10); [1TH 2:4](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:4); [HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)

Sacrifices and duties please God when carried out with the right attitude
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[EXO 29:18](https://ref.ly/Exod29:18)**; **[PHP 4:18](https://ref.ly/Phil4:18)** *See also* [EXO 29:25](https://ref.ly/Exod29:25), [EXO 29:41](https://ref.ly/Exod29:41); [LEV 1:9](https://ref.ly/Lev1:9), [LEV 3:5](https://ref.ly/Lev3:5); [NUM 15:3](https://ref.ly/Num15:3), [NUM 29:2](https://ref.ly/Num29:2); [EZR 6:10](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:10); [HEB 13:16](https://ref.ly/Heb13:16)

Results of pleasing God
-----------------------

**[PSA 37:23](https://ref.ly/Ps37:23)** *See also* [1KI 10:9](https://ref.ly/1Kgs10:9); [JOB 33:26](https://ref.ly/Job33:26); [PRO 16:7](https://ref.ly/Prov16:7); [ECC 2:26](https://ref.ly/Eccl2:26), [ECC 7:26](https://ref.ly/Eccl7:26)

Examples of actions that please God
-----------------------------------

### Prayer

**[PRO 15:8](https://ref.ly/Prov15:8)**

### Doing God's will

**[HEB 13:20–13:21](https://ref.ly/Heb13:20-Heb13:21)** *See also* [MAT 7:21](https://ref.ly/Matt7:21); [EPH 6:6](https://ref.ly/Eph6:6); [1JN 2:17](https://ref.ly/1John2:17)

Examples of those concerned to pleased God by their actions
-----------------------------------------------------------

Examples of people who pleased God
----------------------------------

## 8461: priorities (id: 8461)

Scripture stresses that God must be allowed to rule at the heart of a person's life.

* **Associated Articles:** 8462: priority, of God (ID: `8462@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8463: priority, of faith, hope and love (ID: `8463@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8462: priority, of God (id: 8462)

Scripture provides examples of individuals who have allowed God to take priority in their lives, and also of those who have allowed something or someone else to take priority.

God's glory made a priority
---------------------------

**[MAT 6:9](https://ref.ly/Matt6:9)**

### Commands to put God first

**[MAT 4:10](https://ref.ly/Matt4:10)** parallel [LUK 4:8](https://ref.ly/Luke4:8) *See also* [DEU 6:13](https://ref.ly/Deut6:13); [1CH 16:29](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:29)

### Examples of putting God first

[GEN 5:22](https://ref.ly/Gen5:22), [GEN 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gen5:24) *Enoch*; ; [GEN 6:9](https://ref.ly/Gen6:9) *Noah*; ; [GEN 12:4](https://ref.ly/Gen12:4) *Abraham*; ; [JOS 24:15](https://ref.ly/Josh24:15) *Joshua*; ; [2KI 20:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs20:3) *Hezekiah*; ; [DAN 3:16–3:18](https://ref.ly/Dan3:16-Dan3:18) *Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego*; ; [DAN 6:10](https://ref.ly/Dan6:10) *Daniel*; ; [JHN 3:29–3:30](https://ref.ly/John3:29-John3:30) *John the Baptist*

### Disapproval of not putting God first

**[EXO 20:3](https://ref.ly/Exod20:3)** *See also* [LUK 16:13](https://ref.ly/Luke16:13)

### Examples of not putting God first

**[ACT 12:22–12:23](https://ref.ly/Acts12:22-Acts12:23)** *See also* [1KI 11:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:4) *Solomon*; [1KI 15:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:3) *Abijah*; [2CH 25:2](https://ref.ly/2Chr25:2) *Amaziah*; [JER 3:10](https://ref.ly/Jer3:10) *Judah*; [ACT 5:1–5:5](https://ref.ly/Acts5:1-Acts5:5) *Ananias and Sapphira*; [ROM 16:17–16:18](https://ref.ly/Rom16:17-Rom16:18)

### Worship commended as the highest human activity

**[PSA 95:6](https://ref.ly/Ps95:6)** *See also* [PSA 96:9](https://ref.ly/Ps96:9), [PSA 99:5](https://ref.ly/Ps99:5); [ZEC 14:17](https://ref.ly/Zech14:17); [JHN 4:24](https://ref.ly/John4:24)

### Outstanding examples of worship

**[2SA 6:14–6:15](https://ref.ly/2Sam6:14-2Sam6:15)** *David was prepared to be despised by his wife rather than inhibit his worship.* *See also* [EXO 3:6](https://ref.ly/Exod3:6); [ISA 6:3](https://ref.ly/Isa6:3); [EZK 1:28](https://ref.ly/Ezek1:28); [DAN 6:10](https://ref.ly/Dan6:10); [JHN 9:38](https://ref.ly/John9:38); [REV 1:17](https://ref.ly/Rev1:17)

God's kingdom made a priority
-----------------------------

**[MAT 6:10](https://ref.ly/Matt6:10)**

### Commands to participate in the kingdom

**[MAT 6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:33)** *See also* [LUK 19:11–19:27](https://ref.ly/Luke19:11-Luke19:27)

### Examples of wholehearted participation

**[ACT 26:19](https://ref.ly/Acts26:19)** *See also* [HEB 6:12](https://ref.ly/Heb6:12), [HEB 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1-Heb12:2)

### Warning against half\-hearted participation

[REV 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/Rev2:4-Rev2:5)

### Sacrifices for the kingdom advocated

**[REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10)** *See also* [MAT 5:29](https://ref.ly/Matt5:29) parallel [MRK 9:47](https://ref.ly/Mark9:47); [MAT 18:8](https://ref.ly/Matt18:8)

### Examples of sacrifices for the kingdom

**[HEB 11:26](https://ref.ly/Heb11:26)** *See also* [2CO 11:23–11:30](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:23-2Cor11:30); [PHP 2:21–2:22](https://ref.ly/Phil2:21-Phil2:22), [PHP 2:30](https://ref.ly/Phil2:30); [REV 2:13](https://ref.ly/Rev2:13)

God's will made a priority
--------------------------

**[MAT 6:10](https://ref.ly/Matt6:10)**

### Conformity to God's will commanded

**[EPH 5:17](https://ref.ly/Eph5:17)** *See also* [1TH 4:3](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:3), [1TH 5:18](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:18); [HEB 13:20–13:21](https://ref.ly/Heb13:20-Heb13:21); [JAS 4:15](https://ref.ly/Jas4:15)

### Outstanding examples of conformity to God's will

**[MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39)** parallels [MRK 14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:36), [LUK 22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42) *See also* [JHN 4:34](https://ref.ly/John4:34), [JHN 6:38](https://ref.ly/John6:38); [ACT 20:22–20:24](https://ref.ly/Acts20:22-Acts20:24)

## 8463: priority, of faith, hope and love (id: 8463)

Putting God first\-\-living according to his word\-\-serves the glory of God and also the best interests of believers, by giving them true wisdom for daily living.

The wisdom of making faith a priority
-------------------------------------

**[HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)**

### Putting the fear of God before other considerations

**[PSA 31:19](https://ref.ly/Ps31:19)** *See also* [EXO 1:17](https://ref.ly/Exod1:17); [NEH 5:15](https://ref.ly/Neh5:15); [PRO 1:7](https://ref.ly/Prov1:7)

### Preferring God's way to sinful advice

**[PSA 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Ps1:1-Ps1:2)** [PRO 3:13–3:14](https://ref.ly/Prov3:13-Prov3:14), [PRO 8:19](https://ref.ly/Prov8:19), [PRO 8:32](https://ref.ly/Prov8:32); [NUM 31:16](https://ref.ly/Num31:16); ; [1KI 12:28](https://ref.ly/1Kgs12:28)

### Choosing imaginative action rather than laziness or fearfulness

**[NUM 13:30](https://ref.ly/Num13:30)** *See also* [1SA 25:33](https://ref.ly/1Sam25:33); [EPH 5:16](https://ref.ly/Eph5:16)MAT [25:10](https://ref.ly/Eph25:10), [MAT 25:26–25:27](https://ref.ly/Matt25:26-Matt25:27), [MAT 25:44–25:45](https://ref.ly/Matt25:44-Matt25:45), [MAT 26:40](https://ref.ly/Matt26:40)

### Patient waiting rather than impetuous action

**[PSA 40:1](https://ref.ly/Ps40:1)** *See also* [PSA 27:14](https://ref.ly/Ps27:14), [PSA 37:5–37:6](https://ref.ly/Ps37:5-Ps37:6), [PSA 62:5](https://ref.ly/Ps62:5), [PSA 123:2](https://ref.ly/Ps123:2); [PRO 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Prov3:5-Prov3:6); [ISA 40:31](https://ref.ly/Isa40:31); [HOS 12:6](https://ref.ly/Hos12:6); [JHN 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/John2:4-John2:5); [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10)

The wisdom of making hope a priority
------------------------------------

**[HEB 6:19](https://ref.ly/Heb6:19)** *See also* [PSA 147:10–147:11](https://ref.ly/Ps147:10-Ps147:11)

### Putting true riches above earthly wealth

**[LUK 16:9](https://ref.ly/Luke16:9)** *See also* [DEU 15:8](https://ref.ly/Deut15:8); [MAT 6:24](https://ref.ly/Matt6:24), [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21) parallels [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21), [LUK 18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22); [MAT 19:29](https://ref.ly/Matt19:29) parallels [MRK 10:29–10:30](https://ref.ly/Mark10:29-Mark10:30), [LUK 18:29–18:30](https://ref.ly/Luke18:29-Luke18:30); [HEB 11:26](https://ref.ly/Heb11:26)

### Putting eternal joy before temporal hardship

**[2CO 4:17–4:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:17-2Cor4:18)** *See also* [ACT 14:22](https://ref.ly/Acts14:22), [ACT 16:25](https://ref.ly/Acts16:25); [ROM 8:18](https://ref.ly/Rom8:18); [2TI 2:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:10); [HEB 10:34](https://ref.ly/Heb10:34)

The wisdom of making love a priority
------------------------------------

**[1CO 13:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:13)** *Paul's concern that love, rather than competition over spiritual gifts, should be made a priority.*

### Loyalty rather than opportunism

**[PRO 18:24](https://ref.ly/Prov18:24)** *See also* [RUT 1:16](https://ref.ly/Ruth1:16); [2TI 4:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:10) *Demas' love for this world rather than loyalty*

### Following the Spirit rather than sinful human nature

**[GAL 5:16](https://ref.ly/Gal5:16)** *Merely “human” activity betrays a failure of love for God.* *See also* [PSA 147:10–147:11](https://ref.ly/Ps147:10-Ps147:11); [ISA 31:1–31:3](https://ref.ly/Isa31:1-Isa31:3); [ROM 8:5](https://ref.ly/Rom8:5)

### Inner sincerity rather than outward appearance

**[ROM 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rom12:9)** *See also* [1SA 16:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:7); [EPH 6:5](https://ref.ly/Eph6:5); [COL 3:22](https://ref.ly/Col3:22)

### Actions rather than mere words

**[JAS 2:18](https://ref.ly/Jas2:18)** *See also* [MAT 7:21–7:22](https://ref.ly/Matt7:21-Matt7:22); [1JN 3:18](https://ref.ly/1John3:18)

### Peace rather than disharmony

**[ROM 12:18](https://ref.ly/Rom12:18)** *See also* [ROM 14:19](https://ref.ly/Rom14:19); [HEB 12:14](https://ref.ly/Heb12:14)

### Truth rather than falsehood

**[PRO 12:19](https://ref.ly/Prov12:19)** *See also* [ACT 5:4](https://ref.ly/Acts5:4); [COL 3:9](https://ref.ly/Col3:9)

* **Associated Passages:** Hebrews 11:6; Psalms 31:19; Exodus 1:17; Nehemiah 5:15; Proverbs 1:7; Psalms 1:1-2; Proverbs 3:13-14; Proverbs 8:19; Proverbs 8:32; Numbers 31:16; 1 Kings 12:28; Numbers 13:30; 1 Samuel 25:33; Ephesians 5:16; Ephesians 25:10; Matthew 25:26-27; Matthew 25:44-45; Matthew 26:40; Psalms 40:1; Psalms 27:14; Psalms 37:5-6; Psalms 62:5; Psalms 123:2; Proverbs 3:5-6; Isaiah 40:31; Hosea 12:6; John 2:4-5; Revelation 2:10; Hebrews 6:19; Psalms 147:10-11; Luke 16:9; Deuteronomy 15:8; Matthew 6:24; Matthew 19:21; Mark 10:21; Luke 18:22; Matthew 19:29; Mark 10:29-30; Luke 18:29-30; Hebrews 11:26; 2 Corinthians 4:17-18; Acts 14:22; Acts 16:25; Romans 8:18; 2 Timothy 2:10; Hebrews 10:34; 1 Corinthians 13:13; Proverbs 18:24; Ruth 1:16; 2 Timothy 4:10; Galatians 5:16; Isaiah 31:1-3; Romans 8:5; Romans 12:9; 1 Samuel 16:7; Ephesians 6:5; Colossians 3:22; James 2:18; Matthew 7:21-22; 1 John 3:18; Romans 12:18; Romans 14:19; Hebrews 12:14; Proverbs 12:19; Acts 5:4; Colossians 3:9
* **Associated Articles:** 1460: truth (ID: `1460@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5569: suffering, hardship (ID: `5569@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6166: flesh, sinful nature (ID: `6166@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6644: eternal life (ID: `6644@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8020: faith (ID: `8020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8030: trust (ID: `8030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8283: joy (ID: `8283@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8292: love (ID: `8292@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8318: patience (ID: `8318@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8335: reverence, and blessing (ID: `8335@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8808: riches (ID: `8808@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9610: hope (ID: `9610@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8465: progress (id: 8465)

The process of development and growth, of special importance in the life of believers. Scripture stresses the importance of progress, both of the individual believer and of the church, and the need to work towards that goal.

Progress in the Christian life should be expected
-------------------------------------------------

**[2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18)**; **[EPH 4:15](https://ref.ly/Eph4:15)** *See also* [JOB 17:9](https://ref.ly/Job17:9); [PSA 84:5](https://ref.ly/Ps84:5), [PSA 84:7](https://ref.ly/Ps84:7), [PSA 92:12](https://ref.ly/Ps92:12); [PRO 4:18](https://ref.ly/Prov4:18); [ROM 8:29–8:30](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29-Rom8:30)

Believers are to strive for progress in their Christian lives
-------------------------------------------------------------

**[PHP 2:12](https://ref.ly/Phil2:12)** *See also* [PSA 18:29](https://ref.ly/Ps18:29); [1CO 9:24–9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:24-1Cor9:27); [PHP 3:12–3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:12-Phil3:14); [1TH 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:12); [2TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3); [1TI 4:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:15); [HEB 6:1](https://ref.ly/Heb6:1); [1PE 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:2); [2PE 1:5–1:8](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:5-2Pet1:8), [2PE 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:18)

Progress in the Christian life brings assurance
-----------------------------------------------

**[HEB 3:14](https://ref.ly/Heb3:14)** *See also* [MAT 10:22](https://ref.ly/Matt10:22) parallel [MRK 13:13](https://ref.ly/Mark13:13); [MAT 24:13](https://ref.ly/Matt24:13); [HEB 6:9–6:11](https://ref.ly/Heb6:9-Heb6:11)

The church is expected to progress
----------------------------------

**[MAT 16:18](https://ref.ly/Matt16:18), [MAT 13:31–13:32](https://ref.ly/Matt13:31-Matt13:32)** parallels [MRK 4:30–4:32](https://ref.ly/Mark4:30-Mark4:32), [LUK 13:18–13:19](https://ref.ly/Luke13:18-Luke13:19)**[EPH 4:16](https://ref.ly/Eph4:16)** *See also* [ACT 2:47](https://ref.ly/Acts2:47), [ACT 4:4](https://ref.ly/Acts4:4), [ACT 5:14](https://ref.ly/Acts5:14), [ACT 6:7](https://ref.ly/Acts6:7), [ACT 11:21](https://ref.ly/Acts11:21)

* **Associated Passages:** 2 Corinthians 3:18; Ephesians 4:15; Job 17:9; Psalms 84:5; Psalms 84:7; Psalms 92:12; Proverbs 4:18; Romans 8:29-30; Philippians 2:12; Psalms 18:29; 1 Corinthians 9:24-27; Philippians 3:12-14; 1 Thessalonians 3:12; 2 Thessalonians 1:3; 1 Timothy 4:15; Hebrews 6:1; 1 Peter 2:2; 2 Peter 1:5-8; 2 Peter 3:18; Hebrews 3:14; Matthew 10:22; Mark 13:13; Matthew 24:13; Hebrews 6:9-11; Matthew 16:18; Matthew 13:31-32; Mark 4:30-32; Luke 13:18-19; Ephesians 4:16; Acts 2:47; Acts 4:4; Acts 5:14; Acts 6:7; Acts 11:21
* **Associated Articles:** 4450: fruit (ID: `4450@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4971: seasons, of life (ID: `4971@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5787: ambition, positive aspects of (ID: `5787@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5902: maturity (ID: `5902@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6744: sanctification (ID: `6744@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7020: church, the (ID: `7020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8026: faith, growth in (ID: `8026@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8104: assurance (ID: `8104@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8162: spiritual vitality (ID: `8162@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8266: holiness (ID: `8266@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8347: spiritual growth (ID: `8347@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8443: growth (ID: `8443@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8466: reformation (id: 8466)

The process of bringing religious practices and beliefs back into line with the word of God. The OT portrays Israel as requiring reformation at several points in her history. God's people continue to need to review their beliefs and practices in the light of God's word.

The continual need to turn from idolatry
----------------------------------------

**[1SA 7:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:3)** *Idolatry was the besetting sin of Israel and the point at which all reforms had to begin.* *See also* [GEN 35:2](https://ref.ly/Gen35:2); [JOS 24:14–24:24](https://ref.ly/Josh24:14-Josh24:24); [JDG 6:25–6:27](https://ref.ly/Judg6:25-Judg6:27); [2KI 10:18–10:27](https://ref.ly/2Kgs10:18-2Kgs10:27), [2KI 11:17–11:18](https://ref.ly/2Kgs11:17-2Kgs11:18) parallel [2CH 23:16–23:17](https://ref.ly/2Chr23:16-2Chr23:17); [2CH 19:3](https://ref.ly/2Chr19:3), [2CH 33:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr33:15); [1CO 10:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:14); [1JN 5:21](https://ref.ly/1John5:21)

The reform of Asa
-----------------

### He removed idols

[1KI 15:12–15:13](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:12-1Kgs15:13)

### He repaired the altar of the temple

[2CH 15:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:8), [2CH 15:18](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:18)

### As a result the people sought and found God

[2CH 15:9–15:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:9-2Chr15:15)

The reform of Hezekiah
----------------------

### He removed idols and even local shrines dedicated to God

[2KI 18:4](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:4) parallel [2CH 31:1](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:1)

### He established worship in the renovated and consecrated temple

[2CH 29:3–29:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:3-2Chr29:7), [2CH 29:15–29:28](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:15-2Chr29:28)

### The covenant between God and his people was renewed

[2CH 29:10–29:11](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:10-2Chr29:11), [2CH 29:29–29:31](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:29-2Chr29:31), [2CH 30:1–30:27](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:1-2Chr30:27), [2CH 31:2–31:19](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:2-2Chr31:19)

The reform of Josiah
--------------------

### He repaired the temple

[2KI 22:3–22:7](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:3-2Kgs22:7) parallel [2CH 34:8–34:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:8-2Chr34:13)

### He ended false worship

[2KI 23:4–23:24](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:4-2Kgs23:24) parallel [2CH 34:3–34:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:3-2Chr34:7); ; [2CH 34:33](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:33)

### The results of Josiah's reform

[2KI 22:11–22:20](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:11-2Kgs22:20) parallel [2CH 34:19–34:28](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:19-2Chr34:28) *The prevailing attitude was that God would ensure that no disaster would befall his chosen people. Now the need to turn from sin and complacency was reiterated and repentance ensued*; ; [2KI 23:1–23:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:1-2Kgs23:3) parallel [2CH 34:29–34:32](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:29-2Chr34:32); ; [2KI 23:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:3) parallel [2CH 34:31–34:32](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:31-2Chr34:32); ; [2KI 23:21–23:23](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:21-2Kgs23:23) parallel [2CH 35:1–35:19](https://ref.ly/2Chr35:1-2Chr35:19)

The reforms of Ezra and Nehemiah
--------------------------------

### The problem of intermarriage was dealt with

**[EZR 10:2–10:3](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:2-Ezra10:3)** *The objection to intermarriage was based on religious not racial grounds. It led to a corruption of the faith.* *See also* [EZR 9:1–9:15](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:1-Ezra9:15), [EZR 10:5–10:17](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:5-Ezra10:17); [NEH 13:23–13:27](https://ref.ly/Neh13:23-Neh13:27)

### The temple was purified

[NEH 13:4–13:13](https://ref.ly/Neh13:4-Neh13:13)

### The Sabbath\-rest was reaffirmed

**[NEH 13:15](https://ref.ly/Neh13:15)** *See also* [NEH 13:16–13:22](https://ref.ly/Neh13:16-Neh13:22)

Incomplete reforms
------------------

**[2KI 10:28–10:29](https://ref.ly/2Kgs10:28-2Kgs10:29)** *See also* [1KI 15:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:14) parallel [2CH 15:17](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:17); [2KI 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs3:2-2Kgs3:3), [2KI 12:2–12:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs12:2-2Kgs12:3)

The call to reform
------------------

### To Israel

**[JER 7:3](https://ref.ly/Jer7:3)** *See also* [2CH 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:14); [ISA 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Isa1:16-Isa1:17), [ISA 55:6–55:7](https://ref.ly/Isa55:6-Isa55:7); [JER 18:11](https://ref.ly/Jer18:11), [JER 26:13](https://ref.ly/Jer26:13), [JER 35:15](https://ref.ly/Jer35:15); [ZEC 1:3](https://ref.ly/Zech1:3); [ACT 3:19–3:26](https://ref.ly/Acts3:19-Acts3:26)

### To the church

**[REV 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/Rev3:2-Rev3:3)** *See also* [1CO 5:1–5:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:1-1Cor5:13); [REV 2:5](https://ref.ly/Rev2:5), [REV 3:15–3:20](https://ref.ly/Rev3:15-Rev3:20)

### To individuals

**[JAS 1:21](https://ref.ly/Jas1:21)** *See also* [ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2); [2CO 6:14–7:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:14-2Cor7:1); [EPH 4:22–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22-Eph4:24); [COL 3:5–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:5-Col3:10); [JAS 1:22–1:25](https://ref.ly/Jas1:22-Jas1:25), [JAS 4:7–4:10](https://ref.ly/Jas4:7-Jas4:10)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Samuel 7:3; Genesis 35:2; Joshua 24:14-24; Judges 6:25-27; 2 Kings 10:18-27; 2 Kings 11:17-18; 2 Chronicles 23:16-17; 2 Chronicles 19:3; 2 Chronicles 33:15; 1 Corinthians 10:14; 1 John 5:21; 1 Kings 15:12-13; 2 Chronicles 15:8; 2 Chronicles 15:18; 2 Chronicles 15:9-15; 2 Kings 18:4; 2 Chronicles 31:1; 2 Chronicles 29:3-7; 2 Chronicles 29:15-28; 2 Chronicles 29:10-11; 2 Chronicles 29:29-31; 2 Chronicles 30:1-27; 2 Chronicles 31:2-19; 2 Kings 22:3-7; 2 Chronicles 34:8-13; 2 Kings 23:4-24; 2 Chronicles 34:3-7; 2 Chronicles 34:33; 2 Kings 22:11-20; 2 Chronicles 34:19-28; 2 Kings 23:1-3; 2 Chronicles 34:29-32; 2 Kings 23:3; 2 Chronicles 34:31-32; 2 Kings 23:21-23; 2 Chronicles 35:1-19; Ezra 10:2-3; Ezra 9:1-15; Ezra 10:5-17; Nehemiah 13:23-27; Nehemiah 13:4-13; Nehemiah 13:15; Nehemiah 13:16-22; 2 Kings 10:28-29; 1 Kings 15:14; 2 Chronicles 15:17; 2 Kings 3:2-3; 2 Kings 12:2-3; Jeremiah 7:3; 2 Chronicles 7:14; Isaiah 1:16-17; Isaiah 55:6-7; Jeremiah 18:11; Jeremiah 26:13; Jeremiah 35:15; Zechariah 1:3; Acts 3:19-26; Revelation 3:2-3; 1 Corinthians 5:1-13; Revelation 2:5; Revelation 3:15-20; James 1:21; Romans 12:2; 2 Corinthians 6:14-7:1; Ephesians 4:22-24; Colossians 3:5-10; James 1:22-25; James 4:7-10

## 8467: reminders (id: 8467)

The means of calling to mind important matters or events. Scripture stresses the importance of being reminded of God's dealings with his people in the past.

The importance of being reminded of God's words and deeds
---------------------------------------------------------

**[1CO 15:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:1)**; **[2PE 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:12)** *See also* [2PE 3:1](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:1)

Reminders of God's covenant and faithfulness
--------------------------------------------

**[GEN 9:12–9:16](https://ref.ly/Gen9:12-Gen9:16)** *See also* [GEN 17:9–17:14](https://ref.ly/Gen17:9-Gen17:14)

Reminders of God's intervention in history
------------------------------------------

**[JUD 1:5](https://ref.ly/Jude1:5)** *See also* [EXO 12:14–12:20](https://ref.ly/Exod12:14-Exod12:20) parallel [DEU 16:1–16:8](https://ref.ly/Deut16:1-Deut16:8); [EXO 13:3–13:10](https://ref.ly/Exod13:3-Exod13:10), [EXO 17:14](https://ref.ly/Exod17:14); [1CO 11:23–11:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:23-1Cor11:26); [2PE 1:12–1:16](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:12-2Pet1:16)

Reminders to people of their sin or shortcomings
------------------------------------------------

**[HEB 10:3–10:4](https://ref.ly/Heb10:3-Heb10:4)** *See also* [GEN 41:9](https://ref.ly/Gen41:9); [EXO 30:16](https://ref.ly/Exod30:16); [NUM 5:11–5:15](https://ref.ly/Num5:11-Num5:15); [EZK 29:16](https://ref.ly/Ezek29:16)

Reminders to people to be faithful to God
-----------------------------------------

**[NUM 15:38–15:40](https://ref.ly/Num15:38-Num15:40)** *See also* [ROM 11:22](https://ref.ly/Rom11:22); [HEB 12:1–12:3](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1-Heb12:3); [2PE 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:1-2Pet3:2)

Reminders to people of their potential and gifts from God
---------------------------------------------------------

**[2TI 1:6](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:6)** *See also* [1TI 4:14](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:14)

Reminders to God's people on matters of faith and conduct
---------------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 15:15](https://ref.ly/Rom15:15)** *See also* [DEU 31:9–31:13](https://ref.ly/Deut31:9-Deut31:13); [1CO 4:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:17), [1CO 15:1–15:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:1-1Cor15:2); [TIT 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Titus3:1-Titus3:2)

## 8468: renunciation (id: 8468)

The deliberate rejection or disavowal, especially of a person or object.

Renunciation of the LORD
------------------------

**[JDG 2:12](https://ref.ly/Judg2:12)**; **[ISA 1:28](https://ref.ly/Isa1:28)**; **[ACT 3:13](https://ref.ly/Acts3:13)** *See also* [EXO 32:8](https://ref.ly/Exod32:8); [JOS 22:16](https://ref.ly/Josh22:16); [2KI 22:17](https://ref.ly/2Kgs22:17); [1CH 28:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:9); [JER 5:19](https://ref.ly/Jer5:19); [MAT 24:10](https://ref.ly/Matt24:10); [2TI 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:12)

Renunciation of evil
--------------------

### In repentance

**[PSA 37:27](https://ref.ly/Ps37:27)** *See also* [JER 35:15](https://ref.ly/Jer35:15); [EZK 14:6](https://ref.ly/Ezek14:6); [DAN 4:27](https://ref.ly/Dan4:27); [2CO 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:2); [1TI 6:20](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:20)

### To find God's mercy

**[2CH 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:14)** *See also* [PRO 28:13](https://ref.ly/Prov28:13); [EZK 18:21](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:21); [JON 3:10](https://ref.ly/Jonah3:10)

Self\-renunciation and the Christian life
-----------------------------------------

### An integral part of discipleship

**[MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24)** parallels [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34), [LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23) *See also* [MRK 10:28](https://ref.ly/Mark10:28); [LUK 5:28](https://ref.ly/Luke5:28), [LUK 14:33](https://ref.ly/Luke14:33); [PHP 3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8)

### The example of Jesus Christ

**[MRK 10:45](https://ref.ly/Mark10:45)** *See also* [JHN 10:17](https://ref.ly/John10:17); [PHP 2:7–2:8](https://ref.ly/Phil2:7-Phil2:8)

## 8469: respect (id: 8469)

An attitude of reverence and deference, reflecting an appreciation of the significance of the person or thing that is esteemed.

* **Associated Articles:** 8470: respect, for God's character (ID: `8470@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8471: respect, for human beings (ID: `8471@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8472: respect, for environment (ID: `8472@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8470: respect, for God's character (id: 8470)

God's revelation of himself calls for deference, honour and a response of right living.

Respect for God's name
----------------------

**[PSA 29:2](https://ref.ly/Ps29:2)** *See also* [EXO 20:7](https://ref.ly/Exod20:7) parallel [DEU 5:11](https://ref.ly/Deut5:11); [EXO 23:20–23:21](https://ref.ly/Exod23:20-Exod23:21); [LEV 18:21](https://ref.ly/Lev18:21), [LEV 19:12](https://ref.ly/Lev19:12), [LEV 22:31–22:33](https://ref.ly/Lev22:31-Lev22:33), [LEV 24:10–24:16](https://ref.ly/Lev24:10-Lev24:16); [PSA 86:9–86:11](https://ref.ly/Ps86:9-Ps86:11); [JER 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/Jer3:16-Jer3:17); [MAL 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/Mal2:1-Mal2:2)

Respect for God's presence
--------------------------

**[EXO 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Exod3:5-Exod3:6)** *See also* [EXO 33:19–33:23](https://ref.ly/Exod33:19-Exod33:23); [PSA 89:7](https://ref.ly/Ps89:7); [ISA 6:1–6:5](https://ref.ly/Isa6:1-Isa6:5); [ZEP 1:7](https://ref.ly/Zeph1:7); [ZEC 2:13](https://ref.ly/Zech2:13)

Respect for God's word
----------------------

**[DEU 4:2](https://ref.ly/Deut4:2)** *See also* [DEU 12:32](https://ref.ly/Deut12:32); [JOS 1:7–1:8](https://ref.ly/Josh1:7-Josh1:8); [PRO 30:5–30:6](https://ref.ly/Prov30:5-Prov30:6); [2PE 1:19–1:21](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:19-2Pet1:21); [REV 22:18–22:19](https://ref.ly/Rev22:18-Rev22:19)

Respect for God's ark and sanctuary
-----------------------------------

**[LEV 19:30](https://ref.ly/Lev19:30)** *See also* [1SA 6:19–6:20](https://ref.ly/1Sam6:19-1Sam6:20); [2SA 6:1–6:7](https://ref.ly/2Sam6:1-2Sam6:7); [ECC 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:1-Eccl5:2); [HAB 2:20](https://ref.ly/Hab2:20); [MAT 21:12–21:13](https://ref.ly/Matt21:12-Matt21:13) parallels [MRK 11:15–11:17](https://ref.ly/Mark11:15-Mark11:17), [LUK 19:45–19:46](https://ref.ly/Luke19:45-Luke19:46), [JHN 2:13–2:17](https://ref.ly/John2:13-John2:17); [JER 7:11](https://ref.ly/Jer7:11)

Respect for God's servants
--------------------------

**[1TH 5:12–5:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:12-1Thess5:13)** *See also* [ACT 23:1–23:5](https://ref.ly/Acts23:1-Acts23:5); [EXO 22:28](https://ref.ly/Exod22:28); [ACT 28:7–28:10](https://ref.ly/Acts28:7-Acts28:10); [PHP 2:29–2:30](https://ref.ly/Phil2:29-Phil2:30); [1TI 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17-1Tim5:18); [HEB 13:7](https://ref.ly/Heb13:7), [HEB 13:17](https://ref.ly/Heb13:17)

Respect for God leads to godly living
-------------------------------------

**[EXO 20:20](https://ref.ly/Exod20:20)** *See also* [2CH 6:30–6:31](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:30-2Chr6:31); [PRO 16:6](https://ref.ly/Prov16:6); [HEB 11:7](https://ref.ly/Heb11:7); [1PE 1:14–1:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:14-1Pet1:17)

## 8471: respect, for human beings (id: 8471)

Each individual, created in the image of God, should be honoured and esteemed, and this should be worked out in every area of life.

Human beings are to be respected
--------------------------------

### They are made in the image of God

**[GEN 9:5–9:6](https://ref.ly/Gen9:5-Gen9:6)** *See also* [PRO 14:31](https://ref.ly/Prov14:31), [PRO 17:5](https://ref.ly/Prov17:5); [COL 3:9–3:11](https://ref.ly/Col3:9-Col3:11); [JAS 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Jas3:9-Jas3:10)

### The bounds of life belong to God

**[EXO 20:13](https://ref.ly/Exod20:13)** parallel [DEU 5:17](https://ref.ly/Deut5:17) *See also* [EXO 21:22–21:25](https://ref.ly/Exod21:22-Exod21:25) *NIV footnote at verse 22*; [2SA 1:14–1:15](https://ref.ly/2Sam1:14-2Sam1:15), [2SA 4:9–4:12](https://ref.ly/2Sam4:9-2Sam4:12); [1KI 2:31–2:33](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:31-1Kgs2:33); [PSA 139:13–139:16](https://ref.ly/Ps139:13-Ps139:16)

### The equality and dignity of human beings is commanded

**[DEU 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Deut1:16-Deut1:17)** *See also* [EXO 23:2–23:3](https://ref.ly/Exod23:2-Exod23:3); [LEV 19:15](https://ref.ly/Lev19:15); [DEU 16:18–16:19](https://ref.ly/Deut16:18-Deut16:19); [PRO 24:23–24:25](https://ref.ly/Prov24:23-Prov24:25), [PRO 28:21](https://ref.ly/Prov28:21); [ACT 10:24–10:28](https://ref.ly/Acts10:24-Acts10:28), [ACT 10:34–10:35](https://ref.ly/Acts10:34-Acts10:35); [JAS 2:1–2:9](https://ref.ly/Jas2:1-Jas2:9); [1PE 2:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:17)

Respect in the family
---------------------

### Respect for parents is commanded

**[EXO 20:12](https://ref.ly/Exod20:12)** parallel [DEU 5:16](https://ref.ly/Deut5:16) *See also* [LEV 19:3](https://ref.ly/Lev19:3); [PRO 1:8](https://ref.ly/Prov1:8); [MAL 1:6](https://ref.ly/Mal1:6); [MAT 15:4–15:6](https://ref.ly/Matt15:4-Matt15:6) parallel [MRK 7:10–7:13](https://ref.ly/Mark7:10-Mark7:13); [MAT 19:19](https://ref.ly/Matt19:19) parallel [LUK 18:20](https://ref.ly/Luke18:20); [EPH 6:1–6:3](https://ref.ly/Eph6:1-Eph6:3); [COL 3:20](https://ref.ly/Col3:20); [HEB 12:9](https://ref.ly/Heb12:9)

### Disrespect for parents is condemned

**[DEU 27:16](https://ref.ly/Deut27:16)** *See also* [EXO 21:17](https://ref.ly/Exod21:17); [LEV 20:9](https://ref.ly/Lev20:9); [PRO 30:17](https://ref.ly/Prov30:17); [ISA 45:10](https://ref.ly/Isa45:10); [2TI 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:1-2Tim3:2)

### Examples of those who respected their parents

[GEN 9:20–9:23](https://ref.ly/Gen9:20-Gen9:23) *Shem and Japheth*; ; [GEN 47:11–47:12](https://ref.ly/Gen47:11-Gen47:12) *Joseph*; ; [1SA 22:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam22:3) *David*; ; [1KI 2:19](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:19) *Solomon*; ; [1KI 19:20](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:20) *Elisha*; [LUK 2:51](https://ref.ly/Luke2:51); ; [JHN 19:25–19:27](https://ref.ly/John19:25-John19:27)

### Respect in marriage

**[EPH 5:33](https://ref.ly/Eph5:33)** *See also* [EPH 5:21–5:25](https://ref.ly/Eph5:21-Eph5:25); [COL 3:18–3:19](https://ref.ly/Col3:18-Col3:19); [1PE 3:6–3:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:6-1Pet3:7)

### Respect for children

**[MAT 18:10](https://ref.ly/Matt18:10)** *See also* [LEV 20:1–20:5](https://ref.ly/Lev20:1-Lev20:5); [MAT 18:5–18:6](https://ref.ly/Matt18:5-Matt18:6) parallels [MRK 9:36–9:37](https://ref.ly/Mark9:36-Mark9:37), [LUK 9:47–9:48](https://ref.ly/Luke9:47-Luke9:48); [MAT 19:13–19:15](https://ref.ly/Matt19:13-Matt19:15) parallels [MRK 10:13–10:16](https://ref.ly/Mark10:13-Mark10:16), [LUK 18:15–18:17](https://ref.ly/Luke18:15-Luke18:17); [EPH 6:4](https://ref.ly/Eph6:4); [COL 3:20–3:21](https://ref.ly/Col3:20-Col3:21)

Respect for leaders
-------------------

### Leaders must have gained respect

**[DEU 1:13–1:15](https://ref.ly/Deut1:13-Deut1:15)** *See also* [1SA 9:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam9:6); [PRO 31:23](https://ref.ly/Prov31:23); [1TI 3:2–3:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:2-1Tim3:11)

### Leaders must be given respect

**[1SA 26:9–26:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam26:9-1Sam26:11)** *See also* [1SA 24:1–24:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam24:1-1Sam24:7); [2KI 3:14](https://ref.ly/2Kgs3:14); [ROM 13:1–13:7](https://ref.ly/Rom13:1-Rom13:7); [1TH 5:12](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:12); [HEB 13:17](https://ref.ly/Heb13:17)

Respect for old age
-------------------

**[LEV 19:32](https://ref.ly/Lev19:32)** *See also* [JOB 32:4–32:7](https://ref.ly/Job32:4-Job32:7); [LAM 5:12](https://ref.ly/Lam5:12); [1TI 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:1-1Tim5:2); [TIT 2:2](https://ref.ly/Titus2:2); [1PE 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:5)

Respect at the place of work
----------------------------

**[DEU 24:14–24:15](https://ref.ly/Deut24:14-Deut24:15)** *See also* [LEV 19:13](https://ref.ly/Lev19:13); [EPH 6:5–6:9](https://ref.ly/Eph6:5-Eph6:9); [COL 3:22–4:1](https://ref.ly/Col3:22-Col4:1); [1TI 6:1–6:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:1-1Tim6:2); [1PE 2:18](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:18)

## 8472: respect, for environment (id: 8472)

Although God created the universe and retains ultimate ownership of it, he has delegated responsibility for the well\-being of the earth to the human race. This stewardship includes the care of the animal kingdom and the earth's natural resources.

God's creation is to be respected
---------------------------------

### The earth belongs to God

**[PSA 24:1–24:2](https://ref.ly/Ps24:1-Ps24:2)** *See also* [EXO 19:5–19:6](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5-Exod19:6); [LEV 25:23](https://ref.ly/Lev25:23); [1CH 29:14](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:14); [PSA 50:9–50:12](https://ref.ly/Ps50:9-Ps50:12), [PSA 89:11](https://ref.ly/Ps89:11); [HAG 2:8](https://ref.ly/Hag2:8)

### Responsibility to rule and care for the earth has been delegated to the human race

**[GEN 1:26–1:28](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:28)** *See also* [GEN 9:1–9:3](https://ref.ly/Gen9:1-Gen9:3); [PSA 8:6–8:8](https://ref.ly/Ps8:6-Ps8:8), [PSA 115:16](https://ref.ly/Ps115:16); [HEB 2:8](https://ref.ly/Heb2:8); [JAS 3:7](https://ref.ly/Jas3:7)

### God himself maintains a caring supervision of his creation

**[MAT 6:26–6:30](https://ref.ly/Matt6:26-Matt6:30)** parallel [LUK 12:24–12:28](https://ref.ly/Luke12:24-Luke12:28) *See also* [DEU 11:10–11:15](https://ref.ly/Deut11:10-Deut11:15); [PSA 65:9–65:13](https://ref.ly/Ps65:9-Ps65:13); [MAT 5:45](https://ref.ly/Matt5:45)

Respect for all nature and animals
----------------------------------

**[DEU 20:19](https://ref.ly/Deut20:19)** *NIV footnote.* *See also* [EXO 23:4–23:5](https://ref.ly/Exod23:4-Exod23:5), [EXO 23:10–23:11](https://ref.ly/Exod23:10-Exod23:11); [DEU 22:4](https://ref.ly/Deut22:4), [DEU 22:6–22:7](https://ref.ly/Deut22:6-Deut22:7), [DEU 25:4](https://ref.ly/Deut25:4); [PRO 12:10](https://ref.ly/Prov12:10)

Respect and care for the earth's natural resources
--------------------------------------------------

**[EXO 23:10–23:11](https://ref.ly/Exod23:10-Exod23:11)** *See also* [LEV 25:1–25:7](https://ref.ly/Lev25:1-Lev25:7); [NEH 10:31](https://ref.ly/Neh10:31)
