## 8474: seeing God (id: 8474)

Perceiving God in all his fulness. Scripture stresses that God, as spirit, is invisible to sinful human beings. He has, however, been revealed in Jesus Christ, who is his perfect likeness, and he will be seen in all his glory at the end of history when he comes in judgment.

No human can see the face of God in all his fulness
---------------------------------------------------

**[1TI 6:15–6:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:15-1Tim6:16)** *See also* [DEU 4:10–4:12](https://ref.ly/Deut4:10-Deut4:12); [JHN 6:46](https://ref.ly/John6:46); [1TI 1:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:17); [1JN 4:12](https://ref.ly/1John4:12)

Privileged individuals may catch a glimpse of God
-------------------------------------------------

**[EXO 33:21–33:23](https://ref.ly/Exod33:21-Exod33:23)** *See also* [GEN 16:13–16:14](https://ref.ly/Gen16:13-Gen16:14) *Hagar*; [NUM 12:5–12:8](https://ref.ly/Num12:5-Num12:8) *Moses*; [JDG 6:11–6:24](https://ref.ly/Judg6:11-Judg6:24) *Gideon*; [JDG 13:2–13:23](https://ref.ly/Judg13:2-Judg13:23) *Manoah and his wife*

Threat of death on seeing the face of God
-----------------------------------------

**[EXO 33:20](https://ref.ly/Exod33:20)** *See also* [GEN 32:24–32:30](https://ref.ly/Gen32:24-Gen32:30); [EXO 19:21](https://ref.ly/Exod19:21), [EXO 24:9–24:11](https://ref.ly/Exod24:9-Exod24:11)

Seeing God in a vision
----------------------

**[ISA 6:1](https://ref.ly/Isa6:1)** *See also* [1KI 22:19](https://ref.ly/1Kgs22:19) parallel [2CH 18:18](https://ref.ly/2Chr18:18) *Micaiah*; [EZK 1:1–1:28](https://ref.ly/Ezek1:1-Ezek1:28) *Ezekiel*; [ACT 7:55–7:56](https://ref.ly/Acts7:55-Acts7:56) *Stephen*

God may be seen in Jesus Christ
-------------------------------

**[JHN 14:8–14:9](https://ref.ly/John14:8-John14:9)**; **[COL 1:15](https://ref.ly/Col1:15)** *See also* [JHN 1:1–1:18](https://ref.ly/John1:1-John1:18); [1JN 5:20](https://ref.ly/1John5:20)

The hope of seeing God at the resurrection
------------------------------------------

**[1CO 13:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:12)** *See also* [JOB 19:26–19:27](https://ref.ly/Job19:26-Job19:27); [PSA 17:15](https://ref.ly/Ps17:15); [MAT 5:8](https://ref.ly/Matt5:8); [1CO 13:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:12); [HEB 12:14](https://ref.ly/Heb12:14); [REV 1:7](https://ref.ly/Rev1:7)

## 8475: self-denial (id: 8475)

The willingness to deny oneself possessions or status, in order to grow in holiness and commitment to God. This practice is commended and illustrated by Jesus Christ himself, and underlies Christian fellowship within the church.

The wisdom of self\-denial
--------------------------

**[PRO 23:20–23:21](https://ref.ly/Prov23:20-Prov23:21)** *See also* [PRO 25:16](https://ref.ly/Prov25:16)

Examples of self\-denial in order to put God first
--------------------------------------------------

**[DAN 1:8](https://ref.ly/Dan1:8)**; **[HEB 11:25](https://ref.ly/Heb11:25)** *See also* [LEV 23:29](https://ref.ly/Lev23:29); [JER 35:6](https://ref.ly/Jer35:6); [DAN 10:3](https://ref.ly/Dan10:3); [LUK 1:15](https://ref.ly/Luke1:15), [LUK 7:33](https://ref.ly/Luke7:33) parallel [MAT 11:18](https://ref.ly/Matt11:18)

Self\-denial is a requirement of following Jesus Christ
-------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 16:24](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24)** parallels [MRK 8:34](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34), [LUK 9:23](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23)**[ACT 21:13](https://ref.ly/Acts21:13)**; **[PHP 3:7](https://ref.ly/Phil3:7)**; **[1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11)** *See also* [MAT 5:29](https://ref.ly/Matt5:29), [MAT 6:10](https://ref.ly/Matt6:10), [MAT 9:9](https://ref.ly/Matt9:9) parallels [MRK 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/Mark2:13-Mark2:14), [LUK 5:27–5:28](https://ref.ly/Luke5:27-Luke5:28) *the calling of Matthew*; [MAT 10:37–10:38](https://ref.ly/Matt10:37-Matt10:38) parallel [LUK 14:26–14:27](https://ref.ly/Luke14:26-Luke14:27) *the cost of being a disciple*; [MAT 18:8](https://ref.ly/Matt18:8) parallel [MRK 9:43](https://ref.ly/Mark9:43); [MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21) parallel [LUK 18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22) *the rich young man*; [MAT 19:27](https://ref.ly/Matt19:27) parallels [MRK 10:28](https://ref.ly/Mark10:28), [LUK 18:28](https://ref.ly/Luke18:28) *Peter left everything to follow Jesus Christ*; [MAT 19:29](https://ref.ly/Matt19:29) parallels [MRK 10:29–10:30](https://ref.ly/Mark10:29-Mark10:30), [LUK 18:29–18:30](https://ref.ly/Luke18:29-Luke18:30) *the rewards of self\-denial for the sake of the gospel*; [LUK 5:11](https://ref.ly/Luke5:11), [LUK 14:33](https://ref.ly/Luke14:33), [LUK 21:34](https://ref.ly/Luke21:34); [ACT 20:24](https://ref.ly/Acts20:24); [ROM 6:2](https://ref.ly/Rom6:2), [ROM 6:6](https://ref.ly/Rom6:6), [ROM 6:11](https://ref.ly/Rom6:11), [ROM 8:13](https://ref.ly/Rom8:13), [ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1), [ROM 13:14](https://ref.ly/Rom13:14); [1CO 6:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:12), [1CO 9:25–9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:25-1Cor9:27); [2CO 8:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:5) *the example of the Macedonian churches*; [GAL 2:20](https://ref.ly/Gal2:20), [GAL 5:16](https://ref.ly/Gal5:16), [GAL 5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:23); [COL 3:3](https://ref.ly/Col3:3), [COL 3:5](https://ref.ly/Col3:5); [2TI 2:21](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:21); [TIT 2:12–2:13](https://ref.ly/Titus2:12-Titus2:13); [JAS 4:7](https://ref.ly/Jas4:7); [1PE 4:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:2)

Self\-denial for the sake of others
-----------------------------------

**[RUT 2:11](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:11)**; **[PHP 2:4](https://ref.ly/Phil2:4)** *Esther put her own life at risk for the sake of her people* *See also* [EXO 32:32](https://ref.ly/Exod32:32); [EST 4:16](https://ref.ly/Esth4:16)ROM [14:21](https://ref.ly/Esth14:21), [ROM 15:1](https://ref.ly/Rom15:1); [1CO 8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:13), [1CO 9:23](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:23)[1CO 10:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:24), [1CO 10:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:33), [1CO 12:15](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:15); [EPH 4:2](https://ref.ly/Eph4:2), [EPH 5:21](https://ref.ly/Eph5:21); [PHP 2:17](https://ref.ly/Phil2:17), [PHP 2:20–2:21](https://ref.ly/Phil2:20-Phil2:21) *the example of Timothy*; [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24); [2TI 2:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:10); [TIT 3:2](https://ref.ly/Titus3:2); [1PE 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:8), [1PE 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:5)

Self\-denial and the example of Jesus Christ
--------------------------------------------

## 8476: self-discipline (id: 8476)

The dedicated training, through the study of Scripture, prayer and self\-control, which enables Christians to be more effective witnesses to the gospel, to lead lives more pleasing to God, and to win the crown that awaits those who are victorious over sin.

Self\-discipline is training oneself to be godly
------------------------------------------------

**[1TI 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:7)** *See also* [ROM 13:14](https://ref.ly/Rom13:14); [1CO 9:24–9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:24-1Cor9:27); [EPH 4:23–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:23-Eph4:24); [PHP 3:12–3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:12-Phil3:14); [COL 3:12](https://ref.ly/Col3:12); [2TI 1:7](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:7); [HEB 5:14](https://ref.ly/Heb5:14), [HEB 12:1](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1)

Self\-discipline and the study of Scripture
-------------------------------------------

**[PSA 119:9–119:11](https://ref.ly/Ps119:9-Ps119:11)**; **[2TI 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16-2Tim3:17)** *See also* [DEU 29:29](https://ref.ly/Deut29:29)

Self\-discipline involves learning through experience
-----------------------------------------------------

**[TIT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Titus2:12)** *See also* [ROM 5:3–5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:3-Rom5:5)

Self\-discipline should transform the whole person
--------------------------------------------------

### A Christian's thoughts should be disciplined

**[2CO 10:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:5)** *See also* [ROM 12:3](https://ref.ly/Rom12:3)ROM [12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2); [EPH 4:23](https://ref.ly/Eph4:23)[1PE 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:7)

### A Christian's speech should be disciplined

**[PSA 141:3](https://ref.ly/Ps141:3)** *See also* [JAS 3:2–3:12](https://ref.ly/Jas3:2-Jas3:12)

### A Christian's behaviour should be disciplined

**[ROM 14:20–14:21](https://ref.ly/Rom14:20-Rom14:21)**

### A Christian's body should be disciplined

**[1CO 9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:27)** *See also* [ROM 6:12–6:13](https://ref.ly/Rom6:12-Rom6:13), [ROM 8:13](https://ref.ly/Rom8:13); [EPH 4:22](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22); [COL 3:5](https://ref.ly/Col3:5); [JAS 3:2](https://ref.ly/Jas3:2)

Self\-discipline prevents God's discipline
------------------------------------------

**[1CO 11:31–11:32](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:31-1Cor11:32)**

Physical self\-discipline is of some value, but only in this life
-----------------------------------------------------------------

**[1TI 4:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:8)** *See also* [1CO 9:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:25)

An elder should be self\-disciplined
------------------------------------

**[TIT 1:8](https://ref.ly/Titus1:8)**

Examples of those who exercised self\-discipline
------------------------------------------------

*See also* [GEN 22:9–22:14](https://ref.ly/Gen22:9-Gen22:14) *Abraham*; [GEN 39:8–39:12](https://ref.ly/Gen39:8-Gen39:12) *Joseph*; [2SA 11:11–11:13](https://ref.ly/2Sam11:11-2Sam11:13) *Uriah*[DAN 1:8](https://ref.ly/Dan1:8), [DAN 1:11–1:13](https://ref.ly/Dan1:11-Dan1:13)[MAT 4:4](https://ref.ly/Matt4:4) *Jesus Christ*; [1CO 8:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:13) *Paul*

Self\-discipline strengthens believers when faced with temptation
-----------------------------------------------------------------

[MAT 5:29](https://ref.ly/Matt5:29) parallel [MRK 9:47](https://ref.ly/Mark9:47); ; [ROM 8:13](https://ref.ly/Rom8:13); ; [GAL 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gal5:24)

The reward for self\-discipline is a crown and a prize
------------------------------------------------------

**[1CO 9:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:25)** *See also* [1CO 9:24](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:24), [1CO 9:27](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:27); [PHP 3:14](https://ref.ly/Phil3:14); [COL 2:18](https://ref.ly/Col2:18); [1TH 2:19](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:19); [2TI 4:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:8); [JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12); [1PE 5:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:4); [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10), [REV 3:11](https://ref.ly/Rev3:11)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Timothy 4:7; Romans 13:14; 1 Corinthians 9:24-27; Ephesians 4:23-24; Philippians 3:12-14; Colossians 3:12; 2 Timothy 1:7; Hebrews 5:14; Hebrews 12:1; Psalms 119:9-11; 2 Timothy 3:16-17; Deuteronomy 29:29; Titus 2:12; Romans 5:3-5; 2 Corinthians 10:5; Romans 12:3; Romans 12:2; Ephesians 4:23; 1 Peter 4:7; Psalms 141:3; James 3:2-12; Romans 14:20-21; 1 Corinthians 9:27; Romans 6:12-13; Romans 8:13; Ephesians 4:22; Colossians 3:5; James 3:2; 1 Corinthians 11:31-32; 1 Timothy 4:8; 1 Corinthians 9:25; Titus 1:8; Genesis 22:9-14; Genesis 39:8-12; 2 Samuel 11:11-13; Daniel 1:8; Daniel 1:11-13; Matthew 4:4; 1 Corinthians 8:13; Matthew 5:29; Mark 9:47; Galatians 5:24; 1 Corinthians 9:24; Philippians 3:14; Colossians 2:18; 1 Thessalonians 2:19; 2 Timothy 4:8; James 1:12; 1 Peter 5:4; Revelation 2:10; Revelation 3:11

## 8477: self-examination (id: 8477)

Reflection on one's own character, motives and actions, in order to judge whether they are truly in accordance with Christian values.

* **Associated Articles:** 8478: self-examination, teaching on (ID: `8478@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8479: self-examination, examples of (ID: `8479@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8478: self-examination, teaching on (id: 8478)

Self\-examination should take place on the basis of God's revelation of himself and the example he sets believers in Jesus Christ. It is especially important before confessing one's sins.

The importance of self\-examination
-----------------------------------

**[HAG 1:5](https://ref.ly/Hag1:5)** *See also* [PSA 4:4](https://ref.ly/Ps4:4), [PSA 77:6](https://ref.ly/Ps77:6); [HAG 1:7](https://ref.ly/Hag1:7), [HAG 2:15](https://ref.ly/Hag2:15), [HAG 2:18](https://ref.ly/Hag2:18); [1CO 11:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:28); [2CO 13:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:5); [HEB 3:12](https://ref.ly/Heb3:12)

A lack of self\-examination leads to pride and self\-delusion
-------------------------------------------------------------

**[1CO 11:28–11:29](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:28-1Cor11:29)** *See also* [MAT 7:5](https://ref.ly/Matt7:5); [JHN 8:7](https://ref.ly/John8:7); [ROM 2:1–2:4](https://ref.ly/Rom2:1-Rom2:4)

Self\-examination is not easy because of humanity's fallen nature
-----------------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 19:12–19:14](https://ref.ly/Ps19:12-Ps19:14)** *See also* [JER 17:9](https://ref.ly/Jer17:9)

God helps believers in their self\-examination
----------------------------------------------

**[PSA 26:2](https://ref.ly/Ps26:2)** *See also* [JOB 7:17–7:18](https://ref.ly/Job7:17-Job7:18), [JOB 13:9](https://ref.ly/Job13:9), [JOB 13:23](https://ref.ly/Job13:23); [PSA 11:4–11:5](https://ref.ly/Ps11:4-Ps11:5), [PSA 139:23–139:24](https://ref.ly/Ps139:23-Ps139:24); [PRO 5:21](https://ref.ly/Prov5:21); [JER 17:10](https://ref.ly/Jer17:10), [JER 20:12](https://ref.ly/Jer20:12)

The purpose of self\-examination is to lead people to God and amendment of life
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[LAM 3:40–3:42](https://ref.ly/Lam3:40-Lam3:42)** *See also* [PSA 42:5](https://ref.ly/Ps42:5), [PSA 42:11](https://ref.ly/Ps42:11), [PSA 43:5](https://ref.ly/Ps43:5); [JAS 1:23–1:25](https://ref.ly/Jas1:23-Jas1:25)

Self\-examination is especially important when ministering to others
--------------------------------------------------------------------

**[GAL 6:1](https://ref.ly/Gal6:1)** *See also* [ROM 14:4](https://ref.ly/Rom14:4); [GAL 6:3–6:4](https://ref.ly/Gal6:3-Gal6:4); [1TI 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:16); [JAS 3:1](https://ref.ly/Jas3:1)

* **Associated Passages:** Haggai 1:5; Psalms 4:4; Psalms 77:6; Haggai 1:7; Haggai 2:15; Haggai 2:18; 1 Corinthians 11:28; 2 Corinthians 13:5; Hebrews 3:12; 1 Corinthians 11:28-29; Matthew 7:5; John 8:7; Romans 2:1-4; Psalms 19:12-14; Jeremiah 17:9; Psalms 26:2; Job 7:17-18; Job 13:9; Job 13:23; Psalms 11:4-5; Psalms 139:23-24; Proverbs 5:21; Jeremiah 17:10; Jeremiah 20:12; Lamentations 3:40-42; Psalms 42:5; Psalms 42:11; Psalms 43:5; James 1:23-25; Galatians 6:1; Romans 14:4; Galatians 6:3-4; 1 Timothy 4:16; James 3:1
* **Associated Articles:** 1461: truth, nature of (ID: `1461@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6029: sin, accepting forgiveness of (ID: `6029@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6624: confession, of sin (ID: `6624@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8451: mortification (ID: `8451@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8662: meditation (ID: `8662@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8479: self-examination, examples of (id: 8479)

Scripture provides numerous examples of self\-examination, and its results. In particular, self\-examination is often portrayed as leading to repentance.

Self\-examination in the experience of Israel
---------------------------------------------

### Self\-examination at the entry into the promised land

[JOS 7:1–7:26](https://ref.ly/Josh7:1-Josh7:26), [JOS 24:14](https://ref.ly/Josh24:14)

### Self\-examination during the war with the Philistines

[1SA 14:24–14:47](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:24-1Sam14:47)

### Self\-examination at the time of the exile

[JER 31:18–31:20](https://ref.ly/Jer31:18-Jer31:20)

### Self\-examination after returning from exile in Babylon

[NEH 8:9](https://ref.ly/Neh8:9); ; [HAG 1:5–1:12](https://ref.ly/Hag1:5-Hag1:12), [HAG 2:15–2:19](https://ref.ly/Hag2:15-Hag2:19)

Self\-examination by other nations
----------------------------------

[JON 3:1–3:10](https://ref.ly/Jonah3:1-Jonah3:10)

Self\-examination in the experience of individuals
--------------------------------------------------

### King David

**[PSA 51:3–51:6](https://ref.ly/Ps51:3-Ps51:6)** *See also* [2SA 12:1–12:13](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:1-2Sam12:13); [PSA 32:3–32:5](https://ref.ly/Ps32:3-Ps32:5)

### Job

**[JOB 42:1–42:6](https://ref.ly/Job42:1-Job42:6)**

### The psalmists

**[PSA 119:59](https://ref.ly/Ps119:59)** *See also* [PSA 42:5](https://ref.ly/Ps42:5), [PSA 42:11](https://ref.ly/Ps42:11), [PSA 43:5](https://ref.ly/Ps43:5)

### The lost son

**[LUK 15:17–15:20](https://ref.ly/Luke15:17-Luke15:20)**

### The disciples

**[MAT 26:22](https://ref.ly/Matt26:22)** parallel [MRK 14:19](https://ref.ly/Mark14:19)

### Judas

*See also* [MAT 26:25](https://ref.ly/Matt26:25), [MAT 27:3–27:5](https://ref.ly/Matt27:3-Matt27:5)

* **Associated Passages:** Joshua 7:1-26; Joshua 24:14; 1 Samuel 14:24-47; Jeremiah 31:18-20; Nehemiah 8:9; Haggai 1:5-12; Haggai 2:15-19; Jonah 3:1-10; Psalms 51:3-6; 2 Samuel 12:1-13; Psalms 32:3-5; Job 42:1-6; Psalms 119:59; Psalms 42:5; Psalms 42:11; Psalms 43:5; Luke 15:17-20; Matthew 26:22; Mark 14:19; Matthew 26:25; Matthew 27:3-5
* **Associated Articles:** 6732: repentance (ID: `6732@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8820: self-confidence (ID: `8820@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8481: self-sacrifice (id: 8481)

The willingness to leave one's possessions or to give them to others; to deny oneself to the point of death or to give oneself in the service of God or other people.

Self\-sacrifice as forfeiting one's present comfort for the sake of others
--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[RUT 2:11](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:11)** *See also* [GEN 44:33–44:34](https://ref.ly/Gen44:33-Gen44:34); [HEB 10:34](https://ref.ly/Heb10:34), [HEB 11:24–11:27](https://ref.ly/Heb11:24-Heb11:27)

Self\-sacrifice as giving one's possessions to others
-----------------------------------------------------

### Jesus Christ commends the willingness to give away one's possessions

**[MAT 19:21](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21)** parallels [MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21), [LUK 18:22](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22) *See also* [LUK 12:33](https://ref.ly/Luke12:33)

### God rewards those who give their possessions away

**[LUK 18:28–18:30](https://ref.ly/Luke18:28-Luke18:30)** parallels [MAT 19:27–19:29](https://ref.ly/Matt19:27-Matt19:29), [MRK 10:28–10:30](https://ref.ly/Mark10:28-Mark10:30)

### Sacrificing one's possessions as demonstrated in the life of the church

*See also* [ACT 2:44–2:45](https://ref.ly/Acts2:44-Acts2:45), [ACT 4:32–4:37](https://ref.ly/Acts4:32-Acts4:37); [2CO 8:1–8:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:1-2Cor8:5)

Self\-sacrifice as leaving all and following Jesus Christ
---------------------------------------------------------

### Such sacrifice is a condition of discipleship

**[LUK 14:33](https://ref.ly/Luke14:33)** *See also* [MAT 10:37](https://ref.ly/Matt10:37) parallel [LUK 14:26](https://ref.ly/Luke14:26) *This means loving Jesus Christ over and above one's immediate family.*

### Those willing to leave everything to follow Jesus Christ

[LUK 5:27–5:28](https://ref.ly/Luke5:27-Luke5:28); ; [PHP 3:8](https://ref.ly/Phil3:8)

Self\-sacrifice as the metaphorical laying down of one's life for others
------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Followers of Jesus Christ are required to give themselves in the service of others

**[JHN 12:24–12:25](https://ref.ly/John12:24-John12:25)** *See also* [MAT 10:38](https://ref.ly/Matt10:38) parallel [LUK 14:27](https://ref.ly/Luke14:27); [MAT 16:24–16:25](https://ref.ly/Matt16:24-Matt16:25) parallels [MRK 8:34–8:35](https://ref.ly/Mark8:34-Mark8:35), [LUK 9:23–9:24](https://ref.ly/Luke9:23-Luke9:24); [LUK 17:33](https://ref.ly/Luke17:33); [1JN 3:16–3:18](https://ref.ly/1John3:16-1John3:18)

### Examples of those who demonstrated such self\-sacrifice

**[2CO 4:10–4:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:10-2Cor4:11)** *See also* [1CO 9:19–9:23](https://ref.ly/1Cor9:19-1Cor9:23), [1CO 15:30–15:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:30-1Cor15:31); [2CO 11:23–11:29](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:23-2Cor11:29), [2CO 12:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:15)

Self\-sacrifice as the literal laying down of one's life
--------------------------------------------------------

### Jesus Christ warns his disciples to be prepared to give their lives

**[MAT 10:21–10:22](https://ref.ly/Matt10:21-Matt10:22)** parallels [MRK 13:12–13:13](https://ref.ly/Mark13:12-Mark13:13), [LUK 21:16–21:17](https://ref.ly/Luke21:16-Luke21:17)

### Sacrificing one's life is of no value without love

*See also* [1CO 13:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:3)

### Examples of those willing to give their lives for the sake of God and others

**[ACT 20:23–20:24](https://ref.ly/Acts20:23-Acts20:24)** *See also* [EXO 32:32](https://ref.ly/Exod32:32); [1CH 11:15–11:19](https://ref.ly/1Chr11:15-1Chr11:19); [EST 4:14–4:16](https://ref.ly/Esth4:14-Esth4:16); [MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39) parallels [MRK 14:35–14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:35-Mark14:36), [LUK 22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42); [PHP 2:17](https://ref.ly/Phil2:17)

### Examples of those who gave their lives in God's service

**[ACT 7:59–7:60](https://ref.ly/Acts7:59-Acts7:60)** *See also* [JDG 11:36–11:38](https://ref.ly/Judg11:36-Judg11:38); [PHP 2:5–2:8](https://ref.ly/Phil2:5-Phil2:8); [HEB 11:36–11:38](https://ref.ly/Heb11:36-Heb11:38); [REV 20:4](https://ref.ly/Rev20:4)

* **Associated Passages:** Ruth 2:11; Genesis 44:33-34; Hebrews 10:34; Hebrews 11:24-27; Matthew 19:21; Mark 10:21; Luke 18:22; Luke 12:33; Luke 18:28-30; Matthew 19:27-29; Mark 10:28-30; Acts 2:44-45; Acts 4:32-37; 2 Corinthians 8:1-5; Luke 14:33; Matthew 10:37; Luke 14:26; Luke 5:27-28; Philippians 3:8; John 12:24-25; Matthew 10:38; Luke 14:27; Matthew 16:24-25; Mark 8:34-35; Luke 9:23-24; Luke 17:33; 1 John 3:16-18; 2 Corinthians 4:10-11; 1 Corinthians 9:19-23; 1 Corinthians 15:30-31; 2 Corinthians 11:23-29; 2 Corinthians 12:15; Matthew 10:21-22; Mark 13:12-13; Luke 21:16-17; 1 Corinthians 13:3; Acts 20:23-24; Exodus 32:32; 1 Chronicles 11:15-19; Esther 4:14-16; Matthew 26:39; Mark 14:35-36; Luke 22:42; Philippians 2:17; Acts 7:59-60; Judges 11:36-38; Philippians 2:5-8; Hebrews 11:36-38; Revelation 20:4
* **Associated Articles:** 2570: Jesus Christ, suffering of (ID: `2570@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8116: discipleship, cost of (ID: `8116@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8120: following Jesus Christ (ID: `8120@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8342: servanthood (ID: `8342@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8356: unselfishness (ID: `8356@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8450: martyrdom (ID: `8450@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8475: self-denial (ID: `8475@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8482: spiritual warfare (id: 8482)

The struggle against the forces of evil, which is a constant feature of the life of faith. Scripture locates the origins of spiritual warfare in the rebellion of Satan and his angels against God and affirms the hope of God's final victory over such forces through Jesus Christ's death and resurrection.

* **Associated Articles:** 8483: spiritual warfare, causes of (ID: `8483@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8484: spiritual warfare, enemies in (ID: `8484@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8485: spiritual warfare, as conflict (ID: `8485@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8486: spiritual warfare, armour (ID: `8486@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8483: spiritual warfare, causes of (id: 8483)

Spiritual warfare has its origin in a rebellion of many angels against God. Satan is seen as the prince of this world, leading an array of forces opposed to God. Although disarmed by Jesus Christ on the cross, they remain a powerful threat to the church and to individual believers.

Satan and his angels fall
-------------------------

**[2PE 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:4)** *See also* [ISA 14:12–14:15](https://ref.ly/Isa14:12-Isa14:15); [EZK 28:12–28:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:12-Ezek28:19) *Some believe the kings of Babylon and Tyre to be types of Satan*; [1TI 3:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:6); [JUD 1:6](https://ref.ly/Jude1:6)

Satan and his angels comprise a well\-organised army
----------------------------------------------------

**[EPH 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eph6:12)** *See also* [COL 1:13](https://ref.ly/Col1:13)

Satan and his angels will ultimately be fully disarmed by Jesus Christ
----------------------------------------------------------------------

**[COL 2:15](https://ref.ly/Col2:15)**; **[REV 12:7–12:9](https://ref.ly/Rev12:7-Rev12:9)** *See also* [MRK 3:27](https://ref.ly/Mark3:27) parallel [MAT 12:29](https://ref.ly/Matt12:29); [LUK 10:18](https://ref.ly/Luke10:18); [JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31); [HEB 2:14](https://ref.ly/Heb2:14); [1JN 3:8](https://ref.ly/1John3:8)

Satan persecutes the church
---------------------------

**[REV 12:13](https://ref.ly/Rev12:13)** *The woman is here thought to be symbolic of the church.* *See also* [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10), [REV 13:7](https://ref.ly/Rev13:7) *The dragon is here thought to be symbolic of the world's persecution (empowered by Satan) of the church.*

Satan opposes the gospel
------------------------

**[2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4)** *See also* [MAT 13:19](https://ref.ly/Matt13:19) parallels [MRK 4:15](https://ref.ly/Mark4:15), [LUK 8:12](https://ref.ly/Luke8:12); [MAT 13:38–13:39](https://ref.ly/Matt13:38-Matt13:39); [1TH 2:2](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:2), [1TH 2:18](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:18)

### Examples of opposition to the first Christians

[ACT 6:8–6:14](https://ref.ly/Acts6:8-Acts6:14), [ACT 7:54–7:58](https://ref.ly/Acts7:54-Acts7:58) *Stephen stoned to death*; ; [ACT 8:1–8:3](https://ref.ly/Acts8:1-Acts8:3) *Saul causes havoc in Jerusalem.*; [ACT 13:6–13:12](https://ref.ly/Acts13:6-Acts13:12), [ACT 13:44–13:45](https://ref.ly/Acts13:44-Acts13:45), [ACT 17:13](https://ref.ly/Acts17:13), [ACT 18:6](https://ref.ly/Acts18:6), [ACT 18:12](https://ref.ly/Acts18:12); [ACT 9:23](https://ref.ly/Acts9:23), [ACT 14:5](https://ref.ly/Acts14:5), [ACT 14:19](https://ref.ly/Acts14:19), [ACT 16:16–16:24](https://ref.ly/Acts16:16-Acts16:24), [ACT 17:5–17:6](https://ref.ly/Acts17:5-Acts17:6), [ACT 19:23–19:29](https://ref.ly/Acts19:23-Acts19:29), [ACT 20:3](https://ref.ly/Acts20:3), [ACT 21:27–21:36](https://ref.ly/Acts21:27-Acts21:36); [ACT 23:12–23:15](https://ref.ly/Acts23:12-Acts23:15), [ACT 25:3](https://ref.ly/Acts25:3)

Satan attacks individual believers
----------------------------------

**[REV 12:17](https://ref.ly/Rev12:17)** *See also* [JOB 2:7](https://ref.ly/Job2:7); [LUK 22:31–22:32](https://ref.ly/Luke22:31-Luke22:32); [2TI 3:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:12); [1PE 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:8)

* **Associated Passages:** 2 Peter 2:4; Isaiah 14:12-15; Ezekiel 28:12-19; 1 Timothy 3:6; Jude 1:6; Ephesians 6:12; Colossians 1:13; Colossians 2:15; Revelation 12:7-9; Mark 3:27; Matthew 12:29; Luke 10:18; John 12:31; Hebrews 2:14; 1 John 3:8; Revelation 12:13; Revelation 2:10; Revelation 13:7; 2 Corinthians 4:4; Matthew 13:19; Mark 4:15; Luke 8:12; Matthew 13:38-39; 1 Thessalonians 2:2; 1 Thessalonians 2:18; Acts 6:8-14; Acts 7:54-58; Acts 8:1-3; Acts 13:6-12; Acts 13:44-45; Acts 17:13; Acts 18:6; Acts 18:12; Acts 9:23; Acts 14:5; Acts 14:19; Acts 16:16-24; Acts 17:5-6; Acts 19:23-29; Acts 20:3; Acts 21:27-36; Acts 23:12-15; Acts 25:3; Revelation 12:17; Job 2:7; Luke 22:31-32; 2 Timothy 3:12; 1 Peter 5:8
* **Associated Articles:** 2372: Jesus Christ, victory of (ID: `2372@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4111: angels, as God's servants (ID: `4111@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4116: angels, opposed to God (ID: `4116@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4120: Satan (ID: `4120@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5598: victory, over spiritual forces (ID: `5598@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5975: violence (ID: `5975@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7505: Jews, the (ID: `7505@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8738: evil, victory over (ID: `8738@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8773: jealousy (ID: `8773@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8787: opposition, to God's person and work (ID: `8787@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8794: persecution (ID: `8794@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8833: threats (ID: `8833@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8484: spiritual warfare, enemies in (id: 8484)

Christians are at war with the world, the flesh and the devil. Satan empowers the world to attack believers externally, persecuting, deceiving and seducing them. Internally, sinfulness frustrates the efforts of believers to serve God fully.

The world is an enemy
---------------------

**[JAS 4:4](https://ref.ly/Jas4:4)** *“world” here refers to the sinful human race, hostile to the truth and to the people of God.* *See also* [ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2); [1JN 2:15–2:17](https://ref.ly/1John2:15-1John2:17), [1JN 5:4](https://ref.ly/1John5:4)

### The world hates Christians

**[JHN 15:19–15:20](https://ref.ly/John15:19-John15:20)** *See also* [MAT 5:10–5:12](https://ref.ly/Matt5:10-Matt5:12) parallel [LUK 6:22](https://ref.ly/Luke6:22); [JHN 16:2](https://ref.ly/John16:2), [JHN 17:14](https://ref.ly/John17:14); [1PE 4:12–4:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:12-1Pet4:16); [1JN 3:13](https://ref.ly/1John3:13); [REV 13:7](https://ref.ly/Rev13:7) *The beast may represent the world's antichristian persecution.*

### The world has its own false teaching and religion

**[COL 2:8](https://ref.ly/Col2:8)** *See also* [1TI 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1); [2TI 4:3–4:4](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:3-2Tim4:4); [1JN 4:1](https://ref.ly/1John4:1); [2JN 1:7–1:11](https://ref.ly/2John1:7-2John1:11); [JUD 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/Jude1:3-Jude1:4); [REV 13:11](https://ref.ly/Rev13:11), [REV 19:20](https://ref.ly/Rev19:20) *This beast is thought to represent antichristian religion.*

### The world seeks to seduce Christians

**[1JN 2:16](https://ref.ly/1John2:16)** *See also* [LUK 12:15](https://ref.ly/Luke12:15), [LUK 12:19](https://ref.ly/Luke12:19); [2TI 4:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:10); [TIT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Titus2:12); [HEB 11:24–11:25](https://ref.ly/Heb11:24-Heb11:25); [REV 17:1–17:5](https://ref.ly/Rev17:1-Rev17:5) *Babylon may represent the world's seduction.*

Sinful human nature is an enemy
-------------------------------

**[GAL 5:17](https://ref.ly/Gal5:17)**; **[1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11)** *See also* [ROM 6:12](https://ref.ly/Rom6:12), [ROM 7:14–7:23](https://ref.ly/Rom7:14-Rom7:23), [ROM 8:13](https://ref.ly/Rom8:13); [GAL 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gal5:24); [COL 3:5](https://ref.ly/Col3:5); [HEB 12:4](https://ref.ly/Heb12:4); [JAS 4:1](https://ref.ly/Jas4:1)

The devil is an enemy
---------------------

**[1PE 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:8)** *See also* [MAT 13:39](https://ref.ly/Matt13:39) parallels [MRK 4:15](https://ref.ly/Mark4:15), [LUK 8:12](https://ref.ly/Luke8:12); [JHN 17:15](https://ref.ly/John17:15); [2TH 3:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:3); [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10), [REV 12:17](https://ref.ly/Rev12:17)

### He seeks to tempt Christians

**[1TH 3:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:5)** *See also* [GEN 3:1–3:6](https://ref.ly/Gen3:1-Gen3:6); [HEB 2:18](https://ref.ly/Heb2:18), [HEB 4:15](https://ref.ly/Heb4:15)

### He seeks to deceive

**[2CO 11:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:3)**; **[REV 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rev12:9)** *See also* [GEN 3:13](https://ref.ly/Gen3:13); [2CO 2:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:11), [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4), [2CO 11:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:4); [REV 20:3](https://ref.ly/Rev20:3)

### He constantly seeks to accuse believers

**[REV 12:10](https://ref.ly/Rev12:10)** *See also* [JOB 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/Job1:9-Job1:11); [ZEC 3:1](https://ref.ly/Zech3:1)

* **Associated Passages:** James 4:4; Romans 12:2; 1 John 2:15-17; 1 John 5:4; John 15:19-20; Matthew 5:10-12; Luke 6:22; John 16:2; John 17:14; 1 Peter 4:12-16; 1 John 3:13; Revelation 13:7; Colossians 2:8; 1 Timothy 4:1; 2 Timothy 4:3-4; 1 John 4:1; 2 John 1:7-11; Jude 1:3-4; Revelation 13:11; Revelation 19:20; 1 John 2:16; Luke 12:15; Luke 12:19; 2 Timothy 4:10; Titus 2:12; Hebrews 11:24-25; Revelation 17:1-5; Galatians 5:17; 1 Peter 2:11; Romans 6:12; Romans 7:14-23; Romans 8:13; Galatians 5:24; Colossians 3:5; Hebrews 12:4; James 4:1; 1 Peter 5:8; Matthew 13:39; Mark 4:15; Luke 8:12; John 17:15; 2 Thessalonians 3:3; Revelation 2:10; Revelation 12:17; 1 Thessalonians 3:5; Genesis 3:1-6; Hebrews 2:18; Hebrews 4:15; 2 Corinthians 11:3; Revelation 12:9; Genesis 3:13; 2 Corinthians 2:11; 2 Corinthians 4:4; 2 Corinthians 11:4; Revelation 20:3; Revelation 12:10; Job 1:9-11; Zechariah 3:1
* **Associated Articles:** 3278: Holy Spirit, indwelling of (ID: `3278@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4018: life, spiritual (ID: `4018@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4027: world, as fallen (ID: `4027@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4121: Satan, as the enemy of God (ID: `4121@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5201: accusation (ID: `5201@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5931: resistance (ID: `5931@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6030: sin, avoidance of (ID: `6030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6166: flesh, sinful nature (ID: `6166@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6251: temptation, resisting (ID: `6251@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7105: believers (ID: `7105@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8345: servanthood, and worship of God (ID: `8345@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8451: mortification (ID: `8451@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8485: spiritual warfare, as conflict (id: 8485)

The warfare believers must fight is spiritual, personal, intense and continual. It calls for courage, determination and prayer, and therefore believers must stand in God's strength and use the armour he has provided.

General descriptions of spiritual conflict
------------------------------------------

### It is spiritual

**[EPH 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eph6:12)** *See also* [ZEC 4:6](https://ref.ly/Zech4:6); [2CO 10:3–10:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:3-2Cor10:4); [GAL 5:17](https://ref.ly/Gal5:17); [1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11)

### It is personal

**[LUK 22:31–22:32](https://ref.ly/Luke22:31-Luke22:32)** *See also* [ROM 7:23](https://ref.ly/Rom7:23); [2TI 3:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:12), [2TI 4:18](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:18)

### It is strenuous

**[HEB 12:4](https://ref.ly/Heb12:4)** *See also* [JHN 16:33](https://ref.ly/John16:33); [PHP 1:27–1:30](https://ref.ly/Phil1:27-Phil1:30); [1PE 4:12–4:13](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:12-1Pet4:13)

### It is continual

**[EPH 6:13](https://ref.ly/Eph6:13)** *See also* [2TI 2:3](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:3); [HEB 3:13](https://ref.ly/Heb3:13); [REV 12:10](https://ref.ly/Rev12:10)

How believers are to fight
--------------------------

### With courage

**[1CO 16:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:13)** *See also* [JOS 1:9](https://ref.ly/Josh1:9), [JOS 10:25](https://ref.ly/Josh10:25); [2CH 32:6–32:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:6-2Chr32:8)

### With determination

**[1TI 6:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:12)** *See also* [2TH 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:4); [HEB 10:23](https://ref.ly/Heb10:23); [1PE 5:9–5:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:9-1Pet5:10)

### With watchfulness

**[1PE 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:8)** *See also* [1CO 16:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:13); [GAL 6:1](https://ref.ly/Gal6:1); [EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18)

### With prayer

**[EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18)** *See also* [EXO 17:11](https://ref.ly/Exod17:11); [MAT 6:13](https://ref.ly/Matt6:13) parallel [LUK 11:4](https://ref.ly/Luke11:4); [MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41) parallels [MRK 14:38](https://ref.ly/Mark14:38), [LUK 22:46](https://ref.ly/Luke22:46); [ACT 12:5](https://ref.ly/Acts12:5); [2TH 3:2](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:2)

### Standing in God's strength

**[EPH 6:10](https://ref.ly/Eph6:10)** *See also* [1SA 17:45](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:45); [2SA 22:40](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:40); [PSA 18:32–18:36](https://ref.ly/Ps18:32-Ps18:36), [PSA 118:8](https://ref.ly/Ps118:8); [EPH 3:16](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16); [PHP 4:13](https://ref.ly/Phil4:13); [2TI 2:1](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:1)

### Using the armour of God

**[EPH 6:11](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11)** *See also* [ROM 13:12–13:14](https://ref.ly/Rom13:12-Rom13:14); [2CO 10:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:4); [EPH 6:13–6:17](https://ref.ly/Eph6:13-Eph6:17)

* **Associated Passages:** Ephesians 6:12; Zechariah 4:6; 2 Corinthians 10:3-4; Galatians 5:17; 1 Peter 2:11; Luke 22:31-32; Romans 7:23; 2 Timothy 3:12; 2 Timothy 4:18; Hebrews 12:4; John 16:33; Philippians 1:27-30; 1 Peter 4:12-13; Ephesians 6:13; 2 Timothy 2:3; Hebrews 3:13; Revelation 12:10; 1 Corinthians 16:13; Joshua 1:9; Joshua 10:25; 2 Chronicles 32:6-8; 1 Timothy 6:12; 2 Thessalonians 1:4; Hebrews 10:23; 1 Peter 5:9-10; 1 Peter 5:8; Galatians 6:1; Ephesians 6:18; Exodus 17:11; Matthew 6:13; Luke 11:4; Matthew 26:41; Mark 14:38; Luke 22:46; Acts 12:5; 2 Thessalonians 3:2; Ephesians 6:10; 1 Samuel 17:45; 2 Samuel 22:40; Psalms 18:32-36; Psalms 118:8; Ephesians 3:16; Philippians 4:13; 2 Timothy 2:1; Ephesians 6:11; Romans 13:12-14; 2 Corinthians 10:4; Ephesians 6:13-17

## 8486: spiritual warfare, armour (id: 8486)

The armour of God refers to the resources that Christians possess for defending themselves against the attacks of the world, the flesh and the devil.

God is the believer's strength and shield
-----------------------------------------

**[PSA 28:7–28:8](https://ref.ly/Ps28:7-Ps28:8)** *See also* [GEN 15:1](https://ref.ly/Gen15:1); [DEU 33:29](https://ref.ly/Deut33:29); [PSA 3:3](https://ref.ly/Ps3:3), [PSA 7:10](https://ref.ly/Ps7:10), [PSA 119:114](https://ref.ly/Ps119:114)

Believers should be rightly clothed for battle
----------------------------------------------

**[ROM 13:12–13:14](https://ref.ly/Rom13:12-Rom13:14)** *See also* [EPH 4:22–4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:22-Eph4:24); [COL 3:9](https://ref.ly/Col3:9), [COL 3:12–3:14](https://ref.ly/Col3:12-Col3:14); [1PE 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:1)

Believers should put on the full armour of God
----------------------------------------------

### The belt of truth

**[EPH 6:14](https://ref.ly/Eph6:14)** [PSA 119:95](https://ref.ly/Ps119:95), [PSA 119:116](https://ref.ly/Ps119:116); ; [EPH 4:14–4:15](https://ref.ly/Eph4:14-Eph4:15); ; [COL 2:8](https://ref.ly/Col2:8); ; [2TI 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:13-2Tim1:14); ; [1PE 1:13](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:13)

### The breastplate of righteousness

**[EPH 6:14](https://ref.ly/Eph6:14)** [PRO 4:23](https://ref.ly/Prov4:23), [PRO 13:6](https://ref.ly/Prov13:6); ; [ISA 61:10](https://ref.ly/Isa61:10); ; [ZEC 3:1–3:4](https://ref.ly/Zech3:1-Zech3:4)

### The gospel of peace

**[EPH 6:15](https://ref.ly/Eph6:15)** [JHN 14:27](https://ref.ly/John14:27), [JHN 16:33](https://ref.ly/John16:33); ; [PHP 4:6–4:7](https://ref.ly/Phil4:6-Phil4:7)

### The shield of faith

**[EPH 6:16](https://ref.ly/Eph6:16)** [ROM 1:17](https://ref.ly/Rom1:17); ; [HAB 2:4](https://ref.ly/Hab2:4); ; [1PE 5:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:9); ; [1JN 5:4](https://ref.ly/1John5:4)

### The helmet of salvation

**[EPH 6:17](https://ref.ly/Eph6:17)** [1TH 5:8–5:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:8-1Thess5:9); ; [TIT 2:11–2:14](https://ref.ly/Titus2:11-Titus2:14); ; [1JN 3:3](https://ref.ly/1John3:3)

The Christian's spiritual weapons
---------------------------------

**[2CO 10:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:4)**

### The sword of the Spirit

**[EPH 6:17](https://ref.ly/Eph6:17)** [PSA 119:11](https://ref.ly/Ps119:11); ; [2TI 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:16-2Tim3:17); ; [HEB 4:12](https://ref.ly/Heb4:12)

### The armour of God is worn with prayer

**[EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18)** [PSA 55:16–55:18](https://ref.ly/Ps55:16-Ps55:18); ; [HEB 4:16](https://ref.ly/Heb4:16); ; [JAS 5:16](https://ref.ly/Jas5:16)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 28:7-8; Genesis 15:1; Deuteronomy 33:29; Psalms 3:3; Psalms 7:10; Psalms 119:114; Romans 13:12-14; Ephesians 4:22-24; Colossians 3:9; Colossians 3:12-14; 1 Peter 4:1; Ephesians 6:14; Psalms 119:95; Psalms 119:116; Ephesians 4:14-15; Colossians 2:8; 2 Timothy 1:13-14; 1 Peter 1:13; Proverbs 4:23; Proverbs 13:6; Isaiah 61:10; Zechariah 3:1-4; Ephesians 6:15; John 14:27; John 16:33; Philippians 4:6-7; Ephesians 6:16; Romans 1:17; Habakkuk 2:4; 1 Peter 5:9; 1 John 5:4; Ephesians 6:17; 1 Thessalonians 5:8-9; Titus 2:11-14; 1 John 3:3; 2 Corinthians 10:4; Psalms 119:11; 2 Timothy 3:16-17; Hebrews 4:12; Ephesians 6:18; Psalms 55:16-18; Hebrews 4:16; James 5:16
* **Associated Articles:** 1460: truth (ID: `1460@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1610: Scripture (ID: `1610@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3236: Holy Spirit, and Scripture (ID: `3236@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5292: defence, divine (ID: `5292@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5953: stability (ID: `5953@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6705: peace, believers' experience of (ID: `6705@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7797: teaching (ID: `7797@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8020: faith (ID: `8020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8154: righteousness (ID: `8154@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8422: equipping, spiritual (ID: `8422@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8498: witnessing, and Holy Spirit (ID: `8498@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9613: hope, as confidence (ID: `9613@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8488: tithing (id: 8488)

The practice of offering to God a tenth of the harvest of the land and of livestock, as holy to the LORD. The idea is also used in a more general sense, meaning offering one\-tenth of one's income to the Lord.

Tithing was practised before the giving of the OT law
-----------------------------------------------------

**[GEN 14:18–14:20](https://ref.ly/Gen14:18-Gen14:20)** *Abraham offered a tenth of the goods taken in battle, apparently in thankfulness to God for victory.* *See also* [GEN 28:22](https://ref.ly/Gen28:22); [HEB 7:1–7:3](https://ref.ly/Heb7:1-Heb7:3)

Tithing under the law
---------------------

### Tithing extends to all kinds of produce and livestock

**[LEV 27:30–27:32](https://ref.ly/Lev27:30-Lev27:32)** *Cereal and fruit offerings could be commuted to money.* *See also* [2CH 31:5–31:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:5-2Chr31:6); [NEH 10:35–10:38](https://ref.ly/Neh10:35-Neh10:38), [NEH 13:12](https://ref.ly/Neh13:12)

### All tithes were paid to the Levites

[NUM 18:21–18:24](https://ref.ly/Num18:21-Num18:24); ; [NEH 10:37–10:38](https://ref.ly/Neh10:37-Neh10:38); ; [HEB 7:5](https://ref.ly/Heb7:5)

### Tithes were to be paid in a designated place

[DEU 12:5–12:6](https://ref.ly/Deut12:5-Deut12:6), [DEU 14:22–14:29](https://ref.ly/Deut14:22-Deut14:29), [DEU 26:2](https://ref.ly/Deut26:2) *Tithes were paid in Jerusalem, or every three years in towns where the tithe feast was eaten.*

### Levites offered a tenth to the LORD

[NUM 18:25–18:29](https://ref.ly/Num18:25-Num18:29); ; [NEH 10:39](https://ref.ly/Neh10:39)

Uses of the tithe
-----------------

### Support of the Levites

**[NUM 18:21](https://ref.ly/Num18:21)** *See also* [2CH 31:4](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:4)

### The tithe meal

**[DEU 14:23](https://ref.ly/Deut14:23)**

### A three\-yearly gift to the poor

**[DEU 14:28–14:29](https://ref.ly/Deut14:28-Deut14:29)**

Tithing of minor items must not lead to neglect of major matters
----------------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 23:23](https://ref.ly/Matt23:23)** *See also* [LUK 11:42](https://ref.ly/Luke11:42), [LUK 18:9–18:14](https://ref.ly/Luke18:9-Luke18:14)

Freewill offerings were made in addition to the tithe
-----------------------------------------------------

### They were given freely

**[EXO 36:3](https://ref.ly/Exod36:3)** *See also* [LEV 7:12–7:18](https://ref.ly/Lev7:12-Lev7:18); [NUM 15:3](https://ref.ly/Num15:3); [EZR 1:4](https://ref.ly/Ezra1:4); [PSA 54:6](https://ref.ly/Ps54:6); [EZK 46:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek46:12)

### They were given according to ability

**[DEU 16:10](https://ref.ly/Deut16:10)** *See also* [DEU 16:17](https://ref.ly/Deut16:17); [ACT 11:29](https://ref.ly/Acts11:29); [1CO 16:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:2); [2CO 8:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:12) *There is no specific command in the NT for the church to tithe, but many commands to give generously and to support the Lord's work.*

Blessing promised to those who tithe
------------------------------------

**[MAL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Mal3:10)** *See also* [PRO 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Prov3:9-Prov3:10)

Failure to tithe and abuses of the tithe
----------------------------------------

**[MAL 3:8–3:10](https://ref.ly/Mal3:8-Mal3:10)** *See also* [LEV 27:33](https://ref.ly/Lev27:33); [1SA 8:15](https://ref.ly/1Sam8:15), [1SA 8:17](https://ref.ly/1Sam8:17); [NEH 13:10](https://ref.ly/Neh13:10)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 14:18-20; Genesis 28:22; Hebrews 7:1-3; Leviticus 27:30-32; 2 Chronicles 31:5-6; Nehemiah 10:35-38; Nehemiah 13:12; Numbers 18:21-24; Nehemiah 10:37-38; Hebrews 7:5; Deuteronomy 12:5-6; Deuteronomy 14:22-29; Deuteronomy 26:2; Numbers 18:25-29; Nehemiah 10:39; Numbers 18:21; 2 Chronicles 31:4; Deuteronomy 14:23; Deuteronomy 14:28-29; Matthew 23:23; Luke 11:42; Luke 18:9-14; Exodus 36:3; Leviticus 7:12-18; Numbers 15:3; Ezra 1:4; Psalms 54:6; Ezekiel 46:12; Deuteronomy 16:10; Deuteronomy 16:17; Acts 11:29; 1 Corinthians 16:2; 2 Corinthians 8:12; Malachi 3:10; Proverbs 3:9-10; Malachi 3:8-10; Leviticus 27:33; 1 Samuel 8:15; 1 Samuel 8:17; Nehemiah 13:10
* **Associated Articles:** 4442: firstfruits (ID: `4442@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5375: law (ID: `5375@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5412: money (ID: `5412@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5446: poverty (ID: `5446@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5577: taxation (ID: `5577@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7366: freewill offering (ID: `7366@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7402: offerings (ID: `7402@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7550: Pharisees (ID: `7550@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7766: priests (ID: `7766@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7912: collections (ID: `7912@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8260: generosity (ID: `8260@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8434: giving (ID: `8434@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8489: urgency (id: 8489)

The urgency of the call to repent
---------------------------------

### In the preaching of John the Baptist

**[MAT 3:2](https://ref.ly/Matt3:2)** parallels [MRK 1:4](https://ref.ly/Mark1:4), [LUK 3:3](https://ref.ly/Luke3:3)

### In the preaching of Jesus Christ

**[MRK 1:15](https://ref.ly/Mark1:15)** *See also* [MAT 4:17](https://ref.ly/Matt4:17); [LUK 13:3](https://ref.ly/Luke13:3)

### In the preaching of Peter

**[ACT 2:38](https://ref.ly/Acts2:38)** *See also* [ACT 3:19](https://ref.ly/Acts3:19)

### In the preaching of Paul

[ACT 20:21](https://ref.ly/Acts20:21), [ACT 26:20](https://ref.ly/Acts26:20)

The urgency of the need to proclaim the gospel
----------------------------------------------

**[2TI 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:1-2Tim4:2)** *See also* [JHN 4:35–4:37](https://ref.ly/John4:35-John4:37); [2CO 6:2](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:2); [1TH 5:2](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:2) *in the light of the coming day of the Lord*

Examples of urgent summons by officials
---------------------------------------

[NUM 22:37](https://ref.ly/Num22:37); ; [1SA 21:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam21:8); ; [DAN 3:22](https://ref.ly/Dan3:22)

## 8490: watchfulness (id: 8490)

The state of being alert and expectant; watching over someone in one's care or waiting for the arrival of someone important or for some significant event. Scripture lays particular emphasis on the need to watch for the second coming of Jesus Christ.

* **Associated Articles:** 8491: watchfulness, divine (ID: `8491@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8492: watchfulness, of leaders (ID: `8492@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8493: watchfulness, of believers (ID: `8493@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8491: watchfulness, divine (id: 8491)

The Lord's alertness to the needs of his people, his constant care for them and his awareness of the power and evil intent of their enemies.

The Lord's watchfulness over his people in danger or trouble
------------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 121:1–121:8](https://ref.ly/Ps121:1-Ps121:8)** *See also* [EXO 3:16](https://ref.ly/Exod3:16); [DEU 32:9–32:10](https://ref.ly/Deut32:9-Deut32:10); [EZR 5:5](https://ref.ly/Ezra5:5); [PSA 1:6](https://ref.ly/Ps1:6), [PSA 11:4–11:5](https://ref.ly/Ps11:4-Ps11:5), [PSA 17:8](https://ref.ly/Ps17:8), [PSA 32:6](https://ref.ly/Ps32:6), [PSA 33:16–33:18](https://ref.ly/Ps33:16-Ps33:18), [PSA 34:7](https://ref.ly/Ps34:7), [PSA 127:1](https://ref.ly/Ps127:1), [PSA 145:20](https://ref.ly/Ps145:20); [ZEC 9:8](https://ref.ly/Zech9:8), [ZEC 12:4](https://ref.ly/Zech12:4); [MAT 10:29–10:31](https://ref.ly/Matt10:29-Matt10:31); [JHN 10:1–10:9](https://ref.ly/John10:1-John10:9); [2TI 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:12)

The Lord's watchfulness means that his people's needs are met
-------------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 146:9](https://ref.ly/Ps146:9)** *See also* [GEN 28:15](https://ref.ly/Gen28:15), [GEN 48:15](https://ref.ly/Gen48:15); [DEU 2:7](https://ref.ly/Deut2:7), [DEU 11:12](https://ref.ly/Deut11:12); [2CH 16:9](https://ref.ly/2Chr16:9); [JOB 10:12](https://ref.ly/Job10:12), [JOB 29:2](https://ref.ly/Job29:2); [JER 24:6](https://ref.ly/Jer24:6), [JER 31:28](https://ref.ly/Jer31:28); [DAN 9:18](https://ref.ly/Dan9:18)

### The watchfulness of a shepherd

[PSA 23:1](https://ref.ly/Ps23:1), [PSA 28:9](https://ref.ly/Ps28:9); ; [ISA 40:11](https://ref.ly/Isa40:11); ; [MAT 2:6](https://ref.ly/Matt2:6); ; [JHN 10:1–10:9](https://ref.ly/John10:1-John10:9)

The Lord's watchfulness means that he hears his people's prayers
----------------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 34:15](https://ref.ly/Ps34:15)** *See also* [1KI 8:28–8:30](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:28-1Kgs8:30) parallel [2CH 6:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:20); [1KI 9:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:3) parallel [2CH 7:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:16); [NEH 1:6](https://ref.ly/Neh1:6); [1PE 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:12)

The Lord's watchfulness with a view to correction
-------------------------------------------------

**[JER 7:25–7:26](https://ref.ly/Jer7:25-Jer7:26)** *See also* [JER 7:13](https://ref.ly/Jer7:13), [JER 11:7](https://ref.ly/Jer11:7), [JER 25:4](https://ref.ly/Jer25:4), [JER 32:33](https://ref.ly/Jer32:33); [2SA 22:28](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:28); [JOB 33:11](https://ref.ly/Job33:11); [JER 16:16–16:17](https://ref.ly/Jer16:16-Jer16:17)

The Lord's watchfulness in seeking out those who have gone astray
-----------------------------------------------------------------

**[EZK 34:16](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:16)** *See also* [MAT 18:12](https://ref.ly/Matt18:12) parallel [LUK 15:4](https://ref.ly/Luke15:4); [1PE 2:25](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:25)

People are vulnerable without the Lord's watchfulness
-----------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 9:36](https://ref.ly/Matt9:36)** *See also* [1KI 22:17](https://ref.ly/1Kgs22:17) parallel [2CH 18:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr18:16); [ISA 13:14](https://ref.ly/Isa13:14); [EZK 34:11–34:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:11-Ezek34:12)

## 8492: watchfulness, of leaders (id: 8492)

Leaders must be alert to the needs of those they serve and also to the dangers that surround believers in the world. The OT teaching on watchmen provides an indication of the importance of watchfulness and the responsibility of those called to be watchful.

Leaders are required to be watchful
-----------------------------------

**[EZK 3:17](https://ref.ly/Ezek3:17)** *See also* [EZK 33:7–33:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek33:7-Ezek33:9); [JHN 21:16](https://ref.ly/John21:16)

### They are accountable to God

**[EZK 3:18](https://ref.ly/Ezek3:18)** *See also* [MRK 13:34–13:35](https://ref.ly/Mark13:34-Mark13:35); [HEB 13:17](https://ref.ly/Heb13:17)

### They must warn against false teachers

**[ACT 20:31](https://ref.ly/Acts20:31)** *Elders are called overseers in [Acts 20:28](https://ref.ly/Acts20:28); [1Ti 3:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:2); [Tit 1:7](https://ref.ly/Titus1:7); [1Pe 5:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:2).* *See also* [JHN 10:1–10:3](https://ref.ly/John10:1-John10:3); [ACT 20:29](https://ref.ly/Acts20:29); [2TI 4:2–4:5](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:2-2Tim4:5); [TIT 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/Titus1:9-Titus1:11)

### Examples of leaders' warnings to churches

**[1CO 4:14](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:14)** *See also* [ROM 16:17](https://ref.ly/Rom16:17); [GAL 5:21](https://ref.ly/Gal5:21); [1TH 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:1); [TIT 3:10](https://ref.ly/Titus3:10); [REV 22:18](https://ref.ly/Rev22:18)

Leaders' watchfulness in prayer
-------------------------------

**[ISA 62:6–62:7](https://ref.ly/Isa62:6-Isa62:7)** *See also* [1SA 12:23](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:23); [ROM 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Rom1:9-Rom1:10); [EPH 1:16](https://ref.ly/Eph1:16); [PHP 1:4](https://ref.ly/Phil1:4); [2TH 1:11](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:11)

Leaders need to watch over their own lives
------------------------------------------

**[ACT 20:28](https://ref.ly/Acts20:28)** *See also* [MRK 14:29–14:30](https://ref.ly/Mark14:29-Mark14:30); [1TI 3:2–3:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:2-1Tim3:7), [1TI 4:15–4:16](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:15-1Tim4:16); [TIT 1:6–1:8](https://ref.ly/Titus1:6-Titus1:8); [JAS 3:1](https://ref.ly/Jas3:1); [3JN 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/3John1:9-3John1:10)

Watchmen sometimes fail to be watchful
--------------------------------------

[ISA 56:9–56:12](https://ref.ly/Isa56:9-Isa56:12); ; [EZK 34:1–34:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:1-Ezek34:10); ; [ZEC 10:2–10:3](https://ref.ly/Zech10:2-Zech10:3)

* **Associated Passages:** Ezekiel 3:17; Ezekiel 33:7-9; John 21:16; Ezekiel 3:18; Mark 13:34-35; Hebrews 13:17; Acts 20:31; Acts 20:28; 1 Timothy 3:2; Titus 1:7; 1 Peter 5:2; John 10:1-3; Acts 20:29; 2 Timothy 4:2-5; Titus 1:9-11; 1 Corinthians 4:14; Romans 16:17; Galatians 5:21; 1 Thessalonians 4:1; Titus 3:10; Revelation 22:18; Isaiah 62:6-7; 1 Samuel 12:23; Romans 1:9-10; Ephesians 1:16; Philippians 1:4; 2 Thessalonians 1:11; Mark 14:29-30; 1 Timothy 3:2-7; 1 Timothy 4:15-16; Titus 1:6-8; James 3:1; 3 John 1:9-10; Isaiah 56:9-12; Ezekiel 34:1-10; Zechariah 10:2-3

## 8493: watchfulness, of believers (id: 8493)

Alertness to dangers and blessings in the Christian life, and also to opportunities to do good.

Watchfulness for dangers
------------------------

**[1PE 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:8)** *See also* [PRO 4:23](https://ref.ly/Prov4:23)

### The danger of false teaching

**[MAT 7:15](https://ref.ly/Matt7:15)** *See also* [PSA 94:8](https://ref.ly/Ps94:8); [PRO 8:33–8:34](https://ref.ly/Prov8:33-Prov8:34); [MAT 24:4–24:5](https://ref.ly/Matt24:4-Matt24:5); [MRK 8:15](https://ref.ly/Mark8:15); [ROM 16:17](https://ref.ly/Rom16:17); [1CO 16:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:13)

### The danger of temptation

**[MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41)** parallel [MRK 14:38](https://ref.ly/Mark14:38) *See also* [DEU 4:15](https://ref.ly/Deut4:15); [1KI 2:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:4); [LUK 12:15](https://ref.ly/Luke12:15), [LUK 17:1–17:3](https://ref.ly/Luke17:1-Luke17:3); [1CO 10:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:12); [GAL 6:1](https://ref.ly/Gal6:1); [2JN 1:8](https://ref.ly/2John1:8)

### The danger of neglecting the word of God

**[DEU 4:9](https://ref.ly/Deut4:9)** *See also* [JOS 22:5](https://ref.ly/Josh22:5); [1KI 2:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:3); [HEB 2:1](https://ref.ly/Heb2:1), [HEB 12:25](https://ref.ly/Heb12:25); [2PE 1:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:19)

### The danger of damage to the Lord's work

[NEH 4:9](https://ref.ly/Neh4:9), [NEH 7:3](https://ref.ly/Neh7:3)

### The danger of speaking sinfully

[PSA 39:1](https://ref.ly/Ps39:1), [PSA 141:3](https://ref.ly/Ps141:3); ; [PRO 13:3](https://ref.ly/Prov13:3), [PRO 21:23](https://ref.ly/Prov21:23); ; [JAS 1:26](https://ref.ly/Jas1:26), [JAS 3:5–3:8](https://ref.ly/Jas3:5-Jas3:8); ; [1PE 3:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:10)

Watchfulness for blessings
--------------------------

[PSA 25:15](https://ref.ly/Ps25:15), [PSA 59:9](https://ref.ly/Ps59:9), [PSA 123:1–123:2](https://ref.ly/Ps123:1-Ps123:2), [PSA 130:5–130:6](https://ref.ly/Ps130:5-Ps130:6); ; [ISA 40:9](https://ref.ly/Isa40:9); ; [MIC 7:7](https://ref.ly/Mic7:7); ; [LUK 2:25](https://ref.ly/Luke2:25), [LUK 2:36–2:38](https://ref.ly/Luke2:36-Luke2:38)

Watchfulness and prayer
-----------------------

**[COL 4:2–4:3](https://ref.ly/Col4:2-Col4:3)** *See also* [MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41) parallel [MRK 14:38](https://ref.ly/Mark14:38); [MRK 13:33](https://ref.ly/Mark13:33); [LUK 21:36](https://ref.ly/Luke21:36); [EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18); [1PE 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:7)

Watchfulness for the return of Jesus Christ
-------------------------------------------

**[MAT 24:42–24:44](https://ref.ly/Matt24:42-Matt24:44)** *See also* [MAT 25:1–25:13](https://ref.ly/Matt25:1-Matt25:13); [MRK 13:32–13:37](https://ref.ly/Mark13:32-Mark13:37); [LUK 12:35–12:40](https://ref.ly/Luke12:35-Luke12:40), [LUK 21:32–21:36](https://ref.ly/Luke21:32-Luke21:36); [1TH 5:4–5:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:4-1Thess5:8); [REV 16:15](https://ref.ly/Rev16:15)

Watchfulness for opportunities to serve the Lord
------------------------------------------------

**[1PE 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15)** *See also* [EPH 5:15–5:16](https://ref.ly/Eph5:15-Eph5:16); [COL 4:5–4:6](https://ref.ly/Col4:5-Col4:6)

### Meeting the needs of others

**[EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18)** *See also* [MAT 26:36–26:40](https://ref.ly/Matt26:36-Matt26:40); [GAL 6:10](https://ref.ly/Gal6:10); [TIT 3:1](https://ref.ly/Titus3:1)

Contrast with the watchfulness of unbelievers with evil intent
--------------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 37:32](https://ref.ly/Ps37:32)** *See also* [1SA 18:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:9), [1SA 19:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam19:11); [PSA 10:8](https://ref.ly/Ps10:8); [JER 20:10](https://ref.ly/Jer20:10); [MAT 26:16](https://ref.ly/Matt26:16); [MRK 3:2](https://ref.ly/Mark3:2); [ACT 9:24](https://ref.ly/Acts9:24)

Warning against neglect of watchfulness
---------------------------------------

[REV 3:2–3:3](https://ref.ly/Rev3:2-Rev3:3)

## 8495: witnessing (id: 8495)

The task of declaring what has happened, especially in relation to the life, death and resurrection of Jesus Christ. Believers are given the responsibility of proclaiming the good news of Jesus Christ to the world at all times and in all places.

* **Associated Articles:** 8496: witnessing, importance of (ID: `8496@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8497: witnessing, approaches to (ID: `8497@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8498: witnessing, and Holy Spirit (ID: `8498@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8496: witnessing, importance of (id: 8496)

Sharing the good news about God and Jesus Christ with others is a work to which some believers have a special calling, but in which all believers are to take part.

Witnessing is sharing the truth of God
--------------------------------------

**[PSA 145:10–145:12](https://ref.ly/Ps145:10-Ps145:12)**; **[LUK 24:46–24:48](https://ref.ly/Luke24:46-Luke24:48)** *See also* [1CH 16:7–16:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:7-1Chr16:9); [PSA 71:15](https://ref.ly/Ps71:15); [MAT 27:54](https://ref.ly/Matt27:54) parallels [MRK 15:39](https://ref.ly/Mark15:39), [LUK 23:47](https://ref.ly/Luke23:47); [JHN 1:35–1:36](https://ref.ly/John1:35-John1:36), [JHN 4:29](https://ref.ly/John4:29)

Believers are commanded to witness
----------------------------------

**[MAT 28:18–28:19](https://ref.ly/Matt28:18-Matt28:19)** *See also* [ISA 12:4–12:5](https://ref.ly/Isa12:4-Isa12:5); [MAT 24:14](https://ref.ly/Matt24:14) parallel [MRK 13:10](https://ref.ly/Mark13:10); [ACT 1:8](https://ref.ly/Acts1:8), [ACT 9:15–9:16](https://ref.ly/Acts9:15-Acts9:16)

Special ministries of witnessing
--------------------------------

### By the prophets

**[JHN 1:6–1:8](https://ref.ly/John1:6-John1:8)** *See also* [JER 1:4–1:9](https://ref.ly/Jer1:4-Jer1:9); [EZK 33:7–33:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek33:7-Ezek33:9); [JON 1:2](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:2), [JON 1:9](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:9); [JHN 1:15](https://ref.ly/John1:15), [JHN 1:29](https://ref.ly/John1:29), [JHN 1:36](https://ref.ly/John1:36); [ACT 10:43](https://ref.ly/Acts10:43)

### By Jesus Christ

**[JHN 18:37](https://ref.ly/John18:37)** *See also* [JHN 3:31–3:34](https://ref.ly/John3:31-John3:34); [REV 1:5](https://ref.ly/Rev1:5), [REV 3:14](https://ref.ly/Rev3:14)

### By the apostles

**[ACT 4:33](https://ref.ly/Acts4:33)** *See also* [ACT 2:32](https://ref.ly/Acts2:32), [ACT 10:39–10:42](https://ref.ly/Acts10:39-Acts10:42), [ACT 13:30–13:31](https://ref.ly/Acts13:30-Acts13:31); [1JN 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/1John1:1-1John1:3)

### By Christian leaders

**[2TI 1:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:8)** *Paul, in prison for his faith, encourages the young leader, Timothy.* *See also* [ACT 8:5](https://ref.ly/Acts8:5); [EPH 4:11](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11)

Witnessing is a task for all God's people
-----------------------------------------

**[1PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9), [1PE 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15)** *See also* [PSA 26:6–26:7](https://ref.ly/Ps26:6-Ps26:7), [PSA 107:1–107:2](https://ref.ly/Ps107:1-Ps107:2)ISA [43:10](https://ref.ly/Ps43:10), [ISA 43:12](https://ref.ly/Isa43:12), [ISA 44:8](https://ref.ly/Isa44:8)[ISA 52:7](https://ref.ly/Isa52:7); [ACT 8:4](https://ref.ly/Acts8:4)

Witnessing is a major aspect of Christian living
------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 10:9–10:10](https://ref.ly/Rom10:9-Rom10:10)** *See also* [MAT 10:32–10:33](https://ref.ly/Matt10:32-Matt10:33) parallels [MRK 8:38](https://ref.ly/Mark8:38), [LUK 12:8–12:9](https://ref.ly/Luke12:8-Luke12:9); [2CO 4:13](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:13); [1JN 2:23](https://ref.ly/1John2:23), [1JN 4:15](https://ref.ly/1John4:15)

Examples of witnessing to Jesus Christ
--------------------------------------

[MAT 16:16](https://ref.ly/Matt16:16) parallels [MRK 8:29](https://ref.ly/Mark8:29), [LUK 9:20](https://ref.ly/Luke9:20) *Simon Peter*; ; [LUK 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/Luke2:16-Luke2:17) *shepherds*; ; [JHN 1:40–1:42](https://ref.ly/John1:40-John1:42) *Andrew*; ; [JHN 1:49](https://ref.ly/John1:49) *Nathanael*; ; [JHN 11:27](https://ref.ly/John11:27) *Martha*; ; [JHN 20:28](https://ref.ly/John20:28) *Thomas*; ; [ACT 8:37](https://ref.ly/Acts8:37) *the Ethiopian eunuch*

Witnessing recounts personal experience
---------------------------------------

**[ISA 63:7](https://ref.ly/Isa63:7)** *See also* [PSA 66:16](https://ref.ly/Ps66:16); [JER 51:10](https://ref.ly/Jer51:10); [DAN 4:2](https://ref.ly/Dan4:2); [MAT 9:27–9:31](https://ref.ly/Matt9:27-Matt9:31); [MRK 1:40–1:45](https://ref.ly/Mark1:40-Mark1:45); [JHN 9:25](https://ref.ly/John9:25); [ACT 4:20](https://ref.ly/Acts4:20)

Witnessing to the resurrection of Jesus Christ
----------------------------------------------

**[ACT 2:32](https://ref.ly/Acts2:32)** *See also* [LUK 24:33–24:35](https://ref.ly/Luke24:33-Luke24:35); [ACT 5:30–5:32](https://ref.ly/Acts5:30-Acts5:32); [1CO 15:3–15:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:3-1Cor15:7)

## 8497: witnessing, approaches to (id: 8497)

Scripture provides teaching, supported by examples, concerning when believers should witness, the methods they are to use, and the manner of doing it.

When and where to witness
-------------------------

### In the home and family

**[MRK 5:18–5:19](https://ref.ly/Mark5:18-Mark5:19)** parallel [LUK 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/Luke8:38-Luke8:39) *See also* [2KI 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs5:1-2Kgs5:3); [JHN 1:41](https://ref.ly/John1:41)

### To individuals

**[JHN 1:40–1:42](https://ref.ly/John1:40-John1:42)** *See also* [JHN 4:7–4:26](https://ref.ly/John4:7-John4:26); [ACT 8:30–8:35](https://ref.ly/Acts8:30-Acts8:35)

### To assembled groups

**[ACT 17:17](https://ref.ly/Acts17:17)** *See also* [ACT 5:42](https://ref.ly/Acts5:42), [ACT 16:13](https://ref.ly/Acts16:13), [ACT 19:8–19:9](https://ref.ly/Acts19:8-Acts19:9)

Methods of witnessing
---------------------

### Sharing personal testimony

**[JHN 4:29](https://ref.ly/John4:29)** *See also* [ACT 22:3–22:8](https://ref.ly/Acts22:3-Acts22:8) *Paul uses the account of his conversion in witnessing.*

### Explaining the Scriptures

**[ACT 8:30–8:35](https://ref.ly/Acts8:30-Acts8:35)** *See also* [ISA 53:7–53:8](https://ref.ly/Isa53:7-Isa53:8); [PSA 119:172](https://ref.ly/Ps119:172); [ACT 17:1–17:3](https://ref.ly/Acts17:1-Acts17:3), [ACT 17:10–17:12](https://ref.ly/Acts17:10-Acts17:12)

### Using prophetic gifts

**[1CO 14:24–14:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:24-1Cor14:25)**

### Answering questions

**[COL 4:6](https://ref.ly/Col4:6)** *See also* [JHN 9:8–9:11](https://ref.ly/John9:8-John9:11), [JHN 9:15–9:17](https://ref.ly/John9:15-John9:17), [JHN 9:24–9:25](https://ref.ly/John9:24-John9:25); [1PE 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15)

### Through writing

**[JHN 20:31](https://ref.ly/John20:31)** *See also* [LUK 1:1–1:4](https://ref.ly/Luke1:1-Luke1:4)

### Through holy living

**[MAT 5:16](https://ref.ly/Matt5:16)** *See also* [1PE 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:1-1Pet3:2)

### Through acts of devotion

**[MAT 26:6–26:7](https://ref.ly/Matt26:6-Matt26:7)** parallel [MRK 14:3](https://ref.ly/Mark14:3) *See also* [LUK 7:36–7:38](https://ref.ly/Luke7:36-Luke7:38); [JHN 12:1–12:3](https://ref.ly/John12:1-John12:3)

The manner of witnessing
------------------------

### With love

**[MRK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21)** *See also* [PHP 1:15–1:17](https://ref.ly/Phil1:15-Phil1:17)

### With urgency

**[2CO 5:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:20)** *See also* [EZK 33:7–33:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek33:7-Ezek33:9)

### Fearlessly

**[EPH 6:19–6:20](https://ref.ly/Eph6:19-Eph6:20)** *See also* [ACT 4:29](https://ref.ly/Acts4:29)

### Clearly and courteously

**[1PE 3:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:15)** *See also* [ACT 26:1–26:3](https://ref.ly/Acts26:1-Acts26:3); [COL 4:4–4:6](https://ref.ly/Col4:4-Col4:6)

## 8498: witnessing, and Holy Spirit (id: 8498)

Christian witnessing is made effective through the empowering, strengthening and guiding of the Holy Spirit. Witnessing is an aspect of spiritual warfare, and believers need supernatural aid to face Satan's opposition.

The Holy Spirit supports believers in witnessing
------------------------------------------------

**[ACT 5:31–5:32](https://ref.ly/Acts5:31-Acts5:32)** *See also* [JHN 15:26–15:27](https://ref.ly/John15:26-John15:27)

The Holy Spirit empowers effective witness
------------------------------------------

**[ACT 1:8](https://ref.ly/Acts1:8)**; **[1CO 2:1–2:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:1-1Cor2:5)** *See also* [LUK 4:14–4:19](https://ref.ly/Luke4:14-Luke4:19), [LUK 24:48–24:49](https://ref.ly/Luke24:48-Luke24:49)

### He confirms the testimony of believers

[1TH 1:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:5); ; [HEB 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/Heb2:3-Heb2:4)

### He convinces people of their need

[JHN 16:7–16:11](https://ref.ly/John16:7-John16:11)

### He brings people to new birth

[JHN 3:5–3:8](https://ref.ly/John3:5-John3:8)

The Holy Spirit guides believers in witnessing
----------------------------------------------

**[ACT 8:39–8:40](https://ref.ly/Acts8:39-Acts8:40)** *See also* [ACT 8:29–8:35](https://ref.ly/Acts8:29-Acts8:35), [ACT 16:6–16:7](https://ref.ly/Acts16:6-Acts16:7)

Witnessing and spiritual warfare
--------------------------------

**[REV 12:11](https://ref.ly/Rev12:11)** *See also* [EPH 6:15–6:17](https://ref.ly/Eph6:15-Eph6:17)

Witnessing and persecution
--------------------------

### Witnessing results in persecution

**[REV 1:9](https://ref.ly/Rev1:9)** *See also* [ACT 4:17](https://ref.ly/Acts4:17), [ACT 5:40](https://ref.ly/Acts5:40), [ACT 7:54–7:60](https://ref.ly/Acts7:54-Acts7:60) *Stephen's witnessing leads him to become the first Christian martyr. The English word “martyr” comes from the Greek word for “witness”*; [ACT 22:22–22:25](https://ref.ly/Acts22:22-Acts22:25); [EPH 6:19–6:20](https://ref.ly/Eph6:19-Eph6:20); [COL 4:3–4:4](https://ref.ly/Col4:3-Col4:4); [2TI 1:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:8); [REV 2:12–2:13](https://ref.ly/Rev2:12-Rev2:13), [REV 6:9](https://ref.ly/Rev6:9), [REV 17:6](https://ref.ly/Rev17:6)

### Supernatural help to face persecution

**[MAT 10:18–10:20](https://ref.ly/Matt10:18-Matt10:20)** parallels [MRK 13:9–13:11](https://ref.ly/Mark13:9-Mark13:11), [LUK 21:12–21:15](https://ref.ly/Luke21:12-Luke21:15)**[ACT 7:55](https://ref.ly/Acts7:55)** *See also* [ACT 5:18–5:19](https://ref.ly/Acts5:18-Acts5:19), [ACT 18:9–18:10](https://ref.ly/Acts18:9-Acts18:10)

### Witness is promoted by persecution

[ACT 8:1–8:5](https://ref.ly/Acts8:1-Acts8:5); ; [PHP 1:12–1:14](https://ref.ly/Phil1:12-Phil1:14)
