## 8602: prayer (id: 8602)

Fellowship with God through Jesus Christ, expressed in adoration, thanksgiving and intercession, through which believers draw near to God and learn more of his will for their lives. Scripture stresses the vital role of the Holy Spirit in stimulating and guiding prayer.

* **Associated Articles:** 8603: prayer, as a relationship with God (ID: `8603@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8604: prayer, as a response to God (ID: `8604@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8605: prayer, and God's will (ID: `8605@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8606: prayer, and Holy Spirit (ID: `8606@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8607: prayer, God's promises concerning (ID: `8607@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8608: prayer, and worship (ID: `8608@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8609: prayer, as praise and thanksgiving (ID: `8609@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8610: prayer, as asking God (ID: `8610@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8611: prayer, for others (ID: `8611@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8612: prayer, and faith (ID: `8612@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8613: prayer, persistence in (ID: `8613@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8614: prayer, answers to (ID: `8614@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8615: prayer, doubts about (ID: `8615@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8616: prayerlessness (ID: `8616@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8617: prayer, advice for effective (ID: `8617@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8618: prayerfulness (ID: `8618@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8619: prayer, in the church (ID: `8619@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8620: prayer, practicalities of (ID: `8620@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8603: prayer, as a relationship with God (id: 8603)

Prayer is based on God's love for believers. Through his grace, he gives them things which they do not deserve, while through his mercy he shields them from those things which they do deserve.

God's children can turn to their Father in prayer
-------------------------------------------------

### Under the old covenant

**[ISA 64:8–64:9](https://ref.ly/Isa64:8-Isa64:9)** *See also* [PSA 103:13–103:14](https://ref.ly/Ps103:13-Ps103:14); [ISA 63:16](https://ref.ly/Isa63:16)

### Under the new covenant

**[MAT 6:9–6:13](https://ref.ly/Matt6:9-Matt6:13)** parallel [LUK 11:2–11:4](https://ref.ly/Luke11:2-Luke11:4) *See also* [MAT 6:6](https://ref.ly/Matt6:6), [MAT 7:7–7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:7-Matt7:11) parallel [LUK 11:9–11:13](https://ref.ly/Luke11:9-Luke11:13); [ROM 8:15](https://ref.ly/Rom8:15); [GAL 4:6](https://ref.ly/Gal4:6)

### Jesus Christ's prayer life with his Father

**[MRK 14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:36)** parallels [MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39), [MAT 26:42](https://ref.ly/Matt26:42), [LUK 22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42) *See also* [JHN 17:1–17:26](https://ref.ly/John17:1-John17:26)

It is possible to approach God in prayer because of Jesus Christ's sacrifice
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[HEB 10:19–10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:19-Heb10:22)** *See also* [EPH 3:12](https://ref.ly/Eph3:12); [HEB 7:15–7:19](https://ref.ly/Heb7:15-Heb7:19)

Prayer reflects a longing after God
-----------------------------------

**[PSA 42:1–42:2](https://ref.ly/Ps42:1-Ps42:2)**; **[JER 29:12–29:13](https://ref.ly/Jer29:12-Jer29:13)** *See also* [PSA 130:5–130:6](https://ref.ly/Ps130:5-Ps130:6), [PSA 145:18–145:19](https://ref.ly/Ps145:18-Ps145:19); [PRO 8:17](https://ref.ly/Prov8:17); [ISA 26:9](https://ref.ly/Isa26:9), [ISA 33:2](https://ref.ly/Isa33:2); [LAM 3:25](https://ref.ly/Lam3:25)

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 64:8-9; Psalms 103:13-14; Isaiah 63:16; Matthew 6:9-13; Luke 11:2-4; Matthew 6:6; Matthew 7:7-11; Luke 11:9-13; Romans 8:15; Galatians 4:6; Mark 14:36; Matthew 26:39; Matthew 26:42; Luke 22:42; John 17:1-26; Hebrews 10:19-22; Ephesians 3:12; Hebrews 7:15-19; Psalms 42:1-2; Jeremiah 29:12-13; Psalms 130:5-6; Psalms 145:18-19; Proverbs 8:17; Isaiah 26:9; Isaiah 33:2; Lamentations 3:25
* **Associated Articles:** 1040: God, fatherhood of (ID: `1040@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1250: Abba (ID: `1250@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6606: access to God (ID: `6606@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8122: friendship, with God (ID: `8122@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8135: knowing God, nature of (ID: `8135@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8656: longing for God (ID: `8656@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8604: prayer, as a response to God (id: 8604)

Prayer offers believers a means of acknowledging the character and purposes of God and the opportunity to seek guidance concerning his will for them.

The direction of prayer is upwards towards God
----------------------------------------------

**[PSA 123:1–123:2](https://ref.ly/Ps123:1-Ps123:2)** *See also* [PSA 25:1](https://ref.ly/Ps25:1), [PSA 86:4](https://ref.ly/Ps86:4), [PSA 121:1–121:2](https://ref.ly/Ps121:1-Ps121:2), [PSA 143:8](https://ref.ly/Ps143:8), [PSA 145:15](https://ref.ly/Ps145:15)

Fellowship with God through prayer
----------------------------------

**[PSA 73:23–73:26](https://ref.ly/Ps73:23-Ps73:26)** *See also* [EXO 33:11](https://ref.ly/Exod33:11); [1KI 8:57–8:59](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:57-1Kgs8:59); [PSA 16:2](https://ref.ly/Ps16:2), [PSA 145:17–145:20](https://ref.ly/Ps145:17-Ps145:20); [MAT 18:20](https://ref.ly/Matt18:20)

The habit of prayer
-------------------

**[LUK 5:16](https://ref.ly/Luke5:16)** *See also* [NEH 2:4](https://ref.ly/Neh2:4) *Nehemiah felt so close to God that it was automatic for him to speak to God and the king almost simultaneously*; [DAN 6:10–6:11](https://ref.ly/Dan6:10-Dan6:11), [DAN 6:13](https://ref.ly/Dan6:13)

Contemplative prayer as a response to God's presence
----------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 27:4](https://ref.ly/Ps27:4)** *See also* [1CH 16:10–16:11](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:10-1Chr16:11) parallel [PSA 105:3–105:4](https://ref.ly/Ps105:3-Ps105:4); [PSA 27:8](https://ref.ly/Ps27:8); [ISA 55:6](https://ref.ly/Isa55:6); [JER 29:13](https://ref.ly/Jer29:13); [ACT 17:27–17:28](https://ref.ly/Acts17:27-Acts17:28); [HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)

Prayer of acceptance in response to God's call
----------------------------------------------

**[1SA 3:10](https://ref.ly/1Sam3:10)** *See also* [ISA 6:8](https://ref.ly/Isa6:8); [REV 3:20](https://ref.ly/Rev3:20)

Prayer of confession
--------------------

### In response to God's holiness

**[1JN 1:5–1:9](https://ref.ly/1John1:5-1John1:9)** *See also* [ISA 6:3–6:7](https://ref.ly/Isa6:3-Isa6:7), [ISA 55:7–55:9](https://ref.ly/Isa55:7-Isa55:9)

### In response to sin being exposed

**[PSA 51:1–51:2](https://ref.ly/Ps51:1-Ps51:2)** *See also* [PSA 51:3–51:12](https://ref.ly/Ps51:3-Ps51:12)

Prayer of co\-operation in response to God's purposes
-----------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 15:7–15:8](https://ref.ly/John15:7-John15:8)** *See also* [PSA 119:105–119:106](https://ref.ly/Ps119:105-Ps119:106); [LUK 1:38](https://ref.ly/Luke1:38); [JHN 15:16](https://ref.ly/John15:16)

Prayer of confidence in response to God's mercy and grace
---------------------------------------------------------

**[HEB 4:16](https://ref.ly/Heb4:16)** *See also* [NEH 1:4–1:7](https://ref.ly/Neh1:4-Neh1:7); [PSA 123:1–123:2](https://ref.ly/Ps123:1-Ps123:2); [JAS 1:5–1:8](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5-Jas1:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 123:1-2; Psalms 25:1; Psalms 86:4; Psalms 121:1-2; Psalms 143:8; Psalms 145:15; Psalms 73:23-26; Exodus 33:11; 1 Kings 8:57-59; Psalms 16:2; Psalms 145:17-20; Matthew 18:20; Luke 5:16; Nehemiah 2:4; Daniel 6:10-11; Daniel 6:13; Psalms 27:4; 1 Chronicles 16:10-11; Psalms 105:3-4; Psalms 27:8; Isaiah 55:6; Jeremiah 29:13; Acts 17:27-28; Hebrews 11:6; 1 Samuel 3:10; Isaiah 6:8; Revelation 3:20; 1 John 1:5-9; Isaiah 6:3-7; Isaiah 55:7-9; Psalms 51:1-2; Psalms 51:3-12; John 15:7-8; Psalms 119:105-106; Luke 1:38; John 15:16; Hebrews 4:16; Nehemiah 1:4-7; James 1:5-8
* **Associated Articles:** 1055: God, grace and mercy of (ID: `1055@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1065: God, holiness of (ID: `1065@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5767: attitudes, in prayer (ID: `5767@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6602: acceptance (ID: `6602@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6624: confession, of sin (ID: `6624@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6732: repentance (ID: `6732@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7921: fellowship (ID: `7921@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8605: prayer, and God's will (id: 8605)

Prayer is concerned not only with the well\-being of the one who prays. A vital aspect of its purpose is to allow the will of God to be done, and to bring glory and honour to his name.

True motives for prayer
-----------------------

### The desire that God's name be honoured

**[MAT 6:9–6:13](https://ref.ly/Matt6:9-Matt6:13)** parallel [LUK 11:2–11:4](https://ref.ly/Luke11:2-Luke11:4) *See also* [NUM 14:13–14:16](https://ref.ly/Num14:13-Num14:16); [JOS 7:7–7:9](https://ref.ly/Josh7:7-Josh7:9); [2SA 7:25–7:26](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:25-2Sam7:26); [1KI 18:36–18:37](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:36-1Kgs18:37); [PSA 115:1](https://ref.ly/Ps115:1); [JHN 17:1](https://ref.ly/John17:1)

### The desire that God's will be fulfilled

**[MAT 6:9–6:13](https://ref.ly/Matt6:9-Matt6:13)** parallel [LUK 11:2–11:4](https://ref.ly/Luke11:2-Luke11:4) *See also* [MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39) parallels [MRK 14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:36), [LUK 22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42); [MAT 26:42](https://ref.ly/Matt26:42); [HEB 10:7](https://ref.ly/Heb10:7) *Submission to God's will characterised Jesus Christ's prayer life.*

God answers prayer that accords with his will
---------------------------------------------

**[1JN 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/1John5:14-1John5:15)**

### Petitioners may enquire of God to discover his will

**[PSA 143:10](https://ref.ly/Ps143:10)** *See also* [GEN 25:22–25:23](https://ref.ly/Gen25:22-Gen25:23); [JDG 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Judg1:1-Judg1:2); [2SA 2:1](https://ref.ly/2Sam2:1); [1CH 14:14–14:15](https://ref.ly/1Chr14:14-1Chr14:15)

### The Holy Spirit helps believers to pray in God's will

**[ROM 8:26–8:27](https://ref.ly/Rom8:26-Rom8:27)**

God's response to prayers allows believers to discern his will
--------------------------------------------------------------

**[2CO 12:7–12:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:7-2Cor12:9)** *See also* [EXO 33:18–33:20](https://ref.ly/Exod33:18-Exod33:20); [2SA 12:15–12:18](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:15-2Sam12:18); [JOB 19:7–19:8](https://ref.ly/Job19:7-Job19:8); [PSA 35:13–35:14](https://ref.ly/Ps35:13-Ps35:14)

God does not respond to the prayers of the wicked
-------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 9:31](https://ref.ly/John9:31)** *See also* [PSA 66:18](https://ref.ly/Ps66:18); [PRO 15:8](https://ref.ly/Prov15:8); [ISA 1:15](https://ref.ly/Isa1:15), [ISA 59:1–59:2](https://ref.ly/Isa59:1-Isa59:2); [LAM 3:44](https://ref.ly/Lam3:44); [1PE 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:12)

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 6:9-13; Luke 11:2-4; Numbers 14:13-16; Joshua 7:7-9; 2 Samuel 7:25-26; 1 Kings 18:36-37; Psalms 115:1; John 17:1; Matthew 26:39; Mark 14:36; Luke 22:42; Matthew 26:42; Hebrews 10:7; 1 John 5:14-15; Psalms 143:10; Genesis 25:22-23; Judges 1:1-2; 2 Samuel 2:1; 1 Chronicles 14:14-15; Romans 8:26-27; 2 Corinthians 12:7-9; Exodus 33:18-20; 2 Samuel 12:15-18; Job 19:7-8; Psalms 35:13-14; John 9:31; Psalms 66:18; Proverbs 15:8; Isaiah 1:15; Isaiah 59:1-2; Lamentations 3:44; 1 Peter 3:12
* **Associated Articles:** 1115: God, purpose of (ID: `1115@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1175: God, will of (ID: `1175@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5959: submission (ID: `5959@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8124: guidance (ID: `8124@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8444: honouring God (ID: `8444@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8606: prayer, and Holy Spirit (id: 8606)

See [3221: Holy Spirit, and prayer](3221.md)



## 8607: prayer, God's promises concerning (id: 8607)

God promises to hear and respond to the prayers of his people, when they pray in the name of his Son and according to his will.

God expects his people to make requests of him in prayer
--------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 7:7–7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:7-Matt7:11)** parallel [LUK 11:9–11:13](https://ref.ly/Luke11:9-Luke11:13) *See also* [MAT 21:22](https://ref.ly/Matt21:22)

God promises to answer prayer in the name of Jesus Christ
---------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 14:13–14:14](https://ref.ly/John14:13-John14:14), [JHN 15:7](https://ref.ly/John15:7)** *See also* [JHN 15:16](https://ref.ly/John15:16), [JHN 16:23–16:24](https://ref.ly/John16:23-John16:24)

God promises to respond to the prayers of his people in times of need
---------------------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 91:14–91:16](https://ref.ly/Ps91:14-Ps91:16)** *See also* [PSA 50:14–50:15](https://ref.ly/Ps50:14-Ps50:15)

God promises to hear the prayers of the oppressed
-------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 10:17](https://ref.ly/Ps10:17)** *See also* [EXO 22:22–22:23](https://ref.ly/Exod22:22-Exod22:23), [EXO 22:26–22:27](https://ref.ly/Exod22:26-Exod22:27); [PSA 102:19–102:20](https://ref.ly/Ps102:19-Ps102:20); [ISA 41:17](https://ref.ly/Isa41:17)

God promises to hear the prayers of the truly penitent
------------------------------------------------------

**[2CH 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:14)** *See also* [EZK 36:37](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:37); [ZEC 10:6](https://ref.ly/Zech10:6), [ZEC 13:8–13:9](https://ref.ly/Zech13:8-Zech13:9)

God promises to hear the prayers of his obedient people
-------------------------------------------------------

**[1JN 3:22](https://ref.ly/1John3:22)**

The need in prayer to have confidence in God's promises
-------------------------------------------------------

**[MRK 11:24](https://ref.ly/Mark11:24)**; **[1JN 5:14](https://ref.ly/1John5:14)** *See also* [MAT 18:19](https://ref.ly/Matt18:19)

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 7:7-11; Luke 11:9-13; Matthew 21:22; John 14:13-14; John 15:7; John 15:16; John 16:23-24; Psalms 91:14-16; Psalms 50:14-15; Psalms 10:17; Exodus 22:22-23; Exodus 22:26-27; Psalms 102:19-20; Isaiah 41:17; 2 Chronicles 7:14; Ezekiel 36:37; Zechariah 10:6; Zechariah 13:8-9; 1 John 3:22; Mark 11:24; 1 John 5:14; Matthew 18:19
* **Associated Articles:** 5467: promises, divine (ID: `5467@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8024: faith, and blessings of God (ID: `8024@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8608: prayer, and worship (id: 8608)

Worship is turning to God in awe, praise and joy, as his people realise how wonderful he is. Prayer is a natural part of worship: to know God is to want to worship him and pray to him.

Worship is a fundamental requirement of life
--------------------------------------------

### All nations are exhorted to worship God

**[1CH 16:28–16:29](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:28-1Chr16:29)** *See also* [PSA 29:1–29:2](https://ref.ly/Ps29:1-Ps29:2), [PSA 96:9](https://ref.ly/Ps96:9)

### Israel is commanded to worship God

**[2KI 17:36](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:36)** *See also* [PSA 95:6–95:7](https://ref.ly/Ps95:6-Ps95:7), [PSA 99:4–99:5](https://ref.ly/Ps99:4-Ps99:5)

Right attitudes in worship are imperative
-----------------------------------------

### Reverence and humility characterise acceptable worship

**[HEB 12:28–12:29](https://ref.ly/Heb12:28-Heb12:29)** *See also* [PSA 5:7](https://ref.ly/Ps5:7), [PSA 95:6](https://ref.ly/Ps95:6), [PSA 138:2](https://ref.ly/Ps138:2); [ECC 5:1](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:1)

### Honesty, without hypocrisy, characterises acceptable worship

**[AMO 5:21–5:24](https://ref.ly/Amos5:21-Amos5:24)** *See also* [MAT 15:7–15:9](https://ref.ly/Matt15:7-Matt15:9) parallel [MRK 7:6–7:7](https://ref.ly/Mark7:6-Mark7:7); [ISA 29:13](https://ref.ly/Isa29:13); [LUK 18:9–18:14](https://ref.ly/Luke18:9-Luke18:14); [JHN 4:24](https://ref.ly/John4:24)

Prayer can focus on different aspects of God's character
--------------------------------------------------------

### Prayer can focus on God's holiness

**[EXO 15:11](https://ref.ly/Exod15:11)** *See also* [PSA 77:13](https://ref.ly/Ps77:13), [PSA 96:9](https://ref.ly/Ps96:9), [PSA 99:5](https://ref.ly/Ps99:5)

### Prayer can focus on God's glory

**[PSA 19:1–19:6](https://ref.ly/Ps19:1-Ps19:6)** *See also* [PSA 29:1–29:2](https://ref.ly/Ps29:1-Ps29:2), [PSA 138:5](https://ref.ly/Ps138:5); [ROM 16:27](https://ref.ly/Rom16:27); [PHP 4:20](https://ref.ly/Phil4:20); [JUD 1:25](https://ref.ly/Jude1:25)

### Prayer can focus on God's majesty

**[PSA 104:1–104:4](https://ref.ly/Ps104:1-Ps104:4)** *See also* [PSA 8:1](https://ref.ly/Ps8:1), [PSA 76:4](https://ref.ly/Ps76:4), [PSA 96:4–96:6](https://ref.ly/Ps96:4-Ps96:6)

### Prayer can focus on God's kingship

**[PSA 97:1](https://ref.ly/Ps97:1)** *See also* [PSA 9:7](https://ref.ly/Ps9:7), [PSA 22:3](https://ref.ly/Ps22:3), [PSA 93:1](https://ref.ly/Ps93:1), [PSA 95:3](https://ref.ly/Ps95:3), [PSA 102:12](https://ref.ly/Ps102:12)

### Prayer can focus on God's love and compassion

**[PSA 103:1–103:18](https://ref.ly/Ps103:1-Ps103:18)** *See also* [PSA 111:4](https://ref.ly/Ps111:4), [PSA 118:1–118:4](https://ref.ly/Ps118:1-Ps118:4), [PSA 145:17–145:20](https://ref.ly/Ps145:17-Ps145:20)

### Prayer can focus on God's justice and righteousness

**[PSA 97:2](https://ref.ly/Ps97:2)** *See also* [PSA 7:17](https://ref.ly/Ps7:17), [PSA 9:8](https://ref.ly/Ps9:8), [PSA 97:6](https://ref.ly/Ps97:6), [PSA 111:3](https://ref.ly/Ps111:3)

### Prayer can focus on God's creative activity

**[NEH 9:6](https://ref.ly/Neh9:6)** *See also* [PSA 90:2](https://ref.ly/Ps90:2), [PSA 95:3–95:7](https://ref.ly/Ps95:3-Ps95:7), [PSA 102:25–102:27](https://ref.ly/Ps102:25-Ps102:27), [PSA 104:5–104:9](https://ref.ly/Ps104:5-Ps104:9), [PSA 104:24–104:26](https://ref.ly/Ps104:24-Ps104:26)

## 8609: prayer, as praise and thanksgiving (id: 8609)

Prayer embraces praising God for who he is, thanking him for what he has already done, and looking forward with joy to what he has promised to do in the future.

Scripture exhorts God's people to praise and thank him
------------------------------------------------------

**[PHP 4:6](https://ref.ly/Phil4:6)** *See also* [PSA 66:1](https://ref.ly/Ps66:1), [PSA 68:4](https://ref.ly/Ps68:4), [PSA 95:1–95:2](https://ref.ly/Ps95:1-Ps95:2), [PSA 105:1–105:3](https://ref.ly/Ps105:1-Ps105:3); [EPH 5:19–5:20](https://ref.ly/Eph5:19-Eph5:20); [COL 4:2](https://ref.ly/Col4:2); [1TH 5:16–5:18](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:16-1Thess5:18); [HEB 13:15](https://ref.ly/Heb13:15)

Praise and thanksgiving in prayer for God's goodness towards his people
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Praise and thanksgiving for deliverance and salvation

**[PSA 65:1–65:5](https://ref.ly/Ps65:1-Ps65:5)** *See also* [PSA 66:5–66:6](https://ref.ly/Ps66:5-Ps66:6), [PSA 81:1–81:7](https://ref.ly/Ps81:1-Ps81:7), [PSA 124:1–124:8](https://ref.ly/Ps124:1-Ps124:8); [JON 2:1–2:9](https://ref.ly/Jonah2:1-Jonah2:9)

### Praise and thanksgiving for provision of material needs

**[MRK 8:6](https://ref.ly/Mark8:6)** parallel [MAT 15:36](https://ref.ly/Matt15:36) *See also* [PSA 65:9–65:13](https://ref.ly/Ps65:9-Ps65:13); [MAT 26:26–26:27](https://ref.ly/Matt26:26-Matt26:27) parallels [MRK 14:22–14:23](https://ref.ly/Mark14:22-Mark14:23), [LUK 22:19–22:20](https://ref.ly/Luke22:19-Luke22:20)

### Praise and thanksgiving for help in time of trouble

**[PSA 34:1–34:4](https://ref.ly/Ps34:1-Ps34:4)** *See also* [PSA 30:1–30:12](https://ref.ly/Ps30:1-Ps30:12), [PSA 40:1–40:5](https://ref.ly/Ps40:1-Ps40:5), [PSA 103:1–103:5](https://ref.ly/Ps103:1-Ps103:5), [PSA 116:1–116:19](https://ref.ly/Ps116:1-Ps116:19)

### Praise and thanksgiving for the encouragement of other believers

**[PHP 1:3–1:6](https://ref.ly/Phil1:3-Phil1:6)** *See also* [ROM 1:8](https://ref.ly/Rom1:8); [2CO 8:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor8:1); [EPH 1:16](https://ref.ly/Eph1:16); [2TH 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:3)

Notable songs of praise and thanksgiving
----------------------------------------

[EXO 15:1–15:18](https://ref.ly/Exod15:1-Exod15:18) *Moses, on crossing the Red Sea*; [2SA 22:2–22:51](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:2-2Sam22:51); ; [PSA 18:1–18:50](https://ref.ly/Ps18:1-Ps18:50); [1CH 16:8–16:36](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:8-1Chr16:36) *David, on bringing the ark to Jerusalem*; ; [LUK 1:46–1:55](https://ref.ly/Luke1:46-Luke1:55) *Mary, on learning that she was to be the mother of Jesus Christ*

* **Associated Passages:** Philippians 4:6; Psalms 66:1; Psalms 68:4; Psalms 95:1-2; Psalms 105:1-3; Ephesians 5:19-20; Colossians 4:2; 1 Thessalonians 5:16-18; Hebrews 13:15; Psalms 65:1-5; Psalms 66:5-6; Psalms 81:1-7; Psalms 124:1-8; Jonah 2:1-9; Mark 8:6; Matthew 15:36; Psalms 65:9-13; Matthew 26:26-27; Mark 14:22-23; Luke 22:19-20; Psalms 34:1-4; Psalms 30:1-12; Psalms 40:1-5; Psalms 103:1-5; Psalms 116:1-19; Philippians 1:3-6; Romans 1:8; 2 Corinthians 8:1; Ephesians 1:16; 2 Thessalonians 1:3; Exodus 15:1-18; 2 Samuel 22:2-51; Psalms 18:1-50; 1 Chronicles 16:8-36; Luke 1:46-55
* **Associated Articles:** 7927: hymn (ID: `7927@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8352: thankfulness (ID: `8352@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8646: doxology (ID: `8646@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8664: praise (ID: `8664@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8676: thanksgiving (ID: `8676@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8610: prayer, as asking God (id: 8610)

God wants his people to turn to him in prayer, individually and corporately, in times of need or crisis, and to bring requests to him as a Father.

God's people are commanded to bring their requests to him
---------------------------------------------------------

**[PHP 4:6](https://ref.ly/Phil4:6)** *See also* [1CH 16:11](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:11); [MAT 7:7](https://ref.ly/Matt7:7) parallel [LUK 11:9](https://ref.ly/Luke11:9); [JHN 16:24](https://ref.ly/John16:24); [EPH 6:18–6:20](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18-Eph6:20); [1TH 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:17); [JAS 5:13](https://ref.ly/Jas5:13)

Prayer for deliverance from difficulty
--------------------------------------

**[PSA 4:1](https://ref.ly/Ps4:1), [PSA 107:6](https://ref.ly/Ps107:6)** *See also* [PSA 40:2–40:3](https://ref.ly/Ps40:2-Ps40:3); [JON 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/Jonah2:1-Jonah2:3); [ACT 12:5](https://ref.ly/Acts12:5)

Prayer for deliverance from enemies
-----------------------------------

**[PSA 17:8–17:9](https://ref.ly/Ps17:8-Ps17:9), [PSA 35:4](https://ref.ly/Ps35:4)** *See also* [2KI 19:9–19:11](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:9-2Kgs19:11); [2CH 14:11](https://ref.ly/2Chr14:11)

Prayers of individuals in time of crisis
----------------------------------------

### Jacob's prayer

[GEN 32:9–32:12](https://ref.ly/Gen32:9-Gen32:12)

### David's prayers

**[PSA 28:1–28:9](https://ref.ly/Ps28:1-Ps28:9)** *See also* [PSA 4:1](https://ref.ly/Ps4:1), [PSA 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/Ps5:1-Ps5:3), [PSA 30:8–30:10](https://ref.ly/Ps30:8-Ps30:10), [PSA 142:1–142:7](https://ref.ly/Ps142:1-Ps142:7)

### Elijah's prayer

**[1KI 19:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:4)**

### Jeremiah's prayer

*See also* [JER 15:15–15:18](https://ref.ly/Jer15:15-Jer15:18)

### Jesus Christ's prayers

**[MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39)** parallels [MRK 14:35–14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:35-Mark14:36), [LUK 22:42–22:44](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42-Luke22:44)

Individual petition to God in prayer
------------------------------------

### Individual prayer for guidance

**[GEN 24:12–24:14](https://ref.ly/Gen24:12-Gen24:14)** *See also* [JDG 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Judg1:1-Judg1:2), [JDG 6:36–6:40](https://ref.ly/Judg6:36-Judg6:40); [1SA 14:41](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:41); [2SA 2:1](https://ref.ly/2Sam2:1); [1CH 14:14–14:15](https://ref.ly/1Chr14:14-1Chr14:15)

### Individual prayer for healing

**[2KI 20:1–20:11](https://ref.ly/2Kgs20:1-2Kgs20:11)** parallel [ISA 38:1–38:10](https://ref.ly/Isa38:1-Isa38:10)

### Individual prayer for the birth of a child

**[1SA 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:10-1Sam1:11)** *See also* [GEN 25:21](https://ref.ly/Gen25:21), [GEN 30:17](https://ref.ly/Gen30:17)

Corporate petition to God
-------------------------

### Corporate prayer for deliverance

**[EXO 2:23](https://ref.ly/Exod2:23)** *See also* [NUM 20:15–20:16](https://ref.ly/Num20:15-Num20:16); [DEU 26:6–26:8](https://ref.ly/Deut26:6-Deut26:8); [JDG 3:9](https://ref.ly/Judg3:9), [JDG 4:3](https://ref.ly/Judg4:3), [JDG 6:7–6:10](https://ref.ly/Judg6:7-Judg6:10); [1SA 12:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:8)

### Corporate prayer for restoration

[PSA 44:23–44:26](https://ref.ly/Ps44:23-Ps44:26), [PSA 79:8–79:9](https://ref.ly/Ps79:8-Ps79:9), [PSA 80:4–80:7](https://ref.ly/Ps80:4-Ps80:7), [PSA 85:4–85:7](https://ref.ly/Ps85:4-Ps85:7)

### Corporate prayer for protection, especially at times of crisis

**[EZR 8:21–8:23](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:21-Ezra8:23)** *See also* [2CH 20:12–20:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:12-2Chr20:13); [EZR 10:1](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:1); [EST 4:16](https://ref.ly/Esth4:16); [PSA 74:18–74:23](https://ref.ly/Ps74:18-Ps74:23); [DAN 2:17–2:18](https://ref.ly/Dan2:17-Dan2:18)

The first Christians prayed together when they met
--------------------------------------------------

**[ACT 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Acts1:13-Acts1:14)** *See also* [ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42), [ACT 2:46–2:47](https://ref.ly/Acts2:46-Acts2:47), [ACT 16:13](https://ref.ly/Acts16:13), [ACT 16:16](https://ref.ly/Acts16:16), [ACT 20:36](https://ref.ly/Acts20:36), [ACT 21:5](https://ref.ly/Acts21:5)

The first Christians prayed together at times of crisis or important decisions
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### When threatened with punishment

**[ACT 4:24–4:31](https://ref.ly/Acts4:24-Acts4:31)** *See also* [ACT 12:5](https://ref.ly/Acts12:5), [ACT 12:12](https://ref.ly/Acts12:12)

### When Barnabas and Saul were sent off by the church at Antioch

[ACT 13:3](https://ref.ly/Acts13:3)

### When Paul and Silas experienced persecution

[ACT 16:25](https://ref.ly/Acts16:25)

Prayers for mercy and grace
---------------------------

**[PSA 143:1](https://ref.ly/Ps143:1)**; **[HEB 4:16](https://ref.ly/Heb4:16)** *See also* [2CH 6:18–6:19](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:18-2Chr6:19); [PSA 130:1–130:2](https://ref.ly/Ps130:1-Ps130:2); [MAT 20:30–20:31](https://ref.ly/Matt20:30-Matt20:31)

* **Associated Passages:** Philippians 4:6; 1 Chronicles 16:11; Matthew 7:7; Luke 11:9; John 16:24; Ephesians 6:18-20; 1 Thessalonians 5:17; James 5:13; Psalms 4:1; Psalms 107:6; Psalms 40:2-3; Jonah 2:1-3; Acts 12:5; Psalms 17:8-9; Psalms 35:4; 2 Kings 19:9-11; 2 Chronicles 14:11; Genesis 32:9-12; Psalms 28:1-9; Psalms 5:1-3; Psalms 30:8-10; Psalms 142:1-7; 1 Kings 19:4; Jeremiah 15:15-18; Matthew 26:39; Mark 14:35-36; Luke 22:42-44; Genesis 24:12-14; Judges 1:1-2; Judges 6:36-40; 1 Samuel 14:41; 2 Samuel 2:1; 1 Chronicles 14:14-15; 2 Kings 20:1-11; Isaiah 38:1-10; 1 Samuel 1:10-11; Genesis 25:21; Genesis 30:17; Exodus 2:23; Numbers 20:15-16; Deuteronomy 26:6-8; Judges 3:9; Judges 4:3; Judges 6:7-10; 1 Samuel 12:8; Psalms 44:23-26; Psalms 79:8-9; Psalms 80:4-7; Psalms 85:4-7; Ezra 8:21-23; 2 Chronicles 20:12-13; Ezra 10:1; Esther 4:16; Psalms 74:18-23; Daniel 2:17-18; Acts 1:13-14; Acts 2:42; Acts 2:46-47; Acts 16:13; Acts 16:16; Acts 20:36; Acts 21:5; Acts 4:24-31; Acts 12:12; Acts 13:3; Acts 16:25; Psalms 143:1; Hebrews 4:16; 2 Chronicles 6:18-19; Psalms 130:1-2; Matthew 20:30-31
* **Associated Articles:** 8636: asking (ID: `8636@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8640: calling upon God (ID: `8640@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8611: prayer, for others (id: 8611)

Believers should pray, not only for their own needs, but for those of others. Scripture provides many examples of intercession, and commends it as pleasing to God.

Believers must value others
---------------------------

**[PHP 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/Phil2:3-Phil2:4)**

Examples of praying for others
------------------------------

### Moses prays for the Israelites

**[DEU 9:18–9:19](https://ref.ly/Deut9:18-Deut9:19)** *See also* [EXO 32:9–32:14](https://ref.ly/Exod32:9-Exod32:14), [EXO 34:9](https://ref.ly/Exod34:9); [NUM 14:11–14:19](https://ref.ly/Num14:11-Num14:19); [DEU 9:25–9:29](https://ref.ly/Deut9:25-Deut9:29)

### Samuel prays for Israel

**[1SA 7:5–7:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:5-1Sam7:9)** *See also* [1SA 12:19–12:23](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:19-1Sam12:23)

### Job prays for his friends

**[JOB 42:10](https://ref.ly/Job42:10)**

### Jeremiah prays for Judah

**[JER 7:16](https://ref.ly/Jer7:16)** *God forbade the prophet Jeremiah to pray for his people because they were unrepentant sinners.* *See also* [JER 11:14](https://ref.ly/Jer11:14), [JER 14:11](https://ref.ly/Jer14:11)

Jesus Christ intercedes for believers
-------------------------------------

**[ROM 8:34](https://ref.ly/Rom8:34)** *See also* [ISA 53:12](https://ref.ly/Isa53:12); [HEB 7:25](https://ref.ly/Heb7:25); [1JN 2:1](https://ref.ly/1John2:1)

The Holy Spirit intercedes for believers
----------------------------------------

**[ROM 8:26–8:27](https://ref.ly/Rom8:26-Rom8:27)**

Christians are to intercede for others
--------------------------------------

### Christians are to pray for their enemies

**[MAT 5:44](https://ref.ly/Matt5:44)** *See also* [LUK 6:28](https://ref.ly/Luke6:28), [LUK 23:34](https://ref.ly/Luke23:34); [ACT 7:60](https://ref.ly/Acts7:60)

### Christians are to pray for one another

**[EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18)** *See also* [1TH 5:25](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:25); [PHM 1:22](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:22); [HEB 13:18–13:19](https://ref.ly/Heb13:18-Heb13:19); [JAS 5:14–5:16](https://ref.ly/Jas5:14-Jas5:16); [1JN 5:16](https://ref.ly/1John5:16)

### Christians are to prayer for rulers

**[1TI 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1-1Tim2:2)**

Examples of pleas made to Jesus Christ on behalf of others
----------------------------------------------------------

*See also* [MAT 8:5–8:13](https://ref.ly/Matt8:5-Matt8:13) parallel [LUK 7:1–7:10](https://ref.ly/Luke7:1-Luke7:10); [MAT 15:21–15:28](https://ref.ly/Matt15:21-Matt15:28) parallel [MRK 7:24–7:30](https://ref.ly/Mark7:24-Mark7:30); [MAT 17:14–17:20](https://ref.ly/Matt17:14-Matt17:20) parallels [MRK 9:14–9:29](https://ref.ly/Mark9:14-Mark9:29), [LUK 9:37–9:42](https://ref.ly/Luke9:37-Luke9:42)

Examples of notable prayers of intercession
-------------------------------------------

[2KI 19:14–19:19](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:14-2Kgs19:19) parallel [ISA 37:14–37:20](https://ref.ly/Isa37:14-Isa37:20) *Hezekiah for deliverance*; ; [EZR 8:21–8:23](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:21-Ezra8:23) *Ezra for a safe journey*; ; [DAN 9:1–9:19](https://ref.ly/Dan9:1-Dan9:19) *Daniel for Jerusalem*; ; [JHN 17:6–17:26](https://ref.ly/John17:6-John17:26) *Jesus Christ for his disciples*; [EPH 1:15–1:21](https://ref.ly/Eph1:15-Eph1:21), [EPH 3:14–3:21](https://ref.ly/Eph3:14-Eph3:21); [COL 1:9–1:13](https://ref.ly/Col1:9-Col1:13) *Paul for the believers in Colosse*

* **Associated Passages:** Philippians 2:3-4; Deuteronomy 9:18-19; Exodus 32:9-14; Exodus 34:9; Numbers 14:11-19; Deuteronomy 9:25-29; 1 Samuel 7:5-9; 1 Samuel 12:19-23; Job 42:10; Jeremiah 7:16; Jeremiah 11:14; Jeremiah 14:11; Romans 8:34; Isaiah 53:12; Hebrews 7:25; 1 John 2:1; Romans 8:26-27; Matthew 5:44; Luke 6:28; Luke 23:34; Acts 7:60; Ephesians 6:18; 1 Thessalonians 5:25; Philemon 1:22; Hebrews 13:18-19; James 5:14-16; 1 John 5:16; 1 Timothy 2:1-2; Matthew 8:5-13; Luke 7:1-10; Matthew 15:21-28; Mark 7:24-30; Matthew 17:14-20; Mark 9:14-29; Luke 9:37-42; 2 Kings 19:14-19; Isaiah 37:14-20; Ezra 8:21-23; Daniel 9:1-19; John 17:6-26; Ephesians 1:15-21; Ephesians 3:14-21; Colossians 1:9-13
* **Associated Articles:** 2306: Jesus Christ, as high priest (ID: `2306@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2360: Jesus Christ, prayers of (ID: `2360@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3221: Holy Spirit, and prayer (ID: `3221@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6655: forgiveness, application of (ID: `6655@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8658: Lord's Prayer, the (ID: `8658@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8612: prayer, and faith (id: 8612)

Effective prayer depends on faith, especially on a willingness to trust in God's faithfulness to his promises to his people.

Faith is necessary in order to approach God
-------------------------------------------

**[HEB 11:6](https://ref.ly/Heb11:6)**

Faith is necessary to receive benefits from God
-----------------------------------------------

**[MRK 6:5–6:6](https://ref.ly/Mark6:5-Mark6:6)**; **[JAS 5:16–5:18](https://ref.ly/Jas5:16-Jas5:18)** *See also* [EPH 3:12](https://ref.ly/Eph3:12); [HEB 10:22](https://ref.ly/Heb10:22)

Faith is necessary for effective prayer
---------------------------------------

**[MAT 21:21–21:22](https://ref.ly/Matt21:21-Matt21:22)** parallel [MRK 11:22–11:24](https://ref.ly/Mark11:22-Mark11:24)**[JAS 1:5–1:8](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5-Jas1:8)** *See also* [JAS 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/Jas5:14-Jas5:15)

Jesus Christ responded to people's need on the basis of faith
-------------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 9:27–9:30](https://ref.ly/Matt9:27-Matt9:30)** *See also* [MAT 8:5–8:13](https://ref.ly/Matt8:5-Matt8:13) parallel [LUK 7:1–7:10](https://ref.ly/Luke7:1-Luke7:10); [MAT 9:20–9:22](https://ref.ly/Matt9:20-Matt9:22) parallels [MRK 5:25–5:34](https://ref.ly/Mark5:25-Mark5:34), [LUK 8:43–8:48](https://ref.ly/Luke8:43-Luke8:48); [MAT 15:21–15:28](https://ref.ly/Matt15:21-Matt15:28) parallel [MRK 7:24–7:30](https://ref.ly/Mark7:24-Mark7:30)

Examples of notable prayers of faith
------------------------------------

[1KI 18:36–18:37](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:36-1Kgs18:37) *Elijah, in contest with the prophets of Baal*; ; [JAS 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/Jas5:17-Jas5:18) *Elijah, praying about rain*; ; [1KI 17:19–17:22](https://ref.ly/1Kgs17:19-1Kgs17:22) *Elijah and the widow's son*; ; [2KI 4:32–4:35](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:32-2Kgs4:35) *Elisha and the Shunammite's son*

* **Associated Passages:** Hebrews 11:6; Mark 6:5-6; James 5:16-18; Ephesians 3:12; Hebrews 10:22; Matthew 21:21-22; Mark 11:22-24; James 1:5-8; James 5:14-15; Matthew 9:27-30; Matthew 8:5-13; Luke 7:1-10; Matthew 9:20-22; Mark 5:25-34; Luke 8:43-48; Matthew 15:21-28; Mark 7:24-30; 1 Kings 18:36-37; James 5:17-18; 1 Kings 17:19-22; 2 Kings 4:32-35
* **Associated Articles:** 5159: hearing (ID: `5159@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8020: faith (ID: `8020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8224: dependence (ID: `8224@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8490: watchfulness (ID: `8490@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8678: waiting on God (ID: `8678@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8613: prayer, persistence in (id: 8613)

An answer to prayer may not come immediately. Petitioners are to continue praying earnestly. This requires patience, determination and, at times, a willingness to wrestle with God for the desired outcome.

The principle of persistence in prayer
--------------------------------------

### Prayer should be made with patience and perseverance

**[PSA 40:1](https://ref.ly/Ps40:1), [PSA 88:1](https://ref.ly/Ps88:1)** *See also* [1CH 16:11](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:11); [PSA 116:2](https://ref.ly/Ps116:2)

### Jesus Christ taught his disciples to persist in prayer

**[LUK 18:1–18:8](https://ref.ly/Luke18:1-Luke18:8)** *See also* [LUK 11:5–11:10](https://ref.ly/Luke11:5-Luke11:10)

### Persistence in prayer was exemplified in the early church

**[ACT 1:14](https://ref.ly/Acts1:14)** *See also* [ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42)

### Paul exhorted the churches to practise persistent prayer

**[EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18)** *See also* [ROM 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rom12:12); [1TH 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:17)

Examples of persistence in prayer
---------------------------------

### Abraham pleads persistently for Sodom

**[GEN 18:23–18:33](https://ref.ly/Gen18:23-Gen18:33)**

### Jacob persists in wrestling with God

**[GEN 32:24–32:32](https://ref.ly/Gen32:24-Gen32:32)**

### Moses persists in interceding for Israel

**[DEU 9:25–9:29](https://ref.ly/Deut9:25-Deut9:29)** *See also* [EXO 32:31–32:32](https://ref.ly/Exod32:31-Exod32:32)

### Hannah persistently asks for a son

**[1SA 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:10-1Sam1:11)**

### Elijah persists in prayer about the rain

**[JAS 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/Jas5:17-Jas5:18)** *See also* [1KI 18:36–18:44](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:36-1Kgs18:44)

### The psalmists persist in calling out to God

[PSA 88:1–88:18](https://ref.ly/Ps88:1-Ps88:18), [PSA 119:147–119:149](https://ref.ly/Ps119:147-Ps119:149), [PSA 130:1–130:6](https://ref.ly/Ps130:1-Ps130:6)

### Jesus Christ persisted in pursuing the Father's will

**[LUK 22:42–22:44](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42-Luke22:44)** parallels [MAT 26:36–26:43](https://ref.ly/Matt26:36-Matt26:43), [MRK 14:32–14:40](https://ref.ly/Mark14:32-Mark14:40)

Persistence in prayer is exemplified in waiting for God
-------------------------------------------------------

**[MIC 7:7](https://ref.ly/Mic7:7)** *See also* [PSA 27:14](https://ref.ly/Ps27:14), [PSA 33:20](https://ref.ly/Ps33:20), [PSA 37:7](https://ref.ly/Ps37:7), [PSA 38:15](https://ref.ly/Ps38:15), [PSA 40:1](https://ref.ly/Ps40:1); [ISA 26:8](https://ref.ly/Isa26:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 40:1; Psalms 88:1; 1 Chronicles 16:11; Psalms 116:2; Luke 18:1-8; Luke 11:5-10; Acts 1:14; Acts 2:42; Ephesians 6:18; Romans 12:12; 1 Thessalonians 5:17; Genesis 18:23-33; Genesis 32:24-32; Deuteronomy 9:25-29; Exodus 32:31-32; 1 Samuel 1:10-11; James 5:17-18; 1 Kings 18:36-44; Psalms 88:1-18; Psalms 119:147-149; Psalms 130:1-6; Luke 22:42-44; Matthew 26:36-43; Mark 14:32-40; Micah 7:7; Psalms 27:14; Psalms 33:20; Psalms 37:7; Psalms 38:15; Isaiah 26:8
* **Associated Articles:** 8459: perseverance (ID: `8459@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8653: importunity, towards God (ID: `8653@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8672: striving with God (ID: `8672@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8614: prayer, answers to (id: 8614)

God has promised to answer prayer for personal or corporate needs and for the needs of others.

God answers the prayers of individuals
--------------------------------------

### God answers the psalmists' prayers

**[PSA 145:18–145:19](https://ref.ly/Ps145:18-Ps145:19)** *See also* [PSA 3:4](https://ref.ly/Ps3:4), [PSA 6:8–6:9](https://ref.ly/Ps6:8-Ps6:9), [PSA 30:2–30:3](https://ref.ly/Ps30:2-Ps30:3), [PSA 66:19–66:20](https://ref.ly/Ps66:19-Ps66:20), [PSA 116:1–116:2](https://ref.ly/Ps116:1-Ps116:2), [PSA 118:5](https://ref.ly/Ps118:5), [PSA 138:3](https://ref.ly/Ps138:3)

### God answers Moses' prayers

[EXO 15:23–15:25](https://ref.ly/Exod15:23-Exod15:25), [EXO 17:4–17:7](https://ref.ly/Exod17:4-Exod17:7); ; [NUM 11:10–11:17](https://ref.ly/Num11:10-Num11:17)

### God answers Hannah's prayer for a son

**[1SA 1:27](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:27)** *See also* [1SA 1:10–1:20](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:10-1Sam1:20)

### God answers the prayers of the prophets

**[PSA 99:6](https://ref.ly/Ps99:6)** *See also* [1SA 7:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:9); [LAM 3:55–3:57](https://ref.ly/Lam3:55-Lam3:57); [JON 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/Jonah2:1-Jonah2:2); [JAS 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/Jas5:17-Jas5:18)

### God answers the prayers of the kings of Israel

[1KI 9:3](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:3); ; [2CH 18:31](https://ref.ly/2Chr18:31)

God answers corporate petition
------------------------------

### Answered prayer for deliverance from hardship

**[DEU 26:7–26:8](https://ref.ly/Deut26:7-Deut26:8)** *See also* [EXO 2:23–2:25](https://ref.ly/Exod2:23-Exod2:25), [EXO 3:7–3:9](https://ref.ly/Exod3:7-Exod3:9); [NUM 20:16](https://ref.ly/Num20:16); [1SA 12:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:8); [PSA 81:7](https://ref.ly/Ps81:7)

### Answered prayer for deliverance from enemies

**[1SA 12:10–12:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:10-1Sam12:11)** *See also* [JDG 3:9](https://ref.ly/Judg3:9), [JDG 3:15](https://ref.ly/Judg3:15); [2KI 19:19–19:20](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:19-2Kgs19:20); [1CH 5:20](https://ref.ly/1Chr5:20)

God answers the prayer of the oppressed
---------------------------------------

**[JAS 5:4](https://ref.ly/Jas5:4)** *See also* [EXO 22:22–22:23](https://ref.ly/Exod22:22-Exod22:23); [JOB 34:28](https://ref.ly/Job34:28)

God answers prayer for healing
------------------------------

**[JAS 5:14–5:16](https://ref.ly/Jas5:14-Jas5:16)** *See also* [NUM 12:10–12:15](https://ref.ly/Num12:10-Num12:15); [1KI 17:21–17:22](https://ref.ly/1Kgs17:21-1Kgs17:22); [2KI 4:32–4:35](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:32-2Kgs4:35), [2KI 20:1–20:6](https://ref.ly/2Kgs20:1-2Kgs20:6) parallels [2CH 32:24](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:24), [ISA 38:1–38:6](https://ref.ly/Isa38:1-Isa38:6); [MAT 8:2–8:3](https://ref.ly/Matt8:2-Matt8:3) parallels [MRK 1:40–1:42](https://ref.ly/Mark1:40-Mark1:42), [LUK 5:12–5:13](https://ref.ly/Luke5:12-Luke5:13); [ACT 9:40](https://ref.ly/Acts9:40)

God answers prayer for others
-----------------------------

**[DEU 9:18–9:19](https://ref.ly/Deut9:18-Deut9:19)** *See also* [1SA 7:8–7:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:8-1Sam7:9); [ACT 12:5–12:8](https://ref.ly/Acts12:5-Acts12:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 145:18-19; Psalms 3:4; Psalms 6:8-9; Psalms 30:2-3; Psalms 66:19-20; Psalms 116:1-2; Psalms 118:5; Psalms 138:3; Exodus 15:23-25; Exodus 17:4-7; Numbers 11:10-17; 1 Samuel 1:27; 1 Samuel 1:10-20; Psalms 99:6; 1 Samuel 7:9; Lamentations 3:55-57; Jonah 2:1-2; James 5:17-18; 1 Kings 9:3; 2 Chronicles 18:31; Deuteronomy 26:7-8; Exodus 2:23-25; Exodus 3:7-9; Numbers 20:16; 1 Samuel 12:8; Psalms 81:7; 1 Samuel 12:10-11; Judges 3:9; Judges 3:15; 2 Kings 19:19-20; 1 Chronicles 5:20; James 5:4; Exodus 22:22-23; Job 34:28; James 5:14-16; Numbers 12:10-15; 1 Kings 17:21-22; 2 Kings 4:32-35; 2 Kings 20:1-6; 2 Chronicles 32:24; Isaiah 38:1-6; Matthew 8:2-3; Mark 1:40-42; Luke 5:12-13; Acts 9:40; Deuteronomy 9:18-19; 1 Samuel 7:8-9; Acts 12:5-8
* **Associated Articles:** 5225: barrenness (ID: `5225@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5333: healing (ID: `5333@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5446: poverty (ID: `5446@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6634: deliverance (ID: `6634@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7221: exodus, the (ID: `7221@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8790: oppression (ID: `8790@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8615: prayer, doubts about (id: 8615)

Sometimes God does not seem to answer prayer, causing his people to doubt him. Scripture affirms God's faithfulness to those who pray according to his will, and points out that the human understanding of a situation is limited.

Examples of God's servants questioning his promises
---------------------------------------------------

**[EXO 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Exod5:22-Exod5:23)** *See also* [GEN 15:2–15:3](https://ref.ly/Gen15:2-Gen15:3); [JOS 7:7–7:9](https://ref.ly/Josh7:7-Josh7:9)

Examples of God's servants questioning the tasks he has given them
------------------------------------------------------------------

**[NUM 11:11–11:15](https://ref.ly/Num11:11-Num11:15)** *See also* [1KI 19:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:4); [JER 15:15–15:18](https://ref.ly/Jer15:15-Jer15:18), [JER 20:7–20:9](https://ref.ly/Jer20:7-Jer20:9), [JER 20:14–20:18](https://ref.ly/Jer20:14-Jer20:18); [JON 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:1-Jonah4:3); [MAT 27:46](https://ref.ly/Matt27:46) parallel [MRK 15:34](https://ref.ly/Mark15:34); [PSA 22:1](https://ref.ly/Ps22:1)

Examples of God's servants expressing their anger and confusion in prayer
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[JOB 10:2–10:22](https://ref.ly/Job10:2-Job10:22)** *See also* [JOB 13:20–13:27](https://ref.ly/Job13:20-Job13:27), [JOB 14:1–14:22](https://ref.ly/Job14:1-Job14:22); [PSA 13:1–13:2](https://ref.ly/Ps13:1-Ps13:2), [PSA 42:9–42:10](https://ref.ly/Ps42:9-Ps42:10), [PSA 44:22–44:26](https://ref.ly/Ps44:22-Ps44:26), [PSA 77:7–77:9](https://ref.ly/Ps77:7-Ps77:9), [PSA 80:4–80:6](https://ref.ly/Ps80:4-Ps80:6), [PSA 88:6–88:9](https://ref.ly/Ps88:6-Ps88:9); [HAB 1:2–1:3](https://ref.ly/Hab1:2-Hab1:3)

God's response to prayers of questioning or complaint
-----------------------------------------------------

### God reiterates his promises to those who question him

**[GEN 15:2–15:5](https://ref.ly/Gen15:2-Gen15:5)** *See also* [EXO 6:1–6:8](https://ref.ly/Exod6:1-Exod6:8)

### God provides help for those who question him

[1KI 19:1–19:8](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:1-1Kgs19:8)

### God rebukes those who question him

**[JOB 40:1–40:9](https://ref.ly/Job40:1-Job40:9)** *See also* [JER 15:19–15:21](https://ref.ly/Jer15:19-Jer15:21)

### God explains events to those who question him

[HAB 1:5–1:11](https://ref.ly/Hab1:5-Hab1:11)

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 5:22-23; Genesis 15:2-3; Joshua 7:7-9; Numbers 11:11-15; 1 Kings 19:4; Jeremiah 15:15-18; Jeremiah 20:7-9; Jeremiah 20:14-18; Jonah 4:1-3; Matthew 27:46; Mark 15:34; Psalms 22:1; Job 10:2-22; Job 13:20-27; Job 14:1-22; Psalms 13:1-2; Psalms 42:9-10; Psalms 44:22-26; Psalms 77:7-9; Psalms 80:4-6; Psalms 88:6-9; Habakkuk 1:2-3; Genesis 15:2-5; Exodus 6:1-8; 1 Kings 19:1-8; Job 40:1-9; Jeremiah 15:19-21; Habakkuk 1:5-11
* **Associated Articles:** 5566: suffering, encouragements in (ID: `5566@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8482: spiritual warfare (ID: `8482@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8721: doubt (ID: `8721@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8726: doubters (ID: `8726@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8616: prayerlessness (id: 8616)

Without prayer any relationship with God is impoverished because vital communication is lost.

Reasons for prayerlessness
--------------------------

### Unbelief

**[PSA 14:1–14:4](https://ref.ly/Ps14:1-Ps14:4)** parallel [PSA 53:1–53:4](https://ref.ly/Ps53:1-Ps53:4) *See also* [JOB 21:15](https://ref.ly/Job21:15); [ROM 3:11](https://ref.ly/Rom3:11)

### Self\-reliance

**[JER 17:5](https://ref.ly/Jer17:5)** *See also* [ZEP 3:2](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:2)

### Worship of other gods

**[DEU 32:17–32:18](https://ref.ly/Deut32:17-Deut32:18)** *See also* [JER 2:5–2:6](https://ref.ly/Jer2:5-Jer2:6), [JER 2:8](https://ref.ly/Jer2:8)

### Guilt as a result of disobedience

[GEN 3:9–3:12](https://ref.ly/Gen3:9-Gen3:12) *Adam and Eve did not respond to their sin by praying. On the contrary they sought to hide from God*; ; [JON 1:1–1:6](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:1-Jonah1:6) *Jonah tried to run away from God.*

### Tiredness

**[LUK 22:45](https://ref.ly/Luke22:45)** *See also* [MAT 26:40](https://ref.ly/Matt26:40) parallel [MRK 14:37](https://ref.ly/Mark14:37); [MAT 26:43–26:45](https://ref.ly/Matt26:43-Matt26:45) parallel [MRK 14:40–14:41](https://ref.ly/Mark14:40-Mark14:41)

### Discord in relationship

[1PE 3:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:7)

Examples of prayerlessness
--------------------------

### Joshua, after a great victory

[JOS 7:2–7:5](https://ref.ly/Josh7:2-Josh7:5) *Joshua devised his own plan in attacking Ai and did not seek the LORD until after he suffered a disastrous defeat.*

### King Ahaziah, turning to idols

**[2KI 1:16](https://ref.ly/2Kgs1:16)** *See also* [2KI 1:1–1:6](https://ref.ly/2Kgs1:1-2Kgs1:6)

### The nominal religion of Israel

**[ISA 43:22](https://ref.ly/Isa43:22)** *This verse implies that prayer involves effort\-\-the people only paid lip service to God.* *See also* [ISA 1:14](https://ref.ly/Isa1:14), [ISA 64:7](https://ref.ly/Isa64:7)

### Israel trusts in other people rather than God

[ISA 30:1–30:2](https://ref.ly/Isa30:1-Isa30:2), [ISA 31:1](https://ref.ly/Isa31:1)

### Israel's failure to repent of their sins

**[DAN 9:13](https://ref.ly/Dan9:13)** *See also* [ISA 9:13](https://ref.ly/Isa9:13); [JER 5:3](https://ref.ly/Jer5:3)

### The lack of an intercessor among God's people

[EZK 22:30](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:30)

Consequences of prayerlessness
------------------------------

### Alienation from God

**[JHN 15:6](https://ref.ly/John15:6)** *See also* [PSA 73:27](https://ref.ly/Ps73:27)

### God's judgment

**[ZEP 1:4–1:6](https://ref.ly/Zeph1:4-Zeph1:6)** *See also* [JER 10:21](https://ref.ly/Jer10:21)

### Disloyalty to Jesus Christ

**[MAT 26:74](https://ref.ly/Matt26:74)** parallels [MRK 14:71](https://ref.ly/Mark14:71), [LUK 22:60](https://ref.ly/Luke22:60), [JHN 18:27](https://ref.ly/John18:27) *Peter had previously failed to pray in Gethsemane.*

### Spiritual poverty

**[JAS 4:2](https://ref.ly/Jas4:2)** *See also* [2KI 17:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:15); [JER 2:5](https://ref.ly/Jer2:5)

### Ineffective ministry

[1SA 2:12](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:12) *This literally means they had no fellowship with the LORD*; ; [1SA 12:23](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:23); ; [JHN 15:4–15:5](https://ref.ly/John15:4-John15:5)

### Conflicts with others because of unfulfilled desires

[JAS 4:1–4:4](https://ref.ly/Jas4:1-Jas4:4)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 14:1-4; Psalms 53:1-4; Job 21:15; Romans 3:11; Jeremiah 17:5; Zephaniah 3:2; Deuteronomy 32:17-18; Jeremiah 2:5-6; Jeremiah 2:8; Genesis 3:9-12; Jonah 1:1-6; Luke 22:45; Matthew 26:40; Mark 14:37; Matthew 26:43-45; Mark 14:40-41; 1 Peter 3:7; Joshua 7:2-5; 2 Kings 1:16; 2 Kings 1:1-6; Isaiah 43:22; Isaiah 1:14; Isaiah 64:7; Isaiah 30:1-2; Isaiah 31:1; Daniel 9:13; Isaiah 9:13; Jeremiah 5:3; Ezekiel 22:30; John 15:6; Psalms 73:27; Zephaniah 1:4-6; Jeremiah 10:21; Matthew 26:74; Mark 14:71; Luke 22:60; John 18:27; James 4:2; 2 Kings 17:15; Jeremiah 2:5; 1 Samuel 2:12; 1 Samuel 12:23; John 15:4-5; James 4:1-4
* **Associated Articles:** 5582: tiredness (ID: `5582@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5829: defiance (ID: `5829@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5885: indifference (ID: `5885@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6172: guilt (ID: `6172@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6178: hardness of heart (ID: `6178@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6245: stubbornness (ID: `6245@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8752: false worship (ID: `8752@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8784: nominal religion (ID: `8784@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8834: unbelief (ID: `8834@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8617: prayer, advice for effective (id: 8617)

Scripture provides guidance concerning what attitudes and actions are appropriate for effective prayer. It also identifies a number of motives which are likely to lead to prayers being unanswered.

Hindrances to prayer
--------------------

### Sin

**[ISA 59:2](https://ref.ly/Isa59:2)** *See also* [PSA 66:18](https://ref.ly/Ps66:18); [JER 14:10–14:12](https://ref.ly/Jer14:10-Jer14:12); [LAM 3:42–3:44](https://ref.ly/Lam3:42-Lam3:44); [MIC 3:4](https://ref.ly/Mic3:4)

### Disobedience

**[ZEC 7:13](https://ref.ly/Zech7:13)** *See also* [DEU 1:43–1:45](https://ref.ly/Deut1:43-Deut1:45); [PRO 1:28–1:31](https://ref.ly/Prov1:28-Prov1:31)

### Selfishness

**[JAS 4:3](https://ref.ly/Jas4:3)**

### Injustice

**[ISA 1:15–1:17](https://ref.ly/Isa1:15-Isa1:17)** *See also* [PRO 21:13](https://ref.ly/Prov21:13); [ISA 58:1–58:7](https://ref.ly/Isa58:1-Isa58:7)

### Lack of faith

**[JAS 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/Jas1:6-Jas1:7)**

Qualities that lead to effective prayer
---------------------------------------

### Humility

**[LUK 18:9–18:14](https://ref.ly/Luke18:9-Luke18:14)** *See also* [2SA 7:18](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:18); [2CH 7:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:14); [PSA 51:16–51:17](https://ref.ly/Ps51:16-Ps51:17); [ISA 57:15](https://ref.ly/Isa57:15); [MAT 8:8](https://ref.ly/Matt8:8) parallel [LUK 7:6](https://ref.ly/Luke7:6)

### Obedience

**[1JN 3:21–3:22](https://ref.ly/1John3:21-1John3:22)** *See also* [1SA 15:22](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:22); [JER 7:22–7:23](https://ref.ly/Jer7:22-Jer7:23)

### Righteousness

**[PRO 15:29](https://ref.ly/Prov15:29)** *See also* [1KI 3:11–3:12](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:11-1Kgs3:12); [PSA 34:15](https://ref.ly/Ps34:15)

### Single\-mindedness

**[JER 29:13](https://ref.ly/Jer29:13)** *See also* [DEU 4:29](https://ref.ly/Deut4:29); [1CH 28:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:9)

### Faith

**[MAT 21:21–21:22](https://ref.ly/Matt21:21-Matt21:22)** parallel [MRK 11:22–11:24](https://ref.ly/Mark11:22-Mark11:24) *See also* [MAT 7:7–7:11](https://ref.ly/Matt7:7-Matt7:11) parallel [LUK 11:9–11:13](https://ref.ly/Luke11:9-Luke11:13); [MAT 8:5–8:13](https://ref.ly/Matt8:5-Matt8:13) parallel [LUK 7:1–7:10](https://ref.ly/Luke7:1-Luke7:10); [MAT 15:21–15:28](https://ref.ly/Matt15:21-Matt15:28) parallel [MRK 7:24–7:30](https://ref.ly/Mark7:24-Mark7:30); [JHN 14:12–14:14](https://ref.ly/John14:12-John14:14)

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 59:2; Psalms 66:18; Jeremiah 14:10-12; Lamentations 3:42-44; Micah 3:4; Zechariah 7:13; Deuteronomy 1:43-45; Proverbs 1:28-31; James 4:3; Isaiah 1:15-17; Proverbs 21:13; Isaiah 58:1-7; James 1:6-7; Luke 18:9-14; 2 Samuel 7:18; 2 Chronicles 7:14; Psalms 51:16-17; Isaiah 57:15; Matthew 8:8; Luke 7:6; 1 John 3:21-22; 1 Samuel 15:22; Jeremiah 7:22-23; Proverbs 15:29; 1 Kings 3:11-12; Psalms 34:15; Jeremiah 29:13; Deuteronomy 4:29; 1 Chronicles 28:9; Matthew 21:21-22; Mark 11:22-24; Matthew 7:7-11; Luke 11:9-13; Matthew 8:5-13; Luke 7:1-10; Matthew 15:21-28; Mark 7:24-30; John 14:12-14
* **Associated Articles:** 6020: sin (ID: `6020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8154: righteousness (ID: `8154@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8276: humility (ID: `8276@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8453: obedience (ID: `8453@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8827: selfishness (ID: `8827@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8618: prayerfulness (id: 8618)

An attitude by which a constant relationship between God and believers is developed.

Prayerfulness is a way of life
------------------------------

**[LUK 2:37](https://ref.ly/Luke2:37)** *See also* [PSA 5:3](https://ref.ly/Ps5:3), [PSA 55:17](https://ref.ly/Ps55:17), [PSA 109:4](https://ref.ly/Ps109:4); [DAN 6:10–6:11](https://ref.ly/Dan6:10-Dan6:11), [DAN 6:13](https://ref.ly/Dan6:13)

Prayerfulness arises from a desire to be with God
-------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 130:5–130:6](https://ref.ly/Ps130:5-Ps130:6)** *See also* [PSA 42:1–42:4](https://ref.ly/Ps42:1-Ps42:4), [PSA 84:1–84:2](https://ref.ly/Ps84:1-Ps84:2)

Prayerfulness arises from an awareness of need that can only be met by God
--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[1TI 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:5)** *See also* [PSA 86:1](https://ref.ly/Ps86:1), [PSA 105:4](https://ref.ly/Ps105:4)

Prayerfulness demonstrates a continuing trust in God
----------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 15:5–15:8](https://ref.ly/John15:5-John15:8)** *See also* [PSA 63:1–63:8](https://ref.ly/Ps63:1-Ps63:8)

Prayerfulness involves a heart that is right with God
-----------------------------------------------------

**[ISA 1:15–1:17](https://ref.ly/Isa1:15-Isa1:17)** *See also* [MAT 6:7](https://ref.ly/Matt6:7); [MRK 12:40](https://ref.ly/Mark12:40) parallel [LUK 20:47](https://ref.ly/Luke20:47)

Prayerfulness involves the need to be alert
-------------------------------------------

**[MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41)** parallels [MRK 14:38](https://ref.ly/Mark14:38), [LUK 22:40](https://ref.ly/Luke22:40) *See also* [MIC 7:7](https://ref.ly/Mic7:7); [LUK 21:36](https://ref.ly/Luke21:36); [COL 4:2](https://ref.ly/Col4:2)

Prayerfulness needs to be maintained especially in difficult circumstances
--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[LUK 18:1](https://ref.ly/Luke18:1)** *See also* [HAB 3:16–3:19](https://ref.ly/Hab3:16-Hab3:19); [ACT 16:25](https://ref.ly/Acts16:25); [1TH 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:17); [1PE 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:7)

Examples of people whose prayerfulness proved effective
-------------------------------------------------------

### Hannah, who prayed for a child

**[1SA 1:20](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:20)** *See also* [ISA 1:10–1:18](https://ref.ly/Isa1:10-Isa1:18)

### Elijah, an ordinary man who prayed

**[JAS 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/Jas5:17-Jas5:18)** *See also* [1KI 17:1](https://ref.ly/1Kgs17:1), [1KI 18:41–18:46](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:41-1Kgs18:46)

### Nehemiah, a man who discovered God's plan through prayer

**[NEH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Neh1:4)** *See also* [NEH 1:5–1:11](https://ref.ly/Neh1:5-Neh1:11), [NEH 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/Neh2:4-Neh2:5)

### David, sustained through trials

**[1SA 30:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam30:6)** *See also* [2SA 22:1–22:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:1-2Sam22:4) parallel [PSA 18:1–18:3](https://ref.ly/Ps18:1-Ps18:3); [PSA 3:1–3:8](https://ref.ly/Ps3:1-Ps3:8)

### Daniel, whose patience in prayer was rewarded

**[DAN 10:12](https://ref.ly/Dan10:12)** *See also* [DAN 9:1–9:19](https://ref.ly/Dan9:1-Dan9:19)

### Jesus Christ, who perfectly trusted his Father

**[HEB 5:7](https://ref.ly/Heb5:7)** *See also* [LUK 5:16](https://ref.ly/Luke5:16); [JHN 11:41–11:42](https://ref.ly/John11:41-John11:42)

### The early church, which was founded upon prayer

**[ACT 1:14](https://ref.ly/Acts1:14)** *See also* [ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42), [ACT 4:23–4:31](https://ref.ly/Acts4:23-Acts4:31), [ACT 6:4](https://ref.ly/Acts6:4), [ACT 12:5](https://ref.ly/Acts12:5)

### Paul, who prayed for all the churches which he founded or visited

**[COL 1:9](https://ref.ly/Col1:9)** *See also* [ROM 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Rom1:9-Rom1:10); [EPH 1:16](https://ref.ly/Eph1:16); [PHP 1:4](https://ref.ly/Phil1:4); [1TH 3:10](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:10); [2TH 1:11](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:11); [2TI 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:3); [PHM 1:4](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:4)

* **Associated Passages:** Luke 2:37; Psalms 5:3; Psalms 55:17; Psalms 109:4; Daniel 6:10-11; Daniel 6:13; Psalms 130:5-6; Psalms 42:1-4; Psalms 84:1-2; 1 Timothy 5:5; Psalms 86:1; Psalms 105:4; John 15:5-8; Psalms 63:1-8; Isaiah 1:15-17; Matthew 6:7; Mark 12:40; Luke 20:47; Matthew 26:41; Mark 14:38; Luke 22:40; Micah 7:7; Luke 21:36; Colossians 4:2; Luke 18:1; Habakkuk 3:16-19; Acts 16:25; 1 Thessalonians 5:17; 1 Peter 4:7; 1 Samuel 1:20; Isaiah 1:10-18; James 5:17-18; 1 Kings 17:1; 1 Kings 18:41-46; Nehemiah 1:4; Nehemiah 1:5-11; Nehemiah 2:4-5; 1 Samuel 30:6; 2 Samuel 22:1-4; Psalms 18:1-3; Psalms 3:1-8; Daniel 10:12; Daniel 9:1-19; Hebrews 5:7; Luke 5:16; John 11:41-42; Acts 1:14; Acts 2:42; Acts 4:23-31; Acts 6:4; Acts 12:5; Colossians 1:9; Romans 1:9-10; Ephesians 1:16; Philippians 1:4; 1 Thessalonians 3:10; 2 Thessalonians 1:11; 2 Timothy 1:3; Philemon 1:4
* **Associated Articles:** 5763: attitudes, positive to God (ID: `5763@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8030: trust (ID: `8030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8102: abiding in Christ (ID: `8102@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8164: spirituality (ID: `8164@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8225: devotion (ID: `8225@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8619: prayer, in the church (id: 8619)

The prayer life of the NT provides a pattern from which the modern church can learn, both in terms of the importance of prayer, and also matters for prayer.

Prayer was at the centre of the life of the early church
--------------------------------------------------------

### They prayed when they met together

**[ACT 1:14](https://ref.ly/Acts1:14)** *See also* [ACT 2:42](https://ref.ly/Acts2:42), [ACT 4:23–4:31](https://ref.ly/Acts4:23-Acts4:31), [ACT 12:12](https://ref.ly/Acts12:12), [ACT 20:36](https://ref.ly/Acts20:36), [ACT 21:5](https://ref.ly/Acts21:5)

### They prayed about the selection and ordination of Christian leaders

**[ACT 13:2–13:3](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2-Acts13:3)** *See also* [ACT 1:24–1:25](https://ref.ly/Acts1:24-Acts1:25), [ACT 6:6](https://ref.ly/Acts6:6), [ACT 14:23](https://ref.ly/Acts14:23)

### They prayed during persecution

**[ACT 12:5](https://ref.ly/Acts12:5)** *See also* [ACT 7:59–7:60](https://ref.ly/Acts7:59-Acts7:60), [ACT 12:12](https://ref.ly/Acts12:12), [ACT 16:22–16:25](https://ref.ly/Acts16:22-Acts16:25)

### They prayed for healing

**[ACT 9:40](https://ref.ly/Acts9:40)** *See also* [ACT 28:7–28:8](https://ref.ly/Acts28:7-Acts28:8)

The apostles' teaching on prayer in church life
-----------------------------------------------

### The importance of prayer

**[COL 4:2](https://ref.ly/Col4:2)** *See also* [ROM 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rom12:12); [EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18); [1TH 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:17); [1TI 2:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1); [1PE 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:7)

### Prayer for the spread of the gospel

**[COL 4:3–4:4](https://ref.ly/Col4:3-Col4:4)** *See also* [EPH 6:19–6:20](https://ref.ly/Eph6:19-Eph6:20); [2TH 3:1](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:1)

### Prayer for the sick

**[JAS 5:14](https://ref.ly/Jas5:14)**

### Prayer for sinners

**[1JN 5:16–5:17](https://ref.ly/1John5:16-1John5:17)** *See also* [JAS 5:16](https://ref.ly/Jas5:16)

### Prayer for God's servants

**[ROM 15:30](https://ref.ly/Rom15:30)** *See also* [2CO 1:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:11)

### Orderly conduct of public prayer

**[1CO 11:4–11:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:4-1Cor11:5)** *See also* [1CO 11:13–11:15](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:13-1Cor11:15)

The practice of the apostles
----------------------------

### Prayer was central to their ministry

**[ACT 6:3–6:4](https://ref.ly/Acts6:3-Acts6:4)**

### They prayed for the church

**[COL 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Col1:9-Col1:10)** *See also* [EPH 1:16–1:21](https://ref.ly/Eph1:16-Eph1:21), [EPH 3:16–3:19](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16-Eph3:19); [PHP 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/Phil1:9-Phil1:11); [COL 1:3](https://ref.ly/Col1:3); [1TH 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:2); [2TH 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:11-2Thess1:12)

* **Associated Passages:** Acts 1:14; Acts 2:42; Acts 4:23-31; Acts 12:12; Acts 20:36; Acts 21:5; Acts 13:2-3; Acts 1:24-25; Acts 6:6; Acts 14:23; Acts 12:5; Acts 7:59-60; Acts 16:22-25; Acts 9:40; Acts 28:7-8; Colossians 4:2; Romans 12:12; Ephesians 6:18; 1 Thessalonians 5:17; 1 Timothy 2:1; 1 Peter 4:7; Colossians 4:3-4; Ephesians 6:19-20; 2 Thessalonians 3:1; James 5:14; 1 John 5:16-17; James 5:16; Romans 15:30; 2 Corinthians 1:11; 1 Corinthians 11:4-5; 1 Corinthians 11:13-15; Acts 6:3-4; Colossians 1:9-10; Ephesians 1:16-21; Ephesians 3:16-19; Philippians 1:9-11; Colossians 1:3; 1 Thessalonians 1:2; 2 Thessalonians 1:11-12
* **Associated Articles:** 7028: church, life of (ID: `7028@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8638: benedictions (ID: `8638@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8620: prayer, practicalities of (id: 8620)

Scripture commends a life of prayer, characterised by simplicity of expression, sincerity of heart and trust in the promises of God. It gives guidance on how, when and where to pray.

Scripture stresses the importance of prayer
-------------------------------------------

**[1TH 5:16–5:18](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:16-1Thess5:18)** *See also* [ACT 6:3–6:4](https://ref.ly/Acts6:3-Acts6:4); [ROM 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rom12:12)

Judgment comes on those who do not pray
---------------------------------------

**[PSA 79:6](https://ref.ly/Ps79:6)** *See also* [PSA 53:4](https://ref.ly/Ps53:4); [JER 10:21](https://ref.ly/Jer10:21); [ZEP 1:4–1:6](https://ref.ly/Zeph1:4-Zeph1:6); [JAS 4:2](https://ref.ly/Jas4:2)

Prayers should be expressed simply
----------------------------------

**[MAT 6:7–6:8](https://ref.ly/Matt6:7-Matt6:8)** *See also* [ECC 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:1-Eccl5:3); [LUK 18:9–18:14](https://ref.ly/Luke18:9-Luke18:14)

Prayer should not be ostentatious
---------------------------------

**[MAT 6:5–6:6](https://ref.ly/Matt6:5-Matt6:6)** *See also* [MAT 14:23](https://ref.ly/Matt14:23) parallel [MRK 6:46](https://ref.ly/Mark6:46); [LUK 5:16](https://ref.ly/Luke5:16)

Physical positions for prayer
-----------------------------

### Sitting while praying

**[2SA 7:18](https://ref.ly/2Sam7:18)** *See also* [JDG 20:26](https://ref.ly/Judg20:26); [NEH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Neh1:4)

### Kneeling while praying

**[LUK 22:41](https://ref.ly/Luke22:41)** *See also* [1KI 8:54](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:54); [2CH 6:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:13); [EZR 9:5](https://ref.ly/Ezra9:5); [ACT 9:40](https://ref.ly/Acts9:40), [ACT 21:5](https://ref.ly/Acts21:5); [EPH 3:14](https://ref.ly/Eph3:14)

### Standing while praying

**[1KI 8:22](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:22)** *See also* [1SA 1:26](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:26); [MRK 11:25](https://ref.ly/Mark11:25)

### Lying prostrate while praying

**[2CH 20:18](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:18)** *See also* [GEN 24:52](https://ref.ly/Gen24:52); [NUM 20:6](https://ref.ly/Num20:6)

### Praying with arms outstretched

**[EXO 9:29](https://ref.ly/Exod9:29)**; **[ISA 1:15](https://ref.ly/Isa1:15)** *See also* [1KI 8:54](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:54); [2CH 6:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:13)

### Praying with hands raised

**[1TI 2:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:8)** *See also* [EXO 9:29](https://ref.ly/Exod9:29); [1KI 8:22](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:22), [1KI 8:54](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:54); [PSA 63:4](https://ref.ly/Ps63:4), [PSA 77:1–77:2](https://ref.ly/Ps77:1-Ps77:2)

Prayer can be offered at any time
---------------------------------

### Praying several times a day

**[DAN 6:10](https://ref.ly/Dan6:10)** *See also* [PSA 55:17](https://ref.ly/Ps55:17), [PSA 88:1](https://ref.ly/Ps88:1)

### Praying early in the morning

**[MRK 1:35](https://ref.ly/Mark1:35)** *See also* [PSA 5:3](https://ref.ly/Ps5:3), [PSA 119:147](https://ref.ly/Ps119:147)

### Praying all night

**[LUK 6:12](https://ref.ly/Luke6:12)** *See also* [1SA 15:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:11); [LUK 2:37](https://ref.ly/Luke2:37)

Prayer is not confined to any single place
------------------------------------------

**[JHN 4:21–4:24](https://ref.ly/John4:21-John4:24)**

### Praying inside a building

**[DAN 6:10](https://ref.ly/Dan6:10)**; **[MAT 6:6](https://ref.ly/Matt6:6)** *See also* [1KI 8:28–8:30](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:28-1Kgs8:30)

### Praying outside a building

**[MRK 1:35](https://ref.ly/Mark1:35)**; **[LUK 5:16](https://ref.ly/Luke5:16)** *See also* [ACT 10:9](https://ref.ly/Acts10:9), [ACT 21:5](https://ref.ly/Acts21:5)

Prayer may be accompanied by fasting
------------------------------------

**[ACT 13:2–13:3](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2-Acts13:3)** *See also* [EZR 8:23](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:23); [NEH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Neh1:4); [PSA 35:13](https://ref.ly/Ps35:13); [DAN 9:3](https://ref.ly/Dan9:3); [LUK 2:37](https://ref.ly/Luke2:37), [LUK 5:33](https://ref.ly/Luke5:33); [ACT 14:23](https://ref.ly/Acts14:23); [MAT 17:21](https://ref.ly/Matt17:21) parallel [MRK 9:29](https://ref.ly/Mark9:29)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Thessalonians 5:16-18; Acts 6:3-4; Romans 12:12; Psalms 79:6; Psalms 53:4; Jeremiah 10:21; Zephaniah 1:4-6; James 4:2; Matthew 6:7-8; Ecclesiastes 5:1-3; Luke 18:9-14; Matthew 6:5-6; Matthew 14:23; Mark 6:46; Luke 5:16; 2 Samuel 7:18; Judges 20:26; Nehemiah 1:4; Luke 22:41; 1 Kings 8:54; 2 Chronicles 6:13; Ezra 9:5; Acts 9:40; Acts 21:5; Ephesians 3:14; 1 Kings 8:22; 1 Samuel 1:26; Mark 11:25; 2 Chronicles 20:18; Genesis 24:52; Numbers 20:6; Exodus 9:29; Isaiah 1:15; 1 Timothy 2:8; Psalms 63:4; Psalms 77:1-2; Daniel 6:10; Psalms 55:17; Psalms 88:1; Mark 1:35; Psalms 5:3; Psalms 119:147; Luke 6:12; 1 Samuel 15:11; Luke 2:37; John 4:21-24; Matthew 6:6; 1 Kings 8:28-30; Acts 10:9; Acts 13:2-3; Ezra 8:23; Psalms 35:13; Daniel 9:3; Luke 5:33; Acts 14:23; Matthew 17:21; Mark 9:29

## 8622: worship (id: 8622)

The praise, adoration and reverence of God, both in public and private. It is a celebration of the worthiness of God, by which honour is given to his name.

* **Associated Articles:** 8623: worship, of God alone (ID: `8623@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8624: worship, reasons for (ID: `8624@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8625: worship, acceptable attitudes in (ID: `8625@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8626: worship, places of (ID: `8626@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8627: worship, elements of (ID: `8627@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8628: worship, hindrances to (ID: `8628@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8629: worship, times for (ID: `8629@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8630: worship, results of (ID: `8630@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8623: worship, of God alone (id: 8623)

God alone is worthy of worship; the worship of other gods is forbidden. In the NT worship is offered to the Son of God.

God alone is to be worshipped
-----------------------------

### He alone is worthy of worship

**[1CH 16:25](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:25)** *The English word “worship” means literally “worth\-ship”.* *See also* [PSA 48:1](https://ref.ly/Ps48:1), [PSA 96:4–96:5](https://ref.ly/Ps96:4-Ps96:5), [PSA 145:3](https://ref.ly/Ps145:3); [2SA 22:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:4)

### The worship of God the Father

**[JHN 4:23](https://ref.ly/John4:23)** *See also* [PHP 2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:11)

### The worship of God the Son

**[MAT 2:11](https://ref.ly/Matt2:11), [MAT 14:33](https://ref.ly/Matt14:33)**; **[JHN 20:28](https://ref.ly/John20:28)** *See also* [MAT 28:16–28:17](https://ref.ly/Matt28:16-Matt28:17); [JHN 9:35–9:38](https://ref.ly/John9:35-John9:38); [PHP 2:9–2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:9-Phil2:11); [HEB 1:6](https://ref.ly/Heb1:6); [REV 5:8–5:14](https://ref.ly/Rev5:8-Rev5:14)

Angels worship God
------------------

**[PSA 103:20](https://ref.ly/Ps103:20), [PSA 148:1–148:2](https://ref.ly/Ps148:1-Ps148:2)** *See also* [PSA 29:1–29:2](https://ref.ly/Ps29:1-Ps29:2); [ISA 6:1–6:4](https://ref.ly/Isa6:1-Isa6:4); [EZK 10:1–10:18](https://ref.ly/Ezek10:1-Ezek10:18); [REV 4:8–4:9](https://ref.ly/Rev4:8-Rev4:9)

The worship of other gods forbidden
-----------------------------------

**[EXO 20:3](https://ref.ly/Exod20:3)** parallel [DEU 5:7](https://ref.ly/Deut5:7)**[2KI 17:35–17:36](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:35-2Kgs17:36)** *See also* [EXO 34:14](https://ref.ly/Exod34:14); [DEU 6:13–6:14](https://ref.ly/Deut6:13-Deut6:14); [NEH 9:6](https://ref.ly/Neh9:6); [PSA 86:9–86:10](https://ref.ly/Ps86:9-Ps86:10), [PSA 97:7](https://ref.ly/Ps97:7); [ACT 10:25–10:26](https://ref.ly/Acts10:25-Acts10:26), [ACT 14:13–14:18](https://ref.ly/Acts14:13-Acts14:18)

The worship of angels forbidden
-------------------------------

**[COL 2:18](https://ref.ly/Col2:18)** *See also* [REV 19:9–19:10](https://ref.ly/Rev19:9-Rev19:10), [REV 22:8–22:9](https://ref.ly/Rev22:8-Rev22:9)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Chronicles 16:25; Psalms 48:1; Psalms 96:4-5; Psalms 145:3; 2 Samuel 22:4; John 4:23; Philippians 2:11; Matthew 2:11; Matthew 14:33; John 20:28; Matthew 28:16-17; John 9:35-38; Philippians 2:9-11; Hebrews 1:6; Revelation 5:8-14; Psalms 103:20; Psalms 148:1-2; Psalms 29:1-2; Isaiah 6:1-4; Ezekiel 10:1-18; Revelation 4:8-9; Exodus 20:3; Deuteronomy 5:7; 2 Kings 17:35-36; Exodus 34:14; Deuteronomy 6:13-14; Nehemiah 9:6; Psalms 86:9-10; Psalms 97:7; Acts 10:25-26; Acts 14:13-18; Colossians 2:18; Revelation 19:9-10; Revelation 22:8-9

## 8624: worship, reasons for (id: 8624)

The supreme reason for human existence is to worship God for his love, greatness and saving deeds.

To worship is a divine command
------------------------------

**[MAT 4:10](https://ref.ly/Matt4:10)** parallel [LUK 4:8](https://ref.ly/Luke4:8) *See also* [DEU 6:13](https://ref.ly/Deut6:13); [EXO 23:25](https://ref.ly/Exod23:25); [2KI 17:36](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:36); [1CH 16:29](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:29); [PSA 22:23](https://ref.ly/Ps22:23), [PSA 29:2](https://ref.ly/Ps29:2), [PSA 68:26](https://ref.ly/Ps68:26), [PSA 113:1](https://ref.ly/Ps113:1), [PSA 117:1](https://ref.ly/Ps117:1), [PSA 148:11–148:13](https://ref.ly/Ps148:11-Ps148:13), [PSA 150:6](https://ref.ly/Ps150:6); [1TI 2:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:8); [REV 14:7](https://ref.ly/Rev14:7)

God's people are to be a worshipping people
-------------------------------------------

**[1PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:9)** *See also* [EXO 19:5–19:6](https://ref.ly/Exod19:5-Exod19:6); [PSA 105:1–105:6](https://ref.ly/Ps105:1-Ps105:6); [ISA 43:21](https://ref.ly/Isa43:21); [REV 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/Rev1:5-Rev1:6)

Worship is the response of God's people
---------------------------------------

### To God's love

**[EXO 4:31](https://ref.ly/Exod4:31)** *See also* [DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5), [DEU 12:7](https://ref.ly/Deut12:7), [DEU 26:10–26:11](https://ref.ly/Deut26:10-Deut26:11); [2CH 7:3](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:3); [PSA 95:6–95:7](https://ref.ly/Ps95:6-Ps95:7), [PSA 117:1–117:2](https://ref.ly/Ps117:1-Ps117:2), [PSA 138:2](https://ref.ly/Ps138:2)

### To God's holy presence

**[1CH 16:29](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:29)** parallel [PSA 96:8–96:9](https://ref.ly/Ps96:8-Ps96:9) *See also* [EXO 33:10](https://ref.ly/Exod33:10); [LEV 10:3](https://ref.ly/Lev10:3); [JOS 5:13–5:15](https://ref.ly/Josh5:13-Josh5:15); [PSA 29:2](https://ref.ly/Ps29:2), [PSA 99:5](https://ref.ly/Ps99:5); [REV 4:8](https://ref.ly/Rev4:8), [REV 15:4](https://ref.ly/Rev15:4)

### To God's greatness

**[PSA 95:1–95:3](https://ref.ly/Ps95:1-Ps95:3)** *See also* [EXO 3:12](https://ref.ly/Exod3:12); [PSA 22:27–22:28](https://ref.ly/Ps22:27-Ps22:28), [PSA 66:1–66:4](https://ref.ly/Ps66:1-Ps66:4), [PSA 96:1–96:3](https://ref.ly/Ps96:1-Ps96:3); [REV 15:3–15:4](https://ref.ly/Rev15:3-Rev15:4)

To the deeds of God
-------------------

**[GEN 8:20](https://ref.ly/Gen8:20)** *Noah's response to God's deliverance from the flood.* *See also* [GEN 12:7](https://ref.ly/Gen12:7) *God's promise of an inheritance to Abraham*[EXO 4:29–4:31](https://ref.ly/Exod4:29-Exod4:31), [EXO 12:27](https://ref.ly/Exod12:27), [EXO 15:1](https://ref.ly/Exod15:1), [EXO 15:20](https://ref.ly/Exod15:20)[EZR 3:10–3:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra3:10-Ezra3:11); [ISA 19:21](https://ref.ly/Isa19:21); [DAN 3:28](https://ref.ly/Dan3:28) *God's deliverance of Daniel in Babylon*; [MAT 9:7–9:8](https://ref.ly/Matt9:7-Matt9:8) parallels [MRK 2:12](https://ref.ly/Mark2:12), [LUK 5:25–5:26](https://ref.ly/Luke5:25-Luke5:26) *the healing of the paralytic*; [ACT 3:8](https://ref.ly/Acts3:8) *the healing of the crippled beggar*

### To the fear of God

**[PSA 22:23](https://ref.ly/Ps22:23)**; **[HEB 12:28](https://ref.ly/Heb12:28)** *See also* [PSA 2:11](https://ref.ly/Ps2:11); [ACT 10:2](https://ref.ly/Acts10:2)

## 8625: worship, acceptable attitudes in (id: 8625)

True worship is not the mechanical repetition of rituals, but should be wholehearted and reverent. It should be based upon trustful and obedient lives, in that obedience is itself to be seen as an act of worship.

Worship should be in accordance with God's commands
---------------------------------------------------

**[GEN 22:2](https://ref.ly/Gen22:2)** *See also* [GEN 12:1](https://ref.ly/Gen12:1), [GEN 12:7–12:8](https://ref.ly/Gen12:7-Gen12:8); [DEU 30:16–30:20](https://ref.ly/Deut30:16-Deut30:20); [1SA 15:22](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:22); [PSA 40:6–40:8](https://ref.ly/Ps40:6-Ps40:8); [JER 7:2](https://ref.ly/Jer7:2); [DAN 3:28](https://ref.ly/Dan3:28); [ACT 13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2); [ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)

Worship should not be mechanical
--------------------------------

**[JHN 4:23–4:24](https://ref.ly/John4:23-John4:24)** *See also* [HEB 10:1](https://ref.ly/Heb10:1)

Worship should give God the honour due to him
---------------------------------------------

[1CH 16:29](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:29) parallel [PSA 96:8–96:9](https://ref.ly/Ps96:8-Ps96:9)

Worship of mere human devising is unacceptable
----------------------------------------------

**[ISA 29:13](https://ref.ly/Isa29:13)** *See also* [LEV 10:1](https://ref.ly/Lev10:1); [MAT 15:7–15:9](https://ref.ly/Matt15:7-Matt15:9) parallel [MRK 7:6–7:7](https://ref.ly/Mark7:6-Mark7:7); [PHP 3:3](https://ref.ly/Phil3:3); [COL 2:23](https://ref.ly/Col2:23)

Worship should be orderly and reverent
--------------------------------------

**[1CO 14:40](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:40)** *See also* [1CH 16:37–16:42](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:37-1Chr16:42); [1KI 18:30–18:39](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:30-1Kgs18:39); [1CO 14:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:26)

Worship should be grounded in godly and obedient living
-------------------------------------------------------

**[MIC 6:6–6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:6-Mic6:8)**; **[ROM 12:1](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1)** *See also* [PSA 15:1–15:5](https://ref.ly/Ps15:1-Ps15:5), [PSA 24:3–24:4](https://ref.ly/Ps24:3-Ps24:4); [1TI 2:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:10)

The proper attitude of worshippers
----------------------------------

### Preparation for worship

**[1CO 11:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:28)** *See also* [LEV 16:3–16:4](https://ref.ly/Lev16:3-Lev16:4); [2SA 12:20](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:20); [2CH 7:1](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:1); [MAT 2:11](https://ref.ly/Matt2:11)

### Wholeheartedness

**[DEU 6:5](https://ref.ly/Deut6:5)** *See also* [EXO 34:14](https://ref.ly/Exod34:14); [DEU 10:12](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12); [JOS 22:5](https://ref.ly/Josh22:5); [1SA 12:24](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:24); [PSA 27:4](https://ref.ly/Ps27:4); [MAT 22:37](https://ref.ly/Matt22:37) parallel [MRK 12:30](https://ref.ly/Mark12:30); [LUK 10:27](https://ref.ly/Luke10:27)

### Confidence in approaching God

**[HEB 10:22–10:23](https://ref.ly/Heb10:22-Heb10:23)** *See also* [GEN 4:4](https://ref.ly/Gen4:4); [JAS 4:8](https://ref.ly/Jas4:8); [HEB 7:19](https://ref.ly/Heb7:19), [HEB 11:4](https://ref.ly/Heb11:4)

## 8626: worship, places of (id: 8626)

Under the old covenant, there were rules governing the places where worship might be offered but under the new covenant the earthly location is of no importance.

Worship at places commemorating some act of God
-----------------------------------------------

**[GEN 12:7](https://ref.ly/Gen12:7)** *See also* [GEN 8:20](https://ref.ly/Gen8:20), [GEN 26:23–26:25](https://ref.ly/Gen26:23-Gen26:25), [GEN 35:1](https://ref.ly/Gen35:1)

Worship at a place chosen by God
--------------------------------

**[DEU 12:13–12:14](https://ref.ly/Deut12:13-Deut12:14)** *See also* [GEN 22:2](https://ref.ly/Gen22:2); [DEU 14:23–14:25](https://ref.ly/Deut14:23-Deut14:25); [1CH 21:18–21:19](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:18-1Chr21:19); [2CH 7:15–7:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:15-2Chr7:16)

Worship in certain sacred places
--------------------------------

**[DEU 12:5](https://ref.ly/Deut12:5)** *See also* [EXO 3:12](https://ref.ly/Exod3:12); [DEU 26:2](https://ref.ly/Deut26:2); [1SA 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:3), [1SA 1:28](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:28); [ISA 27:13](https://ref.ly/Isa27:13); [JHN 4:20](https://ref.ly/John4:20)

Worship at the Tent of Meeting
------------------------------

**[EXO 25:8–25:9](https://ref.ly/Exod25:8-Exod25:9)** *See also* [EXO 29:42–29:43](https://ref.ly/Exod29:42-Exod29:43), [EXO 33:10](https://ref.ly/Exod33:10); [LEV 17:1–17:5](https://ref.ly/Lev17:1-Lev17:5)

Worship at the temple in Jerusalem
----------------------------------

**[1CH 22:1](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:1)** *See also* [2CH 7:15–7:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:15-2Chr7:16), [2CH 29:27–29:30](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:27-2Chr29:30); [NEH 8:6](https://ref.ly/Neh8:6); [LUK 1:8–1:10](https://ref.ly/Luke1:8-Luke1:10), [LUK 2:37](https://ref.ly/Luke2:37); [ACT 8:27](https://ref.ly/Acts8:27)

Worship in a synagogue
----------------------

**[LUK 4:16](https://ref.ly/Luke4:16)** *See also* [ACT 13:15](https://ref.ly/Acts13:15), [ACT 15:21](https://ref.ly/Acts15:21), [ACT 17:2](https://ref.ly/Acts17:2)

Worship in the home
-------------------

**[DAN 6:10](https://ref.ly/Dan6:10)** *See also* [MAT 6:6](https://ref.ly/Matt6:6); [ROM 16:5](https://ref.ly/Rom16:5); [1CO 16:19](https://ref.ly/1Cor16:19); [COL 4:15](https://ref.ly/Col4:15); [PHM 1:2](https://ref.ly/Phlm1:2)

The earthly location for worship is unimportant
-----------------------------------------------

**[JHN 4:21–4:24](https://ref.ly/John4:21-John4:24)** *See also* [GEN 24:26](https://ref.ly/Gen24:26), [GEN 47:31](https://ref.ly/Gen47:31); [JDG 7:15](https://ref.ly/Judg7:15); [JOB 1:20](https://ref.ly/Job1:20)

In heaven worship is perfect
----------------------------

[LUK 2:13](https://ref.ly/Luke2:13); ; [HEB 12:22](https://ref.ly/Heb12:22); ; [REV 4:9–4:11](https://ref.ly/Rev4:9-Rev4:11), [REV 5:13–5:14](https://ref.ly/Rev5:13-Rev5:14), [REV 7:9–7:12](https://ref.ly/Rev7:9-Rev7:12), [REV 19:4–19:7](https://ref.ly/Rev19:4-Rev19:7)
