## 8714: dishonesty (id: 8714)

A way of speaking or acting which leads to people being deceived, misled or cheated.

* **Associated Articles:** 8715: dishonesty, and God's nature (ID: `8715@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8716: dishonesty, examples of (ID: `8716@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8715: dishonesty, and God's nature (id: 8715)

Dishonesty is contrary to the will and nature of God, and so should not be found among the people of God.

Dishonesty is contrary to the will and nature of God
----------------------------------------------------

**[NUM 23:19](https://ref.ly/Num23:19)** *See also* [1SA 15:29](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:29); [ROM 3:4](https://ref.ly/Rom3:4); [TIT 1:2](https://ref.ly/Titus1:2)

### Dishonesty, like sin, is of satanic origin

**[JHN 8:44](https://ref.ly/John8:44)** *See also* [GEN 3:1–3:5](https://ref.ly/Gen3:1-Gen3:5)

God's hatred of dishonesty
--------------------------

**[PRO 12:22](https://ref.ly/Prov12:22)** *See also* [PSA 5:4–5:6](https://ref.ly/Ps5:4-Ps5:6); [PRO 6:16–6:17](https://ref.ly/Prov6:16-Prov6:17); [ISA 59:1–59:4](https://ref.ly/Isa59:1-Isa59:4), [ISA 59:12–59:15](https://ref.ly/Isa59:12-Isa59:15)

Kinds of dishonesty
-------------------

### In business deals

**[HOS 12:7](https://ref.ly/Hos12:7)** *See also* [DEU 25:13–25:16](https://ref.ly/Deut25:13-Deut25:16); [PRO 20:14](https://ref.ly/Prov20:14); [AMO 8:5](https://ref.ly/Amos8:5); [MIC 6:10](https://ref.ly/Mic6:10)

### In not paying debts

**[PSA 37:21](https://ref.ly/Ps37:21)** *See also* [JAS 5:4](https://ref.ly/Jas5:4)

### In exploiting the poor

**[EZK 22:29](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:29)** *See also* [JOB 24:2–24:11](https://ref.ly/Job24:2-Job24:11); [ISA 32:7](https://ref.ly/Isa32:7); [JER 22:13](https://ref.ly/Jer22:13)

God's judgment on dishonesty
----------------------------

### God's denunciation of dishonesty in general

**[HOS 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/Hos4:1-Hos4:2)** *See also* [LEV 19:15](https://ref.ly/Lev19:15); [JER 7:8–7:10](https://ref.ly/Jer7:8-Jer7:10); [1TH 4:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:6)

### The dishonesty of liars and false witnesses

**[PRO 19:9](https://ref.ly/Prov19:9)**; **[ACT 5:1–5:10](https://ref.ly/Acts5:1-Acts5:10)** *See also* [DEU 19:16–19:19](https://ref.ly/Deut19:16-Deut19:19); [JOS 7:10–7:12](https://ref.ly/Josh7:10-Josh7:12) *regarding Achan's sin*; [2KI 5:19–5:27](https://ref.ly/2Kgs5:19-2Kgs5:27); [PSA 5:6](https://ref.ly/Ps5:6); [ISA 29:20–29:21](https://ref.ly/Isa29:20-Isa29:21); [JER 9:4–9:9](https://ref.ly/Jer9:4-Jer9:9); [REV 21:8](https://ref.ly/Rev21:8)

### The dishonesty of false prophets and teachers

[JER 14:14–14:15](https://ref.ly/Jer14:14-Jer14:15); ; [2PE 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:1-2Pet2:3); ; [ISA 9:14–9:15](https://ref.ly/Isa9:14-Isa9:15); ; [JER 28:15–28:16](https://ref.ly/Jer28:15-Jer28:16); ; [EZK 13:1–13:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek13:1-Ezek13:23); ; [ZEC 10:2–10:3](https://ref.ly/Zech10:2-Zech10:3); ; [1TI 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1-1Tim4:2)

God's demands for making amends for dishonesty
----------------------------------------------

[LEV 6:1–6:7](https://ref.ly/Lev6:1-Lev6:7); ; [LUK 3:12–3:14](https://ref.ly/Luke3:12-Luke3:14) *This demonstrated that their repentance was genuine*; ; [LUK 19:8](https://ref.ly/Luke19:8) *the result of encountering Jesus Christ*; ; [LUK 16:1–16:12](https://ref.ly/Luke16:1-Luke16:12) *Jesus Christ was not commending the steward's dishonesty but his shrewdness.*

* **Associated Passages:** Numbers 23:19; 1 Samuel 15:29; Romans 3:4; Titus 1:2; John 8:44; Genesis 3:1-5; Proverbs 12:22; Psalms 5:4-6; Proverbs 6:16-17; Isaiah 59:1-4; Isaiah 59:12-15; Hosea 12:7; Deuteronomy 25:13-16; Proverbs 20:14; Amos 8:5; Micah 6:10; Psalms 37:21; James 5:4; Ezekiel 22:29; Job 24:2-11; Isaiah 32:7; Jeremiah 22:13; Hosea 4:1-2; Leviticus 19:15; Jeremiah 7:8-10; 1 Thessalonians 4:6; Proverbs 19:9; Acts 5:1-10; Deuteronomy 19:16-19; Joshua 7:10-12; 2 Kings 5:19-27; Psalms 5:6; Isaiah 29:20-21; Jeremiah 9:4-9; Revelation 21:8; Jeremiah 14:14-15; 2 Peter 2:1-3; Isaiah 9:14-15; Jeremiah 28:15-16; Ezekiel 13:1-23; Zechariah 10:2-3; 1 Timothy 4:1-2; Leviticus 6:1-7; Luke 3:12-14; Luke 19:8; Luke 16:1-12
* **Associated Articles:** 1065: God, holiness of (ID: `1065@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5492: restitution (ID: `5492@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5614: weights and measures, laws concerning (ID: `5614@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6130: corruption (ID: `6130@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6145: deceit (ID: `6145@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8275: honesty (ID: `8275@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8767: hypocrisy (ID: `8767@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8716: dishonesty, examples of (id: 8716)

Examples of the dishonest behaviour condemned by God.

Dishonest words condemned
-------------------------

### Lying

**[EPH 4:25](https://ref.ly/Eph4:25)** *See also* [LEV 19:11](https://ref.ly/Lev19:11); [PSA 34:13](https://ref.ly/Ps34:13); [COL 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:9-Col3:10)

### False witness

**[EXO 20:16](https://ref.ly/Exod20:16)** parallel [DEU 5:20](https://ref.ly/Deut5:20) *See also* [MAT 19:17–19:18](https://ref.ly/Matt19:17-Matt19:18); [MRK 10:19](https://ref.ly/Mark10:19); [LUK 18:20](https://ref.ly/Luke18:20); [EXO 23:1](https://ref.ly/Exod23:1), [EXO 23:7](https://ref.ly/Exod23:7); [MAT 26:59–26:60](https://ref.ly/Matt26:59-Matt26:60); [ACT 6:12–6:14](https://ref.ly/Acts6:12-Acts6:14)

### Swearing falsely

**[LEV 19:12](https://ref.ly/Lev19:12)** *See also* [EXO 20:7](https://ref.ly/Exod20:7); [MAT 5:33–5:37](https://ref.ly/Matt5:33-Matt5:37)

Dishonest actions condemned
---------------------------

### Stealing

**[EXO 20:15](https://ref.ly/Exod20:15)** parallel [DEU 5:19](https://ref.ly/Deut5:19) *See also* [MAT 19:18](https://ref.ly/Matt19:18) parallels [MRK 10:19](https://ref.ly/Mark10:19), [LUK 18:20](https://ref.ly/Luke18:20); [ROM 13:9](https://ref.ly/Rom13:9)

### Dishonest dealing

**[PRO 11:1](https://ref.ly/Prov11:1)** *See also* [LEV 19:13](https://ref.ly/Lev19:13); [DEU 25:13–25:16](https://ref.ly/Deut25:13-Deut25:16); [PSA 62:10](https://ref.ly/Ps62:10); [ISA 33:15–33:16](https://ref.ly/Isa33:15-Isa33:16); [TIT 2:9–2:10](https://ref.ly/Titus2:9-Titus2:10)

Israel condemned for dishonest gain
-----------------------------------

### Bribery and extortion

**[EZK 22:12–22:13](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:12-Ezek22:13)** *See also* [JER 22:13](https://ref.ly/Jer22:13), [JER 22:17–22:19](https://ref.ly/Jer22:17-Jer22:19); [EZK 22:27–22:31](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:27-Ezek22:31); [HAB 2:6–2:9](https://ref.ly/Hab2:6-Hab2:9)

### Cheating and dishonest scales

**[AMO 8:4–8:8](https://ref.ly/Amos8:4-Amos8:8)** *See also* [LEV 19:35–19:36](https://ref.ly/Lev19:35-Lev19:36); [MIC 6:10–6:13](https://ref.ly/Mic6:10-Mic6:13); [MAL 1:14](https://ref.ly/Mal1:14) *In this case, they were cheating the LORD.*

Examples of dishonesty
----------------------

[GEN 26:15–26:22](https://ref.ly/Gen26:15-Gen26:22) *Abimelech's servants*; [GEN 25:29–25:33](https://ref.ly/Gen25:29-Gen25:33), [GEN 27:6–27:29](https://ref.ly/Gen27:6-Gen27:29), [GEN 30:31–30:43](https://ref.ly/Gen30:31-Gen30:43); [GEN 29:21–29:30](https://ref.ly/Gen29:21-Gen29:30), [GEN 31:19](https://ref.ly/Gen31:19) *Rachel*; ; [GEN 31:36–31:42](https://ref.ly/Gen31:36-Gen31:42) *Laban*; ; [JOS 7:11–7:26](https://ref.ly/Josh7:11-Josh7:26) *Achan*; ; [1KI 21:2–21:16](https://ref.ly/1Kgs21:2-1Kgs21:16) *Ahab and Naboth's vineyard*

* **Associated Passages:** Ephesians 4:25; Leviticus 19:11; Psalms 34:13; Colossians 3:9-10; Exodus 20:16; Deuteronomy 5:20; Matthew 19:17-18; Mark 10:19; Luke 18:20; Exodus 23:1; Exodus 23:7; Matthew 26:59-60; Acts 6:12-14; Leviticus 19:12; Exodus 20:7; Matthew 5:33-37; Exodus 20:15; Deuteronomy 5:19; Matthew 19:18; Romans 13:9; Proverbs 11:1; Leviticus 19:13; Deuteronomy 25:13-16; Psalms 62:10; Isaiah 33:15-16; Titus 2:9-10; Ezekiel 22:12-13; Jeremiah 22:13; Jeremiah 22:17-19; Ezekiel 22:27-31; Habakkuk 2:6-9; Amos 8:4-8; Leviticus 19:35-36; Micah 6:10-13; Malachi 1:14; Genesis 26:15-22; Genesis 25:29-33; Genesis 27:6-29; Genesis 30:31-43; Genesis 29:21-30; Genesis 31:19; Genesis 31:36-42; Joshua 7:11-26; 1 Kings 21:2-16
* **Associated Articles:** 5238: bribery (ID: `5238@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5253: cheating (ID: `5253@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5310: exploitation (ID: `5310@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5311: extortion (ID: `5311@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5318: fraud (ID: `5318@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5353: interest (ID: `5353@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5429: oaths (ID: `5429@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5512: scales and balances (ID: `5512@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5555: stealing (ID: `5555@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8751: false witness (ID: `8751@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8776: lies (ID: `8776@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8718: disobedience (id: 8718)

The refusal to obey someone, especially someone in a position of authority. Scripture insists on the need to obey God at all times.

Disobedience enters people's hearts for various reasons
-------------------------------------------------------

### Disobedience comes through greed and lust

**[GEN 3:6](https://ref.ly/Gen3:6)** *See also* [GEN 3:11–3:12](https://ref.ly/Gen3:11-Gen3:12); [EXO 16:19–16:20](https://ref.ly/Exod16:19-Exod16:20); [JOS 7:20–7:21](https://ref.ly/Josh7:20-Josh7:21); [2SA 11:2–11:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam11:2-2Sam11:4)

### Disobedience arises from impatience

**[EXO 32:23](https://ref.ly/Exod32:23)** *See also* [NUM 20:10–20:11](https://ref.ly/Num20:10-Num20:11); [1SA 13:8–13:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam13:8-1Sam13:14)

### Disobedience comes through fear

[JER 43:2–43:7](https://ref.ly/Jer43:2-Jer43:7); ; [JHN 7:13](https://ref.ly/John7:13), [JHN 12:42](https://ref.ly/John12:42); ; [GAL 2:12](https://ref.ly/Gal2:12)

### Disobedience results from pride and arrogance

**[LEV 10:1](https://ref.ly/Lev10:1)** *See also* [EXO 5:2](https://ref.ly/Exod5:2); [2CH 26:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:16)

Unbelief is disobedience
------------------------

**[HEB 3:12](https://ref.ly/Heb3:12)** *See also* [JER 7:23–7:28](https://ref.ly/Jer7:23-Jer7:28); [ROM 11:30–11:32](https://ref.ly/Rom11:30-Rom11:32) *[Ro 11:20](https://ref.ly/Rom11:20) makes it clear that the disobedience spoken of here was unbelief*; [HEB 3:18–3:19](https://ref.ly/Heb3:18-Heb3:19), [HEB 4:2](https://ref.ly/Heb4:2), [HEB 4:6](https://ref.ly/Heb4:6)

Lack of love is disobedience
----------------------------

**[JHN 14:24](https://ref.ly/John14:24)** *See also* [1JN 2:9](https://ref.ly/1John2:9), [1JN 3:15](https://ref.ly/1John3:15)

Disobedience to God leads to punishment
---------------------------------------

### Punishment is applied to individuals

**[GEN 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Gen3:17-Gen3:19)** *See also* [GEN 3:23–3:24](https://ref.ly/Gen3:23-Gen3:24); [LEV 10:1–10:2](https://ref.ly/Lev10:1-Lev10:2); [NUM 20:12](https://ref.ly/Num20:12); [1SA 28:18](https://ref.ly/1Sam28:18); [2SA 12:14](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:14); [JON 1:10–1:12](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:10-Jonah1:12); [EPH 5:5–5:6](https://ref.ly/Eph5:5-Eph5:6)

### Punishment for the disobedience of unbelief

**[2TH 1:8–1:9](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:8-2Thess1:9)** *See also* [HEB 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Heb2:2-Heb2:3)

### Nations are also punished

**[GEN 15:14](https://ref.ly/Gen15:14)** *See also* [ACT 7:7](https://ref.ly/Acts7:7)**[DEU 11:26–11:28](https://ref.ly/Deut11:26-Deut11:28)**; **[1SA 12:15](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:15)** *See also* [EXO 32:35](https://ref.ly/Exod32:35); [DEU 28:15](https://ref.ly/Deut28:15); [ISA 13:11](https://ref.ly/Isa13:11)

### Disobedience, like all sin, can be forgiven

**[ROM 5:19](https://ref.ly/Rom5:19)** *See also* [EPH 2:1–2:5](https://ref.ly/Eph2:1-Eph2:5)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 3:6; Genesis 3:11-12; Exodus 16:19-20; Joshua 7:20-21; 2 Samuel 11:2-4; Exodus 32:23; Numbers 20:10-11; 1 Samuel 13:8-14; Jeremiah 43:2-7; John 7:13; John 12:42; Galatians 2:12; Leviticus 10:1; Exodus 5:2; 2 Chronicles 26:16; Hebrews 3:12; Jeremiah 7:23-28; Romans 11:30-32; Romans 11:20; Hebrews 3:18-19; Hebrews 4:2; Hebrews 4:6; John 14:24; 1 John 2:9; 1 John 3:15; Genesis 3:17-19; Genesis 3:23-24; Leviticus 10:1-2; Numbers 20:12; 1 Samuel 28:18; 2 Samuel 12:14; Jonah 1:10-12; Ephesians 5:5-6; 2 Thessalonians 1:8-9; Hebrews 2:2-3; Genesis 15:14; Acts 7:7; Deuteronomy 11:26-28; 1 Samuel 12:15; Exodus 32:35; Deuteronomy 28:15; Isaiah 13:11; Romans 5:19; Ephesians 2:1-5
* **Associated Articles:** 5483: punishment, nature of (ID: `5483@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5813: conceit (ID: `5813@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5883: impatience (ID: `5883@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6155: fall, of Adam and Eve (ID: `6155@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6178: hardness of heart (ID: `6178@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6218: provoking God (ID: `6218@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6222: rebellion, against God (ID: `6222@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8453: obedience (ID: `8453@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8744: faithlessness, as disobedience (ID: `8744@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8834: unbelief (ID: `8834@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8840: unfaithfulness, to God (ID: `8840@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8719: distrust (id: 8719)

Failure to trust another, or a tendency to be suspicious of others' abilities or intentions. Though sometimes justifiable towards other human beings, such an attitude is never acceptable towards God.

Distrust between human beings
-----------------------------

**[GEN 50:15–50:17](https://ref.ly/Gen50:15-Gen50:17)** *Joseph's brothers distrusted him because they could not believe he had forgiven them.* *See also* [GEN 32:6–32:8](https://ref.ly/Gen32:6-Gen32:8) *Jacob distrusted Esau because he thought he was seeking revenge*; [JDG 11:19–11:20](https://ref.ly/Judg11:19-Judg11:20) *Sihon distrusted Israel because he suspected a trick*; [ACT 15:37–15:38](https://ref.ly/Acts15:37-Acts15:38) *Paul distrusted John Mark, having been let down by him.*

Distrust of God
---------------

### Israel distrusted God

**[ZEP 3:2](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:2)** *See also* [DEU 1:32–1:33](https://ref.ly/Deut1:32-Deut1:33), [DEU 9:23–9:24](https://ref.ly/Deut9:23-Deut9:24) *Because that generation distrusted God, they failed to enter the promised land*; [PSA 78:7](https://ref.ly/Ps78:7), [PSA 78:22](https://ref.ly/Ps78:22) *Israel distrusted God in spite of the miracles he had done for her.*[2KI 17:14–17:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:14-2Kgs17:15); [JER 13:25](https://ref.ly/Jer13:25)

### Other examples

Distrust in God involves failure to trust God's promises and placing trust in other things: [JER 13:25](https://ref.ly/Jer13:25); ; [EZK 33:13](https://ref.ly/Ezek33:13); ; [MAL 3:6–3:10](https://ref.ly/Mal3:6-Mal3:10); ; [MAT 19:22](https://ref.ly/Matt19:22) parallel [MRK 10:22](https://ref.ly/Mark10:22)

Distrust by God
---------------

**[JOB 4:18](https://ref.ly/Job4:18)** *See also* [JOB 15:15](https://ref.ly/Job15:15); [JHN 2:24](https://ref.ly/John2:24)

Distrust is sometimes justified
-------------------------------

**[PSA 118:8](https://ref.ly/Ps118:8)** *See also* [JOB 39:12](https://ref.ly/Job39:12); [PSA 5:9](https://ref.ly/Ps5:9), [PSA 44:6](https://ref.ly/Ps44:6), [PSA 146:3](https://ref.ly/Ps146:3); [JER 7:4](https://ref.ly/Jer7:4), [JER 9:4](https://ref.ly/Jer9:4), [JER 12:6](https://ref.ly/Jer12:6); [MIC 7:5](https://ref.ly/Mic7:5); [HAB 2:18](https://ref.ly/Hab2:18)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 50:15-17; Genesis 32:6-8; Judges 11:19-20; Acts 15:37-38; Zephaniah 3:2; Deuteronomy 1:32-33; Deuteronomy 9:23-24; Psalms 78:7; Psalms 78:22; 2 Kings 17:14-15; Jeremiah 13:25; Ezekiel 33:13; Malachi 3:6-10; Matthew 19:22; Mark 10:22; Job 4:18; Job 15:15; John 2:24; Psalms 118:8; Job 39:12; Psalms 5:9; Psalms 44:6; Psalms 146:3; Jeremiah 7:4; Jeremiah 9:4; Jeremiah 12:6; Micah 7:5; Habakkuk 2:18
* **Associated Articles:** 1415: miracles (ID: `1415@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5020: human nature (ID: `5020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7257: promised land, the (ID: `7257@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8020: faith (ID: `8020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8030: trust (ID: `8030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8354: trustworthiness (ID: `8354@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8721: doubt (ID: `8721@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8742: faithlessness (ID: `8742@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8768: idolatry (ID: `8768@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8830: suspicion (ID: `8830@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8834: unbelief (ID: `8834@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8720: double-mindedness (id: 8720)

Indicative of insincerity and hypocrisy. God requires wholeheartedness and sincerity from all people, both in their dealings with others and in their worship of him.

Double\-mindedness is characteristic of sinners
-----------------------------------------------

**[JAS 4:8](https://ref.ly/Jas4:8)** *See also* [PSA 119:113–119:115](https://ref.ly/Ps119:113-Ps119:115)

Double\-mindedness in dealings with other people
------------------------------------------------

[GEN 34:1–34:29](https://ref.ly/Gen34:1-Gen34:29); ; [JOS 9:3–9:15](https://ref.ly/Josh9:3-Josh9:15); ; [1SA 18:17–18:25](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:17-1Sam18:25); ; [2SA 3:22–3:27](https://ref.ly/2Sam3:22-2Sam3:27), [2SA 20:8–20:10](https://ref.ly/2Sam20:8-2Sam20:10); ; [NEH 6:1–6:4](https://ref.ly/Neh6:1-Neh6:4), [NEH 6:10–6:13](https://ref.ly/Neh6:10-Neh6:13); ; [MAT 26:47–26:50](https://ref.ly/Matt26:47-Matt26:50) parallels [MRK 14:43–14:46](https://ref.ly/Mark14:43-Mark14:46), [LUK 22:47–22:48](https://ref.ly/Luke22:47-Luke22:48); ; [ACT 23:12–23:24](https://ref.ly/Acts23:12-Acts23:24)

Double\-mindedness in daily life
--------------------------------

**[MAT 23:25–23:28](https://ref.ly/Matt23:25-Matt23:28)** *See also* [MAT 15:10–15:19](https://ref.ly/Matt15:10-Matt15:19) parallel [MRK 7:14–7:23](https://ref.ly/Mark7:14-Mark7:23); [LUK 11:39–11:40](https://ref.ly/Luke11:39-Luke11:40)

Double\-mindedness in worship
-----------------------------

### Idolatry

**[1KI 18:21](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:21)** *See also* [2KI 17:27–17:34](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:27-2Kgs17:34), [2KI 17:40–17:41](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:40-2Kgs17:41); [HOS 10:1–10:2](https://ref.ly/Hos10:1-Hos10:2)

### Insincerity

**[MAT 15:1–15:9](https://ref.ly/Matt15:1-Matt15:9)** parallel [MRK 7:1–7:13](https://ref.ly/Mark7:1-Mark7:13) *See also* [ISA 29:13](https://ref.ly/Isa29:13)

Lack of faith in prayer is equated with double\-mindedness
----------------------------------------------------------

**[JAS 1:5–1:8](https://ref.ly/Jas1:5-Jas1:8)**

God requires wholeheartedness and sincerity
-------------------------------------------

### Towards himself

**[1CH 28:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:9)** *See also* [NUM 14:20–14:24](https://ref.ly/Num14:20-Num14:24); [JOS 14:14](https://ref.ly/Josh14:14); [2CH 31:21](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:21); [ROM 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rom12:9); [1CO 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:8); [2CO 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:12); [1TI 3:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:8); [JAS 3:13–3:17](https://ref.ly/Jas3:13-Jas3:17)

### Towards other people

**[COL 3:22](https://ref.ly/Col3:22)** *See also* [2CH 19:8–19:11](https://ref.ly/2Chr19:8-2Chr19:11); [EPH 6:5–6:9](https://ref.ly/Eph6:5-Eph6:9)

* **Associated Passages:** James 4:8; Psalms 119:113-115; Genesis 34:1-29; Joshua 9:3-15; 1 Samuel 18:17-25; 2 Samuel 3:22-27; 2 Samuel 20:8-10; Nehemiah 6:1-4; Nehemiah 6:10-13; Matthew 26:47-50; Mark 14:43-46; Luke 22:47-48; Acts 23:12-24; Matthew 23:25-28; Matthew 15:10-19; Mark 7:14-23; Luke 11:39-40; 1 Kings 18:21; 2 Kings 17:27-34; 2 Kings 17:40-41; Hosea 10:1-2; Matthew 15:1-9; Mark 7:1-13; Isaiah 29:13; James 1:5-8; 1 Chronicles 28:9; Numbers 14:20-24; Joshua 14:14; 2 Chronicles 31:21; Romans 12:9; 1 Corinthians 5:8; 2 Corinthians 1:12; 1 Timothy 3:8; James 3:13-17; Colossians 3:22; 2 Chronicles 19:8-11; Ephesians 6:5-9
* **Associated Articles:** 5884: indecision (ID: `5884@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5891: instability (ID: `5891@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5920: pretence (ID: `5920@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8207: commitment (ID: `8207@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8615: prayer, doubts about (ID: `8615@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8622: worship (ID: `8622@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8721: doubt (ID: `8721@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8767: hypocrisy (ID: `8767@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8721: doubt (id: 8721)

Uncertainty about the truth and reality of spiritual things, as seen especially in a lack of faith in and commitment to God.

* **Associated Articles:** 8722: doubt, nature of (ID: `8722@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8723: doubt, results of (ID: `8723@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8724: doubt, dealing with (ID: `8724@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8722: doubt, nature of (id: 8722)

Doubt leads to insecurity and lack of trust concerning God's willingness and ability to deliver his people. It also leads to a fear of people and situations.

Doubting God's truth
--------------------

### Doubt as a questioning of God's words

**[GEN 3:1](https://ref.ly/Gen3:1)** *See also* [GEN 3:4](https://ref.ly/Gen3:4); [ISA 5:19](https://ref.ly/Isa5:19); [JER 17:15](https://ref.ly/Jer17:15); [2PE 3:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:4)

### Doubt as lack of faith

**[MAT 21:21–21:22](https://ref.ly/Matt21:21-Matt21:22)** parallel [MRK 11:23–11:24](https://ref.ly/Mark11:23-Mark11:24) *See also* [MAT 17:20](https://ref.ly/Matt17:20); [MRK 6:6](https://ref.ly/Mark6:6), [MRK 16:14](https://ref.ly/Mark16:14); [LUK 17:6](https://ref.ly/Luke17:6)

### Doubt as wavering

**[JAS 1:6](https://ref.ly/Jas1:6)** *See also* [1KI 18:21](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:21); [ROM 4:20](https://ref.ly/Rom4:20); [EPH 4:13–4:14](https://ref.ly/Eph4:13-Eph4:14)

### Doubt as double\-mindedness

**[JAS 1:8](https://ref.ly/Jas1:8)** *See also* [2KI 17:40–17:41](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:40-2Kgs17:41); [LUK 16:13](https://ref.ly/Luke16:13); [1CO 10:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:21); [JAS 4:8](https://ref.ly/Jas4:8)

Doubt as insecurity about relationship with God
-----------------------------------------------

### Doubting God's compassion

**[PSA 77:7–77:9](https://ref.ly/Ps77:7-Ps77:9)** *See also* [PSA 90:13](https://ref.ly/Ps90:13); [HEB 12:5–12:6](https://ref.ly/Heb12:5-Heb12:6)

### Doubting God's concern

**[JOB 30:20](https://ref.ly/Job30:20)**; **[ISA 49:14](https://ref.ly/Isa49:14)** *See also* [PSA 13:1–13:2](https://ref.ly/Ps13:1-Ps13:2), [PSA 22:1–22:2](https://ref.ly/Ps22:1-Ps22:2), [PSA 35:17](https://ref.ly/Ps35:17); [ISA 40:27](https://ref.ly/Isa40:27); [JER 8:18–8:22](https://ref.ly/Jer8:18-Jer8:22); [LAM 3:8](https://ref.ly/Lam3:8); [HAB 1:2](https://ref.ly/Hab1:2)

### Doubting God's desire to deliver

**[JER 45:3](https://ref.ly/Jer45:3)** *See also* [EXO 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Exod5:22-Exod5:23); [LAM 2:1–2:9](https://ref.ly/Lam2:1-Lam2:9), [LAM 3:13–3:20](https://ref.ly/Lam3:13-Lam3:20)

### Doubting God's ability to deliver

**[PSA 78:18–78:22](https://ref.ly/Ps78:18-Ps78:22)** *See also* [EXO 14:10–14:12](https://ref.ly/Exod14:10-Exod14:12); [PSA 78:41–78:43](https://ref.ly/Ps78:41-Ps78:43); [MAT 8:26](https://ref.ly/Matt8:26) parallels [MRK 4:39–4:40](https://ref.ly/Mark4:39-Mark4:40), [LUK 8:24–8:25](https://ref.ly/Luke8:24-Luke8:25)

### Doubting God's justice

**[JER 12:1](https://ref.ly/Jer12:1)** *See also* [JOB 9:23](https://ref.ly/Job9:23); [PSA 73:13–73:16](https://ref.ly/Ps73:13-Ps73:16), [PSA 82:2](https://ref.ly/Ps82:2); [JER 15:16–15:18](https://ref.ly/Jer15:16-Jer15:18); [HAB 1:13](https://ref.ly/Hab1:13)

--------------------------------------

## 8723: doubt, results of (id: 8723)

Doubt results in uncertainty and ineffectiveness in the spiritual life of individual believers and of the believing community. God appeals to those who waver to make a clear choice.

Doubt results in spiritual uncertainty
--------------------------------------

### Uncertainty about commitment

**[LUK 9:57–9:62](https://ref.ly/Luke9:57-Luke9:62)** parallel [MAT 8:19–8:22](https://ref.ly/Matt8:19-Matt8:22) *See also* [GEN 19:17](https://ref.ly/Gen19:17), [GEN 19:26](https://ref.ly/Gen19:26); [EXO 16:2–16:3](https://ref.ly/Exod16:2-Exod16:3); [MAT 6:24](https://ref.ly/Matt6:24) parallel [LUK 16:13](https://ref.ly/Luke16:13); [HEB 11:15](https://ref.ly/Heb11:15)

### Uncertainty about God's power

**[NUM 13:31](https://ref.ly/Num13:31)** *See also* [DEU 1:29–1:33](https://ref.ly/Deut1:29-Deut1:33)

### Uncertainty about God's love

**[ISA 40:27](https://ref.ly/Isa40:27)** *See also* [DEU 1:27](https://ref.ly/Deut1:27); [JOB 9:16–9:18](https://ref.ly/Job9:16-Job9:18), [JOB 30:21](https://ref.ly/Job30:21)

### Uncertainty about the meaning of life

**[JOB 3:16](https://ref.ly/Job3:16)** *See also* [1KI 19:3–19:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:3-1Kgs19:4); [PSA 42:3–42:4](https://ref.ly/Ps42:3-Ps42:4); [JER 20:14–20:18](https://ref.ly/Jer20:14-Jer20:18); [JON 4:3](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:3)

### Uncertainty about teaching

**[EPH 4:14](https://ref.ly/Eph4:14)** *See also* [1TI 6:20–6:21](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:20-1Tim6:21)

### Uncertainty about the will of God

**[JDG 6:17](https://ref.ly/Judg6:17)** *See also* [JDG 6:36–6:40](https://ref.ly/Judg6:36-Judg6:40); [JHN 20:25](https://ref.ly/John20:25); [2CO 13:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor13:3)

Doubt may result in a spiritual decline
---------------------------------------

### Doubt may result in drifting from faith

**[HEB 2:1](https://ref.ly/Heb2:1)** *See also* [2CH 36:12–36:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr36:12-2Chr36:13); [NEH 9:16–9:17](https://ref.ly/Neh9:16-Neh9:17); [PSA 95:8–95:9](https://ref.ly/Ps95:8-Ps95:9); [LAM 5:20](https://ref.ly/Lam5:20); [HEB 3:12–3:13](https://ref.ly/Heb3:12-Heb3:13), [HEB 6:4–6:6](https://ref.ly/Heb6:4-Heb6:6); [2PE 2:20–2:21](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:20-2Pet2:21)

### Doubt may result in faithless action

**[ISA 31:1](https://ref.ly/Isa31:1)**; **[ROM 14:23](https://ref.ly/Rom14:23)** *See also* [GEN 12:13](https://ref.ly/Gen12:13), [GEN 16:2–16:3](https://ref.ly/Gen16:2-Gen16:3); [EXO 32:1](https://ref.ly/Exod32:1); [NUM 20:11–20:12](https://ref.ly/Num20:11-Num20:12); [ACT 7:40](https://ref.ly/Acts7:40); [ROM 14:14](https://ref.ly/Rom14:14)

### Doubt brings the risk of God's judgment

**[NUM 20:12](https://ref.ly/Num20:12)** *See also* [NUM 11:1](https://ref.ly/Num11:1), [NUM 14:37](https://ref.ly/Num14:37); [HEB 6:7–6:8](https://ref.ly/Heb6:7-Heb6:8)

Doubt leads to ineffectiveness in prayer
----------------------------------------

**[JAS 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/Jas1:6-Jas1:7)** *See also* [MAT 17:20](https://ref.ly/Matt17:20), [MAT 21:21](https://ref.ly/Matt21:21) parallel [MRK 11:23](https://ref.ly/Mark11:23)

Doubt spreads
-------------

**[DEU 1:28](https://ref.ly/Deut1:28)** *See also* [NUM 13:32](https://ref.ly/Num13:32); [2KI 17:14](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:14)

God's appeal for a clear decision
---------------------------------

**[1KI 18:21](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:21)** *See also* [DEU 30:15–30:17](https://ref.ly/Deut30:15-Deut30:17); [JOS 24:15](https://ref.ly/Josh24:15); [JHN 20:27](https://ref.ly/John20:27); [JAS 4:8](https://ref.ly/Jas4:8)

## 8724: doubt, dealing with (id: 8724)

Uncertainty may be remedied by gaining assurance from God's word, remembering God's past goodness, reflecting on his power and appealing to his unfailing love. Believers should help the weak with the patience and encouragement that reflects God's own compassion.

Doubt dealt with by holding on to God's truth
---------------------------------------------

### Gaining assurance from God's word

**[PSA 119:147](https://ref.ly/Ps119:147)**; **[1JN 5:13](https://ref.ly/1John5:13)** *See also* [PSA 119:116](https://ref.ly/Ps119:116); [JHN 20:31](https://ref.ly/John20:31); [ROM 15:4](https://ref.ly/Rom15:4); [2PE 1:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:19)

### Receiving correction and understanding through God's word

**[2TI 3:14–3:17](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:14-2Tim3:17)** *See also* [PSA 119:130](https://ref.ly/Ps119:130); [PRO 6:23](https://ref.ly/Prov6:23); [1CO 10:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:11)

### Avoiding idle speculation

[EPH 4:14](https://ref.ly/Eph4:14); ; [1TI 6:20–6:21](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:20-1Tim6:21); ; [2TI 2:16](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:16), [2TI 2:23](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:23); ; [TIT 3:9](https://ref.ly/Titus3:9)

Doubt dealt with by meditating on God's works
---------------------------------------------

### Remembering God's past deeds

**[PSA 77:10–77:20](https://ref.ly/Ps77:10-Ps77:20)** *See also* [DEU 7:17–7:19](https://ref.ly/Deut7:17-Deut7:19); [1CH 16:8–16:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:8-1Chr16:12) parallel [PSA 105:1–105:6](https://ref.ly/Ps105:1-Ps105:6); [PSA 22:4–22:5](https://ref.ly/Ps22:4-Ps22:5), [PSA 74:12–74:17](https://ref.ly/Ps74:12-Ps74:17), [PSA 143:5](https://ref.ly/Ps143:5); [ISA 46:9](https://ref.ly/Isa46:9); [MAT 16:9–16:10](https://ref.ly/Matt16:9-Matt16:10)

### Commemorating God's deeds

**[EXO 12:14](https://ref.ly/Exod12:14)** *Religious festivals such as Passover provided a permanent reminder of God's past goodness to his people.* *See also* [DEU 16:1](https://ref.ly/Deut16:1); [LUK 22:19](https://ref.ly/Luke22:19); [1CO 11:24–11:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:24-1Cor11:25)

### Reflecting on divine power

[MAT 11:4–11:6](https://ref.ly/Matt11:4-Matt11:6); ; [JHN 10:38](https://ref.ly/John10:38), [JHN 14:11](https://ref.ly/John14:11)

Doubt dealt with by trusting
----------------------------

### Trusting in God's unfailing love

**[PSA 6:2–6:4](https://ref.ly/Ps6:2-Ps6:4)** *See also* [PSA 42:8](https://ref.ly/Ps42:8); [ISA 49:15–49:16](https://ref.ly/Isa49:15-Isa49:16), [ISA 54:10](https://ref.ly/Isa54:10); [JER 31:3–31:4](https://ref.ly/Jer31:3-Jer31:4)

### Trusting in God's presence

**[GEN 28:15](https://ref.ly/Gen28:15)** *See also* [EXO 3:12](https://ref.ly/Exod3:12); [DEU 20:1](https://ref.ly/Deut20:1); [2CH 20:15–20:17](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:15-2Chr20:17); [PSA 42:11](https://ref.ly/Ps42:11), [PSA 73:23–73:26](https://ref.ly/Ps73:23-Ps73:26)

### Trusting in God's strength

**[ISA 41:10](https://ref.ly/Isa41:10)** *See also* [1KI 19:6–19:8](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:6-1Kgs19:8); [ISA 40:28–40:31](https://ref.ly/Isa40:28-Isa40:31), [ISA 43:2](https://ref.ly/Isa43:2)

Remembering God's concern for the weak
--------------------------------------

### God's compassion for the weak

**[EZK 34:16](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:16)** *See also* [ISA 42:3](https://ref.ly/Isa42:3)

### God's grace to those with doubts

**[EXO 5:22–6:1](https://ref.ly/Exod5:22-Exod6:1)** *God responds to Moses' uncertainty by promising a demonstration of his power.* *See also* [NUM 11:21–11:23](https://ref.ly/Num11:21-Num11:23); [JDG 6:39–6:40](https://ref.ly/Judg6:39-Judg6:40); [JHN 20:27](https://ref.ly/John20:27)

Pastoral concern for those who doubt
------------------------------------

### Being patient with doubters

**[JUD 1:22](https://ref.ly/Jude1:22)** *See also* [ROM 14:1–14:4](https://ref.ly/Rom14:1-Rom14:4), [ROM 14:15–14:17](https://ref.ly/Rom14:15-Rom14:17), [ROM 15:1](https://ref.ly/Rom15:1)

### Encouraging those with doubts

**[JDG 20:22](https://ref.ly/Judg20:22)**; **[JOB 4:3–4:4](https://ref.ly/Job4:3-Job4:4)** *See also* [2CH 32:6–32:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:6-2Chr32:8); [ISA 35:3–35:4](https://ref.ly/Isa35:3-Isa35:4), [ISA 40:1](https://ref.ly/Isa40:1); [1TH 3:2](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:2); [HEB 10:23–10:25](https://ref.ly/Heb10:23-Heb10:25), [HEB 12:12](https://ref.ly/Heb12:12)

## 8726: doubters (id: 8726)

Scripture provides examples of believers who express temporary doubts\-\-in particular about the willingness and power of God to deliver his people, the nature of his purpose, and their own place within the divine plan.

Examples of those doubting their effectiveness to serve God
-----------------------------------------------------------

### Moses

**[EXO 3:11](https://ref.ly/Exod3:11)** *See also* [EXO 4:1](https://ref.ly/Exod4:1), [EXO 4:10–4:13](https://ref.ly/Exod4:10-Exod4:13), [EXO 6:12](https://ref.ly/Exod6:12), [EXO 6:30](https://ref.ly/Exod6:30); [NUM 11:13–11:15](https://ref.ly/Num11:13-Num11:15)

### Gideon

**[JDG 6:15](https://ref.ly/Judg6:15)** *See also* [JDG 6:17](https://ref.ly/Judg6:17), [JDG 6:36–6:40](https://ref.ly/Judg6:36-Judg6:40)

### Elijah

**[1KI 19:3–19:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:3-1Kgs19:4)** *See also* [1KI 19:10](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:10), [1KI 19:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:14)

### Jeremiah

**[JER 1:6](https://ref.ly/Jer1:6)** *See also* [JER 15:10](https://ref.ly/Jer15:10)

Those temporarily doubting God's promises
-----------------------------------------

**[GEN 15:8](https://ref.ly/Gen15:8)** *See also* [GEN 17:17–17:18](https://ref.ly/Gen17:17-Gen17:18), [GEN 18:12–18:15](https://ref.ly/Gen18:12-Gen18:15); [LUK 1:18](https://ref.ly/Luke1:18)

Those doubting God's power
--------------------------

### Abraham and Isaac doubt God's protection

**[GEN 12:12–12:13](https://ref.ly/Gen12:12-Gen12:13)** *Fearing for his safety, Abraham resorts to deception.* *See also* [GEN 20:2](https://ref.ly/Gen20:2), [GEN 26:7](https://ref.ly/Gen26:7)

### Moses and Israel in the desert

**[EXO 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Exod5:22-Exod5:23)** *See also* [EXO 14:10–14:11](https://ref.ly/Exod14:10-Exod14:11) *The Israelites doubt God's protection at the Red Sea*; [NUM 11:21–11:22](https://ref.ly/Num11:21-Num11:22) *Moses doubts God's provision of food*; [NUM 13:31–13:33](https://ref.ly/Num13:31-Num13:33) *The ten spies doubt God's power to give victory in Canaan*; [NUM 20:7–20:12](https://ref.ly/Num20:7-Num20:12) *Moses strikes the rock twice.*

### Others doubting God's deliverance

[1SA 17:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:11) *The people of Israel are dismayed by the challenge from Goliath*; ; [ISA 7:2](https://ref.ly/Isa7:2) *King Ahaz, afraid of the coalition of Syria and Israel turns to Assyria for help*; ; [MAT 14:29–14:31](https://ref.ly/Matt14:29-Matt14:31) *Peter, walking on water, is afraid and begins to sink*; ; [ACT 12:14–12:15](https://ref.ly/Acts12:14-Acts12:15) *The early church does not believe that God has released Peter from prison.*

Believers questioning God
-------------------------

### Questioning God's actions

**[JDG 6:13](https://ref.ly/Judg6:13)** *See also* [NUM 11:10–11:12](https://ref.ly/Num11:10-Num11:12), [NUM 14:3](https://ref.ly/Num14:3); [JOS 7:7–7:8](https://ref.ly/Josh7:7-Josh7:8)

### Questioning God's commands

[1SA 16:2](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:2) *Samuel*; ; [2KI 4:42–4:43](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:42-2Kgs4:43) *Elisha's servant*; ; [ISA 7:12](https://ref.ly/Isa7:12) *Ahaz*; [MRK 6:37](https://ref.ly/Mark6:37) parallels [MAT 14:16–14:17](https://ref.ly/Matt14:16-Matt14:17), [LUK 9:13](https://ref.ly/Luke9:13); [JHN 11:39](https://ref.ly/John11:39) *Martha*; ; [ACT 9:13–9:14](https://ref.ly/Acts9:13-Acts9:14) *Ananias*

Believers with doubts about Jesus Christ
----------------------------------------

**[MAT 11:2–11:3](https://ref.ly/Matt11:2-Matt11:3)** parallel [LUK 7:18–7:19](https://ref.ly/Luke7:18-Luke7:19)**[JHN 20:25](https://ref.ly/John20:25)** *See also* [MAT 28:17](https://ref.ly/Matt28:17); [MRK 16:11–16:14](https://ref.ly/Mark16:11-Mark16:14); [LUK 24:25](https://ref.ly/Luke24:25)

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 3:11; Exodus 4:1; Exodus 4:10-13; Exodus 6:12; Exodus 6:30; Numbers 11:13-15; Judges 6:15; Judges 6:17; Judges 6:36-40; 1 Kings 19:3-4; 1 Kings 19:10; 1 Kings 19:14; Jeremiah 1:6; Jeremiah 15:10; Genesis 15:8; Genesis 17:17-18; Genesis 18:12-15; Luke 1:18; Genesis 12:12-13; Genesis 20:2; Genesis 26:7; Exodus 5:22-23; Exodus 14:10-11; Numbers 11:21-22; Numbers 13:31-33; Numbers 20:7-12; 1 Samuel 17:11; Isaiah 7:2; Matthew 14:29-31; Acts 12:14-15; Judges 6:13; Numbers 11:10-12; Numbers 14:3; Joshua 7:7-8; 1 Samuel 16:2; 2 Kings 4:42-43; Isaiah 7:12; Mark 6:37; Matthew 14:16-17; Luke 9:13; John 11:39; Acts 9:13-14; Matthew 11:2-3; Luke 7:18-19; John 20:25; Matthew 28:17; Mark 16:11-14; Luke 24:25

## 8727: enemies (id: 8727)

Opponents or hostile forces which pose a threat to people or nations. Scripture identifies Satan as being the particular enemy of God and notes many enemies of the people of God. Scripture urges caution and courage in dealing with such enemies. Jesus Christ had enemies, and he provides an example of Christian conduct in the face of enemies' threats.

* **Associated Articles:** 8728: enemies, of Israel and Judah (ID: `8728@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8729: enemies, of Jesus Christ (ID: `8729@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8730: enemies, of believers (ID: `8730@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8731: enemy, Satan as the enemy of God (ID: `8731@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8728: enemies, of Israel and Judah (id: 8728)

Throughout their history, Israel and Judah contended with enemies committed to their destruction, finding refuge only in their covenant\-keeping God.

Enemies of Israel
-----------------

### The Egyptians

[EXO 1:8–1:11](https://ref.ly/Exod1:8-Exod1:11), [EXO 14:9](https://ref.ly/Exod14:9); ; [1KI 14:25](https://ref.ly/1Kgs14:25) parallel [2CH 12:2](https://ref.ly/2Chr12:2); ; [2CH 36:3](https://ref.ly/2Chr36:3)

### The Amalekites

[EXO 17:8](https://ref.ly/Exod17:8); ; [JDG 3:13](https://ref.ly/Judg3:13)

### The Edomites

[NUM 20:18](https://ref.ly/Num20:18); ; [1KI 11:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:14)

### Sihon, king of the Amorites

[NUM 21:23](https://ref.ly/Num21:23)

### Og, king of Bashan

[NUM 21:33](https://ref.ly/Num21:33)

### The Canaanites and the surrounding nations

[JOS 11:1–11:5](https://ref.ly/Josh11:1-Josh11:5)

### The Syrians (Arameans)

[JDG 3:8](https://ref.ly/Judg3:8); ; [1KI 11:25](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:25), [1KI 20:1](https://ref.ly/1Kgs20:1); ; [2KI 6:8](https://ref.ly/2Kgs6:8), [2KI 6:24](https://ref.ly/2Kgs6:24), [2KI 24:2](https://ref.ly/2Kgs24:2); ; [2CH 28:5](https://ref.ly/2Chr28:5)

### The Moabites

[JDG 3:12](https://ref.ly/Judg3:12); ; [2KI 1:1](https://ref.ly/2Kgs1:1), [2KI 24:2](https://ref.ly/2Kgs24:2)

### The Ammonites

[JDG 3:13](https://ref.ly/Judg3:13), [JDG 10:9](https://ref.ly/Judg10:9); ; [2SA 10:6](https://ref.ly/2Sam10:6) parallel [1CH 19:6](https://ref.ly/1Chr19:6); ; [2KI 24:2](https://ref.ly/2Kgs24:2)

### The Midianites

[JDG 6:1](https://ref.ly/Judg6:1)

### The Philistines

[JDG 10:7–10:8](https://ref.ly/Judg10:7-Judg10:8); ; [1SA 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/1Sam4:1-1Sam4:2), [1SA 17:1–17:2](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:1-1Sam17:2), [1SA 31:1](https://ref.ly/1Sam31:1); ; [2SA 5:17](https://ref.ly/2Sam5:17), [2SA 8:1](https://ref.ly/2Sam8:1), [2SA 21:15](https://ref.ly/2Sam21:15), [2SA 21:18](https://ref.ly/2Sam21:18) parallel [1CH 20:4](https://ref.ly/1Chr20:4)

### The Assyrians

[2KI 15:19](https://ref.ly/2Kgs15:19), [2KI 15:29](https://ref.ly/2Kgs15:29), [2KI 17:3–17:6](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:3-2Kgs17:6), [2KI 18:13](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:13)

### The Babylonians

[2KI 24:1](https://ref.ly/2Kgs24:1), [2KI 25:1](https://ref.ly/2Kgs25:1); ; [2CH 36:5–36:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr36:5-2Chr36:7), [2CH 36:15–36:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr36:15-2Chr36:20)

### Those opposed to the rebuilding under Ezra and Nehemiah

[EZR 4:4–4:6](https://ref.ly/Ezra4:4-Ezra4:6), [EZR 5:3](https://ref.ly/Ezra5:3); ; [NEH 2:10](https://ref.ly/Neh2:10)

### Haman the Persian

[EST 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Esth3:5-Esth3:6)

### The Greeks

[ZEC 9:13](https://ref.ly/Zech9:13)

### The Romans

[JHN 11:48](https://ref.ly/John11:48)

Characteristics of Israel's enemies
-----------------------------------

### They were often more numerous than Israel

**[1SA 13:5](https://ref.ly/1Sam13:5)** *See also* [NAM 1:12](https://ref.ly/Nah1:12)

### They were often better equipped

**[JOS 17:16](https://ref.ly/Josh17:16)** *See also* [1SA 13:19–13:22](https://ref.ly/1Sam13:19-1Sam13:22)

### They were cruel and oppressive

**[JER 6:23](https://ref.ly/Jer6:23)** *See also* [EXO 6:5–6:9](https://ref.ly/Exod6:5-Exod6:9); [DEU 28:33](https://ref.ly/Deut28:33); [JDG 6:2–6:6](https://ref.ly/Judg6:2-Judg6:6); [JER 50:42](https://ref.ly/Jer50:42); [HAB 1:6](https://ref.ly/Hab1:6)

### They were cunning

**[PSA 83:3](https://ref.ly/Ps83:3)**

### They were determined to destroy Israel

**[PSA 83:4](https://ref.ly/Ps83:4)**

### They were often in league with each other

*See also* [PSA 83:5–83:8](https://ref.ly/Ps83:5-Ps83:8)

God helped Israel against her enemies
-------------------------------------

### He opposed Israel's enemies

**[GEN 12:3](https://ref.ly/Gen12:3)** *See also* [EXO 23:22](https://ref.ly/Exod23:22)

### He protected Israel

[DEU 23:14](https://ref.ly/Deut23:14); ; [NEH 4:15](https://ref.ly/Neh4:15), [NEH 6:16](https://ref.ly/Neh6:16); ; [PSA 125:2](https://ref.ly/Ps125:2); ; [ISA 51:22](https://ref.ly/Isa51:22), [ISA 59:19](https://ref.ly/Isa59:19)

### He delivered Israel

[NUM 10:9](https://ref.ly/Num10:9); ; [1SA 12:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:11); ; [2KI 17:39](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:39); ; [LUK 1:71](https://ref.ly/Luke1:71)

### He gave Israel victory

**[EXO 23:27](https://ref.ly/Exod23:27)** *See also* [LEV 26:7–26:8](https://ref.ly/Lev26:7-Lev26:8); [NUM 10:35](https://ref.ly/Num10:35); [DEU 6:19](https://ref.ly/Deut6:19), [DEU 33:27](https://ref.ly/Deut33:27); [PSA 60:12](https://ref.ly/Ps60:12) parallel [PSA 108:13](https://ref.ly/Ps108:13); [PSA 68:1](https://ref.ly/Ps68:1); [ISA 54:15](https://ref.ly/Isa54:15)

### He destroyed Israel's enemies

**[EXO 15:6](https://ref.ly/Exod15:6)** *See also* [DEU 20:17](https://ref.ly/Deut20:17), [DEU 30:7](https://ref.ly/Deut30:7); [JOS 10:19](https://ref.ly/Josh10:19); [2CH 20:29](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:29); [PSA 44:5](https://ref.ly/Ps44:5)

### He gave Israel rest

**[DEU 12:10](https://ref.ly/Deut12:10)** *See also* [DEU 25:19](https://ref.ly/Deut25:19); [1KI 5:3–5:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs5:3-1Kgs5:4); [1CH 22:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr22:9)

Israel's attitude towards her enemies
-------------------------------------

### Israel was not to fear them

**[DEU 20:1–20:4](https://ref.ly/Deut20:1-Deut20:4)** *See also* [1SA 17:45–17:47](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:45-1Sam17:47)

### Israel was to pray for deliverance

[1KI 8:33–8:34](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:33-1Kgs8:34) parallel [2CH 6:24–6:25](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:24-2Chr6:25); ; [1KI 8:37–8:40](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:37-1Kgs8:40) parallel [2CH 6:28–6:31](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:28-2Chr6:31); ; [EZR 8:22–8:23](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:22-Ezra8:23); ; [PSA 74:3](https://ref.ly/Ps74:3), [PSA 74:10](https://ref.ly/Ps74:10), [PSA 74:18](https://ref.ly/Ps74:18), [PSA 74:22–74:23](https://ref.ly/Ps74:22-Ps74:23)

### Kindness was to be shown to Israel's enemies

[EXO 23:4–23:5](https://ref.ly/Exod23:4-Exod23:5); ; [2KI 6:21–6:23](https://ref.ly/2Kgs6:21-2Kgs6:23); ; [PRO 25:21–25:22](https://ref.ly/Prov25:21-Prov25:22); ; [ROM 12:20](https://ref.ly/Rom12:20)

Thanksgiving for victory over Israel's enemies
----------------------------------------------

### Giving thanks to God was the proper response to victory

**[EXO 15:1](https://ref.ly/Exod15:1)** *See also* [2SA 8:11–8:12](https://ref.ly/2Sam8:11-2Sam8:12) parallel [1CH 18:11](https://ref.ly/1Chr18:11); [PSA 136:24](https://ref.ly/Ps136:24)

### Israel often forgot to give thanks to God

[JDG 8:33–8:34](https://ref.ly/Judg8:33-Judg8:34)

God used enemies to chastise Israel
-----------------------------------

**[DEU 28:47–28:48](https://ref.ly/Deut28:47-Deut28:48)** *See also* [LEV 26:44](https://ref.ly/Lev26:44) *Because of his covenant, the LORD was unwilling to destroy Israel completely at the hand of her enemies*; [DEU 28:53](https://ref.ly/Deut28:53); [JDG 2:10–2:23](https://ref.ly/Judg2:10-Judg2:23), [JDG 6:1](https://ref.ly/Judg6:1); [ISA 8:5–8:8](https://ref.ly/Isa8:5-Isa8:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 1:8-11; Exodus 14:9; 1 Kings 14:25; 2 Chronicles 12:2; 2 Chronicles 36:3; Exodus 17:8; Judges 3:13; Numbers 20:18; 1 Kings 11:14; Numbers 21:23; Numbers 21:33; Joshua 11:1-5; Judges 3:8; 1 Kings 11:25; 1 Kings 20:1; 2 Kings 6:8; 2 Kings 6:24; 2 Kings 24:2; 2 Chronicles 28:5; Judges 3:12; 2 Kings 1:1; Judges 10:9; 2 Samuel 10:6; 1 Chronicles 19:6; Judges 6:1; Judges 10:7-8; 1 Samuel 4:1-2; 1 Samuel 17:1-2; 1 Samuel 31:1; 2 Samuel 5:17; 2 Samuel 8:1; 2 Samuel 21:15; 2 Samuel 21:18; 1 Chronicles 20:4; 2 Kings 15:19; 2 Kings 15:29; 2 Kings 17:3-6; 2 Kings 18:13; 2 Kings 24:1; 2 Kings 25:1; 2 Chronicles 36:5-7; 2 Chronicles 36:15-20; Ezra 4:4-6; Ezra 5:3; Nehemiah 2:10; Esther 3:5-6; Zechariah 9:13; John 11:48; 1 Samuel 13:5; Nahum 1:12; Joshua 17:16; 1 Samuel 13:19-22; Jeremiah 6:23; Exodus 6:5-9; Deuteronomy 28:33; Judges 6:2-6; Jeremiah 50:42; Habakkuk 1:6; Psalms 83:3; Psalms 83:4; Psalms 83:5-8; Genesis 12:3; Exodus 23:22; Deuteronomy 23:14; Nehemiah 4:15; Nehemiah 6:16; Psalms 125:2; Isaiah 51:22; Isaiah 59:19; Numbers 10:9; 1 Samuel 12:11; 2 Kings 17:39; Luke 1:71; Exodus 23:27; Leviticus 26:7-8; Numbers 10:35; Deuteronomy 6:19; Deuteronomy 33:27; Psalms 60:12; Psalms 108:13; Psalms 68:1; Isaiah 54:15; Exodus 15:6; Deuteronomy 20:17; Deuteronomy 30:7; Joshua 10:19; 2 Chronicles 20:29; Psalms 44:5; Deuteronomy 12:10; Deuteronomy 25:19; 1 Kings 5:3-4; 1 Chronicles 22:9; Deuteronomy 20:1-4; 1 Samuel 17:45-47; 1 Kings 8:33-34; 2 Chronicles 6:24-25; 1 Kings 8:37-40; 2 Chronicles 6:28-31; Ezra 8:22-23; Psalms 74:3; Psalms 74:10; Psalms 74:18; Psalms 74:22-23; Exodus 23:4-5; 2 Kings 6:21-23; Proverbs 25:21-22; Romans 12:20; Exodus 15:1; 2 Samuel 8:11-12; 1 Chronicles 18:11; Psalms 136:24; Judges 8:33-34; Deuteronomy 28:47-48; Leviticus 26:44; Deuteronomy 28:53; Judges 2:10-23; Isaiah 8:5-8

## 8729: enemies, of Jesus Christ (id: 8729)

Throughout his life Jesus Christ was opposed by both spiritual and human enemies. He overcame every enemy so that his people might be set free by his victory.

The enemies of the infant Jesus
-------------------------------

**[MAT 2:13–2:20](https://ref.ly/Matt2:13-Matt2:20)** *See also* [MAT 2:14–2:20](https://ref.ly/Matt2:14-Matt2:20); [REV 12:1–12:5](https://ref.ly/Rev12:1-Rev12:5)

Satan as the enemy of Jesus Christ
----------------------------------

### In the temptation in the wilderness

**[MRK 1:12–1:13](https://ref.ly/Mark1:12-Mark1:13)** parallels [MAT 4:1–4:11](https://ref.ly/Matt4:1-Matt4:11), [LUK 4:1–4:13](https://ref.ly/Luke4:1-Luke4:13) *See also* [GEN 3:15](https://ref.ly/Gen3:15)

### Operating through Jesus Christ's friends

**[MAT 16:22–16:23](https://ref.ly/Matt16:22-Matt16:23)** *See also* [LUK 22:3](https://ref.ly/Luke22:3); [JHN 13:21–13:27](https://ref.ly/John13:21-John13:27)

The Jewish leaders as enemies of Jesus Christ
---------------------------------------------

### They plotted to kill Jesus Christ

**[MAT 12:14](https://ref.ly/Matt12:14)** parallels [MRK 3:6](https://ref.ly/Mark3:6), [LUK 6:11](https://ref.ly/Luke6:11) *See also* [PSA 2:2](https://ref.ly/Ps2:2); [ISA 53:3](https://ref.ly/Isa53:3); [MAT 27:1](https://ref.ly/Matt27:1); [JHN 5:18](https://ref.ly/John5:18), [JHN 7:1](https://ref.ly/John7:1), [JHN 7:19](https://ref.ly/John7:19), [JHN 11:53](https://ref.ly/John11:53); [1PE 2:21–2:24](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:21-1Pet2:24)

### They had no real reason for hating him

**[JHN 15:25](https://ref.ly/John15:25)** *See also* [PSA 35:19](https://ref.ly/Ps35:19), [PSA 69:4](https://ref.ly/Ps69:4)

Judas as the enemy of Jesus Christ
----------------------------------

**[MAT 26:14–26:16](https://ref.ly/Matt26:14-Matt26:16)** *See also* [MAT 10:4](https://ref.ly/Matt10:4), [MAT 10:36](https://ref.ly/Matt10:36); [MIC 7:6](https://ref.ly/Mic7:6); [MAT 26:21–26:25](https://ref.ly/Matt26:21-Matt26:25), [MAT 26:47–26:50](https://ref.ly/Matt26:47-Matt26:50); [JHN 13:25–13:27](https://ref.ly/John13:25-John13:27)

The enemies of Jesus Christ succeeded in killing him in accordance with God's will
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Jesus Christ was crucified

**[ACT 2:23](https://ref.ly/Acts2:23)** *See also* [MAT 27:22](https://ref.ly/Matt27:22); [MRK 15:1](https://ref.ly/Mark15:1); [JHN 18:28–18:32](https://ref.ly/John18:28-John18:32); [ACT 3:13](https://ref.ly/Acts3:13)

### Jesus Christ did not retaliate but prayed for his enemies

[LUK 23:34](https://ref.ly/Luke23:34)

Jesus Christ can change an enemy into a friend
----------------------------------------------

**[GAL 1:23](https://ref.ly/Gal1:23)** *See also* [ACT 9:1–9:6](https://ref.ly/Acts9:1-Acts9:6), [ACT 22:4–22:5](https://ref.ly/Acts22:4-Acts22:5), [ACT 26:9–26:11](https://ref.ly/Acts26:9-Acts26:11); [ROM 5:10](https://ref.ly/Rom5:10); [PHP 3:18](https://ref.ly/Phil3:18); [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24)

Jesus Christ will ultimately conquer all his enemies
----------------------------------------------------

**[1CO 15:25–15:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:25-1Cor15:26)** *See also* [PSA 2:9](https://ref.ly/Ps2:9); [MAL 3:2](https://ref.ly/Mal3:2); [MAT 22:44](https://ref.ly/Matt22:44); [PSA 110:1](https://ref.ly/Ps110:1); [ACT 2:34](https://ref.ly/Acts2:34); [PHP 2:9–2:11](https://ref.ly/Phil2:9-Phil2:11); [2TH 1:6–1:10](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:6-2Thess1:10), [2TH 2:3–2:8](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:3-2Thess2:8); [HEB 1:13](https://ref.ly/Heb1:13), [HEB 10:13](https://ref.ly/Heb10:13)

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 2:13-20; Matthew 2:14-20; Revelation 12:1-5; Mark 1:12-13; Matthew 4:1-11; Luke 4:1-13; Genesis 3:15; Matthew 16:22-23; Luke 22:3; John 13:21-27; Matthew 12:14; Mark 3:6; Luke 6:11; Psalms 2:2; Isaiah 53:3; Matthew 27:1; John 5:18; John 7:1; John 7:19; John 11:53; 1 Peter 2:21-24; John 15:25; Psalms 35:19; Psalms 69:4; Matthew 26:14-16; Matthew 10:4; Matthew 10:36; Micah 7:6; Matthew 26:21-25; Matthew 26:47-50; John 13:25-27; Acts 2:23; Matthew 27:22; Mark 15:1; John 18:28-32; Acts 3:13; Luke 23:34; Galatians 1:23; Acts 9:1-6; Acts 22:4-5; Acts 26:9-11; Romans 5:10; Philippians 3:18; Colossians 1:24; 1 Corinthians 15:25-26; Psalms 2:9; Malachi 3:2; Matthew 22:44; Psalms 110:1; Acts 2:34; Philippians 2:9-11; 2 Thessalonians 1:6-10; 2 Thessalonians 2:3-8; Hebrews 1:13; Hebrews 10:13

## 8730: enemies, of believers (id: 8730)

Christians must expect to face many enemies on account of their faith. Jesus Christ made it clear that such opposition was the inevitable result of commitment to him. Nevertheless, Christians are called upon to love their enemies.

Christians are enemies of the world because they belong to Jesus Christ
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

**[JHN 15:18–15:19](https://ref.ly/John15:18-John15:19)** *See also* [PSA 86:14](https://ref.ly/Ps86:14); [JHN 17:14](https://ref.ly/John17:14); [2TI 3:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:12); [1PE 4:15–4:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:15-1Pet4:16); [1JN 3:13](https://ref.ly/1John3:13)

Opposition to Christians is opposition to Jesus Christ
------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 25:34–25:40](https://ref.ly/Matt25:34-Matt25:40)** *See also* [MRK 9:42](https://ref.ly/Mark9:42); [LUK 17:1](https://ref.ly/Luke17:1); [ACT 9:4–9:5](https://ref.ly/Acts9:4-Acts9:5)

Particular enemies of Christians
--------------------------------

### All kinds of people

**[MRK 13:13](https://ref.ly/Mark13:13)** parallel [MAT 10:22](https://ref.ly/Matt10:22) *See also* [JHN 15:21](https://ref.ly/John15:21)

### Family members

**[MAT 10:34–10:36](https://ref.ly/Matt10:34-Matt10:36)** parallel [LUK 12:51–12:53](https://ref.ly/Luke12:51-Luke12:53) *See also* [GEN 37:1–37:11](https://ref.ly/Gen37:1-Gen37:11); [MIC 7:6](https://ref.ly/Mic7:6); [MAT 10:21](https://ref.ly/Matt10:21) parallel [MRK 13:12](https://ref.ly/Mark13:12)

### Religious zealots

[ACT 4:18](https://ref.ly/Acts4:18), [ACT 5:28](https://ref.ly/Acts5:28), [ACT 8:3](https://ref.ly/Acts8:3), [ACT 9:1–9:2](https://ref.ly/Acts9:1-Acts9:2); ; [2PE 2:1](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:1); ; [3JN 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/3John1:9-3John1:10)

Christians may be killed by their enemies
-----------------------------------------

**[JHN 16:2](https://ref.ly/John16:2)** *See also* [ACT 7:56–7:60](https://ref.ly/Acts7:56-Acts7:60), [ACT 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Acts12:1-Acts12:2), [ACT 26:9–26:10](https://ref.ly/Acts26:9-Acts26:10); [REV 6:9](https://ref.ly/Rev6:9)

Christian attitudes towards enemies
-----------------------------------

### To love, do good, bless and pray for them

**[MAT 5:44–5:45](https://ref.ly/Matt5:44-Matt5:45)** *See also* [JOB 31:29–31:30](https://ref.ly/Job31:29-Job31:30); [LUK 6:27–6:29](https://ref.ly/Luke6:27-Luke6:29), [LUK 6:35](https://ref.ly/Luke6:35), [LUK 23:34](https://ref.ly/Luke23:34); [ACT 7:59–7:60](https://ref.ly/Acts7:59-Acts7:60); [ROM 12:14](https://ref.ly/Rom12:14); [1PE 3:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:9)

### To forgive them

[MAT 6:12–6:15](https://ref.ly/Matt6:12-Matt6:15); ; [LUK 11:4](https://ref.ly/Luke11:4), [LUK 23:33–23:34](https://ref.ly/Luke23:33-Luke23:34); ; [ACT 7:59–7:60](https://ref.ly/Acts7:59-Acts7:60)

### To help and show kindness to them

**[ROM 12:20](https://ref.ly/Rom12:20)** *See also* [PRO 25:21–25:22](https://ref.ly/Prov25:21-Prov25:22); [LUK 10:25–10:37](https://ref.ly/Luke10:25-Luke10:37)

### To show kindness to their beasts of burden

**[EXO 23:4–23:5](https://ref.ly/Exod23:4-Exod23:5)**

### Not to rejoice in their misfortunes

**[PRO 24:17–24:18](https://ref.ly/Prov24:17-Prov24:18)**

### To win them with kindness

**[ROM 12:21](https://ref.ly/Rom12:21)** *See also* [1SA 26:21](https://ref.ly/1Sam26:21)

Christians have a spiritual enemy
---------------------------------

### Satan opposes Christians

**[1PE 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:8)** *See also* [JOB 1:7–1:9](https://ref.ly/Job1:7-Job1:9); [LUK 22:31](https://ref.ly/Luke22:31); [2TI 4:17–4:18](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:17-2Tim4:18)

### The need to engage in spiritual warfare

**[1PE 5:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:9)** *See also* [2CO 10:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:4); [EPH 6:10–6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:10-Eph6:18); [1TI 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:14-1Tim5:15); [2TI 4:7](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:7); [JAS 4:7](https://ref.ly/Jas4:7)

God supports his people against their enemies
---------------------------------------------

**[PSA 23:5](https://ref.ly/Ps23:5)**; **[JHN 17:15](https://ref.ly/John17:15)** *See also* [DEU 33:27](https://ref.ly/Deut33:27); [1SA 12:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:11); [2SA 22:1–22:3](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:1-2Sam22:3); [PSA 18:2](https://ref.ly/Ps18:2), [PSA 43:1](https://ref.ly/Ps43:1), [PSA 46:1](https://ref.ly/Ps46:1), [PSA 59:1–59:2](https://ref.ly/Ps59:1-Ps59:2), [PSA 71:1–71:4](https://ref.ly/Ps71:1-Ps71:4), [PSA 91:1–91:4](https://ref.ly/Ps91:1-Ps91:4), [PSA 119:134](https://ref.ly/Ps119:134), [PSA 140:1–140:2](https://ref.ly/Ps140:1-Ps140:2), [PSA 143:9](https://ref.ly/Ps143:9), [PSA 144:11](https://ref.ly/Ps144:11); [MAT 10:28–10:31](https://ref.ly/Matt10:28-Matt10:31); [LUK 1:69](https://ref.ly/Luke1:69), [LUK 1:71](https://ref.ly/Luke1:71), [LUK 22:32](https://ref.ly/Luke22:32); [2TI 4:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:8)

Death as the last enemy to be destroyed by Jesus Christ
-------------------------------------------------------

**[1CO 15:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:26)** *See also* [PSA 116:8](https://ref.ly/Ps116:8); [2TI 1:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:10); [REV 20:14](https://ref.ly/Rev20:14), [REV 21:4](https://ref.ly/Rev21:4)

## 8731: enemy, Satan as the enemy of God (id: 8731)

See [4121: Satan, as the enemy of God](4121.md)



## 8733: envy (id: 8733)

A desire for another's gifts, possessions, position or achievements, closely associated with jealousy.

Causes of envy
--------------

### Envy is the result of human sin

**[GAL 5:19–5:21](https://ref.ly/Gal5:19-Gal5:21)** *See also* [PRO 23:17](https://ref.ly/Prov23:17); [MAT 15:19–15:20](https://ref.ly/Matt15:19-Matt15:20) parallel [MRK 7:21–7:23](https://ref.ly/Mark7:21-Mark7:23); [ROM 1:29](https://ref.ly/Rom1:29); [1CO 3:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:3); [1TI 6:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:4); [TIT 3:3](https://ref.ly/Titus3:3); [1PE 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:1-1Pet2:2)

### Envy arises from the good fortune of others

[GEN 26:12–26:14](https://ref.ly/Gen26:12-Gen26:14); ; [1SA 18:6–18:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:6-1Sam18:8); ; [PSA 73:3](https://ref.ly/Ps73:3); ; [MAT 20:12–20:15](https://ref.ly/Matt20:12-Matt20:15)

### Love does not envy others

**[1CO 13:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:4)**

### Envy arises from the spiritual abilities of others

**[PSA 106:16–106:18](https://ref.ly/Ps106:16-Ps106:18)**; **[ACT 13:44–13:45](https://ref.ly/Acts13:44-Acts13:45)** *See also* [NUM 11:28–11:30](https://ref.ly/Num11:28-Num11:30), [NUM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Num12:2), [NUM 16:1–16:3](https://ref.ly/Num16:1-Num16:3); [MAT 27:18](https://ref.ly/Matt27:18) parallel [MRK 15:10](https://ref.ly/Mark15:10); [ACT 17:5](https://ref.ly/Acts17:5); [PHP 1:15](https://ref.ly/Phil1:15)

Examples of envy
----------------

### Cain envies Abel

**[GEN 4:3–4:5](https://ref.ly/Gen4:3-Gen4:5)**

### Esau envies Jacob

**[GEN 27:41](https://ref.ly/Gen27:41)**

### Rachel envies Leah

**[GEN 30:1](https://ref.ly/Gen30:1)**

### The brothers envy Joseph

**[GEN 37:4](https://ref.ly/Gen37:4)**

Results of envy
---------------

**[JOB 5:2](https://ref.ly/Job5:2)** *See also* [PRO 14:30](https://ref.ly/Prov14:30); [ECC 4:4](https://ref.ly/Eccl4:4); [JAS 3:14–3:16](https://ref.ly/Jas3:14-Jas3:16)

### In some cases, envy can be used by God

**[ROM 10:19](https://ref.ly/Rom10:19), [ROM 11:11](https://ref.ly/Rom11:11), [ROM 11:13–11:14](https://ref.ly/Rom11:13-Rom11:14)** *Paul hopes that the Gentiles' response to the gospel might make Israel want its blessings as well.* *See also* [DEU 32:21](https://ref.ly/Deut32:21)

Envy forbidden
--------------

**[PSA 37:1](https://ref.ly/Ps37:1)** *See also* [PRO 3:31](https://ref.ly/Prov3:31), [PRO 24:1](https://ref.ly/Prov24:1); [GAL 5:26](https://ref.ly/Gal5:26)

* **Associated Passages:** Galatians 5:19-21; Proverbs 23:17; Matthew 15:19-20; Mark 7:21-23; Romans 1:29; 1 Corinthians 3:3; 1 Timothy 6:4; Titus 3:3; 1 Peter 2:1-2; Genesis 26:12-14; 1 Samuel 18:6-8; Psalms 73:3; Matthew 20:12-15; 1 Corinthians 13:4; Psalms 106:16-18; Acts 13:44-45; Numbers 11:28-30; Numbers 12:2; Numbers 16:1-3; Matthew 27:18; Mark 15:10; Acts 17:5; Philippians 1:15; Genesis 4:3-5; Genesis 27:41; Genesis 30:1; Genesis 37:4; Job 5:2; Proverbs 14:30; Ecclesiastes 4:4; James 3:14-16; Romans 10:19; Romans 11:11; Romans 11:13-14; Deuteronomy 32:21; Psalms 37:1; Proverbs 3:31; Proverbs 24:1; Galatians 5:26
* **Associated Articles:** 5848: exaggeration (ID: `5848@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5910: motives, examples of (ID: `5910@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5929: resentment, against people (ID: `5929@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6133: coveting (ID: `6133@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8773: jealousy (ID: `8773@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8734: evil (id: 8734)

The presence of corruption, malevolence and depravity in the world, opposed to God's nature and will. Scripture stresses that evil is a force in its own right, rather than the mere absence of good, and describes its origins and the manner in which God deals with its continuing presence and power in his world.

* **Associated Articles:** 8735: evil, origins of (ID: `8735@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8736: evil, warnings against (ID: `8736@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8737: evil, believers' responses to (ID: `8737@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8738: evil, victory over (ID: `8738@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8739: evil, examples of (ID: `8739@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8735: evil, origins of (id: 8735)

Although Scripture does not reveal the ultimate origin of evil, it identifies a number of intermediate sources.

Satan as a source of evil
-------------------------

**[GEN 3:1](https://ref.ly/Gen3:1)** *Identified later ([Rev 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rev12:9)) with Satan*; **[MAT 4:1](https://ref.ly/Matt4:1)** parallels [MRK 1:13](https://ref.ly/Mark1:13), [LUK 4:2](https://ref.ly/Luke4:2)**[JHN 8:44](https://ref.ly/John8:44)**; **[1JN 3:8](https://ref.ly/1John3:8)**; **[REV 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rev12:9)** *See also* [1CH 21:1](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:1) *Satan incites David to take a census of Israel*; [JOB 1:11](https://ref.ly/Job1:11), [JOB 2:5](https://ref.ly/Job2:5); [MAT 5:37](https://ref.ly/Matt5:37), [MAT 6:13](https://ref.ly/Matt6:13), [MAT 13:38–13:39](https://ref.ly/Matt13:38-Matt13:39) *the parable of the weeds*; [LUK 13:16](https://ref.ly/Luke13:16) *Satan is responsible for a woman's crippling disease*; [JHN 13:2](https://ref.ly/John13:2) *The devil prompts Judas to betray Jesus Christ*; [JHN 17:15](https://ref.ly/John17:15); [ACT 5:3](https://ref.ly/Acts5:3) *Ananias lies to the Holy Spirit at Satan's instigation*; [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4), [2CO 12:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:7) *Paul's thorn in the flesh from Satan*; [EPH 2:2](https://ref.ly/Eph2:2), [EPH 6:11](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11); [1TH 2:18](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:18); [1PE 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:8); [1JN 3:12](https://ref.ly/1John3:12), [1JN 5:19](https://ref.ly/1John5:19); [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10), [REV 20:2](https://ref.ly/Rev20:2)

Other evil powers
-----------------

**[LUK 9:39](https://ref.ly/Luke9:39)** parallel [MRK 9:17–9:18](https://ref.ly/Mark9:17-Mark9:18)**[EPH 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eph6:12)**; **[1TI 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1)** *See also* [JDG 9:23](https://ref.ly/Judg9:23); [1SA 16:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:14), [1SA 18:10–18:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:10-1Sam18:11), [1SA 19:9–19:10](https://ref.ly/1Sam19:9-1Sam19:10); [MAT 12:45](https://ref.ly/Matt12:45) parallel [LUK 11:26](https://ref.ly/Luke11:26); [REV 12:7](https://ref.ly/Rev12:7), [REV 16:13–16:14](https://ref.ly/Rev16:13-Rev16:14)

Fallen human nature as a source of evil
---------------------------------------

**[GEN 6:5](https://ref.ly/Gen6:5)**; **[MAT 15:19](https://ref.ly/Matt15:19)** parallel [MRK 7:21–7:22](https://ref.ly/Mark7:21-Mark7:22)**[JAS 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Jas1:13-Jas1:14)** *See also* [GEN 8:21](https://ref.ly/Gen8:21); [PRO 6:18](https://ref.ly/Prov6:18); [ECC 8:11](https://ref.ly/Eccl8:11), [ECC 9:3](https://ref.ly/Eccl9:3); [ISA 59:7](https://ref.ly/Isa59:7); [JER 4:14](https://ref.ly/Jer4:14), [JER 17:9](https://ref.ly/Jer17:9), [JER 18:12](https://ref.ly/Jer18:12)MAT [23:25](https://ref.ly/Jer23:25) parallel [LUK 11:39](https://ref.ly/Luke11:39); [MAT 23:27–23:28](https://ref.ly/Matt23:27-Matt23:28)[ROM 1:24](https://ref.ly/Rom1:24), [ROM 7:14–7:23](https://ref.ly/Rom7:14-Rom7:23); [1TI 6:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:10) *the love of money a root of evil*; [JAS 3:6](https://ref.ly/Jas3:6) *The tongue is a source of evil*; [JAS 4:1](https://ref.ly/Jas4:1)

Physical evil is a consequence of moral evil
--------------------------------------------

**[GEN 3:17](https://ref.ly/Gen3:17)**; **[ROM 5:12](https://ref.ly/Rom5:12)** *See also* [DEU 28:20–28:24](https://ref.ly/Deut28:20-Deut28:24), [DEU 28:58–28:59](https://ref.ly/Deut28:58-Deut28:59); [PSA 90:8–90:9](https://ref.ly/Ps90:8-Ps90:9); [PRO 14:30](https://ref.ly/Prov14:30); [MAL 4:6](https://ref.ly/Mal4:6); [ROM 6:23](https://ref.ly/Rom6:23), [ROM 8:19–8:21](https://ref.ly/Rom8:19-Rom8:21); [REV 16:1](https://ref.ly/Rev16:1), [REV 16:5–16:6](https://ref.ly/Rev16:5-Rev16:6)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 3:1; Revelation 12:9; Matthew 4:1; Mark 1:13; Luke 4:2; John 8:44; 1 John 3:8; 1 Chronicles 21:1; Job 1:11; Job 2:5; Matthew 5:37; Matthew 6:13; Matthew 13:38-39; Luke 13:16; John 13:2; John 17:15; Acts 5:3; 2 Corinthians 4:4; 2 Corinthians 12:7; Ephesians 2:2; Ephesians 6:11; 1 Thessalonians 2:18; 1 Peter 5:8; 1 John 3:12; 1 John 5:19; Revelation 2:10; Revelation 20:2; Luke 9:39; Mark 9:17-18; Ephesians 6:12; 1 Timothy 4:1; Judges 9:23; 1 Samuel 16:14; 1 Samuel 18:10-11; 1 Samuel 19:9-10; Matthew 12:45; Luke 11:26; Revelation 12:7; Revelation 16:13-14; Genesis 6:5; Matthew 15:19; Mark 7:21-22; James 1:13-14; Genesis 8:21; Proverbs 6:18; Ecclesiastes 8:11; Ecclesiastes 9:3; Isaiah 59:7; Jeremiah 4:14; Jeremiah 17:9; Jeremiah 18:12; Jeremiah 23:25; Luke 11:39; Matthew 23:27-28; Romans 1:24; Romans 7:14-23; 1 Timothy 6:10; James 3:6; James 4:1; Genesis 3:17; Romans 5:12; Deuteronomy 28:20-24; Deuteronomy 28:58-59; Psalms 90:8-9; Proverbs 14:30; Malachi 4:6; Romans 6:23; Romans 8:19-21; Revelation 16:1; Revelation 16:5-6
* **Associated Articles:** 4116: angels, opposed to God (ID: `4116@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4120: Satan (ID: `4120@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4130: demons (ID: `4130@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5033: knowledge of good and evil (ID: `5033@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5560: suffering (ID: `5560@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6020: sin (ID: `6020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6154: fall, the (ID: `6154@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6166: flesh, sinful nature (ID: `6166@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6186: imagination, evil scheming (ID: `6186@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6199: imperfection (ID: `6199@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8736: evil, warnings against (id: 8736)

Scripture repeatedly warns against evil. It exposes it and reveals its consequences.

God opposes evil
----------------

**[PSA 34:16](https://ref.ly/Ps34:16)** *See also* [PRO 6:16–6:19](https://ref.ly/Prov6:16-Prov6:19); [ISA 31:2](https://ref.ly/Isa31:2); [MIC 2:1](https://ref.ly/Mic2:1)

Warnings against specific dangers
---------------------------------

**[LEV 20:23](https://ref.ly/Lev20:23)**; **[2CO 6:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:14)** *See also* [EZK 20:18](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:18); [LUK 12:1](https://ref.ly/Luke12:1), [LUK 12:15](https://ref.ly/Luke12:15); [ACT 13:40](https://ref.ly/Acts13:40); [1CO 10:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:21); [2PE 3:17](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:17)

God's law given to counter evil
-------------------------------

### By exposing evil

**[ROM 7:7](https://ref.ly/Rom7:7)** *See also* [ROM 3:20](https://ref.ly/Rom3:20), [ROM 5:20](https://ref.ly/Rom5:20), [ROM 7:13](https://ref.ly/Rom7:13); [GAL 3:19](https://ref.ly/Gal3:19)

### By leading believers away from evil

**[GAL 3:24](https://ref.ly/Gal3:24)** *See also* [1TI 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:9-1Tim1:11)

The state is ordained to restrain evil
--------------------------------------

**[ROM 13:1–13:4](https://ref.ly/Rom13:1-Rom13:4)** *See also* [DEU 17:7](https://ref.ly/Deut17:7), [DEU 17:12–17:13](https://ref.ly/Deut17:12-Deut17:13), [DEU 21:21](https://ref.ly/Deut21:21); [1TI 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1-1Tim2:2); [1PE 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13-1Pet2:14)

Evil rebounds on evildoers
--------------------------

**[PRO 22:8](https://ref.ly/Prov22:8)**; **[GAL 6:7–6:8](https://ref.ly/Gal6:7-Gal6:8)** *See also* [DEU 19:18–19:19](https://ref.ly/Deut19:18-Deut19:19); [EST 9:25](https://ref.ly/Esth9:25); [PRO 1:29–1:31](https://ref.ly/Prov1:29-Prov1:31), [PRO 14:22](https://ref.ly/Prov14:22), [PRO 17:13](https://ref.ly/Prov17:13); [HOS 8:7](https://ref.ly/Hos8:7)

Evil ends in judgment
---------------------

**[ISA 65:12](https://ref.ly/Isa65:12)**; **[ROM 2:9](https://ref.ly/Rom2:9)** *See also* [PSA 37:9](https://ref.ly/Ps37:9); [PRO 6:12–6:15](https://ref.ly/Prov6:12-Prov6:15), [PRO 12:7](https://ref.ly/Prov12:7); [MAL 4:1](https://ref.ly/Mal4:1); [ROM 2:5](https://ref.ly/Rom2:5), [ROM 6:23](https://ref.ly/Rom6:23)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 34:16; Proverbs 6:16-19; Isaiah 31:2; Micah 2:1; Leviticus 20:23; 2 Corinthians 6:14; Ezekiel 20:18; Luke 12:1; Luke 12:15; Acts 13:40; 1 Corinthians 10:21; 2 Peter 3:17; Romans 7:7; Romans 3:20; Romans 5:20; Romans 7:13; Galatians 3:19; Galatians 3:24; 1 Timothy 1:9-11; Romans 13:1-4; Deuteronomy 17:7; Deuteronomy 17:12-13; Deuteronomy 21:21; 1 Timothy 2:1-2; 1 Peter 2:13-14; Proverbs 22:8; Galatians 6:7-8; Deuteronomy 19:18-19; Esther 9:25; Proverbs 1:29-31; Proverbs 14:22; Proverbs 17:13; Hosea 8:7; Isaiah 65:12; Romans 2:9; Psalms 37:9; Proverbs 6:12-15; Proverbs 12:7; Malachi 4:1; Romans 2:5; Romans 6:23
* **Associated Articles:** 1025: God, anger of (ID: `1025@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1310: God, as judge (ID: `1310@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5215: authority (ID: `5215@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5376: law, purpose of (ID: `5376@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5482: punishment (ID: `5482@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5978: warning (ID: `5978@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6187: immorality (ID: `6187@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6193: impenitence (ID: `6193@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8737: evil, believers' responses to (id: 8737)

Scripture outlines several ways in which believers should respond to evil.

Evil is to be avoided
---------------------

**[PSA 1:1](https://ref.ly/Ps1:1)**; **[PRO 4:14](https://ref.ly/Prov4:14)**; **[1TH 5:22](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:22)** *See also* [JOB 28:28](https://ref.ly/Job28:28); [PSA 119:115](https://ref.ly/Ps119:115); [PRO 4:27](https://ref.ly/Prov4:27), [PRO 14:16](https://ref.ly/Prov14:16); [ISA 52:11](https://ref.ly/Isa52:11); [ACT 2:40](https://ref.ly/Acts2:40) *Peter's appeal to the crowd*; [ROM 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rom12:9), [ROM 13:141](https://ref.ly/Rom13:141)CO [5:6–5:7](https://ref.ly/Rom5:6-Rom5:7); [GAL 5:9](https://ref.ly/Gal5:9)[2CO 6:14–6:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:14-2Cor6:18); [EPH 4:27](https://ref.ly/Eph4:27), [EPH 5:3](https://ref.ly/Eph5:3), [EPH 5:6–5:7](https://ref.ly/Eph5:6-Eph5:7); [2TH 3:6](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:6); [1PE 3:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:11); [PSA 34:14](https://ref.ly/Ps34:14)

Evil is to be hated
-------------------

**[PRO 8:13](https://ref.ly/Prov8:13)** *See also* [PSA 97:10](https://ref.ly/Ps97:10); [AMO 5:15](https://ref.ly/Amos5:15); [JHN 3:20](https://ref.ly/John3:20); [ROM 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rom12:9)

Evil is to be rebuked
---------------------

**[MAT 16:23](https://ref.ly/Matt16:23)** parallel [MRK 8:33](https://ref.ly/Mark8:33)**[2TI 4:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:2)** *See also* [1SA 2:29](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:29), [1SA 13:13](https://ref.ly/1Sam13:13), [1SA 15:22](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:22); [2SA 12:9](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:9) *Nathan rebukes David*; [1KI 18:18](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:18) *Elijah rebukes Ahab*; [2CH 16:9](https://ref.ly/2Chr16:9), [2CH 24:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr24:20), [2CH 26:18](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:18); [EZR 10:10](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:10); [PSA 141:5](https://ref.ly/Ps141:5); [DAN 4:27](https://ref.ly/Dan4:27), [DAN 5:22](https://ref.ly/Dan5:22); [MAT 14:4](https://ref.ly/Matt14:4) parallel [MRK 6:18](https://ref.ly/Mark6:18) *John the Baptist rebukes Herod*; [LUK 23:40](https://ref.ly/Luke23:40); [ACT 5:3–5:4](https://ref.ly/Acts5:3-Acts5:4) *Peter rebukes Ananias*; [ACT 5:9](https://ref.ly/Acts5:9) *Peter rebukes Sapphira*; [1TI 1:3](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:3), [1TI 5:20](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:20); [TIT 1:13](https://ref.ly/Titus1:13), [TIT 2:15](https://ref.ly/Titus2:15)

Evil is to be resisted
----------------------

**[PRO 1:10](https://ref.ly/Prov1:10)**; **[GAL 2:11](https://ref.ly/Gal2:11)**; **[EPH 6:11](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11)**; **[JAS 4:7](https://ref.ly/Jas4:7)** *See also* [1CO 5:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:13); [EPH 5:11](https://ref.ly/Eph5:11); [HEB 12:1](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1); [1PE 2:1](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:1), [1PE 5:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:9)

Evil is to be repaid with good
------------------------------

**[LUK 6:35](https://ref.ly/Luke6:35)**; **[ROM 12:20–12:21](https://ref.ly/Rom12:20-Rom12:21)** *See also* [PRO 25:21–25:22](https://ref.ly/Prov25:21-Prov25:22); [EXO 23:5](https://ref.ly/Exod23:5); [LEV 19:18](https://ref.ly/Lev19:18); [MAT 5:44](https://ref.ly/Matt5:44) parallel [LUK 6:27](https://ref.ly/Luke6:27); [1TH 5:15](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:15); [1PE 3:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:9)

Believers should pray in response to evil
-----------------------------------------

**[MAT 6:13](https://ref.ly/Matt6:13)** parallel [LUK 11:4](https://ref.ly/Luke11:4)**[ACT 4:29](https://ref.ly/Acts4:29)**; **[HEB 4:16](https://ref.ly/Heb4:16)** *See also* [EXO 17:4](https://ref.ly/Exod17:4); [1KI 18:36](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:36); [2KI 19:19](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:19); [2CH 20:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:12); [EZR 8:23](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:23); [NEH 1:4](https://ref.ly/Neh1:4); [MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41) parallels [MRK 14:38](https://ref.ly/Mark14:38), [LUK 22:46](https://ref.ly/Luke22:46); [ACT 12:5](https://ref.ly/Acts12:5); [JAS 5:13](https://ref.ly/Jas5:13)

Believers should trust God in the face of evil
----------------------------------------------

**[PSA 23:4](https://ref.ly/Ps23:4)**; **[MAT 26:39](https://ref.ly/Matt26:39)** parallels [MRK 14:36](https://ref.ly/Mark14:36), [LUK 22:42](https://ref.ly/Luke22:42) *See also* [PSA 4:8](https://ref.ly/Ps4:8), [PSA 20:7](https://ref.ly/Ps20:7), [PSA 27:1](https://ref.ly/Ps27:1); [ISA 12:2](https://ref.ly/Isa12:2); [DAN 3:17–3:18](https://ref.ly/Dan3:17-Dan3:18); [HAB 3:17–3:18](https://ref.ly/Hab3:17-Hab3:18); [2TI 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:12); [HEB 13:6](https://ref.ly/Heb13:6); [PSA 118:6–118:7](https://ref.ly/Ps118:6-Ps118:7)

## 8738: evil, victory over (id: 8738)

Although evil continues to be present and active in the world, Scripture gives an assurance that God will finally triumph over evil in all its forms.

Satan's power is already limited by God
---------------------------------------

**[JOB 1:12](https://ref.ly/Job1:12)** *See also* [GEN 3:14–3:15](https://ref.ly/Gen3:14-Gen3:15); [JOB 2:6](https://ref.ly/Job2:6); [ZEC 3:2](https://ref.ly/Zech3:2); [REV 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rev12:9)

Evil spirits are subject to God's control
-----------------------------------------

**[1SA 16:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:14)** *See also* [JDG 9:23](https://ref.ly/Judg9:23); [1SA 18:10](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:10), [1SA 19:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam19:9); [1KI 22:23](https://ref.ly/1Kgs22:23); [COL 2:13–2:15](https://ref.ly/Col2:13-Col2:15); [JUD 1:6](https://ref.ly/Jude1:6)

Jesus Christ's triumph over evil powers
---------------------------------------

**[1JN 3:8](https://ref.ly/1John3:8)** *See also* [MAT 12:25–12:29](https://ref.ly/Matt12:25-Matt12:29) parallels [MRK 3:23–3:27](https://ref.ly/Mark3:23-Mark3:27), [LUK 11:17–11:22](https://ref.ly/Luke11:17-Luke11:22); [MRK 1:27](https://ref.ly/Mark1:27) parallel [LUK 4:36](https://ref.ly/Luke4:36); [LUK 4:13](https://ref.ly/Luke4:13), [LUK 10:18](https://ref.ly/Luke10:18); [JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31), [JHN 14:30](https://ref.ly/John14:30); [HEB 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Heb2:14-Heb2:15); [1JN 4:4](https://ref.ly/1John4:4); [REV 3:21](https://ref.ly/Rev3:21)

God's transforming power reverses the effects of evil in human lives
--------------------------------------------------------------------

**[2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18)**; **[1JN 3:2](https://ref.ly/1John3:2)** *See also* [JON 3:10](https://ref.ly/Jonah3:10); [MRK 5:15](https://ref.ly/Mark5:15) parallel [LUK 8:35](https://ref.ly/Luke8:35); [LUK 19:8](https://ref.ly/Luke19:8); [ACT 26:17–26:18](https://ref.ly/Acts26:17-Acts26:18); [ROM 6:14](https://ref.ly/Rom6:14), [ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2); [1CO 15:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:10); [2CO 12:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:9); [COL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:10)

God brings good out of evil
---------------------------

**[GEN 50:20](https://ref.ly/Gen50:20)**; **[ROM 8:28](https://ref.ly/Rom8:28)** *See also* [GEN 45:8](https://ref.ly/Gen45:8); [JOB 23:10](https://ref.ly/Job23:10); [JHN 9:3](https://ref.ly/John9:3), [JHN 12:24](https://ref.ly/John12:24); [ACT 2:36](https://ref.ly/Acts2:36), [ACT 3:13–3:16](https://ref.ly/Acts3:13-Acts3:16), [ACT 5:30–5:31](https://ref.ly/Acts5:30-Acts5:31); [PHP 1:12–1:14](https://ref.ly/Phil1:12-Phil1:14), [PHP 1:17–1:18](https://ref.ly/Phil1:17-Phil1:18); [JAS 1:2–1:3](https://ref.ly/Jas1:2-Jas1:3); [1PE 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:6-1Pet1:7)

The removal of the curse on creation
------------------------------------

**[ROM 8:20–8:21](https://ref.ly/Rom8:20-Rom8:21)** *See also* [MAT 19:28](https://ref.ly/Matt19:28); [ACT 3:21](https://ref.ly/Acts3:21); [REV 21:1](https://ref.ly/Rev21:1), [REV 21:5](https://ref.ly/Rev21:5), [REV 22:3](https://ref.ly/Rev22:3)

Jesus Christ's victory over evil is expressed in his thousand\-year reign with believers, during which Satan is bound
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[REV 20:4](https://ref.ly/Rev20:4)** *See also* [REV 20:2](https://ref.ly/Rev20:2) *Interpreters differ over whether the “thousand years” refers to a future period or to Jesus Christ's present rule in the world.*

The final defeat of all evil powers
-----------------------------------

**[REV 20:4](https://ref.ly/Rev20:4)**; **[ROM 16:20](https://ref.ly/Rom16:20)**; **[REV 20:10](https://ref.ly/Rev20:10)** *See also* [MAL 4:1](https://ref.ly/Mal4:1); [MAT 13:41–13:42](https://ref.ly/Matt13:41-Matt13:42), [MAT 25:41](https://ref.ly/Matt25:41); [1CO 15:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:25); [2TH 2:8](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:8); [REV 19:20](https://ref.ly/Rev19:20), [REV 21:8](https://ref.ly/Rev21:8)

Evil will be excluded from the new heaven and earth
---------------------------------------------------

**[2PE 3:13](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:13)** *See also* [ISA 65:17](https://ref.ly/Isa65:17); [REV 21:4](https://ref.ly/Rev21:4), [REV 21:27](https://ref.ly/Rev21:27), [REV 22:15](https://ref.ly/Rev22:15)

## 8739: evil, examples of (id: 8739)

Biblical examples of evil are many and varied.

Evil disasters sent by God in judgment
--------------------------------------

[GEN 7:20](https://ref.ly/Gen7:20), [GEN 19:24](https://ref.ly/Gen19:24); [EXO 7:20](https://ref.ly/Exod7:20), [EXO 8:6](https://ref.ly/Exod8:6), [EXO 8:17](https://ref.ly/Exod8:17), [EXO 8:24](https://ref.ly/Exod8:24), [EXO 9:6](https://ref.ly/Exod9:6), [EXO 9:10](https://ref.ly/Exod9:10), [EXO 9:23](https://ref.ly/Exod9:23), [EXO 10:13](https://ref.ly/Exod10:13), [EXO 10:22](https://ref.ly/Exod10:22), [EXO 12:29](https://ref.ly/Exod12:29); [NUM 16:21–16:22](https://ref.ly/Num16:21-Num16:22); ; [1SA 5:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam5:6); ; [2SA 24:15](https://ref.ly/2Sam24:15); ; [1KI 17:1](https://ref.ly/1Kgs17:1)

Other disasters
---------------

[GEN 12:10](https://ref.ly/Gen12:10), [GEN 26:1](https://ref.ly/Gen26:1), [GEN 41:54](https://ref.ly/Gen41:54); ; [AMO 1:1](https://ref.ly/Amos1:1); ; [LUK 13:4](https://ref.ly/Luke13:4); ; [ACT 11:28](https://ref.ly/Acts11:28)

National evil
-------------

### Israel guilty of evil

[EXO 32:7](https://ref.ly/Exod32:7); ; [NUM 14:11](https://ref.ly/Num14:11); ; [DEU 32:5](https://ref.ly/Deut32:5); ; [JDG 2:11–2:15](https://ref.ly/Judg2:11-Judg2:15), [JDG 3:7](https://ref.ly/Judg3:7), [JDG 4:1](https://ref.ly/Judg4:1), [JDG 6:1](https://ref.ly/Judg6:1), [JDG 10:6](https://ref.ly/Judg10:6), [JDG 13:1](https://ref.ly/Judg13:1); ; [NEH 9:28](https://ref.ly/Neh9:28); ; [ISA 65:12](https://ref.ly/Isa65:12); ; [AMO 2:4–2:8](https://ref.ly/Amos2:4-Amos2:8)

### Threats to Israel from other nations

[JDG 6:1](https://ref.ly/Judg6:1); ; [1SA 7:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam7:7); ; [2CH 20:10–20:11](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:10-2Chr20:11)

Evil rulers
-----------

### Of Israel

### Of Judah

### Of other nations

----------------------
