## 8794: persecution (id: 8794)

Scripture indicates that believers can expect to face hardship, ridicule and oppression, from individuals and state authorities, on account of their faith. It encourages believers to remain faithful in the face of such persecution and to draw strength from the example of Jesus Christ himself.

* **Associated Articles:** 8795: persecution, nature of (ID: `8795@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8796: persecution, forms of (ID: `8796@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8797: persecution, attitudes to (ID: `8797@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8795: persecution, nature of (id: 8795)

Persecution by the world and secular powers is a likely consequence of faith. Scripture identifies a number of potential sources of such persistent harassment.

Persecution is characteristic of this world
-------------------------------------------

**[PSA 10:2](https://ref.ly/Ps10:2)** *See also* [AMO 1:6](https://ref.ly/Amos1:6), [AMO 1:9](https://ref.ly/Amos1:9), [AMO 2:1](https://ref.ly/Amos2:1); [HAB 1:6–1:11](https://ref.ly/Hab1:6-Hab1:11); [REV 6:8](https://ref.ly/Rev6:8), [REV 9:7–9:10](https://ref.ly/Rev9:7-Rev9:10)

Satan is the arch\-persecutor of the church
-------------------------------------------

**[GEN 3:15](https://ref.ly/Gen3:15)** *See also* [JOB 2:6–2:7](https://ref.ly/Job2:6-Job2:7); [ZEC 3:1](https://ref.ly/Zech3:1); [LUK 22:3–22:4](https://ref.ly/Luke22:3-Luke22:4); [1PE 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:8); [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10), [REV 2:13](https://ref.ly/Rev2:13)

The agencies of persecution
---------------------------

### The world

**[JHN 15:18](https://ref.ly/John15:18)**; **[1JN 3:13](https://ref.ly/1John3:13)** *See also* [MRK 12:7](https://ref.ly/Mark12:7); [JHN 5:18](https://ref.ly/John5:18), [JHN 15:19](https://ref.ly/John15:19), [JHN 17:14](https://ref.ly/John17:14); [ACT 14:22](https://ref.ly/Acts14:22); [1TH 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:14-1Thess2:15); [1JN 3:1](https://ref.ly/1John3:1)

### Earthly governments

**[MRK 13:9](https://ref.ly/Mark13:9)** *See also* [1KI 19:2](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:2); [NEH 6:1](https://ref.ly/Neh6:1), [NEH 6:9](https://ref.ly/Neh6:9); [EST 3:6](https://ref.ly/Esth3:6); [PSA 119:161](https://ref.ly/Ps119:161); [JER 38:6](https://ref.ly/Jer38:6); [DAN 3:13–3:17](https://ref.ly/Dan3:13-Dan3:17); [MAT 10:17](https://ref.ly/Matt10:17); [ACT 12:1–12:3](https://ref.ly/Acts12:1-Acts12:3)

### Religious authorities

**[1TH 2:13–2:16](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:13-1Thess2:16)** *See also* [JER 26:8](https://ref.ly/Jer26:8); [AMO 7:12–7:13](https://ref.ly/Amos7:12-Amos7:13); [MAT 23:34–23:37](https://ref.ly/Matt23:34-Matt23:37); [ACT 4:27–4:29](https://ref.ly/Acts4:27-Acts4:29), [ACT 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/Acts5:17-Acts5:18), [ACT 22:4](https://ref.ly/Acts22:4)REV [13:7](https://ref.ly/Acts13:7), [REV 13:15](https://ref.ly/Rev13:15), [REV 17:6](https://ref.ly/Rev17:6)

### Family and friends

**[MAT 10:36](https://ref.ly/Matt10:36)** *See also* [MIC 7:6](https://ref.ly/Mic7:6); [GEN 4:8](https://ref.ly/Gen4:8); [MAT 10:21](https://ref.ly/Matt10:21); [MRK 3:21](https://ref.ly/Mark3:21); [GAL 4:29](https://ref.ly/Gal4:29)

The experience of persecution
-----------------------------

**[2CO 12:10](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:10)** *See also* [1SA 24:14](https://ref.ly/1Sam24:14); [PSA 59:1–59:4](https://ref.ly/Ps59:1-Ps59:4), [PSA 64:1–64:4](https://ref.ly/Ps64:1-Ps64:4); [2CO 4:8–4:12](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:8-2Cor4:12), [2CO 11:23–11:26](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:23-2Cor11:26); [HEB 11:32–11:38](https://ref.ly/Heb11:32-Heb11:38)

Believers must expect persecution
---------------------------------

**[2TI 3:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:12)** *See also* [MAT 13:21](https://ref.ly/Matt13:21); [MRK 10:29–10:30](https://ref.ly/Mark10:29-Mark10:30); [1TH 3:4](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:4)

Persecution is part of the tribulation of the church
----------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 24:7–24:10](https://ref.ly/Matt24:7-Matt24:10)** *See also* [2TH 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:3-2Thess2:4); [REV 6:11](https://ref.ly/Rev6:11)

Persecution is sometimes part of God's judgment on his people
-------------------------------------------------------------

**[LAM 4:16–4:19](https://ref.ly/Lam4:16-Lam4:19)** *See also* [JER 6:22–6:26](https://ref.ly/Jer6:22-Jer6:26), [JER 32:26–32:29](https://ref.ly/Jer32:26-Jer32:29), [JER 39:5–39:10](https://ref.ly/Jer39:5-Jer39:10)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 10:2; Amos 1:6; Amos 1:9; Amos 2:1; Habakkuk 1:6-11; Revelation 6:8; Revelation 9:7-10; Genesis 3:15; Job 2:6-7; Zechariah 3:1; Luke 22:3-4; 1 Peter 5:8; Revelation 2:10; Revelation 2:13; John 15:18; 1 John 3:13; Mark 12:7; John 5:18; John 15:19; John 17:14; Acts 14:22; 1 Thessalonians 2:14-15; 1 John 3:1; Mark 13:9; 1 Kings 19:2; Nehemiah 6:1; Nehemiah 6:9; Esther 3:6; Psalms 119:161; Jeremiah 38:6; Daniel 3:13-17; Matthew 10:17; Acts 12:1-3; 1 Thessalonians 2:13-16; Jeremiah 26:8; Amos 7:12-13; Matthew 23:34-37; Acts 4:27-29; Acts 5:17-18; Acts 22:4; Acts 13:7; Revelation 13:15; Revelation 17:6; Matthew 10:36; Micah 7:6; Genesis 4:8; Matthew 10:21; Mark 3:21; Galatians 4:29; 2 Corinthians 12:10; 1 Samuel 24:14; Psalms 59:1-4; Psalms 64:1-4; 2 Corinthians 4:8-12; 2 Corinthians 11:23-26; Hebrews 11:32-38; 2 Timothy 3:12; Matthew 13:21; Mark 10:29-30; 1 Thessalonians 3:4; Matthew 24:7-10; 2 Thessalonians 2:3-4; Revelation 6:11; Lamentations 4:16-19; Jeremiah 6:22-26; Jeremiah 32:26-29; Jeremiah 39:5-10

## 8796: persecution, forms of (id: 8796)

Scripture identifies a number of reasons why individuals and governmments may attempt to persecute believers and also the methods by which they may carry this out.

The motives for persecution
---------------------------

### Envy

**[ACT 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/Acts5:17-Acts5:18)** *See also* [GEN 26:14–26:15](https://ref.ly/Gen26:14-Gen26:15), [GEN 37:4](https://ref.ly/Gen37:4), [GEN 37:8](https://ref.ly/Gen37:8); [1SA 18:8–18:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:8-1Sam18:9); [PSA 106:16](https://ref.ly/Ps106:16); [DAN 6:1–6:5](https://ref.ly/Dan6:1-Dan6:5); [MAT 27:18](https://ref.ly/Matt27:18); [ACT 13:45](https://ref.ly/Acts13:45); [JAS 3:16](https://ref.ly/Jas3:16)

### Fear

**[LUK 22:2](https://ref.ly/Luke22:2)** *See also* [EXO 1:10](https://ref.ly/Exod1:10); [1SA 18:15](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:15), [1SA 18:29](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:29); [MAT 2:3](https://ref.ly/Matt2:3); [ACT 19:23–19:27](https://ref.ly/Acts19:23-Acts19:27)

### Hatred

**[1JN 3:12](https://ref.ly/1John3:12)** *See also* [GEN 4:3–4:8](https://ref.ly/Gen4:3-Gen4:8); [1KI 22:8](https://ref.ly/1Kgs22:8) parallel [2CH 18:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr18:7); [JHN 7:7](https://ref.ly/John7:7)

The means of persecution
------------------------

### Deception

**[PSA 38:12](https://ref.ly/Ps38:12)** *See also* [1KI 21:10](https://ref.ly/1Kgs21:10); [EZR 4:12–4:13](https://ref.ly/Ezra4:12-Ezra4:13); [PSA 35:11](https://ref.ly/Ps35:11); [JER 20:10](https://ref.ly/Jer20:10); [AMO 7:10](https://ref.ly/Amos7:10); [MAT 5:11](https://ref.ly/Matt5:11); [JHN 7:12](https://ref.ly/John7:12); [ACT 6:11](https://ref.ly/Acts6:11), [ACT 21:21](https://ref.ly/Acts21:21), [ACT 21:28](https://ref.ly/Acts21:28), [ACT 24:5](https://ref.ly/Acts24:5)

### Threats

**[PSA 10:7](https://ref.ly/Ps10:7)** *See also* [EZR 4:4](https://ref.ly/Ezra4:4); [DAN 3:15](https://ref.ly/Dan3:15); [JHN 9:22](https://ref.ly/John9:22); [ACT 4:17](https://ref.ly/Acts4:17)

### Ridicule

**[NEH 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/Neh4:1-Neh4:3)** *See also* [HOS 9:7](https://ref.ly/Hos9:7); [1CO 4:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:13); [HEB 13:13](https://ref.ly/Heb13:13); [REV 2:9](https://ref.ly/Rev2:9)

### Ostracism

**[MAT 10:22](https://ref.ly/Matt10:22)** *See also* [JHN 9:29](https://ref.ly/John9:29), [JHN 9:34](https://ref.ly/John9:34), [JHN 12:42](https://ref.ly/John12:42), [JHN 16:2](https://ref.ly/John16:2)

### Violence

**[ROM 8:35](https://ref.ly/Rom8:35)** *See also* [JER 38:6](https://ref.ly/Jer38:6); [MAT 10:17](https://ref.ly/Matt10:17) parallel [MRK 13:9](https://ref.ly/Mark13:9); [JHN 21:18–21:19](https://ref.ly/John21:18-John21:19); [ACT 5:40](https://ref.ly/Acts5:40), [ACT 16:37](https://ref.ly/Acts16:37); [2CO 11:25](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:25); [GAL 6:17](https://ref.ly/Gal6:17); [HEB 11:36–11:39](https://ref.ly/Heb11:36-Heb11:39)

How God deals with persecutors
------------------------------

**[1TI 1:13](https://ref.ly/1Tim1:13)** *See also* [DAN 4:34–4:35](https://ref.ly/Dan4:34-Dan4:35); [ACT 12:1](https://ref.ly/Acts12:1), [ACT 12:21–12:23](https://ref.ly/Acts12:21-Acts12:23); [GAL 1:23](https://ref.ly/Gal1:23)

* **Associated Passages:** Acts 5:17-18; Genesis 26:14-15; Genesis 37:4; Genesis 37:8; 1 Samuel 18:8-9; Psalms 106:16; Daniel 6:1-5; Matthew 27:18; Acts 13:45; James 3:16; Luke 22:2; Exodus 1:10; 1 Samuel 18:15; 1 Samuel 18:29; Matthew 2:3; Acts 19:23-27; 1 John 3:12; Genesis 4:3-8; 1 Kings 22:8; 2 Chronicles 18:7; John 7:7; Psalms 38:12; 1 Kings 21:10; Ezra 4:12-13; Psalms 35:11; Jeremiah 20:10; Amos 7:10; Matthew 5:11; John 7:12; Acts 6:11; Acts 21:21; Acts 21:28; Acts 24:5; Psalms 10:7; Ezra 4:4; Daniel 3:15; John 9:22; Acts 4:17; Nehemiah 4:1-3; Hosea 9:7; 1 Corinthians 4:13; Hebrews 13:13; Revelation 2:9; Matthew 10:22; John 9:29; John 9:34; John 12:42; John 16:2; Romans 8:35; Jeremiah 38:6; Matthew 10:17; Mark 13:9; John 21:18-19; Acts 5:40; Acts 16:37; 2 Corinthians 11:25; Galatians 6:17; Hebrews 11:36-39; 1 Timothy 1:13; Daniel 4:34-35; Acts 12:1; Acts 12:21-23; Galatians 1:23
* **Associated Articles:** 2426: gospel, responses to (ID: `2426@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2545: Jesus Christ, opposition to (ID: `2545@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5040: murder (ID: `5040@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5560: suffering (ID: `5560@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5875: hatred (ID: `5875@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6145: deceit (ID: `6145@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8498: witnessing, and Holy Spirit (ID: `8498@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8733: envy (ID: `8733@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8754: fear (ID: `8754@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8815: ridicule (ID: `8815@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8819: scoffing (ID: `8819@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8833: threats (ID: `8833@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8797: persecution, attitudes to (id: 8797)

Scripture outlines the attitudes which believers should adopt in the face of persecution, laying particular emphasis upon the faithfulness of God, the example of Jesus Christ and the need for patience and hope by believers.

The call to endure in the face of persecution
---------------------------------------------

### Passively

**[PSA 119:87](https://ref.ly/Ps119:87)** *See also* [MAT 10:22](https://ref.ly/Matt10:22), [MAT 10:28](https://ref.ly/Matt10:28); [1CO 4:12](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:12); [2TH 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:4); [JAS 5:8](https://ref.ly/Jas5:8)

### Actively

**[HEB 12:1](https://ref.ly/Heb12:1)** *See also* [EPH 6:10–6:20](https://ref.ly/Eph6:10-Eph6:20); [2TI 2:3](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:3); [1PE 5:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:9); [REV 2:3](https://ref.ly/Rev2:3)

Attitudes believers are to adopt in facing persecution
------------------------------------------------------

### Living holy and forgiving lives

**[1PE 2:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:12)** *See also* [MAT 5:44](https://ref.ly/Matt5:44); [ROM 12:19–12:20](https://ref.ly/Rom12:19-Rom12:20); [1PE 2:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:15), [1PE 2:23](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:23), [1PE 3:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:16)

Rejoicing in suffering
----------------------

**[ROM 5:3–5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:3-Rom5:5)** *See also* [PSA 30:5](https://ref.ly/Ps30:5); [MAT 5:11–5:12](https://ref.ly/Matt5:11-Matt5:12) parallel [LUK 6:22–6:23](https://ref.ly/Luke6:22-Luke6:23); [ACT 5:41](https://ref.ly/Acts5:41), [ACT 16:22–16:25](https://ref.ly/Acts16:22-Acts16:25); [ROM 12:15](https://ref.ly/Rom12:15); [COL 1:24](https://ref.ly/Col1:24); [1PE 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:6), [1PE 1:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:8), [1PE 4:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:12), [1PE 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:16)

### Relying on the promise of God's grace to endure

**[LAM 3:22–3:23](https://ref.ly/Lam3:22-Lam3:23)** *See also* [PSA 18:17–18:19](https://ref.ly/Ps18:17-Ps18:19); [NAM 1:7–1:8](https://ref.ly/Nah1:7-Nah1:8); [ROM 8:18](https://ref.ly/Rom8:18), [ROM 8:35–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:35-Rom8:39); [2TI 3:10–3:11](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:10-2Tim3:11); [HEB 13:6](https://ref.ly/Heb13:6); [REV 3:10](https://ref.ly/Rev3:10)

### Trusting in the promise of God's presence

**[HEB 13:5](https://ref.ly/Heb13:5)** *See also* [PSA 23:4](https://ref.ly/Ps23:4); [ISA 43:2](https://ref.ly/Isa43:2), [ISA 43:5](https://ref.ly/Isa43:5); [MAT 28:20](https://ref.ly/Matt28:20); [2CO 4:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:9)

### Praying always

**[EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18)** *See also* [PSA 35:24](https://ref.ly/Ps35:24), [PSA 38:15–38:16](https://ref.ly/Ps38:15-Ps38:16), [PSA 129:5](https://ref.ly/Ps129:5), [PSA 143:9](https://ref.ly/Ps143:9); [MIC 7:7–7:8](https://ref.ly/Mic7:7-Mic7:8); [LUK 6:28](https://ref.ly/Luke6:28), [LUK 18:7–18:8](https://ref.ly/Luke18:7-Luke18:8); [1PE 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:7)

The certain prospect of victory over persecution
------------------------------------------------

### The triumph of Jesus Christ

**[1CO 15:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:25)** *See also* [OBA 1:21](https://ref.ly/Obad1:21); [PHP 3:20–3:21](https://ref.ly/Phil3:20-Phil3:21); [2TH 1:6–1:8](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:6-2Thess1:8); [REV 11:15](https://ref.ly/Rev11:15)

### The vindication of the saints

**[JUD 1:24](https://ref.ly/Jude1:24)** *See also* [EZR 6:8](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:8); [EST 6:11–6:13](https://ref.ly/Esth6:11-Esth6:13); [PSA 126:1](https://ref.ly/Ps126:1); [DAN 6:26](https://ref.ly/Dan6:26); [HAG 2:22–2:23](https://ref.ly/Hag2:22-Hag2:23); [2TI 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:12); [REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10), [REV 7:13–7:17](https://ref.ly/Rev7:13-Rev7:17), [REV 12:11](https://ref.ly/Rev12:11)

Believers are to take heart from the example of Jesus Christ in facing persecution
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### The persecution of Jesus Christ was predicted in the OT

[PSA 22:1–22:18](https://ref.ly/Ps22:1-Ps22:18); ; [ISA 50:6](https://ref.ly/Isa50:6), [ISA 53:7–53:12](https://ref.ly/Isa53:7-Isa53:12)

### The fulfilment of these predictions

[MAT 27:26–27:31](https://ref.ly/Matt27:26-Matt27:31) parallel [MRK 15:15–15:20](https://ref.ly/Mark15:15-Mark15:20)

### The relevance of Jesus Christ's innocent suffering to believers

**[1PE 2:20–2:23](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:20-1Pet2:23)** *See also* [1PE 3:14–3:17](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:14-1Pet3:17) *suffering for the sake of righteousness*; [1PE 4:13–4:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:13-1Pet4:14) *rejoicing at sharing in Christ's sufferings*

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 119:87; Matthew 10:22; Matthew 10:28; 1 Corinthians 4:12; 2 Thessalonians 1:4; James 5:8; Hebrews 12:1; Ephesians 6:10-20; 2 Timothy 2:3; 1 Peter 5:9; Revelation 2:3; 1 Peter 2:12; Matthew 5:44; Romans 12:19-20; 1 Peter 2:15; 1 Peter 2:23; 1 Peter 3:16; Romans 5:3-5; Psalms 30:5; Matthew 5:11-12; Luke 6:22-23; Acts 5:41; Acts 16:22-25; Romans 12:15; Colossians 1:24; 1 Peter 1:6; 1 Peter 1:8; 1 Peter 4:12; 1 Peter 4:16; Lamentations 3:22-23; Psalms 18:17-19; Nahum 1:7-8; Romans 8:18; Romans 8:35-39; 2 Timothy 3:10-11; Hebrews 13:6; Revelation 3:10; Hebrews 13:5; Psalms 23:4; Isaiah 43:2; Isaiah 43:5; Matthew 28:20; 2 Corinthians 4:9; Ephesians 6:18; Psalms 35:24; Psalms 38:15-16; Psalms 129:5; Psalms 143:9; Micah 7:7-8; Luke 6:28; Luke 18:7-8; 1 Peter 4:7; 1 Corinthians 15:25; Obadiah 1:21; Philippians 3:20-21; 2 Thessalonians 1:6-8; Revelation 11:15; Jude 1:24; Ezra 6:8; Esther 6:11-13; Psalms 126:1; Daniel 6:26; Haggai 2:22-23; 2 Timothy 1:12; Revelation 2:10; Revelation 7:13-17; Revelation 12:11; Psalms 22:1-18; Isaiah 50:6; Isaiah 53:7-12; Matthew 27:26-31; Mark 15:15-20; 1 Peter 2:20-23; 1 Peter 3:14-17; 1 Peter 4:13-14

## 8799: polytheism (id: 8799)

Belief in, and worship of, more than one god. It is forbidden in Scripture because God has revealed himself as the one true God. Israel in the OT and the church in the NT lived amongst polytheistic peoples. The Israelites shared in this worship and so came under God's judgment.

The uniqueness of God
---------------------

### There is only one true God

**[ISA 45:5–45:6](https://ref.ly/Isa45:5-Isa45:6)** *See also* [DEU 6:4](https://ref.ly/Deut6:4), [DEU 32:39](https://ref.ly/Deut32:39); [ISA 43:10](https://ref.ly/Isa43:10), [ISA 44:8](https://ref.ly/Isa44:8)

### The contrast of the true God with idols

**[1TH 1:9](https://ref.ly/1Thess1:9)** *See also* [1CH 16:26](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:26) parallel [PSA 96:5](https://ref.ly/Ps96:5); [ISA 40:18–40:19](https://ref.ly/Isa40:18-Isa40:19), [ISA 40:25–40:26](https://ref.ly/Isa40:25-Isa40:26); [ACT 17:29](https://ref.ly/Acts17:29); [1CO 8:4–8:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:4-1Cor8:6); [GAL 4:8](https://ref.ly/Gal4:8)

Polytheism is expressly forbidden
---------------------------------

### Warnings against worshipping idols

**[EXO 20:23](https://ref.ly/Exod20:23)** *See also* [EXO 20:3–20:5](https://ref.ly/Exod20:3-Exod20:5) parallel [DEU 5:7–5:9](https://ref.ly/Deut5:7-Deut5:9); [EXO 23:13](https://ref.ly/Exod23:13); [LEV 17:7](https://ref.ly/Lev17:7)

### Polytheism compromises relationship with God

**[2KI 17:35–17:38](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:35-2Kgs17:38)** *See also* [DEU 31:16](https://ref.ly/Deut31:16); [JER 11:10](https://ref.ly/Jer11:10); [1CO 10:18–10:22](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:18-1Cor10:22)

### The challenge to Israel to worship God only

**[JOS 24:15](https://ref.ly/Josh24:15)** *See also* [GEN 35:2–35:4](https://ref.ly/Gen35:2-Gen35:4); [DEU 12:2–12:4](https://ref.ly/Deut12:2-Deut12:4); [1KI 18:21](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:21)

Polytheism brings God's judgment
--------------------------------

[EXO 22:20](https://ref.ly/Exod22:20); ; [DEU 31:17–31:18](https://ref.ly/Deut31:17-Deut31:18); ; [JOS 23:16](https://ref.ly/Josh23:16); ; [JER 11:11–11:13](https://ref.ly/Jer11:11-Jer11:13)

Polytheism among Israel's neighbours
------------------------------------

**[JDG 10:6](https://ref.ly/Judg10:6)** *See also* [JDG 16:23](https://ref.ly/Judg16:23); [1KI 11:33](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:33); [2KI 1:2](https://ref.ly/2Kgs1:2), [2KI 17:29–17:33](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:29-2Kgs17:33); [ISA 46:1](https://ref.ly/Isa46:1); [JER 50:2](https://ref.ly/Jer50:2); [EZK 8:14](https://ref.ly/Ezek8:14)

Polytheism among the Israelites
-------------------------------

### They were called to destroy foreign gods

**[NUM 33:51–33:52](https://ref.ly/Num33:51-Num33:52)** *See also* [EXO 23:24](https://ref.ly/Exod23:24), [EXO 34:12–34:13](https://ref.ly/Exod34:12-Exod34:13); [DEU 12:2–12:3](https://ref.ly/Deut12:2-Deut12:3)

### They were seduced by foreign gods

**[2KI 17:15–17:18](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:15-2Kgs17:18)**; **[JER 2:11](https://ref.ly/Jer2:11)** *See also* [EXO 34:15–34:16](https://ref.ly/Exod34:15-Exod34:16); [NUM 25:2](https://ref.ly/Num25:2); [DEU 12:30](https://ref.ly/Deut12:30), [DEU 32:16–32:17](https://ref.ly/Deut32:16-Deut32:17); [JDG 2:11–2:13](https://ref.ly/Judg2:11-Judg2:13); [PSA 106:34–106:36](https://ref.ly/Ps106:34-Ps106:36); [HOS 2:13](https://ref.ly/Hos2:13), [HOS 11:2](https://ref.ly/Hos11:2)

### Polytheism among Israel's kings

[1KI 11:5–11:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs11:5-1Kgs11:7) *Solomon*; ; [1KI 12:28–12:29](https://ref.ly/1Kgs12:28-1Kgs12:29) *Jeroboam, king of Israel*; ; [1KI 16:30–16:33](https://ref.ly/1Kgs16:30-1Kgs16:33) *Ahab, king of Israel*; ; [2KI 16:3–16:4](https://ref.ly/2Kgs16:3-2Kgs16:4) *Ahaz, king of Judah*; ; [2KI 21:3–21:5](https://ref.ly/2Kgs21:3-2Kgs21:5) *Manasseh, king of Judah*

### Examples of reforming kings

[1KI 15:12–15:13](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:12-1Kgs15:13) *Asa, king of Judah*; ; [2KI 18:4](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:4) *Hezekiah, king of Judah*; ; [2KI 23:12–23:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:12-2Kgs23:15) *Josiah, king of Judah*

The character of polytheism in the OT
-------------------------------------

### The physical representation of deities

[LEV 26:1](https://ref.ly/Lev26:1); ; [1KI 14:23](https://ref.ly/1Kgs14:23); ; [ISA 48:5](https://ref.ly/Isa48:5)

### Cult prostitution

[DEU 23:17](https://ref.ly/Deut23:17); ; [1KI 14:24](https://ref.ly/1Kgs14:24)

### Human sacrifice

[LEV 18:21](https://ref.ly/Lev18:21) *to Molech*; ; [DEU 12:31](https://ref.ly/Deut12:31); ; [2KI 3:26–3:27](https://ref.ly/2Kgs3:26-2Kgs3:27) *to Chemosh*; ; [JER 19:5](https://ref.ly/Jer19:5) *to Baal*; ; [EZK 16:20–16:21](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:20-Ezek16:21)

### Self\-mutilation

[1KI 18:28–18:29](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:28-1Kgs18:29)

Polytheism in the NT
--------------------

### It was widespread

**[ACT 17:23](https://ref.ly/Acts17:23)** *The Athenians were fearful of offending a god by failing to give him attention. Any omissions were covered in the designation “UNKNOWN GOD”.* *See also* [ACT 14:11–14:13](https://ref.ly/Acts14:11-Acts14:13), [ACT 19:35](https://ref.ly/Acts19:35); [1CO 8:5–8:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:5-1Cor8:6)

### The worship of man\-made idols

**[1CO 12:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:2)** *See also* [ACT 17:16](https://ref.ly/Acts17:16), [ACT 19:26](https://ref.ly/Acts19:26); [ROM 1:20–1:23](https://ref.ly/Rom1:20-Rom1:23); [1CO 10:19–10:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:19-1Cor10:20) *Idols in themselves are nothing, but they represent a demonic presence which lies behind polytheistic worship.*

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 45:5-6; Deuteronomy 6:4; Deuteronomy 32:39; Isaiah 43:10; Isaiah 44:8; 1 Thessalonians 1:9; 1 Chronicles 16:26; Psalms 96:5; Isaiah 40:18-19; Isaiah 40:25-26; Acts 17:29; 1 Corinthians 8:4-6; Galatians 4:8; Exodus 20:23; Exodus 20:3-5; Deuteronomy 5:7-9; Exodus 23:13; Leviticus 17:7; 2 Kings 17:35-38; Deuteronomy 31:16; Jeremiah 11:10; 1 Corinthians 10:18-22; Joshua 24:15; Genesis 35:2-4; Deuteronomy 12:2-4; 1 Kings 18:21; Exodus 22:20; Deuteronomy 31:17-18; Joshua 23:16; Jeremiah 11:11-13; Judges 10:6; Judges 16:23; 1 Kings 11:33; 2 Kings 1:2; 2 Kings 17:29-33; Isaiah 46:1; Jeremiah 50:2; Ezekiel 8:14; Numbers 33:51-52; Exodus 23:24; Exodus 34:12-13; Deuteronomy 12:2-3; 2 Kings 17:15-18; Jeremiah 2:11; Exodus 34:15-16; Numbers 25:2; Deuteronomy 12:30; Deuteronomy 32:16-17; Judges 2:11-13; Psalms 106:34-36; Hosea 2:13; Hosea 11:2; 1 Kings 11:5-7; 1 Kings 12:28-29; 1 Kings 16:30-33; 2 Kings 16:3-4; 2 Kings 21:3-5; 1 Kings 15:12-13; 2 Kings 18:4; 2 Kings 23:12-15; Leviticus 26:1; 1 Kings 14:23; Isaiah 48:5; Deuteronomy 23:17; 1 Kings 14:24; Leviticus 18:21; Deuteronomy 12:31; 2 Kings 3:26-27; Jeremiah 19:5; Ezekiel 16:20-21; 1 Kings 18:28-29; Acts 17:23; Acts 14:11-13; Acts 19:35; 1 Corinthians 8:5-6; 1 Corinthians 12:2; Acts 17:16; Acts 19:26; Romans 1:20-23; 1 Corinthians 10:19-20
* **Associated Articles:** 1165: God, uniqueness of (ID: `1165@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7312: Baal (ID: `7312@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8138: monotheism (ID: `8138@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8622: worship (ID: `8622@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8747: false gods (ID: `8747@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8768: idolatry (ID: `8768@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8829: superstition (ID: `8829@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8831: syncretism (ID: `8831@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8840: unfaithfulness, to God (ID: `8840@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8800: prejudice (id: 8800)

Seen mainly in Scripture as a bias against places, peoples and ideas. It is sometimes so firmly rooted as to resist all contrary evidence.

Prejudice against places
------------------------

**[JHN 1:46](https://ref.ly/John1:46)** *See also* [JHN 7:41](https://ref.ly/John7:41), [JHN 7:52](https://ref.ly/John7:52)

Prejudice against people
------------------------

### Prejudice due to an attitude of superiority

**[JHN 7:49](https://ref.ly/John7:49)** *See also* [1SA 10:27](https://ref.ly/1Sam10:27), [1SA 25:10–25:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam25:10-1Sam25:11); [JOB 30:1–30:10](https://ref.ly/Job30:1-Job30:10); [ISA 65:5](https://ref.ly/Isa65:5); [LUK 18:11](https://ref.ly/Luke18:11)

### Prejudice based on fear or jealousy

[EXO 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Exod1:9-Exod1:10), [EXO 1:12–1:13](https://ref.ly/Exod1:12-Exod1:13); ; [1SA 18:8–18:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:8-1Sam18:9), [1SA 18:29](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:29)

### Prejudice against Jesus Christ

**[JHN 12:37](https://ref.ly/John12:37)** *See also* [MAT 9:34](https://ref.ly/Matt9:34); [MRK 6:2–6:3](https://ref.ly/Mark6:2-Mark6:3); [JHN 9:29](https://ref.ly/John9:29), [JHN 10:20](https://ref.ly/John10:20)

Prejudice may be based on false assumptions about people's behaviour
--------------------------------------------------------------------

### Hostility incorrectly assumed

**[GEN 12:11–12:12](https://ref.ly/Gen12:11-Gen12:12)** *See also* [GEN 20:1–20:2](https://ref.ly/Gen20:1-Gen20:2), [GEN 26:1–26:11](https://ref.ly/Gen26:1-Gen26:11)

### Motives misunderstood

**[NUM 32:5–32:9](https://ref.ly/Num32:5-Num32:9)** *The leaders of Reuben and Gad chose to inhabit the fertile land in Transjordan but they were also prepared to cross the Jordan to help their brothers conquer the land.* *See also* [NUM 32:14](https://ref.ly/Num32:14), [NUM 32:17](https://ref.ly/Num32:17); [JOS 22:10–22:24](https://ref.ly/Josh22:10-Josh22:24); [2SA 10:3](https://ref.ly/2Sam10:3)

Prejudice in terms of partiality
--------------------------------

### Favouritism

[GEN 25:28](https://ref.ly/Gen25:28), [GEN 37:3](https://ref.ly/Gen37:3), [GEN 44:20](https://ref.ly/Gen44:20), [GEN 44:27–44:29](https://ref.ly/Gen44:27-Gen44:29)

### People are often prejudiced in favour of their own kind

**[MAT 5:46–5:47](https://ref.ly/Matt5:46-Matt5:47)** parallel [LUK 6:32–6:34](https://ref.ly/Luke6:32-Luke6:34) *See also* [LUK 7:29](https://ref.ly/Luke7:29), [LUK 17:16](https://ref.ly/Luke17:16); [ACT 10:45](https://ref.ly/Acts10:45); [LUK 11:18](https://ref.ly/Luke11:18)

### Prejudice on grounds of outward appearance or behaviour

**[JAS 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/Jas2:3-Jas2:4)** *See also* [1SA 16:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:7); [2SA 14:25](https://ref.ly/2Sam14:25); [ECC 9:16](https://ref.ly/Eccl9:16); [JHN 8:15](https://ref.ly/John8:15); [ROM 14:1](https://ref.ly/Rom14:1), [ROM 14:3](https://ref.ly/Rom14:3), [ROM 14:10](https://ref.ly/Rom14:10), [ROM 14:13](https://ref.ly/Rom14:13); [1CO 4:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:5); [GAL 2:6](https://ref.ly/Gal2:6)

### Prejudice due to race

**[EST 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Esth3:5-Esth3:6)** *See also* [EZR 4:15–4:16](https://ref.ly/Ezra4:15-Ezra4:16); [NEH 4:1–4:4](https://ref.ly/Neh4:1-Neh4:4); [EST 3:8–3:14](https://ref.ly/Esth3:8-Esth3:14), [EST 7:4](https://ref.ly/Esth7:4); [DAN 3:8–3:12](https://ref.ly/Dan3:8-Dan3:12), [DAN 6:3–6:9](https://ref.ly/Dan6:3-Dan6:9), [DAN 6:13](https://ref.ly/Dan6:13)

### Partiality forbidden

**[EXO 23:3](https://ref.ly/Exod23:3)** *See also* [LEV 19:15](https://ref.ly/Lev19:15); [JAS 2:9](https://ref.ly/Jas2:9)

God is not prejudiced
---------------------

### God is impartial

**[ACT 10:34](https://ref.ly/Acts10:34)** *See also* [ROM 2:11](https://ref.ly/Rom2:11); [EPH 6:9](https://ref.ly/Eph6:9); [COL 3:25](https://ref.ly/Col3:25)

### Job falsely accuses God of partiality

[JOB 9:16](https://ref.ly/Job9:16), [JOB 9:20](https://ref.ly/Job9:20), [JOB 9:30–9:31](https://ref.ly/Job9:30-Job9:31), [JOB 10:15–10:17](https://ref.ly/Job10:15-Job10:17)

Prejudice which no contrary evidence would change
-------------------------------------------------

**[LUK 16:31](https://ref.ly/Luke16:31)** *See also* [1SA 22:13–22:15](https://ref.ly/1Sam22:13-1Sam22:15); [MAT 11:21–11:23](https://ref.ly/Matt11:21-Matt11:23), [MAT 21:32](https://ref.ly/Matt21:32); [ACT 7:52](https://ref.ly/Acts7:52), [ACT 13:41](https://ref.ly/Acts13:41)

The Sadducees' prejudice against the resurrection
-------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 22:23](https://ref.ly/Matt22:23)** parallels [MRK 12:18](https://ref.ly/Mark12:18), [LUK 20:27](https://ref.ly/Luke20:27) *See also* [ACT 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/Acts4:1-Acts4:3), [ACT 23:8](https://ref.ly/Acts23:8)

* **Associated Passages:** John 1:46; John 7:41; John 7:52; John 7:49; 1 Samuel 10:27; 1 Samuel 25:10-11; Job 30:1-10; Isaiah 65:5; Luke 18:11; Exodus 1:9-10; Exodus 1:12-13; 1 Samuel 18:8-9; 1 Samuel 18:29; John 12:37; Matthew 9:34; Mark 6:2-3; John 9:29; John 10:20; Genesis 12:11-12; Genesis 20:1-2; Genesis 26:1-11; Numbers 32:5-9; Numbers 32:14; Numbers 32:17; Joshua 22:10-24; 2 Samuel 10:3; Genesis 25:28; Genesis 37:3; Genesis 44:20; Genesis 44:27-29; Matthew 5:46-47; Luke 6:32-34; Luke 7:29; Luke 17:16; Acts 10:45; Luke 11:18; James 2:3-4; 1 Samuel 16:7; 2 Samuel 14:25; Ecclesiastes 9:16; John 8:15; Romans 14:1; Romans 14:3; Romans 14:10; Romans 14:13; 1 Corinthians 4:5; Galatians 2:6; Esther 3:5-6; Ezra 4:15-16; Nehemiah 4:1-4; Esther 3:8-14; Esther 7:4; Daniel 3:8-12; Daniel 6:3-9; Daniel 6:13; Exodus 23:3; Leviticus 19:15; James 2:9; Acts 10:34; Romans 2:11; Ephesians 6:9; Colossians 3:25; Job 9:16; Job 9:20; Job 9:30-31; Job 10:15-17; Luke 16:31; 1 Samuel 22:13-15; Matthew 11:21-23; Matthew 21:32; Acts 7:52; Acts 13:41; Matthew 22:23; Mark 12:18; Luke 20:27; Acts 4:1-3; Acts 23:8
* **Associated Articles:** 2545: Jesus Christ, opposition to (ID: `2545@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5347: injustice (ID: `5347@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5882: impartiality (ID: `5882@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5961: superiority (ID: `5961@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7515: anti-semitism (ID: `7515@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8753: favouritism (ID: `8753@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8773: jealousy (ID: `8773@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8802: pride (ID: `8802@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8801: presumption (id: 8801)

A form of self\-confidence, which makes overconfident assumptions concerning one's importance and rights. It is criticised as a form of arrogance that is unacceptable among believers, whose lives should be characterised by humility.

Presumption is unacceptable
---------------------------

**[PSA 5:5](https://ref.ly/Ps5:5)**; **[ISA 13:11](https://ref.ly/Isa13:11)** *See also* [NUM 15:30](https://ref.ly/Num15:30); [DEU 6:16](https://ref.ly/Deut6:16), [DEU 18:20](https://ref.ly/Deut18:20); [ISA 45:9](https://ref.ly/Isa45:9); [ROM 2:4](https://ref.ly/Rom2:4), [ROM 9:20](https://ref.ly/Rom9:20); [1CO 10:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:9); [JAS 4:13](https://ref.ly/Jas4:13); [2PE 2:10](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:10)

Examples of presumption
-----------------------

[GEN 11:1–11:4](https://ref.ly/Gen11:1-Gen11:4) *those preparing to build the tower of Babel in defiance of God*; ; [NUM 14:40–14:45](https://ref.ly/Num14:40-Num14:45) *the Israelites, ignoring Moses' orders*; ; [LUK 12:16–12:21](https://ref.ly/Luke12:16-Luke12:21) *the rich fool*

Humility is commended in place of presumption
---------------------------------------------

**[MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8)** *See also* [LUK 14:10](https://ref.ly/Luke14:10), [LUK 22:26](https://ref.ly/Luke22:26); [ROM 12:3](https://ref.ly/Rom12:3); [JAS 4:10](https://ref.ly/Jas4:10); [1PE 5:5](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:5)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 5:5; Isaiah 13:11; Numbers 15:30; Deuteronomy 6:16; Deuteronomy 18:20; Isaiah 45:9; Romans 2:4; Romans 9:20; 1 Corinthians 10:9; James 4:13; 2 Peter 2:10; Genesis 11:1-4; Numbers 14:40-45; Luke 12:16-21; Micah 6:8; Luke 14:10; Luke 22:26; Romans 12:3; James 4:10; 1 Peter 5:5
* **Associated Articles:** 5761: attitudes (ID: `5761@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5793: arrogance (ID: `5793@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5956: strength, human (ID: `5956@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8202: boldness (ID: `8202@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8276: humility (ID: `8276@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8802: pride (ID: `8802@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8820: self-confidence (ID: `8820@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8802: pride (id: 8802)

Arrogance or delusions of greatness on account of one's achievements, status or possessions. Scripture frequently speaks of God humbling the proud.

* **Associated Articles:** 8803: pride, evil of (ID: `8803@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8804: pride, examples of (ID: `8804@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8805: pride, results of (ID: `8805@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8803: pride, evil of (id: 8803)

Pride is viewed as a great evil because it involves pretending to a greatness and glory that belong rightly to God alone.

The sinfulness of pride
-----------------------

### It is condemned as evil

**[1SA 15:23](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:23)**; **[PRO 21:4](https://ref.ly/Prov21:4)**; **[JAS 4:16](https://ref.ly/Jas4:16)** *See also* [MRK 7:22–7:23](https://ref.ly/Mark7:22-Mark7:23); [ROM 1:29–1:30](https://ref.ly/Rom1:29-Rom1:30); [2CO 12:20](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:20); [2TI 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:1-2Tim3:2); [1JN 2:16](https://ref.ly/1John2:16)

### It is a characteristic of Satan

**[EZK 28:2](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:2)**; **[1TI 3:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:6)** *See also* [2TH 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:4) *the antichrist*

Warnings against pride
----------------------

### In the book of Proverbs

**[PRO 16:5](https://ref.ly/Prov16:5), [PRO 16:18](https://ref.ly/Prov16:18)** *See also* [PRO 3:7](https://ref.ly/Prov3:7), [PRO 3:34](https://ref.ly/Prov3:34), [PRO 6:16–6:17](https://ref.ly/Prov6:16-Prov6:17), [PRO 11:2](https://ref.ly/Prov11:2), [PRO 25:6–25:7](https://ref.ly/Prov25:6-Prov25:7), [PRO 25:27](https://ref.ly/Prov25:27), [PRO 26:12](https://ref.ly/Prov26:12), [PRO 27:1](https://ref.ly/Prov27:1), [PRO 29:23](https://ref.ly/Prov29:23)

### Elsewhere in Scripture

**[PSA 119:21](https://ref.ly/Ps119:21)** *See also* [LEV 26:191](https://ref.ly/Lev26:191)SA [2:3](https://ref.ly/Lev2:3); [PSA 12:2–12:3](https://ref.ly/Ps12:2-Ps12:3); [JER 9:23–9:24](https://ref.ly/Jer9:23-Jer9:24)[PSA 5:5](https://ref.ly/Ps5:5), [PSA 40:4](https://ref.ly/Ps40:4), [PSA 138:6](https://ref.ly/Ps138:6); [ISA 5:21](https://ref.ly/Isa5:21); [JER 13:15–13:17](https://ref.ly/Jer13:15-Jer13:17); [MAT 23:12](https://ref.ly/Matt23:12) parallel [LUK 14:11](https://ref.ly/Luke14:11) *Jesus Christ's teaching on pride*; [ROM 12:16](https://ref.ly/Rom12:16); [1CO 10:121](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:121)PE [5:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor5:5); [JAS 4:6](https://ref.ly/Jas4:6); [PRO 3:34](https://ref.ly/Prov3:34)

The gospel excludes pride
-------------------------

**[ROM 3:27](https://ref.ly/Rom3:27)** *See also* [LUK 18:9–18:14](https://ref.ly/Luke18:9-Luke18:14); [ROM 4:2–4:3](https://ref.ly/Rom4:2-Rom4:3), [ROM 11:17–11:20](https://ref.ly/Rom11:17-Rom11:20); [1CO 1:26–1:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:26-1Cor1:31); [EPH 2:8–2:9](https://ref.ly/Eph2:8-Eph2:9)

Godliness involves rejecting pride
----------------------------------

**[PRO 8:13](https://ref.ly/Prov8:13)** *See also* [PSA 101:5](https://ref.ly/Ps101:5), [PSA 131:1](https://ref.ly/Ps131:1); [ROM 12:3](https://ref.ly/Rom12:3); [1CO 13:4](https://ref.ly/1Cor13:4); [GAL 6:14](https://ref.ly/Gal6:14)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Samuel 15:23; Proverbs 21:4; James 4:16; Mark 7:22-23; Romans 1:29-30; 2 Corinthians 12:20; 2 Timothy 3:1-2; 1 John 2:16; Ezekiel 28:2; 1 Timothy 3:6; 2 Thessalonians 2:4; Proverbs 16:5; Proverbs 16:18; Proverbs 3:7; Proverbs 3:34; Proverbs 6:16-17; Proverbs 11:2; Proverbs 25:6-7; Proverbs 25:27; Proverbs 26:12; Proverbs 27:1; Proverbs 29:23; Psalms 119:21; Leviticus 26:191; Leviticus 2:3; Psalms 12:2-3; Jeremiah 9:23-24; Psalms 5:5; Psalms 40:4; Psalms 138:6; Isaiah 5:21; Jeremiah 13:15-17; Matthew 23:12; Luke 14:11; Romans 12:16; 1 Corinthians 10:121; 1 Corinthians 5:5; James 4:6; Romans 3:27; Luke 18:9-14; Romans 4:2-3; Romans 11:17-20; 1 Corinthians 1:26-31; Ephesians 2:8-9; Proverbs 8:13; Psalms 101:5; Psalms 131:1; Romans 12:3; 1 Corinthians 13:4; Galatians 6:14

## 8804: pride, examples of (id: 8804)

Scripture illustrates the many different ways in which pride manifests itself.

Pride in status
---------------

[EXO 5:2](https://ref.ly/Exod5:2) *Pharaoh*; ; [2KI 5:11](https://ref.ly/2Kgs5:11) *Naaman*; [2KI 20:13](https://ref.ly/2Kgs20:13); ; [2CH 32:25](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:25); [EST 5:11–5:12](https://ref.ly/Esth5:11-Esth5:12) *Haman*; [ISA 16:6](https://ref.ly/Isa16:6); ; [JER 48:29](https://ref.ly/Jer48:29); [ISA 47:8](https://ref.ly/Isa47:8) *Babylon*; ; [EZK 16:49–16:50](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:49-Ezek16:50) *Sodom*; ; [EZK 28:2](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:2) *the king of Tyre*; [EZK 31:3](https://ref.ly/Ezek31:3), [EZK 31:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek31:10); [DAN 5:23](https://ref.ly/Dan5:23) *Belshazzar*; ; [OBA 1:3](https://ref.ly/Obad1:3) *Edom*; ; [ZEP 2:15](https://ref.ly/Zeph2:15) *Nineveh*; [MAT 23:6–23:7](https://ref.ly/Matt23:6-Matt23:7) parallels [MRK 12:38–12:39](https://ref.ly/Mark12:38-Mark12:39), [LUK 20:46](https://ref.ly/Luke20:46); ; [LUK 11:43](https://ref.ly/Luke11:43); [ACT 8:9](https://ref.ly/Acts8:9) *Simon the sorcerer*; ; [REV 18:7](https://ref.ly/Rev18:7) *Babylon the Great*

Pride in strength
-----------------

[1SA 17:42](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:42) *Goliath*; ; [2KI 14:9–14:10](https://ref.ly/2Kgs14:9-2Kgs14:10) *Amaziah, king of Judah*; ; [2KI 18:33–18:35](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:33-2Kgs18:35) *the Assyrian commander*; [ISA 9:9–9:10](https://ref.ly/Isa9:9-Isa9:10); ; [HOS 10:13](https://ref.ly/Hos10:13); [ISA 10:13](https://ref.ly/Isa10:13) *the king of Assyria*; [DAN 3:15](https://ref.ly/Dan3:15), [DAN 4:30](https://ref.ly/Dan4:30); [MAT 26:33–26:35](https://ref.ly/Matt26:33-Matt26:35) parallels [MRK 14:29–14:31](https://ref.ly/Mark14:29-Mark14:31), [LUK 22:33](https://ref.ly/Luke22:33); ; [JHN 13:37](https://ref.ly/John13:37)

Pride in wisdom
---------------

[ISA 10:13](https://ref.ly/Isa10:13) *the king of Assyria*; ; [ACT 17:21](https://ref.ly/Acts17:21); ; [ROM 1:22](https://ref.ly/Rom1:22); ; [1CO 1:20](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:20), [1CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:18)

Proud ambition
--------------

[ISA 14:13–14:14](https://ref.ly/Isa14:13-Isa14:14) *the king of Babylon*; ; [2TH 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:3-2Thess2:4) *the antichrist*

Spiritual pride
---------------

[2KI 10:16](https://ref.ly/2Kgs10:16); ; [JOB 32:1](https://ref.ly/Job32:1), [JOB 33:9](https://ref.ly/Job33:9); ; [ISA 65:5](https://ref.ly/Isa65:5); ; [MAT 6:2](https://ref.ly/Matt6:2), [MAT 6:3](https://ref.ly/Matt6:3), [MAT 6:16](https://ref.ly/Matt6:16); [MAT 23:5](https://ref.ly/Matt23:5), [MAT 23:30](https://ref.ly/Matt23:30); ; [MRK 12:40](https://ref.ly/Mark12:40) parallel [LUK 20:47](https://ref.ly/Luke20:47); ; [LUK 16:14–16:15](https://ref.ly/Luke16:14-Luke16:15), [LUK 18:9](https://ref.ly/Luke18:9), [LUK 18:11–18:12](https://ref.ly/Luke18:11-Luke18:12); ; [JHN 9:40–9:41](https://ref.ly/John9:40-John9:41); [LUK 10:29](https://ref.ly/Luke10:29) *an expert in the law*; [JHN 8:33](https://ref.ly/John8:33), [JHN 9:34](https://ref.ly/John9:34); ; [ROM 2:17–2:20](https://ref.ly/Rom2:17-Rom2:20); [1CO 4:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:7), [1CO 4:18](https://ref.ly/1Cor4:18); ; [REV 3:17](https://ref.ly/Rev3:17) *the church in Laodicea*

## 8805: pride, results of (id: 8805)

The real nature of pride can be seen in the fact that it leads to many other evils and ends in destruction.

Pride leads to other forms of evil
----------------------------------

### Self\-deception

**[GAL 6:3](https://ref.ly/Gal6:3)** *See also* [DEU 8:17–8:18](https://ref.ly/Deut8:17-Deut8:18); [ISA 16:6](https://ref.ly/Isa16:6), [ISA 47:10](https://ref.ly/Isa47:10); [JER 49:16](https://ref.ly/Jer49:16) parallel [OBA 1:3](https://ref.ly/Obad1:3); [1CO 8:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:2); [1TI 6:3–6:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:3-1Tim6:4)

### Spiritual blindness

**[JER 43:2](https://ref.ly/Jer43:2)** *See also* [DEU 8:14](https://ref.ly/Deut8:14); [NEH 9:16](https://ref.ly/Neh9:16), [NEH 9:29](https://ref.ly/Neh9:29)

### A hard heart

**[PSA 36:2](https://ref.ly/Ps36:2)** *See also* [PSA 10:3](https://ref.ly/Ps10:3), [PSA 52:1](https://ref.ly/Ps52:1); [DAN 5:20](https://ref.ly/Dan5:20)

### A malicious spirit

**[PSA 119:85](https://ref.ly/Ps119:85)** *See also* [PSA 73:8](https://ref.ly/Ps73:8), [PSA 140:5](https://ref.ly/Ps140:5)

### Contempt for others

**[PSA 123:4](https://ref.ly/Ps123:4)** *See also* [PSA 119:51](https://ref.ly/Ps119:51); [PRO 21:24](https://ref.ly/Prov21:24)

### Quarrelling

**[PRO 13:10](https://ref.ly/Prov13:10)**

### Violence

**[PSA 73:6](https://ref.ly/Ps73:6)** *See also* [EST 3:5–3:6](https://ref.ly/Esth3:5-Esth3:6); [PSA 86:14](https://ref.ly/Ps86:14)

### Injustice

**[PSA 119:78](https://ref.ly/Ps119:78)** *See also* [PSA 56:2](https://ref.ly/Ps56:2)

### Oppression

**[PSA 10:2](https://ref.ly/Ps10:2)** *See also* [PSA 119:122](https://ref.ly/Ps119:122); [HAB 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/Hab2:4-Hab2:5)

### Contempt for God

**[PSA 10:4](https://ref.ly/Ps10:4)** *See also* [2KI 19:22](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:22)

Pride may be accompanied by temporary prosperity
------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 73:3](https://ref.ly/Ps73:3)** *See also* [PSA 10:5](https://ref.ly/Ps10:5)

Pride ends in disaster
----------------------

**[PRO 16:5](https://ref.ly/Prov16:5), [PRO 16:18](https://ref.ly/Prov16:18)** *See also* [2SA 22:28](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:28) parallel [PSA 18:27](https://ref.ly/Ps18:27); [JOB 40:11–40:12](https://ref.ly/Job40:11-Job40:12); [PSA 31:23](https://ref.ly/Ps31:23), [PSA 101:5](https://ref.ly/Ps101:5); [PRO 11:2](https://ref.ly/Prov11:2), [PRO 15:25](https://ref.ly/Prov15:25), [PRO 26:12](https://ref.ly/Prov26:12), [PRO 29:23](https://ref.ly/Prov29:23); [ISA 2:11–2:12](https://ref.ly/Isa2:11-Isa2:12), [ISA 2:17](https://ref.ly/Isa2:17), [ISA 13:11](https://ref.ly/Isa13:11), [ISA 26:5](https://ref.ly/Isa26:5); [ZEP 3:11](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:11); [MAL 4:1](https://ref.ly/Mal4:1); [LUK 1:51–1:52](https://ref.ly/Luke1:51-Luke1:52); [1TI 3:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:6)

Examples of the proud being humbled
-----------------------------------

Pharaoh: [EXO 14:28](https://ref.ly/Exod14:28); ; [NEH 9:10](https://ref.ly/Neh9:10); [2CH 26:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:16) *Uzziah*; [2CH 32:21](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:21); ; [ISA 10:12](https://ref.ly/Isa10:12), [ISA 10:16](https://ref.ly/Isa10:16); [2CH 32:25](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:25) *Hezekiah*; ; [EST 7:10](https://ref.ly/Esth7:10) *Haman*; ; [ISA 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/Isa3:16-Isa3:17) *the women of Zion*; [ISA 13:19](https://ref.ly/Isa13:19), [ISA 14:11–14:15](https://ref.ly/Isa14:11-Isa14:15); [ISA 23:9](https://ref.ly/Isa23:9), [ISA 25:10–25:12](https://ref.ly/Isa25:10-Isa25:12) *Moab*; ; [ISA 28:1–28:3](https://ref.ly/Isa28:1-Isa28:3) *Samaria*; [ISA 47:10–47:11](https://ref.ly/Isa47:10-Isa47:11); ; [JER 50:31–50:32](https://ref.ly/Jer50:31-Jer50:32); [JER 13:9](https://ref.ly/Jer13:9); ; [EZK 7:24](https://ref.ly/Ezek7:24); [EZK 16:49–16:50](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:49-Ezek16:50) *Sodom*; [EZK 28:5–28:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:5-Ezek28:9), [EZK 28:17](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:17); [EZK 30:6](https://ref.ly/Ezek30:6), [EZK 32:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek32:12); [DAN 4:30–4:33](https://ref.ly/Dan4:30-Dan4:33) *Nebuchadnezzar*; ; [DAN 5:30](https://ref.ly/Dan5:30) *Belshazzar*; ; [AMO 6:8](https://ref.ly/Amos6:8); ; [ZEP 2:15](https://ref.ly/Zeph2:15) *Nineveh*; ; [ZEC 9:6](https://ref.ly/Zech9:6), [ZEC 10:11](https://ref.ly/Zech10:11) *Assyria*; ; [MAT 11:23](https://ref.ly/Matt11:23) *Capernaum*; ; [ACT 12:21–12:23](https://ref.ly/Acts12:21-Acts12:23) *Herod*; ; [REV 18:7–18:8](https://ref.ly/Rev18:7-Rev18:8) *Babylon the Great*

## 8807: profanity (id: 8807)

Behaviour which dishonours God's name or brings it into disrepute. It is often the result of idolatry, injustice or irreverence. Scripture strongly admonishes God's people to avoid it.

General warnings against profanity
----------------------------------

**[LEV 22:31–22:33](https://ref.ly/Lev22:31-Lev22:33)** *See also* [LEV 21:5–21:6](https://ref.ly/Lev21:5-Lev21:6)

God's name profaned through idolatry
------------------------------------

### Through child sacrifice

**[LEV 18:21](https://ref.ly/Lev18:21)** *See also* [LEV 20:3](https://ref.ly/Lev20:3); [DEU 12:29–12:31](https://ref.ly/Deut12:29-Deut12:31), [DEU 18:9–18:13](https://ref.ly/Deut18:9-Deut18:13); [2KI 16:1–16:4](https://ref.ly/2Kgs16:1-2Kgs16:4) parallel [2CH 28:1–28:4](https://ref.ly/2Chr28:1-2Chr28:4); [2KI 17:16–17:17](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:16-2Kgs17:17), [2KI 21:1–21:6](https://ref.ly/2Kgs21:1-2Kgs21:6) parallel [2CH 33:1–33:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr33:1-2Chr33:6); [PSA 106:36–106:39](https://ref.ly/Ps106:36-Ps106:39); [ISA 57:3–57:5](https://ref.ly/Isa57:3-Isa57:5); [JER 32:32–32:35](https://ref.ly/Jer32:32-Jer32:35); [EZK 16:20–16:22](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:20-Ezek16:22)

### Through the worship of idols

**[EZK 20:39](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:39)** *See also* [JER 44:25–44:28](https://ref.ly/Jer44:25-Jer44:28); [EZK 20:31](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:31), [EZK 43:6–43:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek43:6-Ezek43:9)

God's name profaned through injustice and evil
----------------------------------------------

**[MAL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Mal2:10)** *See also* [JER 34:12–34:16](https://ref.ly/Jer34:12-Jer34:16); [AMO 2:6–2:8](https://ref.ly/Amos2:6-Amos2:8), [AMO 5:7–5:15](https://ref.ly/Amos5:7-Amos5:15); [MIC 6:6–6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:6-Mic6:8)

God's name profaned through false swearing
------------------------------------------

**[LEV 19:12](https://ref.ly/Lev19:12)** *See also* [JER 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Jer5:1-Jer5:2); [MAT 5:33–5:37](https://ref.ly/Matt5:33-Matt5:37); [JAS 5:12](https://ref.ly/Jas5:12)

God's name profaned through blasphemy
-------------------------------------

**[ISA 52:5–52:6](https://ref.ly/Isa52:5-Isa52:6)** *See also* [EXO 20:7](https://ref.ly/Exod20:7) parallel [DEU 5:11](https://ref.ly/Deut5:11); [LEV 24:10–24:16](https://ref.ly/Lev24:10-Lev24:16); [ISA 37:23](https://ref.ly/Isa37:23); [2PE 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:12)

God's name profaned through irreverence
---------------------------------------

**[LEV 22:2](https://ref.ly/Lev22:2)** *See also* [EZK 22:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:26); [ZEP 3:1–3:4](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:1-Zeph3:4); [MAL 1:6–1:14](https://ref.ly/Mal1:6-Mal1:14)

God's name profaned in the sight of foreign nations
---------------------------------------------------

**[EZK 39:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek39:7)** *See also* [EZK 20:13–20:44](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:13-Ezek20:44), [EZK 36:16–36:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:16-Ezek36:23); [ROM 2:17–2:24](https://ref.ly/Rom2:17-Rom2:24); [ISA 52:5](https://ref.ly/Isa52:5)

Penalties for profanity
-----------------------

**[LEV 20:1–20:5](https://ref.ly/Lev20:1-Lev20:5)** *See also* [JER 44:25–44:30](https://ref.ly/Jer44:25-Jer44:30); [EZK 13:17–13:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek13:17-Ezek13:23), [EZK 21:24–21:27](https://ref.ly/Ezek21:24-Ezek21:27), [EZK 39:1–39:8](https://ref.ly/Ezek39:1-Ezek39:8); [AMO 4:2–4:13](https://ref.ly/Amos4:2-Amos4:13), [AMO 8:4–8:14](https://ref.ly/Amos8:4-Amos8:14); [MAL 2:7–2:9](https://ref.ly/Mal2:7-Mal2:9)

* **Associated Passages:** Leviticus 22:31-33; Leviticus 21:5-6; Leviticus 18:21; Leviticus 20:3; Deuteronomy 12:29-31; Deuteronomy 18:9-13; 2 Kings 16:1-4; 2 Chronicles 28:1-4; 2 Kings 17:16-17; 2 Kings 21:1-6; 2 Chronicles 33:1-6; Psalms 106:36-39; Isaiah 57:3-5; Jeremiah 32:32-35; Ezekiel 16:20-22; Ezekiel 20:39; Jeremiah 44:25-28; Ezekiel 20:31; Ezekiel 43:6-9; Malachi 2:10; Jeremiah 34:12-16; Amos 2:6-8; Amos 5:7-15; Micah 6:6-8; Leviticus 19:12; Jeremiah 5:1-2; Matthew 5:33-37; James 5:12; Isaiah 52:5-6; Exodus 20:7; Deuteronomy 5:11; Leviticus 24:10-16; Isaiah 37:23; 2 Peter 2:12; Leviticus 22:2; Ezekiel 22:26; Zephaniah 3:1-4; Malachi 1:6-14; Ezekiel 39:7; Ezekiel 20:13-44; Ezekiel 36:16-23; Romans 2:17-24; Isaiah 52:5; Leviticus 20:1-5; Jeremiah 44:25-30; Ezekiel 13:17-23; Ezekiel 21:24-27; Ezekiel 39:1-8; Amos 4:2-13; Amos 8:4-14; Malachi 2:7-9

## 8808: riches (id: 8808)

Material possessions and wealth. Scripture stresses that riches originate from God: used wisely, they can be a blessing; used foolishly, they can lead people away from God.

* **Associated Articles:** 8809: riches, nature of (ID: `8809@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8810: riches, dangers of (ID: `8810@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8811: riches, believers' attitudes towards (ID: `8811@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8812: riches, ungodly use of (ID: `8812@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8813: riches, spiritual (ID: `8813@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8809: riches, nature of (id: 8809)

God has created an abundance of good things. Those who have material wealth should understand its true nature and acknowledge God.

God and riches
--------------

### All riches belong to God the Creator

**[PSA 24:1–24:2](https://ref.ly/Ps24:1-Ps24:2)** *See also* [JOB 41:11](https://ref.ly/Job41:11); [PSA 50:12](https://ref.ly/Ps50:12); [HAG 2:8](https://ref.ly/Hag2:8)

### God gives of his riches

**[1SA 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:7)** *See also* [ECC 5:19](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:19); [1CH 29:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:12); [2CH 1:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr1:12)

### God gives the ability to produce wealth

**[DEU 8:17–8:18](https://ref.ly/Deut8:17-Deut8:18)** *See also* [GEN 26:12–26:13](https://ref.ly/Gen26:12-Gen26:13); [DEU 26:9–26:10](https://ref.ly/Deut26:9-Deut26:10)

### Riches may be a sign of God's blessing

**[PRO 10:22](https://ref.ly/Prov10:22)** *See also* [2CH 25:9](https://ref.ly/2Chr25:9); [JOB 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Job1:9-Job1:10); [PSA 112:1–112:3](https://ref.ly/Ps112:1-Ps112:3), [PSA 128:1–128:2](https://ref.ly/Ps128:1-Ps128:2); [PRO 8:17–8:18](https://ref.ly/Prov8:17-Prov8:18)

### Riches should be thankfully received

**[1TI 4:4–4:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:4-1Tim4:5)** *See also* [MAT 14:19](https://ref.ly/Matt14:19); [ROM 1:21](https://ref.ly/Rom1:21); [COL 3:17](https://ref.ly/Col3:17)

The character of earthly riches
-------------------------------

### Riches provide great opportunity for doing good

[EXO 35:29](https://ref.ly/Exod35:29); ; [1CH 29:6–29:7](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:6-1Chr29:7); ; [LUK 12:33](https://ref.ly/Luke12:33), [LUK 16:9](https://ref.ly/Luke16:9), [LUK 19:8](https://ref.ly/Luke19:8); ; [ACT 4:34–4:35](https://ref.ly/Acts4:34-Acts4:35)

### Riches do not satisfy

**[ECC 5:10](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:10)** *See also* [PRO 13:11](https://ref.ly/Prov13:11), [PRO 27:20](https://ref.ly/Prov27:20), [PRO 27:24](https://ref.ly/Prov27:24); [ECC 4:8](https://ref.ly/Eccl4:8), [ECC 6:7](https://ref.ly/Eccl6:7); [LUK 12:18](https://ref.ly/Luke12:18)

### Riches are insecure and uncertain

**[1TI 6:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17)** *See also* [JOB 1:13–1:19](https://ref.ly/Job1:13-Job1:19); [PRO 23:5](https://ref.ly/Prov23:5), [PRO 27:24](https://ref.ly/Prov27:24); [JER 48:36](https://ref.ly/Jer48:36); [MAT 6:19](https://ref.ly/Matt6:19); [1PE 1:18](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:18); [REV 18:14–18:20](https://ref.ly/Rev18:14-Rev18:20)

### Riches are for this life only

**[1JN 2:17](https://ref.ly/1John2:17)** *See also* [LUK 12:13–12:21](https://ref.ly/Luke12:13-Luke12:21); [1TI 6:6–6:8](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:6-1Tim6:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 24:1-2; Job 41:11; Psalms 50:12; Haggai 2:8; 1 Samuel 2:7; Ecclesiastes 5:19; 1 Chronicles 29:12; 2 Chronicles 1:12; Deuteronomy 8:17-18; Genesis 26:12-13; Deuteronomy 26:9-10; Proverbs 10:22; 2 Chronicles 25:9; Job 1:9-10; Psalms 112:1-3; Psalms 128:1-2; Proverbs 8:17-18; 1 Timothy 4:4-5; Matthew 14:19; Romans 1:21; Colossians 3:17; Exodus 35:29; 1 Chronicles 29:6-7; Luke 12:33; Luke 16:9; Luke 19:8; Acts 4:34-35; Ecclesiastes 5:10; Proverbs 13:11; Proverbs 27:20; Proverbs 27:24; Ecclesiastes 4:8; Ecclesiastes 6:7; Luke 12:18; 1 Timothy 6:17; Job 1:13-19; Proverbs 23:5; Jeremiah 48:36; Matthew 6:19; 1 Peter 1:18; Revelation 18:14-20; 1 John 2:17; Luke 12:13-21; 1 Timothy 6:6-8
* **Associated Articles:** 1325: God, the Creator (ID: `1325@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1330: God, the provider (ID: `1330@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1335: blessing (ID: `1335@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4035: abundance (ID: `4035@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5399: luxury (ID: `5399@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5446: poverty (ID: `5446@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5503: rich, the (ID: `5503@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5629: work, as ordained by God (ID: `5629@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5874: happiness (ID: `5874@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5890: insecurity (ID: `5890@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8352: thankfulness (ID: `8352@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8701: affluence (ID: `8701@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8810: riches, dangers of (id: 8810)

Material wealth can be a source of both physical and spiritual danger, against which believers are clearly warned to be on their guard.

Riches are spiritually dangerous
--------------------------------

### Love of riches a root of many evils

**[1TI 6:10](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:10)** *See also* [JOS 7:11](https://ref.ly/Josh7:11), [JOS 7:20–7:21](https://ref.ly/Josh7:20-Josh7:21); [1TI 3:3](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:3)

### They may lead to divided loyalty

**[MAT 6:24](https://ref.ly/Matt6:24)** parallel [LUK 16:13](https://ref.ly/Luke16:13) *See also* [MAT 4:9–4:10](https://ref.ly/Matt4:9-Matt4:10); [JAS 4:4](https://ref.ly/Jas4:4)

### They may hinder people's response to the gospel

[MAT 13:22](https://ref.ly/Matt13:22) parallels [MRK 4:19](https://ref.ly/Mark4:19), [LUK 8:14](https://ref.ly/Luke8:14); ; [MAT 19:21–19:22](https://ref.ly/Matt19:21-Matt19:22) parallels [MRK 10:21–10:22](https://ref.ly/Mark10:21-Mark10:22), [LUK 18:22–18:23](https://ref.ly/Luke18:22-Luke18:23)

### They may create false security

**[1TI 6:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17)** *See also* [JOB 31:24–31:28](https://ref.ly/Job31:24-Job31:28); [PSA 52:6–52:7](https://ref.ly/Ps52:6-Ps52:7); [PRO 11:28](https://ref.ly/Prov11:28); [JER 49:4](https://ref.ly/Jer49:4)

### They may make people proud

**[EZK 28:5](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:5)** *See also* [PSA 62:10](https://ref.ly/Ps62:10); [PRO 18:23](https://ref.ly/Prov18:23), [PRO 28:11](https://ref.ly/Prov28:11); [HOS 12:8](https://ref.ly/Hos12:8)

### They may cause unbelief and anxiety

**[ECC 5:12](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:12)** *See also* [JOB 20:17–20:20](https://ref.ly/Job20:17-Job20:20); [PRO 15:6](https://ref.ly/Prov15:6)

### They may lead people to forget God

**[PRO 30:8–30:9](https://ref.ly/Prov30:8-Prov30:9)** *See also* [DEU 8:10–8:14](https://ref.ly/Deut8:10-Deut8:14), [DEU 32:15](https://ref.ly/Deut32:15); [NEH 9:25–9:26](https://ref.ly/Neh9:25-Neh9:26); [HOS 13:6](https://ref.ly/Hos13:6)

Riches are physically dangerous
-------------------------------

### Working for them may cause excessive tiredness

**[PRO 23:4](https://ref.ly/Prov23:4)** *See also* [JHN 6:26–6:27](https://ref.ly/John6:26-John6:27)

### Enjoying them may lead to self\-indulgence

**[JAS 5:5](https://ref.ly/Jas5:5)** *See also* [HAG 1:3–1:5](https://ref.ly/Hag1:3-Hag1:5); [MAT 23:25](https://ref.ly/Matt23:25); [LUK 16:19–16:21](https://ref.ly/Luke16:19-Luke16:21); [1TI 6:8–6:9](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:8-1Tim6:9)

### Misusing them may foster oppression and injustice

**[LEV 19:13](https://ref.ly/Lev19:13)** *See also* [DEU 24:12–24:15](https://ref.ly/Deut24:12-Deut24:15); [PRO 22:16](https://ref.ly/Prov22:16); [ISA 1:23](https://ref.ly/Isa1:23); [JER 22:13](https://ref.ly/Jer22:13); [MIC 6:12](https://ref.ly/Mic6:12); [MAL 3:5](https://ref.ly/Mal3:5); [JAS 2:6](https://ref.ly/Jas2:6), [JAS 5:4](https://ref.ly/Jas5:4)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Timothy 6:10; Joshua 7:11; Joshua 7:20-21; 1 Timothy 3:3; Matthew 6:24; Luke 16:13; Matthew 4:9-10; James 4:4; Matthew 13:22; Mark 4:19; Luke 8:14; Matthew 19:21-22; Mark 10:21-22; Luke 18:22-23; 1 Timothy 6:17; Job 31:24-28; Psalms 52:6-7; Proverbs 11:28; Jeremiah 49:4; Ezekiel 28:5; Psalms 62:10; Proverbs 18:23; Proverbs 28:11; Hosea 12:8; Ecclesiastes 5:12; Job 20:17-20; Proverbs 15:6; Proverbs 30:8-9; Deuteronomy 8:10-14; Deuteronomy 32:15; Nehemiah 9:25-26; Hosea 13:6; Proverbs 23:4; John 6:26-27; James 5:5; Haggai 1:3-5; Matthew 23:25; Luke 16:19-21; 1 Timothy 6:8-9; Leviticus 19:13; Deuteronomy 24:12-15; Proverbs 22:16; Isaiah 1:23; Jeremiah 22:13; Micah 6:12; Malachi 3:5; James 2:6; James 5:4

## 8811: riches, believers' attitudes towards (id: 8811)

God entrusts some of his people with material wealth. If this is to be a blessing, it must be used in God\-honouring ways.

Believers may be blessed with riches
------------------------------------

### Riches can be a blessing from God

**[1CH 29:16](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:16)** *See also* [1CH 29:14–29:15](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:14-1Chr29:15); [JOB 1:9–1:102](https://ref.ly/Job1:9-Job1:102)KI [4:1](https://ref.ly/Job4:1); [MAT 8:20](https://ref.ly/Matt8:20); [LUK 6:20](https://ref.ly/Luke6:20), [LUK 16:20–16:22](https://ref.ly/Luke16:20-Luke16:22); [ROM 15:26](https://ref.ly/Rom15:26)

The attitude of believers towards riches
----------------------------------------

### They acknowledge that their riches come from God

**[1CH 29:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:12)** *See also* [ECC 5:19–5:20](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:19-Eccl5:20)

### They devote their riches to God's service

**[PRO 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Prov3:9-Prov3:10)** *See also* [1CH 29:1–29:9](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:1-1Chr29:9); [ACT 4:32–4:37](https://ref.ly/Acts4:32-Acts4:37)

### They support gospel work and workers

[LUK 8:1–8:3](https://ref.ly/Luke8:1-Luke8:3); ; [ACT 16:15](https://ref.ly/Acts16:15)

### They give to the poor

**[1JN 3:17](https://ref.ly/1John3:17)** *See also* [LUK 19:8](https://ref.ly/Luke19:8); [ACT 9:36–9:39](https://ref.ly/Acts9:36-Acts9:39); [GAL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Gal2:10)

### They are generous

**[1TI 6:18](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:18)** *See also* [DEU 15:10–15:11](https://ref.ly/Deut15:10-Deut15:11); [2CO 9:10–9:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:10-2Cor9:11)

### They remain humble

[JAS 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/Jas1:10-Jas1:11)

### They do not trust in riches

**[1TI 6:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17)** *See also* [JOB 31:24–31:28](https://ref.ly/Job31:24-Job31:28); [PRO 11:28](https://ref.ly/Prov11:28); [JER 49:4](https://ref.ly/Jer49:4)

### They do not set their heart on riches

**[PSA 62:10](https://ref.ly/Ps62:10)** *See also* [LUK 12:29–12:30](https://ref.ly/Luke12:29-Luke12:30)

Believers value heavenly riches most
------------------------------------

**[MAT 6:20–6:21](https://ref.ly/Matt6:20-Matt6:21)** *See also* [LUK 12:33–12:34](https://ref.ly/Luke12:33-Luke12:34); [1TI 6:18–6:19](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:18-1Tim6:19)

Examples of rich believers
--------------------------

### Abraham

[GEN 12:1–12:3](https://ref.ly/Gen12:1-Gen12:3), [GEN 13:1–13:2](https://ref.ly/Gen13:1-Gen13:2)

### Solomon

[2CH 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr1:11-2Chr1:12), [2CH 9:22](https://ref.ly/2Chr9:22)

### Hezekiah

[2CH 32:27–32:29](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:27-2Chr32:29)

### Job

[JOB 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/Job1:1-Job1:3)

### Joseph of Arimathea

[ISA 53:9](https://ref.ly/Isa53:9); ; [MAT 27:57–27:60](https://ref.ly/Matt27:57-Matt27:60) parallels [MRK 15:42–15:46](https://ref.ly/Mark15:42-Mark15:46), [LUK 23:50–23:54](https://ref.ly/Luke23:50-Luke23:54), [JHN 19:38–19:42](https://ref.ly/John19:38-John19:42)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Chronicles 29:16; 1 Chronicles 29:14-15; Job 1:9-102; Job 4:1; Matthew 8:20; Luke 6:20; Luke 16:20-22; Romans 15:26; 1 Chronicles 29:12; Ecclesiastes 5:19-20; Proverbs 3:9-10; 1 Chronicles 29:1-9; Acts 4:32-37; Luke 8:1-3; Acts 16:15; 1 John 3:17; Luke 19:8; Acts 9:36-39; Galatians 2:10; 1 Timothy 6:18; Deuteronomy 15:10-11; 2 Corinthians 9:10-11; James 1:10-11; 1 Timothy 6:17; Job 31:24-28; Proverbs 11:28; Jeremiah 49:4; Psalms 62:10; Luke 12:29-30; Matthew 6:20-21; Luke 12:33-34; 1 Timothy 6:18-19; Genesis 12:1-3; Genesis 13:1-2; 2 Chronicles 1:11-12; 2 Chronicles 9:22; 2 Chronicles 32:27-29; Job 1:1-3; Isaiah 53:9; Matthew 27:57-60; Mark 15:42-46; Luke 23:50-54; John 19:38-42

## 8812: riches, ungodly use of (id: 8812)

Ungodly people often make the possession of wealth a priority. They do not understand the true nature of wealth, and they do not realise that they will have to face God in judgment.

The ungodly grow rich
---------------------

**[PSA 73:12](https://ref.ly/Ps73:12)** *See also* [LUK 19:21](https://ref.ly/Luke19:21); [JAS 2:6–2:7](https://ref.ly/Jas2:6-Jas2:7)

The ungodly misuse riches
-------------------------

### They often obtain their riches unjustly

**[PRO 10:2](https://ref.ly/Prov10:2)** *See also* [1KI 20:5](https://ref.ly/1Kgs20:5); [PRO 13:11](https://ref.ly/Prov13:11), [PRO 21:6](https://ref.ly/Prov21:6), [PRO 22:16](https://ref.ly/Prov22:16); [JER 17:11](https://ref.ly/Jer17:11); [MIC 2:1–2:5](https://ref.ly/Mic2:1-Mic2:5), [MIC 6:10–6:12](https://ref.ly/Mic6:10-Mic6:12); [HAB 2:6–2:11](https://ref.ly/Hab2:6-Hab2:11)

### They accumulate and hoard their riches

**[PRO 11:26](https://ref.ly/Prov11:26)** *See also* [JOB 27:16–27:17](https://ref.ly/Job27:16-Job27:17); [PRO 3:27](https://ref.ly/Prov3:27); [ECC 2:26](https://ref.ly/Eccl2:26), [ECC 5:10–5:14](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:10-Eccl5:14); [JAS 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/Jas5:1-Jas5:3)

### They trust in their riches

**[PSA 49:5–49:6](https://ref.ly/Ps49:5-Ps49:6)** *See also* [JOB 31:24](https://ref.ly/Job31:24); [PSA 52:7](https://ref.ly/Ps52:7); [PRO 11:28](https://ref.ly/Prov11:28); [JER 9:23–9:24](https://ref.ly/Jer9:23-Jer9:24), [JER 48:7](https://ref.ly/Jer48:7)

The ungodly suffer difficulties because of their riches
-------------------------------------------------------

**[PRO 15:6](https://ref.ly/Prov15:6)** *See also* [PRO 10:16](https://ref.ly/Prov10:16), [PRO 13:7–13:8](https://ref.ly/Prov13:7-Prov13:8), [PRO 15:16–15:17](https://ref.ly/Prov15:16-Prov15:17)

The ungodly, like all people, must leave their riches to others
---------------------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 49:10](https://ref.ly/Ps49:10)** *See also* [PSA 39:6](https://ref.ly/Ps39:6); [ECC 2:18–2:21](https://ref.ly/Eccl2:18-Eccl2:21); [LUK 12:20](https://ref.ly/Luke12:20)

Jesus Christ warned the rich of their danger
--------------------------------------------

**[LUK 6:24](https://ref.ly/Luke6:24)** *See also* [LUK 12:15](https://ref.ly/Luke12:15), [LUK 16:25](https://ref.ly/Luke16:25)

Examples of the ungodly rich
----------------------------

### Nabal

[1SA 25:2–25:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam25:2-1Sam25:3)

### Rich young ruler

[MRK 10:17–10:23](https://ref.ly/Mark10:17-Mark10:23) parallels [MAT 19:16–19:24](https://ref.ly/Matt19:16-Matt19:24), [LUK 18:18–18:25](https://ref.ly/Luke18:18-Luke18:25)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 73:12; Luke 19:21; James 2:6-7; Proverbs 10:2; 1 Kings 20:5; Proverbs 13:11; Proverbs 21:6; Proverbs 22:16; Jeremiah 17:11; Micah 2:1-5; Micah 6:10-12; Habakkuk 2:6-11; Proverbs 11:26; Job 27:16-17; Proverbs 3:27; Ecclesiastes 2:26; Ecclesiastes 5:10-14; James 5:1-3; Psalms 49:5-6; Job 31:24; Psalms 52:7; Proverbs 11:28; Jeremiah 9:23-24; Jeremiah 48:7; Proverbs 15:6; Proverbs 10:16; Proverbs 13:7-8; Proverbs 15:16-17; Psalms 49:10; Psalms 39:6; Ecclesiastes 2:18-21; Luke 12:20; Luke 6:24; Luke 12:15; Luke 16:25; 1 Samuel 25:2-3; Mark 10:17-23; Matthew 19:16-24; Luke 18:18-25

## 8813: riches, spiritual (id: 8813)

Out of his infinite abundance God gives his people spiritual treasure. This, much more valuable than material wealth, is to be held in the highest esteem and sought after eagerly.

The riches of God
-----------------

### His wisdom and knowledge

**[ROM 11:33–11:36](https://ref.ly/Rom11:33-Rom11:36)**

### His mercy, love and grace

**[EPH 2:4](https://ref.ly/Eph2:4), [EPH 3:8](https://ref.ly/Eph3:8)** *See also* [ROM 2:4](https://ref.ly/Rom2:4); [EPH 2:7](https://ref.ly/Eph2:7)

### His riches in Jesus Christ

**[COL 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Col2:2-Col2:3)** *See also* [PHP 4:19](https://ref.ly/Phil4:19); [COL 1:27](https://ref.ly/Col1:27)

God bestows spiritual riches on believers
-----------------------------------------

### His precious word

[JOB 23:12](https://ref.ly/Job23:12); ; [PSA 19:9–19:10](https://ref.ly/Ps19:9-Ps19:10), [PSA 119:72](https://ref.ly/Ps119:72), [PSA 119:111](https://ref.ly/Ps119:111), [PSA 119:127](https://ref.ly/Ps119:127)

### A wealth of spiritual qualities

**[ISA 33:5–33:6](https://ref.ly/Isa33:5-Isa33:6)** *See also* [PRO 2:1–2:5](https://ref.ly/Prov2:1-Prov2:5), [PRO 15:6](https://ref.ly/Prov15:6); [2CO 9:10–9:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor9:10-2Cor9:11); [EPH 1:7–1:8](https://ref.ly/Eph1:7-Eph1:8); [COL 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Col2:2-Col2:3); [JAS 2:5](https://ref.ly/Jas2:5)

### A glorious gospel

**[2CO 4:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:7)**

### A costly kingdom

*See also* [MAT 13:44–13:46](https://ref.ly/Matt13:44-Matt13:46)

### A rich reward

**[RUT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Ruth2:12)** *See also* [1SA 26:23](https://ref.ly/1Sam26:23); [PSA 18:20](https://ref.ly/Ps18:20); [PRO 25:21–25:22](https://ref.ly/Prov25:21-Prov25:22); [COL 3:24](https://ref.ly/Col3:24); [HEB 10:35](https://ref.ly/Heb10:35)

### A heavenly inheritance

**[ACT 20:32](https://ref.ly/Acts20:32)** *See also* [EPH 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/Eph1:13-Eph1:14), [EPH 1:18](https://ref.ly/Eph1:18); [COL 1:12](https://ref.ly/Col1:12), [COL 3:24](https://ref.ly/Col3:24); [1PE 1:4](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:4)

Christians and spiritual riches
-------------------------------

### Christians need to appreciate their spiritual riches

**[EPH 1:7–1:8](https://ref.ly/Eph1:7-Eph1:8)** *See also* [EPH 1:18](https://ref.ly/Eph1:18); [REV 2:9](https://ref.ly/Rev2:9)

### Christians need to store up treasure in heaven

**[LUK 12:33](https://ref.ly/Luke12:33)** *See also* [MAT 6:20](https://ref.ly/Matt6:20); [LUK 12:20–12:21](https://ref.ly/Luke12:20-Luke12:21); [1TI 6:19](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:19); [HEB 11:26](https://ref.ly/Heb11:26); [REV 3:18](https://ref.ly/Rev3:18)

* **Associated Passages:** Romans 11:33-36; Ephesians 2:4; Ephesians 3:8; Romans 2:4; Ephesians 2:7; Colossians 2:2-3; Philippians 4:19; Colossians 1:27; Job 23:12; Psalms 19:9-10; Psalms 119:72; Psalms 119:111; Psalms 119:127; Isaiah 33:5-6; Proverbs 2:1-5; Proverbs 15:6; 2 Corinthians 9:10-11; Ephesians 1:7-8; James 2:5; 2 Corinthians 4:7; Matthew 13:44-46; Ruth 2:12; 1 Samuel 26:23; Psalms 18:20; Proverbs 25:21-22; Colossians 3:24; Hebrews 10:35; Acts 20:32; Ephesians 1:13-14; Ephesians 1:18; Colossians 1:12; 1 Peter 1:4; Revelation 2:9; Luke 12:33; Matthew 6:20; Luke 12:20-21; 1 Timothy 6:19; Hebrews 11:26; Revelation 3:18

## 8815: ridicule (id: 8815)

Laughing others to scorn, publicly humiliating or making fun of them in a demeaning manner.

* **Associated Articles:** 8816: ridicule, nature of (ID: `8816@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8817: ridicule, objects of (ID: `8817@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 8816: ridicule, nature of (id: 8816)

Scripture declares that ridicule of the weak, the poor and the godly is unacceptable. Those who ridicule them invite judgment upon themselves.

Warnings against ridicule
-------------------------

### Ridicule is foolish

**[PRO 11:12](https://ref.ly/Prov11:12)** *See also* [PRO 1:20–1:22](https://ref.ly/Prov1:20-Prov1:22), [PRO 14:6](https://ref.ly/Prov14:6), [PRO 14:9](https://ref.ly/Prov14:9)

### Ridicule creates trouble

**[PRO 9:12](https://ref.ly/Prov9:12)** *See also* [PRO 19:29](https://ref.ly/Prov19:29), [PRO 22:10](https://ref.ly/Prov22:10), [PRO 29:8](https://ref.ly/Prov29:8), [PRO 30:17](https://ref.ly/Prov30:17); [MAT 5:22](https://ref.ly/Matt5:22) *“Raca” probably means “empty\-head”, a term of derision.*

### Ridicule is a sign of the last days

**[2PE 3:3–3:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:3-2Pet3:4)** *See also* [JUD 1:18](https://ref.ly/Jude1:18)

Examples of ridicule
--------------------

[JDG 9:28–9:29](https://ref.ly/Judg9:28-Judg9:29), [JDG 9:38](https://ref.ly/Judg9:38); ; [1SA 17:41–17:44](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:41-1Sam17:44); ; [1KI 22:24](https://ref.ly/1Kgs22:24); ; [2KI 2:23–2:24](https://ref.ly/2Kgs2:23-2Kgs2:24), [2KI 18:23–18:25](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:23-2Kgs18:25); ; [NEH 2:19](https://ref.ly/Neh2:19), [NEH 4:1–4:3](https://ref.ly/Neh4:1-Neh4:3)

Ridicule associated with divine punishment
------------------------------------------

**[ISA 14:3–14:4](https://ref.ly/Isa14:3-Isa14:4)** *See also* [ISA 37:22–37:23](https://ref.ly/Isa37:22-Isa37:23); [JER 49:17](https://ref.ly/Jer49:17), [JER 50:13](https://ref.ly/Jer50:13); [EZK 36:1–36:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:1-Ezek36:7); [HAB 2:6](https://ref.ly/Hab2:6); [ZEP 2:15](https://ref.ly/Zeph2:15)**[MIC 2:3–2:4](https://ref.ly/Mic2:3-Mic2:4)** *See also* [DEU 28:37](https://ref.ly/Deut28:37); [1KI 9:6–9:9](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:6-1Kgs9:9) parallel [2CH 7:19–7:22](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:19-2Chr7:22); [JER 19:8](https://ref.ly/Jer19:8), [JER 24:9](https://ref.ly/Jer24:9); [EZK 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/Ezek5:14-Ezek5:15), [EZK 23:32](https://ref.ly/Ezek23:32), [EZK 22:3–22:5](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:3-Ezek22:5); [HOS 7:16](https://ref.ly/Hos7:16); [MIC 6:16](https://ref.ly/Mic6:16)

Prophets ridicule idolatry
--------------------------

**[1KI 18:27](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:27)** *See also* [ISA 41:7](https://ref.ly/Isa41:7), [ISA 41:21–41:24](https://ref.ly/Isa41:21-Isa41:24), [ISA 44:12–44:17](https://ref.ly/Isa44:12-Isa44:17), [ISA 46:1–46:2](https://ref.ly/Isa46:1-Isa46:2); [JER 10:3–10:5](https://ref.ly/Jer10:3-Jer10:5)

* **Associated Passages:** Proverbs 11:12; Proverbs 1:20-22; Proverbs 14:6; Proverbs 14:9; Proverbs 9:12; Proverbs 19:29; Proverbs 22:10; Proverbs 29:8; Proverbs 30:17; Matthew 5:22; 2 Peter 3:3-4; Jude 1:18; Judges 9:28-29; Judges 9:38; 1 Samuel 17:41-44; 1 Kings 22:24; 2 Kings 2:23-24; 2 Kings 18:23-25; Nehemiah 2:19; Nehemiah 4:1-3; Isaiah 14:3-4; Isaiah 37:22-23; Jeremiah 49:17; Jeremiah 50:13; Ezekiel 36:1-7; Habakkuk 2:6; Zephaniah 2:15; Micah 2:3-4; Deuteronomy 28:37; 1 Kings 9:6-9; 2 Chronicles 7:19-22; Jeremiah 19:8; Jeremiah 24:9; Ezekiel 5:14-15; Ezekiel 23:32; Ezekiel 22:3-5; Hosea 7:16; Micah 6:16; 1 Kings 18:27; Isaiah 41:7; Isaiah 41:21-24; Isaiah 44:12-17; Isaiah 46:1-2; Jeremiah 10:3-5
